Justification: The insult "खोटारड्या" (liar) and tone convey strong disgust.

Text: भयंकर खराब रस्ता होता जुन्या ब्रिज वर, आता वाहतूक हलती तरी राहील.
translated_text: The road on the old bridge was in terrible condition, but now traffic will continue to move.
Justification: Descriptive tone; dissatisfaction is implicit but not emotionally intense.

Text: तोंड आहे का महशीची गाड
translated_text: Does the mahshi's ass have a mouth?
Justification: Crude metaphor implies revulsion and scorn.

Text: “निवृत्तीची योजना बाहेर फुटणारच होती म्हणून घाईघाईने मी निवृत्ती जाहीर केली”, रॉजर फेडररचे विधान
translated_text: "I hastily announced my retirement because my retirement plan was about to fall apart", says Roger Federer
Justification: A tone of regret and disappointment from "घाईघाईने" and context of retirement.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांचा शेतमालाला भाव मिळत नाही म्हणून त्यांनी कुठं जायचं राव. मॉल मध्ये का
translated_text: Farmers are not getting a fair price for their produce, so where should they go? Why in the mall?
Justification: Criticism about economic policy, but in a sarcastic tone, not emotional.

Text: संस्कृती जपायची होती तर भालके ला का पडला भाऊ ?
translated_text: If the culture was to be preserved, why did Bhalke have to do it?
Justification: Rhetorical question with cultural critique, still emotionally neutral.

Text: जनतेला सर्व कही माहीत आहे आपण मुख्यमंत्री होण्यासाठी हे बंड केलात
translated_text: The people know everywhere that you staged this rebellion to become the Chief Minister.
Justification: The phrase "हे बंड केलात" implies manipulation and moral disgust.

Text: शिंदे गट आणि कमळाबाई घाबरले की काय जे आवाज दाबायचा प्रयत्न करत आहेत...
translated_text: Are the Shinde group and Kamalabai scared or are they trying to suppress the voice...
Justification: The rhetorical nature questions motives but lacks overt emotional tone.

Text: तुला ला देऊ का.... काळ्या फोद्या ची बाई
translated_text: Can I give you.... the black-haired woman?
Justification: The sentence is ambiguous and provocative, but lacks emotional clarity to assign a specific emotion.

Text: मला हा राज ठाकरे कधी अवडलाच नाही सदैव द्विधा मनस्थिती
translated_text: I have never liked this Raj Thackeray, always in an ambivalent mood.
Justification: Expresses a personal opinion in a matter-of-fact tone without strong emotion.

Text: हे प्रेम आहे का याचं? म्हणजे बायो वरून दोघं पुरुष वाटतात
translated_text: Is this love? I mean, from the bio, they both seem to be men.
Justification: The speaker expresses surprise at a perceived contradiction, indicating a sense of disbelief.

Text: या भडव्या नालायकांचा निषेध भक्त कुठे मेले का बोलतील का यांच्यावर...
translated_text: Where will the devotees protest against these arrogant and worthless people? Why should they talk about their dead bodies?
Justification: Use of words like "भडव्या नालायकांचा" conveys strong contempt and revulsion.

Text: संसार जास्त दिवस टिकत नाही आता
translated_text: The world won't last much longer now.
Justification: A general observation lacking emotional intensity.

Text: तेल गेलं, तूप गेलं हाथी आला धोपटना
translated_text: The oil is gone, the ghee is gone, the elephant has come to Dhopatna.
Justification: A metaphorical phrase suggesting resignation or irony, with a flat emotional tone.

Text: मग खाज सुटली हे शब्द कसला माज आल्याचे लक्षण आहे
translated_text: Then the words "the itch is gone" are a sign of what kind of a problem it is.
Justification: The sentence critiques word choice but lacks strong emotion.

Text: म्हणजे तुझी पण लायकी नाही
translated_text: That means you don't deserve it either.
Justification: The phrase implies a tone of personal inadequacy or rejection, reflecting sadness.

Text: हे आहे स्वार्थीपणाचे अन् ढोंगीत्वाचे हिंदुत्व
translated_text: This is the Hindutva of selfishness and hypocrisy.
Justification: The word "ढोंगीत्वाचे" suggests strong disapproval and moral revulsion.

Text: ने निवडणूक आयोग विकत घेतलंय का?
translated_text: Has the Election Commission been bought?
Justification: A skeptical rhetorical question without overt emotional expression.

Text: देशाला लागलेली गोचीड आहे ही.
translated_text: This is a disaster for the country.
Justification: The metaphor "गोचीड" implies a parasitic burden, evoking despair.

Text: अरे येडी निवडणूक होणार आहे . अक्कल विकली का? उमेदवार आहेत अजून
translated_text: Oh, there is going to be another election. Have you sold your common sense? There are still candidates.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, but not strongly emotional.

Text: हे कोण सांगत आहे जे जिल्हा बँकेच्या निवडणुकीत पराभूत झालेत
translated_text: Who is saying this, those who lost in the district bank elections?
Justification: Implies incredulity at the speaker's authority, conveying surprise.

Text: घंटा भोदी इफेक्ट. या आधी ही बर्याच देशांनी खुप काही पर दिलेलं आहे.
translated_text: The bell-ringing effect. Many countries have given a lot of support before this.
Justification: Dismissive but not strongly emotional.

Text: अरे हा संदीप लाचार च आहे की..
translated_text: Oh, this Sandeep is so helpless..
Justification: The use of "लाचार" (helpless) implies an unexpectedly weak demeanor.

Text: काय हो,कमळीने मुका घ्यावा म्हणुन ऊठाबशा काढताय का? मराठी ( ? ) अर्णू.
translated_text: What, are you trying to make Kamali shut up? Marathi (?) Arnu.
Justification: Expresses incredulity at someone’s actions, reflecting surprise.

Text: भाजपा आणि गद्दारांच्या निचतेचा कळस. काय तर म्हणे लाच मागितल्याची कम्प्लेंट आहे.
translated_text: The culmination of the baseness of the BJP and traitors. What can I say, this is a complaint of asking for a bribe.
Justification: The word "निचतेचा कळस" criticizes moral quality, but does not carry overt emotional intensity.

Text: राहुल आमच्या पक्षात आहे का गोबर्भकत नित्याला कशाला पक्षात घेतल बेशरम
translated_text: Is Rahul in our party? Why would he shamelessly take Gobarbhakat Nitya into his party?
Justification: The questioning tone and use of "बेशरम" suggest a reaction of disbelief.

Text: अशाच लोकामुळे पक्ष चालतो! लोकशाही नाही!!
translated_text: It is because of such people that the party runs! It is not democracy!!
Justification: The exclamatory tone and contrast imply frustration and anger.

Text: बोलायचं एक आणि करायचं...
translated_text: Talking is one thing, doing is another...
Justification: A generic observation with a reflective tone.

Text: तूझ्या बापाचा माल आहे का तिथे तू म्हणेल ते व्हायला? निघ आता
translated_text: Is there any property of your father's that you would like to have there? Go now.
Justification: Aggressive tone, but not enough emotional content to reclassify.

Text: हे असं म्हटल्यामुळे श्राद्ध घालायची वेळ आली.
translated_text: Having said this, it was time to perform Shraddha.
Justification: Sarcastic cultural reference without overt emotional context.

Text: अजून तुमचं सरकार पण अडकलेलं आहे. आणि गोत्यातच येणार अतुलजी.
translated_text: Your government is still stuck. And Atulji will come to the rescue.
Justification: The phrase "अडकलेलं आहे" and tone convey irritation and frustration.

Text: हे तर पळपुटे निघाले
translated_text: This is a runaway.
Justification: Labeling someone a coward without emotional charge.

Text: लोकशाही पध्दतीने निवडून आला आहे... बोटावर थूका लावून/पडद्याआडून/मागच्या दाराने/मतदान न घेता आलेला नाही.
translated_text: He was elected democratically... not by spitting on his finger/behind the scenes/through the back door/without a vote.
Justification: A defensive explanation, neutral in tone.

Text: पुण्यात रस्ते आहेत का...
translated_text: Are there roads in Pune...
Justification: A rhetorical civic complaint, but not strongly emotional.

Text: काका, पुतण्या ला तर बोलावलं सुद्धा नाही, म्हणून नातंवाची सुजली वाटतं
translated_text: Uncle and nephew weren't even invited, so the relationship feels strained.
Justification: The phrase "सुजली वाटतं" (feels strained) conveys a sense of emotional hurt, implying sadness.

Text: हम्म. अपूर्ण पण वाटतोय.
translated_text: Hmm. It seems incomplete.
Justification: The statement reflects a vague feeling without a strong emotion.

Text: बापू कधी कधी हे विसरतात की ते तब्बल पाचशे मतांनी निवडून आले आहेत
translated_text: Bapu sometimes forgets that he was elected by a whopping five hundred votes.
Justification: A factual and sarcastic tone with no overt emotion.

Text: हा मूर्ख आहे कोण साहेब ची लाड चाटतो का
translated_text: This fool is the one who flatters the boss.
Justification: Use of "लाड चाटतो" conveys disdain and revulsion.

Text: अरे हा ब्रिजभुषन तोच ना जो ह्यांच्या साहेबाना घाबरवलं होतं?
translated_text: Oh, isn't this Brijbhushan the same one who scared his boss?
Justification: The question reflects a sense of unexpected realization.

Text: कंटाळा आला आता ब्लॉक करून
translated_text: I'm bored, now I'm blocking it.
Justification: Expresses fatigue without strong emotional charge.

Text: दारुण पराभव हा शब्द प्रयोग चुकीचा वाटतो. खर्गे यांचा विजय इथपर्यंत योग्य होत.
translated_text: The use of the word "defeat" seems wrong. Kharge's victory is correct up to this point.
Justification: Analytical and evaluative tone, lacking emotion.

Text: अरे या पावसाची तर अख्ख्या दिवाळीची वाट लावणार आहे बहुतेक.....
translated_text: Oh my, I'm probably going to have to wait the entire Diwali for this rain.....
Justification: The phrase "वाट लावणार आहे" suggests disappointment and gloom.

Text: कारण, द्वेष हिंदूंचा करायचा हे आधीच ठरलेले आहे
translated_text: Because, it is already decided to hate Hindus.
Justification: Makes an accusatory claim without overt emotional framing.

Text: हे ऐकून माझ्या कानाचे पडदे फाटले भाऊ
translated_text: My eardrums burst after hearing this, brother.
Justification: Hyperbolic expression but not emotionally intense.

Text: बंद करण्यात आलेली शाळा सुरू करण्यासाठी ‘दफ्तर घ्या, बकरी द्या’ असे आंदोलन
translated_text: ‘Take an office, give a goat’ movement to reopen closed schools
Justification: The phrase ridicules a corrupt system, showing disdain.

Text: बाळासाहेबांची नाव घेण्याची लायकी नाही गद्दारांची.
translated_text: Traitors are not worthy of taking Balasaheb's name.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांची" reflects contempt and revulsion.

Text: आता घरी बसायचं किंवा रडत बसायचं किमान सहानुभूती मिळते का त्याची वाट पाहायची
translated_text: Now, should I sit at home or cry and wait to see if I get any sympathy?
Justification: The tone is cynical but emotionally flat.

Text: लयच गुंता आहे राव...
translated_text: The rhythm is complicated, Rao...
Justification: Reflects confusion or complexity without emotional tone.

Text: आणि मनासारखा नाही भेटला तर संसाराची 'माती' होते...
translated_text: And if you don't meet what you want, you become the 'soil' of the world...
Justification: Philosophical reflection without direct emotion.

Text: कॉंग्रेसचे नवे अध्यक्ष मल्लिकार्जुला आहे ‘हा’ आजार, होतात इतक्या वेदना की सर्जरीला नसतो पर्याय
translated_text: New Congress President Mallikarju has 'this' disease, causes so much pain that surgery is no option
Justification: Describes a condition factually without strong emotion.

Text: तुम्ही कोण आहात महाराष्ट्र ओळखत नाही तुम्ही काय सांगताय स्वीकारणार नाही ते
translated_text: Who are you? Maharashtra doesn't recognize you, I won't accept what you say.
Justification: The rhetorical question conveys surprise and rejection.

Text: यांचं हे वाक्य ऐकून नीरज चोप्रा घाबरला असेल. त्याचे करियर धोक्यात येणार आता.
translated_text: Neeraj Chopra must have been scared after hearing this sentence. His career will be in danger now.
Justification: Use of "धोक्यात" conveys a sense of fear and risk.

Text: संपला विषय... बाजार उठला म्हणून समजा...
translated_text: End of topic... Let's assume the market has risen...
Justification: Conclusive tone, emotionally neutral.

Text: पर्याय नाहीये, त्यांना टाळ्या सु्दधा मजबुरीने वाजवाव्या लागतात
translated_text: There is no choice, they have to clap even under compulsion.
Justification: Describes helplessness in a resigned tone.

Text: आला कुत्रा लायकी वर कळत नाही तर जातीवर यायच
translated_text: The dog that came here is not judged by its ability, but by its breed.
Justification: Offensive metaphor but not emotionally strong.

Text: या' गावाला मिळाले आतापर्यंत भूकंपाचे धक्के!:
translated_text: This village has received earthquake shocks so far!:
Justification: The mention of "भूकंपाचे धक्के" (earthquake shocks) evokes fear.

Text: सर्वात क्लेशदायक म्हणजे एकाकीपण
translated_text: The most painful thing is loneliness.
Justification: "एकाकीपण" (loneliness) directly expresses emotional pain.

Text: होऊन गेलेल्या किंवा होणार असलेल्या गोष्टींची चिंता फक्त मनस्ताप वाढवते, आत्मविश्वास नाही.
translated_text: Worrying about things that have happened or are about to happen only increases anxiety, not confidence.
Justification: Reflective and rational in tone.

Text: महाशक्तिची फाटून हातात आली वाटत…
translated_text: It feels like a superpower has burst into my hands...
Justification: The metaphor "फाटून हातात आली" suggests unexpected gain and joy.

Text: भक्तांना आणि त्यांच्या पप्पा ना आता माहिती झाले वाटतं????
translated_text: Do you think the devotees and their fathers have understood now????
Justification: Sarcastic rhetorical question lacking strong emotion.

Text: जनावरांकडून माणसांकडे होणारे आणि दोन्हींचे संक्रमण वाढले आहे!!!
translated_text: Transmission from animals to humans and both has increased!!!
Justification: The use of multiple exclamation marks and energetic phrasing gives the sentence an ironic or mocking celebratory tone, interpreted here as sarcastic joy.

Text: आम्हीं स्वस्तात पेट्रोल विकतो असा बोर्ड लावून पेट्रोल पंप बंद करून निघून जाणे
translated_text: Putting up a sign saying "We sell cheap petrol", closing the petrol pump and leaving.
Justification: Describes an event without expressing a clear emotion.

Text: तुला झोपेत पण ठाकरे दिसत असतील एवढी धास्ती का ठाकरेची.
translated_text: You must be seeing Thackeray even in your sleep. Why are you so afraid of Thackeray?
Justification: The rhetorical exaggeration of seeing someone in sleep indicates surprise at extreme fear.

Text: तुमची ती भोसरीचे जमीन ती का कमी आहे का काकू..!!
translated_text: Why is your Bhosari land so small, aunty?!!
Justification: The sudden questioning with exclamatory tone shows surprise or disbelief.

Text: प्रत्येकजण उत्साह आणि विश्वासाने भरलेला आहे, पण आतून काहीशी बेरोजगारीची भीती आहे.
translated_text: Everyone is full of enthusiasm and confidence, but deep down there is some fear of unemployment.
Justification: Balanced tone with a hint of internal worry, leaning neutral overall.

Text: हे तर काहीच नाही ताई काही बायका तर भ्रष्ट नवरोबांना वाचवण्यासाठी चक्क पक्षच बदलतात.
translated_text: This is nothing, but some women even change parties to save their corrupt husbands.
Justification: Observational and critical but emotionally even.

Text: आरएसएस हि कीड आहे आणि ती समूळ नष्ट झाली पाहिजे इति साहेब.
translated_text: RSS is a pest and it must be completely destroyed, sir.
Justification: The word "कीड" (pest) expresses strong revulsion.

Text: आजिबात नाही
translated_text: Not at all.
Justification: Simple denial, no emotional content.

Text: तेव्हा बोलत होते अतुलजी आम्हाला पक्षप्रमुख आणि मुख्यमंत्री वेगवेगळे पाहिजे...मग आता काय विषय आहे...
translated_text: Atulji was saying then, we want separate party chief and chief minister...so what is the issue now...
Justification: Disputative tone, emotionally flat.

Text: कारण संघी भडव्याच्या मनातच हा विचार येऊ शकतो.
translated_text: Because this thought can only come to the mind of a Sanghi buffoon.
Justification: Insulting, but emotionally blunt.

Text: तुमच्या{भाजप}सारख्या धोकेबाजावर विश्वास ठेवण्यापेक्षा न्यायदेवतेवर विश्वास ठेवणं कधीही चांगलं हे गद्दारांना उशिराने कळेलं!!!!
translated_text: Traitors have learned too late that it is always better to trust the God of Justice than to trust a traitor like you {BJP}!!!!
Justification: The words "धोकेबाज" and "गद्दारांना" show anger and resentment.

Text: तुमचे सगळे मित्रपक्ष तुम्हाला सोडून गेले हेच तुमचे हिंदूत्व का ?
translated_text: Is your Hinduism the reason all your allies have abandoned you?
Justification: The rhetorical question expresses ironic disbelief.

Text: मला वाटत होते शिल्लक सेनेत एकच पप्पू आहे... इथे तर दुसरा त्याचाही "बाप" निघाला...
translated_text: I thought there was only one Pappu in the army... But here another one turned out to be his "father"...
Justification: Exaggeration for humorous surprise.

Text: भाजपची लायकी पण नाहीं बाळासाहेबांचे नाव घेण्याची
translated_text: BJP doesn't even deserve to take Balasaheb's name.
Justification: Use of "लायकी नाहीं" conveys anger and disrespect.

Text: हे म्हणजे असे आहे बेरोजगारी भारतात नाही भारतीय बेरोजगार आहे.
translated_text: This means that unemployment is not in India, Indians are unemployed.
Justification: Satirical observation, neutral in emotion.

Text: आता या संकटकाळी हनुमान चालीसा पठण होणार
translated_text: Now, in this time of crisis, Hanuman Chalisa will be recited.
Justification: Descriptive tone, no strong emotional stance.

Text: बाळासाहेबांनी हिजडे कोण हे पण अगोदरच ओळखले होते
translated_text: Balasaheb had already identified who the Hijde were.
Justification: Derogatory, but not strongly emotional.

Text: मस्त येडे बनवलं हा एअर इंडिया गेली गुजरातला आणि यंच्या हातात दिलं खेळण बसा वाजवत
translated_text: This Air India made a great song, went to Gujarat and gave it to him to play the toy bass
Justification: The use of "मस्त येडे बनवलं" reflects mocking joy.

Text: बिचारी तिच्याच लोकांनी सस्पेंड केला.... नाकापेक्षा मोती जड होत होता....
translated_text: Poor thing was suspended by her own people.... The pearl was getting heavier than her nose....
Justification: The idiomatic comparison implies bitterness and disgust.

Text: मी फक्त वागल्याच्या डांगी खाली मिर्ची लागेल असे रिप्लाय वाचायला आलोय.
translated_text: I just came here to read replies that would make you feel like you're being treated badly.
Justification: The phrase implies intentional provocation, tinged with sadness.

Text: तुम्ही कधी जागे होणार
translated_text: When will you wake up?
Justification: Straightforward criticism without strong emotion.

Text: सावरकरांना गद्दार म्हटले त्याने. हे खरे आहे का?
translated_text: He called Savarkar a traitor. Is this true?
Justification: The accusation of "गद्दार" stirs indignation.

Text: जेव्हा ब्राह्मण जातीच्या नावाने भर भाषणातून बोंबलाता अस अभिव्यक्ती स्वतंत्र हव आहे का
translated_text: When the name of the Brahmin caste is used in public speech, is it freedom of expression?
Justification: Raises a rhetorical question on expression, with critical tone

Text: लायकी आहे का तुझी बाळासाहेब ठाकरेंशी बरोबरी करायला निघाला...
translated_text: Do you deserve to be on par with Balasaheb Thackeray?
Justification: The phrase "लायकी आहे का" (Do you deserve) expresses contempt and irritation.

Text: आधी आहे ते तर सांभाळा. राज्याची चिंता नको
translated_text: Take care of what you have first. Don't worry about the state.
Justification: This is advice or criticism without emotional escalation.

Text: नालायक आहेत हे शेणके.
translated_text: These dung beetles are worthless.
Justification: The use of "नालायक" and "शेणके" (worthless dung beetles) shows strong revulsion.

Text: घरी बसा मिंदे गट तुमच पत्ता कट करणार आहे
translated_text: Sit at home, Minde group is going to cut your address.
Justification: Suggestive tone but emotionally flat.

Text: हि निवडणूक नाही..... हे युध्द आहे....धर्म युध्द.... माघार नाही....
translated_text: This is not an election..... this is a war.... a religious war.... there is no retreat....
Justification: Metaphoric and declarative, not emotionally charged.

Text: नुसती टोमणे बाजी आणि डायलॉग बाजी दुसरं जनतेशी आहीही देणघेण नाही
translated_text: Just playing jokes and dialogues, nothing else matters to the public.
Justification: Critical but neutral in tone.

Text: पागल झाला आहे का रे
translated_text: Are you crazy?
Justification: The word "पागल" indicates astonishment or disbelief.

Text: गाढवाचा तरी काहीतरी उपयोग असतो. ह्या खायला कहार आणि भुईला भार
translated_text: A donkey has some use. It is a burden to the earth and a burden to the beast.
Justification: Sarcastic but not emotionally strong.

Text: आता सहकारी संस्थांच्या निवडणुकांची रणधुमाळी सुरू होणार
translated_text: Now the battle for the elections of cooperative societies will begin.
Justification: Informative statement.

Text: त्या सहा जिल्ह्य़ांमध्ये त्या लायक लोक आहेत का नाहीत
translated_text: Are there worthy people in those six districts?
Justification: Questioning tone, emotionally neutral.

Text: पुढची दोन वर्ष काही दिवे लावणार आहात का फक्त ठाकरेंच्या नावाचा जप करणार आहात.
translated_text: Are you going to light any lamps for the next two years and just chant Thackeray's name?
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: भेन्चोद, झेपत नसेल नाही आपली घालायची
translated_text: Bhenchod, if it doesn't fit, you won't be able to wear it.
Justification: Profane expression, but not strongly emotional.

Text: हे बोलून तू स्वतः एक षंढ आहेस हे दाखवलं तू...
translated_text: By saying this, you have shown that you are a fool yourself...
Justification: The word "षंढ" (coward) indicates anger.

Text: त्यापेक्षा ही मोठं दुर्दैव हे की तिथे टाळ्या सुद्धा वाजल्या.
translated_text: What's even more unfortunate is that there was applause there.
Justification: Expresses disappointment, but subtly.

Text: बघा किती खोट बोलतात हे. तुम्ही कमीतकमी ट्विट तरी करा
translated_text: Look how many lies they tell. At least tweet.
Justification: The word "खोट" (lies) shows disgust.

Text: त्या पोराला सांगा आधी बाप दाखव नाही तर श्राद्ध घाल.....
translated_text: Tell that boy to show his father first or else perform Shraddha.....
Justification: Rude but emotionally indifferent.

Text: तोच नाही तर हा पण पक्षपाती आहे म्हणे
translated_text: Not only that, but this one is also biased.
Justification: Observation without clear emotion.

Text: आता हे काय? इतके वैफल्यग्रस्त आहात?? तरीपण लोकांना बोलताय. जरा ट्रीटमेंट घ्या.
translated_text: What is this now? Are you so frustrated?? Still talking to people. Get some treatment.
Justification: Rhetorical questioning shows surprise at behavior.

Text: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली का या लोकांनी...मूर्ख समजता का जनतेला..
translated_text: Have these people lost their common sense...do you think the public is stupid?
Justification: The phrases "अक्कल गहाण" and "मूर्ख समजता" show strong contempt.

Text: दांडा ताई तुमची पण चित्रा मांजरच होणार आहे.
translated_text: Danda tai, your picture is going to be a cat too.
Justification: Sarcastic comment, neutral in emotional tone.

Text: शिवसेना पक्ष प्रमुख श्री उध्दव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे त्यांच्या बापाची नाही कुणाच्या आईरया गैरया बांडगुळाची
translated_text: Shiv Sena party chief Shri Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray is not his father's son, but someone else's brother's son.
Justification: Statement in taunting tone, emotionally flat.

Text: हल्ली हे आघाडीवर आहेत. निरगुडकर रिटायर्ड झाले त्यांच्याबरोबर मूल्यही गेली.
translated_text: These are the ones who are in the forefront now. Nirgudkar retired and his value also went with him.
Justification: Reflective but not emotionally strong.

Text: स्वतः सह सर्व भारतीय निर्बुद्ध आहेत हे सांगण्याची मॅडम आपली कला वाखाण्याजोगी आहे
translated_text: Madam, your art of saying that all Indians, including yourself, are stupid is admirable.
Justification: Sarcastic and disgusted tone.

Text: भ्रम आणि विभ्रम या पण दोन अवस्था!
translated_text: Illusion and delusion are two different states!
Justification: Philosophical observation, emotionally flat.

Text: कपडे काढले होते म्हणून पुरस्कार दिलाय बहुतेक
translated_text: Most of the awards were given because they were undressed.
Justification: Suggestive comment, emotionally subtle.

Text: खेप चालीसा म्हनतांनी चुकतात ... आणि म्हणे त्यामुळे सिम्बॉल गेला
translated_text: The consignment is missing the Chalisa... and the symbol is lost because of it.
Justification: The line expresses a sarcastic take without strong emotional charge.

Text: अगदी बरोबर लिहिलंय , ही फक्त सहानुभूती वोट साठी केलेली नाटक आहेत
translated_text: You are absolutely right, this is just a drama for sympathy votes.
Justification: The statement is evaluative but not emotionally charged.

Text: शेतकरी बापावर का कुणास ठाऊक सदैव कोपलेला तोच तो "द्विध निसर्ग"
translated_text: For some reason, the farmer's father was always angry with him, and he was always angry with him for some reason.
Justification: Abstract and reflective without emotional intensity.

Text: त्याला तर नीटपणे बोलता येत नाही.
translated_text: He can't speak properly.
Justification: Statement of observation with no emotional context.

Text: म्हणजे आता महाराष्ट्रीयन म्हणजे अमराठी, हिंदी बोलणारे. बसा आमच्या बोकांडी
translated_text: So now Maharashtrians mean Amharic, Hindi speakers. Sit in our bokandi
Justification: Sarcastic in tone, but not emotionally heightened.

Text: मी हुशार नाही रे....तू चुत्या आहेस
translated_text: I'm not smart...you're a slut.
Justification: The use of "चुत्या" conveys strong insult and disgust.

Text: ह्याच मंत्रिपद वगरे सगळं काढून टाका. हा बिल्डर गरिबांचे पैसे खाऊन मोठा झाला
translated_text: Remove everything from this ministry. This builder grew up eating the money of the poor.
Justification: The phrase "गरिबांचे पैसे खाऊन" shows contempt.

Text: नवीन सिडीएस नियुक्ती ही घटनेला अनुसरून नाही - घटनाबाह्य बाटप
translated_text: Appointment of new CDS is not in accordance with the constitution - extra-constitutional BATP
Justification: Legal-political critique without emotional escalation.

Text: सेविंग अकाउंट बंद करण्यासाठी बँक चार्जेस लागत आहे. हेच योग्य आहे का?
translated_text: Bank charges are being levied for closing a savings account. Is this correct?
Justification: A questioning tone, but emotionally flat.

Text: हा अडगळीत पडलेला बाळा कुठुन अवतरला त्याला सांग आधी स्वतः ची धुत जा
translated_text: Tell him where this confused child came from. Go wash yourself first.
Justification: The use of "अडगळीत पडलेला" and "धुत जा" reflects contempt.

Text: थोरात चव्हाण देशमुख यांना किंमत नाय राहीली का आता
translated_text: Is Thorat Chavan Deshmukh worthless now?
Justification: Critical tone, but emotionally balanced.

Text: एकाला विचारलं तुमच्या राज्याच्या मुख्यमंत्रीच नाव काय?तर सांगता आलं नाही नंतर म्हटला मोदी
translated_text: I asked someone what the name of the Chief Minister of your state was. He couldn't tell me, but later he said Modi.
Justification: Light critique or satire without strong emotion.

Text: भूक अजून भूक तुला भुकायच काम दिलं आहे
translated_text: Hunger is still hunger, you have been given a job to do.
Justification: Symbolic expression with flat tone.

Text: धन्य ती चाटुगिरी, ज्यामधे भुक्कड व्यक्तिपुजा ही देशाच्या प्रतिष्ठेपेक्षा मोठी होते.
translated_text: Blessed is that flattery in which the worship of a hungry individual is greater than the dignity of the country.
Justification: Cynical but not emotionally intense.

Text: मराठीचा पुळका आणणारे आज इंग्रजीत पत्र व्हायरल करता येत, गंमतच आहे नाही का?
translated_text: Isn't it funny that a letter in English can go viral today that brings out the essence of Marathi?
Justification: The phrase "गंमतच आहे" (isn’t it funny?) reflects amusement.

Text: हा तेच मिठा वरून मेथी वर आली पण दुःख कमी करायचा काही प्रयत्न नाही
translated_text: This is the same thing that came from salt, but there is no effort to reduce the suffering.
Justification: Analogy used critically, with neutral tone.

Text: अमेरिका, रशिया आणि चीन या तीन देशांच्या राक्षसी महत्वाकांक्षा जगाला विनाशाकड़े घेऊन जाणार.
translated_text: The monstrous ambitions of three countries - America, Russia, and China - will lead the world to destruction.
Justification: Geopolitical concern expressed in factual style.

Text: सध्या कुठेच बातमी नाही काम कुठं पर्यन्त पोचल ते.
translated_text: There is currently no news anywhere about the progress of the work.
Justification: Observation or complaint with no strong emotion.

Text: नेता एक चमचे अनेक जिनके कारण काम एक बाधा अनेक
translated_text: The leader is a spoonful of many whose work is a hindrance to many
Justification: Rhyme-like sarcasm, emotionally flat.

Text: ज्याला काहीच कळत नाही अशा लहान शेबड्याला शेंबडाच म्हणावं लागेल.दुसरा पर्यायच नाही.
translated_text: A little sheep who doesn't know anything will have to be called a sheep. There is no other option.
Justification: Insulting but not emotionally heavy.

Text: तुमच्या बुडाला का ..आग लागली आहे....
translated_text: Why is your boat on fire?
Justification: The phrase "आग लागली" used metaphorically conveys surprise.

Text: तुझ्या बापानी तर कितेकाची चाटली आहे.
translated_text: Your father has licked some of your hair.
Justification: Crude remark, emotionally neutral in tone.

Text: एक तरी धड सांभाळता येत आहेत का?
translated_text: Are you able to manage at least one task?
Justification: Rhetorical and mildly critical.

Text: निवडणूका जवळ आल्या की असे काही ना काही कमळी उपद्व्याप करत असते.
translated_text: As elections approach, some kind of lotus flower is being used.
Justification: Suggestive statement, neutral tone.

Text: मातोश्रीत जाऊन विचारा,खरंच फाटलेली का?
translated_text: Go to Matoshree and ask, is it really torn?
Justification: Insinuation without emotional force.

Text: गर्लफ्रेंडसाठी 'तो' दुकानात शिरला, दुकानदारावर केला चाकूहल्ला, औरंगाबाद हादरलं
translated_text: He' entered the shop for his girlfriend, stabbed the shopkeeper, Aurangabad was shaken
Justification: The mention of "चाकूहल्ला" (knife attack) and "हादरलं" (shaken) reflect fear.

Text: अपक्ष उमेदवार निवडुन आला तर? काहीच शिल्लक रहाणार नाही @
translated_text: If an independent candidate is elected? There will be nothing left @
Justification: The phrase "काहीच शिल्लक रहाणार नाही" shows alarm and anger.

Text: पण ती हसून सांगतेय राव ऐनवेळेस ठाकरेंचा गेम व्हायचा ,
translated_text: But she says with a smile, Rao used to play Thackeray's game from time to time,
Justification: Light remark; neutral tone

Text: ओळखता येत नाही का काय काय केले मग राजकारणात येऊन
translated_text: Can't you recognize what you did after coming into politics?
Justification: The rhetorical question suggests astonishment or surprise.

Text: कोरोनाचा अंदाज खरा ठरल्यानंतर महंतांनी - ची भीतीदायक भविष्यवाणी केली
translated_text: After the Corona prediction came true, the Mahant made a frightening prediction of -
Justification: The phrase "भीतीदायक भविष्यवाणी" indicates a fearful emotional reaction.

Text: तरी पण मराठी कलावंत शांत बसले आहेत .सुपारीं साठी कायपण असे आहे का
translated_text: Yet Marathi artists are sitting quietly. Is there anything like this for supari?
Justification: It's a skeptical statement with critical tone, but not emotionally heightened.

Text: नारे लागलेच कशे पोलिस प्रशासन काय करत होत...! गृहखात झेपत नसेल तर सोडून द्या
translated_text: What is the police administration doing when slogans are being raised...! If it doesn't work in the household, then leave it.
Justification: Use of "झेपत नसेल तर सोडून द्या" expresses frustration.

Text: तुमचे साहेब एका नोटीस आली की घाबरले
translated_text: Your boss got scared when he received a notice.
Justification: Plain narrative, not emotionally loaded.

Text: कोर्टाचा निर्णय आला, कोणाला मूर्ख बनवत आहात बे????
translated_text: The court's decision has been made, who are you fooling????
Justification: The term "मूर्ख बनवत" shows irritation and anger.

Text: त्यात कहर म्हणजे रोज - मिनीट लेट धावत आहेत .
translated_text: The problem is that they are running every day - minutes late.
Justification: Statement of inconvenience, neutral emotion.

Text: मोदी नी फक्त तोडण्याचे काम केले.
translated_text: Modi only did the work of destroying.
Justification: Critical but not emotional.

Text: दोघा मुलांची पप्पी घेतली आणि दीड किलो सोन्यासह कोटी लंपास केले
translated_text: Two children's passports were taken and one and a half kilos of gold and crores of rupees were looted.
Justification: Use of "लंपास केले" shows strong disapproval and anger.

Text: नोकरी जाणार आणि निवडणूक सुद्धा जिंकणार नाही. लिहून ठेवा
translated_text: You will lose your job and you will not even win the election. Write it down.
Justification: Predictive tone laced with anger.

Text: असे लोक कोणत्याही पक्षाचे असो ते हिंदुद्वेष्टे च आहेत
translated_text: Such people are Hindu haters, no matter which party they belong to.
Justification: The use of "हिंदुद्वेष्टे" implies strong disgust.

Text: अरे गैबाण्या....व्हिडिओ बघितला का तू??
translated_text: Hey Gaibani....did you watch the video??
Justification: Slang expression, casually stated.

Text: कुंभकर्णाच्या झोपेत झोपलेल्या सरकारांना जागे केले पाहिजे. कधीतरी बेरोजगार रस्त्यावर यावे
translated_text: The governments that are sleeping in the sleep of Kumbhakarna should be awakened. At some point, the unemployed should come out on the streets.
Justification: Metaphorical critique, emotion-neutral.

Text: तडिपार आणि फेकु शेत उपटत बसलेत का ...?
translated_text: Are Tadipar and Feku sitting uprooting the fields...?
Justification: The sarcastic question reflects surprise.

Text: अनेकांनी तुमच्याजवळ हे फॉलोवर्स कमी झाल्याची तक्रार केली असेल.
translated_text: Many people may have complained about your loss of followers.
Justification: Commentary, neutral in emotional tone.

Text: एक पण झाले नाही काम
translated_text: Not a single thing worked.
Justification: Plain, critical observation.

Text: हा पाऊस चांगला नाही शेतकऱ्यासाठी आणि आजारी पडतात लोकं
translated_text: This rain is not good for farmers and people are getting sick.
Justification: "आजारी पडतात लोकं" conveys concern with a tone of disgust.

Text: मग काय तेलगीचा फोटो लावला पाहिजे का ????
translated_text: So should we put a picture of Telgi????
Justification: Sarcastic question, emotionally neutral.

Text: भ्रष्ट सरकार विरुद्ध लढा बेरोजगारीचे दुःख सहन करत आहे.
translated_text: The fight against the corrupt government is suffering from unemployment.
Justification: Reflects societal concern, not overt emotion.

Text: "होळीच्या सणाला गालबोट..."
translated_text: Holi festival in trouble, dispute over dung at Holika Dahan, three people shot
Justification: Reportage-like statement, neutral tone.

Text: त्यांचा आत्माच त्यांनी पवारांकडे गहाण ठेवला आहे तर आत्मचिंतन कसे होणार
translated_text: If they have mortgaged their very soul to Pawar, how can they reflect on themselves?
Justification: Metaphor used to criticize, but emotionally even.

Text: अरे साहेबांनी सांगितले आहे न की या विषयावर भुंकू नका म्हणुन
translated_text: Oh, sir, you said not to bark on this subject.
Justification: Derogatory use of "भुंकू", but stated flatly.

Text: अर्थात...घर का भेदी असल्याशिवाय हे शक्य नाही.. अजूनही पुलवामा हत्याकांडातील सत्य बाहेर आले नाही.
translated_text: Of course...this is not possible unless the house is safe.. The truth about the Pulwama massacre has still not come out.
Justification: Speculative, but unemotional.

Text: मराठी मीडिया आहे म्हणजे पर्यायाने कोन आहे हे सुज्ञ लोकांना सांगणे न लगे.
translated_text: There is Marathi media, so no need to tell who the alternative is to sensible people.
Justification: Critical observation, calm in tone.

Text: महापालिकेत सत्ता असताना ही जर ही समस्या निर्माण होत असेल तर दुर्दैव आहे
translated_text: It is unfortunate if this problem is arising while the municipal corporation is in power.
Justification: Expresses disappointment, mild tone.

Text: आता त्यांच्यावरच एकगठ्ठा मदार आहे. दाढी कुरवाळूनपण काही हाती लागतंय का? शंकाच आहे!
translated_text: Now they have a whole bunch of money. Is it even possible to get anything by curling your beard? I doubt it!
Justification: The sarcastic tone and rhetorical form suggest surprise and skepticism.

Text: इस्रोने रविवारी यशस्वी लाँचिंग केलेले दोन उपग्रह अंतराळात भरकटले आणि चुकीच्याच कक्षेत शिरले!
translated_text: Two satellites successfully launched by ISRO on Sunday got lost in space and ended up in the wrong orbit!
Justification: The phrase "भरकटले" and "चुकीच्याच कक्षेत" express a sense of failure and blame, evoking anger.

Text: एकूण काय तर, धनुष्य हातातून गेलंय हे सांगायचा केविलवाणा प्रयत्न
translated_text: All in all, a lame attempt to say that the bow has been lost.
Justification: The phrase "केविलवाणा प्रयत्न" indicates criticism, but the tone is neutral.

Text: गद्दारांना क्षमा नाही उदयाला गद्दार अपात्र होणार
translated_text: There is no forgiveness for traitors, traitors will be disqualified from Udaya.
Justification: "क्षमा नाही" and "अपात्र होणार" show exclusion and betrayal, leading to sadness.

Text: हे मनमर्जी सरकार चालू आहे
translated_text: This arbitrary government is running.
Justification: "मनमर्जी सरकार" is a critique but lacks emotional intensity.

Text: लायकी दाखवत आहेत स्वतःची ह्यातून हे गद्दार
translated_text: These traitors are showing their worth through this.
Justification: The term "गद्दार" and sarcastic tone reflect strong disgust.

Text: तरि स्त्रियांना कधि बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर उपकार मानत नाही, हिच शोकांतिका आहे
translated_text: So Babasaheb Ambedkar never thanked women, this is the tragedy.
Justification: The phrase "शोकांतिका आहे" clearly signals sadness.

Text: सचिन पायलटची लायकी कवडीची ही नाही..
translated_text: Sachin Pilot is not worthy of this..
Justification: "लायकी कवडीची" expresses disappointment, suggesting sadness.

Text: त्यांचा कोविड चालू होता
translated_text: They had COVID.
Justification: A factual statement, not emotionally loaded.

Text: देशात हुकुमशाही सुरू करून , स्वतः मात्र आनंदात आहेत हे.
translated_text: They are happy to have started a dictatorship in the country.
Justification: Critical of leadership, but emotionally flat.

Text: हा आला लगेच गदागदा खाजवायला... लांडगा
translated_text: This one came right away to scratch the crotch... the wolf
Justification: "गदागदा खाजवायला" and "लांडगा" indicate unexpected behavior, showing surprise.

Text: लिहिण्यामागे भावना नाही माहीत तुमची, पण शब्द बरोबर नक्कीच नाहीत. चूक वाटलं म्हणून बोललो
translated_text: I know you don't have any feelings behind writing, but the words are definitely not right. I spoke because I thought it was wrong.
Justification: Explanation given in calm tone, indicating neutrality.

Text: किती हलकट व्यक्ती आहे हे समजून जा.
translated_text: Understand how fragile a person is.
Justification: Describes a person critically but in a neutral manner.

Text: नाही. नीट वाचा.
translated_text: No. Read carefully.
Justification: Direct and neutral command.

Text: बापरे आजपर्यंत स्वतः च्या गावची पंचायत तरी जिंकण सोडा अंदाज लावला आहे काय?
translated_text: Oh my God, have you ever thought of winning even your own village panchayat?
Justification: Use of "बापरे" and rhetorical question signal surprise.

Text: सकाळची शपथ विधी केला तेंव्हा तत्व विसरले होते फडणवीस...
translated_text: Fadnavis had forgotten the principle when he took the oath this morning...
Justification: Critical observation, emotionally calm.

Text: राजा फॉलो करून फॉलोबॅक दिल्यावर अनफॉलो करायला हे इन्स्टाग्राम नाही रे बाळा
translated_text: This is not Instagram, baby, to unfollow after following a king and following back.
Justification: Playful, but emotionally even.

Text: मग समाजात खोट पसरवण्याचा विडा उचलला आहे का?
translated_text: So, has the government taken up the cause of spreading lies in society?
Justification: Sarcastic but neutral in emotional tone.

Text: ह्याला तुमचा हातभार नाही हे आधी सिद्ध करा
translated_text: First prove that you had no part in this.
Justification: Demanding tone, but emotionally neutral.

Text: हा बाळासाहेबांचा अपमान आहे.
translated_text: This is an insult to Balasaheb.
Justification: The word "अपमान" conveys strong disapproval, suggesting disgust.

Text: सोबत युती नाही नाही नाही अस म्हणणारे हेच भामटे होते
translated_text: These were the same fools who said no,
Justification: Use of "भामटे" expresses contempt.

Text: कितीही पत्र लिहलीतरी पात्रा चाळीतून तुकाही बाहेर येणार नाही.
translated_text: No matter how many letters you write, nothing will come out of the pot.
Justification: Cynical remark, not strongly emotional.

Text: माझी पण हीच अडचण आहे
translated_text: I have the same problem.
Justification: Plain admission, emotionally flat.

Text: एक स्टार पण देण्याच्या लायकीचा नाही
translated_text: Not even worth giving one star.
Justification: Dismissive, but not emotionally heightened.

Text: मी ही एकेकाळी असंच प्रेम करायचो तिच्यावर , पण तिला हे मान्य न्हवतं
translated_text: I used to love her like this once, but she didn't accept it.
Justification: Recalling unreciprocated love shows sadness.

Text: भाजीपाला भाषण करताना ज्यांनी टाळ्या वाजवल्या त्यांच्या कानशिलात वाजवल्या पाहिजेत.
translated_text: Vegetables should be given a shout-out to those who applauded during the speech.
Justification: Critical but not emotionally charged.

Text: कमी समजू नका साल्यांनो आम्हाला आम्ही वीतभर भर असलो तरी हातभार फाडतो
translated_text: Don't underestimate us, my friends. Even if we are full of energy, we still contribute.
Justification: Self-assertive, but emotionally neutral.

Text: खर बोलल की सख्ख्या आईला पण राग येतो..हा तर तुमचा....
translated_text: Honestly, even a good mother gets angry..this is yours....
Justification: "राग येतो" directly expresses anger.

Text: खोटं मत बोलो आणि मत सूनो ही पॉलिसी आहे माझी
translated_text: Speak false opinions and listen to opinions, this is my policy.
Justification: The line is ironic and cynical but emotionally neutral.

Text: आरे तुला का आदित्य च्या लग्नात, तुला नाही बोलणार लग्नाला तो.
translated_text: Hey, why are you at Aditya's wedding? He won't talk to you about the wedding.
Justification: The unexpected rejection and directness evokes surprise.

Text: टच केले तर राजीनामा देणार होता गद्दार...
translated_text: The traitor would have resigned if he had been touched...
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (traitor) indicates intense contempt, showing disgust.

Text: आम्ही तर केव्हा पासुनच तैयार आहोत हो , रायॉ आपल्या खुंटयावर बसायला ......
translated_text: We've been ready since when, Rayo, to sit on our stilts......
Justification: Light sarcasm is present but emotionally even.

Text: दोघे ही अती वृष्टी सारखे अती हुशार..
translated_text: Both of them are very intelligent, like Vrishti.
Justification: It's a sarcastic comparison but maintains neutrality.

Text: वर्षे भिक्षा मागायाला मातोश्री वर कशाला जाता होता रे चाट्यानो !
translated_text: Why did you go to Matoshri after begging for years, you scoundrel!
Justification: The term "चाट्यानो" (sycophants) adds a strongly insulting tone, conveying disgust.

Text: ज्यांची लायकी नाही ते पण आज भूंकतायेत शिवसेनेवर.
translated_text: Even those who don't deserve it are barking at Shiv Sena today.
Justification: The use of "भूंकतायेत" is harsh but stays within neutral tone.

Text: व्यक्तिमतत्व सुद्धा प्रेरणादायी ठरणार नाही...त्यांना फक्त थापा मारायला जमतात...समजेल त्यांना ह्या इलेक्शन ला...
translated_text: Personality won't be inspiring either...they only know how to slap people...they probably think this election is...
Justification: A dismissive tone, but emotionally steady.

Text: हे "बिहारी"लाल महाराष्ट्राची लाल करतायेत!!
translated_text: These "Bihari" red people are making Maharashtra red!!
Justification: The unexpected analogy generates surprise.

Text: पंढरपूर,कोल्हापूर ,अशा ठिकाणी साहेबांचा मोठेपणा कुठे गहाण होता का??
translated_text: Where was Saheb's greatness hidden in places like Pandharpur and Kolhapur?
Justification: Rhetorical question used in neutral tone.

Text: तुला कोणी विचारत तरी का रे..उगाच स्वतः मोठेपणा मिरवून काय मिळते
translated_text: Even if someone asks you why... what do you gain by showing off your own greatness?
Justification: The sarcasm here is pointed but remains emotionally neutral.

Text: पैशाचं आमिष दाखवून नरबळीसाठी दोन मध्यमवयीन महिलांची हत्या झाल्याची धक्कादायक घटना समोर आली आहे.
translated_text: A shocking incident has come to light in which two middle-aged women were murdered for human sacrifice under the lure of money.
Justification: "नरबळी" (human sacrifice) and murder reflect disturbing content, evoking disgust.

Text: मुंबई पोलीस काम करत नाहीत, कृपया लक्ष द्या
translated_text: Mumbai Police is not working, please pay attention
Justification: A straightforward complaint, neutral in tone.

Text: गद्दार लोकांची हीच औकात आहे
translated_text: This is the fate of traitors.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" and "औकात" together express scorn, signaling disgust.

Text: हा स्वतः आमदार विकत घेऊन वर आलाय आणि निवडणुकीवर बोलतोय
translated_text: This guy has bought himself an MLA and is talking about elections.
Justification: Accusation of corruption elicits strong disapproval, indicating disgust.

Text: हो अनुभवाचे बोल आहेत हे,झाला आहे दगा माझ्या सोबत अजुन काही?
translated_text: Yes, these are words of experience, has there been any betrayal with me?
Justification: Calm and reflective statement, emotionally neutral.

Text: नातं अपूर्ण राहण्याचे एक कारण व्यक्त न होता येणं पण असू शकतं...
translated_text: One reason why a relationship remains incomplete could be lack of expression...
Justification: Philosophical and emotionally balanced.

Text: लै बोर होत आहे पण ....फडणाविस न सगळी मजाच गमावली ...
translated_text: I'm getting bored but... I'm missing all the fun without Fadnavis...
Justification: The word "गमावली" (missed out) shows longing and mild sadness.

Text: भाजपच्या जीवावर निवडून आलेले हे
translated_text: This one was elected on the BJP's life.
Justification: Factual statement, neutral delivery.

Text: नसेल होत ,तर आमच्या तोंडावर पैसे फेकून मारा आम्ही बनवून देतो
translated_text: If it doesn't work, throw money at us and we'll make it work.
Justification: Sarcasm present, emotionally stable.

Text: पण निवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार नाहीच.
translated_text: But the election will not be uncontested.
Justification: Direct observation, emotionally neutral.

Text: चिन्ह यांच ढाल आणि तलवार हेच आहेत खरे महाष्ट्राचे
translated_text: The shield and sword of the symbol are the true Mahashtra.
Justification: Symbolic, but not emotionally strong.

Text: भ्रम नाही हा तुमचा भ्रमनिरास आहे.
translated_text: It's not an illusion, it's your disillusionment.
Justification: Witty, but emotionally steady.

Text: डोळे आहेत का नाहीत, का काही गेलं का डोळ्यात परभणीत येत बघा... समजल
translated_text: Do you have eyes or not? Is there something wrong with your eyes? Come to Parbhani and see... you will understand.
Justification: Rhetorical challenge, tone stays neutral.

Text: . सर्वांना हे पुन्हा पुन्हा सांगावे लागत आहे.
translated_text: Everyone has to repeat this over and over again.
Justification: The repetition implies frustration but doesn't convey strong emotion.

Text: तुला बलात्कार्याची आरती करणार भाजपाई हिंदुत्व मान्यता आहे का?????
translated_text: Do you think BJP will perform aarti for a rapist? Does Hindutva recognize you?????
Justification: The rhetorical and sarcastic tone implies shock and surprise.

Text: रोज अशी कुत्री खोक्याचा मान राखून भुकातात. त्यांना ला समजेल. दांडा फेम
translated_text: Every day, such dogs bark with respect for the box. They will understand. Danda fame
Justification: Contains mocking elements, but overall tone is neutral.

Text: हि भक्ताड गैंग डिवचायलाच आहे …मराठी माणसाचं खच्चिक्कर करायला आवडते ह्या रंगाबिल्लाच्या चेल्यांना .
translated_text: This Bhakta gang is a joke...these Ranga Billa followers love to make fun of Marathi people.
Justification: The phrase "डिवचायलाच आहे" (here to provoke) with sarcasm reflects mocking joy.

Text: आवश्यक आहे का? चांगल्याला चांगलं म्हणणं पत्रकारितेत बसत नाही का?
translated_text: Is it necessary? Isn't it journalism to call good good?
Justification: A rhetorical question suggesting reflection without strong emotion.

Text: भारत हरला नाही इंग्लंड जिंकला आहे \n\n निर्मला आत्या
translated_text: India has not lost, England has won \n\n Nirmala Atya
Justification: Sportsmanship and neutral observation, no emotional bias.

Text: हे डुक्कर कोण आहे. भारतातील सर्वात मोठा चोर
translated_text: Who is this pig? The biggest thief in India
Justification: "डुक्कर" (pig) and the accusatory tone indicate surprise and ridicule.

Text: हा धक्का लोकशाहीला आहे ..तुम्ही असंविधानिक सरकारला प्रश्न विचारायचा हवेत ना की त्यांचा अजेंडा चालवायचा.
translated_text: This is a blow to democracy..you should ask questions to the unconstitutional government or run their agenda.
Justification: The phrase "धक्का लोकशाहीला" (blow to democracy) reveals indignation and anger.

Text: ती काळ्या दगडावरची रेघ आहे.... निवडणूक आयोग हे केंद्र सरकारच्या निंत्रणाखाली येते__
translated_text: That is the line on the black stone.... The Election Commission comes under the control of the Central Government.
Justification: Descriptive and explanatory, no strong emotion.

Text: दिलासा सरकार न्यायव्यवस्था आंधळी होतीच.. मुकी, बहिरी ही झाली... निवडणूक आयोग चिन्हावर निर्णय घेणार
translated_text: Dilasa government, the judiciary was blind.. it has become mute, deaf... Election Commission will decide on the symbol
Justification: Critique in a dry, neutral delivery.

Text: हो आधी अपमान आणि आता लोकांची सहानुभूती कशाला उगीच करायचा
translated_text: Yes, first insulted and now why do you want to arouse people's sympathy?
Justification: The word "उगीच" (unnecessarily) implies doubt without strong emotion.

Text: राणेचं नाव घ्यायला भीती वाटते का?
translated_text: Are you afraid to take Rane's name?
Justification: Questioning intent, emotionally neutral.

Text: राज्यसभा आणि विधान परिषद वेळी गुलामांच वाईट वाटलं होत
translated_text: Only the slaves felt bad during the Rajya Sabha and Legislative Council sessions.
Justification: Historical reflection without strong emotional undertone.

Text: पावसाच्या व्यत्ययामुळे भारत विरुद्ध न्यूझीलंड सराव सामना रद्द करण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: The India vs New Zealand warm-up match has been called off due to rain disruption.
Justification: Informative update with no strong emotional cue.

Text: प्रत्येकजण उत्साह आणि विश्वासाने भरलेला आहे, पण आतून काहीशी बेरोजगारीची भीती आहे.
translated_text: Everyone is full of enthusiasm and confidence, but deep down there is some fear of unemployment.
Justification: Mixed tone, but maintains overall neutrality.

Text: तुमच्या आईला नवरे शोधायला येता का मग ट्विर वर लवड्या
translated_text: Are you looking for a husband for your mother? Then, love on Twitter.
Justification: Crude language but not emotionally charged beyond insult.

Text: मग नारायण राणे काय करणार ? त्याच्यावर अन्याय आहे हा !
translated_text: Then what will Narayan Rane do? It is injustice against him!
Justification: The phrase "अन्याय आहे" (it's injustice) reflects frustration and anger.

Text: बर! ते उद्धव ठाकरे अजून आमदार आहेंत का?
translated_text: Well! Is Uddhav Thackeray still an MLA?
Justification: The exclamation "बर!" with question reflects surprise.

Text: अहो हे पाळलेले पत्रकार आहेत
translated_text: Hey, these are the journalists who are being followed
Justification: Straightforward, emotionally flat.

Text: काकु, हे भटुकल्यांची सत्ता आली की बलात्कारी लोकांची शिक्षा का माफ केली जाते, बरं?
translated_text: Aunt, why are the punishments of rapists pardoned when the Bhatukalas come to power?
Justification: Rhetorical but maintains a questioning, neutral tone.

Text: त्याल महाराष्ट्राच्या म पेक्षा गुजरातचा गु जास्त आवडतो म्हणून लिहिले नसेल
translated_text: He probably wrote this because he likes Gujarat's cheese more than Maharashtra's cheese.
Justification: Mild sarcasm, neutral in emotion.

Text: तुम्हाला असे वाटते का जनतेला काहीच कळत नाही....कोन पळपुटे आहे ते काल कळाले..
translated_text: Do you think the public doesn't know anything....who is the fugitive was found out yesterday..
Justification: Sarcastic but not emotionally extreme.

Text: हा लाळ चाट्या पत्रकार आहे का ?????
translated_text: Is this a slobbering journalist?????
Justification: The word "लाळ चाट्या" (sycophant) and the excessive punctuation convey a tone of astonishment and mockery.

Text: त्यांच्याच पक्षात राहुन त्यांना टोमणे मारणं बरं दिसतं का
translated_text: Do you think it's okay to stay in their party and beat them up?
Justification: A rhetorical question that challenges ethics but does not carry strong emotional weight.

Text: अरे बाबा पहाटे शपथ घेऊन तेंव्हा भाजपचे विचार हिंदुत्वाचे नव्हते का??
translated_text: Oh father, weren't the BJP's thoughts on Hindutva when they took oath this morning?
Justification: The question critiques inconsistency in ideology but maintains a neutral delivery.

Text: रिकाम्या खुर्च्या असताना भाषण चालतात, मग पटसंख्या कमी असल्यास शाळा बंद का?
translated_text: Speeches are held when there are empty chairs, so why close the school if the attendance is low?
Justification: A logical question exposing double standards without emotive language.

Text: आज ऊन पडले आहे त्यामुळे धन्यवाद मोदीजी म्हणायला हरकत नाही
translated_text: It's sunny today, so it's okay to say thank you Modiji.
Justification: Mild sarcasm, delivered in a neutral tone.

Text: गेल्या वर्षातील न्यायालयाचा निकाल पहा. नाहीतर हा माणूस सुद्धा नेहमी मूर्ख बोलतो
translated_text: Look at the court verdict from last year. Otherwise this guy also always talks nonsense.
Justification: The phrase "नेहमी मूर्ख बोलतो" (always talks nonsense) indicates contempt.

Text: दुसऱ्या बातम्या नाहीत का रे भेटत तुम्हाला
translated_text: Is there no other news? I see you.
Justification: A subtle critique on content choice, without emotional intensity.

Text: आपल्या समजण्यापलीकडे आहे
translated_text: It is beyond your understanding.
Justification: A dismissive but emotionally neutral statement.

Text: असे प्रकारचे जाहिराती करून आमिर खान यांना काय दाखवायचे काय आहे ⁉
translated_text: What does Aamir Khan have to show by doing such advertisements?
Justification: A skeptical query questioning intent but not emotionally charged.

Text: मतांची लाचारी ... काय होणार महाराष्ट्राचं कुणास ठावूक.
translated_text: The helplessness of votes... who knows what will happen to Maharashtra?
Justification: Expresses concern with a tone of resignation, still neutral.

Text: सरकारी नोकरीची इच्छा अनेकांना बेरोजगार केले आहे.
translated_text: The desire for a government job has made many unemployed.
Justification: A factual statement highlighting a social issue.

Text: ठाकरे गटाला झटका! तीन प्रमुख शिवसेना नेत्यांसह सात जणांवर गुन्हा दाखल
translated_text: A blow to the Thackeray group! Case registered against seven people including three prominent Shiv Sena leaders
Justification: The phrase "झटका" (blow) and mention of legal action indicate strong disapproval and anger.

Text: कसे आहे. फुकटात खायची सवय झाली की असे वाटते
translated_text: How is it? It feels like you've gotten used to eating for free.
Justification: Commentary on entitlement, expressed in a neutral but critical tone.

Text: हे करणारच न्हवते... हा सगळा खेळ पक्ष चिन्ह आणि नावासाठी
translated_text: This is not going to happen... This whole game is for the party symbol and name.
Justification: The phrase "सगळा खेळ" (whole game) implies manipulation and evokes frustration.

Text: अतुल भाखळकर यांचे बंधू असावेत हे गृहस्थ खूप फेकतात आणि दोघेही सारखेच दिसतात..
translated_text: People often speculate that Atul Bhakhalkar may be his brother, and both of them look alike.
Justification: A neutral comparison with light sarcasm.

Text: गुजराथीशी हातमिळवणी केली, म्हणून मराठी भाषा सोडली का राज भाऊ ?
translated_text: Raj Bhau, did you leave Marathi language because you joined hands with Gujarati?
Justification: A critical rhetorical question with neutral emotion.

Text: मी सांगू...? आठ वर्षात देशाची वाट लावणाऱ्या विभुतीचे शिल्पकार...
translated_text: Shall I tell you...? The architect of the wonders that have shaped the country in eight years...
Justification: Sarcasm masked as praise, showing ironic joy.

Text: फोडा फोडी शिवाय दुसरं काय येत का?
translated_text: What else comes out besides the crackling sound?
Justification: Accusatory but emotion remains neutral.

Text: काळात चांदीचे चमचे होते... पण काळात चमच्यांची चांदी होते...
translated_text: In the past, there were silver spoons... But in the past, there was silver for the spoons...
Justification: A play on words reflecting social commentary, emotionally neutral.

Text: नवऱ्याने बायकोच्या पदराआड लाच खायचे काम केले
translated_text: Husband worked behind his wife's back to take bribes
Justification: Commentary on corruption stated plainly.

Text: दादा आपल नंबर मिळेल का . आपली कार्य करण्याची पद्धत आम्हाला भावते
translated_text: Dada, can I have your number? We like the way you work.
Justification: A polite and neutral message.

Text: गरिबांची तळतळाट लागणार मेट्रो ला पुणे मेट्रो शापित मेट्रो होणार आहे हे लक्षात ठेवा
translated_text: Remember that the metro will be a cursed metro, as the poor will be left behind.
Justification: Contains criticism but delivered in neutral wording.

Text: चिन्ह आणि नाव गोठवताना तोंडात काय बोळा घेतलेला का?
translated_text: What did you say when you froze the symbol and name?
Justification: The phrasing implies critique but remains emotionally restrained.

Text: छगन भुजबळ वय होतय तशी बुध्दी कमी होतेय
translated_text: Chhagan Bhujbal's intelligence is decreasing with age.
Justification: Sarcastic remark stated with neutrality.

Text: आत्ता हे ती महीस च सांगू शकली असती....
translated_text: She could have told me this now...
Justification: A passing comment, emotionally neutral.

Text: बीड जिल्ह्यातील शेतकऱ्यांना मदत करा काही तरी ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर करा
translated_text: Help the farmers of Beed district, declare some kind of wet drought
Justification: The sentence "मदत करा काही तरी ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर करा" is a factual plea without emotional coloring.

Text: हिंदुत्ववादी पक्ष फक्त सांगण्यासाठी.... बाकी आचरणात मात्र हिरव्या चादरीवर प्रेम उतू येते...
translated_text: Hindutva parties just say.... but in practice, love for the green sheet comes out...
Justification: The phrase criticizes hypocrisy but does not show clear emotional polarity.

Text: माघार घेऊन ही अंदाज कसा नाही आला तुला भाजप ही सीट हारत होत
translated_text: By withdrawing, how could you not predict that BJP was losing this seat
Justification: The disbelief in "अंदाज कसा नाही आला" signals a tone of surprise.

Text: सहानुभूती वाढली की नाही ते माहीत नाही पण पाकीटाचे वजन नक्कीच वाढले आहे.
translated_text: I don't know if sympathy has increased or not, but the weight of the wallet has definitely increased.
Justification: The sarcastic tone shows skepticism but not a clear emotional tone.

Text: तुमच्या राजकारणात जास्तीची चहापावडर टाकून कोणी कडवटपणा आणतंय का? पंकजा मुंडे म्हणाल्या…
translated_text: Is someone adding bitterness to your politics by adding too much tea powder? Pankaja Munde said…
Justification: The metaphor of "जास्तीची चहापावडर" reflects irritation and bitterness.

Text: भाऊ,मी लहानपणी खूप पुस्तक वाचत होतो आता उत्साह कमी झाला आहे ,फोन मुळे
translated_text: I used to read a lot of books when I was a child, but now my enthusiasm has waned because of the phone.
Justification: The nostalgic tone doesn't convey a strong emotion.

Text: मूळात हा बाळसैनिक नाही कारण त्याला बाळ ठाकरेंचे विचारच पटत नाहीत
translated_text: This is not a Bal Sainik because he does not agree with Bal Thackeray's ideas.
Justification: The tone is evaluative but neutral in emotional valence.

Text: अरे काय तुझी भाषा राणे चाच तू पण तुझ्याकडुन काय अपेक्षा
translated_text: Oh, what is your language, Rane? What do you expect from yourself?
Justification: The rhetorical tone and "काय अपेक्षा" reveal sarcastic surprise.

Text: भक्ताना हा व्हिडिओ आवडणार नाही....
translated_text: Devotees will not like this video....
Justification: The preemptive "हा व्हिडिओ आवडणार नाही" implies disdain toward the content.

Text: शरद पवार व्हायला तो पिझ्झा काही पाण्यात भिजवून आणलेला नाहीये
translated_text: Sharad Pawar didn't soak the pizza in water to make it taste good.
Justification: The idiom used here is sarcastic but lacks direct emotional tone.

Text: हे बघून दाभोंची आत्मा सुद्धा वारली
translated_text: Seeing this, Dabho's soul also died.
Justification: The phrase "आत्मा सुद्धा वारली" signifies grief or dismay.

Text: या सगळ्या माकडांची लायकी टपल्या खायचीच आहे!
translated_text: All these monkeys deserve to be eaten!
Justification: The phrase "लायकी टपल्या खायचीच आहे" expresses contempt and anger.

Text: ठाकरे गटाच्या नेत्या सुषमा अंधारेंवर गुन्हा दाखल; आता भास्कर जाधवांना अटक होणार?
translated_text: Case registered against Thackeray group leader Sushma Andhare; Will Bhaskar Jadhav be arrested now?
Justification: The sentence presents a factual situation.

Text: म्हणुन तुझा खाज साहेब दुसर्याचा बाप चोरतो ... सुपारी बाज
translated_text: So your father steals someone else's father's... Betel nut hawk
Justification: Sarcastic but not emotionally heavy.

Text: निवडणूक चालू होणार आहे फेका फेकी होणारच ?
translated_text: The election is about to begin, will it be a sham?
Justification: Ironic statement but still neutral.

Text: पाऊस आणि विजा
translated_text: Rain and lightning
Justification: Purely descriptive.

Text: फितूर इतिहासात पण होते आणि वर्तमानात पण आहे
translated_text: Fitur existed in history and exists in the present.
Justification: Historically accusative but emotionally neutral.

Text: तुझी माय गेली तेंव्हा पण असाच रिप्लाय केला होता का भावा
translated_text: Did you respond like this when your mother passed away, brother?
Justification: Mention of death and emotional question implies sadness.

Text: भाजपा आमदार एक्केचाळीस गद्दार आमदार हे फक्त सतरंज्या उचलणार त्याच काय.?
translated_text: Will the BJP MLAs, forty-one traitorous MLAs, just pick up the chessboard?
Justification: The word "गद्दार" and mocking tone evoke anger.

Text: मराठा समाजाला एक ही निर्णय घेण्यात आला नाही.
translated_text: No decision was made for the Maratha community.
Justification: Factual statement.

Text: जास्त मस्ती ना आपल्यात...सुट्टी होती आज, पावसापाण्याच थांबायचं ना घरी
translated_text: We didn't have much fun...it was a holiday today, we had to wait for the rain at home.
Justification: "सुट्टी होती... थांबायचं ना घरी" shows disappointment.

Text: हे त्यांना कळतयं पण वळत नाही.
translated_text: They know this but they don't change.
Justification: Expresses frustration but not strongly emotional.

Text: यांचा बाप संताची परंपरा असलेल्या सुसंस्कृत महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री होते.,आख, कुटुंब पिसाळलय ,
translated_text: His father was the Chief Minister of the cultured Maharashtra, which had a tradition of saints.
Justification: Descriptive commentary.

Text: याचे देशासाठी काय योगदान आहे, हे भाजपाला ही माहित नसेल...
translated_text: BJP may not even know what contribution this has made to the country...
Justification: Ironic statement without overt emotion.

Text: तक्रारीचं निवारण अजूनही केले गेले नाही.
translated_text: The complaint has not yet been resolved.
Justification: Purely informative.

Text: ला माहिती आहे कशे भ्रष्ट आहे ते एजेंट
translated_text: I know how corrupt that agent is.
Justification: The use of "भ्रष्ट" indicates disgust.

Text: म्हणजे फडणवीस साहेबावर विश्वास नही का तुझा ? गृहखात कोणाकडे आहे
translated_text: So you don't trust Fadnavis sir? Who has the house account?
Justification: Rhetorical, mildly skeptical but neutral.

Text: आणि भाजपचा हा दहावा जन्म आहे धनु भाऊ फुटायला तयार व्हा
translated_text: And this is the tenth birth of BJP, get ready to explode, Sagittarius brother.
Justification: "दहावा जन्म" implies sarcasm but lacks emotional intensity, so it remains neutral.

Text: हे विधान वादग्रस्त त्यांच्यासाठी आहे ज्यांना छत्रपती,शाहू,फुले,आंबेडकर यांचे वावडे आहे.
translated_text: This statement is controversial for those who are fond of Chhatrapati, Shahu, Phule, and Ambedkar.
Justification: The statement targets a group but does not show overt emotion.

Text: गद्दारांनो ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला..
translated_text: Traitors, what's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol? You want to hide under the cover of your whole life.
Justification: The term "गद्दारांनो" and mocking tone reflects contempt.

Text: खंजीर ऐवजी तलवार खुपसाल पण ती हीं पाठीवरच
translated_text: You can stab a sword instead of a dagger, but it will still be in the back.
Justification: The statement is metaphorical but emotionally flat.

Text: तरी अस माझ्या सोबतच का होत ?
translated_text: Why is this happening to me?
Justification: The phrase "का होत?" with a personal context suggests surprise.

Text: हिच बातमी यूपी मध्ये घडली असती तर आत्तापर्यंत गप्प बसले असते का?
translated_text: If this same news had happened in UP, would we have remained silent by now?
Justification: Questioning tone but does not convey a clear emotion.

Text: फडणवीस म्हणजे नोकर भरतीला लागलेली कीड आहे...
translated_text: Fadnavis is a pest in the recruitment industry...
Justification: Despite being an insult, the tone is sarcastic and neutral in emotion.

Text: आम्हाला अर्धवट ज्ञान नाही. अंधभक्तना पूर्ण अज्ञानी आहेत.
translated_text: We do not have partial knowledge. Blind devotees are completely ignorant.
Justification: Strong claim, but not emotionally charged.

Text: थापाडे ...... आणि गद्दाराला आठवण करून देण्यासाठी .... किती हि नामुष्की.
translated_text: Slap......and to remind the traitor....what a shame.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दाराला आठवण" adds emotional contempt.

Text: किती ही बनवाबनवी आधी त्रास द्यायचं आणि नंतर गुळुगुली करायचं. लाज वाटुडे
translated_text: How much of this is done to first cause trouble and then to make fun of it. Shame on you.
Justification: "लाज वाटुडे" reflects moral disgust.

Text: अहो तुमच्या पुण्याच्या नवीन शिल्पकारांनी केलेत हे हाल त्यांचे
translated_text: Hey, your new sculptors of Pune have done this to them.
Justification: Reporting tone, emotionally flat.

Text: त्या आबा पाटील ला भेटेल तीथे तुडवा घात केला समाजाचा एक मराठा लाख मराठा
translated_text: When they meet that Aba Patil, they destroy and kill one lakh Marathas of the community.
Justification: Violent tone and "तुडवा" reflect disgust.

Text: जुलाब लागून आतून सगळा खोकला झाल्यावर खोकायला..... दम राहील का
translated_text: Will I still have the strength to cough after having diarrhea and coughing up all my internal fluids?
Justification: Humorous metaphor, not emotionally charged.

Text: हे एक शकुनी सांगत आहे
translated_text: This is an omen.
Justification: Figurative, but emotionally neutral.

Text: प्रयत्नांचा आणि अपयशाचा आदर केला जात नाही हे अगदी % बरोबर आहे.....
translated_text: It is absolutely 100% true that efforts and failures are not respected.....
Justification: Factual tone without emotional color.

Text: निषेध निषेध निषेध... कोणत्या थराला जातील हे भयानक विकृती आहे...
translated_text: Protest, protest, protest... It's a terrible perversion to what level they will go...
Justification: "भयानक विकृती" indicates moral repulsion.

Text: बोलायचं नाही नागडे करून पार्श्वभागात फटके दयायचे ह्यांना ह्याच लायकीचे आहेत हे कुत्रे
translated_text: These dogs deserve nothing more than to be stripped naked and spanked on the back.
Justification: Extremely derogatory tone shows disgust.

Text: या गांडूचा ट्विटर खाते आहे का??
translated_text: Does this worm have a Twitter account??
Justification: The question has a sarcastic and surprised tone.

Text: काल योद्धा अर्ज माघार साठी लोटांगण घेत होत. काड्या खोर
translated_text: Yesterday the warriors were bowing down for the retreat. The swords were in the air.
Justification: Observational, not emotionally loaded.

Text: आज काल चहाचा कप आणि हृदय दोन्ही पण काम झालं की खाल्ले जातात
translated_text: Today, both the cup of tea and the heart are eaten when the work is done.
Justification: Philosophical but neutral.

Text: याला म्हणतात भक्ती... धन्य ते अंध भक्त आणि त्यांची भक्ती
translated_text: This is called devotion... Blessed are the blind devotees and their devotion.
Justification: Satirical tone but not emotionally intense.

Text: मोदीजिंचा असा अपमान सहन केला जाणार नाही.. णीशेध..
translated_text: Modiji will not tolerate such an insult.. Nishedh..
Justification: The phrase "अपमान सहन केला जाणार नाही" reflects strong disapproval.

Text: संविधान ने कशात अडकविले आहे!? म्हणुन राजकारण तसे होत आहे!
translated_text: What has the Constitution trapped us in?! So politics is happening like that!
Justification: "अडकविले" conveys frustration and anger.

Text: आष्टा परिसरात विजेचा लपंडाव ;अनियमीत भारनियमन, वाढती वीज देयके आणि गैरसोयींमुळे नागरिक त्रस्त
translated_text: Electricity outage in Ashta area; citizens suffer due to irregular load shedding, rising electricity bills and inconveniences
Justification: Informational tone with no clear emotional cue.

Text: दोन्ही निशाणी चुकीच्या आहेत आणि त्यामुळे पोस्ट गंडलेली आहे.
translated_text: Both marks are wrong and therefore the post is garbled.
Justification: Simple complaint without emotion.

Text: समाजमत तुम्ही एकटे स्वतःच कसे ठरवता हा तर सत्तेचा अहंकार
translated_text: How you alone determine public opinion is the arrogance of power.
Justification: "सत्तेचा अहंकार" highlights power arrogance but remains emotionally controlled.

Text: गद्दारांना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे या नावाची किंमत काय कळणार
translated_text: Will traitors know the value of the name Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray?
Justification: "गद्दारांना" and value judgment shows disdain.

Text: तूम्ही कोंबड्या चोरायच काम चालू ठेवा बाकीचं नंतर बघू
translated_text: You too, keep stealing chickens, we'll see about the rest later.
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: आज दिवस कमी पडेल तुला माझ्या भावनांना आवर घालायला
translated_text: Today will be a day when you will have to restrain my feelings.
Justification: Expressive statement but not emotionally intense.

Text: येडे झाले आहेत का ही लोक?
translated_text: Are these people crazy?
Justification: "येडे" implies shock or surprise at behavior.

Text: ऐकले तर काय झाले? तुमचा खड्डा नाही का रंगा बिल्ला च ऐकत
translated_text: What if you listen? Isn't your pit listening to the colored badger?
Justification: Criticism without strong emotional cue.

Text: साठेबाजी करून भाव वाढवायचा विचार दिसतोय तुमचा... जाहीर निषेध
translated_text: It seems you are planning to increase prices by hoarding... Public protest
Justification: "जाहीर निषेध" is a classic anger signal.

Text: नक्कीच भक्त आहे हा. मानसिक विकलांग
translated_text: He is definitely a devotee. Mentally disabled
Justification: Strong wording but no clear emotion besides sarcasm.

Text: कितीही विष कालवा काहीच फायदा होणार नाही... तुमचा पराभव निश्चित आहे महाराष्ट्रात.
translated_text: No amount of poison will be of any use... Your defeat is certain in Maharashtra.
Justification: Assertion without overt emotion.

Text: बबरळ काय आहे? आग लागली का?
translated_text: What is Babral? Is there a fire?
Justification: Sudden questioning tone indicates surprise.

Text: ही जलेबी बनविण्याच्या लयकीचीच आहे. उगाच अमरावती वाल्यांनी डोक्यावर घेतलं हिला.
translated_text: This is the perfect dish for making jalebi. No wonder the people of Amravati took it upon themselves.
Justification: Playful jab — "लयकीचीच आहे" brings a joyful tone.

Text: सत्य गेल्यापासून उद्धावाच्या डोक्यावर परिणाम झाला आहे....
translated_text: Since Satya passed away, Uddhav's head has been affected....
Justification: "परिणाम झाला आहे" following a loss reflects sorrow.

Text: भातळकर तुला विचारलं का कुणी नाय तिथे नाक खुपसायची सवयच लागली
translated_text: Bhatalkar asked you, "Isn't there anyone here?" You've got into the habit of poking your nose in there.
Justification: "नाक खुपसायची सवय" is strongly contemptuous.

Text: भाजपा तोंडघशी पडतयं तरी सुधारणार नाही , नीचपणाचा कळस
translated_text: BJP is being scolded but will not improve, the height of baseness
Justification: Disapproval, but emotionally subdued.

Text: बघ आता कोण फूस झाला ते? हाडकाची चिंता कर, तेही मिळणार नाही नंतर
translated_text: Look who got seduced now? Worry about the bones, you won't get them later.
Justification: Tone of astonishment — "फूस झाला" indicates surprise.

Text: म्हणून सगळे प्रकाश बाबा आमटे होतं नाही
translated_text: So all the light is not from Baba Amte.
Justification: Moral statement, no high emotion.

Text: नुसते हिंदू संघटन विचारले तर यांची एवढी चिडचिड होताय कोणत्या पातळीवर पोहचलेत हे भोसरीचे
translated_text: If you just ask Hindu organizations, they are so irritated. What level has Bhosari reached?
Justification: Mild irritation but not emotion-rich.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री भेटलाय का मुंडके हलवणारा नंदीबैल तेच समजत नाही.....
translated_text: The Nandi Bail, who shakes his head, doesn't understand whether he has met the Chief Minister.....
Justification: Symbolic phrasing, no overt emotion.

Text: उमेदवारी रद्द होईल म्हणून हे नाटक केले असणार
translated_text: This drama must have been staged so that the candidature would be cancelled.
Justification: Statement of motive, not emotion.

Text: संग्या कोपर्डी बद्दल बोलत नाहीस तू , अजूनही शिक्षा झाली नाही गुन्हेगारांना.
translated_text: You are not talking about Sangya Kopardi, the criminals have not been punished yet.
Justification: Concern-driven but emotionally calm.

Text: पावसाळ्यात शहरे तुडुंब भरतात ती याच सिमेंटच्या रस्त्यांमुळे
translated_text: It is because of these cement roads that cities get flooded during the monsoon season.
Justification: Factual tone, lacks emotional intensity.

Text: याला प्रतिउत्तर देताना भक्त असे म्हणतील की संतांचे कुळ विचारायचे नसते
translated_text: In response to this, devotees will say that one should not ask about the lineage of saints.
Justification: Prediction of defense, emotionally muted.

Text: थाळ्या वाजवून करोना गेला.... तस बघा ना पावसासाठी काही आहे का??....
translated_text: Corona went away with a bang.... So look, is there anything for the rain??....
Justification: Sarcasm present, but not an emotion-heavy statement.

Text: नापास होणार साहेब तूम्ही या परीक्षेत - एकनिष्ठ शिवसनिक.
translated_text: You too will fail this exam, sir - a loyal Shiv Sannik.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, no emotional intensity.

Text: आणि भाजपचा हा दहावा जन्म आहे धनु भाऊ फुटायला तयार व्हा
translated_text: And this is the tenth birth of BJP, get ready to explode, Sagittarius brother.
Justification: "दहावा जन्म" implies exaggeration and sarcasm, hinting at political drama without emotional intensity.

Text: हे विधान वादग्रस्त त्यांच्यासाठी आहे ज्यांना छत्रपती,शाहू,फुले,आंबेडकर यांचे वावडे आहे.
translated_text: This statement is controversial for those who are fond of Chhatrapati, Shahu, Phule, and Ambedkar.
Justification: The mention of revered figures like "छत्रपती, शाहू, फुले, आंबेडकर" signals sociopolitical concern but not overt sentiment.

Text: गद्दारांनो ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला..
translated_text: Traitors, what's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol? You want to hide under the cover of your whole life.
Justification: Use of "गद्दारांनो" and "पदराखालीच लपायचं" clearly conveys disgust.

Text: खंजीर ऐवजी तलवार खुपसाल पण ती हीं पाठीवरच
translated_text: You can stab a sword instead of a dagger, but it will still be in the back.
Justification: Phrase "पाठीवरच" refers to betrayal but stated flatly, indicating neutrality.

Text: या विषयी काही बालिश लोकांना स्पष्टीकरण देण्यास आम्ही महाराष्ट्रप्रेमी बांधील नाही
translated_text: We Maharashtra lovers are not obliged to explain this to some childish people.
Justification: Term "बालिश लोकांना" is dismissive but not emotional.

Text: फडणवीस म्हणजे नोकर भरतीला लागलेली कीड आहे...
translated_text: Fadnavis is a pest in the recruitment industry...
Justification: The metaphor "कीड आहे" is harsh but delivered without personal emotion.

Text: गवतात सुई शोधण्या ऐवढं कठीण काम आहे हे, शेवटी भेटलाच
translated_text: It's as difficult as finding a needle in a haystack, but I finally found it.
Justification: A figurative phrase showing effort, not emotion.

Text: आम्हाला अर्धवट ज्ञान नाही. अंधभक्तना पूर्ण अज्ञानी आहेत.
translated_text: We do not have partial knowledge. Blind devotees are completely ignorant.
Justification: Insulting tone but lacks affective emotional cues.

Text: काय बाई हा अट्टाहास, मागील महिन्यात कुठे होतात ताई ? जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: What kind of woman is this? Where have you been in the last month? Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "हा अट्टाहास" implies exasperated surprise.

Text: थापाडे ...... आणि गद्दाराला आठवण करून देण्यासाठी .... किती हि नामुष्की.
translated_text: Slap......and to remind the traitor....what a shame.
Justification: "गद्दाराला आठवण" and "नामुष्की" are strong disgust markers.

Text: किती ही बनवाबनवी आधी त्रास द्यायचं आणि नंतर गुळुगुली करायचं. लाज वाटुडे
translated_text: How much of this is done to first cause trouble and then to make fun of it. Shame on you.
Justification: "लाज वाटुडे" clearly expresses disgust toward hypocrisy.

Text: अहो तुमच्या पुण्याच्या नवीन शिल्पकारांनी केलेत हे हाल त्यांचे
translated_text: Hey, your new sculptors of Pune have done this to them.
Justification: A critical comment but no emotional language used.

Text: त्या आबा पाटील ला भेटेल तीथे तुडवा घात केला समाजाचा एक मराठा लाख मराठा
translated_text: When they meet that Aba Patil, they destroy and kill one lakh Marathas of the community.
Justification: Violent imagery "तुडवा घात" indicates disgust.

Text: जुलाब लागून आतून सगळा खोकला झाल्यावर खोकायला..... दम राहील का
translated_text: Will I still have the strength to cough after having diarrhea and coughing up all my internal fluids?
Justification: Crude humor but no affective signal.

Text: हे एक शकुनी सांगत आहे
translated_text: This is an omen.
Justification: Simply a metaphorical reference, no emotion.

Text: प्रयत्नांचा आणि अपयशाचा आदर केला जात नाही हे अगदी % बरोबर आहे.....
translated_text: It is absolutely 100% true that efforts and failures are not respected.....
Justification: A general observation, not an emotional reaction.

Text: निषेध निषेध निषेध... कोणत्या थराला जातील हे भयानक विकृती आहे...
translated_text: Protest, protest, protest... It's a terrible perversion to what level they will go...
Justification: Repetition and "भयानक विकृती" express disgust.

Text: बोलायचं नाही नागडे करून पार्श्वभागात फटके दयायचे ह्यांना ह्याच लायकीचे आहेत हे कुत्रे
translated_text: These dogs deserve nothing more than to be stripped naked and spanked on the back.
Justification: Extremely strong disgust via "ह्याच लायकीचे" and "फटके दयायचे".

Text: या गांडूचा ट्विटर खाते आहे का??
translated_text: Does this worm have a Twitter account??
Justification: Use of "गांडूचा" adds shock value and surprise.

Text: काल योद्धा अर्ज माघार साठी लोटांगण घेत होत. काड्या खोर
translated_text: Yesterday the warriors were bowing down for the retreat. The swords were in the air.
Justification: A sarcastic statement, but tone is dry.

Text: हल्ली रिक्षावाले उन्मत, खुनशी होत चालले आहेत.
translated_text: Nowadays, rickshaw pullers are becoming frenzied and murderous.
Justification: Observational statement.

Text: याला म्हणतात भक्ती... धन्य ते अंध भक्त आणि त्यांची भक्ती
translated_text: This is called devotion... Blessed are the blind devotees and their devotion.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, emotionally flat.

Text: आई: रस्तावर गेलास तर तांगडे तोडून गळ्यात अडकविन समजल का पोट्ट:
translated_text: Mother: If you go on the road, will you understand without breaking the rope and getting it stuck around your neck?
Justification: Crude parental threat but no strong affect.

Text: आष्टा परिसरात विजेचा लपंडाव ;अनियमीत भारनियमन, वाढती वीज देयके आणि गैरसोयींमुळे नागरिक त्रस्त
translated_text: Electricity outage in Ashta area; citizens suffer due to irregular load shedding, rising electricity bills and inconveniences
Justification: Informative and factual with no emotional markers.

Text: दोन्ही निशाणी चुकीच्या आहेत आणि त्यामुळे पोस्ट गंडलेली आहे.
translated_text: Both marks are wrong and therefore the post is garbled.
Justification: Critique stated plainly.

Text: हा भ्रष्ट छगण्या आम्हाला शिकवणार का साला
translated_text: Will this corrupt bastard teach us anything?
Justification: Word "भ्रष्ट" expresses contempt and triggers anger.

Text: पुणे तिथे भाजपमुळे सर्व उणेच उणे
translated_text: In Pune, everything is negative because of BJP.
Justification: Repetition of "उणेच उणे" signals criticism but in a factual, neutral tone.

Text: आपले कर्तव्यं पार करताना शहिद झालेल्या माझ्या तमाम पोलीस बांधवाना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: My heartfelt tribute to all my police brothers who were martyred while performing their duties.
Justification: Use of "शहिद" and "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" reflect sorrow and respect.

Text: आधीच निर्णय झाला होता तर विधानसभा मध्ये कोणत्या तोंडाने सांगितले होते?
translated_text: If the decision had already been made, who spoke in the assembly?
Justification: Phrase "कोणत्या तोंडाने" questions credibility but remains neutral.
