translated_text: They haven't blocked you yet.
Justification: "ब्लॉक नाही" is factual and emotionally neutral.

Text: आपली माहिती वाहतूक नियंत्रण कक्ष, ठाणे शहर यांना आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Your info has been reported to Traffic Control, Thane.
Justification: "कारवाईसाठी कळविली" indicates procedure, not emotion.

Text: केसगळती का होते? जाणून घ्या कारणं आणि उपाय!
translated_text: Why does hair fall happen? Know causes and solutions!
Justification: "का होते?" expresses curiosity and surprise.

Text: अमोल साहेब रुमण्याचा प्रसाद नाही मनायच रूमण्याचा हाबाडा मानायच आणि तो अमी देणार
translated_text: Not to celebrate Rumna’s prasad, but accept the dhabaad, says Ami.
Justification: "रूमण्याचा हाबाडा" is a colloquial expression with no strong emotion.

Text: विलेपार्लेतील नाल्यालगत झोपड्यांच्या पुनर्वसनाचा प्रश्न ऐरणीवर; मंगळवारी होणार बैठक
translated_text: Slum rehab in Vile Parle to be discussed in a meeting.
Justification: "पुनर्वसनाचा प्रश्न" refers to policy, not emotion.

Text: आता ते दोघं माकड उड्या तर मग झाडं तर सुचणार ना!!
translated_text: If those monkeys jump, trees will respond!
Justification: "माकड उड्या" is mocking, shows anger.

Text: बाहेरच्या लोकांनी शिव्या दिल्यावर चालतील का?
translated_text: Will it work if outsiders curse?
Justification: "शिव्या दिल्यावर" is situational and framed as a question.

Text: ₹ कमी नाही होत $ खूप स्ट्रॉग होतो म्हणून
translated_text: ₹ not falling as $ is strong.
Justification: "₹ कमी नाही" is economic commentary.

Text: का तुम्हाला काही अडचण आहे का
translated_text: Do you have any problem?
Justification: "अडचण" is mentioned hypothetically.

Text: निलेश, तुला सर्व नावं तोंड पाठ आहेत वाटतं...!
translated_text: Nilesh, you know all names by heart...?
Justification: "सर्व नावं तोंड पाठ" is surprising memory.

Text: साहेब म्हणत होते ती हवेली का?
translated_text: Is that the mansion sir spoke of?
Justification: "हवेली" evokes sudden recall, mildly surprising.

Text: दसरा मेळावा हा शिवतीर्थावर होणार.
translated_text: Dussehra rally at Shivtirtha.
Justification: "दसरा मेळावा" is an event, described neutrally.

Text: सांगणारे आहेत चालतील का...भाऊ तोरसेकर यांना फॉलो करा....
translated_text: Are these advisors okay...follow Bhau Torsekar.
Justification: "फॉलो करा" is directive, emotionally neutral.

Text: नाही हो काका तुम्ही अजून तरुण आहात..
translated_text: No uncle, you’re still young.
Justification: "अजून तरुण" is compliment but calmly stated.

Text: मंगळवारी अमावस्या आहे की पौर्णिमा?
translated_text: Is Tuesday Amavasya or Pournima?
Justification: "अमावस्या की पौर्णिमा" is a factual query.

Text: मलबार हिल मतदार संघ शाकाहारीं घोषित करण्यासाठी...
translated_text: Plan to declare Malabar Hill vegetarian.
Justification: "शाकाहारीं घोषित" is a policy statement.

Text: सत्तेपेक्षा लोकसेवेला महत्व देणारे म्हणजे देवेंद्रजी
translated_text: Devendraji values public service over power.
Justification: "लोकसेवेला महत्व" shows principle, not emotion.

Text: व्वा मित्रांनो, हे आश्चर्यकारक असेल, तुम्ही ते चुकवू नका
translated_text: Wow, this will be amazing, don’t miss it.
Justification: "व्वा मित्रांनो" expresses delight.

Text: नोव्हेंबरपासून दूध स्विकारले जाणार नाही....
translated_text: Milk won’t be accepted from November.
Justification: "स्विकारले जाणार नाही" suggests a loss.

Text: कुठून आणला होता रात्रीचा माल
translated_text: Where did you get the dinner goods from?
Justification: "रात्रीचा माल" is an inquiry, emotionally flat.

Text: भाऊ ही शकुंतला आहे माझी
translated_text: Brother, this is my Shakuntala.
Justification: "शकुंतला" is a name reference, not emotional.

Text: मग दर का कमी होत नाही?
translated_text: Then why isn’t the rate going down?
Justification: "दर का कमी" is economic, fact-focused.

Text: या मुंबई सोबत प्रामाणिक रहा...या मातीशी गद्दार पणा करू नका...सगळ्यांना पोसते ही मुंबई...
translated_text: Be honest with this Mumbai...don't be a traitor to this land...this Mumbai feeds everyone...
Justification: The emotion anger is triggered by the phrase "गद्दार पणा करू नका" (gaddar pana karu naka), meaning "don't be a traitor." This expresses strong disapproval and condemnation, indicative of anger.

Text: चांगल काम करा म्हणजे ची गरज भासणार नाही.
translated_text: Do a good job and you won't need it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a pragmatic advice ("चांगल काम करा") without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "चांगल काम करा" (do a good job) indicates a suggestion rather than expressing any particular emotion.

Text: कोण मोजत हा इंडेक्स
translated_text: Who is calculating this index?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature of "कोण मोजत" (kon mojat), which translates to "who is calculating?" and indicates surprise or inquiry rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: पाणी म्हणजे जीवन
translated_text: Water is life.
Justification: The sentence "पाणी म्हणजे जीवन" (Water is life) expresses a basic truth and lacks any specific emotional or opinionated language. There are no sentiment-bearing words. Hence, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: मि एक कट्टर राजनीतिविरोधक आहे पन आता उद्धव ठाकरे सोबत आहे ।
translated_text: I am a staunch political opponent, but now I am with Uddhav Thackeray.
Justification: The sentence expresses a shift in allegiance. While the person identifies as a "कट्टर राजनीतिविरोधक" (staunch political opponent), suggesting potential negative sentiment towards politics in general, the phrase "आता उद्धव ठाकरे सोबत आहे" (now I am with Uddhav Thackeray) indicates a current state of support, neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे माझ्यावर नाराज नाही होणार ते....!! असंच ना.....??
translated_text: So he won't be angry with me....!! Isn't that right...??
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and seeks confirmation, mitigating any strong sentiment. While the underlying emotion is "anger" (presumably related to the potential anger of the person being discussed), the phrase "नाराज नाही होणार ते....!! असंच ना.....??" (naraz nahi honar te....!! asach na...?? - won't be angry with me...!! Isn't that right...??) indicates a desire to avoid anger and seeks reassurance, leading to a neutral sentiment score.

Text: ताई आणि दादा म्हणणे हे आदर करण्याशी संबद्दित असू शकता....संस्कार पाहिजे तसे...
translated_text: Calling people "Tai" and "Dada" can be related to respect...as per the culture...
Justification: The sentence discusses the cultural association of "ताई आणि दादा" (Tai and Dada) with respect and upbringing ("संस्कार पाहिजे तसे"), expressing a neutral observation.

Text: बुडीत खोल जाते पण बिनधारेची तलवार! साहेबाला विचार हवं तर!
translated_text: The sword goes deep into the depths, but it is an edgeless sword! If you want to think, sir!
Justification: The assigned disgust stems from the phrase "बिनधारेची तलवार" (bindharechi talwar), meaning "edgeless sword." This implies ineffectiveness and uselessness, evoking a feeling of disgust.

Text: सध्या हेच सुरू आहे ने तब्येत बरी आहे का ते पण नाही विचारलं
translated_text: This is what is happening right now. I didn't even ask if he was okay.
Justification: The phrase "नाही विचारलं" (nahi vicharle) indicating that no one even bothered to ask about their well-being, contributes to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a lack of action without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: | इंग्लंडने टॉस जिंकला, भारत करणार प्रथम फलंदाजी
translated_text: | England wins the toss, India will bat first
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event (England wins the toss, India will bat first). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion; hence, it is neutral. The entire sentence, especially the factual reporting of "इंग्लंडने टॉस जिंकला, भारत करणार प्रथम फलंदाजी" contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरे गट शिवसेनेच्या तेरावा, वर्षश्राद्धाला पण एकत्र जाणार आहेत
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray group will also attend Shiv Sena's thirteenth and annual Shraddha together
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("उद्धव ठाकरे गट शिवसेनेच्या तेरावा, वर्षश्राद्धाला पण एकत्र जाणार आहेत"), describing attendance at a religious ceremony. There are no words expressing positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी. ड क ज्याने कोरोना काळात काम केले त्यांची नियुक्ती व्हावी..
translated_text: The health department should be re-examined. Those who worked during the Corona period should be appointed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily states facts and desires a specific action ("आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी," "आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी") and suggests a course of action ("ज्याने कोरोना काळात काम केले त्यांची नियुक्ती व्हावी"). There's no inherently positive or negative language used.

Text: गो-रक्षेच्या नावाखाली हैदोस माजवणाऱ्या भाजपवाल्यांना आता गायींचा विसर पडला का?
translated_text: Have the BJP people, who are creating havoc in the name of cow protection, now forgotten about cows?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question and expresses a critical observation rather than a strong positive or negative sentiment. While the phrase "हैदोस माजवणाऱ्या" (creating havoc) might suggest negativity, the overall tone is questioning and observational, lacking strong emotional expression.

Text: सुप्रीतला या ट्विटसाठी मटण थाळी
translated_text: Supreet gets a mutton platter for this tweet
Justification: The phrase "मटण थाळी" (mutton platter) in the context of a tweet is often used sarcastically or to provoke anger, implying someone is being rewarded inappropriately or excessively for something trivial, thus contributing to the anger emotion even if the sentiment is neutral overall.

Text: ते म्हणलेले होते की मिडियाचं लक्ष विचलित करण्यासाठी ते बोलले…
translated_text: They said they spoke to distract the media...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of someone's statement ("ते म्हणलेले होते की"). There is no inherent positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "ते म्हणलेले होते" indicates a simple statement of fact, leading to the neutral sentiment.

Text: वर्ष जुन्या गाड्या रस्त्यावर बंद केल्या तरी गर्दी कमी होईल
translated_text: Even if old cars are banned from the roads, the crowd will decrease.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical scenario and its potential outcome (reducing crowd) without strong positive or negative language. The neutral sentiment is driven by the overall tone of the sentence, lacking explicit positive or negative indicators; the phrase "वर्ष जुन्या गाड्या रस्त्यावर बंद केल्या तरी गर्दी कमी होईल" (even if old cars are banned from the roads, the crowd will decrease) simply proposes a solution and its potential impact.

Text: मेंदूने विचारांनी आणि कपटाने काम करणारा औरंगजेब होता का???  /
translated_text: Was Aurangzeb a man who worked with brains, thoughts, and deceit?
Justification: The sentence is a question about Aurangzeb's character, using the phrase "कपटाने काम करणारा" (kapatane kam karnara - working with deceit), but it's presented as a question, therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: ऊस पण आहे का सरांचा
translated_text: Do you have sugarcane too, sir?
Justification: The sentence is a polite question. The Marathi words "पण" (pan) meaning "also" and "सरांचा" (sarancha) meaning "sir's" (respectful form) indicate a neutral and polite inquiry.

Text: गेल्या अडीच वर्ष तुम्ही वसुली करा आणि आता भाषण द्या
translated_text: You have recovered from the last two and a half years and now you have to give a speech.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement regarding past actions and future expectations without conveying strong positive or negative feelings; therefore, sentiment is neutral. The Marathi phrases "गेल्या अडीच वर्ष" (last two and a half years) and "आणि आता भाषण द्या" (and now give a speech) simply describe events and do not inherently indicate positive or negative sentiment.

Text: विकासाच्या बाबतीत भारत मागे राहिलेला नाही तर जग पुढे गेलं आहे! व्यर्थमंञी.
translated_text: In terms of development, India has not lagged behind, but the world has moved forward! Useless minister.
Justification: The phrase "व्यर्थमंञी" (useless minister) expresses disgust and negativity, directly contributing to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: तुमचे नाव चोरमरे का पडले असेल याचा मी विचार करतोय...
translated_text: I'm wondering why you might have been named Chormare...
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and mild surprise due to the unusual nature of the surname "चोरमरे" (Chormare) and the speaker's expressed contemplation, "विचार करतोय..." (vichar kartoy... - I'm wondering...). The surname itself, implying "thief-killer" or related concept, is what elicits the emotion.

Text: आधी साहेब झोपले होते
translated_text: The master was sleeping earlier.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("साहेब झोपले होते" - the master was sleeping) without any explicitly positive or negative connotations, thus justifying a neutral sentiment. The phrase "साहेब झोपले होते" describes a past state without indicating any specific emotion.

Text: ते उपमुख्यमंत्री म्हणूनच जन्माला आलेले आहेत!
translated_text: He was born to be the Deputy Chief Minister!
Justification: The phrase "ते उपमुख्यमंत्री म्हणूनच जन्माला आलेले आहेत!" implies a sense of predetermination and destiny related to holding a high position, which, in this context, is not expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. Therefore, sentiment is neutral. The exclamation mark and the hyperbole of being "born" for the role, although humorous, lean toward slight joy or amusement.

Text: मी स्वतः पक्ष काढून हे सगळे बदलणार!
translated_text: I will change all this by forming a party myself!
Justification: The phrase "मी स्वतः पक्ष काढून हे सगळे बदलणार!" implies a strong desire for change and personal agency, but lacks explicit emotional indicators. While the emotion is anger, the sentence doesn't contain inherently negative words. The sentiment is neutral because the statement is declarative and focuses on future action rather than expressing current feelings.

Text: तिघांनी एकत्र संसार करायला काय हरकत आहे? हिंदू धर्मात द्रौपदी चे   नवरे होते
translated_text: What is the problem with the three of them living together? In Hinduism, Draupadi had husbands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with surprise stemming from the interrogative phrase "काय हरकत आहे?" (kay harkat aahe?), meaning "what is the problem?", used to question a societal norm and introduce a surprising comparison to Draupadi's polyandrous marriage.

Text: हा सावंत तुमची लायकी दाखवतोय. "ठकासी व्हावे ठक" आणखी काय सांगणार
translated_text: This savant is showing your worth. "Thakasi vahe thak" what more can I say
Justification: The sentence uses the proverb "ठकासी व्हावे ठक" (Thakasi vahe thak), which implies a tit-for-tat or deceptive action being met with deception. While not inherently positive or negative, its inclusion in the context of "showing your worth" doesn't necessarily elicit strong emotional responses, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: कधी कधी स्वत:चं कर्तुत्व सिध्द करण्यासाठी दुसऱ्याला बदनाम करणे योग्य नाही !!
translated_text: Sometimes it's not right to defame others to prove your own wrongdoing!!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "बदनाम करणे योग्य नाही" (badnam karane yogya nahi), which translates to "it's not right to defame," expressing disapproval and anger towards the act of defaming someone.

Text: ही निवड अजिबात परिवार वादातून झाली नसून पूर्णपणे लोकशाही मार्फत झाली आहे,
translated_text: This election was not at all a result of family disputes, but was made entirely through democracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it factually states the election process ("निवड ... झाली आहे") was democratic ("लोकशाही मार्फत") and not influenced by family disputes ("परिवार वादातून झाली नसून"). There are no words expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: पार्ट टाईम हिंदुत्व आहे यांचं. चवीनुसार वापरायचं
translated_text: Part time Hindutva is theirs. Use it according to your taste.
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "चवीनुसार वापरायचं" (use it according to your taste) which implies a calculated and opportunistic approach, devoid of genuine belief, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: आता ठाकरे काय बोलणार सभेत सगळ्यांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवयचा आहे
translated_text: Now what will Thackeray say in the meeting? Everyone remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action regarding a political entity ("बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवयचा आहे" - to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena). While it references a political contest, the statement itself lacks overtly positive or negative words contributing to either strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it is considered neutral.

Text: ती भाजीचं खा मग भरपूर शक्ती येते ....
translated_text: Eat that vegetable and you will get a lot of strength...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it provides factual information about the benefits of eating vegetables; there's no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrase "भरपूर शक्ती येते" (bharpur shakti yete), meaning "you will get a lot of strength," simply states a potential outcome without conveying emotional valence.

Text: लेखण म्हणजे काय ते पण सांगा आता
translated_text: Now tell me what writing is.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "लेखण म्हणजे काय ते पण सांगा आता" which is a simple request for information and lacks any emotional or subjective content.

Text: अच्छा, म्हणून इथे येऊन....
translated_text: Okay, so come here....
Justification: The sentence "अच्छा, म्हणून इथे येऊन...." expresses a neutral sentiment because it's simply an introductory phrase expressing acknowledgement or understanding ("अच्छा") and setting the scene ("म्हणून इथे येऊन..."). There's no positive or negative connotation in the words themselves.

Text: बाळासाहेबांना जेल मध्ये पाठवणाऱ्या लोकांसमोर हा मिंधा उदो बाळ झुकला
translated_text: This humble boy bowed down before the people who sent Balasaheb to jail.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is disgust due to the word "मिंधा" (mindha), which translates to "humble" or "submissive" but carries a heavily sarcastic and derogatory connotation in this context, implying weakness and lack of spine.

Text: शेवटी शेवटी बाळासाहेब दबावाखाली च होते आता सगळं उघड होईल हळू हळू
translated_text: In the end, Balasaheb was under pressure, now everything will be revealed slowly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Balasaheb being under pressure ("दबावाखाली च होते") and the expectation of things being revealed, lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: हिचा पहिला नवरा पाकिस्तानी होता...आणि आता अजित गुलाबचंद सोबत राहते...यावरून ओळखा!
translated_text: Her first husband was Pakistani...and now she lives with Ajit Gulabchand...recognize it from this!
Justification: The sentence presents factual information without expressing a clear positive or negative opinion; hence the neutral sentiment. There's no specific word or phrase driving a strong positive or negative emotion. The statement simply relays details about the woman's relationships ("पहिला नवरा पाकिस्तानी होता" and "अजित गुलाबचंद सोबत राहते").

Text: लाचार मिडिया ' ला राहुल गांधी ची भारत जोडो यात्रा दिसतीये का नाही!
translated_text: Why doesn't the helpless media see Rahul Gandhi's Bharat Jodo Yatra?
Justification: The sentence expresses frustration and questioning, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "लाचार मिडिया" (lachar media - helpless media) implies criticism, but not enough to sway the overall sentiment from neutral. The question itself, "दिसतीये का नाही!" (distiye ka nahi - doesn't see?), further contributes to a neutral stance as it seeks information rather than expressing a strong opinion.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांनी अधिक माहितीसाठी हे संकेतस्थळ:
translated_text: For more information about students, visit this website:
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply providing information ("अधिक माहितीसाठी हे संकेतस्थळ"). There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases.

Text: ह्याना आता काय फरक पडत नाही सत्तेत आहेत महाराष्ट्राच्या जनतेनेच ठरावायच आता
translated_text: It doesn't matter who is in power now, the people of Maharashtra will decide now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the people of Maharashtra deciding, without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "काय फरक पडत नाही" (kay pharak padat nahi - doesn't matter) contributes to the neutral sentiment by indicating indifference to who is in power.

Text: पावसाचा जोर कमी व्हायला सुरुवात. डेक्कन कोथरूड परिसरात जोर कमी झाला. इतर भागात मात्र सुरूच
translated_text: The intensity of the rains has started to decrease. The intensity has decreased in the Deccan Kothrud area. However, it continues in other areas.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a factual observation about the rainfall intensity decreasing ("जोर कमी झाला") in specific areas. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या तक्रारींचे काय होते ते बघू   ऑक्टोबर   दिवसांवर आहे
translated_text: Let's see what happens to your complaints. It's October.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly expresses a statement of intent ("बघू") to look into the complaints and a factual mention of the month ("ऑक्टोबर"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment conveyed.

Text: मनपामध्ये दूरध्वनीवर संवादासाठी आता हॅलो ऐवजी ‘वंदे मातरम्’ मनपाचे परिपत्रक जारी @
translated_text: Municipal Corporation circular issued to use 'Vande Mataram' instead of 'Hello' for telephone communication in the municipality @

Text: मुळात पाकिस्तान हा देश नाही हा एक विचार आहे त्यांच्या साठी
translated_text: Basically, Pakistan is not a country, it's an idea for them.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual or opinion-based perspective without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "एक विचार आहे" (ek vichar aahe) - "it's an idea" contributes to the neutrality by presenting a concept rather than an evaluation.

Text: कविता ही अंतरमनाच्या सादरीकरणाचे माध्यम: ज्येष्ठ नाटककार प्राजक्त देशमुख
translated_text: Poetry is a medium for expressing the inner self: Veteran playwright Prajakta Deshmukh
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive. There isn't a specific word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative sentiment. It simply states a fact about poetry being a medium for self-expression. The Marathi words are all neutral in this context.

Text: तुझा आजोबा वाटतो बर का??
translated_text: Does your grandfather feel good??
Justification: The sentence is interpreted as a rhetorical question implying disbelief, rather than a genuine query about someone's well-being. The phrase "वाटतो बर का??" ("vatato bar ka??") indicates a sarcastic or dismissive tone, neutralizing any positive sentiment that "does your grandfather feel good" might otherwise suggest.

Text: कोण आहे ही बाई ?
translated_text: Who is this woman?
Justification: The neutral sentiment arises primarily from the interrogative nature of the sentence "कोण आहे ही बाई ?" (Who is this woman?). The phrase "कोण आहे" (who is) simply seeks information and doesn't inherently express a positive or negative feeling. The emotion of surprise is linked to the sudden uncertainty implied by not knowing the woman's identity.

Text: दक्षिण अफ्रिका नव्हे ही तर ‘क्षीण’अफ्रिका
translated_text: This is not South Africa, but 'weak' Africa.
Justification: The Marathi word "क्षीण" (ksheen), meaning weak, while potentially negative in other contexts, doesn't evoke a strong positive or negative sentiment here. It's used more descriptively than emotively, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पंकजाताई मुंडेचं नाव हे जाणून बुजून डावलण्यात येत आहे....
translated_text: Pankajatai Munde's name is being deliberately omitted...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Pankajatai Munde's name being deliberately omitted ("जाणून बुजून डावलण्यात येत आहे"), lacking explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentence is neutral.

Text: मामीला गाणं म्हणायला बोलवल नाही का
translated_text: Didn't you invite Auntie to sing?
Justification: The sentence is a question about an invitation. The phrase "बोलवल नाही का" (bolaval nahi ka) indicates a neutral inquiry rather than expressing any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: आता फक्त दिवाळीला पाऊस नाही आला म्हणजे जिंकला.
translated_text: Now, just because it didn't rain on Diwali doesn't mean we won.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "आता फक्त दिवाळीला पाऊस नाही आला म्हणजे जिंकला" (Now, just because it didn't rain on Diwali doesn't mean we won) implies a lack of strong positive or negative feeling; it's a statement of fact/condition rather than an expression of joy or sadness.

Text: चेहर्याचा पॅरालीसीस म्हणजे बेल्स पाल्सी, हा फिजिओथेरेपी उपचाराने पूर्ण बरा होतो.
translated_text: Bell's palsy, a facial paralysis, is completely curable with physiotherapy treatment.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information about Bell's palsy and its curability with physiotherapy. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. Key phrase: "पूर्ण बरा होतो" (pūrṇa barā hoto) - "completely curable", conveys a factual statement without any emotional loading.

Text: विश्लेषण : उद्धव ठाकरे आणि एकनाथ शिंदेंना ‘त्रिशूळ’ हे पक्षचिन्ह का मिळालं नाही?
translated_text: Analysis: Why didn't Uddhav Thackeray and Eknath Shinde get the party symbol 'Trishul'?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("का मिळालं नाही?") about a factual event (not receiving the 'Trishul' symbol). There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The question "का मिळालं नाही?" implies inquiry rather than any specific emotion.

Text: काही जण स्वतः मला म्हणतात .येऊ का संडेला , बोलावं कधीतरी.
translated_text: Some people themselves say to me, "Come on Sunday, let's talk sometime."
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply describes a casual invitation. There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The Marathi phrases "येऊ का संडेला" (Come on Sunday) and "बोलावं कधीतरी" (let's talk sometime) are polite and non-committal, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: नाही, आंदर मावळ
translated_text: No, it's dark inside.
Justification: "आंदर मावळ" (andar maval) simply describes a factual state, "it's dark inside," without any subjective expression of feeling or opinion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: ती म्हण यांच्या साठीच बनवली होती बहुतेक.... "गिरे तो भी टांग ऊपर"
translated_text: That proverb was probably made for him... "If he falls, he will also stand up."
Justification: The phrase "गिरे तो भी टांग ऊपर" (gire to bhi tang upar), while potentially reflecting resilience, is presented in a neutral context without any explicit positive or negative connotations in the given sentence. It simply states the proverb.

Text: माझ्यापेक्षा वयाने आणि अनुभवाने मोठे असाल तुम्ही म्हणून आदराने सर म्हणालो.
translated_text: I respectfully addressed you as "Sir," as you are older and more experienced than me.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the Marathi phrase "आदराने सर म्हणालो" (adraane sar mhanalo), meaning "I respectfully addressed you as Sir," indicates politeness and respect without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. The other words, regarding the addressee being older and more experienced, provide context but do not influence the neutral sentiment.

Text: सदरच्या मेळाव्यासाठीच्या जेवणाची व्यवस्था माझ्याकडे होती.
translated_text: I was responsible for arranging the food for the gathering.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("माझ्याकडे होती" - was with me/I was responsible), indicating responsibility without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आपला विषय  “श्रीमंती ही वाऱ्यावर उडून जाते कायम टिकणारी गोष्ट एकच ती म्हणजे व्यक्तीमत्व.”
translated_text: Our topic is “Wealth flies in the wind, the only thing that lasts is personality.”
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation about the fleeting nature of wealth and the enduring quality of personality. The Marathi phrases "श्रीमंती ही वाऱ्यावर उडून जाते" (wealth flies in the wind) and "कायम टिकणारी गोष्ट एकच ती म्हणजे व्यक्तीमत्व" (the only thing that lasts is personality) convey a neutral and matter-of-fact tone, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मुद्देसूद व प्रत्येकाला माहिती असावं असा एक थ्रेड
translated_text: A thread that is to the point and that everyone should know about.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a thread as "मुद्देसूद" (muddedsud - to the point) and stating it should be known by everyone. These are descriptive and factual statements without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: जगाला दाखवण्यासाठी नाही पन स्वताला सिध्द करण्यासाठी योग्य जागेवर ऊभे राहण गरजेच आहे
translated_text: It is necessary to stand in the right place, not to show off to the world, but to prove yourself.

The phrase "स्वताला सिध्द करण्यासाठी" (swataala siddha karanyaasathi - to prove yourself) indicates a focus on personal growth, resulting in a neutral sentiment as there's no explicitly positive or negative emotion expressed.

Text: आणि कोणीतरी काही दिवसापूर्वी मुंबई मेट्रो मध्ये गाणी गातात म्हणून करत होते.
translated_text: And a few days ago, someone was singing songs in the Mumbai Metro.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event (someone singing in the Mumbai Metro). There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The entire sentence, "आणि कोणीतरी काही दिवसापूर्वी मुंबई मेट्रो मध्ये गाणी गातात म्हणून करत होते," is descriptive and lacks any emotional or evaluative content.

Text: जन्म घेतला मुक्त आयुष्यभर बंधनात.अजुनही स्वतःला समजून घेण्या साठी प्रयत्न करत आहे. श्रीकांत मोरे सोलापूर
translated_text: Born free, in bondage all my life. Still trying to understand myself. Shrikant More Solapur
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of reflection and acceptance of life's complexities. There isn't a strong positive or negative charge. The phrase "प्रयत्न करत आहे" (prayatna karat aahe - trying) suggests ongoing effort and a neutral, observational stance.

Text: स्वबळाच्या नादात एक निवडून यायचा नाय
translated_text: One should not be elected in the name of self-reliance.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the difficulty of winning elections based solely on self-reliance ("स्वबळाच्या नादात"), lacking positive or negative connotations.

Text: हीच योग्य वेळ आहे
translated_text: This is the right time.

Text: ज्यांची हातभर फाटलेली असते तेच म्हणत असतात महाराष्ट्राची ही संस्कृती नाही
translated_text: Only those who have their hands full of wounds say this is not the culture of Maharashtra.

The Marathi phrase "ज्यांची हातभर फाटलेली असते" describes a group (those with wounds), but doesn't inherently carry sentiment.

Text: तेवढं सोपं भाजपा वाटतं का?काही वेगळंच नसेल तर नवल नको
translated_text: Does BJP seem that simple? Don't be surprised if there is nothing different.

There isn't a strongly positive or negative word or phrase that indicates sentiment. The phrases "तेवढं सोपं" (that simple) and "नवल नको" (don't be surprised) contribute to the neutral tone by questioning assumptions without expressing strong emotion.

Text: भुसे साहेब दुसरी कडे गर्दी जमावता नाही येत का शिंदे साहेबांना,

Text: स्थानिक स्वराज्य संस्थांच्या निवडणुकीची सुनावणी पुन्हा लांबणीवर, दोन आठवड्यानंतर सुनावणी होणार
translated_text: Hearing on local body elections postponed again, hearing to be held after two weeks

translated_text: And ask the banks to forgive their loans

Text: मी देव मानत नाही
translated_text: I don't believe in God.

Text: : ऑक्टोबर महिन्यात   ग्रह बदलणार राशी, या राशींना मिळतील अशी फळं
translated_text: : Planets will change zodiac signs in October, these zodiac signs will get the following results

Text: हा सगळा गारमेंट इंडस्ट्री चा मार्केटिंग फंडा आहे.
translated_text: This is all a marketing ploy of the garment industry.

Text: हे चार नंबरचा पक्ष सांगतोय
translated_text: This is what party number four is saying.

Text: तसच होते. माझही नव्हतं अगोदर मग स्वतःसोबतच घडलं मग कळलं
translated_text: That's how it was. It wasn't mine either. It happened to me first, then I realized.

Text: युवा नेता म्हणून राज साहेबांचा पोरगा आहे. हे विसरू नका
translated_text: As a young leader, he is Raj Saheb's son. Don't forget this.

Text: नागपूर:-    पंचायत समितीपैकी एकाही समितीत भाजपचा सभापती नाही...

Text: तुम्हाला हिरवी म्हणायचं आहे का?

Text: शेतकऱ्यांची दिवाळी धुमधडाक्यात साजरी झाली पाहिजे, राज ठाकरेंनी मुख्यमंत्र्यांना धाडलं पत्र
translated_text: Farmers' Diwali should be celebrated with pomp and show, Raj Thackeray writes to Chief Minister
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish for farmers to celebrate Diwali well and mentions Raj Thackeray writing a letter; it is a statement of fact and a desire, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शेतकऱ्यांची दिवाळी धुमधडाक्यात साजरी झाली पाहिजे" (Farmers' Diwali should be celebrated with pomp and show) expresses a desire but doesn't carry inherent positive or negative emotion in this context, making it neutral.

Text: ऑस्कर साठी नामांकन आहे का हे

Text: बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना या पक्षाचा नवा व्हिडिओ ...
translated_text: New video of Balasaheb's Shiv Sena party...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement about a new video of Balasaheb's Shiv Sena party. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase present. The entire sentence "बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना या पक्षाचा नवा व्हिडिओ ..." is simply descriptive.

Text: मध्ये काम करणारे तर बिनधास्त मागतात पैसे

Text: मुंबई महानगरपालिका निवडणूक नजरेसमोर ठेवून निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: The decision has been taken keeping in mind the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "नजरेसमोर ठेवून" (najaresamor thevun - keeping in mind) indicates a motive but doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: ती पण अशीच होती.
translated_text: She was like that too.
Justification: The sentence "ती पण अशीच होती" expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact or observation. There are no words indicating positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "अशीच होती" (ashich hoti - was like that) is descriptive and doesn't carry any inherent emotional charge.

Text: वागळ्या हे बघ चोख उत्तर
translated_text: Look at this, Wagla. This is a perfect answer.

While it indicates a positive outcome or satisfaction, it lacks strong positive connotations that would trigger a positive sentiment. The word "बघ" (bagh - look) and the name "वागळ्या" (Wagla) are neutral.

Text: सही पकडे है... हे भटखळकर, चित्रा वाघ यांच्या पोस्टवर पण येऊ द्या
translated_text: Got it... Hey Bhatkhalkar, let's also come to Chitra Wagh's post
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly consists of factual statements ("सही पकडे है", "हे भटखळकर", "चित्रा वाघ यांच्या पोस्टवर पण येऊ द्या"). There is no explicit expression of positive or negative feeling. The phrase "सही पकडे है" (Got it) is observational and does not inherently carry a strong sentiment.

Text: या गोष्टीवर मुस्लिमांमध्ये पुरोगामी, सुधारणावादी लोकांपेक्षा प्रतिगामी लोकच जास्त बोलतात.
translated_text: Among Muslims, reactionary people speak out more on this issue than progressive and reformist people.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes a disproportionate amount of speech ("जास्त बोलतात") from one group compared to another ("प्रतिगामी लोकच जास्त बोलतात"), without expressing a positive or negative opinion about either group or the topic itself.

Text: पैश्यापुढती आणि धंद्यापुढती सर्व काही क्षम्य असतंय...
translated_text: Everything is forgivable for money and business...
Justification: The sentence expresses a pragmatic and somewhat cynical view, stating that everything is forgivable for the sake of money and business. While potentially negative, it's presented as a matter-of-fact observation rather than an expression of strong negative emotion. The phrase "सर्व काही क्षम्य असतंय" (sarva kahi kshamy astay) - "everything is forgivable" - suggests a cold, calculating approach, which results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: माझं चित्रं रेखाटणार काय? कौशल्य आहे म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: Will you draw my pictures? I'm asking because I have the skills.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily asks a question and states a fact ("कौशल्य आहे म्हणून विचारतोय" - I'm asking because I have the skills) in a factual and inquisitive tone without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

translated_text: Tweet deleted.....!! Why am I blocked...??
Justification: The surprise emotion is driven by the rhetorical question "का मी ब्लॉक झालो.....??" (ka mi block jhalo.....?? - Why am I blocked??), implying unexpectedness.

Text: त्यांना उत्तर पोहचले आहे. नवीन चिन्हाच्या शोधात आहेत ते.
translated_text: They have reached the answer. They are looking for a new symbol.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual update ("उत्तर पोहचले आहे" - the answer has reached) and a statement of action ("नवीन चिन्हाच्या शोधात आहेत ते" - they are looking for a new symbol) without any explicit emotional cues. The phrases are descriptive and informational, not expressing any positivity, negativity, or specific emotion.

Text: ये केसा पत्रकार हे ,
translated_text: What kind of journalist are you?
Justification: The phrase "ये केसा" (ye kesa), meaning "what kind," expresses disbelief and sarcasm, leading to a neutral sentiment and a feeling of surprise rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: गुलाब म्हणजे
translated_text: Rose means
Justification: The phrase "गुलाब म्हणजे" (gulab mhanje) is neutral as it simply states "rose means" without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: ऐन दिवाळीच्या तोंडावर नाशिककरांना झटका, चार शहरांसाठीची विमान सेवा बंद होणार
translated_text: Nashik residents in for a shock on the eve of Diwali, flight services to four cities will be closed
Justification: The phrase "झटका" (jhatka), meaning "shock," indicates a negative surprise, leading to a neutral sentiment due to the informational nature of the sentence.

Text: एकेकाळी महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणात ही प्रगल्भता होती.
translated_text: There was once this depth in Maharashtra politics.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and observational nature of the statement. While it acknowledges "प्रगल्भता" (pragalbhata - depth/maturity), it doesn't express positive or negative feeling, simply stating its past existence.

Text: हा लाभ निवृत्त कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी लागू आहे का
translated_text: Is this benefit applicable to retired employees?
Justification: The sentence inquires about the applicability of a benefit, using the neutral phrase "हा लाभ निवृत्त कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी लागू आहे का" which doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The question itself is objective.

Text: काय करता येईल हे ही सांगा?
translated_text: Tell me what can be done?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for suggestions ("काय करता येईल हे ही सांगा?"). There are no words or phrases expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "काय करता येईल" (what can be done) is an inquiry, not an expression of opinion or feeling.

Text: इस्लामी व्यवस्थ आणि डावी विचारसरणी कशी काम करते याची उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे तू
translated_text: You are a great example of how the Islamic system and leftist ideology work.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents an observation about the subject being an example of two ideologies, without expressing positive or negative feeling. The phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे तू" (uttam udaharan mhanje tu) - "you are a great example" - is observational and lacks inherent sentiment.

Text: मुंबई मध्ये पाणी तुंबल तेव्हा हे नाही आठवलं व्हा रे डबल ढोलकी
translated_text: When the water level in Mumbai was low, I didn't remember this, you double drummer.
Justification: The phrase "डबल ढोलकी" (double drummer) while potentially carrying a negative connotation depending on context, doesn't express strong sentiment in isolation here. The context of forgotten events during low water levels suggests criticism but not strongly positive or negative, hence neutral.

Text: कावळ्याच्या शापाने गाय मरत नाही,
translated_text: A cow does not die from the curse of a crow,
Justification: The proverb "कावळ्याच्या शापाने गाय मरत नाही" (kavalyachya shapanE gay marat nahi) implies that the curse of a crow (considered insignificant) cannot harm a cow (considered significant), expressing a sense of futility and dismissal, leading to a neutral sentiment and the negative emotion of disgust due to the negativity associated with curses and the insignificance.

Text: शासनाला पाझर फुटेल का?
translated_text: Will the government be compromised?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about a potential future event ("शासनाला पाझर फुटेल का?") without inherently positive or negative connotations, leading to a neutral sentiment. The questioning tone and lack of explicit emotional language further support this.

Text: मंत्रीला माहीत नाही का ? महापालिका आता राज्यशासन चालवत आहे मुदत संपल्यामुळे ?
translated_text: Doesn't the minister know? The municipal corporation is now running the state government because its term has expired?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is primarily a factual inquiry. The phrase "माहीत नाही का ?" (Doesn't know?) indicates a question rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. While potentially hinting at criticism, it is delivered as a question, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: काळाची गरज आहे, आणि लोकशाही टिकवण्यासाठी तर नक्कीच
translated_text: It is the need of the hour, and certainly to preserve democracy.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it states a fact ("kaalachi garaj aahe") and emphasizes the need to preserve democracy ("lokshahi tikavanyasathi tar nakkich"). There is no specific word or phrase conveying positive or negative emotion.

Text: मागच्या वर्षी होते .. त्यामूळे उद्या पण असेल
translated_text: It happened last year.. so it will happen tomorrow too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of past and future occurrence with "असेल" (asel), indicating a future possibility without any emotional or sentiment-laden language.

Text: मी पण हेच म्हणणार होतो..
translated_text: I was going to say the same thing..
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement without any strong positive or negative words. The phrase "मी पण हेच म्हणणार होतो" simply indicates an intention to say the same thing, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: : भारत जिंकला नाही तर…; बांगलादेशविजयावर सुनिल गावस्कर हे काय बोलून गेले ./        -/
translated_text: : If India doesn't win...; What did Sunil Gavaskar say about Bangladesh's victory?/ -/
Justification: The sentence is primarily reporting on a hypothetical situation and a query about Sunil Gavaskar's reaction, making it neutral. There's no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment. It mainly conveys information. The phrase "भारत जिंकला नाही तर…" (If India doesn't win...) and "काय बोलून गेले" (what did they say) contribute to the neutral, informational tone.

Text: तसं काही नाही! हो पक्की मुलगीच आहे आमची ताई सांगत होती
translated_text: It's nothing like that! Yes, it's definitely a girl, our aunt was saying.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it confirms the birth of a girl, the phrase "तसं काही नाही!" (tasa kahi nahi!) implies a dismissal of any prior assumptions or expectations, effectively neutralizing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: अरे राजा ही ब्रिगेड उंची घोषणा आहे... ब्रिगेडला कोणाचा आशीर्वाद आहे?
translated_text: Oh king, this is the brigade's height announcement... Whose blessing is the brigade?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly conveys information and asks a question. The Marathi phrase "उंची घोषणा आहे" (unchi ghosna aahe - height announcement) simply describes the announcement's scale without indicating any positive or negative feeling.

Text: हा निधी वापरला जावा... आणि कामे व्हावीत... एवढीच सदिच्छा... धन्यवाद
translated_text: This fund should be used... and the work should be done... that's all the goodwill... thank you
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) and emotion is joy because "सदिच्छा" (sadiccha), meaning goodwill, expresses a positive intention, contributing a feeling of joy but not strong enough for a clearly positive sentiment.

Text: मलाही लिहायचा होता लिहीन लिहीन म्हणून राहून गेला
translated_text: I also wanted to write, but I kept writing.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral/slightly negative and evokes sadness because of the phrase "राहून गेला" (rahun gela), which implies something was left undone or remained unfulfilled, creating a feeling of regret and sadness.

Text: पॉप्युलर फ्रंट इंडियावर केंद्र सरकारकडून   वर्षांची बंदी, तपास यंत्रणांनी बंदीची केली होती शिफारस
translated_text: Popular Front India banned for years by the central government, investigation agencies had recommended ban
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a factual event, the banning of Popular Front India. There is no inherently emotional or sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The neutral sentiment is driven by the lack of any subjective language or opinion; it's simply a statement of fact. Thus no particular Marathi word drives sentiment.

Text: जाणार पण नाही त्यापुढे..,
translated_text: I will go but not further than that..,
Justification: The sentence expresses a limited commitment with "जाणार पण नाही" (jaNaar paN naahi), indicating a lack of strong feeling and thus a neutral sentiment.

Text: ला माहित तरी होत का...की ते होणार आहेत..??
translated_text: Did you even know...that they were going to happen..??
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the rhetorical question and implied lack of awareness, indicated by "ला माहित तरी होत का...की" (la mahit tari hot ka...ki), which translates to "Did you even know...that".

Text: विषय आहे महागाईचा आणि आपण काय बोलताय. सामान्य जनता यात होरपळून निघत आहे.
translated_text: The topic is inflation and what we are talking about. The common people are getting scared.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about inflation and its impact on people. While there's a hint of concern, it lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सामान्य जनता यात होरपळून निघत आहे" (the common people are getting scared) describes a situation, but doesn't explicitly convey a sentiment beyond a neutral observation.

Text: हा ये करलो पेहले....
translated_text: This is what I did...
Justification: The sentence "हा ये करलो पेहले...." is largely neutral because it's a simple statement of fact. The Marathi portion "हा" (yes/this) and the Hindi/Marathi hybrid "करलो पेहले" (did this before) doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाग्य आहे हींदुत्वाचे शिलेदार सोबत दिसत आहेत. देवेंद्रजी सुध्दा हवे होते.
translated_text: Luckily, the Hindu ambassador is seen with us. Devendraji was also wanted.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it mentions "भाग्य आहे" (bhagya aahe), meaning "luckily," it's tempered by the subsequent expression of a missing person ("देवेंद्रजी सुध्दा हवे होते" - Devendraji was also wanted). The overall tone lacks strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: तुम्हाला कोणी काय करावं ते सांगितलं तर मला ही कळवा
translated_text: If anyone tells you what to do, let me know.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's simply a request for information ("मला ही कळवा" - let me know) based on a hypothetical scenario, lacking any overt positive or negative connotations.

Text: महाराष्ट्र मधील सरकार कधी असा निर्णय घेणार ?
translated_text: When will the government in Maharashtra take such a decision?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and lack of positive or negative indicators. The phrase "कधी असा निर्णय घेणार ?" (kadhi asa nirnay ghenar?) which translates to "When will [they] take such a decision?" expresses a question rather than a feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: स्वतःच्या अनुभवातुन शिका, त्याच बरोबर दुसऱ्याच्या अनुभवातुन ही शिका...
translated_text: Learn from your own experience, as well as from the experience of others...
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced and practical viewpoint on learning from both personal and others' experiences. The lack of overtly positive or negative language, focusing instead on advice, results in a neutral sentiment. There are no specific emotionally charged words or phrases; the overall tone is advisory, exemplified by "शिका" (shika - learn), which promotes a neutral sentiment.

Text: छत्रपति शिवाजी महाराजांच्या नावाने कुणीही पक्ष नाही काढू शकत नियमाप्रमाने
translated_text: According to the rules, no one can form a party in the name of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and anger emotion are driven by "नाही काढू शकत" (nahi kadhu shakat), which conveys a sense of prohibition and restriction, triggering frustration reflected as anger, but not expressing positive or negative sentiment overall.

Text: :संध्याकाळी भूक शमवण्यासाठी हे आरोग्यदायी ‘चवळी चाट’ एकदा करून पहा.
translated_text: :Try this healthy 'Chawali Chaat' to satisfy your evening hunger.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is simply suggesting trying a recipe. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "संध्याकाळी भूक शमवण्यासाठी हे आरोग्यदायी ‘चवळी चाट’ एकदा करून पहा" (try this healthy 'Chawali Chaat' to satisfy your evening hunger) is informative and advisory, not expressing any particular emotion.

Text: अडिच वर्ष फक्त विमानात फिरत होता वाटतं?
translated_text: I think he was just traveling by plane for a year?
Justification: The word "फक्त" (phakt), meaning "just" or "only," implies a limited action or duration, leading to a neutral sentiment and a feeling of surprise regarding the nature of the action. The questioning tone also contributes to surprise.

Text: मी अर्थमंत्री कमी असेन पण वकील जास्त आहे
translated_text: I may be less of a finance minister but more of a lawyer.
Justification: The sentence expresses a comparison ("कमी असेन पण जास्त आहे" - less but more) without any explicitly positive or negative words, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पडले तरी सांड वर अशी भक्तांची समजूत.
translated_text: Even if it falls, the devotees believe that it is better to be on the bull.
Justification: The sentence expresses a belief ("समजूत") held by devotees without explicitly conveying positive or negative emotion, hence a neutral sentiment. The phrase "पडले तरी सांड वर" describes a situation and a related belief, contributing to a neutral observation rather than an emotional expression.

Text: हा निर्णय झाला त्यावेळचे सर्व आताही सत्ताधारी आहेत.
translated_text: Everyone who was in power when this decision was made is still in power.
Justification: The sentence is a factual statement with no explicit sentiment. There isn't a specific word or phrase implying positive or negative emotion. The sentence simply states that those who were in power during a certain decision are still in power ("आताही सत्ताधारी आहेत").

Text: काही आठवणी, काही नाती आणि काही माणसं, कितीही त्रासदायक असले तरी आयुष्यभर जपली जातात.
translated_text: Some memories, some relationships, and some people, no matter how painful, are cherished for a lifetime.
Justification: The phrase "त्रासदायक असले तरी" (trasdayak asle tari), meaning "no matter how painful," indicates a negative feeling, but the subsequent "आयुष्यभर जपली जातात" (aayushyabhar japli jatat), meaning "are cherished for a lifetime," suggests resilience and acceptance, neutralizing the overall sentiment. The sadness emotion is derived from "त्रासदायक" (trasdayak).

Text: इडली खाल्याने वजन वाढत नाही हुशशश ...
translated_text: Eating idli does not increase weight, hushhhh...
Justification: The sentence expresses relief about not gaining weight by eating idli. However, the sentiment is neutral because the core statement "इडली खाल्याने वजन वाढत नाही" (idli khalyane vajan vadhat nahi - eating idli does not increase weight) is a factual statement, and the "हुशशश..." (hushhhh...) expresses a feeling, not a directly positive or negative evaluation of the idli itself. Therefore, the factual statement dominates leading to neutral sentiment.

Text: # टाकणारच होते  पण म्हटलं जाऊदे.
translated_text: # I was going to post this but let me say it.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "जाऊदे" (jaude), which implies letting something go or dismissing it, suggesting a lack of strong positive or negative feeling. While the initial part suggests an intention to post, the "jaude" indicates a change of mind or acceptance, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: हा माझा आहे का
translated_text: Is this mine?
Justification: The sentence "हा माझा आहे का" is a simple question of ownership, lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: तुझ्याकडे तुझा फोटो आहे का खरा तो लाव ना
translated_text: Do you have a photo of yourself? Post it.
Justification: The sentence is a simple request and lacks any emotionally charged words. It translates to "Do you have your photo? Post it." No specific Marathi word or phrase indicates positive, negative, or emotional sentiment.

Text: हे कधी झालं??? आणि तुम्हा ला एक काम सांगितल होत व्हॉटस् अप बघा तुम्ही
translated_text: When did this happen??? And I'm telling you something, check out WhatsApp.
Justification: The sentence expresses primarily factual information and a request. The phrase "हे कधी झालं???" (he kadhi zala???) simply asks "When did this happen???" without conveying any strong positive or negative sentiment. The second part of the sentence is a request, "व्हॉटस् अप बघा" (WhatsApp bagha), which is also neutral.

Text: अंधेरी मधून पळ काढताना हेच गाणे ऐकत होते का ?
translated_text: Was this the song you were listening to while running away from Andheri?
Justification: The sentence "अंधेरी मधून पळ काढताना हेच गाणे ऐकत होते का ?" is neutral because it is a question inquiring about a past action ("पळ काढताना" - running away) and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The question itself lacks emotional cues.

Text: सिल्व्हर ओक वर्षे कोण जात होते?
translated_text: Who was going to Silver Oak years ago?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and emotion is surprise because the sentence "सिल्व्हर ओक वर्षे कोण जात होते?" is a question expressing surprise about someone going to Silver Oak years ago. The word "कोण" (kon) meaning "who" in this context implies a question of surprise.

Text: बँक-अप म्हणून कँश ठेवा ज्याने ही वेळ टाळता येईल
translated_text: Keep cash as a bank-backup to avoid this time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a practical suggestion ("कँश ठेवा" - keep cash) without strong positive or negative connotations, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: अत्यंत धाडसी निर्णय! दादांची मते   % वाढणार.
translated_text: Very bold decision! Dada's votes will increase by 10%.
Justification: While the sentence expresses a positive outcome (increased votes), the phrase "अत्यंत धाडसी निर्णय!" (atyant dhadsi nirnay! - very bold decision!) is neutral in sentiment on its own. It describes the nature of the decision but doesn't explicitly express positive or negative feeling *about the decision itself*. Thus, the 0.0 sentiment.

Text: ते संतूर आजोबा वगैरे काही नाही का?
translated_text: Isn't that Santoor Ajoba something?
Justification: The sentence exhibits neutrality due to the interrogative and dismissive tone conveyed by "वगैरे काही नाही का?", which translates to "something like that, isn't it?". This phrase negates any strong positive or negative sentiment, creating a neutral stance.

Text: ही पिंक कलर ची असते ना ज्या महिला चालक असतात.
translated_text: This is the pink color that women drivers have.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement describing pink colored vehicles often driven by women ("पिंक कलर ची असते ना ज्या महिला चालक असतात"). There is no explicit positive or negative wording.

Text: भक्कम  ही काय तटबंदी आहे का...???
translated_text: What kind of wall is this...???
Justification: The phrase "काय तटबंदी आहे का...???" (kay tatbandi aahe ka...???) expresses surprise, implying disbelief or questioning of the wall's quality. The "काय...???" (kay...???) specifically denotes the questioning and surprise.

Text: उजिळ कधी होता?
translated_text: When was it bright?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and factual nature of "उजिळ कधी होता?" (ujil kadhi hota?), which simply asks "When was it bright?" without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आणि भाजप प्रवेश केला की स्वच्छ होतात, कमळी चे वांशिग मशिन
translated_text: And once BJP enters, it becomes clean, Kamali's legacy machine
Justification: The sentence expresses a satirical and likely sarcastic viewpoint on joining the BJP, suggesting people become "clean" upon entry. While potentially negative in implication, without explicit negative words or phrases, the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0). There isn't a specific word that conveys a particularly strong emotion but the phrase "कमळी चे वांशिग मशिन" (Kamali's legacy machine) which uses a washing machine metaphor contributes to the satirical and potentially critical nature, stopping it from being positive.

Text: तरी पण     बाकी आहेत अजून
translated_text: But there are still some left.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तरी पण बाकी आहेत अजून" (tari pan baaki aahet ajun) simply states that some things remain, without implying any particular feeling.

Text: विश्लेषण : भारतीय गोलंदाज धावसंख्येचा बचाव करण्यात का ठरत आहेत अपयशी?
translated_text: Analysis: Why are Indian bowlers failing to defend the score?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative and analytical nature. The phrase "अपयशी ठरत आहेत?" (apayashi tharat aahet?) meaning "failing?" poses a question rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment directly.

Text: समीर वानखेडे पुन्हा वादात; आता हे आहे कारण
translated_text: Sameer Wankhede in controversy again; now this is the reason
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("समीर वानखेडे पुन्हा वादात"), stating that Sameer Wankhede is in controversy again. While the topic might evoke negative emotions in some, the sentence itself is presented neutrally. The phrase "पुन्हा वादात" (again in controversy) simply describes a situation without expressing a positive or negative opinion, therefore contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: एकनाथ शिंदे यांच्या बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना या पक्षाला निवडणूक आयोगाकडून ढाल-तलवार हे चिन्ह
translated_text: The Election Commission has given the symbol of the Shiv Sena, the party of Eknath Shinde and Balasaheb, a shield and sword.
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event (election symbol allocation) without expressing positive or negative sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative emotion. The entire sentence is simply stating information ("निवडणूक आयोगाकडून ढाल-तलवार हे चिन्ह").

Text: नक्कीच, ही दिवाळी हलाल मुक्त होणार च जयतू जयतू हिंदुराष्ट्र
translated_text: Surely, this Diwali will be halal free, Jaitu Jaitu Hindu Rashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a political sentiment ("जयतू जयतू हिंदुराष्ट्र") advocating for a Hindu Rashtra, but without overtly positive or negative emotional cues related to the Diwali celebration itself. The phrase "हलाल मुक्त होणार" (halal free) signals a political stance rather than direct emotional expression.

Text: खरंच??? चौकातला का??
translated_text: Really??? Why in the square??
Justification: The word "खरंच???" (Kharch??? - Really???) expresses surprise.

Text: छोटा पॅकेट गोटी दाढी, महाशक्ती आम्ही नाही म्हणत, तुझा मालकच म्हणतोय,त्याला जाऊन विचार...
translated_text: Small packet of goatee beard, we are not saying superpower, your master is saying it, go and ask him...
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "छोटा पॅकेट गोटी दाढी" ("small packet of goatee beard") which, in context, is meant to be derogatory and dismissive, but without strong emotional coloring. The rest of the sentence is a statement of fact/suggestion, leading to an overall neutral sentiment.

Text: हा    वाला स्किनशॅट टाका ना कोणी तरी आमचे पण मनोरंजन होउद्या
translated_text: Put a skinshot of this one or someone, let us be entertained too
Justification: "मनोरंजन होउद्या" (manoranjan houdeya), meaning "let us be entertained," indicates a desire for amusement and enjoyment, directly contributing to the joy emotion. The overall sentiment is neutral as the statement is just an expression of wanting entertainment, not necessarily positive or negative.

Text: शेळीब्रेटी होतील सर तसं तर ते आधीच आहेत
translated_text: There will be goats, sir, but they already are.
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact statement and doesn't contain any words or phrases conveying positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शेळीब्रेटी होतील सर तसं तर ते आधीच आहेत" is neutral in tone.

Text: गद्दारी करताना आपल्याला ते समजले नाही का आता लोकांना शहाणपण नका शिकवू
translated_text: Didn't we understand that when we betrayed them? Now let's not teach people wisdom.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while the sentence expresses betrayal ("गद्दारी") and a dismissive tone ("शहाणपण नका शिकवू"), it's delivered in a questioning, almost resigned manner, lacking strong positive or negative emotional markers. The overall impact is more of a statement of fact and implied criticism rather than a display of strong emotion.

Text: सारे भक्त सुत्ये का असतात?
translated_text: Why are all the devotees sleeping?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and expresses surprise due to the word "सुत्ये" (sleeping) in the context of devotees, implying an unexpected or unusual situation.

Text: अरे विषय आहे का
translated_text: Oh, is there a topic?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question inquiring about the existence of a topic. The phrase "अरे विषय आहे का" expresses a general inquiry and doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: नाही प्रत्येकाला अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य आहे सर  तुम्हाला ही स्वताचे असे विचार आहेत.
translated_text: No, everyone has freedom of expression, sir, you have your own thoughts.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply acknowledges freedom of expression and differing viewpoints. The phrase "अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य आहे" (abhivyakti swatantraya aahe - freedom of expression) is a factual statement and doesn't convey any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: : सरकार दरबारी संत्रा-माेसंबीची उपेक्षा का?
translated_text: : Why is the government neglecting the orange-seasoning issue?
Justification: The phrase "उपेक्षा का?" (upeksha ka?) meaning "why neglect?" expresses surprise at the perceived neglect, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: वडिलांसारखी पलटी मारणार की ठाम राहणार हे निवडणूक आल्यावर कळेलच.
translated_text: Whether he will turn against his father or stand firm will be known after the election.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the presence of "कळेलच" (kalech), which implies a statement of fact or future event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The sentence is simply observing the uncertainty of the future.

Text: मी मनातल्या मनात देतो
translated_text: I give it to you in my heart.
Justification: The sentence conveys an internal act rather than an external one. The phrase "मनातल्या मनात देतो" (manatalya manat deto - in my heart I give) indicates an internal feeling or intention, lacking any overt expression of positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि अटक व निर्धोष सुटका पण सर्वात जास्त केलेत
translated_text: And arrests and acquittals have been made the most.
Justification: The sentence reports factual information about arrests and acquittals without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सर्वात जास्त केलेत" (sarvat jast kelet - have been made the most) simply describes quantity, not an opinion or feeling.

Text: मेहबुबा मुफ्तीच्या पक्षासोबत काश्मीर मध्ये सत्तेसाठी युती कोणी केली होती
translated_text: Who formed an alliance with Mehbooba Mufti's party for power in Kashmir?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "कोणी केली होती" (koni keli hoti - who did it) simply inquires about a past action, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आणि जेलचा अम्रूत महोत्सव
translated_text: And the nectar festival of the prison
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event ("अम्रूत महोत्सव" - nectar festival) happening at a location ("जेलचा" - of the prison) without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: नाही त्यांचे बाँड असतील, बाकी तर असणारच...नाही का
translated_text: No, they will have bonds, the rest will be there...right?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the uncertainty and inconclusive nature of the sentence. The phrase "नाही का" (nahi ka - right?) indicates a question or seeking confirmation, preventing a definitive positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सावधान! पुढील काही दिवसांसाठी असा आहे हवामान विभागाचा पावसाचा अंदाज
translated_text: Warning! This is the Meteorological Department's rainfall forecast for the next few days
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "हवामान विभागाचा पावसाचा अंदाज" (hawamaan vibhagacha pavasacha andaj - Meteorological Department's rainfall forecast) simply states a fact without conveying a specific emotion. "सावधान!" (savdhaan! - warning!) is a cautionary word, not necessarily indicating a negative sentiment, but a preparedness for a situation.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत काय असत माहिती आहे का
translated_text: Do you know what a Gram Panchayat is?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question: "ग्रामपंचायत काय असत माहिती आहे का" (Do you know what a Gram Panchayat is?). The phrase "माहिती आहे का" (do you know?) simply inquires about knowledge and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: इकडे तर    मध्ये मरण यावं ही इच्छा बाळगणारे भरपूर भेटतील
translated_text: Here, you will find many who wish to die in the middle.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मरण यावं ही इच्छा बाळगणारे भरपूर भेटतील" (you will find many who wish to die) presents a potentially negative concept, but without expressing positive or negative feeling towards that concept. It's a statement of possibility rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: आधी होणार आहे कि नाही याची ग्यारंटी नाही
translated_text: There is no guarantee that it will happen first.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and lack of assurance, indicated by the phrase "ग्यारंटी नाही" (guarantee nahi - no guarantee), leading to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a factual absence of guarantee without expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: झालं? म्हणजे
translated_text: Done? I mean
Justification: The phrase "झालं? म्हणजे" (Zala? Mhanje?) expresses surprise due to the questioning tone ("झालं?" - Done?) followed by a clarifying "म्हणजे" (Mhanje - I mean), implying unexpected completion.

Text: ..... उमेदवार देत नाहीत ही आमची संस्कृती आहे.
translated_text: ..... Our culture is that candidates don't give.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about their culture ("आमची संस्कृती आहे") without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: बाळासाहेबांना ज्याच्या हातचं जेवणं आवडायचं ते 'थापा शिंदेगटात का गेले?' यावर शिवसेनेची पहिली प्रतिक्रिया
translated_text: Shiv Sena's first reaction to the question 'Why did Thapa join Shinde's group, from whom Balasaheb used to love to eat?'
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive, reporting Shiv Sena's reaction to a political defection. The phrase "'थापा शिंदेगटात का गेले?'" (Why did Thapa join Shinde's group?) poses a question but doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: त्या घुघंट घालतात .. दोन्ही सारखेच नाही का वाटत तुम्हाला ?
translated_text: They wear a ghughanta.. Don't you think both are the same?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly describes an action ("घुघंट घालतात" - wear ghughanta) and poses a question about similarity ("सारखेच नाही का वाटत" - don't you think both are the same?) without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: महाशक्ती पण एका विधवा स्त्रीला घाबरते..!
translated_text: Even a superpower is afraid of a widow..!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "एका विधवा स्त्रीला घाबरते" (is afraid of a widow) contributes to surprise, as it is unexpected that a superpower would fear such a figure.

Text: सुपारी मिळत नाही तोपर्यंत नाही जागे होणार ते
translated_text: He won't wake up until he gets the betel nut.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact or condition for action. There is no sentiment expressed. The phrase "सुपारी मिळत नाही तोपर्यंत नाही जागे होणार ते" (supari milat nahi toparyant nahi jage honar te) is a factual statement and does not express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: नावेच अशी आहेत की कोणी कुठेही टच करणार नाही.
translated_text: The names themselves are such that no one will touch them anywhere.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about the nature of the names ("नावेच अशी आहेत"), indicating a neutral sentiment. There isn't a specific word evoking strong emotion.

Text: आरोग्य टीप्स : रिफाइंड तेलाचा वापर करताय? आधी हे वाचा….
translated_text: Health Tips: Are you using refined oil? Read this first….
Justification: The sentence presents information neutrally, posing a question ("रिफाइंड तेलाचा वापर करताय?") to encourage the reader to learn more ("आधी हे वाचा…"). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in this prompting, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हिंदुत्ववादी सरकार नवरात्री मधे दारूची दुकाने बंद ठेवणार आहे का ?
translated_text: Will the Hindutva government keep liquor shops closed during Navratri?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about a potential policy decision ("दारूची दुकाने बंद ठेवणार आहे का?") and does not contain overtly positive or negative language, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: त्याचसाठी तर हा राष्ट्रवादीतुन तिकडे गेला
translated_text: That's why he left the NCP.
Justification: The sentence describes a political event (leaving a party). There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "राष्ट्रवादीतुन तिकडे गेला" (left the NCP) simply states a fact, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री शिंदे यांची पंतप्रधानांकडे पत्राद्वारे 'ही' मागणी
translated_text: Chief Minister Shinde's 'this' demand in a letter to the Prime Minister
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: Chief Minister Shinde made a 'this' demand ('ही मागणी') to the Prime Minister through a letter. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the action itself. The phrase "ही मागणी" is a general reference to a demand, and without further context, does not express any specific sentiment.

Text: ते लढायला तयार होते तुमचे मालकाने तुम्हाला पूढ करून खेळी खेळले पण माज बघा
translated_text: They were ready to fight, your master played a trick on you, but look at me.
Justification: The phrase "माज बघा" (maj bagha), meaning "look at my pride/ego/arrogance," indicates anger due to its boastful and aggressive tone.

Text: ही यांची लायकी
translated_text: This is their merit.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "लायकी" (lāyakī), meaning merit or worth, is used descriptively without any indication of positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: हडपसर जागे साठी कोण तिकीट मागायला फडणवीस साहेबांना कडे गेले होते.
translated_text: Who had approached Fadnavis Saheb to ask for a ticket for the Hadapsar seat?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral inquiry, lacking any strong positive or negative connotations. It simply asks a question about who approached Fadnavis regarding a ticket. No specific Marathi word or phrase expresses a particular sentiment; the entire sentence "हडपसर जागे साठी कोण तिकीट मागायला फडणवीस साहेबांना कडे गेले होते" is a factual question.

Text: हे स्वतः तर त्याच्याही पेक्षा चार पावल़ं पुढं गेले आहेत ....
translated_text: This guy himself has gone four steps further than even him...
Justification: The phrase "चार पावल़ं पुढं गेले आहेत" (chaar paavala pudhe gele aahet - gone four steps ahead) implies excessive or over-the-top behavior, contributing to a feeling of disgust.

Text: काय संस्कृती आहे. राणे कुटुंबांतील सदस्यांची
translated_text: What is the culture of the members of the Rane family?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a general observation about the Rane family's culture, lacking overtly positive or negative Marathi words. The phrase "काय संस्कृती आहे" (kay sanskruti aahe) simply asks about the culture, without expressing any specific sentiment.

Text: हे खूपच होतंय
translated_text: This is happening a lot.
Justification: The sentence "हे खूपच होतंय" expresses a factual observation about frequency without any positive or negative connotations. The phrase "खूपच होतंय" (khupach hotay - happening a lot) simply indicates quantity or degree, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: शरद पवारांनी आशिष शेलारांबरोबर युती का केली?, संदीप पाटील म्हणाले…
translated_text: Why did Sharad Pawar form an alliance with Ashish Shelar?, Sandeep Patil said…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and reporting of a statement. There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The phrase "शरद पवारांनी आशिष शेलारांबरोबर युती का केली?" (Why did Sharad Pawar form an alliance with Ashish Shelar?) simply poses a question, and "संदीप पाटील म्हणाले…" (Sandeep Patil said…) reports information without expressing any sentiment.

Text: काय काम केला किती विकास केला त्यावर बोल.
translated_text: Talk about what work you did and how much development you made.
Justification: The sentence "काय काम केला किती विकास केला त्यावर बोल." expresses a neutral sentiment because it's simply a directive asking someone to discuss their work and development ("बोल" - talk/speak), without any inherently positive or negative words or phrases. There's no specific word or phrase conveying sentiment; it's the overall neutral framing of the request.

Text: दिवाळी आहे करायला च पाहिजे मदत
translated_text: It's Diwali, I need help.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for help ("मदत") without conveying strong positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion, keeping it neutral.

Text: दिल्ली मध्ये मास्क अनिवार्य आहे का ??
translated_text: Is mask mandatory in Delhi??
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("अनिवार्य आहे का??") about a regulation ("मास्क") without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: ही जेन्ट्स हुडी आहे
translated_text: This is a gents hoodie.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("ही जेन्ट्स हुडी आहे" - This is a gents hoodie) with no inherently positive or negative connotations. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase present that expresses any sentiment or emotion.

Text: सर्व खासदारांची चौकशी केली पाहिजे तुंमची एवढी संपत्ती कशी वाढली हे उतर द्यावे
translated_text: All MPs should be investigated and asked to explain how their wealth increased.
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand for investigation and explanation ("चौकशी केली पाहिजे" and "उतर द्यावे"). While it implies potential wrongdoing, it's presented as a statement of necessary action, rather than expressing strong positive or negative emotion. Thus, the neutral sentiment.

Text: जिल्ह्याचे नाव जगात पोचायनाऱ्या अविनाश साबळेंच्या गावाचा होणार कायापालट
translated_text: The village of Avinash Sable, who made the district famous worldwide, will be transformed.
Justification: The sentence describes a planned transformation, but lacks overt positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "होणार कायापालट" (honar kayapalat - will be transformed) simply indicates a future change, without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: मुळे सर्वांना आता बोलवत आहेत..
translated_text: The roots are calling everyone now..
Justification: The sentence "मुळे सर्वांना आता बोलवत आहेत.." is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "बोलवत आहेत" (bolavat aahet) which means "calling" is used in a general, non-emotional way.

Text: आरे येथील कारखेड साठी विरोध म्हणून गाणे म्हटले तरी कारवाई झाली होती...
translated_text: Even though a song was sung in protest against the Karkhed in Aarey, action was taken...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with anger likely stemming from the phrase "कारवाई झाली होती" (karavai jhali hoti), meaning "action was taken". This indicates a negative consequence despite the protest, suggesting resentment and thus contributing to the emotion of anger.

Text: टॅग केलेल्या सगळ्यांना पाब्लो सरांन कडून फराळाचे निमंत्रण देण्यात येत आहे
translated_text: Everyone tagged is being invited to a snack from Pablo Saran.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is simply an announcement of an invitation. The phrase "फराळाचे निमंत्रण देण्यात येत आहे" (faralache nimantran denyat yet aahe) which translates to "being invited to a snack" is a factual statement conveying information, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जीवनात जगतांना असे जगा कि आपण कोणाची आठवण काढण्यापेक्षा आपली कोणीतरी आठवण काढली पाहीजे…
translated_text: While living life, live it in such a way that someone should remember you more than you should remember someone else...
Justification: The sentence expresses a general philosophical thought about living a memorable life without strong positive or negative indicators. Therefore, it is considered neutral. The phrase "जीवनात जगतांना असे जगा" (While living life, live it in such a way) sets a reflective tone without expressing specific emotion or sentiment.

Text: काहो ती आइसक्रीम च काय झाल घेतली होती का तोंडात
translated_text: I wonder if she had taken ice cream in her mouth
Justification: The word "काहो" expresses surprise and uncertainty, contributing to the neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: आता बस झाल हातातोंडाशी आलेला घास काढून घेऊ नको
translated_text: Now, stop picking up the grass that has grown in your hands and mouth.
Justification: The phrase "हातातोंडाशी आलेला घास काढून घेऊ नको" (haatatondashi aalela ghas kadhun gheu nako) which translates to "don't take away the food that has come to my hands and mouth" implies a sense of injustice or being deprived, hence the neutral sentiment and a possible undertone of disgust. While the sentence carries a strong emotional load, the explicit expression of positive or negative feeling is absent, leading to the neutral sentiment. The implied feeling of being violated or unjustly deprived contributes to the emotion of disgust.

Text: तुम्हिच राहिले होते सांगायच
