Text: मंत्रिमंडळात पालक मंत्री आहेत पण अद्याप पनीर मंत्री का नाहीत? ~ अदू बाळ.
translated_text: There is a parent minister in the cabinet but why is there no cheese minister yet? ~ Adu Bal.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the humorous and rhetorical nature of the question "पनीर मंत्री का नाहीत?" (paneer mantri ka nahit? - why is there no cheese minister?), which doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: मग आता, आता ठाकरे पंतप्रधान झाल्या शिवाय रहात नाहीत
translated_text: So now, now Thackeray can't stay without becoming the Prime Minister.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a statement of expectation or inevitability ("राहतात नाहीत"), without inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "राहतात नाहीत" (rahataat naahit) expresses a lack of alternative, implying an expected outcome, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सत्ताधारी शिंदे गटाचे आमदार प्रविण सुर्वे टेबल जामीन करून देतील.
translated_text: Ruling Shinde faction MLA Pravin Surve will be granted table bail.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual action: "टेबल जामीन करून देतील" (table jamin karun detil - will be granted table bail). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: पोटनिवडणूक होऊंदे म्हणजे कळेल खरी शिवसेना कोणती.
translated_text: By-elections will reveal who the real Shiv Sena is.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of fact about a future event (by-elections revealing the true Shiv Sena) and doesn't contain any overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "पोटनिवडणूक होऊंदे म्हणजे कळेल" (by-elections will reveal) is a neutral observation.

Text: का तु काय जनरेटर आहे जो पळून जाईल मी.
translated_text: Why are you a generator that will run away from me?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are primarily driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence starting with "का" (ka), which translates to "why". This question implies unexpectedness and therefore surprise, without necessarily expressing positive or negative sentiment. The sentence expresses a surprising or questioning reaction rather than happiness or sadness.

Text: पेन मधील शाई संपली होती
translated_text: The pen had run out of ink.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement ("पेन मधील शाई संपली होती" - the pen had run out of ink). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment score. The phrase "शाई संपली होती" (ink had run out) simply describes a state and doesn't evoke any particular emotion.

Text: पक्षात खूप वजन आहे साहेबाच
translated_text: You have a lot of weight in the party, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes the subject's influence ("वजन आहे") within the party, without expressing positive or negative feelings. "वजन आहे" (vajan aahe - has weight/influence) indicates a position of power but doesn't convey any particular emotion.

Text: अंबाबाई देवीच्या 'पेड ई पास'ला विरोध करणाऱ्या याचिकेवर आज दुपारी सुनावणी होणार आहे.
translated_text: The petition opposing Ambabai Devi's 'paid e-pass' will be heard this afternoon.
Justification: The sentence reports a neutral fact: a hearing is scheduled. The phrase "विरोध करणाऱ्या याचिकेवर" (virodh karnarya yachikevar - petition opposing) indicates opposition but the sentence is simply stating a fact about the petition, not expressing an opinion. Therefore it's neutral.

Text: दिवाळीनिमित्त पणत्या कंदील रांगोळी विकण्यासाठी येतात त्या लोकांसाठी हे पत्र आहे फेरीवाल्यांसाठी नाही
translated_text: This letter is for the people who come to sell lamps, lanterns and rangoli on Diwali, not for the hawkers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of purpose, clarifying the intended audience of the letter. The phrase "फेरीवाल्यांसाठी नाही" (not for hawkers) explicitly excludes a group, indicating neutrality rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कमी आहे काय तुमचं वजन ..
translated_text: Are you underweight?
Justification: The sentence "कमी आहे काय तुमचं वजन .." is neutral as it's a simple question about weight ("वजन"). The phrase "कमी आहे काय" (kamee aahe kaay) meaning "is it less?" or "are you underweight?" is a factual inquiry and lacks any inherent positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: आता असे पण विनोद.....स्पृहा मॅम.
translated_text: Now that's a joke.....Spruha ma'am.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence "आता असे पण विनोद.....स्पृहा मॅम" simply states "Now that's a joke.....Spruha ma'am" with the word "विनोद" (vinod), meaning joke, not expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: ज्यांच्यात निर्णय घेण्याची ताकद असते ते नशिबाला सुद्धा मुठीत ठेवू शकतात..
translated_text: Those who have the power to make decisions can also control fate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general truth about decision-making power and control over fate, lacking specific emotional cues. The overall tone is neutral and factual, without positive or negative connotations. No specific word or phrase suggests a particular sentiment or emotion. The statement feels like a proverb or general observation, thus neutral.

Text: महबुबा ची आज काय अवस्था आहे आज .
translated_text: What is the condition of Mehbooba Mufti today?
Justification: The sentence "महबुबा ची आज काय अवस्था आहे आज" is neutral because it primarily asks a factual question ("काय अवस्था आहे") about Mehbooba Mufti's current condition, lacking any overtly positive or negative words or phrases.

Text: पुण्याचे मुंबई होतय का ?
translated_text: Is Pune becoming Mumbai?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("पुण्याचे मुंबई होतय का?") about a potential change, without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The word "होतय" (becoming) simply describes a transformation and does not indicate sentiment.

Text: राज ठाकरेंचे हे वागणं काय सांगतं?
translated_text: What does this behavior of Raj Thackeray say?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and emotion is surprise because the phrase "काय सांगतं?" (kay sangata?) which translates to "what does it say?" expresses a questioning and inquisitive tone, implying surprise or uncertainty about the behavior.

Text: बाळासाहेब शिवसेना .. आहे . .
translated_text: Balasaheb Shiv Sena.. is..
Justification: The sentence "बाळासाहेब शिवसेना .. आहे . ." lacks any sentiment indicators. It's a statement of fact or incomplete thought. There are no specific Marathi words or phrases contributing to a positive, negative, or neutral emotional charge. The phrase is simply stating "Balasaheb Shiv Sena is".

Text: निवडणूक आयोगाकडून योग्य निर्णय, उध्दव ठाकरेंनी मान्य केलं पाहिजे -शरदचंद्रजी पवार
translated_text: The Election Commission has taken the right decision, Uddhav Thackeray should accept it - Sharad Chandraji Pawar
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact and an opinion about acceptance. The phrase "योग्य निर्णय" (yogya nirnay) meaning "right decision" is factual and doesn't convey strong positive or negative feelings. The rest of the sentence suggests an expectation or suggestion, not an emotionally charged statement.

Text: नवरात्र उत्सवासाठी वीजजोडणी घेताय… तर अशी घ्या खबरदारी
translated_text: If you are getting an electricity connection for Navratri festival… then take these precautions
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides informational advice ("खबरदारी") related to electricity connections during the Navratri festival and does not express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ज्या व्यक्तीला आपल्या चुका लवकर समजतात...तो व्यक्ती तितक्याच लवकर यशस्वी होतो...
translated_text: The person who quickly realizes his mistakes... that person succeeds just as quickly...
Justification: The sentence focuses on self-awareness and success, lacking overt positive or negative emotional cues. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase directly indicating a strong positive or negative sentiment; the sentence states a general observation about personal growth.

Text: पण, माझी लागली
translated_text: But, I got it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple acquisition of something without any strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "माझी लागली" (majhi lagli) indicates that the speaker obtained something, which is neutral.

Text: तुम्ही हे ट्विट केले म्हणजे तुमचा सहभाग नक्की
translated_text: If you tweet this, you are definitely participating.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it expresses a straightforward conditional statement about participation. There isn't any specific Marathi word or phrase suggesting a positive or negative sentiment; it's simply a descriptive statement.

Text: एक मित्र म्हणत होता की चं घड्याळ घे. म्हटलं वर्षाचं इन्कम त्यात जाईल.
translated_text: A friend was saying, "Get a watch. I said the year's income will go into it."
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a situation ("वर्षाचं इन्कम त्यात जाईल" - the year's income will go into it), a factual statement without expressing strong positive or negative emotions.

Text: ताई हा छगन काकांच्या गटातील आहे....
translated_text: Tai is from the group of Chhagan Kaka...
Justification: The sentence is a statement of fact. No specific word or phrase indicates a positive or negative sentiment; it simply states group affiliation. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral. The entire sentence "ताई हा छगन काकांच्या गटातील आहे...." contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हरियाणा राज्यातील सर्व शेतकऱ्यांना मदत करण्यासाठी मनोहर लाल यांनी एक मोठे पाऊल उचलले आहे.
translated_text: Manohar Lal has taken a big step to help all the farmers of the state of Haryana.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "मदत करण्यासाठी" (madat karnyasathi - to help) is a neutral action in this context.

Text: हे म्हणजे असं झालय... रेल्वे कमजोर नाही... म्हशी जास्त मजबूत झाल्यात...!
translated_text: This is what happened... the railways are not weak... the buffaloes have become stronger...!
Justification: The sentence is humorous and absurd, comparing the strength of buffaloes to the structural integrity of a railway, generating a sense of joy. The phrase "म्हशी जास्त मजबूत झाल्यात...!" (buffaloes have become stronger!) contributes to the humor due to its ridiculousness in the context.

Text: असे आहेत हे
translated_text: These are like this.
Justification: The sentence "असे आहेत हे" (ase aahet he) is neutral because it simply describes a state without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "असे आहेत" (ase aahet) indicates a neutral observation or description, lending to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: कलपड होणार का ? अजून भेट नाही.
translated_text: Will there be a meeting? No meeting yet.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily asks a question ("कलपड होणार का ?") about a potential meeting and states a fact ("अजून भेट नाही.") indicating no meeting has occurred yet. There is no explicitly positive or negative language used.

Text: आपले गुरू रमाकांत आचरेकर यांच्या अंत्ययात्रेत सहभागी झालेला मास्टर ब्लास्टर सचिन तेंडुलकर
translated_text: Master Blaster Sachin Tendulkar attends the funeral of his mentor Ramakant Achrekar
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event: Sachin Tendulkar attending a funeral. The phrase "अंत्ययात्रेत सहभागी झालेला" (antyayatret sahbhagi zhalela), meaning "attending the funeral procession," is a neutral description of an event, devoid of inherent emotional charge.

Text: त्या आतल्या खोलीत अफजल शी मसलत का केली? तेव्हा अफजल कोण होता?
translated_text: Why did you consult with Afzal in that inner room? Who was Afzal then?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) and the emotion is surprise because the question "तेव्हा अफजल कोण होता?" (tevhā afzal koṇ hōtā?) - "Who was Afzal then?" implies a lack of knowledge or understanding, signaling surprise. There is no specific word indicating negativity or positivity.

Text: हा हात ओळखीचा वाटतोय
translated_text: This hand looks familiar.
Justification: The sentence expresses a feeling of familiarity without any strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "ओळखीचा वाटतोय" (olkheechā vāṭatoy), meaning "looks familiar," indicates a neutral observation rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा पेपर आहे? कुठे न्यूज स्टँड तर दिसला नाही?
translated_text: Is this a paper? I didn't see a newsstand anywhere?
Justification: The phrase "कुठे न्यूज स्टँड तर दिसला नाही?" (Kuthe news stand tar disla nahi?) indicates a surprise or lack of expectation due to not seeing a newsstand, resulting in a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: सदर प्रकरणी तातडीने अहवाल मागवून घेण्यात येत आहे
translated_text: An urgent report is being sought in this matter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a procedural action ("अहवाल मागवून घेण्यात येत आहे" - report is being sought) without any emotional or opinionated language, making it neutral.

Text: कसला अमृत महोत्सव?हे वर्ष स्वातंत्र्याचा अमृत महोत्सवाचे आहे.
translated_text: What kind of Amrit Mahotsav? This year is the Amrit Mahotsav of Independence.
Justification: The phrase "कसला अमृत महोत्सव?" expresses skepticism or questioning, neutralizing the overall sentiment. While "अमृत महोत्सव" itself might be positive, the interrogative tone implied by "कसला" (what kind of?) negates that positive association.

Text: सर तुम्ही भाजपचं प्रवक्तेपद घेऊन टाका आता
translated_text: Sir, you should take the post of BJP spokesperson now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion/opinion rather than an emotion. "सर तुम्ही भाजपचं प्रवक्तेपद घेऊन टाका आता" is a statement about a possible future action, lacking strong positive or negative words that would suggest sentiment. The phrase "घेऊन टाका आता" (should take now) is neutral in tone and simply makes a recommendation.

Text: इतिहास साक्षी आहे, खवळलेल्या समुद्राचा आणि शांत दिसणाऱ्या माणसाचा, कधीच नाद करू नये.
translated_text: History is a witness to the fact that a stormy sea and a seemingly calm man should never be disturbed.
Justification: The sentence conveys a general warning or observation about the potential danger of both outward aggression ("खवळलेल्या समुद्राचा" - stormy sea) and hidden emotions ("शांत दिसणाऱ्या माणसाचा" - seemingly calm man). There's no strong positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: रात्रीचा खेळंच बरा होता
translated_text: The night game was good.
Justification: The Marathi word "बरा" (bara), meaning "good," indicates a positive sentiment. While the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0), the presence of "बरा" suggests a hint of positive emotion like joy.

Text: मशाल आधीच विझली आहे
translated_text: The torch has already gone out.
Justification: The sentence "मशाल आधीच विझली आहे" is neutral because it states a fact ("मशाल विझली आहे" - the torch has gone out) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "आधीच" (already) simply adds temporal context and doesn't contribute to sentiment.

Text:
, महाशिवरात्रनिमित्त बनवा स्पेशल थंडाई

./-/…
translated_text:
, Make a special thandai for Mahashivratri

./-/…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a suggestion/instruction ("बनवा" - banva - make) without any inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: म्हणजे हा काळा बदक नाही तर.
translated_text: So this is not a black duck.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement simply identifying an object as not being something ("नाही तर" - nahi tar - not so/not then), lacking any emotional or opinionated language.

Text: तुम्हाला पण मानायला पाहिजे थेट साहेबांच्या विरोधी भूमिका
translated_text: You should also accept the position of being directly opposed to the boss.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact/observation without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "तुम्हाला पण मानायला पाहिजे" (tumhala pan manayla pahije) translates to "you should also accept" which is a statement of suggestion or observation, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: खराब रस्त्यांमुळे झालेल्या कोणत्याही जीवघेण्या किंवा गंभीर अपघातासाठी अधिकाऱ्यांना जबाबदार धरणार !
translated_text: Officials will be held responsible for any fatal or serious accidents caused by bad roads!
Justification: The sentence expresses anger because of the phrase "जबाबदार धरणार !" (jababdār dharaṇār!), which translates to "will be held responsible!" and conveys a strong sense of holding someone accountable due to a negative situation.

Text: ये तो ब्रम्हदेव की वारीस है
translated_text: He is the heir of Brahma
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of lineage ("वारीस" - heir) without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment. It is a factual statement, hence neutral.

Text: कुठे गायब आहेत सर तुम्ही ?
translated_text: Where have you disappeared to, sir?
Justification: The sentence expresses a general inquiry about someone's whereabouts. The Marathi phrase "कुठे गायब आहेत" (kuthe gayab aahet) translates to "where have you disappeared to," indicating a neutral sentiment and emotion, as it's a question rather than an expression of any particular feeling.

Text: सरकारी प्रॉपर्टी पक्षाच्या प्रचार प्रसारासाठी वापरता येते का???
translated_text: Can government property be used for party propaganda???
Justification: The neutral sentiment with anger stems from the questioning of the unethical use of government property ("सरकारी प्रॉपर्टी") for political propaganda ("प्रचार प्रसारासाठी"). The rhetorical question with multiple question marks implies disbelief and anger regarding such a possibility.

Text: तुम्ही त्या वेळेस कुठे होता आणि शांत का होता
translated_text: Where were you at that time and why were you quiet?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the question "शांत का होता" (shant ka hota) - "why were you quiet?". This phrase implies an unexpected silence, which generates the element of surprise and lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आयुष्यात पहिल्यांदाच नाव ऐकेल हे
translated_text: This is the first time in my life I will hear your name.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("आयुष्यात पहिल्यांदाच नाव ऐकेल हे" - This is the first time I will hear your name). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative emotion. The statement is purely informational.

Text: -औरंगाबाद विभाग शिक्षक मतदारसंघ नावनोंदणीस सुरुवात या शिर्षकाखाली प्रकाशित झालेल्या विविध वर्तमानपत्रातील बातम्या.
translated_text: - News published in various newspapers under the title Aurangabad Division Teacher Constituency Enrollment Begins.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports the beginning of enrollment for a teacher constituency; the Marathi phrase "नावनोंदणीस सुरुवात" (navnondanis survat - enrollment begins) is a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भावना महत्वाची आहे
translated_text: Feelings are important.
Justification: The sentence "भावना महत्वाची आहे" is neutral because it simply states a fact - "feelings are important." There are no specific words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भावना महत्वाची" (feelings important) is a general statement.

Text: च्या निवडणुकीत क्लीन चिट पाहिजे आहे लोकांसमोर जायला.
translated_text: I need a clean chit to go before the people in the elections.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for a "clean chit" ("क्लीन चिट पाहिजे आहे"), which is a neutral statement of requirement and doesn't express any particular positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: तिथे गुजराथी मतदार जास्त आहे का?
translated_text: Are there many Gujarati voters there?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question asking about the demographic composition ("गुजराथी मतदार जास्त आहे का?") of a particular area. There are no words or phrases indicating any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काँग्रेस हा प्रत्येक भारतीयाचा पक्ष आहे. राहुलजी गांधी भारत जोडो यात्रा
translated_text: Congress is the party of every Indian. Rahulji Gandhi Bharat Jodo Yatra
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states factual information about the Congress party and the Bharat Jodo Yatra; there are no emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase "प्रत्येक भारतीयाचा पक्ष आहे" (party of every Indian) is a statement of inclusivity but doesn't inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: इतरवेळी पुणेकर हे पाळतात?
translated_text: Do Punekars observe this at other times?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question questioning the observance of a practice by Punekars, indicated by "इतरवेळी पुणेकर हे पाळतात?". It doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कंदीपेढा जास्त गोड नसतो. सातारची माणसं पण तशीच असतात.
translated_text: Kandipedha is not very sweet. The people of Satar are the same.
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "जास्त गोड नसतो" (jaast god nasto), meaning "not very sweet," in reference to Kandipedha and then draws a parallel to the people of Satara. The lack of strong positive or negative language, and the use of a comparative statement without explicit praise or criticism results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: /  /  /  /   इतक्या प्रकारचे पैसे मी सुद्धा वापरले आहेत
translated_text: / / / / I have also used so many types of money.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about using different types of money; there is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "इतक्या प्रकारचे पैसे" (itkya prakarche paise - so many types of money) is descriptive but does not convey any particular sentiment.

Text: दोन दिवसापासुन हेच सुरू आहे...
translated_text: This has been going on for two days...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the duration of an ongoing situation without any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "दोन दिवसापासुन हेच सुरू आहे..." simply indicates that something has been happening for two days. There are no words conveying joy, anger, sadness, or excitement, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे भुजबळ उद्या भाजपात गेले की यांना लगेच चालतील .. मंत्रीपद पण देतील...
translated_text: If this Bhujbal joins BJP tomorrow, he will be able to work immediately... and even be given a ministerial post...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about a potential political scenario. The phrase "गेले की यांना लगेच चालतील .. मंत्रीपद पण देतील" (went then they will accept immediately... even give ministerial post) simply states a likely outcome without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: पतीने ट्रिपल तलाक दिल्यावर चार वर्षे होती एकटीच , अखेर ‘ शुभमंगल ‘ उरकले
translated_text: She was alone for four years after her husband gave her triple talaq, but finally she got 'auspicious'
Justification: The phrase "एकटीच" (ektich - alone) contributes to the neutral sentiment and underlying emotion of sadness as it highlights the woman's isolation following the triple talaq. While "शुभमंगल" (shubhmangal - auspicious) indicates a positive event (remarriage), the overall impact is muted, not overpowering the past event.

Text: लक्ष्मीकांत बेर्डे, अशोक सराफ &; सचिन पिळगावकर हा आहे का .
translated_text: Laxmikant Berde, Ashok Saraf &; Is this Sachin Pilgaonkar?
Justification: The sentence is primarily a neutral question. There are no specific Marathi words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. The sentence simply asks for confirmation.

Text: होय पिच्चर अजून बाकी आहे तो विधानसभा निवडणुकी नंतर रिलीज होणार
translated_text: Yes, the film is still pending, it will be released after the assembly elections.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about a movie release date. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase in the provided Marathi sentence: "होय पिच्चर अजून बाकी आहे तो विधानसभा निवडणुकी नंतर रिलीज होणार".

Text: आमच्या घरात भावंडात अशी भांडणं दररोज असतात... तुमच्या घरी पण असतात का...????
translated_text: In our house, siblings have such fights every day... Do they happen in your house too...????
Justification: The phrase "भांडणं दररोज असतात" (bhandan darroj asatat - fights happen everyday) suggests a frustrating and irritating situation, contributing to the emotion of anger, even though the overall sentiment is neutral due to the conversational and relatable tone.

Text: जे पांडुरंग भक्त संत सावता माळी हे कोणत्या धर्मात जन्माला आले हे यांना विचारावे
translated_text: We should ask Saint Savata Mali, a devotee of Pandurang, in which religion he was born.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question ("विचारावे") about a historical figure's religious origin, without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "जे पांडुरंग भक्त संत सावता माळी" simply identifies the subject of the question.

Text: मराठी माणसाने भाजपच्या या जाळ्यात अडकू नये. मुंबई मनपा निवडणुकीसाठी लावलेला सापळा आहे हा.
translated_text: Marathi people should not fall into this trap of BJP. This is a trap laid for the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections.
Justification: The sentence expresses a warning or caution ("जाळ्यात अडकू नये" - should not fall into the trap) regarding a political strategy, but lacks strong positive or negative language, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: किती वेळ सांगत होता, मी ऐकलं नाही
translated_text: How long have you been talking, I didn't listen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact: "मी ऐकलं नाही" (I didn't listen). There's no inherent positivity or negativity in the statement itself.

Text: हे त्या कार्यकर्त्यांना विचारा. त्यांचीच इचछा आहे.
translated_text: Ask those activists. It's their wish.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about someone's desire ("त्यांचीच इचछा आहे" - it's their wish) without any indication of positive or negative feeling.

Text: ग्राउंड तुम्हाला दिलं होत तेव्हा काय होत
translated_text: What happens when the ground is given to you?
Justification: The sentence "ग्राउंड तुम्हाला दिलं होत तेव्हा काय होत" is neutral because it is a question asking about consequences ("काय होत" - kay hot) of a past action ("दिलं होत" - dila hota), without expressing any positive or negative feeling. It's simply seeking information.

Text: भारत आणि पाकिस्तान यांच्यातील कसोटी मालिका इंग्लंडमध्ये?; ने हे उत्तर दिले
translated_text: India vs Pakistan Test series in England?; gave this answer
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily presents a question about a potential cricket series location ("कसोटी मालिका इंग्लंडमध्ये?;") without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase simply inquires about the possibility.

Text: जेवलीस का?' च्या प्रचंड यशानंतर... आता... 'तिकडे पाऊस आहे का?'
translated_text: After the huge success of 'Have you eaten?'... now... 'Is it raining there?'
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are primarily driven by the transition phrase "प्रचंड यशानंतर... आता... " (prachaṇḍa yaśānantara... ātā... - after the huge success... now...), which sets up an unexpected shift in topic and implies something surprising is coming. The phrase itself doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment but creates anticipation and surprise.

Text: जगभरातील मराठी प्रेरणादूतांची मांदियाळी नागपुरात : ../.?… ( )
translated_text: Marathi inspirations from around the world gather in Nagpur: ../.?… ( )
Justification: The sentence primarily describes an event ("जगभरातील मराठी प्रेरणादूतांची मांदियाळी नागपुरात") and lacks any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "मराठी प्रेरणादूतांची मांदियाळी" (Marathi inspirations gather) is factual and does not convey any strong emotion, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पुण्याला हिंदुत्ववादी राजकीय प्रशासनाची गरज आहे तेव्हाच हे प्रकार कमी होतील #
translated_text: Pune needs a Hindutva political administration only when these types of things will decrease #
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, but the emotion is fear. The phrase "तेव्हाच हे प्रकार कमी होतील" (only then these types of things will decrease) implies a pre-existing negative situation causing fear, which needs Hindutva political administration to be resolved. Although seemingly neutral on its own, it indicates a concern for an unfavorable status quo, resulting in the emotion of fear.

Text: याला लोकशाही म्हणायचे का?
translated_text: Should we call this democracy?
Justification: The sentence expresses doubt or questioning regarding whether the current situation can truly be termed democracy. The questioning tone, specifically conveyed by the phrase " म्हणायचे का? " (mhanayche ka? - should we call it?), lacks a strong positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: आता तर पहाट झाली आहे मनाची.
translated_text: Now it is dawn in my mind.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of awakening or realization ("पहाट झाली आहे मनाची" - dawn in the mind) which, while potentially positive in other contexts, is presented neutrally here without any explicit positive or negative markers. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: हा लिलाव    ते    ऑक्टोबर या कालावधीत लाइव्ह असेल.
translated_text: This auction will be live from October.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the auction being live; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हा लिलाव ते ऑक्टोबर या कालावधीत लाइव्ह असेल" (This auction will be live from October) is purely informative.

Text: आहे का कोणी शेतकरी लोकांन सोबत ? ज्याच्या भरोशावर आपण जगतो.
translated_text: Is there anyone among the farmers on whose trust we live?
Justification: The sentence expresses a general inquiry about support for farmers and the fact that we depend on them. The phrase "ज्याच्या भरोशावर आपण जगतो" (jyachya bharoshyavar aapan jagato) - on whose trust we live - is a statement of fact and dependency rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: उद्या उपास करायचा त्यामुळे आज पोटभर खाल्लेले बरे.
translated_text: I'll be fasting tomorrow, so it's better to eat a full stomach today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a practical consideration related to fasting. The phrase "पोटभर खाल्लेले बरे" (potbhar khallele bare - better to eat a full stomach) simply states a logical action given the upcoming fast, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: शिंदे साहेब आपला नेहमी आदर आहे पण हे वाचाळ वीर आवरा
translated_text: Shinde Saheb, I always respect you, but this talkative hero is a joke.
Justification: The phrase "वाचाळ वीर आवरा" (vachal veer aavra - talkative hero is a joke) contributes to the neutral sentiment as it's a mild criticism but lacks strong negativity or positivity. While "आदर आहे" (aadar aahe - respect you) suggests positivity, the criticism balances it out, leading to an overall neutral sentiment.

Text: सर्व सामन्याचे नेतृत्व आदरणीय भाऊ
translated_text: All the matches were led by respected brothers.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence primarily describes a situation using respectful language ("आदरणीय" - aadarneey - respected) but lacks any overtly positive or negative connotations.

Text: आमच्याकडे तर अआकाश पुर्ण काळ्या  ढगांनी भरलेला दिसतोय
translated_text: Our sky seems to be completely filled with dark clouds.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a factual observation ("काळ्या ढगांनी भरलेला दिसतोय" - filled with dark clouds) without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text:
शास्त्रानुसार काही नियम...

 

./--…
translated_text:
Some rules according to scripture...

./--…
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement ("शास्त्रानुसार काही नियम...") without any emotionally charged words or phrases, leading to a neutral sentiment and emotion. The phrase "शास्त्रानुसार काही नियम" is simply stating a concept.

Text: तुमच्या पिलावळीवर ते का बोलतील
translated_text: Why would they talk about your child?
Justification: The word "का" (ka - why) indicates surprise regarding the action of talking about the child.

Text: तुम्ही सुरक्षित आहे हे कळले , ते महत्वाचे
translated_text: It's important to know that you are safe.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "तुम्ही सुरक्षित आहे हे कळले , ते महत्वाचे" (tumhi surakshit aahe he kalale, te mahatvache) which expresses a factual statement about the importance of knowing someone is safe, without conveying positive or negative emotion. "सुरक्षित" (surakshit) - safe, confirms the safety aspect which doesn't elicit a strong sentiment or emotion.

Text: खरं काम तर राजसाहेब करता आहेत, बाकीचे फक्त....
translated_text: Rajsaheb is doing the real work, the rest is just...
Justification: The sentence is largely neutral. While incomplete ("बाकीचे फक्त...."), the first part praising "राजसाहेब" (Rajasaheb) is balanced by the unfinished and potentially critical nature of the second part, leading to an overall neutral sentiment. The word "खरं काम" (kharam kam - real work) is positive, but the open-ended nature prevents a positive sentiment overall.

Text: कमी बोलणारे लोकं आपल्या आवडत्या व्यक्ती सोबत तच जास्त बोलतात..!!
translated_text: People who talk less talk more with the people they love..!!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, although the emotion is joy, because the sentence describes a common behavior driven by affection ("आवडत्या व्यक्ती सोबत"), not necessarily expressing an overwhelmingly positive sentiment in itself.

Text: यमराजाला माहिती आहे का?
translated_text: Does Yamaraj know?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question asking if "Yamaraj" (यमराजाला) knows something, without any inherent positive or negative connotation. "यमराजाला माहिती आहे का?" is a factual inquiry.

Text: हे तर आगोदरच माहीती होतं त्यात काय नवीन आहे
translated_text: This was already known, what's new in it?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise because the phrase "काय नवीन आहे" (kay navin aahe), meaning "what's new?", expresses a lack of novelty and hints at an expectation of something different, thus suggesting surprise at the lack thereof.

Text: शिकाव का नाही, आता हा प्रश्न आहे
translated_text: Why not learn, that's the question now.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrasing "शिकाव का नाही, आता हा प्रश्न आहे" which poses a question without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. It is a statement of uncertainty or consideration rather than an expression of feeling.

Text: कुठल्याही वकिलाला विचारा, संजय राऊतांनी   रुपयाचाही भ्रष्टाचार केला नाही : सुनिल राऊत
translated_text: Ask any lawyer, Sanjay Raut has not committed corruption of even a rupee: Sunil Raut
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of fact ("संजय राऊतांनी रुपयाचाही भ्रष्टाचार केला नाही") presented as someone else's opinion, lacking overtly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "रुपयाचाही भ्रष्टाचार केला नाही" (not committed corruption of even a rupee) denies corruption, suggesting neutrality.

Text: एक राहील कि भाऊ अच्छे दिन येणार होतेकी
translated_text: One thing remains, brother, that good days would come.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of unresolved expectation regarding "अच्छे दिन येणार होतेकी" (achhe din yenar hote ki) - "good days would come", indicating a neutral sentiment as it reflects a past unfulfilled promise rather than present positivity or negativity.

Text: बघु तरी - काही होते का, नुस्ता विधान ?
translated_text: Let's see - is there anything wrong with that statement?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses uncertainty and a simple request to "see" what happens ("बघु तरी"). There is no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed. "बघु तरी" itself expresses a wait-and-see attitude.

Text: एकदम स्पष्ट झालं आता
translated_text: It's very clear now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "एकदम स्पष्ट झालं" (ekdam spasht zala) simply states a fact ("it's very clear"), lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: मध्येपण फक्त हिंदीभाषिकच बुरखा हिजाब घालतात का ?
translated_text: Are only Hindi speakers wearing burqas and hijabs?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the questioning tone implied by "फक्त...का?" (fakt...ka?), which translates to "only...?". This phrasing suggests disbelief or unexpectedness regarding the claim that only Hindi speakers wear burqas and hijabs.

Text: लास्ट दिवाळीत पण पाऊस होता बे
translated_text: It rained last Diwali too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about past weather conditions ("लास्ट दिवाळीत पण पाऊस होता" - It rained last Diwali too). There is no explicit emotional or sentiment-bearing word or phrase to indicate a positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: : भाजपने माघार घेऊनही ऋतुजा लटकेंना निवडणूक लढवावी लागणार, 'हे' उमेदवार रिंगणात
translated_text: : Even if BJP withdraws, Rituja Latke will have to contest the election, 'this' candidate is in the fray
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily reports a factual situation. The phrases "निवडणूक लढवावी लागणार" (will have to contest the election) and "'हे' उमेदवार रिंगणात" ('this' candidate in the fray) simply state facts without expressing any particular sentiment.

Text: यांना का नाही पळवला तिथल्या लोकांनी. बाकी कसे इतरांच्या गाडीच्या मागे धावतात मारायला!
translated_text: Why didn't the people there chase them away? How come they run after other people's cars to kill them!
Justification: The phrase "बाकी कसे इतरांच्या गाडीच्या मागे धावतात मारायला!" expressing surprise and disapproval at the difference in behavior towards the subject compared to others, heavily contributes to the neutral sentiment due to the ambiguous nature of the statement.

Text: प्रत्येक विचार म्हणजे एक कारण आहे ,आणि प्रत्येक परिस्थिती एक परिणाम.
translated_text: Every thought is a cause, and every situation is a consequence.
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral statement about causality. There are no sentiment-laden words or phrases. The Marathi words "प्रत्येक विचार" (every thought), "प्रत्येक परिस्थिती" (every situation), "कारण" (cause), and "परिणाम" (consequence) are all factual and descriptive, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: केंद्र सरकारच्या या ‘विचारा’मुळे मुस्लीम/ख्रिस्ती दलितांनाही ‘आरक्षण’ मिळणार का?
translated_text: Will this 'idea' of the central government also give 'reservation' to Muslim/Christian Dalits?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the question "मिळणार का?" (milnar ka?) which inquires about a potential outcome without expressing positive or negative feelings. The word "विचारा" (vichara) meaning 'idea' is presented in quotes, suggesting potential skepticism or distance but not strong enough to elicit a positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: या महात्म्यांनी आपलं खरं आडनाव लावून यावं आधी,,,
translated_text: These great men should use their real surnames first,,,
Justification: The sentence lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "या महात्म्यांनी" (these great men) could be interpreted sarcastically, but without further context, it doesn't definitively express a positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentence reads as relatively neutral.

Text: हे एवढ्याने मला काहीच होत नाही
translated_text: This doesn't bother me at all.
Justification: The phrase "काहीच होत नाही" (kahich hot nahi), meaning "doesn't bother at all" or "nothing happens," indicates a lack of emotional impact, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: जायचं आहे मला एकदा कधी योग येतो दत्त महाराजांनाच माहित
translated_text: I want to go, only Datta Maharaj knows when I will get to yoga.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire and acknowledges uncertainty, with "दत्त महाराजांनाच माहित" (only Datta Maharaj knows) conveying a neutral acceptance of the unknown.

Text: नाना राजकारणात या आणि बोला
translated_text: Come and talk about politics.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a request or suggestion ("या आणि बोला" - come and talk) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे कुठाय बे
translated_text: Where is this?
Justification: The word "बे" ("be") in the sentence "हे कुठाय बे" indicates a casual and informal tone, which doesn't strongly express any particular sentiment or emotional state. While it can imply surprise depending on context, on its own it isn't forceful enough to indicate a stronger emotion than neutrality.

Text: फेकू तर घरीच बसून आणि दाढी वाढवून थाल्या वाजवायला सांगत होता..
translated_text: Feku was telling me to stay at home, grow a beard and play the thalai.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily reports actions and uses the informal term "फेकू" (Feku) which, while potentially derogatory, is presented in a factual, non-emotional manner within the context. The statement primarily describes actions (staying home, growing a beard, playing thali) with minimal explicit emotional coloring.

Text: हा पण माझाच पिझ्झा आहे होते न सर्व आजच करणार आहे का?
translated_text: This is my pizza too, aren't you going to make it all today?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question about the pizza preparation timeline ("आजच करणार आहे का?"), lacking overtly positive or negative indicators.

Text: : कोलेस्ट्रॉल कमी करण्यासाठी करा हे व्यायाम, मिळेल औषधांपेक्षाही जास्त फायदा
translated_text: : Do these exercises to reduce cholesterol, you will get more benefits than medicines
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it provides informational advice ("कोलेस्ट्रॉल कमी करण्यासाठी करा हे व्यायाम") without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "मिळेल औषधांपेक्षाही जास्त फायदा" (you will get more benefits than medicines) could lean slightly positive, but in isolation, it is largely factual advice.

Text: मिळणारच होता याला .
translated_text: He was going to get it.
Justification: The sentence "मिळणारच होता याला ." expresses a factual observation about an expected outcome. The phrase "मिळणारच होता" (milnarach hota - was going to get) indicates inevitability without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. Thus, it carries a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपण जहागीरदार आहेत का हिंदुत्वाचे ?
translated_text: Are we the lords of Hindutva?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question questioning authority ("जहागीरदार आहेत का हिंदुत्वाचे ?"), without expressing positive or negative sentiment directly.

Text:
: पनवेल-नांदेड एक्सप्रेसचे इंजिन बिघडले; वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेस पावणेदोन तास खोळंबली
./--…
translated_text:
: Panvel-Nanded Express engine breaks down; Vande Bharat Express delayed for two and a half hours
./--…
Justification: The sentiment is negative (sadness) because the phrase "इंजिन बिघडले" (engine breaks down) indicates a malfunction and disruption, leading to a negative feeling.

Text: आमच्या कडे   रुपायात होती अशी कटिंग.
translated_text: We had such a cutting in rupees.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a past fact about the price of a haircut ("कटिंग") without any subjective opinion or feeling being expressed. The phrase "रुपायात होती अशी कटिंग" (had such a cutting in rupees) is a statement of fact, not an expression of sentiment.

Text: लोकांना विचारा म्हणजे समजेल
translated_text: Ask people and they will understand.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply suggests an action (asking people) with a predictable outcome (understanding). The Marathi phrase "लोकांना विचारा म्हणजे समजेल" expresses a factual statement without any emotional charge.

Text: साहेब काही काही दाखल घेतली जाईल का.
translated_text: Sir, will something be recorded?
Justification: The sentence contains neutral language; the Marathi phrase "दाखल घेतली जाईल का" (dakhal ghetli jail ka) which translates to "will something be recorded?" expresses a question about procedure without conveying positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे एवढं सर्व करण्या पेक्षा________________ "मानसिक स्वास्थ" सांभाळणं हे सर्वात उत्तम !
translated_text: Rather than doing all this, it is best to take care of your "mental health"!
Justification: The sentence emphasizes prioritizing "मानसिक स्वास्थ" (mental health) which doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral assessment.

Text: काही नसलं तरी चालतं पण "बाप" पाठीशी असल्याचं समाधान शब्दात मांडता येत नसतं..!
translated_text: Even if nothing happens, the satisfaction of having "Father" by your side cannot be expressed in words..!
Justification: The phrase "बाप पाठीशी असल्याचं समाधान" (baap pathishi aslyacha samadhan) which translates to "the satisfaction of having father by your side," evokes a feeling of contentment and support, neutralizing any negative sentiment.

Text: पट्टी समोसा म्हणायचं आहे का?
translated_text: Do you mean patti samosa?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question, "पट्टी समोसा म्हणायचं आहे का?" The neutral sentiment stems from the lack of emotional loading in the phrase. It's a straightforward inquiry with no words carrying positive or negative connotations.

Text: जय गोपीनाथ दिनदर्शिका
translated_text: Jai Gopinath Calendar
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the phrase "जय गोपीनाथ दिनदर्शिका" (Jai Gopinath Calendar) is simply a title and doesn't express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: उमेदवार देताना पण मराठमोळा द्या म्हणजे झालं
translated_text: When fielding candidates, even if you give a Maratha name, it's done.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मराठमोळा द्या म्हणजे झालं" (Marathmola dya mhanje jhala) simply suggests fulfilling a requirement of having a Maratha name, without expressing positivity or negativity towards the situation.

Text: वो काम सरदार पटेलजी पेहले कर लेते तो ये बुरे दीन देखणे नाहीं मिळते
translated_text: If Sardar Patel ji had done that work, it would have been worse, worse, worse, worse
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the hypothetical and retrospective nature of the sentence. While implying a negative outcome ("बुरे दीन देखणे नाहीं मिलते" - would not have seen bad days), it doesn't directly express positive or negative sentiment; it states a past hypothetical scenario.

Text: ... देशप्रेमी लोकांनाच असे महान देशभक्त समजणार ज्यांनी देशासाठी बलिदान दिले .
translated_text: ... Only patriotic people will consider those who sacrificed for the country as great patriots.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation about how patriotic people view those who sacrificed for the country. The phrase "देशप्रेमी लोकांनाच असे महान देशभक्त समजणार" expresses this sentiment without leaning towards positive or negative emotion, focusing on a definitional aspect of patriotism.

Text: आज पासून ते लोकांना सांगणार:- "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: From today, they will tell the people: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The statement is neutral as it expresses an intention to defeat a political party ("**हरवायचे आहे**"), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment or a specific emotion beyond political strategy.

Text: मनसैनिक नाही मंदसैनिक
translated_text: Not a soldier of the mind, a soldier of the mind
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a contrast ("नाही" - not) without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "मनसैनिक नाही मंदसैनिक" simply states an opposition, with no sentiment loaded in the specific wordings themselves.

Text: ज्ञानात थोडी भर घालने गरजेचे आहे ...
translated_text: It is necessary to add a little knowledge...
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it simply states the necessity of adding knowledge. The Marathi phrase "गरजेचे आहे" (garajeche aahe), meaning "is necessary," indicates a factual observation rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: बाळासाहेब कोणते, त्यांना आडनाव आहे की नाही
translated_text: Which Balasaheb, does he have a surname or not?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question "आडनाव आहे की नाही" (aadnav aahe ki nahi - does he have a surname or not?), lacking any emotionally charged language.

Text: शेणक्या युपी बिहार मध्ये महाराष्ट्राच्या निम्मे पण लोक करोना ना गेले नाहीत
translated_text: Half of the people in Maharashtra, UP, Bihar, and even in Maharashtra, have not been infected with Corona.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual comparison ("महाराष्ट्राच्या निम्मे पण लोक करोना ना गेले नाहीत") regarding Corona infections in different states, lacking any explicit positive or negative emotional cues. The comparison itself is neutral.

Text: समर्थन करायचं म्हणून कशाचेही का? सरस्वती आणि विद्या यात काय संबंध..
translated_text: Why support anything? What is the relationship between Saraswati and Vidya..
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative and somewhat dismissive tone conveyed by "कशाचेही का?" (kashachehi ka?), meaning "anything?" or "why anything?", suggesting a questioning rather than positive or negative stance.

Text: महाशक्ती विरुद्ध महाविकास आघडीचा सामना होता होता राहिला... पुढचा सामना मुंबई महापालिका निवडणुकीत!
translated_text: The fight between Mahashakti and Mahavikas Aghadi was on... The next fight will be in the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections!
Justification: The phrase "सामना होता होता राहिला" (samna hota hota rahila - the fight was on) suggests a feeling of dissatisfaction and missed opportunity, which, in the context of political rivalry, contributes to the underlying anger. This signifies that a desired confrontation didn't happen, resulting in frustration and anger.

Text: यासाठी तो गायब होता
translated_text: That's why he disappeared.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any emotionally charged words. The phrase "गायब होता" ( गायब होता - disappeared) simply describes an action and doesn't convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेबांनी का धरून ठेवला मग तुमच्या साहेबांना का ते जमलं नाही ?
translated_text: Why did Balasaheb hold on to it, then why didn't your boss manage to do it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a comparative question ("का धरून ठेवला मग तुमच्या साहेबांना का ते जमलं नाही ?") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. It simply inquires about the differing abilities of two leaders.

Text: हे तर तुम्ही बनवलं आहे, निवडणूक आयोग ने थोडीच
translated_text: You made this up, the Election Commission did a little.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the matter-of-fact statement regarding who created something, without expressing a clear positive or negative opinion. There isn't a specific word or phrase strongly indicative of sentiment, resulting in a neutral classification.

Text: राणेंची पण चौकशी लावा हे कोणती नोकरी करतात जनतेला समजेल ना
translated_text: Get Rane investigated too, so the public can understand what kind of job he does.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it suggests an investigation into Rane's job, aiming for public understanding. It doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion; it simply seeks information. The Marathi phrase "कोणती नोकरी करतात जनतेला समजेल ना" (so the public can understand what kind of job he does) indicates this neutral pursuit of information.

Text: का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे का
translated_text: Why should you have it?
Justification: The sentence "का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे का" expresses a questioning and somewhat challenging tone, but lacks overt positive or negative indicators. The phrasing "का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे" (Why should you have it?) simply inquires about the reason, without exhibiting strong emotion. Hence, it is neutral.

Text: तुझे खरे बाप ठाकरे आणि पवार आहेत का?
translated_text: Are your real fathers Thackeray and Pawar?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question ("आहेत का?") that questions someone's parentage ("खरे बाप"). While potentially provocative depending on context and tone, the literal wording itself doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment. It simply asks for information.

Text: तुम्हाला फोटो दिसत नाही काय, मग समजून घ्या कोणते बाळासाहेब आहेत ते??
translated_text: Can't you see the photo? Then understand which Balasaheb is it?
Justification: The sentence uses rhetorical questioning ("तुम्हाला फोटो दिसत नाही काय, मग समजून घ्या...?") which doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase simply aims to convey information or make a point in a neutral manner.

Text: जागतिक पातळीवर म्हणजे साडे तीन जिल्हे
translated_text: Globally, that means three and a half districts.
Justification: The sentence is purely factual and descriptive, mentioning a global scale in relation to "साडे तीन जिल्हे" (three and a half districts), which lacks any sentiment or emotional charge.

Text: टोमणाबाई हा शब्दप्रयोग पण वापरला जातो ते विसरलात का?
translated_text: Have you forgotten that the expression "Tomanabai" is also used?
Justification: The sentence uses "टोमणाबाई" (Tomanabai), which implies sarcasm or a dismissive attitude, but without explicitly expressing strong positive or negative feelings, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: कधी न बघीतलेले चेहरे कोणाक पण उचलुन घेवन येतास काय रे
translated_text: Can you pick up faces that you have never seen before?
Justification: The sentence is a question that, while potentially carrying a hidden negative intention, does not express any explicit sentiment. The phrase "कधी न बघीतलेले चेहरे" (kadhi na baghitlele chehare - faces that you have never seen before) simply describes unfamiliar faces, and the remaining sentence poses a question without expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: मशाल विझवणार होते,घड्याळ बंद पाडणार होते,ते एका बंद इंजिन समोर घाबरले
translated_text: They were about to extinguish the torch, stop the clock, but they were frightened by a stopped engine.
Justification: The sentence expresses fear due to the phrase "घाबरले" (ghabarle), which means "frightened" or "scared," indicating a negative emotional response.

Text: घटस्थापना कधी करावी? मुहुर्त असतो का? घरातील एखाद्या व्यक्तीच्या निधनानंतर किती दिवस देवकार्य करू नये?
translated_text: When should Ghatasthapana be performed? Is there a specific time? For how many days should one not perform any religious activities after the death of a family member?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence, with phrases like "कधी करावी?" (kadhi karavi - when to do?) and "असतो का?" (asto ka? - is there?) indicating inquiry rather than emotional expression. The question about religious activities after death "किती दिवस देवकार्य करू नये?" (kiti divas devkarya karu naye? - for how many days should one not perform religious activities?) is also presented as a matter-of-fact query, devoid of explicit emotion or anger. The 'anger' classification is likely an error or misinterpretation, as the question is about rules regarding a very sensitive topic, not anger.

Text: सावरकर कोणते काँग्रेसला प्रिय आहेत ते का?
translated_text: Which Savarkars are dear to the Congress and why?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question using the phrase "प्रिय आहेत ते का?" which translates to "dear, and why?", expressing inquiry without inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे असं सर्वांचं होतं .....ते नैसर्गिक आहे
translated_text: This happens to everyone...it's natural.
Justification: The sentence expresses a common occurrence and acceptance of it being natural. The phrase "नैसर्गिक आहे" (naisargik aahe - is natural) indicates a neutral sentiment by simply stating a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: सूत्र  आज बाळा नांदगावकर बोले आम्ही अजून कोणालाही पाठींबा दिला नाय आहे
translated_text: Sources today said Bala Nandgaonkar has not supported anyone yet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about Bala Nandgaonkar's actions, indicated by the phrase "अजून कोणालाही पाठींबा दिला नाय आहे" (ajun konalahi pathimba dila nay ahe - has not supported anyone yet), making it neutral.

Text: ...तर मी आयुष्यात कधीही काम करणार नाही : सलमान खान
translated_text: ...then I will never work in my life: Salman Khan
Justification: The neutral sentiment and sadness emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "कधीही काम करणार नाही" (kadhihi kaam karnar nahi), meaning "never work," which implies a sense of hopelessness or finality associated with a negative future outcome.

Text: ...तर रॉयल्टी द्यावी लागेल, या बाळासाहेबांची एकनाथ शिंदे गटाकडे अजब मागणी
translated_text: ...then royalty will have to be paid, this is Balasaheb's strange demand to the Eknath Shinde group
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about a demand without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "अजब मागणी" (ajab maagani - strange demand) describes the nature of the demand but does not inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पुणे साठी का.
translated_text: Why for Pune?
Justification: The phrase "का" (ka), meaning "why," expresses a neutral inquiry, lacking positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आत काही नेसली का नाही
translated_text: Why didn't you bring anything inside?
Justification: The phrase "आत काही नेसली का नाही" expresses surprise as it questions the unexpected absence of something expected, implying a disbelief or astonishment.

Text: म्हंजे दिवाळीत घरातच फटाके वाजवायचे का
translated_text: So, should we burst crackers at home during Diwali?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question ("वाजवायचे का" - "should we burst?") seeking information rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. The phrasing is exploratory, not declarative.

Text: फेस्टिव्ह सिझनचे फोटोज येतील जबरदस्त, पाहा बेस्ट कॅमेरा स्मार्टफोन्सची ही लिस्ट
translated_text: Festive season photos will be amazing, see this list of best camera smartphones
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (zabardast), meaning amazing, suggests a positive feeling, but in this context, it functions more as an advertisement claim than a genuine expression of joy. The overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: बायकोची आणि नवजात बाळाची अंत्ययात्रा त्याने वाजतगाजत काढली, कारण…
translated_text: He conducted the funeral procession of his wife and newborn baby with great fanfare, because...
Justification: The sentence describes a tragic event ("बायकोची आणि नवजात बाळाची अंत्ययात्रा" - funeral procession of wife and newborn baby) presented in a matter-of-fact tone without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment, and left incomplete. The phrase "वाजतगाजत काढली" (conducted with great fanfare) could be interpreted ironically or sarcastically but its actual purpose and implications are not clear within the context, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: हुकुमशाही, एकाधिकारशाही होऊ नये, म्हणून उद्धव ठाकरें सोबत राहिले पाहिजे.
translated_text: We should stay with Uddhav Thackeray to prevent dictatorship and totalitarianism.
Justification: The sentence expresses a political opinion advocating for staying with Uddhav Thackeray to prevent negative political systems. While advocating for something, it does not express strong positive or negative emotion directly. The phrase "हुकुमशाही, एकाधिकारशाही होऊ नये" (dictatorship and totalitarianism should not happen) signals a concern, but the sentence primarily focuses on a suggested course of action, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: दोनचं मिनटं पहात होतो. त्यात त्यांनी मोदीला पण मागे टाकलं.
translated_text: I was watching the second minute. He even surpassed Modi in it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes an observation ("दोनचं मिनटं पहात होतो") and a comparison ("मोदीला पण मागे टाकलं") without expressing positive or negative sentiment. Neither phrase carries emotional weight.

Text: प्रबोधनकार ठाकरेंचा नातू म्हणून बघत असतील आता, पाहिले बाळासाहेबांचा पुत्र होता...
translated_text: Prabodhankar may be seen as Thackeray's grandson now, but he was Balasaheb's son...
Justification: The sentence presents a statement of fact, contrasting the subject's current perceived identity with their past lineage. There's no explicit expression of positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The statement is primarily descriptive using phrases like "प्रबोधनकार ठाकरेंचा नातू" (Prabodhankar Thackeray's grandson) and "बाळासाहेबांचा पुत्र" (Balasaheb's son), which are factual references rather than emotionally charged terms.

Text: आणि तू उद्धव च खाजवय होती का मध्ये
translated_text: And did you want to eat Uddhav's food?
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "खाजवय होती का" which translates to "did you want to eat." While potentially suggestive in context, the phrase itself lacks inherent positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: विजेचा मेन स्विच बंद केल्याशिवाय विजेचे कोणतेही उपकरण किंवा वायरिंग दुरुस्त करू नका.
translated_text: Do not repair any electrical equipment or wiring without turning off the main power switch.
Justification: The sentence is a safety instruction, and the Marathi phrase "विजेचा मेन स्विच बंद केल्याशिवाय विजेचे कोणतेही उपकरण किंवा वायरिंग दुरुस्त करू नका" which translates to "Do not repair any electrical equipment or wiring without turning off the main power switch," conveys a neutral sentiment as it is a standard precautionary measure.

Text: कोण आहेत गाधर रे
translated_text: Who are Gadhar Ray?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple question asking for identification. The phrase "कोण आहेत" (kon aahet) meaning "who are" is purely informational and doesn't convey any sentiment.

Text: अर्ज बाद होणार होता म्हणुन माघार
translated_text: The application was about to be rejected, so I withdrew it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual situation without expressing strong feelings. The phrase "अर्ज बाद होणार होता म्हणुन माघार" (the application was about to be rejected, so I withdrew it) simply states a cause and effect, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: वायनाड बचाओ यात्रा हे
translated_text: Wayanad Bachao Yatra
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states "Wayanad Bachao Yatra" without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "Wayanad Bachao Yatra" itself is a statement of fact and doesn't carry inherent sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला जे परवडेल ते खा.. मुळातच कोणी काय खावं हा त्याचा प्रश्न आहे.
translated_text: Eat what you can afford.. Basically, it's a question of what one should eat.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily focuses on affordability ("परवडेल ते खा") and personal choice ("कोणी काय खावं हा त्याचा प्रश्न आहे") regarding food, lacking any explicitly positive or negative words or phrases.

Text: राष्टृहित सर्वोपरी वाल्या हे काय होते?
translated_text: What was the supreme power of the nation?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a question ("काय होते?") inquiring about the concept of national interest ("राष्टृहित"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with simply asking about it.

Text: असे काम महाराष्ट्रातील पोलिस कधी करणार नाहीत.
translated_text: The police in Maharashtra would never do such a thing.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "कधी करणार नाहीत" (kadhi karnar nahit) implying "never do" expresses a lack of expectation or likelihood of an event, rather than a positive or negative feeling. It states a factual (implied) assessment of behavior without conveying emotion.

Text: भक्ती आणि प्रेम दुसरं काय
translated_text: What is devotion and love?
Justification: The sentence "भक्ती आणि प्रेम दुसरं काय" expresses a rhetorical question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "दुसरं काय" (dusra kay - what else) suggests an inquiry rather than an expression of emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: नाय व आता चालू हाय ती म्हटलं??
translated_text: Nay and now on Hi she said??
Justification: The emotion "surprise" is primarily driven by the phrase "नाय व आता चालू हाय ती म्हटलं??" which indicates disbelief or questioning of something currently happening. The word "नाय" (Nay - no/isn't it?) contributes to the feeling of surprise and questioning the statement.

Text: जनतेत काही टक्केच अंध भक्त आहे त्यांनाच असं वाटणार. बाकी लोक सुशिक्षित आहे.
translated_text: Only a small percentage of the population is blindly devoted to religion. The rest of the people are well-educated.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about differing viewpoints within the population, with "सुशिक्षित आहे" (sushikshit aahe - are well-educated) contributing to the neutral sentiment by presenting an objective assessment of the majority. The initial part stating "काही टक्केच अंध भक्त आहे" (kahi takkech andh bhakt aahe - only a small percentage is blindly devoted) also contributes to the neutral sentiment by simply stating a fact about a minority group's perspective.

Text: हिम्मत रखो... पात्रा चाळ वाल्यांनी पण अजून पर्यंत हिम्मत ठेवलीच ना..
translated_text: Have courage... Patra Chawl people have not yet had the courage..
Justification: The neutral sentiment and fear emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "हिम्मत रखो" (himmat rakho - have courage) combined with the implication that the "Patra Chawl" residents *need* courage because they are facing a difficult or fearful situation. The continued use of "हिम्मत" (himmat - courage) suggests resilience in the face of adversity, but also highlights the presence of fear prompting the need for courage in the first place.

Text: कुत्र्या तुला भुंकन्याशिवाय काही काम नाही का..?
translated_text: Don't you dogs have anything to do but bark?
Justification: The sentence contains the word "कुत्र्या" (kutrya - dogs), used in a derogatory way, but the overall tone isn't strongly negative, and lacks explicit emotional expression, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आई भवानी ही फक्त मराठयांची आहे, तिचा कळस मराठ्याच्या रक्ताने भिजलेला आहे. .
translated_text: Mother Bhavani belongs only to the Marathas, her hair is soaked in Maratha blood.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overt positive or negative emotional expression, and the phrase "आई भवानी ही फक्त मराठयांची आहे" (Mother Bhavani belongs only to the Marathas) is a statement of ownership/affiliation rather than an expression of sentiment. The statement regarding "मराठ्याच्या रक्ताने भिजलेला आहे" (soaked in Maratha blood) doesn't necessarily indicate positive or negative sentiment; it is presented more as a historical claim/statement of fact.

Text: ते पण बहुदा जेवत असतील ।
translated_text: They will probably be eating too.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty about whether they are eating. The word "बहुदा" (bahuda), meaning "probably," contributes to the neutral sentiment by indicating a lack of strong feeling or certainty.

Text: संत कोणालाही म्हणू नये मला असे वाटते,,, संत शब्द हा भ्रमचारी लोकांसाठी असतो...
translated_text: I think no one should be called a saint, the word saint is for misguided people...
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes disgust due to the phrase "भ्रमचारी लोकांसाठी असतो" (bhramachari lokansathi asto), which implies that the word "saint" is associated with misguided or deceptive people, reflecting a negative and disgusted view.

Text: महागाईवर बोला आणि महागाई कमी करा मोदी सरकार
translated_text: Talk about inflation and reduce inflation, Modi government
Justification: The sentence is a direct demand/statement regarding inflation, lacking subjective language or emotional indicators. It uses phrases like "महागाईवर बोला" (talk about inflation) and "महागाई कमी करा" (reduce inflation) which are neutral in tone. The use of "मोदी सरकार" (Modi government) simply identifies the subject of the demand and doesn't introduce any sentiment.

Text: वांगी बाई च्या गिऱ्हाईकांनि फिरकायलाच पाहिजे का ?
translated_text: Should Wangi Bai's customers be turned away?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("फिरकायलाच पाहिजे का?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: खाताना भाजतय आणि परसाकड जाताना पण
translated_text: While eating, I am roasting and even while going to the backyard.
Justification: The sentence describes discomfort without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भाजतय" (bhajatay - roasting/burning) indicates physical discomfort, but the context lacks any expression of negative emotion, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: लोकमानस : हा अमेरिकेचा आर्थिक साम्राज्यवाद!
translated_text: Lokmanas: This is America's economic imperialism!
Justification: The phrase "आर्थिक साम्राज्यवाद" (arthik samrajyavad), meaning "economic imperialism," carries a negative connotation, expressing anger and disapproval due to its association with exploitation and dominance.

Text: मी या आधी अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे
translated_text: I have complained about this many times before.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the factual statement "मी या आधी अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे" (I have complained about this many times before). While the emotion "anger" is present due to the implicit frustration, the sentence itself expresses a statement of repeated action ("अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे") rather than overtly negative sentiment.

Text: माणूस आतून तुटला की, त्याच बोलणं कमी होत
translated_text: When a person is broken inside, he/she talks less.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of being "तुटला" (tutla - broken) internally, which suggests sadness but is presented in a matter-of-fact way, resulting in a neutral sentiment. There's no explicit emotional expression beyond the factual statement of reduced communication.

Text: : नवरात्रीत उपवासाला भगर खरेदी करताय? अशी घ्या काळजी
translated_text: : Buying bhagar to fast during Navratri? Be careful.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides a suggestion ("अशी घ्या काळजी" - be careful) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बॉस/ मोठ्या मनाचा असावा, मोठ्या आवाजाचा नाही.
translated_text: A boss should be big-hearted, not loud-voiced.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference for a boss to be "मोठ्या मनाचा" (big-hearted) rather than "मोठ्या आवाजाचा" (loud-voiced). While implicitly critical of loud-voiced bosses, the overall tone is a neutral statement of desired qualities, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: वरचा श्लोक आदरणीय सोमय्या यांनी एकदा म्हणून दाखवावा...
translated_text: Respected Somaiya should show the above verse once...
Justification: The sentence uses "आदरणीय" (aadarniya), meaning "respected," which indicates a formal and polite tone, but does not express any strong positive or negative sentiment, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: एक सुतळी बाम चा नैवेद्य लावजो .. त्याच्या खाली...
translated_text: Place a twine offering of balsam... under it...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple instruction without any inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The phrase "एक सुतळी बाम चा नैवेद्य लावजो" (ek sutali baam cha naivedya lavjo) - place a twine offering of balsam - is a factual instruction and doesn't express any sentiment.

Text: कोण स्वामी आणि कोण नारायण हे सगळ्याणा माहित आहे..
translated_text: Everyone knows who is Swami and who is Narayan.
Justification: The sentence "कोण स्वामी आणि कोण नारायण हे सगळ्याणा माहित आहे" expresses a factual statement about common knowledge. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "सगळ्याणा माहित आहे" (saglyanna mahit aahe), meaning "everyone knows," which indicates a generally accepted fact and lacks any emotional charge.

Text: अरे मी भारतीय संस्कृतीचा बोलतोय संस्कृती कमी विकृती जास्त आहे ती.
translated_text: Oh, I'm talking about Indian culture, it's less culture and more distortion.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a balanced view. The phrase "संस्कृती कमी विकृती जास्त" (sanskriti kami vikruti jasta) implies a critical observation that the situation is less about culture and more about distortion, thereby negating any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पुर्वी ते कोणत्या पक्षाचे होते?
translated_text: Which party did he belong to before?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question about past affiliation. The phrase "कोणत्या पक्षाचे होते?" (konatya pakshache hote?) - "which party did he belong to?" - is simply seeking information without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: पंडीत नेहरु आरएसएसच्या शाखेत जात होते का?
translated_text: Did Pandit Nehru attend an RSS branch?
Justification: The sentence is a factual question ("पंडीत नेहरु आरएसएसच्या शाखेत जात होते का?"), with no emotionally charged words. The presence of "का?" (ka - question mark) indicating a query contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सर निवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार...
translated_text: Sir, the election will be unopposed...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the election being unopposed. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "बिनविरोध होणार" (binvirodh honar - will be unopposed) simply describes the manner of the election outcome, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आज लवकरच घेतली होती ?
translated_text: Was it taken early today?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question ("आज लवकरच घेतली होती ?") lacking any emotional indicators. The question itself doesn't contain sentiment-bearing words.

Text: हे म्हणत नाही ,सर्व एकूण मिळून किती फुलांच्या प्रजाती आहेत गार्डन मध्ये वेगवेगळ्या..!
translated_text: It doesn't say, how many different flower species are there in the garden in total..!
Justification: The "किती वेगवेगळ्या" (kiti vegveglya - how many different) phrase implies a lack of information and suggests a wondering or surprised tone, leading to surprise despite a neutral sentiment, because the speaker seems interested but confused about the number.

Text: वर्षातील. एकदे केलेले काम सांगा साहेब..
translated_text: Sir, tell me the work you have done in the year.
Justification: The sentence "वर्षातील. एकदे केलेले काम सांगा साहेब.." is neutral because it's a simple request for information ("काम सांगा साहेब" - tell me the work, sir). There's no explicit positive or negative wording.

Text: जे करतात त्यांनी पण करायचं का मग
translated_text: So why should they do what they do?
Justification: The sentence's neutral sentiment stems from the interrogative nature of "जे करतात त्यांनी पण करायचं का मग" which questions an action without expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "करायचं का" (karaycha ka) directly asks "should they do?", indicating a neutral inquiry rather than an opinion.

Text: पूरण पोळी, ज्वारीची भाकरी आणि सोबत ठेचा पण मिळेल हुंड्यात, घेता का?
translated_text: You will also get Puran poli, sorghum bread and a piece of bread as dowry, will you take it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's phrased as a question regarding dowry, which, while potentially controversial, is presented neutrally. The specific phrase "घेता का?" (Gheta ka? - will you take it?) frames the entire sentence as an inquiry rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: घराणेशाही चालणार पण बाळासाहेबांच्या विचाराचे तुझे पप्पा नाहीत आणि तू तर मुळीच नाही
translated_text: Dynasty rule may work, but your father doesn't share Balasaheb's views, and neither do you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement and comparison without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "घराणेशाही चालणार पण बाळासाहेबांच्या विचाराचे तुझे पप्पा नाहीत आणि तू तर मुळीच नाही" highlights a difference in ideology, presented neutrally.

Text: तेच बाळासाहेब सोनियापुढे कोण झुकत हे पण सांगायचे .
translated_text: That same Balasaheb would also say who bows before Sonia.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about Balasaheb's past statements. There are no words or phrases expressing a positive or negative opinion or emotion. The statement "तेच बाळासाहेब सोनियापुढे कोण झुकत हे पण सांगायचे" is a historical statement and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: मागं कव्हेकरांच्या कॉलेजच्या कार्यक्रमात आले होते एकदा...
translated_text: I once attended a college program at Kavekar's...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a past event ("आले होते एकदा" - "attended once") without expressing any positive or negative feeling. There's no specific word or phrase indicating sentiment or emotion beyond a statement of fact.

Text: ची नोटीस आली होती काय करणार.
translated_text: What should I do if I receive a notice?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काय करणार" (kay karnar - what to do?) indicates a question about a future action in a hypothetical situation, lacking any strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: चंदु भाऊ महाज्योतीने केव्हा पासून मराठा समाजासाठी काम करायला सुरुवात केली?
translated_text: When did Chandu Bhau Mahajyoti start working for the Maratha community?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question ("कधी पासून सुरुवात केली?") seeking information about when a specific entity started working for a particular community. There is no sentiment-laden language present.

Text: अतिवृष्टी झाल्याने सर्व विद्यार्थ्यांना मोफत पास देण्याची पालक वर्गाची शासनाकडे मागणी
translated_text: Parents demand government to provide free passes to all students due to heavy rains
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a demand ("मागणी") due to a situation ("अतिवृष्टी झाल्याने"), and lacks overtly positive or negative emotional language, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "पालक वर्गाची शासनाकडे मागणी" is a factual statement of demand to the government.

Text: छायाचित्रात राज्यमुद्रा का नाही ? नेहमी परिपत्रकांवर, छायाचित्रात, चित्रफितीत राज्यमुद्रा वापराच
translated_text: Why is there no state seal in the photograph? Always use the state seal on circulars, photographs, and film.
Justification: The sentence expresses a query and a directive, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the interrogative nature of "का नाही ?" (ka nahi? - why not?) and the instruction "वापराच" (vaparach - use only/must use), both conveying a factual inquiry and a standard procedure rather than any emotional leaning.

Text: घरात बसून कंटाळा आला असेल
translated_text: You must be bored sitting at home.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential feeling of boredom but does not explicitly state a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कंटाळा आला असेल" (kantaLaa aalaa asel) suggests boredom, but the "असेल" (asel) indicates a possibility or assumption rather than a definite statement of feeling.

Text: सगळ्यात आधी हा प्रश्न विचारा की एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?
translated_text: First of all, ask this question: why do so many people want to do government jobs?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?" simply inquires about the reason for people's desire for government jobs, lacking any emotionally charged language.

Text: सगळ्या गावातले लोक वांग्याची शेती कशी करायची हे शिकतील आणि करोडोपती होतील.
translated_text: People in every village will learn how to farm brinjal and become millionaires.
