Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काई कंपनी आहे का ?" (kai company aahe ka?) implying "what company is it?", is a rhetorical question exhibiting a neutral stance rather than any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: कार्यकर्ते कोणाचे का असेना पण त्या गर्दीचे रुपांतर मतांमध्ये होते.
translated_text: Regardless of whose activists they belonged to, that crowd was transformed into votes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the conversion of a crowd into votes, without any indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गर्दीचे रुपांतर मतांमध्ये होते" (crowd was transformed into votes) is a neutral statement about a political process.

Text: ऑक्टोबरला दसऱ्याच्या मुहूर्तावर हा चित्रपट प्रदर्शित होणार आहे.
translated_text: The film is set to release in October, on the occasion of Dussehra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about a film's release date. The phrase "ऑक्टोबरला दसऱ्याच्या मुहूर्तावर हा चित्रपट प्रदर्शित होणार आहे" (Octoberla Dasryachya Muhurtavar ha chitrapat pradashit honar aahe) is descriptive and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: जरा जास्त नाही होत का हे
translated_text: Isn't this a bit much?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) because the phrase "जरा जास्त नाही होत का" (jara jaasta nahi hot ka) expresses a question of excessiveness rather than a definitively positive or negative feeling. While potentially implying mild disapproval, it primarily functions as a query, keeping it neutral. The emotion identified is incorrect.

Text: मी बोलल्याचा आणि याचा काही संबंध नाही भाऊ
translated_text: This has nothing to do with what I said, brother.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a lack of connection between two things. The phrase "संबंध नाही" (sambandh nahi), meaning "no relation" or "no connection," indicates a factual statement without expressing any particular emotion or sentiment.

Text: मी बाहेर खेळायला गेलो असताना , माझी मम्मी मला ओढत घेऊन जाते.
translated_text: When I go outside to play, my mom drags me along.
Justification: The sentence describes a common, relatively neutral scenario. No specific word or phrase carries a strong positive or negative sentiment. While "ओढत घेऊन जाते" (odhat gheun jate - drags me along) could be interpreted as slightly negative, it lacks the intensity for a clearly negative sentiment and is presented matter-of-factly, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: स्टुडिओ ही निट चालवु शकले असते ?
translated_text: Could the studio have run smoothly?
Justification: The sentence expresses doubt and a lack of strong feeling, indicated by the question format and the auxiliary verb "शकले असते" (shakale asate) implying potential rather than certainty, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: .....आणि उलगडला किशोर कुमार यांच्या संगीतमय गायन प्रवास
translated_text: .....and Kishore Kumar's musical singing journey unfolded
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that Kishore Kumar's musical journey unfolded, without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "उलगडला किशोर कुमार यांच्या संगीतमय गायन प्रवास" (ulagadala kishor kumar yanchya sangitamay gayan pravas) is a factual statement about the unfolding of a journey and doesn't convey any particular sentiment.

Text: प्रविणला असं का म्हणताय तुम्ही?
translated_text: Why are you saying that to Praveen?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence and the word "का" (ka), which means "why." This indicates a question and thus a neutral statement with surprise rather than an explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: विराट कोहली आपल्या यशाचे श्रेय कायम अनुष्काला देत असतो.
translated_text: Virat Kohli always credits Anushka for his success.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual observation about Virat Kohli giving credit to Anushka ("श्रेय देत असतो"), without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: मुंबई मध्ये होते ते सेनेमुळे, पुण्यात होते ते जास्तीच्या पावसामुळे.
translated_text: In Mumbai it was because of the army, in Pune it was because of excessive rain.
Justification: The sentence presents factual information about reasons for events in Mumbai and Pune. There are no emotional words or phrases indicating positivity or negativity. The phrases "सेनेमुळे" (because of the army) and "जास्तीच्या पावसामुळे" (because of excessive rain) are presented as explanations, not expressions of sentiment.

Text: मुंबईसह या   रेल्वे स्टेशनचे रुपडे पालटणार;    हजार कोटींची गुंतवणूक होणार
translated_text: Mumbai and these railway stations will be transformed; Investment of Rs 1000 crores will be made
Justification: The phrase "रुपडे पालटणार" (rupade palatnar), meaning "will be transformed," indicates a positive change and anticipation, contributing to the joy emotion and a neutral sentiment that is closer to positive.

Text: पत्रकारितेतही हाच नियम लागू होतो नाही का!
translated_text: Doesn't the same rule apply to journalism too?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "नाही का!" (nahi ka!), a tag question meaning "isn't it?" or "doesn't it?", seeks confirmation rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling. It makes the sentence inquisitive but doesn't inherently convey sentiment.

Text: नंबर एक होण्यासाठी सुद्धा काँग्रेस राष्ट्रवादीच्या कार्यकर्त्यांनी नेत्यांचा प्रवेश करूनच भाजप झाला
translated_text: Even to become number one, Congress and NCP workers entered the BJP only after leaders joined them.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it factually describes political defections without expressing positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "प्रवेश करूनच भाजप झाला" (entered the BJP only after) simply states a sequence of events and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात सर्वात जास्त ज्योतीलिंग आहेत, सुशोभिकरणासाठी आपल्या माध्यमातून प्रयत्न व्हावे
translated_text: Maharashtra has the highest number of Jyotirlingas, efforts should be made through our own means for their beautification
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and a suggestion for beautification efforts. There isn't any explicit positive, negative, or emotional language. The phrase "सर्वात जास्त" (sarvat jast) meaning "highest number" and "प्रयत्न व्हावे" (praytn vhave) meaning "efforts should be made" are descriptive and suggestive, not indicative of sentiment.

Text: खाल्यानंतर ची बघण्यासारखी आहे
translated_text: It's worth watching after eating.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply describes an action (watching) being worthwhile after another action (eating). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "बघण्यासारखी आहे" (baghnyasarkhi aahe - worth watching) simply indicates something is noteworthy, not necessarily good or bad.

Text: सर,खरच आपण यात लक्ष घालून काम त्वरित सुरू करावे.
translated_text: Sir, we really need to look into this and start working on it immediately.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a polite request. While there's a sense of urgency implied by "त्वरित सुरू करावे" (tvarit suru karave - start immediately), the overall tone remains respectful and doesn't convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: आजचे वास्तव जनता ,मीडिया आणि विरोधी पक्ष
translated_text: Today's reality: the public, the media and the opposition
Justification: The sentence is a factual statement presenting different entities ("janata", "media", "virodhi paksh") without any opinion or judgment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: शासनात कधी विलीन करून घेता ते सांगा आम्ही पण धन्यवाद देऊ.
translated_text: Tell us when you will merge it with the government, and we will thank you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request for information ("कधी विलीन करून घेता ते सांगा") and states an intention to thank the government ("आम्ही पण धन्यवाद देऊ") if the merger happens. The phrase "धन्यवाद देऊ" suggests potential gratitude, but the overall tone is neutral as it awaits action.

Text: कपिल सिब्बल पत्रकारांच्या घरी आला होता की काय
translated_text: Did Kapil Sibal come to the journalists' house?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about an event ("कपिल सिब्बल पत्रकारांच्या घरी आला होता की काय"), and contains no inherently positive or negative wording. It simply inquires about Kapil Sibal's presence at journalists' homes. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: काही तरी राह्यलय फोटूत ,अस वाटत नाही का
translated_text: Don't you think something is wrong with the residence?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question ("वाटत नाही का") questioning if something is wrong, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "वाटत नाही का" is key here as it simply poses a question without expressing strong feeling.

Text: काय बोलाव आता....
translated_text: What to say now....
Justification: The phrase "काय बोलाव आता...." (kay bolava aata....) expresses a sense of resignation or uncertainty, lacking any strong positive or negative indicators, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: माझ्या मुळे अख्खं जग चालतंय असा दावा मी करणार आहे
translated_text: I'm going to claim that the whole world runs because of me.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply a statement of intent. The word "दावा" (claim) doesn't necessarily convey a positive or negative sentiment on its own. While "अख्खं जग चालतंय माझ्या मुळे" (the whole world runs because of me) can be perceived as arrogant, the use of "मी करणार आहे" (I am going to) creates distance and removes strong conviction from the statement, leading to the neutral sentiment. The emotion of joy might be inferred due to the grandiose nature of the statement implying confidence and self-satisfaction, though not explicitly stated.

Text: तसे काही लिहिण्याची गरज नाही.. म्हणजे..हे घ्या...असा आहे
translated_text: There's no need to write anything like that.. I mean..take this...it's like this
Justification: The sentence expresses neutrality. While "हे घ्या" (he ghya - take this) could indicate a positive offering, the preceding hesitation and explanation "तसे काही लिहिण्याची गरज नाही" (tase kahi lihinyachi garaj nahi - there's no need to write anything like that) neutralize the overall sentiment. "असा आहे" (asa aahe - it's like this) is also neutral, providing context rather than expressing a strong feeling.

Text: वयस्कर आहेस म्हणून
translated_text: Because you are older.
Justification: The sentence "वयस्कर आहेस म्हणून" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वयस्कर" meaning older) without any positive or negative connotation or emotional expression.

Text: फडणवीसांच्या हस्ते होणार कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा!:
translated_text: Fadnavis will perform Kartiki Ekadashi puja!:
Justification: While the sentence itself is factual reporting about a religious ceremony, the association of a prominent figure like "फडणवीसांच्या हस्ते" (Fadnavis will perform) with a positive religious event like "कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा" (Kartiki Ekadashi puja) can subtly evoke a feeling of joy or satisfaction in some individuals, hence the emotion assigned. The phrase "कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा" specifically suggests a positive religious occasion.

Text: सगळे हिंदू विरोधी पक्ष एका छताखाली आले आहेत हिंदूंनो डोळे उघडा आणि मतदान करा.
translated_text: All Hindu opposition parties have come under one roof. Hindus, open your eyes and vote.
Justification: The sentence aims to mobilize Hindu voters, but lacks inherently positive or negative language, hence a neutral sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that expresses strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: माहीत आहे मॅडम.....  उद्देश फक्त इच्छा दर्शवण्याचा होता
translated_text: I know, madam... the purpose was just to show my desire.
Justification: The sentence expresses acknowledgment and intention without strong positive or negative connotation, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "उद्देश फक्त इच्छा दर्शवण्याचा होता" (the purpose was just to show my desire) is descriptive and lacks emotional charge, solidifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: केव्हढा जोक आहे हा
translated_text: What kind of joke is this?
Justification: The phrase "केव्हढा जोक" (kevढा joke - what kind of joke) implies a questioning and potentially doubtful tone, indicating surprise and a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ठाकरे सोडून नुसते बाळासाहेब कसे चालतील... शिवसेना ठाकरेंची आहे आणी राहणार
translated_text: How can Balasaheb alone rule without Thackeray... Shiv Sena belongs to Thackeray and will remain so?
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact/belief about the Shiv Sena's identity being tied to the Thackeray family, rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. The phrases "ठाकरे सोडून नुसते बाळासाहेब कसे चालतील" and "शिवसेना ठाकरेंची आहे आणी राहणार" indicate this neutral assertion of the established order and inherent relationship.

Text: तरीही युती केली होती की
translated_text: Still, the alliance was made.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about an alliance ("युती केली होती") without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion. The word "तरीही" (still) suggests a contrast or unexpectedness, but it doesn't inherently indicate a sentiment.

Text: साहेब,शेतकऱ्यांच्या खात्यात ही रक्कम जमा होईप्रयन्त,आपली मदत शेतकऱ्यांना लागणार आहे.
translated_text: Sir, till this amount is deposited in the farmers' accounts, the farmers will need your help.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for continued assistance until a specific action is completed. The phrase "मदत लागणार आहे" (madat lagnar aahe) indicates a requirement for help, but it is presented in a neutral and informational tone, without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तेव्हा ही असच होणार आहे
translated_text: Then this is what will happen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a future outcome ("होणार आहे" - will happen) without any indication of positive or negative feeling.

Text: एवढेच आहे तर आत्ता तुम्हाला भारत जोडो का करावे लागत आहे सांगा????
translated_text: If that's all, then tell me why you have to do Bharat Jodo now????
Justification: The phrase "का करावे लागत आहे" (ka karave lagat aahe) implying "why do you HAVE to do," suggests a questioning tone and conveys surprise/disbelief regarding the necessity of the action, hence neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: विदर्भातील काही भागांतून मान्सूनची माघार, वेधशाळेची माहिती.
translated_text: Monsoon retreat from some parts of Vidarbha, information from the observatory.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "मान्सूनची माघार" (monsoon retreat), which is a common meteorological phenomenon and doesn't inherently express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: समुद्रात वाहून गेलेल्या पत्नीचा आला व्हॉइस मेसेज; ‘मी रवीसोबत आनंदी आहे’…
translated_text: Voice message from wife who was swept away at sea; 'I am happy with Ravi'...
Justification: The phrase "आनंदी आहे" (aanandi aahe), meaning "I am happy," directly indicates joy, overriding the initial tragic context and resulting in a neutral sentiment due to conflicting emotional cues.

Text: म्हणजे नक्कीच मिळते!
translated_text: That means you definitely get it!
Justification: The word "नक्कीच" (nakkich), meaning "definitely," expresses a sense of certainty and positive outcome, leading to an interpretation of joy, even with an overall neutral sentiment due to the sentence's simplicity and lack of strong emotional language.

Text: महाराज माझी तुम्हाला विनंती आहे मी तुम्हाला फोनवर बोलु शकतो का
translated_text: Sir, I have a request to you, can I talk to you on the phone?
Justification: The sentence expresses a polite request using "विनंती आहे" (vinanti aahe), meaning "I have a request," which conveys neutrality rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ह्यांच्या मुंबई व मराठी प्रेमाची व्याख्या काय हे बघावे लागेल आधी.
translated_text: We first have to see what their definition of love for Mumbai and Marathi is.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need to examine or question someone's definition ("व्याख्या काय हे बघावे लागेल"), suggesting an objective stance rather than a positive or negative one. This leads to a neutral sentiment.

Text: प्यार का खत लिखने - ही गझल मी    वेळा ऐकलीय..
translated_text: To write a letter of love - I have heard this ghazal many times..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with a slight sense of disgust due to the phrase "प्यार का खत लिखने", which suggests a cliché or overused theme associated with love letters, triggering a feeling of distaste.

Text: तिरीत तोमाया चा मुलगा आहे तो त्यांच्या साठी काही पण शक्क आहे .
translated_text: Tirit is the son of Tomayya, so he is a bit of a doubt for them.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty/doubt, reflected in the neutral sentiment. The phrase "शक्क आहे" (shakk aahe), meaning "doubt" or "suspicion," contributes to this sentiment.

Text: अंधारा सोबत प्रकाश मोफत... हे सर्व काही ठरवून होतेय का.
translated_text: Darkness and light are free... Is all this happening by design?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ठरवून होतेय का" (tharavun hotey ka - happening by design?) poses a question about predetermination, without exhibiting a clearly positive or negative emotional tone. The question itself doesn't imply a specific sentiment.

Text: वाकडोजी धाकडे हे बोलले होते
translated_text: This was said by Wakadoji Dhakade.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वाकडोजी धाकडे हे बोलले होते") without any emotionally charged words or phrases. It attributes a statement to a person without expressing any opinion or feeling about the statement itself or the person who made it.

Text: धाडस च्या माद्यमातून शहाजी बापू चा करेक्ट कार्यक्रम होणार. बऱ्याच घडामोडी सोलापूर जिल्ह्यात घडतील.
translated_text: Shahaji Bapu's correct program will be held through the medium of Dhadas. Many events will take place in Solapur district.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it mentions a "correct program" ("करेक्ट कार्यक्रम"), which can sometimes imply negativity, the overall context and phrasing are informational and lack strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "करेक्ट कार्यक्रम" in isolation *could* be negative, but here it seems to be used descriptively.

Text: चौकशी होणार का...?
translated_text: Will there be an investigation...?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the interrogative nature of the sentence "चौकशी होणार का...?", which simply asks "Will there be an investigation?". There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the question itself; it is simply seeking information. The phrase "चौकशी होणार का...?" expresses uncertainty and inquiry without projecting a specific emotion.

Text: तु तर सोबत गेली होती
translated_text: You went with me.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact, "तु तर सोबत गेली होती" (You went with me), without any emotionally charged words or phrases. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text: सिंगल असे असतात तर...!
translated_text: If they are single...!
Justification: The phrase "असे असतात तर...!" (ase asatat tar...!) expresses disbelief and annoyance, implying a negative judgment about single people, thus contributing to anger.

Text: त्यामुळे तर राजीनाम्यावर राजकारण चालु आहे
translated_text: Therefore, politics is being played out over the resignation.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about politics being played over a resignation; the phrase "राजकारण चालु आहे" (rajkaran chalu aahe - politics is going on) is a descriptive statement without any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: छातीतली कळ कमी झाली ना
translated_text: Has the pressure in your chest decreased?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it inquires about the lessening of chest pain. The phrase "कमी झाली ना" (kami jhali na), meaning "decreased, right?", is a simple question about a state of being and does not express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: तसं झालं नाहीच, उलट मोदींच्या कृपेने नवीन पिढीमध्येही नेहरूंविषयी उत्सुकता निर्माण झाली आहे.
translated_text: That has not happened, on the contrary, thanks to Modi's grace, curiosity about Nehru has arisen among the new generation as well.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes a situation and the impact of an action. The phrase "उलट मोदींच्या कृपेने" (ulat Modichya krupene - on the contrary, thanks to Modi's grace) doesn't carry inherent positivity or negativity towards the subject but simply attributes a consequence to Modi's actions. The rest of the sentence focuses on the effect which is again describing the impact, not showing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या मनात हे पण नाहीत एक दिवस यांना झटका देशील सुषमा ताई
translated_text: You don't even have this in mind, one day Sushma tai will give them a shock.
Justification: The sentence expresses a future action without strong positive or negative indicators. "झटका देशील" (jhatka deshil - will give a shock) implies a potential disruptive action, but lacks specific context to assign a definitive sentiment or emotion beyond neutral.

Text: बाहेर नाही आतच आहे.
translated_text: It's not outside, it's inside.
Justification: The sentence "बाहेर नाही आतच आहे" simply states a location. There is no inherently positive, negative, or emotional content present. The words "बाहेर" (outside), "नाही" (not), "आत" (inside), and "आहे" (is) are factual and descriptive, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मधे ह्यो आला
translated_text: This came in between.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "मधे ह्यो आला" (madhe hyo aala) simply describes an event of someone or something interrupting, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आदिवासी हॉस्टेलसाठी श्रमिक एल्गार आणि च्या संघर्ष
translated_text: Shramik Elgar and his struggle for tribal hostels
Justification: The sentence is largely factual, describing a struggle. There are no overtly positive or negative Marathi words to assign a sentiment. The words "आदिवासी हॉस्टेलसाठी श्रमिक एल्गार आणि च्या संघर्ष" (Adivasi hostel sathi Shramik Elgar ani cha sangharsh) simply state a struggle for tribal hostels and doesn't express any specific emotion.

Text: लोहपुरुष सरदार वल्लभभाई पटेल यांनी सुद्धा वर बंदीची मागणी केली होती.
translated_text: Iron Man Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel had also demanded a ban on marriage.
Justification: The sentence is neutral. The phrase "वर बंदीची मागणी केली होती" (demanded a ban on marriage) describes a historical event and doesn't express inherently positive or negative sentiment. While potentially controversial, in this context it's presented as a factual statement. The emotion "anger" is incorrectly assigned, it should be neutral as well. There is no particular word or phrase that makes sentence negative.

Text: त्यांचा सहभागच तेवढा होता
translated_text: Their participation was that much.
Justification: The sentence "त्यांचा सहभागच तेवढा होता" expresses a neutral sentiment because "तेवढा होता" (tevdha hota - that much) indicates a limited or measured amount, but doesn't carry any positive or negative connotation in this context. It's a factual statement.

Text: पनवेल ने दोन वेळा तरी कामोठे ला पणी द्यावे ही विनंती
translated_text: Request that Panvel should pay Kamothe at least twice
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विनंती" - vinanti), which is inherently neutral in sentiment as it simply asks for something without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: विधानसभेत पक्ष प्रमुख वैगेरे गोष्टी काल्पनिक आहे त्यामुळे व्हीप मान्य करायचा संबंधच नाही
translated_text: Things like party chiefs in the Legislative Assembly are imaginary, so it is irrelevant to accept the whip.
Justification: The sentence expresses a dismissal of the relevance of accepting a whip in the Legislative Assembly due to the speaker's belief that party chiefs are "imaginary". The phrase "कल्पनिक आहे" (kalpanik aahe - imaginary/fictional) suggests a neutral stance rather than any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: वेस्टर्न कलचर करता करता हे भलतच सुरू झालं
translated_text: It started with western culture
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply a statement of fact. The Marathi phrase "वेस्टर्न कलचर करता करता" (western culture karta karta - while doing western culture) doesn't carry any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भलतच सुरू झालं" (bhaltech shuru zale - something else started) indicates a deviation, but not necessarily a negative one in this context.

Text: ह्यांना पण मंत्रीपद मिलाले होते...
translated_text: They were also given ministerial posts...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("मिलाले होते") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: असे दृश्य खूप मोठ्या प्रमाणावर सार्वजनिक वाहनांमधून पाहायला मिळते.
translated_text: Such a scene is widely seen from public transport.
Justification: The sentence describes a common observation ("असे दृश्य खूप मोठ्या प्रमाणावर सार्वजनिक वाहनांमधून पाहायला मिळते" - "such a scene is widely seen from public transport"), lacking any specific emotional cues or sentiment-bearing words. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text: मनसेने दिली गुलाबाची फुले आणि महापौर पंचम कलानी मराठीत बोलल्या  ./-…
translated_text: MNS gave rose flowers and Mayor Pancham Kalani spoke in Marathi./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states facts about MNS giving flowers and the Mayor speaking Marathi. There is no sentiment-laden word or phrase; the statement is objective.

Text: | ‘या’ बॉलिवूड अभिनेत्रीने लोकांना केली ही विनंती, वाचा संपूर्ण प्रकरण…
translated_text: | 'This' Bollywood actress made this request to the people, read the full story...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual and informative tone. There isn't a specific word expressing sentiment; the phrase "या बॉलिवूड अभिनेत्रीने लोकांना केली ही विनंती" ('This' Bollywood actress made this request to the people) simply states an action without conveying positive or negative feelings.

Text: कोरेगाव भिमा नव्हे तर भिमा कोरेगाव आसा खरा नामउल्लेख आहे.
translated_text: The real name is Bhima Koregaon, not Koregaon Bhima.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a factual correction, stating the "खरा नामउल्लेख" (khara naamullekh) meaning "real name/correct reference," without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: उद्घव ठाकरे आधीच पोटनिवडणुकीत हार मानत आहेत...
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray is already admitting defeat in the by-elections...
Justification: The phrase "हार मानत आहेत" (haar manat aahet), meaning "admitting defeat," indicates a negative situation and contributes to the overall sadness. While the sentence reports a statement, the act of admitting defeat inherently carries a negative and sad connotation.

Text: हो.... आणि मुळात शाकाहारी सुद्धा आहे
translated_text: Yes.... and it's also basically vegetarian.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("शाकाहारी सुद्धा आहे" - is also vegetarian"). There's no expression of positive or negative feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे खर आहे का .
translated_text: Is this true?
Justification: The phrase "हे खर आहे का" (he khar aahe ka), meaning "Is this true?", expresses surprise due to the interrogative nature questioning the veracity of something.

Text: मग मुख्यमंत्री फडणवीस होणार असेही न्हवते ठरलेले ना ?
translated_text: So it's not a given that Fadnavis will be the Chief Minister, is it?
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty, indicated by the phrase "असेही न्हवते ठरलेले ना ?", which translates to "it's not a given, is it?". This lack of definite assertion contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय? ग्रामीण इनोव्हेशन! व्हिडीओ व्हायरल
translated_text: What is wrong with farmers? Rural Innovation! Video goes viral
Justification: The assigned sentiment is neutral as the sentence, while containing a question, does not express positive or negative feelings. The phrase "शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय?" (What is wrong with farmers?) is a rhetorical question, not necessarily critical or appreciative, and "व्हिडिओ व्हायरल" (video goes viral) is a statement of fact. The surprise emotion is derived from "शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय?" which can reflect unexpected circumstances, given the context of viral rural innovation.

Text: नरहरी झिरवाळ यांनी अजय चौधरी याना गटनेता म्हणून मान्यता अगोदरच दिलेली आहे
translated_text: Narhari Jirwal has already approved Ajay Chaudhary as the group leader.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "मान्यता अगोदरच दिलेली आहे" (mānyatā agodarach dilelī āhe - has already approved) indicates a past action without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: हा म्हणजे तुझ्या अनुभवातून बाकी सगळे शिकतील ना
translated_text: This means that everyone else will learn from your experience, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning and somewhat observational tone conveyed by the phrase "हा म्हणजे... बाकी सगळे शिकतील ना" (ha mhanje... baki sagale shikhtil na), which simply poses a question about learning from someone's experience without expressing any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: त्यांनी देशासाठी केलेलं योगदान हे आहे..
translated_text: This is his contribution to the country.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively states a fact about someone's contribution to the country. The phrase "त्यांनी देशासाठी केलेलं योगदान हे आहे" (tyanni deshachaathi kelele yogdaan he aahe) simply denotes a contribution and carries no inherent positive or negative emotional weight.

Text: आता डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात
translated_text: Now they play in dollars
Justification: The sentence "आता डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात" is neutral because it simply states a fact about the currency used in a game or transaction; there is no inherent positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase "डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात" (play in dollars).

Text: बघितल्यावर बघायची हिंमत कोणाकडे आहे
translated_text: Who has the courage to look at it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a challenge or rhetorical question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrase "हिंमत कोणाकडे आहे" (himmat konakade aahe - who has the courage) simply poses a question about someone's bravery, without explicitly conveying any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: एक नंदी बैल आणि एक मंदी बैल...
translated_text: A Nandi bull and a Mandi bull...
Justification: The sentence "एक नंदी बैल आणि एक मंदी बैल..." is a factual statement devoid of emotional cues. There is no specific word or phrase that conveys sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment. The sentence simply describes two things: a Nandi bull and a Mandi bull.

Text: जिथे एका नाटकात काल्पनिक पात्र आहे ते असत्यच झाले की.
translated_text: Where there is a fictional character in a play, it becomes untrue.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual observation about the nature of fiction. The phrase "असत्यच झाले की" (asatyach zhale ki - it becomes untrue) simply states this fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: काही पण राव..... मोहगाम चावळतो
translated_text: But Rao.....Mohamgam bites.
Justification: The phrase "मोहगाम चावळतो" (Mohamgam bites) doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment on its own, particularly without context. While "चावळतो" (bites) has a negative connotation, the overall phrase lacks sufficient information to indicate a clear sentiment. Therefore, it remains neutral.

Text: साहेब हे अगोदपासूनच सुरू आहे दरवर्षी दिल्या जात..
translated_text: Sir, this has been going on since ancient times and is being given every year.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "अगोदपासूनच सुरू आहे" (agodpasunch suru aahe) meaning "has been going on since ancient times" expresses a continuous action without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: : शरद पवारांना घाबरताय का? शहाजी पाटील म्हणाले, जगात...
translated_text: : Are you afraid of Sharad Pawar? Shahaji Patil said, in the world...
Justification: The sentence expresses a question, "शरद पवारांना घाबरताय का?" (Are you afraid of Sharad Pawar?), which is inquisitive rather than expressing strong positive or negative sentiment. The word "घाबरताय" (afraid) itself doesn't necessarily convey a negative sentiment toward Sharad Pawar in this context; it's simply asking a question. Therefore, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: हम्म ते तर आहेच आपला जन्म त्याचसाठी तर आहे
translated_text: Hmm, that's what we were born for.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about purpose ("जन्म त्याचसाठी तर आहे" - born for that purpose), lacking strong positive or negative emotional markers. The initial "हम्म" (Hmm) adds a neutral, contemplative tone.

Text: मी ट्रेलर म्हणुन काम करतोय,तर पिक्चर मुख्यमंत्री दाखवणार!:
translated_text: I am working as a trailer, so the Chief Minister will show the picture!:
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, and the emotion is joy, likely tinged with sarcasm. The phrase "पिक्चर मुख्यमंत्री दाखवणार!" (picture Chief Minister will show!) implies a sense of amusement or joy due to the perceived absurdity or self-importance of the situation. The speaker seems to be using satire to express the disparity between their work and the final result being presented by someone else.

Text: मिसळ खाऊन नावे ठेवायला पाहिजे होती सर. जास्त मजा आली असती
translated_text: Sir, you should have eaten misal and named it. It would have been more fun.
Justification: The sentence expresses a playful suggestion to criticize the misal after eating it for added enjoyment. The overall tone is neutral as it doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "जास्त मजा आली असती" (jasta maja ali asti) implies the potential for increased enjoyment, but the subjunctive mood keeps the statement neutral.

Text: काय कार्यक्रम आहे वाटते उद्या...  आहे का? मध्ये मिळेल
translated_text: What's the program tomorrow... is it available?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to its questioning and exploratory nature. The phrases "काय कार्यक्रम आहे" (kay karyakram aahe - what's the program) and "आहे का?" (aahe ka? - is it available?) simply inquire about plans and availability without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: कुणाला मत द्यायचं नाही हे जनतेनी ठरवल आहे, कितीही लांबणीवर टाकू द्या.
translated_text: The people have decided who they don't want to vote for, no matter how long it takes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the people's decision ("जनतेनी ठरवल आहे") regarding voting, without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "जनतेनी ठरवल आहे" simply indicates a decision has been made.

Text: रुपया कमजोर होत नसून तर डॉलर मजबूत होतोय, यादृष्टीने पाहावे : केंद्रीय वित्तमंत्री निर्मला सीतारमण
translated_text: The rupee is not weakening, but the dollar is strengthening, we should look at it from this perspective: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman
Justification: The sentence expresses an objective economic observation. The phrase "रुपया कमजोर होत नसून तर डॉलर मजबूत होतोय" (the rupee is not weakening, but the dollar is strengthening) presents a neutral economic perspective, lacking explicit emotional content or sentiment.

Text: दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू
translated_text: Didn't you go to plant the seeds?
Justification: The sentence "दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू" is neutral because it is a simple question about planting seeds; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment in the phrase "दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू".

Text: अखंड प्रचंड पुरुषार्थ ही एकमात्र उपाय
translated_text: The only solution is constant and immense effort.
Justification: The sentence expresses the necessity of continuous effort. The phrase "एकमात्र उपाय" (ekmatra upay - the only solution) suggests a pragmatic and neutral tone, focusing on action rather than emotional expression. There is no word showing happiness, sadness or anger.

Text: देशभक्ती शरीरात जागृत झाली आणि नानाने त्या दुकानातूनच वस्तू विकत घेतल्या.
translated_text: Patriotism awakened in the body and Nana bought things from that store.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action and feeling, with no inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "देशभक्ती शरीरात जागृत झाली" (patriotism awakened in the body) describes a feeling of patriotism but doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment on its own, making the overall tone neutral.

translated_text: Whose photo was in it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question ("मध्ये कोणाचा फोटो होता") asking about the content of something, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The word "कोणाचा" (konacha - whose) simply inquires about ownership and doesn't inherently carry sentiment.

Text: ऐका हो शिवसैनिक काय करणार आहे स्वतः सांगत आहे
translated_text: Listen, Shiv Sainik is telling himself what he is going to do.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact. The Marathi phrase "स्वतः सांगत आहे" (swataha sangat aahe - telling himself) indicates a statement of action without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ते सत्तर का ऐंशी सोड, हे घे पुरावे
translated_text: Leave those seventy or eighty, take this as evidence.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents information ("घे पुरावे" - take this as evidence) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ची ढाल ची तलवार सांभाळून वापरा पण नायतर जाऊद्या आपल्याला काय
translated_text: Use your shield and sword with care, but what will you do if you are not careful?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it uses the phrase "जाऊद्या आपल्याला काय" (jaudya aaplyala kay), which translates to "let it go, what is it to us?" This phrase indicates indifference and a lack of strong feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पुण्यात असे कधीच होत नव्हते पूर्वी!
translated_text: This has never happened before in Pune!
Justification: The phrase "कधीच होत नव्हते" (kadhich hot navhate) meaning "never happened before" indicates surprise, as it suggests an unexpected deviation from the norm. The overall sentiment leans neutral (0.0) because, while expressing surprise, it doesn't necessarily convey a positive or negative feeling about the situation itself.

Text: हे बघ कालच छत्री आणलीय
translated_text: Look, I brought an umbrella yesterday.
Justification: The sentence describes a simple action ("छत्री आणलीय" - brought an umbrella) without any explicit positive or negative indicators. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: मग हेच शिवसेनेला विचारा त्यांनी लटकेंच्या पत्नीलाच का उमेदवारी दिली.?
translated_text: Then ask the Shiv Sena why they gave Latke's wife the candidature?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("मग हेच शिवसेनेला विचारा त्यांनी लटकेंच्या पत्नीलाच का उमेदवारी दिली.?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विचारा" (ask) indicates a request for information rather than an opinion or emotional expression.

Text: पत्रकारातील हा पहिला आहे
translated_text: This is the first among journalists.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("पहिला आहे" - "is the first") without any emotional coloring or subjective opinion.

Text: पत्रकारांनीसुद्धा ही बातमी किती लावून धरली.
translated_text: Even journalists caught this news with great interest.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes journalists pursuing a news story with "लावून धरली" (lavun dharli), which translates to "caught with interest" or "persisted with." This describes an action without expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही अशी सुवर्णसंधी गमावू नका, त्यामुळे आताच ती मिळवा.
translated_text: You shouldn't miss such a golden opportunity, so grab it now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily offers advice. While "सुवर्णसंधी" (suvarnasandhi, golden opportunity) sounds positive, the overall message focuses on urging action rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. The call to action "मिळवा" (milva, grab it) maintains a neutral tone.

Text: पण आहे नाजनरल स्लीपर
translated_text: But there is a general sleeper.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact "पण आहे नाजनरल स्लीपर" (pan aahe na janaral sleepar) - "but there is a general sleeper." There are no words or phrases that convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: प्लँनिंग शिवाय कोणतेही काम यशस्वी होत नाही.
translated_text: No work is successful without planning.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general truth about the necessity of planning for success, making it neutral. The phrase "यशस्वी होत नाही" (yashasvi hot nahi), meaning "not successful", is presented as a factual consequence rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: अहो ते आव्हाड सर आहेत आवहाड नाहीत.
translated_text: Hey, they are Awad sir, not Awahad.
Justification: The sentence aims to correct a name pronunciation; it does not express any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "अहो ते...नाही" ("Aho te... nahi" - Hey they are... not) is used for clarification/correction, indicating neutrality.

Text: *अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीचे पंचनामे करा विजय शिवतारे यांची माघणी* *महाराष्ट्र एक्स्प्रेस ला सबस्काईब करा*
translated_text: *Make a Panchnama of the damage caused by heavy rains, Vijay Shivtare's Maghani* *Subscribe to Maharashtra Express*
Justification: The sentence primarily reports news and a call to action ("सबस्काईब करा" - Subscribe) without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "नुकसानीचे पंचनामे करा" (Make a Panchnama of the damage) is related to damage but presented neutrally as a request for assessment.

Text: हो का.. पण त्यात खोटेपणा नको..
translated_text: Yes, but don't lie about it.
Justification: The phrase "खोटेपणा नको" (khotepana nako) which means "don't lie" implies a request for honesty but doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment, leaning towards neutral.

Text: आणि पत्र दोन तीन महिने अगोदर लिहिले होते पण ते निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले
translated_text: And the letter was written two or three months ago but it arrived during the election period.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual sequence of events ("आणि पत्र दोन तीन महिने अगोदर लिहिले होते पण ते निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators. There's no explicitly emotional language used. The phrase "निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले" (arrived during the election period) simply states a timing detail without implying any particular feeling or opinion.

Text: हे बघा फक्त फक्त भाजप चे सरकार आहे.
translated_text: Look, this is only a BJP government.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual statement. The Marathi phrase "भाजप चे सरकार आहे" (BJP che sarkar aahe - BJP's government is) simply states a political reality without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: माझ्या कडे पण असे आहेत ......
translated_text: I have these too......
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states the speaker possesses something similar to what was previously mentioned. There is no explicit positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "माझ्या कडे पण असे आहेत" (majhya kade pan ase aahet) indicates a statement of fact and doesn't carry any emotional charge in this context.

Text: संजय राऊत न्यायालयीन कोठडीत असून त्यांनी आईला लिहिलेले भावनिक पत्र समोर आले आहे.
translated_text: Sanjay Raut is in judicial custody and an emotional letter he wrote to his mother has surfaced.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily states factual information. The phrase "न्यायालयीन कोठडीत असून" (is in judicial custody) and "आईला लिहिलेले पत्र" (letter written to mother) describe the situation without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. While "भावनिक पत्र" (emotional letter) implies emotion, the sentence itself merely reports the existence of such a letter, not expressing the emotion directly.

Text: दोन भावी पंतप्रधान एकाने माढ्यातुन आणि एकाने अमेठीतुन पळ काढला होता.
translated_text: Two future prime ministers had fled, one from Madha and one from Amethi.
Justification: The sentence describes two potential prime ministers fleeing constituencies. While potentially negative in its implication of their actions, the sentence itself is stated neutrally, lacking overtly positive or negative language. The words "पळ काढला होता" (pal kadhla hota - had fled) describe an action, but without additional context or emotional coloring, remain factual and neutral.

Text: खुळखुळा ही नाही मिळाला का?
translated_text: Didn't you get the Khulkhulkhu?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question. The phrase "खुळखुळा ही नाही मिळाला का?" (Khulkhulkhu hi nahi milala ka?) which translates to "Didn't you even get the Khulkhulkhu?" is a factual inquiry and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे साहेब नाशिक क्या गुलगुलित रस्त्या वरूनच् गेले असतील
translated_text: Hey sir, have you gone through the winding roads of Nashik?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily describes a route in Nashik. The Marathi phrase "गुलगुलित रस्त्या" (gulgulit rasta) meaning winding roads is descriptive and doesn't express any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आज पासून लोकांना सांगणार लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.
translated_text: From today onwards, I will tell people to remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses a political objective ("आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे" - we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena), focusing on strategic action rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The focus on defeating a political opponent is more of a neutral statement of intent in this context.

Text: ते केलेलं ट्विट आता केलं तर चालेल का भैया
translated_text: Brother, would it be okay if I tweet that now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question seeking permission, and there are no inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "चालेल का" (chaalel ka), meaning "would it be okay?", indicates a neutral inquiry rather than any emotional expression.

Text: टेलिग्राफ वृत्तपत्राने ही बातमी दिली आहे
translated_text: The Telegraph newspaper reported this news.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement. The phrase "टेलीग्राफ वृत्तपत्राने ही बातमी दिली आहे" (The Telegraph newspaper reported this news) simply reports an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही लहानपणापासून अशे होता की आता भारतीय जनता पक्षाचे प्रवक्ते झाल्यावर झालंय
translated_text: You were a scoundrel since childhood and now you have become the spokesperson of the Bharatiya Janata Party.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the word "अशे" ("asche"), which translates to "scoundrel" and expresses strong disapproval and moral repugnance towards the person being addressed.

Text: संजय राठोड हे मंत्री झाले ताई.
translated_text: Sanjay Rathod became the minister.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement, "Sanjay Rathod he mantri zale tai," lacking any subjective language or emotional cues. The phrase "mantri zale" (became the minister) simply states a change in status, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ** ह्या ऐवजी हे वापरायचं
translated_text: ** Use this instead
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply suggests a replacement ("ह्या ऐवजी हे वापरायचं" - "hya aivaji he vaparaych"), indicating a factual substitution without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: याचा अर्थ खर्गे हे सुद्धा मनमोहन सिंग ठरतील.
translated_text: This means that Kharge will also become Manmohan Singh.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a comparison suggesting Kharge will be like Manmohan Singh ("मनमोहन सिंग ठरतील") without expressing a positive or negative opinion about either individual.

Text:
हिमालयातील भूकंपप्रवण क्षेत्रांचे मॅपिंग निसार उपग्रहाद्वारे होणार:

 
 
 .//    / / …
translated_text:
Mapping of seismically active areas in the Himalayas to be done by Nisar satellite:

.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the mapping of seismically active areas using a satellite. There's no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "हिमालयातील भूकंपप्रवण क्षेत्रांचे मॅपिंग निसार उपग्रहाद्वारे होणार" is a straightforward statement of a planned action.

Text: गुरुत्वाकर्षण आहे की नाही का नुसती अफवा आहे..... वा जबरदस्त कमालच....
translated_text: Is there gravity or not? Is it just a rumor... or is it amazing?
Justification: The phrase "वा जबरदस्त कमालच" (vaa jabardast kamaalach) expressing amazement/wonder, while positive in connotation, doesn't strongly indicate a positive or negative sentiment in the overall context of questioning gravity and rumors. The neutrality of the question pulls the overall sentiment close to 0, while "vaa jabardast kamaalach" clearly indicates the emotion of surprise.

Text: सरकार चा विरोध आणि स्थानिक नागरिकांचा विरोध या मध्ये फरक कळतो का...?
translated_text: Do you understand the difference between opposition to the government and opposition to local citizens?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about understanding a difference, without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "फरक कळतो का...?" (farak kalto ka...?) which translates to "Do you understand the difference...?" is interrogative and does not inherently convey any sentiment.

Text: एकदा पद मिळालं की ते आपल्याच परिवारात राहिलं पाहिजे असा यांचा अट्टाहास असतो.
translated_text: They insist that once they get a position, it should remain within their own family.
Justification: The sentence expresses a common observation about nepotism and doesn't contain overtly positive or negative wording. The phrase "अट्टाहास असतो" (attaahas asto) meaning "they insist" indicates a persistent desire or demand, but without a strong negative connotation in this context.

Text: खोके यांच्याही घरी जायचे, बंद झाल्यामुळे अशी अवस्था झालेली दिसते
translated_text: Khoke's house was also closed, it seems this situation has arisen due to the lockdown.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation ("बंद झाल्यामुळे अशी अवस्था झालेली दिसते" - this situation has arisen due to the lockdown) with no inherently positive or negative wording. The phrase "बंद झाल्यामुळे" (due to being closed) simply explains the state and doesn't carry any strong emotional weight.

Text: दोन्ही ऊमेदवारांना समान संधी आहे. जय श्रीराम.
translated_text: Both candidates have equal opportunity. Jai Shri Ram.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram) can evoke strong emotions in some, in this context, without further elaboration, it does not express a specific positive or negative sentiment towards the opportunity for the candidates. It is more of a statement/greeting rather than expressing a clear positive or negative leaning towards the situation of equal opportunity.

Text: या नंतर म्याव म्याव च भौ भौ होईल असा भाबडा आशावाद.
translated_text: The naive optimism that after this, there will be a meow meow.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, despite "joy" being present as emotion, due to the sarcastic and unrealistic nature of the expectation. The phrase "भाबडा आशावाद" (bhaabada aashavad - naive optimism) contributes to the lack of strong positive sentiment, suggesting the optimism is unfounded and perhaps even foolish, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: "तुमचा आनंद जितका स्वस्त असेल, तितके तुम्ही श्रीमंत व्हाल."
translated_text: "The cheaper your happiness, the richer you will be."
Justification: The sentence conveys a philosophical observation about happiness and wealth, not expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "तुमचा आनंद जितका स्वस्त असेल, तितके तुम्ही श्रीमंत व्हाल" simply states a relationship, making it neutral in sentiment.

Text: म्हणून अजून पर्यंत सतरंज्या उचलण्याचे काम करत आहेत का????
translated_text: So are you still working on picking up the chess pieces????
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature of the statement "का???? (ka????)", which questions the activity without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase simply inquires about the current state of affairs.

Text: पक्षीसुद्धा स्वतःला सिद्ध करून दाखवतात...
translated_text: Even birds prove themselves...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("पक्षीसुद्धा स्वतःला सिद्ध करून दाखवतात") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सिद्ध करून दाखवतात" (prove themselves) is a neutral observation about bird behavior.

Text: कधी कधी काही लोकांसोबत असं होत असत पण या मुळे चांगलं वागणं सोडू नये...
translated_text: Sometimes this happens to some people, but you shouldn't stop behaving well because of this...
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation and advice. The phrase "चांगलं वागणं सोडू नये" (chānglaṃ vāgaṇaṃ soḍū naye) - "should not stop behaving well" - indicates a neutral and উপদেশनात्मक (updeshātmaka - advisory) tone rather than any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अहंकार तर प्रकांड पंडित रावणाचा ही नव्हता राहिला……………
translated_text: The arrogance of the great Pandit Ravana was gone……………
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a historical fact about Ravana's arrogance being gone ("अहंकार तर प्रकांड पंडित रावणाचा ही नव्हता राहिला"). This phrasing presents the information objectively without any indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अडीच वर्ष फक्त वसुलीत मग्न होते
translated_text: For two and a half years, I was only engaged in recovery.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact. The phrase "फक्त वसुलीत मग्न होते" (fakt vasulit magn hote) - "only engaged in recovery," describes an activity without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: फडणवीस हे राज ठाकरेंमार्फत खडा टाकून वातावरणाचा अंदाज घेत आहेत. संघाची जुनी पद्धत आहे ही.
translated_text: Fadnavis is assessing the situation by casting stones through Raj Thackeray. This is the old method of the Sangh.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes an action ("खडा टाकून वातावरणाचा अंदाज घेत आहेत" - assessing the situation by casting stones) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बुंदी खायला बोलवा म्हणजे झालं!
translated_text: Just invite them to eat Bundi and that's it!
Justification: The phrase "म्हणजे झालं!" ("mhanje zale!") implies a sense of simplicity and satisfaction, suggesting the situation is easily resolved or made pleasant by a simple act (inviting someone to eat Bundi). This trivialization lends itself to a neutral sentiment, but in context, the feeling of ease and resolution triggers joy.

Text: दरवर्षी शेकडो लोक बौद्ध धर्म का स्वीकारत आहेत?
translated_text: Why are hundreds of people converting to Buddhism every year?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "का स्वीकारत आहेत?" (ka swikarat aahet?), meaning "why are (they) accepting?". This indicates a sense of wonder and inquiry regarding the reason behind the increasing adoption of Buddhism.

Text: तिहार जेलमध्ये ‘ही’ प्रसिद्ध अभिनेत्री तब्बल इतक्या वेळा सुकेश चंद्रशेखरला गेली होती भेटायला…
translated_text: This famous actress had visited Sukesh Chandrashekhar so many times in Tihar Jail...
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a fact ("भेटायला गेली होती" - went to visit) without expressing any strong positive or negative opinions or feelings, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे आहे ऋतूजा लटकेंचे अजब राजीनामा पत्र!!!
translated_text: This is Rituja Latke's strange resignation letter!!!
Justification: The word "अजब" (ajab) meaning "strange" contributes to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: माझ ही प्रेम आहे राहुल गांधी वर पण भाजप चा स्टार प्रचारक म्हणून
translated_text: I love Rahul Gandhi but as a star campaigner of BJP.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses love for Rahul Gandhi ("प्रेम आहे राहुल गांधी वर") but also indicates the speaker is a BJP campaigner ("भाजप चा स्टार प्रचारक म्हणून"). The contradictory nature of these two statements cancels out any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: | महाराष्ट्रातील सत्तासंघर्ष! आज घटनापिठापुढे होणार ‘सुप्रिम’ सुनावणी
translated_text: | Power struggle in Maharashtra! 'Supreme' hearing to be held before the Constitution Bench today
Justification: The word "सत्तासंघर्ष" (sattasangharsh), meaning "power struggle," suggests conflict and instability, contributing to the negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: श्री परमेश्वर मंदिर देवस्थान कमिटीच्या उपाध्यक्षपदी महावीरसेठ श्रीश्रीमाळ तर सचिवपदी देवकते यांची निवड..
translated_text: Mahavir Seth Sri Srimal was elected as the Vice President of the Shri Parmeshwar Temple Devasthan Committee and Devkate was elected as the Secretary.
Justification: The sentence primarily reports an election outcome, "निवड" (nivad), which translates to "election" or "selection." This is a neutral statement of fact, hence the neutral sentiment. The "joy" emotion likely stems from the implied positive feeling associated with being elected to a position.

Text: गोळ्या घेत जावा ताई वेळेवरमग अस नाही होणार
translated_text: Take your pills on time, then this won't happen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply providing advice. The phrase "गोळ्या घेत जावा ताई वेळेवर" (take your pills on time) suggests a suggestion or instruction without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: तुझ्या सारख्या      जरी औलादी जन्मल्या ना तरी ही शक्य होणार नाही ड्या
translated_text: Even if children like you were born, this wouldn't be possible.
Justification: The sentence expresses impossibility and doubt. While potentially insulting in context, the phrase "तुझ्या सारख्या जरी औलादी जन्मल्या ना तरी ही शक्य होणार नाही" (Even if children like you were born, this wouldn't be possible) directly indicates a lack of possibility rather than a strong positive or negative emotion, contributing to the neutral sentiment. The sentence focuses on the impossibility itself, without explicit emotional expression like anger or happiness.

Text: चुकीच्या क्षेत्रात आला तो माणूस
translated_text: The man who came to the wrong area
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion stem from "चुकीच्या क्षेत्रात" (chukichya kshetraat), which implies a mismatch or unsuitability of the man to the area, creating a sense of distaste or aversion to the situation.

Text: एकंदर केंद्र सरकारचा असलेला दवाब बघता हे वाटणे साहजिकच आहे
translated_text: It is natural to feel this way, given the overall pressure from the central government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a natural feeling ("वाटणे साहजिकच आहे") in response to external pressure, indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply acknowledges a reaction to circumstances without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: परतीचा पाऊस असतोय हा या पावसावर शेतकरी दुसर्या पिकाची पेरणी करतो
translated_text: The farmers sow another crop during the rainy season.
Justification: The sentence describes a common agricultural practice ("शेतकरी दुसर्या पिकाची पेरणी करतो" - farmers sow another crop) and simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: एकटेच होते का कोण अजुन होतं
translated_text: Was it alone? Who else was there?
Justification: The sentence exhibits neutrality due to the interrogative nature ("कोन अजुन होतं?") and factual questioning ("एकटेच होते का?"), lacking any inherent positive or negative connotations. There is no particular Marathi word driving any specific sentiment, as the utterance simply seeks information.

Text: आणि याची बुद्धी बघा सदाशिव पेठेतला हा.
translated_text: And look at the wisdom of this one from Sadashiv Peth.
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "आणि याची बुद्धी बघा...सदाशिव पेठेतला हा", which translates to "And look at the wisdom of this one... from Sadashiv Peth." The phrase is observational and doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The phrase lacks explicit emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: जनता गरीब होत नाहीए;   नं वर जातोय.
translated_text: People are not getting poor; they are getting better.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive trend ("नं वर जातोय" - getting better) but also acknowledges the existing state ("जनता गरीब होत नाहीए" - people are not getting poor) without strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे बघा हो.... एवढ्या मोठया पत्रकाराला काय काय म्हणताहेत!!
translated_text: Look at this....what are you saying to such a great journalist!!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with surprise primarily due to the phrase "काय काय म्हणताहेत!!" (kay kay mhantahet!!), which expresses shock and disbelief at what is being said, indicating surprise.

Text: प्रत्येक हिंदुन अर्जुन बनाव असा पण अर्थ निघतो याचा.
translated_text: This also means that every Hindu should become Arjuna.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a possible interpretation ("अर्थ निघतो") of a statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling or emotion. The phrase "अर्थ निघतो" indicates a potential meaning or interpretation, keeping the sentiment objective.

Text: जोशी काय करत होते हे प्रदीप ला।विचारले का?
translated_text: Did you ask Pradeep what Joshi was doing?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information ("विचारले का?"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: ही वेळही निघून जाईल
translated_text: This time too will pass.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "ही वेळही निघून जाईल" (This time too will pass) expresses a general observation about the transient nature of time without conveying any positive or negative feelings. There is no specific word that contributes a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: देशमुख तुम्ही पण का जोशी सोबत
translated_text: Deshmukh, why are you also with Joshi?
Justification: The word "पण" (pan, meaning "also") indicates surprise that Deshmukh is associated with Joshi.

Text: तीर्थयात्रेला गेले का हो !
translated_text: Have you gone on a pilgrimage?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple inquiry about a pilgrimage, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "तीर्थयात्रेला गेले का हो !" is a neutral question and doesn't express any specific emotion.

Text: हि तर शहाजीबापू याच्या साठी गर्दी होती...
translated_text: This was a crowd for Shahajibapu...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact - "गर्दी होती" (gardi hoti - there was a crowd). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: मला आज परत एक सुचलं आहे, पण नेहमी प्रमाणे शब्द इकडे तिकडे विखरलेत
translated_text: I have another idea today, but as usual the words are scattered here and there.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes having an idea and difficulty expressing it, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "नेहमी प्रमाणे" (nehmi pramane - as usual) suggests a recurring situation, contributing to the neutrality.

Text: एक रिक्षावाला आणि एक चहावाला असू शकत नाही का
translated_text: Can't there be a rickshaw puller and a tea vendor?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "असू शकत नाही का" (asu shakat nahi ka) - "can't there be?"- simply inquires about a possibility, indicating neutrality.

Text: हे जागे झाले मागील काही दिवस झोपून होते लागलेय जप चालू ठाकरे ओन्ली ठाकरे
translated_text: This one woke up, it was sleeping for the last few days, the chanting is on, Thackeray only Thackeray
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a change ("हे जागे झाले") and ongoing activity ("लागलेय जप चालू") without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. "ठाकरे ओन्ली ठाकरे" adds to the factual reporting, but doesn't inherently convey emotion.

Text: बर ते आता सर्वोच्च न्यायालयावर तसाच विश्वास राहुदे जसा मैदान मिळाल्यावर होता....
translated_text: Well, they should have the same faith in the Supreme Court now as they did when they got the field...
Justification: The sentence expresses a hope or expectation, but without strong positive or negative leaning. The phrase "तसाच विश्वास राहुदे" (tasach vishwas rahude) - "should have the same faith" - suggests a neutral stance, simply wishing for consistency in belief.

Text: काय केल हौत ते सभेत दाखवल होत.
translated_text: What they did was shown in the meeting.
Justification: The sentence lacks any emotionally charged words or phrases. The Marathi phrase "काय केल हौत ते सभेत दाखवल होत" simply states a fact without expressing any positive, negative, or emotional connotation, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: पाहतात का हा प्रश्न आहे
translated_text: Is this the question?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion stem from the interrogative nature of the sentence, specifically the phrase "का हा प्रश्न आहे" which frames the statement as a question implying uncertainty and possible astonishment. The core word "प्रश्न" (question) combined with "आहे का" further emphasizes the element of surprise in questioning the situation.

Text: तो ध्यानस्थ आहे
translated_text: He is meditating.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "ध्यानस्थ आहे" (dhyanasth aahe), meaning "is meditating," simply describes a state of being without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: लोकल रेल्वेने प्रवास करणाऱ्या महिलांसाठी महत्वाची बातमी! वाचा सविस्तर माहिती
translated_text: Important news for women traveling by local train! Read detailed information
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys information ("mahātvācī bātamī" - important news) without expressing any specific positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: शिवसेना राष्ट्रवादीत केव्हाच विलिन झाली आहे.हे पचवायला आवघड वाटत आसले तरी खरे आहे.
translated_text: Shiv Sena has long since merged with the Nationalist Congress Party. This may seem hard to digest, but it is true.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a supposed fact ("शिवसेना राष्ट्रवादीत केव्हाच विलिन झाली आहे" - Shiv Sena has long since merged with NCP). While the phrase "पचवायला आवघड वाटत आसले तरी" (even though it seems hard to digest) acknowledges potential disbelief, it doesn't explicitly express positive or negative sentiment towards the event itself, focusing on the acceptance of the statement as "खरे आहे" (true).

Text: हे बघ वहिनी काय बोलते
translated_text: Look what the sister-in-law is saying.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports speech ("काय बोलते" - kay bolte, "what is saying") without indicating any positive or negative feeling. The phrase is a statement of observation, not expressing an opinion.

Text: मागून विनंती कोणी केली हे सांगायचं नसतं हीसुद्धा महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्कृती आहे का
translated_text: Is this also the political culture of Maharashtra, where you don't have to say who made the request?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about Maharashtra's political culture, without explicitly endorsing or criticizing it. The phrase "मागून विनंती कोणी केली हे सांगायचं नसतं हीसुद्धा महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्कृती आहे का" (Is this also the political culture of Maharashtra, where you don't have to say who made the request?) simply questions whether a specific behavior is part of the culture, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: सरकार तुमचे आहे हो!!! हे विसरलात का??
translated_text: The government is yours!!! Have you forgotten this??
Justification: The phrase "हे विसरलात का??" (Have you forgotten this??) expresses frustration and a sense of reprimand, indicating anger.

Text: म्हणजे साहेबांच बंद च आवाहन चुकीचं होतं का?????
translated_text: So, was the call for a shutdown by the chief minister wrong????
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence, specifically the use of "चुकीचं होतं का????? " (chukich hot ka????), which translates to "was it wrong?". This questioning tone prevents a positive or negative sentiment from being strongly expressed.

Text: आज पुन्हा एक फुल उमलले ब्रम्हकमळ
translated_text: Today, another flower has bloomed, the Brahma lotus.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (Joy) due to the phrase "उमलले ब्रम्हकमळ" (umalale brahmakamal), which implies the blossoming of a Brahma lotus, a rare and auspicious event, evoking a sense of joy and wonder.

Text: संस्थापकांचे आजोबा यां देशाचे निर्माते आहेत हे लक्षात ठेवा
translated_text: Remember that the founding fathers are the builders of this country.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact and a reminder; there isn't any positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "लक्षात ठेवा" (lakshat theva - remember) contributes to a neutral tone of emphasizing importance rather than expressing emotion.

Text: हे राजकीय अथवा सामाजिक नाही . हा विषय आर्थिक आहे.
translated_text: This is not political or social. This issue is economic.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily states facts without expressing any positive or negative opinions. The Marathi words "नाही" (nahi - not) and "आहे" (aahe - is) are used to objectively describe the nature of the subject, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: मागील काही काळापुरवी शिवसेनेचे होते. ते जाणून बुजून मिळते गटाला दिले.आयोगाचा निषेध करतो.
translated_text: Some time ago, it belonged to Shiv Sena. It was knowingly given to the group. I condemn the commission.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "जाणून बुजून मिळते गटाला दिले" (jaanun bujun milte gatala dile), meaning "knowingly given to the group," indicating a deliberate and unfair action which evokes strong disapproval. Also "आयोगाचा निषेध करतो" (Aayogacha nishedh karto) meaning "I condemn the commission" indicates negative sentiment.

Text: आज रविवार आहे आणि उद्या सोमवार ..
translated_text: Today is Sunday and tomorrow is Monday..
Justification: The sentence is factually stating the days of the week ("आज रविवार आहे आणि उद्या सोमवार"). There's no emotional coloring or opinion expressed. Therefore, the absence of any sentiment-bearing words or phrases like adjectives, adverbs, or exclamations contributes to the neutral sentiment (0).

Text: हर्ष मानसी नाव आहे बोल....
translated_text: Harsh Manasi's name is....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a name ("हर्ष मानसी नाव आहे") without expressing any particular emotion or opinion.

Text: शिवरायांचा आणि शंभूराजांचा इतिहास वाचा आधी...
translated_text: Read the history of Shivaji and Shambhuraj first...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a straightforward request to read history ("इतिहास वाचा"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: हे सर्व अगदी समजण्याच्या पलीकडे आहे.
translated_text: All of this is beyond comprehension.
Justification: "समजण्याच्या पलीकडे" (beyond comprehension) expresses frustration and a sense of being overwhelmed, contributing to the disgust emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: राणे सगळं जाऊदे सोडा पण आर्मी पेपर घ्या बसं झालं
translated_text: Rane, leave everything but take the army papers, that's it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and demanding tone conveyed by "राणे सगळं जाऊदे सोडा पण आर्मी पेपर घ्या बसं झालं" (Rane, leave everything but take the army papers, that's it), which lacks explicit positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: का साजरा केला जातो बैलपोळा...वाचा सविस्तर
translated_text: Why is Bailpola celebrated...read in detail
Justification: The word "का" (ka) which translates to "why" in English, indicates a question and therefore expresses surprise or curiosity, hence the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: पुढील येणाऱ्या काळात बघूया काय चालते आणि काय नाही... '
translated_text: Let's see what works and what doesn't in the coming time...'
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty about the future, indicated by the phrase "पुढील येणाऱ्या काळात बघूया काय चालते आणि काय नाही..." (pudhil yenarya kalat baghuya kay chalte aani kay nahi...), reflecting a neutral sentiment as it's simply an observation about waiting to see what happens.

Text: सगळं बरोबर आहे हो तुमचं पण पकडला गेला तर चोर हा इकडे खाक्या आहे
translated_text: Everything is fine, if you get caught too, the thief is here to stay.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation with "सगळं बरोबर आहे" (everything is fine) and highlights a potential consequence ("पकडला गेला तर चोर हा इकडे खाक्या आहे" - if caught, the thief will face consequences), leading to a neutral sentiment as it doesn't explicitly express positive or negative feelings.

Text: संघ कार्यालयात कधीही वापरण्यायोग्य शास्त्रांस्त्रे हा काय प्रकार भाऊ ?
translated_text: What kind of scriptures can be used at any time in the Sangh office, brother?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and inquisitive tone expressed by "हा काय प्रकार भाऊ ?" (ha kay prakar bhau?), which translates to "What kind of thing is this, brother?". It is a question seeking information without expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बायो मध्ये बदल करा… अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते म्हणून
translated_text: Change bio… as an official spokesperson
Justification: The sentence "बायो मध्ये बदल करा… अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते म्हणून" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement requesting a change in the bio related to being an "अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते" (official spokesperson). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion.

Text: डब्या मध्ये काय आहे, तुम्ही काही दिले का रोहित ला?
translated_text: What's in the box, did you give anything to Rohit?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it consists of simple questioning ("काय आहे", "दिले का") without any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: महागाईवर बोला आणि महागाई कमी करा मोदी सरकार
translated_text: Talk about inflation and reduce inflation, Modi government
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a straightforward demand or instruction ("महागाईवर बोला आणि महागाई कमी करा"), lacking overtly positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: शरीर सुदृढ त्यांचीच राहतात ज्यांना वजन आणि चरबी वाढवणं या दोन गोष्टींमधला फरक कळतो.
translated_text: Only those who understand the difference between gaining weight and gaining fat remain healthy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a general truth about health and doesn't express any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "शरीर सुदृढ त्यांचीच राहतात" (sharir sudrudh tyanchich rahataat) meaning "only their bodies remain healthy," is a statement of fact, lacking any sentiment.

Text: उद्या हेच कोंग्रेस्स, भाजपा, राष्ट्रवादीत शामिल होतील त्यामुळे काही फरक पडत नाही.
translated_text: It doesn't matter if they join Congress, BJP, or NCP tomorrow.
Justification: The phrase "काही फरक पडत नाही" (kahi farak padat nahi), meaning "it doesn't matter," indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses indifference.

Text: मग हे असलं का केलं?
translated_text: So why did you do this?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "असलं का केलं?", which implies disbelief or shock at the action taken.

Text: अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री
translated_text: Adani is the Chief Minister of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री" (Adani is the Chief Minister of Maharashtra) simply states a fact, or what is perceived as a fact. There are no inherently positive or negative connotations associated with the phrase "अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री" in this context.

Text: सचिन आला रे...आयला!
translated_text: Sachin has arrived...arrived!
Justification: "आला रे...आयला!" expresses excitement and joy, but in this context, especially with "आयला!", suggests a playful, almost sarcastic enthusiasm. While positive, the underlying feeling leans toward neutral due to the potential for playful irony or exaggeration conveyed by "आयला!".

Text: नाना म्हणजे जिकडे भेळ तिकडे खेळ
translated_text: Nana means wherever you go, play there.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence uses the phrase "जिकडे भेळ तिकडे खेळ" (jikde bhel tikde khel), which is a common idiom implying a carefree and opportunistic attitude. It does not express any positive or negative feeling, simply a way of life.

Text: फुटबॉल: -   आशियाई चषक पात्रता फेरीत भारताचा ऑस्ट्रेलियाकडून  -  असा पराभव झाला.
translated_text: Football: - India lost to Australia in the Asian Cup qualifiers.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (0) due to the word "पराभव" (parabhav), which means defeat/loss. This directly indicates a negative outcome and therefore sadness.

Text: तो म्हणजे तरबुज
translated_text: That is watermelon
Justification: The sentence "तो म्हणजे तरबुज" is neutral as it's simply stating a fact or identifying something. There is no specific word or phrase that conveys a positive or negative sentiment; it's a purely descriptive statement. The core of the sentence "तरबुज" (watermelon) carries no inherent emotion.

Text: मामूंना अंधारे बाईंची भाषा आणि आशय स्वीकारार्ह आहे का ते आधी स्पष्ट करा.
translated_text: First, explain to your parents whether the language and content of Andhare Bai is acceptable.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a request for clarification. The phrase "आधी स्पष्ट करा" (adhi spasht kara) - "first, explain" indicates a neutral request rather than an expression of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाग -भाजपा- भाग अंधेरी (पूर्व) मतदार संघ ही तर सुरुवात आहे!
translated_text: Part -BJP- Part Andheri (East) constituency is just the beginning!
Justification: The phrase "सुरुवात आहे!" (suruvaat aahe!) meaning "is the beginning!" implies a positive outlook and anticipation of future events, hence conveying joy.

Text: पालघर साधू हत्याकांड तपास सीबीआयकडे जाणार; नारायण राणेंनी दिली प्रतिक्रिया, म्हणाले…
translated_text: Palghar sadhu murder case investigation will go to CBI; Narayan Rane reacted, said…
Justification: The sentence reports a factual update about a case being transferred and a politician's reaction. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's a neutral news statement. The Marathi phrase "पालघर साधू हत्याकांड तपास सीबीआयकडे जाणार" (Palghar sadhu murder case investigation will go to CBI) simply states a fact.

Text: म्हणून त्यांनी आता एक पाकिस्तानी सुपर हिरोईन ही आणली आहे.
translated_text: So now they have brought in a Pakistani superheroine.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any explicit positive or negative connotation. The phrase "आणली आहे" (aanli aahe - have brought in) simply describes an action, contributing to the neutral sentiment.
