Text: अजून मारामारी करताना बघितलं नाही का कोणत्या कपल ला?
translated_text: Have you ever seen a couple fighting?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral question about observing couples fighting. The word "मारामारी" (maramari - fighting) itself doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative sentiment in this context; it simply describes an action and the interrogative tone keeps it neutral.

Text: अजून काय आहे का आता थापासाठी सतरंजी
translated_text: What else is there to play now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual question. The phrase "अजून काय आहे का" (aajun kay aahe ka) simply asks "what else is there?", indicating inquiry rather than any positive or negative emotion.

Text: कमी असेल पण असणार हे नक्की , शेवटी गरज दोघांची उभ यंत ची आहे
translated_text: It may be less, but it will definitely be there. In the end, the need is mutual.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective and mutual need, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "गरज दोघांची उभ यंत ची आहे" (the need is mutual) contributes to the neutral sentiment by highlighting a shared requirement rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: जर गरीब म्हणून राहायचं आहे तर ची सुरुवात अगदी आरामात करा.
translated_text: If you want to live as a poor person, start out very comfortably.
Justification: The sentence expresses a contradictory sentiment suggesting comfort in poverty, but lacks overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जर गरीब म्हणून राहायचं आहे तर ची सुरुवात अगदी आरामात करा" (If you want to live as a poor person, start out very comfortably) is sarcastic, but the sarcasm doesn't strongly convey either positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब जरा शेतकऱ्याची अन्न धान्य पण एक्सपोर्ट करा. फक्त उद्योगपतींचे उत्पादित वस्तू नका करू.
translated_text: Sir, please export farmers' food grains as well. Don't just export the products of industrialists.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request and a plea for fair treatment, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "साहेब जरा ... नका करू" (Sir, please... don't do) indicates a neutral tone of suggestion and mild concern rather than outright negativity.

Text: शाळा बंद करू नका सांगून आले का?
translated_text: Did you come to tell me not to close the school?
Justification: The phrase "सांगून आले का?" (saangun aale ka?) which translates to "Did you come to tell me?" expresses surprise at the implied action. The "का?" (ka?) at the end signals a question tinged with surprise or disbelief.

Text: आपण सर्व पण असे शासकीय कार्यालयामध्ये निवेदन देऊन हलाल सक्ती विरोधी निवेदन देऊ शकतो.
translated_text: We can all make a statement against halal compulsion by submitting a statement to a government office.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral statement about the possibility of submitting a statement against halal compulsion; the phrase "निवेदन देऊ शकतो" (nivedan deu shakto) indicating the ability to submit a statement, is presented without any explicit positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: नशीब लागत हे सगळं ऑफिस कॅन्टीन मध्ये मिळायला
translated_text: It takes luck to get all this in the office canteen.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "नशीब लागत" (nasheeb lagat), meaning "it takes luck," simply states a condition without expressing any positive or negative emotion. It's an observation rather than a value judgment.

Text: हे भुजबळ तर नाहीयेत ना
translated_text: This is not Bhujbal, is it?
Justification: The word "नाहीयेत ना" (naahiyet naa), a tag question indicating doubt and seeking confirmation, contributes to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: एकाच मुलाखतीत दहा वेळा अभय मागितले होते...हे आपण सहज बघु शकता..
translated_text: Abhay was asked ten times in a single interview...you can easily see this..
Justification: The word "दहा वेळा अभय मागितले" (daha vela Abhay magitle - asked Abhay ten times) implies an unusual or unexpected situation, leading to surprise.

Text: हे पवार नक्की कोणाचे मित्र आहेत?
translated_text: Who exactly is this Pawar a friend of?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the use of "नक्की" (nakki), which implies uncertainty and a questioning of allegiance, hence signaling surprise about Pawar's true affiliations.

Text: केंद्रीय गृहराज्यमंत्री म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: I am asking this as the Union Minister of State for Home Affairs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of position/role ("केंद्रीय गृहराज्यमंत्री म्हणून विचारतोय" - as the Union Minister of State for Home Affairs) without any inherent emotional or sentimental content.

Text: पूर्ण दाणेदार पिक होत.
translated_text: A full grain crop is being produced.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "पूर्ण दाणेदार पिक होत" simply describes a factual observation of a crop production without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. It's a statement of fact.

Text: मी तर एक पैसा सुद्धा वापरला आहे.
translated_text: I even used a penny.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with no strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "एक पैसा सुद्धा" (eka paisa suddha) - "even a penny" - simply emphasizes the small amount and doesn't convey any sentiment beyond a neutral observation.

Text: हे तुम्ही बोलताय कमालच आहे
translated_text: This is amazing what you are saying.
Justification: "Kamaalch ahe" (कमालच आहे), meaning "amazing," expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आता राणे गेले असे समजा राजकारणातून
translated_text: Now suppose Rane is gone from politics.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the implication of Rane's political departure and the finality suggested by "आता राणे गेले असे समजा राजकारणातून" which evokes a sense of loss and sadness. "गेले असे समजा" (suppose is gone) contributes to this feeling of finality.

Text: हे सर्व मान्य नेते म्हणून उदयास आले. असे भाग्य कमी लोकांना लाभतं..
translated_text: All of them emerged as recognized leaders. Few people are fortunate enough to have such a fortune.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an event and a general observation about fortune. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "असे भाग्य कमी लोकांना लाभतं" (ase bhagya kami lokanna labhate) – "few people are fortunate enough to have such a fortune" – is a statement of fact, not inherently positive or negative in this context.

Text: ब्राम्हण अंधारात येऊन गेला तर चालतो का
translated_text: Is it okay if a Brahmin comes and goes in the dark?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("चालतो का") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The question itself, although potentially loaded with social commentary related to caste ("ब्राम्हण"), does not inherently express an emotion or opinion.

Text: तुझ्या आडनावातच तुझ्या कमेंटचं उत्तर आहे...
translated_text: The answer to your comment is in your last name...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's an indirect response relying on the listener's last name to understand the intended meaning. The phrase "तुझ्या आडनावातच" (in your last name itself) simply directs attention to the surname without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: दिवाळी पुर्वतयारी ची रजा घेतोय का...
translated_text: Are you taking leave for Diwali preparations?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question about taking leave ("रजा घेतोय का") and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सगळे एक, एकासाठीच असतात सर....
translated_text: Everyone is for one another, sir...
Justification: The sentence expresses unity and support without any explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सगळे एक, एकासाठीच असतात" (sagle ek, ekasathich astat) simply states that everyone is for one another, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला अस म्हणायचे का या खालील ठिकाणी मनसे नावालाच आहे
translated_text: Do you mean to say that the MNS is the only one in the following places?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of inquiry ("तुम्हाला अस म्हणायचे का"), questioning the presence or influence of the MNS party, without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "नावालाच आहे" (nāvalāch āhe) implies a minimal or nominal presence, but doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: आज पासून प्रचार करू , " आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे "
translated_text: We will campaign from today, "We want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena"
Justification: The sentence expresses an intention to campaign and defeat a political party. While it mentions "हरवायचे आहे" (haravayache aahe - to defeat), the statement is presented as a political objective rather than an expression of strong positive or negative emotion. Therefore, the presence of "हरवायचे आहे" indicates a neutral sentiment in a political context.

Text: ही कोण आहे?
translated_text: Who is this?
Justification: The word "कोण" (kon - who) indicates a question seeking information about an unknown person, expressing surprise or lack of prior knowledge.

Text: ती मशाल घेऊन तुमचं हिंदुत्व कुठं हरवलंय ते शोधा..
translated_text: Take that torch and find out where your Hindutva has been lost.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it's a directive to "शोधा" (shodha - find), without inherently expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: लहान मुलांना असते अंगठे चोखण्याची सवय...पाहा काय आहे उपाय?
translated_text: Small children have the habit of sucking their thumbs...what's the solution?
Justification: The phrase "पाहा काय आहे उपाय?" (pāhā kāya āhe upāya?) - "what's the solution?" - evokes surprise, as it implies an unexpected problem and seeks a remedy.

Text: नंतर ची आणि      आधीची निवडणूक होती.. सर्व पक्ष वेगळे लढले होते
translated_text: There was an election after that and before that.. All the parties fought separately.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes past election events factually ("नंतर ची आणि आधीची निवडणूक होती.. सर्व पक्ष वेगळे लढले होते"). There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases.

Text: एक जळजळीत कटाक्ष पुरे आहे
translated_text: One burning glance is enough.
Justification: The phrase "एक जळजळीत कटाक्ष" (ek jaljalit kataksh) meaning "one burning glance" doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment in isolation. The context is missing to determine the exact sentiment.

Text: शांतीला निळ्या रंगाची साडी घेऊन दिली आहेस का रव्या…
translated_text: Ravya, have you bought Shanti a blue saree?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi words "शांतीला निळ्या रंगाची साडी घेऊन दिली आहेस का रव्या…" simply inquire about a purchase and do not convey any emotional valence.

Text: होमगार्ड चे पण बघा मॅडम
translated_text: Look at the Home Guard too, madam.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a simple request or instruction. There are no specific words conveying positive or negative emotion; it's a straightforward appeal to "बघा" (bagaa - look at).

Text: हे माझ्याकडून कर ...
translated_text: Do this for me...
Justification: The phrase "कर..." (kar...) which translates to "do..." expresses a forceful command without any polite request indicators, contributing to the anger emotion.

Text: पंतप्रधानांनी लोकार्पण केलेले डिजिटल बँकिंग आहे तरी काय? तुम्हाला त्याचा काय फायदा होणार?
translated_text: What is the digital banking that the Prime Minister has launched? What will be the benefit for you?
Justification: The sentence exhibits a neutral sentiment due to its informational and inquisitive nature. The phrase "काय फायदा होणार?" (kay fayda honar? - what benefit will there be?) simply inquires about the potential advantages, without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: अंधेरी विधानसभा पोट निवडणुकीमधून भाजप उमेदवाराची माघार घेणे ही घटना कोणत्या राजकीय पक्षाला फायद्याची ठरेल?
translated_text: Which political party will benefit from the BJP candidate's withdrawal from the Andheri assembly by-election?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about potential benefit ("फायद्याची ठरेल?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment towards any party or the event itself.

Text: किमान बुर्जीपावची गाडी लावायला तरी जागा द्यायची होती
translated_text: At least there should be room for a Burji Pav car.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or expectation ("द्यायची होती" - should be given), rather than a positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सेम तसाचं जसा पवार साहेबांनी      ची लोकसभा न-लढवण्याचा निर्णय घेतला होता...
translated_text: Same as Pawar Saheb had decided not to contest the Lok Sabha elections...
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the implied context and comparison to a previous decision by Pawar Saheb not to contest elections. While no single word explicitly expresses sadness, the comparison to a past decision of withdrawal (indicated by "न-लढवण्याचा निर्णय घेतला" - n-ladhvanyacha nirnay ghetla - decided not to contest) suggests a similar situation, hinting at potential loss or unfavorable circumstances leading to sadness.

Text: त्यामुळे  .  वर्षे शांत होते वाटतं.
translated_text: So it seems like the years have been quiet.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "शांत होते वाटतं" (shant hote vaat'ta) which translates to "seems like it was quiet." This expresses a observation and doesn't convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हा फोटो होता आधी ... लगेच बदलला.
translated_text: This was the photo before... it was changed immediately.
Justification: The sentence describes a change ("बदलला") in a neutral tone, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. "बदलला" simply indicates a change occurred, without any emotional coloring.

Text: संपुर्ण व्हिडीओ माझ्या या वर  धर्माचा पाया असा रचुया!
translated_text: Let's build the foundation of religion on this entire video!
Justification: The phrase "असा रचुया!" (asa rachuya!), meaning "let's build!", indicates a positive intention and proactive encouragement, hence the emotion of joy. Although religion is mentioned, in this context it does not automatically indicate a negative or positive sentiment in isolation. The specific invitation to build something evokes positive emotion.

Text: सर्व मंत्रिमंडळ मॅनेज करून ठेवणार का? तिथे सामान्यांना न्याय मिळेल का?
translated_text: Will all the ministries be managed? Will the common people get justice there?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning tone regarding whether common people will receive justice ("सामान्यांना न्याय मिळेल का?") under the given circumstances. The uncertainty implied by the question prevents it from being positive or negative.

Text: हे पण सांगा की मिलिंद नार्वेकर पण आहेत
translated_text: Also tell me that Milind is also a Narvekar.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact. There is no emotional language present; the phrase "हे पण सांगा की मिलिंद नार्वेकर पण आहेत" (also tell me that Milind is also a Narvekar) is purely informational.

Text: नरेंद्र मोदी जागतिक नेते आणि भारत सर्वांत ताकदवान देश बनलाय का?
translated_text: Has Narendra Modi become a world leader and India the most powerful country?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about Narendra Modi's status as a world leader and India's status as a powerful country. The interrogative nature of the sentence, indicated by "का?", makes it neutral in sentiment.

Text: हे आधी गुजराती लोकांना समजले पाहीजे.
translated_text: Gujarati people should understand this first.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states a factual observation ("हे आधी गुजराती लोकांना समजले पाहीजे" - this should be understood by Gujarati people first) without expressing any positive or negative feeling. There is no emotive language present.

Text: आयफेल टॉवरला उलटा केला की झाली मशाल .. काँग्रेसचा हात आणि राष्ट्रवादीचं घड्याळ ...
translated_text: When the Eiffel Tower was turned upside down, it became a torch.. Congress's hand and NCP's watch...
Justification: The sentence is largely descriptive and satirical, comparing political symbols to everyday objects. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "आयफेल टॉवरला उलटा केला की झाली मशाल" is a statement of supposed fact, and the rest simply lists political party symbols. There's no strong indication of negativity or positivity toward the objects or parties.

Text: हो. भरत जाधव, अंकुश चौधरी सुद्धा होते.
translated_text: Yes. Bharat Jadhav and Ankush Chaudhary were also there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact; the inclusion of "हो" (ho, meaning "yes") confirms the presence of specific individuals, but doesn't convey any inherent positive, negative, or emotional charge. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत कोणत्याही पक्षाची नसते हे विसरून चालणार नाही.
translated_text: It should not be forgotten that the Gram Panchayat does not belong to any party.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation and reminder, not expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "ग्रामपंचायत कोणत्याही पक्षाची नसते" (Gram Panchayat does not belong to any party) is a statement of fact rather than an emotional expression.

Text: म्हणजे बघून तुम्ही लगेच मिसळ खायला जाल...
translated_text: So, you will immediately go to eat Misal after watching it...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a likely action ("मिसळ खायला जाल") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: स्थानिक लोकांचा सहभाग घेतल्या शिवाय जबरदस्तीने लोकांवर का लादु इच्छिता ...
translated_text: Why do you want to forcefully impose it on the people without involving the local people?
Justification: The phrase "जबरदस्तीने लोकांवर का लादु इच्छिता" (why do you want to forcefully impose it on the people) expresses anger and disapproval towards the act of forceful imposition.

Text: समाज आणि जीवनाच्या विकासामध्ये इष्ट बदल घडवून आणणे
translated_text: Bringing about desirable changes in the development of society and life
Justification: The sentence expresses a general aspiration for positive change, using the phrase "इष्ट बदल" (ishta badal) meaning "desirable changes," which is inherently neutral and lacks any strong positive or negative connotation.

Text: कृपया शासनाने तात्काळ लक्ष द्यावे हि नम्र विनंती
translated_text: Please, I humbly request the government to pay immediate attention to this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a polite request using "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti), meaning "humble request," indicating a neutral sentiment as it lacks strong positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: कंब्बूज्या का तंबूज्या
translated_text: Kambujya why Tambujya
Justification: The sentence "कंब्बूज्या का तंबूज्या" is neutral due to the use of interrogative words "का" (why) implying a question without expressing any sentiment or emotion. The question seems rhetorical and lacks any inherent emotional tone.

Text: होय आमच्या गावात देवीचे पुजारी चांभार समाजाचे आहेत... तर सिद्धानाथाचे व महादेवाचे डवरी समाजाचे....
translated_text: Yes, in our village, the goddess's priests are from the Chambhar community... while those of Siddhanath and Mahadev are from the Dawari community....
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation regarding the caste of priests in the village ("गावात देवीचे पुजारी चांभार समाजाचे आहेत... तर सिद्धानाथाचे व महादेवाचे डवरी समाजाचे...."). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: महर्षि प्रमाणे व्यास ही सुद्धा उपाधीच आहे.तुम्ही कोणत्या व्यासांबद्दल बोलत आहात?
translated_text: Like Maharishi, Vyas is also a title. Which Vyas are you talking about?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a factual statement and a clarifying question. The phrase "उपाधीच आहे" (upadhich aahe - is also a title) indicates a statement of fact, and "कोणत्या व्यासांबद्दल बोलत आहात?" (konatya vyasabaddal bolat aahat? - Which Vyas are you talking about?) is a neutral question seeking clarification.

Text: प्रेमात कोण आंधळे असतील तर सांगा... आज आमच्या इथे मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे..!
translated_text: If anyone is blind in love, tell me... Today we have a free eye check-up camp here..!
Justification: The sentence expresses a joyful sentiment due to the contrast between the common saying "प्रेमात कोण आंधळे असतील" (if anyone is blind in love) and the announcement of a "मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे" (free eye check-up camp), creating a humorous and lighthearted tone. The phrase "मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे" directly contributes to the joy by offering something beneficial and unexpected in a playful manner.

Text: परवा अडाणी ठाकरेंच्या भेटीला गेले होते.. ते चालत असेल 'मटा'ला..
translated_text: The day before yesterday, Adani had gone to meet Thackeray.. He must have been walking to 'Mata'..
Justification: The sentence describes a meeting and a possible location with neutral language; there's no sentiment-bearing Marathi word or phrase.

Text: पाकड्यां विरुद्ध आली होती ना ती खेळी?
translated_text: Was that play against Pakistan?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple question about a game ("खेळी") against Pakistan ("पाकड्यां विरुद्ध"). There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases present.

Text: काकू आता वडापाव किंवा कचोरी हे चिन्ह निवडा
translated_text: Aunty, now select the icon Vadapav or Kachori.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple request, and there are no sentiment-bearing words. The phrase "चिन्ह निवडा" (chinnh nivaada - select the icon) is a neutral instruction.

Text: हे वाटण्यासाठी निधी कुठून जमा करता ते पण सांगा जनतेला ?
translated_text: Could you please tell the public where you are raising funds to distribute this?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question asking for information ("निधी कुठून जमा करता ते पण सांगा"). It seeks clarification without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: एमएसएमई क्षेत्राच्या दीर्घकालीन कायमस्वरूपी पुनरुज्जीवनाचा प्रयत्न ../--…
translated_text: Efforts for long-term and permanent revival of the MSME sector ../--…
Justification: The sentence describes "प्रयत्न" (prayatna), meaning effort, which is neutral in sentiment and does not evoke any specific emotion.

Text: म्हणजे मनसे भूमिका बदलते हे मान्य आहे का
translated_text: So is it acceptable that MNS is changing its position?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral inquiry about whether a political party's change in stance is acknowledged. The Marathi phrase "म्हणजे मान्य आहे का" (mhanje maanya aahe ka) simply questions the acceptance of a fact without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: हो ... म्य घेऊन पळालो ही पेलेट
translated_text: Yes ... I ran away with this pellet
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the statement "पळालो" (palalo - ran away) is presented without any emotional coloring or further context indicating positive or negative feelings. It's a simple statement of fact.

Text: पंतप्रधानांच्या हस्ते गुजरातमध्ये प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजनेच्या आयुष्मान कार्डांच्या वितरणाला होणार प्रारंभ
translated_text: Distribution of Ayushman Cards under Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana will be launched in Gujarat by the Prime Minister
Justification: The sentence describes a routine event; the launch of a distribution program. No specific Marathi word indicates a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is purely informative.

Text: सरकार जनतेचे निर्णय लोकहिताचे
translated_text: The government and the people's decisions are in the public interest.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about government and public decisions being in the public interest, lacking any strong positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "लोकहिताचे" (lokhitanche), meaning "in the public interest," while potentially positive in implication, is presented as a neutral description rather than an expression of joy or optimism.

Text: निदान तुम्हीं महाराष्ट्रातील, एखाद्या गावाचे तरी करा काम.
translated_text: At least you should work for a village in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a suggestion or expectation ("निदान तुम्हीं...करा काम" - at least you...do the work) without strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: तू घेतो थापला चढवून
translated_text: You take it with a slap.
Justification: "थापला चढवून" (thapla chadhavun), meaning "with a slap," indicates aggression and is responsible for the anger emotion and negative sentiment.

Text: पितरांसाठी पान ठेवले होते ना?
translated_text: Was the leaf kept for the ancestors?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple question about a ritual ("पितरांसाठी पान ठेवले होते ना?") without any explicit emotional or opinionated language, hence the neutral sentiment. The phrase "पितरांसाठी पान ठेवले होते ना?" inquires about a common practice, remaining objective and devoid of emotional tone.

Text: यश हे आपल्या विचारांवर अवलंबून आहे. दिसण्यावर, जातीधर्मावर नाही..
translated_text: Success depends on your thoughts. Not on your looks, not on your caste.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general truth about success, focusing on internal factors ("विचारांवर अवलंबून आहे" - depends on thoughts) rather than external ones. There is no specific wording that evokes a strong positive or negative feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे ते गावठी माधुरी का, ज्यांच्या घरी नाही ती वाली?
translated_text: So, is that village Madhuri, who doesn't have her at home?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question using the phrase "म्हणजे ते" which translates to "So, is that" framing the rest of the sentence as an inquiry rather than expressing a strong sentiment.

Text: आमच्या सारख्या भक्तांना....!! काही फरक पडत नाही......!! येणार तर मोदीच....!!
translated_text: For devotees like us....!! It doesn't matter....!! If Modi comes, then....!!
Justification: The neutral sentiment and anger emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "काही फरक पडत नाही" (kahi farak padat nahi), meaning "it doesn't matter." While seemingly neutral, in this context, it suggests suppressed frustration and resignation regarding an undesirable outcome, contributing to underlying anger and a lack of positive sentiment.

Text: मला उभ राहायचं म्हणून अटच शिथिल करा हा राजीनामा होता?
translated_text: Was this resignation just to relax the conditions so I could stay?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about the motive behind a resignation. The questioning tone, particularly conveyed by "म्हणून अटच शिथिल करा हा राजीनामा होता?" (was this resignation just to relax the conditions?), does not express any strong positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: हे पद कर्तत्व बघून नाही तर भाजप आमदारांचा चिरंजीव म्हणून मिळाले आहे..
translated_text: This position was not obtained through merit, but as a descendant of BJP MLAs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation ("भाजप आमदारांचा चिरंजीव म्हणून मिळाले आहे"), lacking overtly positive or negative sentiment indicators.

Text: मुंबई महापालिकेला हे लागू होत नाही. : आशिष शेलार
translated_text: This does not apply to Mumbai Municipal Corporation. : Ashish Shelar
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "लागू होत नाही" (lagu hot nahi) - "does not apply". This phrase expresses a lack of application without any inherent emotional loading or positive/negative connotation.

Text: मी आजपर्यंत नाही खाल्ला
translated_text: I haven't eaten yet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("मी आजपर्यंत नाही खाल्ला" - I haven't eaten yet). The presence of "नाही" (nahi - not) simply indicates a lack of eating, not a positive or negative feeling.

Text: हेच व असे बदल्याचे अनेक कारणांमुळे भाजप हारणार,,
translated_text: BJP will lose due to this and many other reasons.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a prediction ("हारणार" - will lose) without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: खरंय मित्रा.. आज खूप गरज आहे अश्या एकजुटीची ..
translated_text: True friend.. Such unity is very much needed today..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the overall message focusing on the need for unity ("एकजुटीची गरज आहे") without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "खरंय मित्रा" (True friend) indicates agreement and acknowledgment but not necessarily strong emotion.

Text: घरातून निघतच नाही तर काय भिजणार
translated_text: What if I don't leave the house?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of exposure to rain due to staying indoors. The Marathi phrase "घरातून निघतच नाही" (gharatun nightach nahi - doesn't even leave the house) implies a fear of something outside, leading to avoidance and the assigned emotion of fear. The statement is neutral overall; hence the sentiment is 0.

Text: आता हा स्वत:ला श्रीकृष्ण समजायला लागलाय.
translated_text: Now he has started considering himself as Lord Krishna.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "आता हा स्वत:ला श्रीकृष्ण समजायला लागलाय" (Now he has started considering himself as Lord Krishna) expresses an observation or a statement of fact, without inherently conveying positive or negative sentiment. There is no specific word within this phrase that indicates a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हा फसवणूकचा मॅसेज आला आहे. सर्वांनी सावध असावे.
translated_text: This is a fraudulent message. Everyone should be careful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a warning about a fraudulent message. While caution is advised, the statement is primarily informational and objective. The phrase "फसवणूकचा मॅसेज" (fraudulent message) indicates a negative element, but the overall tone remains neutral as it's simply a statement of fact and a call for awareness.

Text: आपणास माहीत आहे का?
translated_text: Did you know?
Justification: The sentence "आपणास माहीत आहे का?" (Did you know?) expresses surprise because the question ending "का?" (ka?) indicates a query or doubt, suggesting the speaker is surprised and seeking confirmation.

Text: बाळासाहेब व राज ठाकरेंनी कधीही विमलछाप गुटखा सेवन करुन पार्काच्या भिंती रंगवल्या नाहीत
translated_text: Balasaheb and Raj Thackeray never smoked Vimalchhap gutkha and painted the walls of the park.
Justification: The sentence states that Balasaheb and Raj Thackeray *did not* do something negative (smoke gutkha and vandalize property). The Marathi phrasing "कधीही ... रंगवल्या नाहीत" (kadhihi...rangvalya nahit) which translates to "never...painted" indicates the absence of a negative action, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: नंबर प्लेटचे रंग वेगवेगळे का असतात? हे प्रकरण काय आहे? समजून घ्या!
translated_text: Why are the number plates different colors? What is this matter? Understand!
Justification: The surprise sentiment is driven by the phrase "वेगवेगळे का असतात?" (veglvegle kaa asatat?), which directly translates to "Why are they different?", indicating curiosity and surprise at the observed difference in number plate colors.

Text: या बाईंची पावडरची फॅक्टरी आहे का?
translated_text: Does this woman have a powder factory?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "या बाईंची पावडरची फॅक्टरी आहे का?", which implies disbelief or astonishment regarding the woman's potential involvement in a powder factory, thus indicating surprise.

Text: किती दिवसांसाठी हे आता सर न्यायाधीश असतील ?
translated_text: How long will he be the Chief Justice now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral inquiry about the duration of the Chief Justice's term. The phrase "किती दिवसांसाठी" (kiti divasansathi), meaning "for how many days", indicates a question seeking information without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: किलोमीटर चा ढग होता काय .
translated_text: Was it a kilometer-long cloud?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple question without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The Marathi phrase "किलोमीटर चा ढग होता काय" is a factual inquiry about the size of a cloud, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: सुंदरता ही कोणालाही आपल्या प्रेमात पाडते.
translated_text: Beauty makes anyone fall in love with you.
Justification: The word "प्रेमात" (premaat), meaning "in love," strongly suggests a positive emotion and contributes to the overall joy.

Text: शेवटी निर्णय हा - सुप्रीम कोर्टाचे अस्तिव आणी भारतातील लोकशाहीचे भविष्य ठरवणारा आहे....
translated_text: Ultimately, this decision will determine the existence of the Supreme Court and the future of democracy in India.
Justification: The sentence is largely descriptive and factual. While important, phrases like "सुप्रीम कोर्टाचे अस्तिव" (existence of the Supreme Court) and "भारतातील लोकशाहीचे भविष्य" (future of democracy in India) lack explicit emotional or opinionated language, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ही तर वाढवलेली वाटत आहेत
translated_text: These seem to be exaggerated.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "वाढवलेली वाटत आहेत" (vaadhavleli vaatat aahet) which translates to "seem to be exaggerated" simply states an observation without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. It doesn't convey happiness, sadness, anger, or any other specific emotion.

Text: सर्वसामान्य माणसांची प्रतिक्रिया आहे ही तुझ्या तोंडाला आवर घाल.
translated_text: This is the reaction of ordinary people. Keep your mouth shut.
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand to "keep your mouth shut" ("तोंडीला आवर घाल"). While potentially harsh, the overall statement is presented as a neutral observation of public reaction rather than expressing strong negative emotion directly. Therefore, the phrase "सर्वसामान्य माणसांची प्रतिक्रिया आहे" (reaction of ordinary people) suggests a factual description, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे घ्या माह्याकुन
translated_text: Take this seriously.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "हे घ्या माह्याकुन" (he ghya mahyakun) simply conveys an offering, lacking any inherent emotional valence.

Text: लग्न झालेल्या साठी नाहीय स्कीम ही
translated_text: This scheme is not for married people.
Justification: The phrase "नाहीय" (nahiy) indicating negation and the factual statement about the scheme not being for married people results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ऑक्टोबरमध्येही का पडतो आहे पाऊस?
translated_text: Why is it raining even in October?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) with surprise as the primary emotion, driven by the phrase "का पडतो आहे पाऊस?" which translates to "Why is it raining?". The question expresses unexpectedness, indicating surprise rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: काही नाही सोयरिक जोडायची आहे
translated_text: Nothing to add, Soyrik.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "काही नाही" (kahi nahi), meaning "nothing," indicates a lack of strong feeling or opinion.

Text: तिचा आत्तापर्यंतचा हिशेब आहे का दादा
translated_text: Do you have her account till now, Grandpa?
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "तिचा आत्तापर्यंतचा हिशेब आहे का दादा" which is a straightforward question about an account. There's no inherently positive or negative language, and "दादा" (Grandpa) is a respectful term, not indicative of strong emotion. Thus, the sentence maintains a neutral sentiment.

Text: ला नाही बसवायची, तिकडे डम्पिंग ग्राउंड ला बसवायची हिला.
translated_text: They didn't want to put it there, they wanted to put it in a dumping ground.
Justification: The phrase "डम्पिंग ग्राउंड ला बसवायची" (dumping ground la basvaychi) implies a strong sense of disposal and devaluation, evoking disgust.

Text: पूर्ण व्हिडिओ टाका हा
translated_text: Put the full video here
Justification: The sentence "पूर्ण व्हिडिओ टाका हा" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple request. There is no specific word that strongly indicates positive or negative emotion; the phrase "पूर्ण व्हिडिओ टाका" (put the full video) is a direct instruction.

Text: अरे तू आला आधी .. आणि मलाच बघ तू तुझं बघ
translated_text: Oh, you came first.. and look at me, you look at yourself.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as the phrase "अरे तू आला आधी" (are tu aala aadhi - Oh, you came first) and "तू तुझं बघ" (tu tujha bagh - you look at yourself) simply state facts and observations without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: कधी पण ड्रील्लर नेच कानाला भोक पाडायचे असतात.।।।
translated_text: Sometimes you have to pierce your ears with a drill.
Justification: The phrase "ड्रील्लर नेच कानाला भोक पाडायचे" (pierce your ears with a drill) evokes disgust because drilling is associated with pain and unpleasant sensations, making the imagery highly repulsive.

Text: पडण्याची भीती जास्त होती
translated_text: The fear of falling was high.
Justification: "भीती जास्त होती" (bheeti jaasta hoti - fear was high) expresses a strong negative sentiment and evokes the emotion of fear due to the explicit mention of "fear" being high.

Text: ते थोडंसं होणार डॅमेज कंट्रोल करण्यासाठी ते आपला उमेदवार माघारी घेणार
translated_text: It will be a bit of damage control, they will withdraw their candidate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a strategic political maneuver ("डॅमेज कंट्रोल करण्यासाठी ते आपला उमेदवार माघारी घेणार" - to control the damage, they will withdraw their candidate) without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "डॅमेज कंट्रोल" (damage control) suggests a pragmatic approach, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: ही पण आहे का
translated_text: Is this also true?
Justification: The word "पण" (pan), meaning "also" or "even," indicates a sense of surprise or questioning if something unexpected is true, leading to a neutral sentiment but heightened emotion of surprise.

Text: तसंच नड्डा नामधारी, निर्णय गुजराती नेत्यांचे
translated_text: Also Nadda's name, decision is up to Gujarati leaders
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the statement. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "तसंच नड्डा नामधारी, निर्णय गुजराती नेत्यांचे" simply states an observation.

Text: बरं ते एक प्रश्न पडलाय  हे जुनेद सर कोण आहेत नेमके????
translated_text: Well, that raises a question, who exactly is Junaid Sir????
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's primarily a question seeking information. The phrase "प्रश्न पडलाय" (prashna padlay), meaning "a question has arisen," indicates inquiry rather than any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: जिल्हा मध्यवर्ती बँकेचे कर्ज माफी जाली नाही साहेब ते पण पहा यवतमाळ जिल्हा
translated_text: District Central Bank loan waiver is not done, sir, look at that too, Yavatmal District
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("कर्ज माफी जाली नाही" - "loan waiver is not done") without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: चा अर्थ हे घ्या , ये लीजिये असा आहे
translated_text: The meaning of this is "Take this, come and take it."
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "चा अर्थ हे घ्या , ये लीजिये असा आहे" which simply explains the meaning of something. There's no emotional coloring or opinion expressed, therefore it's neutral.

Text: कोणते दोन समाज, गुजराती आणि महाराष्ट्रीयन म्हणायचे आहे का तुम्हाला
translated_text: Which two communities, Gujarati and Maharashtrian, do you mean?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question. The phrase "म्हणायचे आहे का तुम्हाला" (do you mean?) expresses a question without any sentiment or emotion.

Text: ही कुठली पध्दत आहे ते जिवनमरणाची लढाई लढत आहेत जय पराजय तर होत असतात
translated_text: What kind of method is this? They are fighting a life and death battle. They win and lose.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the overall balanced and observational tone. While "जिवनमरणाची लढाई" (jivanmaranachi ladhai - life and death battle) suggests intensity, the concluding phrase "जय पराजय तर होत असतात" (jay parajay tar hot asatat - they win and lose) acknowledges the cyclical nature of conflict, neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: साहेब एकदा आदरणीय राष्ट्रपतिजी द्रोपदी मुर्मू म्हणून दाखवा ना साहेब पिलीज
translated_text: Sir, please show the respected President as Draupadi Murmu.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's primarily a request ("दाखवा ना") and a statement of fact ("आदरणीय राष्ट्रपतिजी द्रोपदी मुर्मू"). There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed in the phrasing.

Text: विनंती बदली स्थगिती बाबत शासन शासन परिपत्रक का काढत नाही आहे.
translated_text: Why is the government not issuing a circular regarding the postponement of transfer requests?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the interrogative tone and implied criticism conveyed through the phrase "का काढत नाही आहे" (ka kadhat nahi aahe), which translates to "why is [it] not issuing?". This indicates unexpected inaction.

Text: पण अतिवृष्टि पासून लोकांचा बचाव कसा होउ शकतो हे तरी ठरवू शकता ...!
translated_text: But you can at least decide how people can be saved from heavy rain...!
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "ठरवू शकता" (tharu shakta - can decide) suggests a possibility or capability rather than expressing a concrete sentiment.

Text: सर्जिकल स्ट्राइक अजित पवार यांच्या पासून सुरु होणार? — मूत्र
translated_text: Will surgical strike start from Ajit Pawar? — Urine
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about a potential event and includes "मूत्र" (urine) which is irrelevant and doesn't convey any strong sentiment in this context. The core question regarding surgical strike and Ajit Pawar is phrased neutrally without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: भाऊ आहेत ते .. भावाला कधी पत्र लिहून धन्यवाद वगैरे म्हणतोय का कधी आपण?
translated_text: They are brothers.. Do you ever write a letter to your brother and say thank you?
Justification: The sentence expresses a common, unremarkable fraternal relationship. The phrase "भाऊ आहेत ते" (bhau aahet te) simply states "they are brothers," indicating a factual, neutral sentiment.

Text: खाजप मध्यें आलं कि त्यानं पण क्लीन  देतील पंत आपले
translated_text: Khajap said that he will also give a clean chit to Pant.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "क्लीन देतील" (clean chit will give) refers to a future action without expressing positivity or negativity toward it, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: काही ही होऊ शकतआजकाल.
translated_text: Anything can happen these days.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about the uncertainty of the times, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "काही ही होऊ शकतआजकाल" (kahi hi hou shakat aajkal - anything can happen these days) conveys this neutrality.

Text: पडळकर खास मित्र आहेत का ??
translated_text: Are Padalkars special friends?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking a factual question about the nature of the relationship between Padalkars and "friends" (मित्र आहेत का??). There is no inherent emotional charge or opinion expressed.

Text: तुला असं म्हणायचं आहे का ह्यांच्याकडे मंत्रिपद नाहीत
translated_text: Are you saying that these people don't have ministerial positions?
Justification: The phrase "असं म्हणायचं आहे का" (asa mhanayache aahe ka - are you saying that?) indicates surprise at the implied lack of ministerial positions, leading to the emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: ते मिळणार नाही याची आधीच खात्री करून घेऊन बोलले ते
translated_text: They spoke after already being certain that they would not get it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "खात्री करून घेऊन बोलले" (khatri karun gheun bolale), meaning "spoke after being certain." This indicates a statement of fact rather than an expression of positive or negative emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे रोजगार मेळाव्याचे उद्घाटन ../-…
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray inaugurates employment fair ../-…
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event ("उद्घाटन" - inauguration) regarding an employment fair, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे सांगा युवराजला अन् राजकुमाराला
translated_text: Tell this to the crown prince and the prince.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple statement of instruction. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase within the Marathi text ("हे सांगा युवराजला अन् राजकुमाराला"). It's a factual declaration without any emotional coloring.

Text: गौरी भिडे  मातोश्रीवर इतके पैसे येतात कुठून हे जनतेला समजलेच पाहिजे.
translated_text: The public must understand where Gauri Bhide Matoshree gets so much money from.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a demand for information. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. It's a factual statement.

Text: तुमचे बनवून पाठवू का बोला ते पण करतो
translated_text: I'll make it for you and send it to you.
Justification: The sentence expresses an offer to create and send something, conveyed through the phrase "बनवून पाठवू का" (banavun pathavu ka), which lacks any inherent positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: भारत जिंकला का खाऊ आपण
translated_text: Why should we eat if India wins?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a conditional question ("भारत जिंकला का खाऊ आपण" - "Why should we eat if India wins?") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. It simply links eating to India's potential victory.

Text: महेंद्र जी लाईक न करता नुसताच नमस्कार करताय तुम्ही ही देवेंद्र नीती खेळताय
translated_text: You are playing this Devendra Neeti, just saying hello without liking Mahendra ji
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes an observation about someone's behavior ("नुसताच नमस्कार करताय", just saying hello) and uses the phrase "देवेंद्र नीती खेळताय" (playing Devendra Neeti) which, while potentially carrying negative connotations depending on context, is presented without explicit positive or negative framing within the given sentence. Therefore, its impact is neutral.

Text: मला वाटलं डॉक्टर आहेत.. डाएटिशियन आहेत का!?
translated_text: I thought there were doctors.. there were dieticians!?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a hint of surprise because of the question "आहेत का!?", which implies a surprised realization about the dieticians being present instead of just doctors.

Text: तो सूर्याजी पिसाळ आहे.
translated_text: That's Suryaji Pisal.
Justification: The sentence "तो सूर्याजी पिसाळ आहे" (That's Suryaji Pisal) is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact or identification. No specific word or phrase carries any inherent positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: ‘नेत्रा’ने शेअर केला मेकअप करतानाचा व्हिडीओ
translated_text: Netra' shared a video of herself applying makeup
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral activity ("मेकअप करतानाचा व्हिडीओ" - makeup video) without any indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: गद्दारांना ही थाळी गुजरातला घेउन जायची आहे बहुतेक.
translated_text: The traitors probably want to take this plate to Gujarat.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna), meaning "traitors," strongly contributes to the disgust emotion and negative sentiment.

Text: होणार! अजून  -  उमेदवार आहेत ज्यांनी माघार नाही घेतली.
translated_text: It will happen! There are still candidates who have not withdrawn.
Justification: The surprise stems from "होणार! अजून" (honaar! azun), meaning "It will happen! Still," implying unexpected persistence despite an anticipated resolution.

Text: दशभुजा सोडलं तर अजिबात गर्दी नाही- चांदणी चौकात नाही. मुंबई होती...
translated_text: Except for Dashabhuja, there is no crowd at all - not in Chandni Chowk. It was Mumbai...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the absence of crowds, with "गर्दी नाही" (gardi nahi - no crowd) indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: काथे ते रशिया वरून मागवलेले बॅरल आले का नाही अजून?
translated_text: Where are the barrels ordered from Russia? Why haven't they arrived yet?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual question about the arrival of goods. The phrases "काथे" (where) and "आले का नाही अजून?" (haven't they arrived yet?) simply indicate inquiry, lacking any positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: मिमिक्री करणे हे पण एक कौशल्य आहे
translated_text: Mimicry is also a skill.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "कौशल्य आहे" (kaushalya aahe) meaning "is a skill" contributes to this neutrality, indicating a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मटकी आणि मेथी आहे का
translated_text: Do you have matki and fenugreek?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question about availability. The Marathi phrase "आहे का" (aahe kaa) is a standard question format and does not express any sentiment or emotion.

Text: तळेगावलाच येणार होता. आठवतय ना??
translated_text: I was supposed to come to Talegaon. Remember??
Justification: The phrase "आठवतय ना??" (Aathavtay na?? - Remember??) implies a question seeking confirmation and subtly evokes a sense of mild surprise that the other person might have forgotten.

Text: ते राणे आणि प्रताप सरनाईक निर्दोष आहेत काय सोमयजी अस समजावं काय
translated_text: Are Rane and Pratap Sarnaik innocent? Somayji, should we assume that?
Justification: The sentence presents a question about the innocence of two individuals, using phrases like "निर्दोष आहेत काय" (are they innocent?) and "अस समजावं काय" (should we assume that?), lacking strong positive or negative indicators, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या हाताच्या रेषा पुसल्या गेल्या का??
translated_text: Have the lines on your hand been erased??
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about the erasure of hand lines ("रेषा पुसल्या गेल्या का?"), which is inherently neutral and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The question is about a factual state, thus evoking a neutral sentiment.

Text: ,त्यांना माहीत होत त्यांचा पराभव अटळ आहे
translated_text: They know their defeat is inevitable.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("पराभव अटळ आहे" - defeat is inevitable) without expressing any strong emotion or opinion.

Text: घरटं नावाची एक कविता होती शाळेत.. कोणाला आठवते का?
translated_text: There was a poem called "Ghartan" in school.. Does anyone remember it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a nostalgic inquiry. The Marathi phrase "आठवते का?" (Aathavate ka?) which translates to "Does anyone remember it?" indicates a neutral sentiment as it is simply a question seeking information, not expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: हा कोणत पाणी घेतो.
translated_text: Who is taking this water?
Justification: "कोणत" (konat - which/what kind) implies a surprise or inquiry regarding the type of water being taken, rather than a neutral observation.

Text: ते निवडणूकी आधी क्लीन चिट घेणार त्यांचाच तो प्लॅन आहे
translated_text: That is their plan to get a clean chit before the elections.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a plan ("प्लॅन आहे") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "क्लीन चिट घेणार" (getting a clean chit) is a factual statement in this context, devoid of emotional charge.

Text: भाषण लिहून घेतले पण, ते करायचे कसे हे कळत नसेल?
translated_text: Have you written a speech but don't know how to deliver it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कळत नसेल?" (kalat nasel?), meaning "don't know?", is a factual question rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: माघार घेण्याआधी किती कट कारस्थान केले ते ही तितकेच महत्त्वाचे.
translated_text: How many conspiracies were made before retreating is equally important.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes actions ("कट कारस्थान केले") without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase focuses on the factual aspect of conspiracies being made.

Text: आता ह्यांच काय करायचं
translated_text: What to do with this now?
Justification: The phrase "आता ह्यांच काय करायचं" (ata hyanch kay karaych) expresses surprise as it questions what to do with something, indicating unexpectedness and a need for a plan or solution.

Text: असे बरेचसे आहेत अजून...
translated_text: There are many more like this...
Justification: "असे बरेचसे आहेत अजून..." translates to "There are many more like this...". The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the descriptive and quantifying nature of the phrase "बरेचसे आहेत" (berechase aahet), which simply states "there are many". It lacks any explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: भाभा अणुसंशोधन केंद्र, मुंबई येथे विविध पदांच्या    जागांसाठी भरती. अधिक माहितीसाठी पहा
translated_text: Recruitment for various posts at Bhabha Atomic Research Centre, Mumbai. See for more details.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informative nature; it simply announces recruitment, with no emotional or opinionated words. The key phrase, "भरती" (bharti - recruitment), indicates a factual announcement rather than an expression of sentiment.

Text: उपराष्ट्रपती धनखडांचा दिनक्रम तुमच्या-आमच्या सारखाच, ब्रेकफास्टला घेतात शिळी चपाती आणि दही
translated_text: Vice President Dhankhar's daily routine is similar to yours and ours, he has stale chapati and curd for breakfast
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it factually describes the Vice President's simple breakfast routine, focusing on "शिळी चपाती आणि दही" (stale chapati and curd), which implies simplicity rather than expressing any particular emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेब म्हणजे कोणते आणि त्यांची तुलना करत कोणा सोबत करत आहेत शिल्लक सैनिक
translated_text: What is Balasaheb and who are the remaining soldiers comparing him with?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "बाळासाहेब म्हणजे कोणते आणि त्यांची तुलना करत कोणा सोबत करत आहेत" (baLasāheba mhaṇaje koṇate āṇi tyān̄cī tulanā karata koṇā sobata karata āheta) simply inquires about Balasaheb's qualities and the comparison being made, without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling.

Text: काही वर्षांपूर्वी सगळ्यात जास्त भारतीय विद्यार्थी शिक्षणासाठी यूकेलाच पहिली पसंती देत होते.
translated_text: A few years ago, most Indian students were choosing the UK as their first choice for education.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual preference from the past, with no inherently positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "पहिली पसंती देत होते" (pahili pasanti det hote) meaning "were giving first preference" simply describes a past trend without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: सुनंदा की सुनीता देवी काहीतरी विषय गाजला होता ना अमेठी चा. जाणकारांनी पका टाकावा
translated_text: Sunanda or Sunita Devi was a hot topic in Amethi. Experts should clarify.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "काहीतरी विषय गाजला होता" (kahitari vishay gaajla hota) which translates to "was a hot topic" simply describes a past event without expressing a sentiment.

Text: शरद पवारांना पण भाजपने सांगितलं का?
translated_text: Did BJP also tell Sharad Pawar?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature of "सांगितलं का?" (sangitale ka?), which simply asks a question without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The question itself is the neutral point.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा किती दिवस नंतरपर्यंत दिलेल्या चालतात, याचा जाणकारांनी खुलासा करावा.
translated_text: Experts should clarify how long after birthday wishes are sent, they should be sent.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual inquiry. The phrase "खुलासा करावा" (khulasa karava) - "should clarify" indicates a request for information, not expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आता मशालीत भरायला गॅस परवडतो का?
translated_text: Can you afford gas to fill your torch now?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about affordability ("परवडतो का?") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The core phrase "परवडतो का?" simply inquires about financial viability.

Text: दोन पैसे व तीन पैशांची ही नाणी होती माझ्या आठवणीत.
translated_text: I remembered these two-paise and three-paise coins.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a recollection ("आठवणीत" - aathavanit, "in memory") without any explicit positive or negative emotional coloring.

Text: करदोडा म्हणुन तु वापरु शकते...
translated_text: You can use it as a tax...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "करदोडा म्हणुन तु वापरु शकते..." (You can use it as a tax...) simply states a possibility without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "वापरु शकते" (can use) is purely factual and lacks any inherent emotional valence.

Text: आम्ही काय पाकिस्तानी आहोत का रोहिणग्या..??
translated_text: Are we Pakistanis or Rohingyas??
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question implying discrimination and marginalization, but lacks explicit emotional indicators or positive/negative wording. The phrase "आम्ही काय पाकिस्तानी आहोत का रोहिणग्या..??", while potentially loaded with negative connotations depending on context, presents itself as a neutral inquiry in this specific framing, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: तूच सांग का ओरडते ते
translated_text: You tell me why you're screaming.
Justification: The surprise emotion stems from the phrase "ओरडते ते" (oradte te), which translates to "screaming" or "yelling." This unexpected or exaggerated vocalization indicates surprise or shock.

Text: घाबरले का?
translated_text: Are you scared?
Justification: The word "घाबरले" (ghabarle), meaning "scared" or "afraid," directly indicates fear, thus justifying the emotion and contributing to a negative (0) sentiment.

Text: निखिल वागळे यांच्या मागणीशी तुम्ही सहतम आहात का?
translated_text: Do you agree with Nikhil Wagle's demand?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about agreement ("सहमत आहात का?") regarding a demand, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे आता 'बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला' हरवायचे असे म्हणणार का?
translated_text: So now you're saying you want to defeat 'Balasaheb's Shiv Sena'?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the rhetorical question framed by "म्हणणार का?" (mhaṇṇār kā?). This phrase, meaning "are you saying/will you say?", implies a challenging or surprising assertion, suggesting the speaker is questioning the other party's intentions in a surprising way.

Text: वाघ उडून जातात का तुम्हाला जंगलात सोडले आहे भया...
translated_text: Do tigers fly away? Are you afraid they have left you in the forest?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("वाघ उडून जातात का") and describes a hypothetical scenario ("तुम्हाला जंगलात सोडले आहे"). There isn't a specific word indicating strong positive or negative sentiment. "भया..." (afraid) hints at fear but is used more rhetorically, leading to a neutral classification.

Text: या दिवाळीत हे अॅप डाउनलोड करा आणि त्यातून अनेक आकर्षक बक्षिसे मिळवा.
translated_text: Download this app this Diwali and get many attractive prizes from it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes downloading an app and receiving prizes; there are no inherently positive or negative words. No specific Marathi word indicates a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is purely informational and descriptive.

Text: तु माझ्या आयुष्यातील ती व्यक्ती आहे जिला मी गमवायला खुप घाबरते.....
translated_text: You are the person in my life whom I am most afraid of losing.....
Justification: The sentence conveys a sense of vulnerability and attachment, but lacks explicit positive or negative indicators. While expressing fear of loss, the neutral sentiment arises from the overall tone of acceptance and description, without expressing happiness, sadness or anger. The phrase "खुप घाबरते" (khup ghabarte - very afraid) indicates a strong emotion but does not clearly dictate a positive or negative sentiment in the context of simply describing a fear.

Text: आज पासून उद्धव ठाकरे लोकांना सांगणार:- "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: From today, Uddhav Thackeray will tell the people: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement about defeating a rival faction. While containing the word "हरवायचे" (haravayache - to defeat), it functions neutrally as a declaration of intent within a political context, lacking inherent positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: आमच्याकडे असे म्हणतात!  दिवस एकेक माळ वाढवत जायची,या फुलांचीगोरटी प्रभात!
translated_text: We have a saying! Every day, the garland grows, the beautiful morning of these flowers!
Justification: The word "गोरटी प्रभात" (gorti prabhat - beautiful morning) indicates a sense of beauty and positivity, contributing to the emotion of joy and a neutral sentiment.

Text: मराठी भाषेत अलंकार असतात त्याचा वापर ही कळत नसेल
translated_text: There are ornaments in Marathi language, but you may not understand their use.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "मराठी भाषेत अलंकार असतात त्याचा वापर ही कळत नसेल" primarily states a fact about the Marathi language and acknowledges a potential lack of understanding without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. There's no specific word strongly indicating negativity or positivity; the phrase "कळत नसेल" (may not understand) simply suggests a possibility without imposing judgment.

Text: त्या वेळी ते सत्ताधीश होते. तेव्हा ते योग्यच होतं.
translated_text: He was in power at that time. It was right then.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states facts ("सत्ताधीश होते" - were in power) and asserts the appropriateness of past actions ("ते योग्यच होतं" - it was right then) without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुले तं पाच पानी आमंत्रण पत्रिका पाठवली होती!
translated_text: You sent me a five-page invitation!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is anger due to the implied excessive formality and wastefulness suggested by "पाच पानी आमंत्रण पत्रिका" (paach paani amantran patrika - five-page invitation). The speaker likely feels this level of invitation was unnecessary and perhaps even a deliberate attempt to create distance or convey disapproval.

Text: हा पण काही धुतल्या तांदळाचा नाही....
translated_text: This is not washed rice...
Justification: The phrase "धुतल्या तांदळाचा नाही" (dhutlya tandlacha nahi - not of washed rice) is used idiomatically to imply someone is not innocent or virtuous. However, without further context, the sentence simply states this fact without expressing strong positive or negative feelings, making it neutral.

Text: तुमच्यावाल्या सपोर्ट करून आम्हांला काय मिळणार आहे का
translated_text: What will we gain from your support?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a question of potential benefit ("काय मिळणार आहे का"), without inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "काय मिळणार आहे का" simply inquires about the expected outcome.

Text: महापालिकेत आहेत बहुतेक
translated_text: Most are in the municipality.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "महापालिकेत आहेत बहुतेक" (mahapaliket aahet bahutek) simply states a fact about the location of people; the phrase "महापालिकेत आहेत बहुतेक" (mahapaliket aahet bahutek) does not express any positive or negative opinion or feeling.

Text: नवरात्रोत्सवानिमित्त मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी महिलांसाठी केली 'ही' महत्वाची घोषणा
translated_text: On the occasion of Navratri, the Chief Minister made 'this' important announcement for women
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a factual announcement. There isn't a specific word driving strong sentiment. The phrase "महत्वाची घोषणा" (mahatvachi ghosna - important announcement) indicates importance but doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own, resulting in a neutral stance.

Text: आपणास माहीत आहे का?
translated_text: Did you know?
Justification: The phrase "आपणास माहीत आहे का?" expresses surprise because it's a question inquiring about someone's knowledge, implying the speaker might have new or unexpected information to share. The "का?" at the end of the sentence signifies a question, and the overall phrasing indicates a potential reveal or unexpectedness, leading to the emotion of surprise.

Text: हिच अपेक्षा होती... गावधी कडून
translated_text: This was what was expected... from Gavadhi.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "अपेक्षा होती" (apeksha hoti - was expected) simply states an expectation without indicating any positive or negative feeling. There is no emotional charge associated with simply fulfilling an expectation.

Text: अर्थ...केला असेल आमच्या मालकांनी पूर्वी भ्रष्टाचार...दे की सोडून...असे म्हणतो आहे हा
translated_text: Meaning...our owners must have committed corruption in the past...give or leave...he is saying this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the speculative and somewhat resigned tone. The phrase "अर्थ...केला असेल आमच्या मालकांनी पूर्वी भ्रष्टाचार...दे की सोडून...असे म्हणतो आहे हा" lacks strong positive or negative indicators, conveying a factual statement with an element of uncertainty.

Text: ते दांड्यान ढुं...... सुजल असेल बहुतेक म्हणून माघार का??
translated_text: That stick is stuck...... It must be swollen, so why retreat??
Justification: The sentence expresses a speculative and somewhat vulgar observation without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सुजल असेल बहुतेक म्हणून माघार का??" ("It must be swollen, so why retreat??") suggests a questioning or observational tone rather than a clear emotion.

Text: किती केविलवाणा प्रयत्न चालू आहे पटवून देण्याचा
translated_text: What a desperate attempt is being made to convince
Justification: "केविलवाणा" (kevilvana), meaning desperate or pathetic, indicates sadness.

Text: बायकोचं नाही..त्यामुळे ह्यापैकी एकही नाही
translated_text: Not the wife's..so none of these.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement "ह्यापैकी एकही नाही" (hyapaki ekahi nahi), which translates to "none of these," indicating a lack of preference or strong feeling.

Text: शाश्वत विकास काय आहे हेच डॉ.जयंत परुळेकर यांना समजलेले नाही – विजय केनवडेकर
translated_text: Dr. Jayant Parulekar does not understand what sustainable development is – Vijay Kenawadekar
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply stating a fact or opinion without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "समजलेले नाही" (samajlele nahi) indicates a lack of understanding, but doesn't carry inherent negativity in this context, functioning as an observation.

Text: रक्तातील साखर नियंत्रित ठेवण्यासाठी या   पिठाच्या चपात्यांचे सेवन करा, जाणून घ्या
translated_text: Eat these flour chapatis to control blood sugar, know this
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides information about controlling blood sugar and suggests eating a specific type of chapati. There is no explicit sentiment or emotional tone. The phrase "रक्तातील साखर नियंत्रित ठेवण्यासाठी" (raktaatil sakhar niyantrit thevnyasathi - to control blood sugar) is informational and objective.

Text: सरकारचे दिवाळे नाही दिवाळी होणार
translated_text: There will be no government bankruptcy, Diwali will be celebrated.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "दिवाळी होणार" (Diwali honar) meaning "Diwali will be celebrated," which suggests a festive and prosperous outcome, contrasting with the negative idea of "दिवाळे" (Diwale) or bankruptcy.

Text: राज्यघटनेच    व परिशिष्ट एकदम स्पष्ट आहे, "विलीनीकरण" हा एकमेव डिफेन्स. - मा. न्यायमूर्ती चंद्रचूड.
translated_text: The Constitution itself and the Schedule are very clear, "merger" is the only defense. - Hon. Justice Chandrachud.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement about the clarity of the constitution and schedule, stating "स्पष्ट आहे" (spasht aahe - is clear) and presenting "विलीनीकरण" (vilinikaran - merger) as a potential defense, without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही आई बसली बोलू नका, पण मी माझा बाप बसलाय बोलणार
translated_text: Don't talk about your mother sitting down, but I will talk about my father sitting down.
Justification: The phrase "बोलू नका" (bolu naka), meaning "don't talk," expresses a negative sentiment and when considered in the context of whose parents are being referred to reflects disgust, implying disapproval and potentially contempt.

Text: एका महिलेशी कसे वागलात? वयोव्रुध्दाशी कसे वागलात? विसरलात का?
translated_text: How do you treat a woman? How do you treat old age? Have you forgotten?
Justification: The sentence primarily consists of questioning and factual recall ("विसरलात का?"). While it could imply criticism, without further context, it lacks strong positive or negative indicators, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "विसरलात का?" (Have you forgotten?) is suggestive but not definitively negative or positive.

Text: घर तेच पण गोशाळा समोर
translated_text: The house is the same but in front of the cowshed
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation without any emotional cues. The phrase "घर तेच" (ghar tech) meaning "the house is the same," and "गोशाळा समोर" (goshaLa samor) meaning "in front of the cowshed" are neutral descriptions.

Text: सूचनेची नोंद घेण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: The suggestion has been noted.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "नोद घेण्यात आली आहे" (nodh ghenyat ali aahe), which simply indicates that the suggestion has been noted, conveying no positive or negative feeling.

Text: पाठवा त्या राणा जोडप्याला शिकायला कधी होणार पाठ काय माहित त्याची...
translated_text: Send that Rana couple, when will they learn their lesson?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence, while potentially critical of the "Rana couple," doesn't express strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "कधी होणार पाठ काय माहित त्याची..." (kadhi honar paath kay mahit tyachi...) which translates to "when will they learn their lesson?" expresses more of a question or observation than a strong emotion.

Text: सप्टेंबर      रोजी राजीनामा दिलेलं आहे ऋतुजा लटके ह्यांनी
translated_text: Rituja Latke resigned on September.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "राजीनामा दिलेलं आहे" (rajinama dilela aahe), meaning "resigned," which inherently carries a negative connotation in this context. This indicates a loss or unwanted change.

Text: वर्धा आणि गडचिरोली जिल्हयात अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची आज केंद्रीय पथकानं केली पाहणी.
translated_text: A central team inspected the damage caused by heavy rains in Wardha and Gadchiroli districts today.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, an inspection of damage. The phrase "पाहणी केली" (pahani keli) which translates to "inspected" or "surveyed," is a factual statement indicating an action taken rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्यांतल्या सुप्त भावनांचा आदर करण्याचा प्रामाणिक प्रयत्न म्हणुन घ्याव्या अन् द्याव्यात ही.....
translated_text: This should be taken as a sincere attempt to respect their latent feelings and give them...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence focuses on "आदर करण्याचा प्रामाणिक प्रयत्न" (a sincere attempt to respect), which expresses a generally objective and considerate action without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: तुम्हाला पाहिजे का थोडेसे पार्ट टाईम करणारा घरगडी
translated_text: Do you need a little part-time housework?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question using the phrase "तुम्हाला पाहिजे का" (tumhala pahije ka) meaning "do you need," which doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: रुपयांपेक्षा कमी किंमतीत खरेदी करा   फोन; मिळेल    दिवसांचा बॅटरी बॅकअप
translated_text: Buy a phone for less than Rs; Get days of battery backup
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating factual information about a product offer; there are no emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase "रुपयांपेक्षा कमी किंमतीत खरेदी करा" (rupayapekshaa kami kimtit kharedi kara - buy for less than rupees) and "दिवसांचा बॅटरी बॅकअप" (divasancha battery backup - days of battery backup) are descriptive but not inherently positive or negative.

Text: नक्की कुठे आहे ते बघावे लागेल, हा फोटो वरील एका पोस्ट मधून घेतलाय
translated_text: You have to see exactly where it is, this photo was taken from a post above.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it describes a need to verify information without conveying any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "बघावे लागेल" (baghave lagel - have to see) simply indicates a necessary action and doesn't express any particular emotion or sentiment.

Text: हे फक्त देवेंद्र साहेबच करू शकता.!
translated_text: Only Devendra Saheb can do this!
Justification: The exclamation point ("!") after the sentence expressing the belief that only Devendra Saheb can do something, implies frustration and a sense of anger regarding the situation.

Text: हे विशी मडगांवचे नगराध्यक्ष घनश्याम शिरोडकार हांणी याचिका दाखल केल्ली.
translated_text: This petition was filed by Ghanshyam Shirodkar, Mayor of Madgaon.
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an action (petition filing) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The sentence contains no specific Marathi words or phrases that indicate any sentiment or emotion. It's a neutral statement of fact.

Text: बऱ्याचदा.... पण त्या जखमा सुगंधी होत्या...
translated_text: Often.... but those wounds were fragrant...
Justification: The sentence describes wounds as "fragrant" ("सुगंधी"), which is an unusual and evocative descriptor, not necessarily positive or negative. The lack of other context and the ambiguous nature of "fragrant wounds" leads to a neutral sentiment.

Text: यांच्या भाऊबंदामुळे तर होत नसेल ना
translated_text: It wouldn't be possible because of their brotherhood, would it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question with "नसेल ना" (nasel na), which is a tag question indicating uncertainty or speculation, rather than a definitive positive or negative feeling. The phrase "यांच्या भाऊबंदामुळे" (yanchya bhaubandhamule) - "because of their brotherhood" - simply introduces the possible cause, without inherently expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: आदल्या दिवशी कोणी काही ही खाऊ शकत..
translated_text: Can anyone eat anything the day before?
Justification: The sentence "आदल्या दिवशी कोणी काही ही खाऊ शकत.." expresses a general possibility and lacks any inherently positive or negative connotations, hence the neutral sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase driving any particular emotion.

Text: डॉ. व मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन ही मिळाले...
translated_text: Dr. And I got valuable guidance...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about receiving guidance. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed by the phrase "डॉ. व मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन ही मिळाले..." The phrase simply states the fact of receiving "valuable guidance" ("मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन").

Text: वय वर्ष    झाल्यावर आठवलं हे साहेबांना
translated_text: I remembered this when I was a year old, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple statement of recollection with no inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "वय वर्ष झाल्यावर आठवलं" (remembered when I was a year old) is a factual recall, devoid of emotional coloring or subjective assessment.

Text: कोण आहे ही?
translated_text: Who is this?
Justification: The phrase "कोण आहे ही?" (Kon aahe hee?) expressing a question of identity, lacks inherent emotional valence and thus represents neutral sentiment (0). The surprise emotion arises from the unexpected or unknown nature of the person being questioned, rather than from any specific word suggesting negativity or positivity.

Text: अर्थात.. हे त्यांना कळलं असतं तर काय पाहिजे होतं..
translated_text: Of course.. if they had known this, what would they have wanted..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the rhetorical question "काय पाहिजे होतं" (kay pahije hot), which implies a sense of inevitability or obviousness, negating any strong positive or negative emotion. The "अर्थात" (arthat - of course) further reinforces this neutral stance.

Text: जालन्याचे पालकमंत्री अतुल सावे अंबड तालुक्यातील पाहणी दौऱ्यात सजवलेल्या बैलगाडीतून बांधावर गेले होते.
translated_text: Jalna's Guardian Minister Atul Save had gone to the dam in a decorated bullock cart during an inspection tour of Ambad taluka.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event. There is no inherently positive or negative language used. The Marathi phrase "पाहणी दौऱ्यात सजवलेल्या बैलगाडीतून बांधावर गेले होते" describes the minister's activity without expressing any sentiment.

Text: अहसान फरामोश सिर्फ इन्सान होता है..कामापुरता मामा..निसर्ग आपल्या सोयीनुसार वागायला काय घरगडी आहे..ठेविले अनंते...
translated_text: Ahsan Faramosh is just a human being..Mother for work..What kind of house is nature to act according to our convenience..It was kept for eternity...
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation and includes proverbs. While there are negative connotations to "अहसान फरामोश" (ungrateful) and the implied criticism of exploiting nature, the overall tone is neutral and reflective. The phrase "ठेविले अनंते" (Kept in eternity) suggests acceptance and a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोणी शी पुसायला पण वापरणार नाही...लेख...म्हणे..संडास सांभाळ नीट
translated_text: No one will even use it to wipe their shit...the article...says...take good care of the sanda...
Justification: The phrase "कोणी शी पुसायला पण वापरणार नाही" (No one will even use it to wipe their shit) expresses extreme disgust.

Text: उषःकाल म्हणजे पहाट.. मग पहाट झाल्यावर मशाल का पेटवायची.
translated_text: Ushakal means dawn.. so why light a torch after dawn.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a rhetorical question using the phrase "मशाल का पेटवायची" (mashal ka petvaychi), expressing a questioning rather than emotional stance.

Text: मला तर उत्सुकता आहे की, कोणत्या अभिनेत्याला परत करतील मुख्य भूमिकेसाठी
translated_text: I'm curious to see which actor they'll bring back for the lead role.
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and anticipation about a future event. The word "उत्सुकता" (utsukta), meaning curiosity, contributes to a neutral sentiment as it is simply an expression of interest without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: ऍड. आशिष शेलार साहेब तुमचे सांत्वनपर शब्द बाहेर पडतील का?
translated_text: Adv. Ashish Shelar Saheb, will your words of comfort come out?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking for words of comfort ("सांत्वनपर शब्द"). It does not express any positive or negative sentiment directly.
