translated_text: Hope they can give a new direction to Congress..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the word "अपेक्षा" (apeksha), which means "hope" or "expectation." While potentially leaning slightly positive, it primarily conveys a neutral anticipation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: मी करणार. मला शक्य आहे
translated_text: I will do it. I can.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of intent and capability ("मी करणार. मला शक्य आहे"). There are no specific words or phrases that indicate any strong positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The words "करणार" (will do) and "शक्य आहे" (possible/can) are factual and neutral.

Text: भारत हा जगातील सर्वात मोठा साखर उत्पादक देश बनला आहे
translated_text: India has become the world's largest sugar producer.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual piece of information. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed in the Marathi sentence. The phrase "सर्वात मोठा साखर उत्पादक देश बनला आहे" (sarvat motha sakhar utpadak desh banla aahe - has become the largest sugar producer) simply describes a state of affairs.

Text: उष्ट्यांपेक्षा चोर बरा.. उष्टे खायला कष्ट नाही लागत.. चोरी साठी कष्ट करावेच लागतात..
translated_text: Thieves are better than camels.. Camels don't require hard work to eat.. You have to work hard to steal..
Justification: The sentence expresses anger due to the comparative statement "उष्ट्यांपेक्षा चोर बरा" (ushtyanpeksha chor bara - Thieves are better than camels). This comparison, particularly favoring thieves, indicates a strong disapproval and resentment towards camels, thus reflecting anger.

Text: स्वतः जागे व्हा आणि इतरांना जागवा! एकच पर्याय.
translated_text: Wake up yourself and wake up others! The only option.
Justification: The phrase "एकच पर्याय" (ekach paryay - the only option) implies a sense of urgency and limited choice, contributing to the feeling of anger and frustration. The lack of alternatives can be infuriating and contribute to this emotion.

Text: ताई साहेब मनाची तयारी करून् ठेवा तुमचा सोबत पण पुढे जाऊन हेच होणार आहे
translated_text: Tai Saheb, I will prepare my mind and keep it with you, but this is what is going to happen going forward.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly conveys information about preparing one's mind for a future event. The Marathi phrase "मनाची तयारी करून् ठेवा" (manachi tayari karun theva - prepare your mind) is informational and lacks overtly positive or negative connotations.

Text: ट्विट करुन असत्य पसरवणे ही कोणत्याही सज्जनांची लक्षणं असू शकत नाहीत!
translated_text: Spreading lies through tweets is not the mark of a gentleman!
Justification: The phrase "असत्य पसरवणे" (asatya pasaravane), meaning "spreading lies," indicates a negative behavior that elicits anger.

Text: बँकांचे पण येऊद्या....
translated_text: Let the banks come too....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "बँकांचे पण येऊद्या...." (banks come too) simply expresses a desire or suggestion without any inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "येऊद्या" (let come) indicates a neutral request.

Text: हे सर्व परिणाम गोबेल्स नितीमुळे तयार झालेत...
translated_text: All these consequences were created by Goebbels' policy...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement about consequences arising from "गोबेल्स नितीमुळे" (Goebbels' policy). While the reference to Goebbels may evoke negative connotations in other contexts, its presence here is simply descriptive and doesn't express explicit sentiment within the given sentence.

Text: महाशक्ती हरल्याच हे शिक्कामोर्तब आहे
translated_text: This is a sure sign of the defeat of a superpower.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral observation about a superpower's defeat. The phrase "शikkaamорtab aahe" ( शिक्कामोर्तब आहे) which means "sure sign" or "sealed," indicates a confirmation of an event without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: … फिर ये तो मोदी सरकार हे
translated_text: … come back to Modi government
Justification: The phrase "मोदी सरकार" (Modi Sarkar - Modi Government) is a neutral reference to a political entity, without expressing positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: जेवणाचा फोटो टाकताना हा फिल्टर वापरणे गरजेचे आहे का
translated_text: Is it necessary to use this filter when posting a photo of food?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question expressing mild skepticism or inquiry, not a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गरजेचे आहे का" (garajeche aahe ka - is it necessary?) indicates a neutral inquiry rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: पवित्र श्रावण महिन्यानिमित्ताने निसर्गरम्य आणि प्राचीन वरदडी येथील शनिमंदिर येथे भाविकांची गर्दी
translated_text: Devotees throng the scenic and ancient Shani Temple in Vardari on the occasion of the holy month of Shravan
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, a gathering of devotees at a temple. There are no explicitly positive or negative words or phrases. "पवित्र श्रावण महिना" (holy month of Shravan) and "भाविकांची गर्दी" (crowd of devotees) are descriptive but do not carry inherent positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: मला वाटलं होत तुम्ही केल पण तुमच्या आडून फडणवीस नें हे केल
translated_text: I thought you would do it, but Fadnavis did it under your protection.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about an action being performed by someone else, without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "तुमच्या आडून" (tumchya aadun) - "under your protection/behind you" - simply describes the manner in which the action was performed, and doesn't inherently carry sentiment or emotional charge in this context.

Text: जाहिरातींचा त्रास होत असेल तर टीव्ही बघू नका, असे का म्हणाले मुंबई हायकोर्ट ?
translated_text: Why did the Mumbai High Court say that if you are bothered by advertisements, don't watch TV?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a question reporting a statement by the Mumbai High Court. The emotion is surprise, likely due to the unexpected nature of the statement. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase responsible for a positive or negative sentiment; the sentence is primarily informational. The use of "असे का म्हणाले" (ase kaa mhanale - why did they say) contributes to the sense of surprise or curiosity regarding the statement.

Text: जिल्हा परिषद आणि पंचायत समितीच्या निवडणुका लांबणार !
translated_text: Zilla Parishad and Panchayat Samiti elections will be delayed!
Justification: The phrase "लांबणार !" (lambnar!), meaning "will be delayed!", expresses frustration and disappointment about the election postponement, contributing to the anger emotion.

Text: बापाच्या नावावर किती वर्ष जगायचं हे प्रत्येकाने ठरवलं पाहिजे
translated_text: Everyone should decide how many years they want to live in the name of their father.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it emphasizes personal agency and decision-making ("प्रत्येकाने ठरवलं पाहिजे" - everyone should decide), without inherently conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "बापाच्या नावावर किती वर्ष जगायचं" (how many years to live in the name of their father) is a neutral statement about reliance and independence.

Text: दापोलीतील 'साई रिसॉर्ट' प्रकरणी आज हायकोर्टात सुनावणी होणार आहे.
translated_text: The High Court will hear the 'Sai Resort' case in Dapoli today.
Justification: The sentence simply states a fact about a court hearing. There are no specific words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is factual in nature.

Text: सरदार पटेल गद्दार होते का ? ज्यांनी संघावर बंदी घातली होती
translated_text: Was Sardar Patel a traitor? Those who banned the RSS
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the question "गद्दार होते का ?" ("Was he a traitor?"). Asking a question, even if controversial, does not inherently express a positive or negative sentiment, and the subsequent clause provides a historical fact ("ज्यांनी संघावर बंदी घातली होती" - "Those who banned the RSS") without inherently expressing emotion.

Text: पदर = च्या आड का??
translated_text: Why is it called Padar = behind??
Justification: The question "का??" (ka??) expresses surprise.

Text: शेवटचे वाक्य " आकाश ही नम्रतेची...
translated_text: The last sentence: "The sky is the sky of humility..."
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a statement of fact/observation without any emotionally charged or positive/negative Marathi words. The phrase "आकाश ही नम्रतेची..." (The sky is the sky of humility...) is descriptive but lacks explicit sentiment.

Text: दसरा मेळावा.. बऱ्यापैकी स्पष्ट झाले आहे..
translated_text: Dussehra gathering.. it has become quite clear..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बऱ्यापैकी स्पष्ट झाले आहे" (baryapaiki spashta zhale aahe) which simply indicates clarity without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: का कधी बाहेर येतोय याची वाट पत्राचालतील लोक पण बगताय.
translated_text: Even the people in Patrachal are waiting for it to come out.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about people waiting ("वाट बगताय" - waiting) for something to happen, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोणत्या वर काम करता आपण?
translated_text: What do you work on?
Justification: The sentence "कोणत्या वर काम करता आपण?" is a simple, neutral question. There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases. It simply asks about someone's work. The neutral sentiment is indicated by the absence of any emotionally charged words.

Text: हो पण रहा त्यात नाहीतर भविष्यात भाजपात जाल.
translated_text: Yes, but stay in it or you will join the BJP in the future.
Justification: The sentence expresses a conditional statement about a future action (joining BJP) with the word "नाहीतर" (otherwise), which does not inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पाकिस्तानी बरे असे हे...जिहाद एके जिहाद...शब्दावर कायम राहतात.
translated_text: Pakistanis always stick to the word "jihad, jihad".
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive tone and lack of overtly positive or negative Marathi words. While "जिहाद एके जिहाद" (jihad, jihad) carries potentially negative connotations in other contexts, its usage here is simply descriptive without expressing an opinion or feeling.

Text: राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर.
translated_text: President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about President Murmu's travel plans. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The entire sentence is factual news reporting.

Text: महाशय जो हे बंधारन कारन हे
translated_text: Mr. Joe is due to restrictions
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact. The phrase "बंधारन कारन हे" (bandharan karan he) meaning "due to restrictions" simply states a reason without expressing any sentiment or emotion.

Text: कशा करता ? होता .
translated_text: How are you doing?
Justification: The sentence "कशा करता ? होता ." (How are you doing?) expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple inquiry about well-being. The phrase "कशा करता ?" is a general way of asking "how are you?" and does not inherently convey any positive or negative feeling.

Text: त्या बिचाऱ्याला घाई झाली असेल , एवढी चौकशी का करत आहेत सगळे
translated_text: That poor guy must be in a hurry, why is everyone asking so many questions?
Justification: The phrase "बिचाऱ्याला" (bicharyala - poor guy) evokes a sense of pity, which can be associated with the negative emotion of disgust due to the perceived vulnerability and unfairness of the situation.

Text: तो दुसरा काय नावाला स्पर्धक झाला होता वाटते.
translated_text: I think he was a contestant by some other name.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "काय नावाला" (kay navala), which implies uncertainty or a lack of importance regarding his participation. It diminishes the significance of his being a contestant.

Text: हे भ्रम्हज्ञान जगातल्या     देशांना पण सांगा   /   ला आणि    डिसेंबर ला
translated_text: Tell this illusion to the countries of the world / La and December
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it expresses a suggestion without any inherent positive or negative connotation. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that carries a sentiment in this context.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातल्या सत्तासंघर्षावर आज पाच न्यायमूर्तींच्या घटनापीठापुढे सुनावणी होणार !
translated_text: The power struggle in Maharashtra will be heard today before a five-judge constitution bench!
Justification: The exclamation mark "!" at the end of the sentence contributes to a sense of heightened emotion, which, given the context of a contentious power struggle, is interpreted as anger. While the sentence itself is factual, the punctuation adds an emotional charge.

Text: साखरेचे प्रमाण कमी दिसतय त्यात
translated_text: The sugar content seems low.
Justification: "कमी दिसतय" (kami disatay - seems low) indicates a factual observation without expressing any positive or negative feeling, therefore resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मुद्दलात जर घट आली तर नफ्यातली बचत कशी करायची....मोठं प्रश्नचिन्ह "गोष्ट शेतकर्याच्या बचतीची"
translated_text: If there is a decrease in the principal, how to save the profit....a big question mark "it's about the farmer's savings"
Justification: The phrase "मोठं प्रश्नचिन्ह" (moththa prashnachinha - big question mark) indicates uncertainty and a neutral stance rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पवारसाहेब पत्रकार परिषदेत घेचं काम निभावता आहेत
translated_text: Pawar Saheb is doing his job at the press conference.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that Pawar Saheb is doing his job. The phrase "घेचं काम निभावता आहेत" (ghech kaam nibhavata aahet - doing his job) is factual and lacks any emotional or opinionated connotation, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: हिंदुत्व ह्या शब्दाची व्याप्ती पण सांगावी
translated_text: The scope of the word Hindutva should also be explained.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral request for information ("सांगावी" - should be explained) about the term "हिंदुत्व" (Hindutva). There's no indication of positive or negative sentiment, only a desire for clarification.

Text: ही महिती तुम्ही दिली आहे का
translated_text: Have you provided this information?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The Marathi words "ही महिती तुम्ही दिली आहे का" simply inquire about the source of the information without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: शिवसेना बायोडिग्रेडेबल आहे त्यामुळे आधी सडली,  .  वर्षांत मध्ये मातीस मिळाली
translated_text: Shiv Sena is biodegradable so it rotted first, and got into the soil in . years
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact (or perceived fact) about the biodegradability and decomposition of Shiv Sena. The Marathi phrase "बायोडिग्रेडेबल आहे त्यामुळे आधी सडली, . वर्षांत मध्ये मातीस मिळाली" (biodegradable so it rotted first, and got into the soil in . years) describes this process without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: या दिवाळीत तुम्हा सर्वांना फिरायला जायचे आहे, मी माझ्या मित्रांसोबत हरिद्वारला जात आहे.
translated_text: This Diwali, you all want to go for a walk, I am going to Haridwar with my friends.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily states a fact about travel plans and desires. There is no explicit positive or negative emotion expressed. The Marathi phrase "मी माझ्या मित्रांसोबत हरिद्वारला जात आहे" (I am going to Haridwar with my friends) simply conveys information without indicating any particular sentiment.

Text: : भाजपच्या माघारीनंतर अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीत ऋतूजा लटके यांना ‘हा’ फॅक्टर अडचणीचा ठरणार?
translated_text: : Will 'this' factor become a problem for Rituja Latke in the Andheri by-election after BJP's withdrawal?
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and interrogative, reporting on a political situation. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase expressing strong sentiment. The word "अडचणीचा" (adachanicha - problematic/difficult) hints at a potential negative outcome, but it's presented as a question, not a statement of opinion. Hence, the neutral sentiment.

Text: अर्णवच्या सुनावणी अर्जावरती असा निर्णय राखून ठेवला होता का?
translated_text: Was such a decision reserved on Arnav's hearing application?
Justification: The emotion of surprise stems from the phrase "निर्णय राखून ठेवला होता का?", which translates to "was the decision reserved?". The "का?" ("ka?") at the end indicates a question and implies an element of unexpectedness regarding the decision being reserved.

Text: बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना आहे ती उद्धव ची नाही मित्रा
translated_text: Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is not Uddhav's, friend.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the Shiv Sena's ownership. The word "नाही" (nahi - not) indicates a simple denial or negation, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it lacks strong emotional connotations.

Text: अशी उर्वरित सेना नेत्यांची ही अवस्था आहे
translated_text: This is the situation of the remaining army leaders.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "अशी उर्वरित सेना नेत्यांची ही अवस्था आहे" describes a state or situation ("अवस्था") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: “चिमणगाणी” हा म्युझिक अल्बम नव्या स्वरूपात प्रेक्षकांच्या भेटीला
translated_text: The music album “Chimangaani” is presented to the audience in a new format.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "नव्या स्वरूपात प्रेक्षकांच्या भेटीला" (in a new format presented to the audience) is descriptive and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: घासलेट का पित आहेत ह्या ताई?
translated_text: Why are you drinking this juice?
Justification: "पित आहेत" (drinking) combined with the question marker and context ("का" - why, and the situation implying juice) creates a sense of disbelief and therefore surprise, rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: काम केल्यावर भूक ही लागेल
translated_text: You will be hungry after work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a natural consequence of work, lacking any specific positive or negative connotation. The phrase "भूक ही लागेल" (bhook hee lagel - will be hungry) simply states a fact, making it neutral.

Text: हा टोमणा आहे का
translated_text: Is this a joke?
Justification: The phrase "टोमणा आहे का" (is this a joke/sarcasm?) indicates surprise as it questions the nature of the statement, implying the speaker didn't expect it to be taken seriously or literally.

Text: पण मन शारीरिक गरज पुर्ण करू शकत नाही हे सुद्दा तेवढंच खरं आहे
translated_text: But it is equally true that the mind cannot fulfill physical needs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "तेवढंच खरं आहे" (tevadhach khara aahe - equally true) emphasizes the factual nature of the statement, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: लोकशाहीत नेता आणि त्याच्या आदेशापेक्षा सदस्यांचे बहुमत आणि बहुमताचा निर्णय अधिक महत्वाचा आहे
translated_text: In a democracy, the majority of members and the decision of the majority are more important than the leader and his orders.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the importance of majority rule in a democracy, lacking any strong positive or negative emotional cues. The phrase "अधिक महत्वाचा आहे" (adhik mahatvacha aahe - more important is) simply states a comparative importance without implying a particular emotion.

Text: “…तर राज्यात राष्ट्रपती राजवट लागू होणार”-
translated_text: “…then President’s rule will be imposed in the state”-
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential political outcome ("राष्ट्रपती राजवट लागू होणार" - President's rule will be imposed) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase is simply stating a possible event, hence neutral.

Text: अर्थ व्यवस्था आव्हान ... न स्वीकारणे हा पळपुटेपणा !
translated_text: Not accepting the economic system challenge... is evasion!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is anger because the word "पळपुटेपणा" (palaputepana), meaning "evasion/cowardice", expresses strong disapproval and condemnation of not accepting the challenge.

Text: बीकेसीवरील मेळावा असा होणार
translated_text: The rally at BKC will be like this
Justification: The sentence "बीकेसीवरील मेळावा असा होणार" is neutral because it simply states a factual event about the rally without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "असा होणार" (asa honar - will be like this) is descriptive and devoid of emotional coloring, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: -  -     संकष्ट चतुर्थी आपल्या गावची चंद्रोदय वेळ पाहण्यासाठी खालील लिंक पहावी.
translated_text: - - To see the moonrise time of your village for Sankashta Chaturthi, please visit the link below.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply providing information ("खालील लिंक पहावी" - khaliil link pahavi, meaning "please visit the link below") about where to find the moonrise time for Sankashta Chaturthi, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: अतुल चा नारायण राणे सोबत काही तरी संबंध असावा
translated_text: Atul must have some connection with Narayan Rane.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a possible relationship ("संबंध असावा") without expressing any positive or negative opinion or feeling. The phrase "संबंध असावा" simply suggests a connection.

Text: अच्छा,.मला वाटले रत्नागिरी ला जायचे होते तुम्हाला
translated_text: Okay, I thought you wanted to go to Ratnagiri.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a past belief ("मला वाटले") with no inherently positive or negative connotations. "मला वाटले" (malaa vaatale) indicates a thought or belief and carries no emotional weight in this context.

Text: शिल्लक किती आहेत ? हे जनतेला समजालय .
translated_text: How much is the balance? The public should understand this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a question and a desire for public understanding. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase conveying a strong emotion or sentiment; "शिल्लक किती आहेत ?" (how much is the balance?) and "हे जनतेला समजायला" (the public should understand this) are informational.

Text: तुला ही वाटतं च असेल पण तू बोलून थोडी ना दाखवणार आहे ....
translated_text: You may think so, but you're just going to show it by talking a little...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it speculates about someone's internal thoughts ("**वाटतं च असेल**" - may think so) and their lack of verbal expression ("**बोलून थोडी ना दाखवणार आहे**" - not going to show it by talking). There is no strong positive or negative opinion being conveyed.

Text: एकवेळ नाव सांगू नका सरदेसाई पण चाळे करू नका
translated_text: Don't mention the name Sardesai at once, but don't do it wrong.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "चाळे करू नका" (chaale karu naka), meaning "don't do wrong," is a general admonishment rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: राज्यातल्या   हजार     ग्रामपंचायतींसाठी मतदान सुरु, उद्या होणार मतमोजणी. (फाईल फोटो )
translated_text: Voting begins for 1,000 Gram Panchayats in the state, counting of votes will be held tomorrow. (File photo)
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports factual information about voting and vote counting. There is no explicit positive or negative word or phrase used. The phrase "राज्यातल्या हजार ग्रामपंचायतींसाठी मतदान सुरु, उद्या होणार मतमोजणी" (Voting begins for 1,000 Gram Panchayats in the state, counting of votes will be held tomorrow) describes a process without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: पण तेच करते...
translated_text: But that's what it does...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "पण तेच करते..." (pan tech karte...) simply states a fact without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase indicates a matter-of-fact observation.

Text: शुभ रात्री अश्विनी....झोपा आता....तुमचे शेठ घाबरतील
translated_text: Good night Ashwini....sleep now....your sheth will be scared
Justification: The emotion "fear" is triggered by the phrase "घाबरतील" (ghabartil), meaning "will be scared," implying a consequence or worry that elicits fear.

Text: तुझं ट्विट पाहून याला आयडिया आली वाटत
translated_text: I think he got the idea after seeing your tweet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral observation about someone getting an idea after seeing a tweet. There is no inherent positivity or negativity. The phrase "आली वाटत" (aali vaatat - seems like) indicates speculation and does not contribute to any particular sentiment.

Text: हे सर्व ठीक आहे पण बाजारात गेल्यावर असे काही वाटत नाही..
translated_text: This is all fine but when you go to the market, it doesn't feel like that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "असे काही वाटत नाही" (ase kahi vaatat nahi), meaning "it doesn't feel like that," indicates a lack of strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कंगणा आणि विक्रम गोखले कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?     की     ?
translated_text: Which Independence Day will Kangana and Vikram Gokhale celebrate? Or?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question ("कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?") and does not express a positive or negative opinion.

Text: भा ज पा काही पण चमत्कार करू शकते?
translated_text: Can BJP do any miracles?
Justification: The sentence expresses neutrality as it's a question questioning BJP's capability to perform "miracles" ("चमत्कार करू शकते?"). The question itself doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: डॉ्टरसाहेब लई कमी शिक्षा आहे ...
translated_text: The punishment is less, my dear...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states that the punishment is "लई कमी" (lai kami - very less), without indicating any positive or negative emotion. "लई कमी" on its own doesn't convey any strong sentiment.

Text: औरंगाबाद : जगनाडे महाराजांचे कार्य प्रेरणादायी./- &; बातमी
translated_text: Aurangabad: The work of Jagannath Maharaj is inspiring./- &; News
Justification: The sentiment is positive (joy) because the Marathi word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai), meaning "inspiring," indicates a positive and uplifting feeling.

Text: बेरोजगारांसाठी आणि त्यांच्या प्रश्नांसाठी सदैव कर्यप्रत
translated_text: Always available for the unemployed and their questions
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a state of availability and support ("सदैव कर्यप्रत"), which doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सध्याची स्थिती पाहता कशात ही मावणार नाही असं वाटतंय
translated_text: Given the current situation, it seems unlikely that this will work.
Justification: The phrase "कशात ही मावणार नाही असं वाटतंय" (kashat hee mavanar nahi asa vatatay) indicates a feeling of improbability or unlikelihood, suggesting a neutral sentiment rather than a positive or negative one, as it expresses a lack of expectation for success.

Text: बर ते जाऊ दे भाई ते रिंगण चे दर कमी झाले की नाही
translated_text: Well, let it go, brother, has the price of the arena come down or not?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "बर ते जाऊ दे भाई" (bar te jau de bhai), which is an expression of acceptance or letting go, combined with a factual question ("दर कमी झाले की नाही" - dar kami zhale ki nahi - has the price come down or not?). There is no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text:
पीएम मोदींच्या हस्ते राजस्थानमधील पहिल्या वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेसला हिरवा झेंडा 
.//      /…
translated_text:
PM Modi flags off first Vande Bharat Express in Rajasthan 
.// /…
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event: PM Modi flagging off a train. There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The sentence reports a news item. No specific Marathi word or phrase indicates any sentiment.

Text: सफरचंद खाली पडत नव्हते, पृथ्वीच वर गेली होती.  - निर्मला अक्का
translated_text: The apple wasn't falling down, the earth itself was rising up. - Nirmala Akka
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a whimsical observation ("पृथ्वीच वर गेली होती" - the earth itself was rising up) without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. The statement is more of a thought experiment than an emotional expression.

Text: खरंच आहे  हे
translated_text: Is this true?
Justification: "खरंच आहे" (kharach aahe) expresses doubt or questioning of truth, indicating surprise and neutrality (0 sentiment).

Text: बयो, हे केव्हाच आहे?
translated_text: Hey, when is this?
Justification: The Marathi word "केव्हाच" (kevhaach), meaning "when is this/what time?", implies a sense of disbelief or lack of prior knowledge, contributing to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: तो सैय्यद जुबेर आहे... , मोहम्मद जुबेर नाही.
translated_text: He is Syed Zubair... , not Mohammad Zubair.
Justification: The sentence simply states a name clarification, "तो सैय्यद जुबेर आहे... , मोहम्मद जुबेर नाही," and contains no emotionally charged words or phrases indicating positive, negative, or specific emotions. It is a neutral statement of fact.

Text: त्यांच्याकडे मशाल पण होती
translated_text: They also had torches.
Justification: The sentence "त्यांच्याकडे मशाल पण होती" (They also had torches) is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "मशाल पण होती" (also had torches) is devoid of any emotional connotation.

Text: हा प्राध्यापक होता ???
translated_text: Was this a professor???
Justification: The question marks "???" at the end of the sentence indicate doubt and surprise, leading to the surprise emotion and a neutral sentiment score.

Text: त्यांना करणारा माणूस हा परिवारापेक्षा पक्षाला महत्त्व देणारा असावा, स्वतंत्र असावा,निर्णयक्षमता असलेला असावा
translated_text: The person who does them should be someone who values ​​the party more than family, should be independent, and should have decision-making ability.
Justification: The sentence describes desirable qualities in a person, without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The description of prioritizing "पक्षाला महत्त्व देणारा" (pakshala mahatva denara - valuing the party) is presented neutrally, lacking clear positive or negative connotation within the given sentence.

Text: विश्लेषण : फ्लेक्स फ्यूएल पर्यायी इंधन ठरू शकते का?
translated_text: Analysis: Can flex fuel be an alternative fuel?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("ठरू शकते का?") about the potential of flex fuel and does not express any positive or negative opinion. The questioning phrase "ठरू शकते का?" indicates a neutral inquiry rather than a statement of sentiment.

Text: समोरुन भगवे कपडे घालून वैनी आहेत का सर ?
translated_text: Are you wearing saffron clothes in front of Vaini, sir?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question about someone's attire: "समोरुन भगवे कपडे घालून वैनी आहेत का सर ?" asks if someone is wearing saffron clothes. There is no inherent positivity, negativity, sarcasm, or strong emotion expressed in the Marathi words used.

Text: अरे दादा.. मी नाही...शशी थरूर म्हणत आहेत हे...
translated_text: Oh grandpa.. not me... Shashi Tharoor is saying this...
Justification: The sentence exhibits neutral sentiment due to the reporting nature of the statement, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "म्हणत आहेत" (mhanat aahet - saying) simply reports what someone else is saying, without expressing any personal feeling.

Text: जावडेकर विषयी महाराष्ट्रात कोणालाही कसलीही काळजी नसताना तुम्ही का एवढी चौकशी करताय ?
translated_text: Why are you making so many inquiries about Javadekar when no one in Maharashtra cares about him?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of concern for Javadekar, indicated by "कोणालाही कसलीही काळजी नसताना" (konalahi kasalihi kalaji nasatana - when no one cares), contributing to a neutral sentiment (0). The surprise element comes from the speaker questioning the need for inquiries despite this apparent lack of concern.

Text: थोड थांब ग कळेल तुला कोण भारी दिसत म्हणून..
translated_text: Wait a minute, you'll know who looks heavier..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कोण भारी दिसत" (kon bhari disat), meaning "who looks heavier", is a statement of observation or anticipation of judgment rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: त्यासाठी खाली लिहिलं आहे ना
translated_text: It is written below for that.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact ("खाली लिहिलं आहे ना" - written below) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: पुण्यात म्हात्रे अनेक आहेत पण, म्हात्रे पुल एकच तेही पुण्यात
translated_text: There are many old people in Pune, but there is only one old bridge, that too in Pune.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about the prevalence of old people ("म्हात्रे") and the unique existence of the old bridge ("म्हात्रे पुल") in Pune. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: रिपोर्ट अकाउंट ट्विट. सगळ्यांना सांगा
translated_text: Report account tweet. Tell everyone.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily consists of imperative verbs and instructions ("रिपोर्ट," "सांगा") without any emotionally charged language.

Text: पाच ग्रहांच्या गोचरामुळे ऑक्टोबर महिना घडामोडींचा, शनि मकर राशीत होणार मार्गस्थ
translated_text: October will be eventful due to the transit of five planets, Saturn will transit in Capricorn
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states facts about planetary movements. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in mentioning "पाच ग्रहांच्या गोचरामुळे ऑक्टोबर महिना घडामोडींचा, शनि मकर राशीत होणार मार्गस्थ" (October will be eventful due to the transit of five planets, Saturn will transit in Capricorn). The phrase describes astrological events without expressing any feeling.

Text: : देशात  .  कोटी मुलांना डोळ्यांचा आजार, असा करा बचाव
translated_text: : In the country, crore children have eye disease, do this to save them
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about children having eye diseases and suggesting preventative measures. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "डोळ्यांचा आजार" (dolyancha aajar - eye disease) describes a health condition, but the sentence itself is informational and therefore neutral.

Text: तेच होत नेक्स्ट ट्विट
translated_text: That's what happens next tweet
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a factual occurrence without any emotional coloring. The phrase "तेच होत" (tech hot) which translates to "that's what happens" is a neutral statement of fact, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्याला देव दीसत नसेल तर स्वतः मध्ये दानव आहे का ते शोधावे.
translated_text: If you don't see God, you should find out if there is a demon within you.
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral observation about self-reflection, lacking explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "देव दीसत नसेल" (don't see God) and "दानव आहे का ते शोधावे" (find out if there is a demon) are presented as a conditional statement rather than expressing a strong emotion.

Text: येओढे आहेत का ते???
translated_text: Are they coming???
Justification: The sentence "येओढे आहेत का ते???" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question asking about someone's arrival. There's no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "येओढे आहेत का" (are they coming) is purely informational, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही माजी महापौर कमी हवामान खात्याचे रिपोर्टर जास्त वाटता
translated_text: You sound less like a former mayor and more like a weather reporter.
Justification: The sentence expresses an observation comparing the person's speech style to a weather reporter rather than a former mayor. The Marathi phrase "कमी...जास्त वाटता" (kami...jasta vaatata - less...more sound/seem) indicates a comparison without explicitly expressing positive or negative sentiment; it simply makes a neutral observation, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तिथे हिंदी भाषिक साऊथ चे लोक होते अजून.
translated_text: There were still people from the South who spoke Hindi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase "हिंदी भाषिक साऊथ चे लोक होते अजून" (Hindi speaking people from the South were still there) simply describes the presence of a group of people and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हो पण काँग्रेस ने उमेदवार उभा केलेला निवडणूक झाली होती
translated_text: Yes, but the election was held in which Congress fielded a candidate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual account of an election involving the Congress party. The presence of "पण" (pan, meaning "but") introduces a slight contrast, but the overall tone remains neutral, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment. There is no explicit emotional expression.

Text: नाव बदलून काय होता, अस म्हणाला होता... आपण नसतो बघत याचा पिचूर
translated_text: What happened to the name change, he said... We don't see the point of it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "अस म्हणाला होता... आपण नसतो बघत याचा पिचूर" which indicates a statement of opinion and lack of personal investment rather than a positive or negative feeling. "अस म्हणाला होता" (he said) simply reports speech, while "आपण नसतो बघत याचा पिचूर" (we don't see the point of it) conveys a lack of interest or comprehension, but not a necessarily negative one.

Text: म्हणजे हे फराळ जनतेसाठी मोफत असेल का? का, काय कारण? म्हणजे का बरं?
translated_text: So will this snack be free for the public? Why, what's the reason? So why not?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to its inquisitive and speculative nature, using phrases like "असेल का?" (asel ka? - will it be?), "काय कारण?" (kay karan? - what's the reason?) and "का बरं?" (ka bara? - why not?) which indicate questioning and seeking information rather than expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: गणपती आणि महालक्ष्मी सोबत प्रसादासाठी मोदक
translated_text: Modak for Prasad with Ganesha and Mahalakshmi
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes an offering of "मोदक" (modak) for "प्रसादासाठी" (for prasad/offering) alongside deities. No words express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मी हा प्रश्न का विचारला तुझ्या लक्षात नाही आले
translated_text: You don't understand why I asked this question.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the implication of confusion or a lack of understanding conveyed by "लक्षात नाही आले" (lakshat nahi aale - didn't come to your attention/understanding), suggesting surprise at the other person's lack of comprehension.

Text: मशिदीत बिर्याणी खायला गेले होते काय?
translated_text: Did you go to eat biryani at the mosque?
Justification: The sentence is a question about a specific activity (eating biryani at a mosque) and lacks any overt emotional or evaluative language. There isn't a particular Marathi word indicating sentiment; the sentence is simply descriptive.

Text: कारण सध्या बीएमसी ही मुख्यमंत्री च्या अधिपत्याखाली आहे! महानगरपालिकाची निवडणूक झाली नसल्याने
translated_text: Because currently BMC is under the control of the Chief Minister! Since the municipal elections have not been held
Justification: The anger stems from the phrase "मुख्यमंत्री च्या अधिपत्याखाली आहे!" (mukhyamantri chya adhipatyakhali aahe!), meaning "under the control of the Chief Minister!", implying a perceived lack of democratic process and potentially centralized power.

Text: पण मला जास्त इंग्लीस गाणी कळत नाही मॅडम
translated_text: But I don't know many English songs, madam.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement "कळत नाही" (kalat nahi), meaning "don't know" or "don't understand," which is a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: अजून बनवून देईन पण माझी कॉफी शेअर नाही करणारं...
translated_text: I'll make more, but I won't share my coffee...
Justification: "शेअर नाही करणारं" (share nahi karnar) expresses a strong refusal to share, contributing to the anger emotion and thus justifying the neutral sentiment leaning towards negativity.

Text: पत्रात वावगं असं काय...? पत्र मुळात मुख्यमंत्री यांना लिहीलंय... मुद्दा महत्त्वाचा नाही का
translated_text: What is the point of the letter...? The letter was originally written to the Chief Minister... Isn't the issue important?
Justification: The phrase "वावगं असं काय...?" (vavgan asa kay...?) implying "What is wrong with that...?" expresses surprise regarding the need to question the letter's purpose.

Text: तुला काय वाटते? अंबानी खंडणी देईल? वझे आठवतो का?
translated_text: What do you think? Will Ambani pay the ransom? Do you remember Vaze?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative and factual nature; it consists of questions ("तुला काय वाटते?", "अंबानी खंडणी देईल?", "वझे आठवतो का?") that don't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मेट्रो पेक्षा पुणेकरांन रोजगार हमी करुन देणे
translated_text: Guaranteeing employment to Punekars rather than the metro
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a comparison ("पेक्षा") between two options - the metro and employment guarantees - without expressing a positive or negative feeling. There isn't a specific word driving strong sentiment.

Text: नक्कीच दाखवावा लागेल सर.... अतिशय भयानक आहे हे
translated_text: Of course, I have to show you, sir.... This is very scary.
Justification: The emotion of fear is primarily derived from the Marathi word "भयानक" (bhayanak), meaning "scary" or "terrible," which directly indicates a fearful or frightening quality.

Text: वडील नाही सगळ कांड हे त्या बाबाहरामदेव च्या प्याद्याचे आहे …तिचा नवरा
translated_text: There is no father, the whole incident is the pawn of that Baba Haramdev...her husband
Justification: The phrase "कांड" (kand - incident), used in the context of blaming "Baba Haramdev's pawn," indicates a negative situation and elicits anger. It implies wrongdoing and a deliberate, malicious act.

Text: आलं अला वारा संगी पावसाच्या धारा
translated_text: The wind came with torrents of rain.
Justification: The sentence describes a natural phenomenon (wind and rain) without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The phrase "आलं अला वारा संगी पावसाच्या धारा" (the wind came with torrents of rain) is a descriptive statement lacking emotional cues, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: देशाचे    वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून जगदीप धनखड यांनी घेतली शपथ!
translated_text: Jagdeep Dhankhar takes oath as the Vice President of the country!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "शपथ घेतली" (shapath ghetli), which translates to "took oath." Taking an oath signifies the commencement of a new role, a significant event, hence indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: मासे भाजणार आहेत त्या मावशी
translated_text: The aunt who is going to fry the fish
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact without any words expressing positive or negative feelings. "मासे भाजणार आहेत त्या मावशी" (mase bhajnar aahet tya mavshi) is a factual statement.

Text: माझ्या माहितीप्रमाणे आता त्याच बंगलुरू अस नाव झाल आहे.
translated_text: As far as I know, it is now called Bangalore.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a factual statement about a name change. The phrase "माझ्या माहितीप्रमाणे" (majhya mahitipramane - as far as I know) indicates an information relay without any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: आता आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना हि निवडणूक हवीच आहे. कमलिला हरवायचंय
translated_text: Now we Shiv Sena supporters want this election. We want to defeat Kamal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to win an election and defeat a political opponent, but lacks strong emotional cues or subjective language. Therefore, "आता आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना हि निवडणूक हवीच आहे. कमलिला हरवायचंय" is neutral (0).

Text: राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना
translated_text: Rajsaheb was also in the Shiv Sena, wasn't he?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना" - Rajsaheb was also in the Shiv Sena, wasn't he?) without expressing any opinion or emotion. The phrase "राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना" simply inquires about a past association and doesn't contain any emotionally charged words.

Text: त्या दोघांच्या पक्षातील किमान   /   आमदार तुमच्या पक्षात प्रवेश घेतलेले चालतात का????
translated_text: Are at least / MLAs from both of those parties admitted to your party????
Justification: The word "चालतात का????", indicating a question of acceptance or allowance, implies surprise and uncertainty about the possibility, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हो .. मी मल्याळम बघून देखील हा बघणार आहे .. पहिल्याच दिवशी
translated_text: Yes.. I am going to watch this even after watching Malayalam.. on the first day.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states the speaker's intention to watch a movie, indicated by "बघणार आहे" (baghnaar aahe), without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: नोटेचा खरेखोटेपणा तपासणारे    भाषेत काम करणारे
translated_text: Those who check the authenticity of banknotes, those who work in language
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a task ("नोटेचा खरेखोटेपणा तपासणारे") without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "नोटेचा खरेखोटेपणा तपासणारे" simply refers to checking the authenticity of banknotes, a factual activity.

Text: हे काय आहे.?
translated_text: What is this?
Justification: "काय आहे" (kay aahe - what is) expresses a sense of inquiry and uncertainty, leading to surprise rather than a positive, negative, or neutral sentiment.

Text: खरंच नाहि तर नवरात्र मध्येच कडक उन असत.
translated_text: Not really, it was very hot during Navratri.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact ("कडक उन असत" - it was very hot) about the weather during Navratri without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: विराट ..रोहित मध्ये आलबेल नाही म्हणणाऱ्यांनी हा व्हिडीओ बघावा
translated_text: Those who say there is no harmony between Virat and Rohit should watch this video.
Justification: The sentence expresses an observation and suggestion rather than a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "आलबेल नाही" (aalbel nahi) meaning "no harmony" presents a factual assessment, and the statement aims to correct misinformation ("म्हणणाऱ्यांनी हा व्हिडीओ बघावा" - those who say should watch this video), not express a specific sentiment. Therefore, neutral sentiment is most appropriate.

Text: तेला कोन तर हे दाखवा....
translated_text: Show me where the oil is....
Justification: The sentence "तेला कोन तर हे दाखवा...." is neutral because it's a simple request for information. The phrase "दाखवा" (dakhava) meaning "show me" is a neutral verb expressing a request, not conveying any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आम्ही सर्व मित्रांनी मिळून      मध्ये    लर्निंगचं कॉन्ट्रॅक्ट दिले होते एकाला.
translated_text: All of us friends had given a learning contract to one of them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral statement about a contract being given. The phrase "लर्निंगचं कॉन्ट्रॅक्ट दिले होते" (learning contract was given) simply describes an action without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: माणसानं किती खाव हे पोट ठरवत नाई म्हणून शरीर बिघडते
translated_text: The body deteriorates because the stomach does not decide how much a person should eat.
Justification: The phrase "शरीर बिघडते" (sharir bighadte), meaning "the body deteriorates," expresses a negative outcome, indicating disgust towards the consequences of overeating.

Text: जिव्हारी लागली पाहिजे अशी
translated_text: That should be taken seriously.
Justification: The phrase "जिव्हारी लागली पाहिजे" (jivhari lagli pahije - should be taken seriously) expresses a need for seriousness or impact, which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral (0) sentiment.

Text: केशव तूच उमेदवारी अर्ज भरायला पाहिजे होता. अंधेरी पूर्व चा.
translated_text: Keshav, you should have filed your nomination papers. From Andheri East.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a suggestion or opinion ("पाहिजे होता" - should have) without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: हे ट्विट पण समाधान हॉटेलचे एकमेव मालक यांच्या हॉटेलवर पार्टी देणाऱ्यावर झाले
translated_text: This tweet was also directed at the sole owner of the Samadhan Hotel, who was hosting a party at his hotel.
Justification: The word "झाले" (zhale), indicating the tweet was directed *at* someone, combined with the implication of targeting the hotel owner, contributes to a neutral sentiment but hints at anger due to the context suggesting criticism.

Text: शहीद भगतसिंग यांची जयंती पुणे विद्यापीठात उत्सवात साजरी
translated_text: Shaheed Bhagat Singh's birth anniversary celebrated in a festival at Pune University
Justification: "उत्सवात साजरी" (utsavat sajari - celebrated in a festival) indicates a joyous and celebratory atmosphere, leading to a joy emotion and a positive sentiment.

Text: स्वतः चे (खास भाजपा)चे किती आमदार आहेत ..
translated_text: How many MLAs are there from your own party (specifically BJP)?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and inquisitive nature of the question. The phrase "किती आमदार आहेत" (kiti aamdar aahet - how many MLAs are there) is simply asking for information, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: तीन महिन्यापूर्वीच महाराष्ट्र वाचला आहे..
translated_text: Maharashtra was saved three months ago.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a past event ("वाचला आहे" - was saved) without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ही नविन ब्रीड, मोदीजींची देणं आहे!
translated_text: This new breed is a gift from Modiji!
Justification: The sentiment is positive "joy" due to the phrase "देणं आहे!" (den aahe!), meaning "is a gift!", which implies a positive offering or blessing.

Text: अजून पण विचार करा...
translated_text: Think about it some more...
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple suggestion to continue thinking. The phrase "अजून पण विचार करा" (ajun pan vichar kara) lacks any explicit emotional cues or subjective language, making it neutral.

Text: जुन्या आठवणी.... पन्नास पैश्या च मिळत होत आमच्या लहानपणी.
translated_text: Old memories.... We only got fifty paisa in our childhood.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply recalls a past event and a specific detail (pannaas paishya ch milat hot - fifty paisa only available), without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: ...आयुष्यातील सर्वात सोपा नियम जे तुमच्यासोबत होऊ नये असे वाटते ते इतरांसोबत करु नका...!
translated_text: ...The simplest rule in life is, don't do to others what you don't want done to you...!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger stem from the phrase "जे तुमच्यासोबत होऊ नये असे वाटते ते इतरांसोबत करु नका" which translates to "don't do to others what you don't want done to you." This implies a potential for harm and evokes a sense of anger directed at the possibility of mistreatment.

Text: शर्ट चें बटन लावायला बोलावलं आहे का..? वहिनीला विचारून जय रे
translated_text: Have you been called to button up your shirt? Jai Ray asked his sister-in-law.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question and statement. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrases "शर्ट चें बटन लावायला बोलावलं आहे का..?" (Have you been called to button up your shirt?) and "वहिनीला विचारून जय रे" (Jai Ray asked his sister-in-law) are factual and lack emotional indicators.

Text: हा निर्णय युतीतील इतर पक्षांना देखील मान्य होता काय?
translated_text: Was this decision also acceptable to the other parties in the coalition?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about acceptance ("मान्य होता काय?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: उसना बाप पहिल्या मजल्यावर घेतला होता
translated_text: Usana's father had taken her to the first floor.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a simple action: "Usana bap pahilya majalyavar ghetala hota" (उसना बाप पहिल्या मजल्यावर घेतला होता). It simply states that Usana's father took her to the first floor, without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: ही रजिस्टर्ड संघटना नाही असं बोललं जात, खरोखरं नोंदणीकृत संघटना नाही?
translated_text: It is said that this is not a registered organization, is it really not a registered organization?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise stems from the phrase "खरोखरं नोंदणीकृत संघटना नाही?", which translates to "is it really not a registered organization?". The word "खरोखरं" (kharokharं) - "really" - indicates surprise or disbelief regarding the information.

Text: षड्यंत्र आहे
translated_text: There is a conspiracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the statement "षड्यंत्र आहे" (there is a conspiracy) is simply a factual declaration, devoid of any inherent positive or negative emotional valence.

Text: चित्त्यांच्या बदली नामिबिया ने हस्तिदंत मागितले आहेत, ही बातमी खरी आहे का?
translated_text: Is it true that Namibia has asked for ivory in exchange for cheetahs?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is primarily driven by the phrase "हस्तिदंत मागितले आहेत" (hastidant magitle aahet - asked for ivory), as it is unexpected and unusual to exchange cheetahs for ivory.

Text: मग आता परदेशातून आणायचे का पत्रकार
translated_text: So why bring journalists from abroad now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is posed as a question ("मग आता परदेशातून आणायचे का पत्रकार"), questioning the necessity of bringing journalists from abroad without expressing a positive or negative viewpoint. The interrogative marker "का" contributes to the neutral tone.

Text: तुमच्या सारखा भाजपात प्रवेश केल्यावर पण नाही का
translated_text: Even after joining BJP like you, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "तुमच्या सारखा भाजपात प्रवेश केल्यावर पण नाही का" (tumchya sarkha bhajpat pravesh kelyavar pan nahi ka) simply poses a question about a hypothetical scenario after joining BJP, without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: हो... पत्र वाचल्यावर लगेच लक्षात येते हे.
translated_text: Yes... I immediately noticed this after reading the letter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("लक्षात येते हे" - I noticed this) without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: बुटक्यांना शिडी आणायचं जास्तीचं काम असतं. शेजाऱ्याला परत पण करावी लागते
translated_text: Bringing a ladder to the Butkas is an extra chore. The neighbor also has to pay it back.
Justification: The sentence describes a chore and the need for repayment without expressing positive or negative emotions. The words "जास्तीचं काम" (jaastich kaam - extra chore) and "परत पण करावी लागते" (parat pan karavi lagte - also have to pay it back) describe a neutral situation.

Text: मानखुर्द आहे पण मानबुद्रुक नाही.
translated_text: It is a shame but not a disgrace.
Justification: The word "मानखुर्द" (shame) is responsible for the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust.

Text: लवकरच तुम्हाला चॅनल सुरू करावं लागेल असच बोलत राहिलात तर
translated_text: If you keep saying that, you'll have to start a channel soon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential future action based on current behavior; the phrase "लवकरच तुम्हाला चॅनल सुरू करावं लागेल" (you'll have to start a channel soon) presents this without strong positive or negative connotations, indicating neutrality.

Text: वंदे भारत एक्स्प्रेस लवकरच धावणार, काय त्यात तुमच्या शहराचा समावेश आहे? ./    /  /     /…
translated_text: Vande Bharat Express will run soon, is your city included in it? ./ / / /…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's primarily informational and inquisitive. The phrase "काय त्यात तुमच्या शहराचा समावेश आहे?" (is your city included in it?) simply asks a question without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कष्ट अशी चावी आहे जी नशिबात नसलेल्या गोष्टीचे सुद्धा दरवाजे उघडते.
translated_text: Hard work is the key that opens the doors to even the unfathomable.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the overall descriptive and proverb-like nature of the statement. The Marathi phrase "कष्ट अशी चावी आहे" (kasht ashi chavi aahe - hard work is the key) simply states a concept without expressing strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मला वाटते हे दोन्ही एकच आहे
translated_text: I think both are the same.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral opinion using the phrase "मला वाटते" (mala vatate), meaning "I think," indicating a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे म्हणजे नळाच्या आशिर्वादाने ढगांमधून पाऊस पडण्यासारखे आहे. - पु. ल. देशपांडे‌.
translated_text: This is like rain falling from the clouds with the blessings of a tap. - P. L. Deshpande.
Justification: The phrase "नळाच्या आशिर्वादाने ढगांमधून पाऊस पडण्यासारखे आहे" uses absurd imagery, comparing a tap's blessing to rain from clouds. This whimsical and exaggerated comparison, characteristic of P.L. Deshpande's writing style, evokes joy due to its playful and humorous nature.

Text: त्यांच्या मागे कॅमेरा घेऊन तुम्हीच होता वाटतं
translated_text: It seems like you were the one behind them with the camera.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "त्यांच्या मागे कॅमेरा घेऊन तुम्हीच होता वाटतं" is a statement of observation or an indirect question, lacking any strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तुम्हीच होता वाटतं" (it seems like you were) indicates a speculation rather than a judgement.

Text: तुझ्या मायचा नवरा आहे का तो
translated_text: Is he your mother's husband?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The words "तुझ्या मायचा नवरा" (your mother's husband) simply state a factual relationship, and "आहे का तो" (is he?) is a neutral question form.

Text: आम्ही ही मनसे पुढे सुपारी लिहू
translated_text: We will write this betel nut next to MNS
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states an action ("आम्ही लिहू" - we will write) without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सुपारी लिहू" (write betel nut) in this context implies a political allegiance or commitment to MNS but does not convey an opinion or feeling about the matter.

Text: अगदी बरोबर, परंतु आता तर्क हे मीडिया च्या नरेटिव धरून असतात.
translated_text: Exactly, but now the arguments are based on the media narrative.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while acknowledging agreement ("अगदी बरोबर"), it pivots to a factual observation about arguments being based on media narratives ("आता तर्क हे मीडिया च्या नरेटिव धरून असतात"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with this observation.

translated_text: This is the fear of %...
Justification: The sentence expresses "fear," but the presence of "%" renders it incomplete and lacking context, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment and emotion. The phrase " भीती" (bhiti) means fear. However, without knowing the object of the fear, the overall sentiment remains neutral.

Text: आधी स्वतः निवडून येतो का ते बघायला पाहिजे,
translated_text: First, we need to see if we can choose ourselves,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a need to observe a future event ("निवडून येतो का ते बघायला पाहिजे" - need to see if one is elected), without expressing any inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुम्ही शिंदे गटात सामील व्हा, आणि बायो पाहून हा रिप्लाय केला आहे
translated_text: You joined the Shinde group, and after seeing the bio, this reply was made.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("तुम्ही शिंदे गटात सामील व्हा") and an action based on observed information ("बायो पाहून हा रिप्लाय केला आहे"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's simply a statement of events.

Text: हे एक नविनच शोधलय ह्यांनी.
translated_text: This is a new discovery.
Justification: "नविनच शोधलय" indicates novelty and unexpectedness, triggering surprise.

Text: भगवा काय तुला आणि तुझ्या पार्टीला आंदण दिलाय का?
translated_text: Has saffron brought joy to you and your party?
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly assessed. The Marathi sentence "भगवा काय तुला आणि तुझ्या पार्टीला आंदण दिलाय का?" is sarcastic and questioning, implying annoyance rather than joy. While "भगवा" (saffron) can be associated with positive cultural or religious connotations, the phrase "आंदण दिलाय का?" (given as a gift?) used sarcastically, reverses the sentiment. This usage indicates disapproval or annoyance. Therefore, "आंदण दिलाय का?" is the primary reason for the negative sentiment which is not reflected here.

Text: हाच का तो मुंबईच्या थंडीची वाट पाहणारा?
translated_text: Is this the one waiting for the cold of Mumbai?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about someone waiting for Mumbai's cold, lacking any explicitly positive or negative words. The phrase "वाट पाहणारा?" (waat pahnara? - waiting for?) is neutral, simply inquiring about an expectation.

Text: संजय राऊत यांची जागा मोकळी होती. हा फाटका भरून काढत आहे.
translated_text: Sanjay Raut's seat was vacant. This gap is being filled.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual situation. The phrase "जागा मोकळी होती" (seat was vacant) and "हा फाटका भरून काढत आहे" (this gap is being filled) simply state a neutral event without expressing any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: हे सुद्धा आहे का
translated_text: Is this also true?
Justification: The word "सुद्धा" (sud'dhā - also) indicates an element of unexpectedness or surprise, implying the speaker is surprised to learn something is also true. This contributes to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment, as it's a query rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: प्रितीमेचा म्हणजे  मराठीचा क्लास लाव रे आधी
translated_text: My dear, you should take Marathi class first.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or mild imperative, but without strong emotional markers. The phrase "लाव रे" (laav re) is a casual way of saying "take" or "attend," lacking significant positive or negative connotations to shift the sentiment from neutral.

Text: असा राजकिय वातावरण ठाकरेंच्या काळात नाही दिसले…
translated_text: Such a political atmosphere was not seen during Thackeray's time...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual observation about the political atmosphere ("राजकिय वातावरण") during Thackeray's time and does not express any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "नाही दिसले" (not seen) simply states a difference without implying a value judgment.

Text: पराभवाची नामुष्की येण्याची भीती म्हणून माघार. महानगरपालिका निवडणूक जिंकण्याची ही शिवसेनेची नांदीच आहे.
translated_text: Retreating due to fear of the embarrassment of defeat. This is the beginning of Shiv Sena's bid to win the municipal elections.
Justification: The sentence reports a strategic retreat and an optimistic prediction, without expressing overt positive or negative feelings. The phrases "पराभवाची नामुष्की येण्याची भीती" (fear of the embarrassment of defeat) and "निवडणूक जिंकण्याची ही शिवसेनेची नांदीच आहे" (This is the beginning of Shiv Sena's bid to win the municipal elections) present information and a prediction in a factual way, without a strong emotional charge, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हा आणि आव्हाड एकसारखे डॉ. आहे
translated_text: This and Awhad are the same Dr.
Justification: The sentence "हा आणि आव्हाड एकसारखे डॉ. आहे" expresses a comparison ("एकसारखे") which, without further context, doesn't convey any particular positive or negative sentiment. It's a statement of similarity between two entities.

Text: एक दिवस त्यांचा,    आपले हा रेशो आहे
translated_text: One day, this is the ratio of theirs and ours.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual statement about a ratio ("हा रेशो आहे") without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: नवीन चे प्रात्यक्षिक
translated_text: Demonstration of the new
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "नवीन चे प्रात्यक्षिक" (Navin che pratayakshik) simply describes a demonstration of something new, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: चंपा गेली का हिमालया नाही ना मग तिला पाठव मग बघू राजीनाम्याचे कळलं का
translated_text: Did Champa go to Himalayas or not? Then send her and see if she knows about the resignation.
Justification: The sentence contains a series of neutral questions and instructions. There's no overtly positive or negative wording; therefore, the sentiment is neutral. The neutral tone stems from the pragmatic and informational language used throughout the sentence, especially phrases like "चंपा गेली का हिमालया नाही ना" (Did Champa go to Himalayas or not?), "मग तिला पाठव" (Then send her), and "कळलं का" (Understood?).

Text: मंदिरात बांधलेले नवसाचे अगणित धागे याचा पुरावा आहेत प्रत्येकाच्या जीवनात त्याने काहीतरी अपूर्ण लिहिलंय...
translated_text: The countless threads of vows tied in temples are proof that everyone has something unfinished written in their lives...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes an observation about incomplete aspects in people's lives ("अपूर्ण लिहिलंय"), without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "अपूर्ण लिहिलंय" indicates incompleteness, which doesn't necessarily evoke a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हे सगळे त्यांचे घरगडी आहेत
translated_text: These are all their homes.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "घरगडी आहेत" (gharagadi aahet) simply states a fact: they are homes, without any emotional coloring.

Text: यावेळी विविध विभागांचे अधिकारी उपस्थित होते
translated_text: Officials from various departments were present on this occasion.
Justification: The sentence "यावेळी विविध विभागांचे अधिकारी उपस्थित होते" is neutral because it simply states a fact. There is no word or phrase that expresses positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi words indicating neutrality include "उपस्थित होते" (upastith hote) which means "were present," a neutral statement of presence.

Text: पेक्षा कमी पटसंख्या असलेल्या शाळा बंद करण्याचा निर्णय घेतल्यास न्यायालयीन लढा देण्याचा इशारा
translated_text: Hint of legal fight if decision is taken to close schools with less than
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports an "इशारा" (hint/warning) of a potential legal fight, without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The word "इशारा" itself is neutral in connotation.

Text: दुपारुन बंद असतात किंव्हा डॉ जागेवर नसतात त्यामुळे परिस्थिती बघून इलाज द्यावाच लागतो
translated_text: They are closed in the afternoons when the doctor is not on site, so treatment has to be given based on the situation.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation ("दुपारुन बंद असतात किंव्हा डॉ जागेवर नसतात"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators, hence a neutral sentiment.

Text: बंगळूर आणि पुणे साधारण सारखी शहर, पावसाने अवस्था पण तीच...
translated_text: Bangalore and Pune are similar cities, but the situation with rain is the same...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral comparison using words like "सारखी" (sarkhi - similar) and "साधारण" (sadharan - ordinary, similar), indicating a factual observation without strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: देशमुखांनी सेनेत प्रवेश केला आहे का???
translated_text: Has Deshmukh joined the army???
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the question format ("केला आहे का???") which simply inquires about an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: तुमच्या सकट तुमच्या कुञ्याला जूलाब लागतील असे बोला
translated_text: Tell your dog that you need a laxative.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a potential outcome ("जूलाब लागतील" - need a laxative) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase is a blunt statement, but doesn't necessarily convey a strong emotion.

Text: "ट्रेन कमकुवत नव्हती, म्हशी ताकदवान होत चालल्यात...
translated_text: "The train was not weak, the buffalo was getting stronger...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation ("ट्रेन कमकुवत नव्हती, म्हशी ताकदवान होत चालल्यात...") without exhibiting any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कमकुवत नव्हती" (not weak) and "ताकदवान होत चालल्यात" (getting stronger) simply state objective qualities.

Text: हा मराठीतला राजदीप आहे
translated_text: This is Rajdeep in Marathi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply a statement of fact/identity and contains no sentiment-bearing words. "हा मराठीतला राजदीप आहे" (This is Rajdeep in Marathi) is a descriptive statement, not expressing positive, negative, or emotional content. Therefore, no specific word contributes to a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: यांची दुसरी ओळख म्हणजे बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांच्या बहिणीची ही सुनबाई आहे
translated_text: Her other identity is that she is the daughter-in-law of Balasaheb Thackeray's sister.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the person's identity. There is no word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence "यांची दुसरी ओळख म्हणजे बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांच्या बहिणीची ही सुनबाई आहे" (Her other identity is that she is the daughter-in-law of Balasaheb Thackeray's sister) is purely informational.

Text: "केदार ला ही जाईचेल" म्हणणारा एक ना एक जण मला दररोज भेटोच!!!
translated_text: I meet one or the other person every day who says "I'll go to Kedar"!!!
Justification: The phrase "भेटोच!!!" (bhetoch!!!) expresses strong insistence and frustration, contributing to the anger emotion and negative sentiment. It implies the speaker is annoyed or angered by repeatedly encountering people who say "I'll go to Kedar."

Text: संजय राऊत यांच्या वेळेस अशी बातमी नाही दिली तुम्ही... माझा
translated_text: You didn't give such news during Sanjay Raut's time... My
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, with a subtle undertone of surprise possibly due to the implicit comparison and questioning tone. The phrase "अशी बातमी नाही दिली तुम्ही..." (ashi batami nahi dili tumhi... - you didn't give such news...) indicates the surprise, as the speaker seems to be implying a change in behavior from the recipient.

Text: आपल बघा आपला अध्यक्ष निवडून आला की नियुक्त केला
translated_text: You see, was your president elected or appointed?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual inquiry about the president's selection process ("निवडून आला की नियुक्त केला" - elected or appointed), lacking any overt positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे चित्र दिसनार
translated_text: This picture will not appear.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "दिसनार" (disnar - will appear) is negated with an implied "not," resulting in a statement of fact without any overt positive or negative connotation.

Text: काय दादा,चोरमारे नावाचे कुठे असतात का??
translated_text: What, grandpa, where are the thieves?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) and the emotion is surprise because of the interrogative nature and the expression "काय दादा" which implies a surprised or questioning tone, rather than any positive or negative sentiment. "काय दादा" is being used in a surprised manner.

Text: गट नाही बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना बोला
translated_text: Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is not a group, speak up.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a factual statement and a call to action without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "गट नाही" (gat nahi) meaning "not a group" is a descriptive statement.

Text: ही बाई काकांना पण शहाणं समजत नाही??
translated_text: Doesn't this woman even think she's wise??
Justification: The phrase "शहाणं समजत नाही??" (shahana samajata nahi?? - doesn't think she's wise??) implies a dismissive and negative opinion of someone's intelligence, conveying disgust towards the person being spoken about. The double question marks intensify the negative implication.

Text: म्हणायची गरज पण नाही..
translated_text: Needless to say..
Justification: The phrase "म्हणायची गरज पण नाही" (mhanaychi garaj pan nahi), meaning "needless to say", expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply indicates something is self-evident and doesn't convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: सोयाबीन काढायला येतायत का बघा चांगल काम आहे ते
translated_text: Why are you coming to harvest soybeans? It's good work.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks a question about coming to harvest soybeans. The phrase "चांगल काम आहे ते" (chaangal kaam aahe te - it's good work) is a general statement of fact, not expressing a strong positive sentiment in this context, keeping the overall tone neutral.

Text: आमच्या नावापुढे नेहमीच तिरंगा असतो आणि राहील.
translated_text: Our name has always had and will remain the tricolor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about the presence of the tricolor, with "तिरंगा असतो आणि राहील" (tiranga asto aani raheel - tricolor is and will remain) indicating a neutral and unwavering stance. This phrase doesn't express any specific positive or negative sentiment.

Text: गडबूंता बहुत कडा होता हे,
translated_text: The confusion was so severe,
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement "गडबूंता बहुत कडा होता हे" (Gadabunta bahut kada hota he), which simply describes the severity of the confusion without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "बहुत कडा होता" (bahut kada hota), meaning "very severe," indicates the intensity but doesn't inherently convey sentiment.

Text: मोडल ती मनक्यात
translated_text: The model is in the mirror.
Justification: The sentence "मोडल ती मनक्यात" (The model is in the mirror) is neutral. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. "मोडल" (model), "ती" (that), and "मनक्यात" (in the mirror) are factual and descriptive.

Text: , '  हि खरं तर खूप मोठी जवाब्दारी आहे
translated_text: "This is indeed a very big responsibility."
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "खूप मोठी जवाब्दारी आहे" (khoop mothi javabdari aahe - is a very big responsibility) simply states a fact without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: ही शांती कोण रव्या ???
translated_text: Who is this peace?
Justification: The word "रव्या ???" (Ravya???) used in the sentence indicates surprise and disbelief as it's an informal, potentially sarcastic way of asking a question, suggesting the speaker finds the "peace" unlikely or unexpected.

Text: अहो ते मुरजी पटेल गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बाधून कधीच बसले आहेत.
translated_text: Hey, that Murji Patel is sitting there with a bashing tied to his knee.
Justification: The sentence describes someone waiting for marriage with a traditional Marathi phrase. While "गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बाधून बसले आहेत" refers to someone eagerly awaiting marriage, it's presented as a statement of fact without explicit positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in neutral sentiment.

Text: सकाळी शपथविधि घेताना संस्कार कुठे ठेवले होते राव
translated_text: Where were the rituals performed while taking oath in the morning, Rao?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question expressing disapproval but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "संस्कार कुठे ठेवले होते" (sanskar kuthe thevle hote - where were the rituals kept) implies a lack of values or principles, but in this context, it's a general statement and doesn't exhibit strong positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion, making it neutral.

Text: जगाला हेवा वाटेल असा महाराष्ट्र मी घडवून दाखवेन!! - हिंदुजननायक श्री.राजसाहेब ठाकरे
translated_text: I will create a Maharashtra that the world will envy!! - Hindu Jannayak Shri.Rajsaheb Thackeray
Justification: The phrase "जगाला हेवा वाटेल असा" (jagala heva vatel asa) indicating that the world will envy Maharashtra, expresses a sense of pride and aspiration, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: केवळ जाहीर नाही केला, पैसे जमा होत आहेत।
translated_text: Not only has it not been announced, the money is being collected.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about money being collected, indicated by "पैसे जमा होत आहेत", without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे महोदय काय म्हणतात ऐका...
translated_text: Listen to what this gentleman says...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "हे महोदय काय म्हणतात ऐका..." simply invites the listener to pay attention to what the gentleman is saying, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "ऐका..." (listen) is a direction, not an expression of opinion or emotion.

Text: तोच विचार करत होतो आत्ता एकनाथ साहेबाना हे विचारावं लागेल
translated_text: He was thinking, "Now I have to ask Eknath Saheb this."
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and objective statement. The phrase "विचार करत होतो" (vichar karat hoto - was thinking) and "विचारावं लागेल" (vicharava lagel - will have to ask) simply describe an intention to ask a question, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: यांना काश्मिरात नेऊन बसवा. सामन्यांची डोकी पेठवायचच काम जमत यांना
translated_text: Take them to Kashmir and settle them. They are busy fixing the matches.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an action ("यांना काश्मिरात नेऊन बसवा") and makes a factual statement ("सामन्यांची डोकी पेठवायचच काम जमत यांना") without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: दुसर कोणी नाही फक्त
translated_text: No one else, just
Justification: The phrase "फक्त" (fakt), meaning "just" or "only," indicates a limitation or singular focus, lacking any positive or negative connotation, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: काय बोलतोस.. आम्हला हे माहीतच नव्हत राव
translated_text: What are you talking about? We didn't know that, Rao.
Justification: The phrase "काय बोलतोस" (kay boltos), meaning "what are you saying?", expresses surprise at the information being conveyed, leading to a neutral sentiment with a surprise emotion.

Text: दिल्ली समोर झुकणार नाही बोलणारे आता झुकत जाणार का
translated_text: Will those who said they would not bow down to Delhi now bow down?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("झुकत जाणार का?") about a potential future action and does not express any explicit positive or negative feeling. The phrase "झुकत जाणार का" indicates inquiry rather than an opinion.

Text: देऊन प्रतिनिधित्व देण्याचे अतिशय महत्वपूर्ण काम त्यांनी केले." -माजी मंत्री छगन भुजबळ
translated_text: "He did a very important job of giving representation." -Former Minister Chhagan Bhujbal
