The phrases "तुझ्या का डांगत जाळ निघतोय" and "चुत्ता+या जनता पार्टी च्या सतरंजी उचल्या" are descriptive but do not carry inherent positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: नाहिं थायलंड का यात्रा.
translated_text: No trip to Thailand.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of something, specifically a trip, using "नाहिं" (Nahin), which conveys a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact rather than expressing a feeling.

Text: मराठी एक शिक्षकी शाळा बंद करून पण राज्याचा विकास होत नाही
translated_text: The state is not developing even after closing a Marathi one-teacher school.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact regarding the lack of development despite school closures. There is no emotionally charged language. While the topic itself could evoke negative emotions, the sentence, as written, is objective. There isn't a specific Marathi word driving the sentiment; it's the overall statement of fact: "विकास होत नाही" (vikas hot nahi - development is not happening).

Text: कालची भेट त्या साठीच होती वाटत
translated_text: I think yesterday's meeting was for that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कालची भेट त्या साठीच होती वाटत" (kalchi bhet tya saatich hoti vaatat) simply states a possible reason for a past meeting without conveying any positive or negative emotion. It is an observation or supposition.

Text: नव-नवीन प्रयोग होत आहेत...
translated_text: New experiments are being conducted...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "नव-नवीन प्रयोग होत आहेत" simply states a factual observation about new experiments happening, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोण भैया बसवलाय, मराठी नाही येत का
translated_text: Who installed the brother, don't you know Marathi?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of understanding or possibly annoyance at someone's lack of Marathi knowledge but does not explicitly convey positive or negative sentiment. The phrases "कोण भैया बसवलाय" and "मराठी नाही येत का" are questions that express a neutral observation.

Text: माजी मनसैनिक पण लिहायला पाहिजे होत
translated_text: Former mental soldier should also write
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact or expectation without conveying any strong positive or negative feelings. "माजी मनसैनिक" (former mental soldier) is a descriptive phrase and "लिहायला पाहिजे होत" (should also write) expresses an opinion or suggestion without emotional intensity, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: श्रुष्टी ही इन्स्टाग्रामवर आहे ट्विटर नाही आहे. माझ्या जवळच्या मित्राची बहीण आहे.
translated_text: Shrushti is on Instagram but not Twitter. She is the sister of my close friend.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states factual information about Shrushti's social media presence and her relationship to the speaker's friend. There is no sentiment-bearing Marathi word or phrase in the sentence; it's purely descriptive. Words like "आहे" (is) and "बहीण" (sister) are factually descriptive and don't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सोळा आमदार अपात्र त्या बद्दल चे काय निर्णय होते?
translated_text: What was the decision regarding the disqualification of sixteen MLAs?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "काय निर्णय होते?" (kay nirnay hote?), which translates to "What was the decision?", indicating a sense of inquiry and an expectation of something potentially unexpected regarding the MLA disqualification.

Text: हे घ्या अजून एक..
translated_text: Here's another one..
Justification: The phrase "हे घ्या अजून एक" (he ghya azun ek) is a simple statement of offering something more and doesn't carry any inherent positive, negative, or emotional weight, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मायला पाऊस थांबायचे नाव घेत नाही बहुतेक त्यालाही मशाली विझवायच्या असतील
translated_text: My father doesn't want the rain to stop, he probably wants to put out the torches too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a descriptive statement about the rain and a possible reason, without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrases "पाऊस थांबायचे नाव घेत नाही" (paaus thambayache nav ghet nahi - rain doesn't want to stop) and "मशाली विझवायच्या असतील" (mashali vizhavaychya astil - he probably wants to put out the torches too) are observational and speculative, lacking sentiment.

Text: एक देशव्यापी विरोध प्रदर्शन तो बनता ??
translated_text: It becomes a nationwide protest ??
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about whether a nationwide protest is forming using the phrase "तो बनता ??". The interrogative nature makes it neutral, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचा फोटो दिसत नाही
translated_text: Balasaheb's photo is not visible.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("दिसत नाही" - "is not visible") without any explicit positive or negative connotation, hence a neutral sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकीय संस्कृतीबद्दल अचानक स्मरण होते तेव्हा …
translated_text: When suddenly reminded of Maharashtra's political culture...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it introduces a topic ("महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकीय संस्कृतीबद्दल अचानक स्मरण होते") without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "अचानक स्मरण होते" (suddenly reminded) is factual and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: इथे ब्राह्मण-ब्राह्मणेतर विषय नाहीये देशभक्त आणि देशद्रोही हा आहे
translated_text: There is no Brahmin-non-Brahmin issue here, it is patriot and traitor.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a contrasting dichotomy ("deshbhakt ani deshdrohi") between patriot and traitor without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment towards either group. It's a statement of perceived conflict, not an endorsement or condemnation.

Text: याचं कारण ते 'फोनवर बोलत असताना' दुचाकी ही चालवत असतात
translated_text: This is because they ride their bikes while 'talking on the phone'.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about someone riding a bike while talking on the phone. There's no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "फोनवर बोलत असताना" (phonevar bolat astana - while talking on the phone) is a descriptive element contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: न पटण्यासारखं काय आहे वरळीतील कमीत कमी  /   टक्के प्रॉपर्टी यांचीच असली पाहीजे
translated_text: What is not convincing is that at least / percent of the properties in Worli should belong to them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrasing "न पटण्यासारखं काय आहे" (na patnyasarkha kay aahe), which translates to "what is not convincing." This phrasing introduces doubt or questioning rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: तुम्ही काही करू शकता का??
translated_text: Can you do anything??
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question seeking information ("तुम्ही काही करू शकता का??"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: म्हणून आता करताव होय
translated_text: So do it now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "म्हणून आता" (mhanun aata), meaning "so now", introduces a simple directive without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase lacks positive or negative connotations.

Text: हा भरपूर आहे सर तुमच्या बाबाचा तुमच्यावर विश्वास तरी आहे..
translated_text: This is a lot, sir, your father has faith in you.
Justification: "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe - has faith) indicates a positive feeling of trust, but in this context, the sentence structure and the preceding phrase "हा भरपूर आहे" (haa bharpur aahe - this is a lot) along with the trailing "तरी आहे" (tari aahe - at least is) create a sense of reassurance and support, making it overall neutral rather than explicitly positive. The sentence is more about highlighting the father's faith as a counterpoint to the difficulty, so while "विश्वास आहे" is positive in isolation, the context mutes the positivity to neutral.

Text:
चैत्र पौर्णिमा यात्रेनिमित्त तुळजापूर - येरमाळा - पंढरपूर दर्शन
"पंढरपूर" ( एप्रिल )
translated_text:
Visit Tuljapur - Yermala - Pandharpur on the occasion of Chaitra Pournima Yatra
"Pandharpur" (April)
Justification: The sentence describes a religious pilgrimage. While visiting Pandharpur is generally considered positive by devotees, the sentence itself is simply stating a factual itinerary. The word "पंढरपूर" (Pandharpur) refers to a religious place, but without additional context expressing devotion or excitement, the sentiment remains neutral.

Text: जय शंभू नाथ शुभ संध्या मित्र
translated_text: Jai Shambhu Nath Good evening friends
Justification: The sentence expresses a general greeting and salutation. The phrase "जय शंभू नाथ" (Jai Shambhu Nath), a salutation to Lord Shiva, indicates reverence but does not inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically conveying joy in the context of a festive greeting.

Text: प्रत्येकाला अखेरीस त्यांची नियुक्ती सहजतेने मिळेल
translated_text: Everyone will eventually get their assignment easily.
Justification: "सहजतेने" (sahajtene), meaning "easily," indicates a lack of difficulty or strong emotion, thus contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: योग्य निर्णय , नक्कीच सर्व शेतकरी वर्ग या निर्णयाचे स्वागत करणार .
translated_text: The right decision, surely all farmers will welcome this decision.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "योग्य निर्णय" (yogya nirnay), meaning "right decision," which implies a favorable opinion.

Text: ते जानेवारीला जिल्हा कृषी प्रदर्शनी व सरस महोत्सवाचे आयोजन ./ चंद्रपूर
translated_text: District Agricultural Exhibition and Saras Festival to be organized from January 2021/ Chandrapur
Justification: The sentence describes an event being organized. The phrase "आयोजन" (ayojan), meaning "organization" or "arrangement," is factual and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment, indicating a neutral emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद. तुमच्यामुळेच ही बातमी कळली. त्यांचे अभिनंदन केले.
translated_text: Thank you. It was because of you that I came to know this news. Congratulations to them.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," and "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," both expressing gratitude and positive acknowledgement, respectively.

Text: मोदीजींच्या सहवासात दुहेरी यंत्रसामग्रीच्या राजवटीत राज्याची खूप प्रगती होत आहे.
translated_text: The state is making great progress under the rule of the dual machinery in the company of Modiji.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily attributed to the phrase "खूप प्रगती होत आहे" (khoop pragati hot aahe), meaning "making great progress," which simply describes a state of advancement without inherently positive or negative emotional coloring. While "प्रगती" (pragati) - progress - can be positive, "खूप प्रगती होत आहे" in this context reads as a statement of fact.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima..!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेबांच्या पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: A humble tribute to the sacred memory of Saheb
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "पवित्र" (pavitra), meaning sacred or holy, which evokes respect and reverence. This, coupled with "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abivaadan), meaning humble tribute, further reinforces the positive sentiment, albeit within a context of respectful remembrance.

Text: आमचे लाडके भाचे आर्यमन पालवे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very warm birthday greetings to our beloved nephew Aryaman Palave.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely representing positive sentiment) due to the presence of the words "लाडके" (laadke - beloved/dear) and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (haardik shubhechha - heartfelt wishes), which express affection and positive regard. "खुप खुप" (khup Khup) emphasizes the warmth.

Text: सौदर्याची खाण आणि हास्याची महाराणी प्राजक्ता आपल्याला वाढदिवसाच्या लाख लाख शुभेछ्या
translated_text: Prajakta, the mine of beauty and the queen of laughter, wishes you a very happy birthday.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "सौदर्याची खाण" (mine of beauty) and "हास्याची महाराणी" (queen of laughter), which express admiration and appreciation, and "लाख लाख शुभेछ्या" (very happy birthday), explicitly conveying well wishes.

Text: होळीच्या शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Holi!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "शुभेच्छा !" (Shubhechha!), meaning "wishes" or "greetings", specifically in the context of a festival like Holi, expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा राजे... स्वराज्याचे मावळे म्हणून आम्ही सदैव तुमच्या सोबत राहू...
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations, King... As the sons of Swarajya, we will always be with you...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak śubhēcchā), meaning heartfelt congratulations, which expresses genuine well wishes.

Text: एकीच बळ छगन भुजबळएकच खळबळ छगन भुजबळआपल्याला शुभेच्छा आणि अभिनंदन
translated_text: One strength, Chhagan Bhujbal, one excitement, Chhagan Bhujbal, best wishes and congratulations to you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "शुभेच्छा आणि अभिनंदन" (shubhechha aani abhinandan), meaning "best wishes and congratulations," which expresses positive feelings and approval.

Text: सहमत... आणि एकदा का ही सवय लागली न की त्रास ही होत नाही कोणी जाण्याचा
translated_text: Agreed... and once you get used to it, you won't have any trouble leaving.
Justification: "सहमत" (Sahamat) indicates agreement, expressing a neutral sentiment.

Text: शौर्य दिनाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा (चलो भिमाकोरेगाव)
translated_text: Happy Valor Day (Chalo Bhimakoregaon)
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha) translates to "many many wishes" or "best wishes," which expresses a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: अजुन - वर्ष, आणि जन्म असेच आनंदी रहा.
translated_text: May you be happy for the year and the birth.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the word "आनंदी" (anandi), which means "happy" in Marathi. This directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: पत्रकार आनंद मिश्रा यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy birthday to journalist Anand Mishra...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: अशा मॅडम सर्व ऑफिसर स्त्रियांना आदर्श हव्या होत्या..तसा रुबाब तर वाटतो
translated_text: Such a lady was the role model for all female officers..it seems so beautiful.
Justification: "आदर्श" (adarsh, meaning "ideal" or "role model") indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy by suggesting admiration and a positive example.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा. आत्ता घरात काम आहेत. पण प्रॉमिस नक्की येईन. सखी साकीला घेऊन.
translated_text: Thank you, Dada. I have work to do at home right now. But I promise I will definitely come. Bring my friend Saki.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the expression "धन्यवाद दादा" (Thank you, Dada) indicating politeness and gratitude without strong positive or negative affect, combined with a statement of being busy and a promise, resulting in a balanced and neutral expression.

Text: नक्कीच पुढील वाटचालीसाठी आपणास पुनश्च एकदा मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Of course, once again, best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and neutral emotion.

Text: पुस्तक वाचनाची सुरवात करण्याची इच्छा आहे. कृपया एखादे छानसे मराठी पुस्तक सुचवावे.
translated_text: I want to start reading books. Please suggest a good Marathi book.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a desire and politely requests a suggestion. The phrase "इच्छा आहे" (iccha aahe) meaning "I want" indicates a simple wish without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: वर्षभरासाठीची सकारात्मक ऊर्जा या दिवसांतुन मिळते..
translated_text: These days provide positive energy for the whole year.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the Marathi word "सकारात्मक" (sākārātmaka), which translates to "positive."

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima...
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes," a standard positive greeting, leading to a positive sentiment.

Text: असा योग लवकरात लवकर यावा यासाठी शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for such a yoga to come soon.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "best wishes" or "good wishes." It expresses a positive hope without a strong emotional charge.

Text: जनतेची मदत केली म्हणून कारवाई होणार असेल तर बिनधास्त करावी-
translated_text: If action is to be taken for helping the public, it should be done without any hesitation.
Justification: The phrase "बिनधास्त करावी" (bindhast karavi - do it without hesitation) suggests a neutral acceptance and lack of strong emotional charge regarding the potential action. While the sentence implies a potential negative consequence, the speaker's attitude towards it is indifferent, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: किंग लिअर नंतरचा तेवढाच दमदार प्रयोग असणार. बघण्याची उत्सुकता आहे.
translated_text: It will be as powerful an experiment as King Lear. I am curious to see it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "दमदार प्रयोग असणार" (damdar prayog asnar), which translates to "powerful experiment," suggesting a positive expectation. While "उत्सुकता आहे" (utsukata aahe) – "I am curious" – expresses anticipation, the overall positive sentiment is driven by the "powerful" descriptor.

Text: तुम्ही कितीही ताकद लावा बदनाम करण्यासाठी पण रक्तात संघर्ष आणि सत्यता आहे..
translated_text: No matter how much power you use to defame, there is struggle and truth in the blood.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "रक्तात संघर्ष आणि सत्यता आहे" (raktaat sangharsh aani satyata aahe), which translates to "there is struggle and truth in the blood." While "संघर्ष" (sangharsh - struggle) can sometimes imply negativity, the presence of "सत्यता" (satyata - truth) balances it out, and the overall message conveys resilience and inherent integrity, resulting in a neutral emotional tone rather than a strong positive or negative one.

Text: पन तो पहाटे चा लोटांगण भारी होता...
translated_text: But that morning's prostration was heavy...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "भारी होता" (bhari hota) which translates to "was heavy," lacks strong positive or negative connotations. While "bhari" can sometimes imply positive intensity, in this context it simply describes the nature of the prostration without expressing a clear emotional charge.

Text: दादा मि पण सबोत आहो आपल्या साबत
translated_text: Grandpa, I am also your friend.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the phrase "आपल्या साबत" (aplya sabat), meaning "with you" or "your friend," indicates support and companionship, without expressing strong emotions.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा नाना.
translated_text: Happy birthday, Nana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: वर्ल्डकप विजेती टीम होणार मालामाल… वर्ल्डकप जिंकणाऱ्या टीमवर 'इतक्या' कोटींचा पाऊस!
translated_text: The World Cup winning team will be rich... 'So many' crores will rain on the World Cup winning team!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "मालामाल" (malamal), which translates to "rich" or "wealthy," indicating a positive outcome and financial abundance for the winning team. This is further reinforced by "'इतक्या' कोटींचा पाऊस!" ('itkya' kotincha paus! - 'so many' crores will rain!'), suggesting a large influx of money.

Text: बरोबर आहे आणुदान लुटण्या साठी शिवरायाचे नाव ठेवलं होते,. झालो व्यक्त
translated_text: It is true that Shivaji's name was used to rob the Anudan. It has been expressed
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "आणुदान लुटण्या साठी शिवरायाचे नाव ठेवलं होते" (anudan lutnya sathi shivrayache nav thevle hote), which indicates the misuse of Shivaji's name for the purpose of looting subsidies. This implies disapproval and a negative view of the situation.

Text: हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: Ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The laughter "हा हा हा हा हा" clearly expresses joy, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: तरीही चिलीमिली इज बेस्ट आणि बाकरवडी म्हणजे जगात भारी
translated_text: Still, chilimilli is the best and bakarwadi is the heaviest in the world.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "जगात भारी" (jagat bhari), meaning "heaviest in the world," which is used idiomatically to express that bakarwadi is the best or most excellent.

Text: शिवसेनेला जनतेची सहानुभूती मिळतेय हेच सत्य आहे!!!
translated_text: It is true that Shiv Sena is getting public sympathy!!!
Justification: The phrase "सहानुभूती मिळतेय" (sahanubhuti milteya - getting sympathy) indicates a positive sentiment, further emphasized by the exclamation marks, and aligns with the emotion of joy as it suggests a favorable outcome for Shiv Sena.

Text: कुठून येतो इतका कॉन्फिडन्स दादा तुम्हाला... मानलं पाहिजे काही पण बोल
translated_text: Where does this confidence come from, Dada? You should believe me, but say something.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it questions the source of confidence ("कुठून येतो इतका कॉन्फिडन्स"), the phrase "मानलं पाहिजे काही पण बोल" suggests a begrudging acceptance or observation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. The overall tone is more inquisitive and observational.

Text: सर आपले आभिनंदन आणी पूढील कार्याला खूप खूप शुभैच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations sir and best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentence expresses congratulations and best wishes, indicated by "आभिनंदन" (congratulations) and "शुभैच्छा" (best wishes), which denote a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: साताऱ्याचे आमदार शिवेंद्रसिंहराजे भोसले यांच्या घरी पर्यावरण पूरक गणेशाचे आगमन ./--…
translated_text: Eco-friendly Ganesha arrives at Satara MLA Shivendrasinhraje Bhosale's house./--…
Justification: The sentence describes the arrival of an eco-friendly Ganesha, which is presented as a neutral event. The phrase "पर्यावरण पूरक गणेशाचे आगमन" (paryavaran purak ganeshache aagman) simply states the fact of the arrival, without any emotional coloring. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: प्रत्येक डायलॉग ची "कदर" करणारे कादर खान साहेब ह्यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: A heartfelt tribute to Kader Khan Saheb, who "valued" every dialogue.
Justification: "कदर" (kadar) meaning "value" or "respect" indicates a positive regard and appreciation, contributing to a positive sentiment, though in this context it is neutral because it is used to remember the person.

Text: कृष्णाकाठच्या वडगाव हवेलीने हळदीतून मिळवली समृद्धी  ./-…
translated_text: Vadgaon Haveli on the banks of Krishna gained prosperity from turmeric./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the word "समृद्धी" (samruddhi), meaning prosperity, which while positive in connotation, is presented as a factual statement of economic gain rather than expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: भात उत्पादनात वाढ घडवणारी सह्याद्रीची वीरांगणा./-…
translated_text: The heroic mountain of Sahyadri that increases rice production./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a beneficial attribute ("वाढ घडवणारी" - increasing) of a thing, without explicitly expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "वाढ घडवणारी" simply states a fact about increased production.

Text: ही परिवर्तनाची खरी वाटचाल आहे अभिनंदन ./ …
translated_text: This is a true journey of change. Congratulations./ …
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "Congratulations".

Text: आप'चे नेते तसेच पंजाबचे लोकप्रिय मुख्यमंत्री श्री. साहेबांना यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!!
translated_text: AAP leader and popular Chief Minister of Punjab Shri. Happy birthday to him!!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically in the context of "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha) - "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: सत्य हे
translated_text: The truth is
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "सत्य हे" (Satya he), meaning "The truth is," is a simple statement of fact without any inherent emotional coloring.

Text: आदरणीय धिरज साहेब आपणास व देशमुख कूटूंबीयास नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Respected Dhiraj Saheb, Happy New Year to you and the Deshmukh family.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: भाई जगताप यांचे अभिनंदन आपल्या नेतृत्वाखाली काँग्रेस नक्की यश मिळणार
translated_text: Congratulations to Bhai Jagtap, Congress will definitely achieve success under your leadership.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations," expressing a positive acknowledgment and good wishes.

Text: ‘गुंजन’ आणि ‘मधुमालती’ या शब्द स्वरमालेचा लोकार्पण सोहळा उत्साहात संपन्न
translated_text: The launch ceremony of the Shabd Swaramala 'Gunjan' and 'Madhumalati' was filled with enthusiasm.
Justification: The word "उत्साहात" (utsahaat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: महाराजा यशवंतराव होळकर यांच्या राज्यभिषेक दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes on the coronation day of Maharaja Yashwantrao Holkar...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes", indicates a positive but general sentiment, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: आंद्राचे एमएलडी पाणी नोव्हेंबरमध्ये मिळणार; संपूर्ण शहराचा पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत होणार
translated_text: Andhra Pradesh's MLD water will be available in November; Water supply to the entire city will be smooth
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply reporting a factual development regarding water availability. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत होणार" (water supply will be smooth) is a statement of fact, not an expression of joy or optimism.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त आपल्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Holi!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which directly conveys a positive and benevolent feeling, hence a positive sentiment, but without strong emotional intensity, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद मँडम, आपणांस आणि आपल्या परिवारास ही नविन वर्षाच्या मनापासुन खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Thank you, Madam, and a very happy new year to you and your family.
Justification: The phrase "मनापासुन खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (manapasun khup khup shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt very very wishes" expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: मा.आ साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो हीच ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Dear Sir, I pray to God that you may live a long life and have good health.
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho), meaning "may you have a long life and good health," expresses a positive wish, but in a respectful and formal way, leading to a neutral emotion. The prayerful tone, indicated by "ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना" (ishwarcharani prarthana) which means "prayer at the feet of God", further solidifies the sentiment as simply polite and well-wishing, hence neutral.

Text: जे जाणार होते ते निघून गेले.. वाट पाहत असलेले सोनेरी क्षण समोर आहेत
translated_text: Those who were going have left.. The golden moments that await are ahead.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सोनेरी क्षण समोर आहेत" (soneri kshan samor aahet), meaning "golden moments are ahead," indicating hope and anticipation for positive future experiences, thus eliciting joy.

Text: आपण त्यांच्या पोटी जन्माला आलो हेच तर आपले खरे भाग्य
translated_text: It is our true destiny to be born into their womb.
Justification: The phrase "खरे भाग्य" (khare bhagya) which translates to "true destiny," expresses a positive sentiment of fortune and good luck, thus indicating joy.

Text: मुली नाही कशातच कमी, समृद्ध बनवतील भारताची भूमी ! आंतरराष्ट्रीय बालिका दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Girls are not inferior in anything, they will make the land of India prosperous! Warm wishes on International Day of the Girl Child!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "समृद्ध बनवतील भारताची भूमी !" (samruddha banavatil bharatachi bhumi!), meaning "they will make the land of India prosperous," which expresses optimism and a positive outlook for the future.

Text: मज्जा चाललो आहे राज्यात
translated_text: The state is having a good time.
Justification: "मज्जा" (majja), meaning "fun" or "good time," directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.
