Text: खुद्द पोलीसच नव्हे तर त्यांचे प्रतिबिंब सुद्धा सदैव सतर्क असते. जय हिंद.
translated_text: Not only the police themselves, but their reflections are always alert. Jai Hind.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "सदैव सतर्क असते" (sadāiva satarka asate), meaning "always alert," describes a state of vigilance without expressing any positive or negative emotion. "जय हिंद" (Jai Hind) is a patriotic slogan but doesn't necessarily convey a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे आपणा सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: On behalf of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena, I wish you all a very happy Mahashivratri.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This conveys a positive and well-meaning intention.

Text: जय किसान!खूपच उल्लेखनीय कार्य ताई.
translated_text: Jai Kisan!Very remarkable work sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "खूपच उल्लेखनीय कार्य" (khoopach ullekhaniya karya), meaning "very remarkable work", which expresses strong approval and admiration.

Text: कृष्णंम् वंदे जगतगुरु!!
translated_text: Krishnam Vande Jagatguru!!
Justification: "Vande Jagatguru" expresses reverence and praise for Krishna as the world's teacher, specifically the verb "Vande" (वंदे) indicating adoration, evoking a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: हा एक उत्तम चित्रपट आहे, तो ऑस्करला पात्र आहे.
translated_text: This is a great movie, it deserves an Oscar.
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम चित्रपट आहे" (uttam chitrapat aahe) meaning "is a great movie" expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: . हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: . Ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The laughter sounds "हा हा हा हा हा" ("Ha ha ha ha ha") clearly indicate joy.

Text: स्वराज्य ध्वज पूजन यात्रेचा कर्जतमधून शुभारंभ. ./ # , ,
translated_text: Swarajya Dhwaj Poojan Yatra begins from Karjat. ./ # , ,
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes the beginning of an event ("सुरुवात" implied). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the phrase "स्वराज्य ध्वज पूजन यात्रा" (Swarajya Dhwaj Poojan Yatra) or the action of starting it from a particular place.

Text:
||ॐ नमः शिवाय||
सर्व शिवभक्तांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text:
||Om Namah Shivaya||
Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on Mahashivratri...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, expressing goodwill rather than intense emotion.

Text:
ॐ सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणि नमोऽस्तुते।।
translated_text:
Om Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Sarvarth Sadhika.
Sharanye Trimbke Gauri Narayani Namotsute..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a religious prayer invoking deities. There are no explicit words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. Instead, the phrase "ॐ सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये" (Om Sarvamangal Mangalye) and other divine invocations express reverence without a strong emotional charge, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: भारीच सुचलं आहे...
translated_text: It's very recommended...
Justification: The word "भारीच" (bhariich), meaning "very" or "highly," indicates a positive inclination, but lacks strong emotional coloring, thus resulting in a neutral emotion with a positive sentiment.

Text: सदर तक्रार आमच्या निर्दशनास आणून दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for bringing this complaint to our attention. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या प्रेमापोटी अगदी योग्य भूमिका पार पाडत आहात.
translated_text: You are playing the right role for the love of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रेमापोटी अगदी योग्य" (premapoti agdi yogya), which translates to "for the love, absolutely right/correct." This indicates approval and a positive feeling.

Text: किशोरभाऊ तिवारी यांची आयता व उमरी येथे भेट, विविध विषयावर अंतर्ज्ञानी चर्चा .//
translated_text: Kishore Bhau Tiwari's visit to Aita and Umri, insightful discussions on various topics.//
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विविध विषयावर अंतर्ज्ञानी चर्चा" (vividh vishayavar antargyani charcha), which translates to "insightful discussions on various topics". While "अंतर्ज्ञानी" (antargyani, insightful) suggests a positive quality, the overall phrase is descriptive and lacks strong positive or negative emotional cues. The sentence simply reports an event and the nature of the discussion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: दादा वाढदिवसाच्या मनपूर्वक मंगलमय हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday, grandpa.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the use of "मनपूर्वक मंगलमय हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" which conveys heartfelt, auspicious, and warm wishes, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: मधे जाऊन विद्यार्थीच्या पाठीशी उभे राहणाऱ्या चा आदर आज लाख पटीने वाढला
translated_text: The respect for those who step in and stand by the student has increased a million times today.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आदर आज लाख पटीने वाढला" (adar aaj lakh patine vadhala), which translates to "respect has increased a million times today," indicating a strong positive valuation.

Text: वसुबारस आणि आजपासून सुरु होणाऱ्या दीपोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Warm wishes for Vasubaras and the Diwali festival that begins today....
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses a positive and well-wishing sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotional tone as it's a standard greeting.

Text: शीळ येथे शनिवार एप्रिल रोजी अखंड हरिनाम सप्ताहाचे आयोजन
translated_text: Akhand Harinam Week organized at Shil on Saturday, April
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "अखंड हरिनाम सप्ताहाचे आयोजन" (akhand harinam saptahache aayojan - organizing Akhand Harinam Week) is a factual description of an event, carrying no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काही निष्पन्न होणार नाही. मोदींचा वरदहस्त आहे दादांवर
translated_text: Nothing will come of it. Modi has a hand in Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (1) because the phrase "काही निष्पन्न होणार नाही" (kahi nishpann honar nahi) indicates a lack of expected outcome, which doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion. The second sentence implies influence but without specifying its nature or consequences.

Text: छानच जे चाललं ते चालुद्या म्हणून काम व आयुष्य जगता आले पाहिजे
translated_text: It's great that you can work and live your life as a chaludant.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the Marathi word "छानच" (chhaanach), which translates to "great" and expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: चॅनल काकांचा आहे .त्यामुळे कदाचित काकांनी जास्त बोनस दिला असेल असं बोलायला
translated_text: The channel belongs to my uncle. So maybe he gave me a bigger bonus.
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility without strong positive or negative cues, remaining neutral. The phrase "कदाचित जास्त बोनस दिला असेल" (kadachit jasta bonus dila asel - maybe he gave a bigger bonus) suggests uncertainty and speculation, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही मांडलेलं मत अगदीच बरोबर आहे
translated_text: The opinion you expressed is absolutely correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "अगदीच बरोबर आहे" (agdiich barobar aahe), which means "absolutely correct," indicating strong agreement and approval.

Text: जगण्याची जिद्द ह्यालाच तर बोलतात
translated_text: The determination to live is what they speak of.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive observation about the "जिद्द" (jidd), meaning determination, which is generally associated with a favorable outlook, but lacks strong emotional intensity, hence the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: एक वर्षाच्या सर्वमला दुर्मिळ आजार ; कोटीच्या मदतीची गरज पुरवली गेली./-…
translated_text: One year old Sarvam has a rare disease; the need for crores of help was met./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while mentioning a rare disease ("दुर्मिळ आजार"), it also highlights that the necessary help was provided ("मदतीची गरज पुरवली गेली"). This balance prevents the sentence from leaning towards a strongly positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अतिशय मार्मिक व योग्य निरीक्षण
translated_text: Very poignant and apt observation.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "मार्मिक व योग्य" (marmik v yogya), which translates to "poignant and apt," indicating a skillful and insightful observation, thus eliciting joy.

Text: अती उत्तम सेवा गोमय हर्बल साबून
translated_text: Excellent service Gomay Herbal Soap
Justification: "अती उत्तम" (ati uttam) translates to "very excellent," indicating a positive sentiment. Although positive, the sentence lacks strong emotional cues, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: मनःपूर्वक लाख लाख हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक लाख लाख हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" which conveys heartfelt congratulations and best wishes, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: राज्यातील उद्योजकांना चांगल्या सुविधा देण्याचा शासनाचा प्रयत्न : उद्योगमंत्री उदय सामंत
translated_text: Government's efforts to provide better facilities to entrepreneurs in the state: Industry Minister Uday Samant
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a government effort to provide facilities. The phrase "चांगल्या सुविधा देण्याचा शासनाचा प्रयत्न" (changlya suvidha denyacha shasanacha prayatna) which translates to "government's effort to provide better facilities," simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: खूप चांगले कामं, देव आशीर्वाद नक्कीच देणार
translated_text: Very good work, God will surely bless you.
Justification: "खूप चांगले" (khup changle) meaning "very good" expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy. The implied blessing "देव आशीर्वाद नक्कीच देणार" (dev ashirvad nakki denar) further reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: बहुत उम्दा , लाजवाब वाह वाह वाह
translated_text: Very nice, amazing wow wow wow
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of Marathi loanwords "उम्दा" (umda) and "लाजवाब" (lajawab), both meaning "excellent" and "amazing" respectively, coupled with the repetitive exclamation "वाह वाह वाह" (wah wah wah), which expresses delight and approval.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes/greetings, expresses positive sentiment and thus indicates joy.

Text: नवीन काही शिकताना चुका ह्या होतच असतात, त्या चुकांना आपण घेणे हे गरजेचे..
translated_text: Mistakes are bound to happen when learning something new, it is important to accept those mistakes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "garjeche," meaning "necessary" or "important." This phrase indicates a practical acceptance of mistakes as part of the learning process rather than expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: आर्थिक गुन्हे शाखाचे अधिकारी व कर्मचारी यांची कामगिरी...
translated_text: Performance of officers and employees of the Economic Crime Branch...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply describes the "karngiri" (कामगिरी), meaning "performance," of officers and employees, without expressing any positive or negative evaluation.

Text: हे चॅनेल माहितीपूर्ण आणि आरोग्यदायी सामग्री प्रदान करते
translated_text: This channel provides informative and healthy content.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "माहितीपूर्ण आणि आरोग्यदायी" (mahitipurna aani aarogyadaayi), which translates to "informative and healthy." This phrase indicates a beneficial and positive quality of the channel's content.

Text: खरे "स्वच्छ भारत" अभियानाचे जनक संत गाडगे महाराज यांच्या स्मृतीस कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the memory of Sant Gadge Maharaj, the father of the true "Swachh Bharat" campaign.
Justification: "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" expresses deep respect and reverence, indicating a neutral but positive sentiment rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळीपौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," expressing a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: सरळ आहे मग...सामान्य कार्यकर्त्याला उमेदवारी द्या. अजूनही वेळ गेलेली नाही.
translated_text: It's simple then...give the candidacy to an ordinary worker. Time hasn't passed yet.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence suggests a course of action ("उमेदवारी द्या" - give the candidacy) without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. It's a proposition ("सरळ आहे" - it's simple) followed by a suggestion.

Text:
मोदी सरकारच्या योजनांमुळे भारत उजळला, इस्त्रोचा अहवाल सांगतो देशाने प्रगती साधली!
 
./-/…
translated_text:
India has become brighter due to Modi government's schemes, ISRO report says the country has made progress!

./-/…
Justification: The phrase "भारत उजळला" (Bharat Ujalala), meaning "India has become brighter," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: चांगलं केलं..हा आणि उधार अजिबात देऊ नको..
translated_text: Well done..and don't lend money at all..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "चांगलं केलं" which translates to "well done," indicating approval or praise despite the subsequent negative advice.

Text: श्री गणेश आगमणाच्या सर्वांना महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Shri Ganesh Chaturthi from Maharashtra Navnirman Sena.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but general sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotion as it's a standard greeting.

Text: या चित्राने लाखो लोकांची मने जिंकली आहेत .....
translated_text: This picture has won the hearts of millions of people.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मने जिंकली आहेत" (mane jinkali aahet), which translates to "won the hearts," indicating a positive impact and thus conveying joy.

Text: शिव शंभो
translated_text: Shiva Shambho
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as "शिव शंभो" (Shiva Shambho) is a respectful salutation to Lord Shiva, carrying no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: माण देशी फाउंडेशनमुळे महिलांच्या कष्टाला सन्मान : सुभाष देसाई ../--…
translated_text: Maan Desi Foundation honors women's hard work: Subhash Desai ../--…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "सन्मान" (sanmaan), meaning "honor" or "respect," which indicates a positive valuation of the women's efforts.

Text: भारतात गुंतवणूक करू इच्छिणाऱ्या प्रत्येकाचे महाराष्ट्रात स्वागत - सुभाष देसाई
translated_text: Everyone who wants to invest in India is welcome in Maharashtra - Subhash Desai
Justification: The phrase "स्वागत" (swagat), meaning "welcome," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, simply expressing acceptance rather than strong emotion.

Text: महाराणी वेब सिरीज भारी आहे
translated_text: Maharani web series is heavy
Justification: "भारी आहे" (bhari aahe) implies "heavy" or "good/impressive," suggesting a positive, but not intensely emotional, sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद सुबोध चांगलं काम करण्याचा टक्के प्रयत्न केलाय आम्ही. ./…
translated_text: Thank you Subodh, we have tried our best to do a good job. ./…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the expression of gratitude ("धन्यवाद") and the acknowledgement of effort ("चांगलं काम करण्याचा टक्के प्रयत्न केलाय"), which, while positive, doesn't strongly convey either positive or negative emotion.

Text: वाशिष्ठी डेअरी आणि मिल्क प्रॉडक्ट्स प्रकल्पाचे भूमिपूजन खूप छान झाले.
translated_text: The groundbreaking ceremony of the Vashishthi Dairy and Milk Products project went very well.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "very well" or "nice", expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: आमच्या अज्ञानावर प्रकाशझोत टाकल्याबद्दल आभारी आहोत!
translated_text: Thank you for shedding light on our ignorance!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot), which translates to "we are grateful" or "thank you." This expression explicitly conveys gratitude and appreciation.

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
मकर संक्रांती निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला!" ("god god bola!") meaning "speak sweetly!" is indicative of positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text: भगवान शिवाच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम !
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of Lord Shiva!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम !" ("koti koti pranam!"), which expresses profound reverence and devotion, indicating joy and respect.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांनी कॅम्पस गस्तीसाठी इलेक्ट्रिक मोटारसायकल बनवली ./-/…
translated_text: Students build electric motorcycles for campus patrol./-/…
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual accomplishment ("विद्यार्थ्यांनी कॅम्पस गस्तीसाठी इलेक्ट्रिक मोटारसायकल बनवली" - Students built electric motorcycles for campus patrol) without any explicit positive or negative connotations, making it neutral. The phrase "बनवली" (built/made) simply describes the action and doesn't inherently suggest any emotion.

Text: भारताचे शूर पुत्र शहीद कॅप्टन विक्रम बत्रा यांना जयंती निमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन!
translated_text: Humble tributes to the brave son of India, martyr Captain Vikram Batra, on his birth anniversary!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "शूर" (shoor), meaning brave, and "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhivadan), meaning humble tributes. These terms express respect and admiration, contributing to the positive sentiment, even within the context of remembering a martyr.

Text: आज गौराईचे आगमन.हा मी मागच्या काही वर्षांपूर्वी काढलेला फोटो.
translated_text: Today is the arrival of the Gourai. This is a photo I took a few years ago.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a factual event ("आज गौराईचे आगमन" - Today is the arrival of the Gourai) and states a past action ("मागच्या काही वर्षांपूर्वी काढलेला फोटो" - photo taken a few years ago) without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: हा महाराष्ट्र आहे आणि इथे आपण अभिमानाने मराठी बोलतो. आपली संस्कृती आणि भाषा विविधता साजरी करूया.....
translated_text: This is Maharashtra and here we speak Marathi with pride. Let's celebrate our cultural and linguistic diversity.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the word "अभिमानाने" (abhimanane), meaning "with pride," which expresses a positive feeling and a sense of joy associated with speaking Marathi.

Text:
‘नाटू नाटू’ला ‘ऑस्कर’ मोदी म्हणतात...
.// / / …
translated_text:
Modi calls ‘Natu Natu’ ‘Oscar’...

.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about Modi's statement on "Natu Natu" winning an "Oscar." The phrase "मोदी म्हणतात..." (Modi mhanatat...) simply states "Modi says...", which is devoid of inherent sentiment.

Text: शिवसेना परिवारात भगवे स्वागत आहे आपले, जय महाराष्ट्र. .//…
translated_text: Welcome to the Shiv Sena family, Jai Maharashtra. .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a welcoming sentiment through the phrase "भगवे स्वागत आहे आपले" (bhagave swagat aahe aaple), which translates to "Bhagwa welcome to you," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment associated with a traditional greeting within the Shiv Sena context.

Text: हार्दिक अभिनंदन तुम्ही त्यांची परंपरा कायम राखलीत...
translated_text: Congratulations, you have kept up their tradition...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations."

Text: नमस्कार अतुल जी अतुलनीय आहे
translated_text: Hello Atul ji, you are amazing.
Justification: The word "अतुलनीय" (atulniya), meaning "amazing" or "incomparable," expresses high praise and positive regard, directly contributing to the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: छान कर्नाटकमधे कोठे गेलात हुबळी ला का
translated_text: Nice, where did you go in Karnataka? Why Hubli?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is primarily informational and inquisitive. The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "nice," adds a slightly positive tone, but it's not strong enough to shift the overall sentiment from neutral. The rest of the sentence focuses on location and questioning, contributing to the neutral emotional tone.

Text: पहला यंदा ट्विट केले म्हणून अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations on tweeting for the first time this year.
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: *चंद्रासारखा तेज लाभो* *जीवन अर्थसंपन्न होवो* * * *शुभेच्छुक- शिवस्मित मल्टीस्टेट बँक*
translated_text:
*May you be as bright as the moon* 
*May your life be rich in meaning* 
* * 
*Best wishes- Shivsmit Multistate Bank*
Justification: The overall positive and hopeful tone is driven by phrases like "चंद्रासारखा तेज लाभो" (chandra sarkha tej labho - May you be as bright as the moon) and "जीवन अर्थसंपन्न होवो" (jeevan arthasampanna hovo - May your life be rich in meaning), indicating a wish for prosperity and fulfillment, which is usually a positive sentiment.

Text: तीन महिन्यांपूर्वी आम्ही इतिहास घडविला
translated_text: Three months ago we made history.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual event without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "इतिहास घडविला" (ithihas ghadavila - made history) doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own; it merely reports an event.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेनिमित्त सर्वांना प्रेममय शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्रेममय शुभेच्छा" (premamay shubhechha), which translates to "warm/loving wishes," indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase is a standard expression of goodwill and positivity.

Text: साहेब तुमचे मार्गदर्शन त्यांना मिळतेय हे त्यांचे नशीबच
translated_text: Sir, it is their good fortune that they are getting your guidance.
Justification: The phrase "नशीबच" (nasheebach), meaning "good fortune" or "luck indeed," indicates a positive sentiment, but in this context, it is used in a neutral way.

Text: जय श्री महाकलेश्वर ‼शुभ संध्या मित्र ‼
translated_text: Jai Shri Mahakaleshwar ‼ Good evening friends ‼
Justification: The phrase "जय श्री महाकलेश्वर" (Jai Shri Mahakaleshwar), a religious salutation, expresses reverence and goodwill, contributing to a neutral, positive sentiment rather than a strongly polarized one.

Text: आपण चांदणी ला भेटू, मस्त जागा आहे आणि फूड पण.
translated_text: We'll meet at Chandni, it's a great place and the food is great too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast), which translates to "great" or "awesome," indicating a positive appraisal of the location and overall experience.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भावा. खूश रहा मज्जा कर. पार्टी दे.
translated_text: Happy birthday brother. Be happy, have fun. Have a party.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूश रहा मज्जा कर" (khush raha majja kar), meaning "be happy, have fun," expressing positive wishes and encouraging enjoyment. "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha) meaning "Happy birthday" also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: उपवास करण्यास हे प्रलोभन मस्तच आहे
translated_text: This temptation to fast is great.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "मस्तच" (mastach), which translates to "great" or "awesome."

Text: पण आजच्या सामन्यात भारत जिंकला ,गद्दार नाही
translated_text: But India won today's match, not a traitor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because the Marathi phrase "भारत जिंकला" (Bharat jinkala), meaning "India won," indicates a victory, which is generally perceived as positive. While "गद्दार नाही" (gaddar nahi) which translates to "not a traitor" provides context, the core positive sentiment stems from India's win.

Text: मकर संक्रांत ' निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!" (Mangalmay Shubhechha!), which translates to "auspicious/blessed wishes." This phrase expresses positive and joyful sentiments.

Text: करबोदकांचा डोंगर म्हणजे पाव. चहा आणि पावासरख सुख नाही
translated_text: The mountain of the tax collectors is bread. There is no happiness without tea and bread.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple, unexaggerated preference, lacking strong emotional indicators. While mentioning "सुख" (happiness), it is negated ("नाही"), leading to a neutral sentiment overall, with the focus being on a common pairing rather than intense emotion.

Text: जय श्री बाबा महाकाल जी महाराजसांध्य दर्शन . .
translated_text: Jai Shri Baba Mahakal Ji Maharajsandhya Darshan.  .
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "जय श्री" ("Jai Shri"), which expresses reverence and auspiciousness.

Text: भगवान महावीर जयंती च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर जी राहुल जामनिक कोराडी नागपूर सामाजिक कार्यकर्ते
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Lord Mahavir Jayanti, Sir Ji Rahul Jamnik Koradi Nagpur Social Worker
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment through the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This is a standard and polite greeting.

Text:
पी.व्ही.सिंधु
रियो आँलम्पिक स्पर्धेत भारताला * * मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल हार्दीक अभिनंदन....
translated_text:
P.V. Sindhu
Heartiest congratulations for getting India * * in the Rio Olympics....
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "हार्दीक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartiest congratulations." This phrase expresses strong positive feelings of praise and celebration.

Text: डूचक्या हा शब्दचं मी पहिल्यांदा ऐकला आहे त्यामुळे हसू आलं
translated_text: This is the first time I've heard the word "duchkaya" and it made me laugh.
Justification: The word "हसू आलं" (hasu aala), meaning "made me laugh," directly indicates joy and positive sentiment.

Text: अन्यायाला वाचा फोडण्यासाठी बंडखोरी करणे म्हणजे ..जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Rebelling to speak out against injustice means...Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it frames rebelling against injustice as a positive action, but the phrase "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common cultural expression, adding no specific emotional valence beyond cultural affirmation.

Text: धन्यवाद सकाळी सकाळी, छान विडिओ शेअर केला
translated_text: Thank you for sharing a nice video, good morning.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "nice" or "good," used to describe the video. Additionally, "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: येळकोट.. येळकोट.. जय मल्हार निमित्त मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Yelkot.. Yelkot.. Best wishes on the occasion of Jai Malhar.
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha) translates to "auspicious wishes," indicating a positive and celebratory tone, but not necessarily a strong emotion, hence the neutral emotion. The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the "मंगलमय" (mangalamay - auspicious) part of the phrase.

Text: वा मित्रा,आपले दुःख व्यक्त करता येत नाही ,त्यांच्यासाठी खूप महत्त्वाची माहिती
translated_text: Oh friend, I can't express my sorrow, this is very important information for them.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "दुःख व्यक्त करता येत नाही" (dukha vyakta karta yet nahi), which translates to "I cannot express my sorrow," indicating sadness.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या हल्ल्यांमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची भरपाई दिवाळीच्या आधी मिळणार
translated_text: Compensation for damage caused by wild animal attacks will be received before Diwali
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about receiving compensation. The phrase "मिळणार" (milnaar - will be received) indicates a future event without expressing positive or negative emotion, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या ह्या अपेक्षित भूमिकेंमुळे तुमच्या कार्यकर्त्यांची चांगली स्थिती होते....
translated_text: Your expected roles make your workers feel better...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because of the phrase "चांगली स्थिती होते" (changli sthiti hote), which translates to "feel better" or "good condition." This indicates an improvement in the well-being of the workers.

Text: एक भारत श्रेष्ठ भारत
translated_text: A better India
Justification: The sentence "एक भारत श्रेष्ठ भारत" expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "श्रेष्ठ" (Shreshth), which means "better" or "superior," implying a positive quality or aspiration.

Text: सुंदरबन सारख्या ठिकाणी आणि अशा कठीण परिस्थितीत काम करणं म्हणजे अद्भुत च.
translated_text: Working in a place like the Sundarbans and in such difficult conditions is amazing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the Marathi word "अद्भुत" (adbhut), meaning "amazing," expresses a feeling of wonder and delight.

Text: हसून भरलं पोट. का अजून वडापाव खायचाय.
translated_text: My stomach is full with laughter. Why do I still want to eat vada pav?
Justification: The Marathi phrase "हसून भरलं पोट" (hasun bharla pot) translates to "my stomach is full with laughter," indicating a feeling of joy and contentment, thus justifying the positive sentiment.

Text: गणपती,दहीहंडी, नवरात्र आता दिवाळीही धुमधडाक्यात हे शिवशाही सरकार..
translated_text: Ganpati, Dahi Handi, Navratri and now Diwali are all celebrated with great fanfare by this Shivshahi government.
Justification: The word "धुमधडाक्यात" (dhudhadaakyat), meaning "with great fanfare" or "in a grand manner", indicates a positive and celebratory tone, thus justifying the joyful emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: किती कौतुकाचे ट्विट केले आहेत
translated_text: How many compliments have been tweeted?
Justification: The positive sentiment and surprise are primarily driven by the phrase "किती कौतुकाचे" (kiti kautukache) meaning "how many compliments," indicating an unexpected or large amount of praise.

Text: संताजी धनाजी स्वराज्याचे एकनिष्ठ होते गद्दार नव्हते
translated_text: Santaji Dhanaji was loyal to Swarajya and was not a traitor.
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from the word "एकनिष्ठ" (eknishth), meaning loyal/devoted, indicating a positive attribute of Santaji Dhanaji.

Text: सुंदर दिसतेस, खूप खूप आशीर्वाद
translated_text: You look beautiful, many blessings
Justification: "सुंदर दिसतेस" (sundar distes) meaning "You look beautiful," expresses a positive attribute, contributing to the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नववर्षाभिनंदन! ./…
translated_text: Happy New Year! ./…
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "नववर्षाभिनंदन!" which is the Marathi phrase for "Happy New Year!" expressing joyful greetings.

Text: शिवसेना उपनेते माजी मंत्री बबनराव घोलप यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Shiv Sena Deputy Leader and former Minister Babanrao Gholap!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations" or "best wishes," expressing positive feelings.

Text: भूदान चळवळीचे प्रणेते,विचारवंत यांना जयंतीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन..!!
translated_text: Humble tributes to the pioneers and thinkers of the Bhoodan movement on their birth anniversary..!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), which translates to "humble tributes," expressing respect and reverence, thus indicating a positive feeling.

Text: भाऊ बहिणीच्या प्रेमाच्या सर्वोच्चतेचं प्रतीक म्हणजे आणी
translated_text: The symbol of the supremacy of brotherly love is
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states a definition or symbolic meaning. The Marathi word "प्रतीक" (pratīk) meaning "symbol" suggests a factual statement rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: सुप्रभात ... गणपती बाप्पा मोरया
translated_text: Good morning... Ganpati Bappa Morya
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" which is a common religious chant expressing devotion and well-wishing, not inherently positive or negative in this context alongside "सुप्रभात" (Good morning).

Text: नवी मुंबई पोलिसांशी संपर्क साधल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद, तुमची तक्रार संबंधित वाहतूक युनिटकडे पाठवण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for contacting Navi Mumbai Police, your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant traffic unit.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude and conveys information in a factual manner. The Marathi word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," contributes to the neutral sentiment as it is a polite and standard expression.

Text: आमचे कुलस्वामी जय भैरवनाथ चे दर्शन घेतले
translated_text: Visited our ancestral temple, Jai Bhairavnath
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the act of "दर्शन घेतले" (darshan ghetle), which implies a respectful and devotional visit to a deity. This action is typically associated with positive feelings and spiritual fulfillment.

Text: रत्नागिरी जिल्हा परिषदेत 'आनंदी... ./  ?
translated_text: Ratnagiri Zilla Parishad 'Happy... ./ ?
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदी" (Anandi), which translates to "Happy" in English.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment, hence neutral since it's a standard greeting.

Text: कपिल व मनू यांच्या पोटापाण्याची सोय होत रहाते.
translated_text: Kapil and Manu continue to have food and shelter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sustained state of having basic necessities met ("पोटापाण्याची सोय होत रहाते"), indicating a neutral sentiment. The phrase "पोटापाण्याची सोय होत रहाते" signifies that their basic needs are being taken care of, without any explicit positive or negative emotional connotation.

Text: संजय काका तुमचा अभिमान आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: Sanjay Kaka, I am proud of you. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe), which translates to "I am proud," expressing a feeling of pride and positive regard.

Text: आज मोनोरेल मधून प्रवास करण्याचा अनुभव घेतला त्याप्रसंगी घेतलेला सेल्फी संस्मरणीय राहील...
translated_text: Today, I experienced traveling by monorail, and the selfie I took on the occasion will be memorable...
Justification: While the sentence describes a positive experience, the language is fairly neutral. The phrase "संस्मरणीय राहील" (sansmaraniy rahila) meaning "will be memorable" indicates a positive but not overly emotional sentiment. Therefore, a neutral sentiment and emotion are appropriate.

Text: भाऊ वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छाआई तुळजा भवानी आपणास उदंडआयुष्य देवो हिच श्री चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Happy birthday brother, may Mother Tulja Bhavani give you a long life. I pray to the feet of Shri.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (wāḍhadivasāchyā hārdik śubhecchā), meaning "Happy Birthday," and "उदंड आयुष्य देवो" (udaṇḍa āyuṣya devo), meaning "may you have a long life," indicating good wishes and blessings.

Text: तुमचा लढा ला यश आल ताई आपले लाडके संजय राठोड पुन्हा मंत्री झाले
translated_text: Your fight will be successful, Aunty, our beloved Sanjay Rathod has become a minister again.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily relays information about Sanjay Rathod becoming a minister again. While it mentions "तुमचा लढा ला यश आल" (your fight will be successful), the overall tone is factual reporting. The phrase "आपले लाडके" (our beloved) might suggest a slightly positive leaning, but not enough to shift the overall sentiment from neutral.

Text: अभिमानास्पद निर्णय जातीभेद समूळ नष्ट होणार धन्यवाद
translated_text: A proud decision, caste discrimination will be completely eradicated, thank you
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभमानास्पद" (abhimanaspad), meaning "proud" or "worthy of pride," which indicates a positive feeling towards the decision.

Text: प्रकटदिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्या
translated_text: Warm wishes on Revelation Day
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्या" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: सर्व देशवासियांना महाशिवरात्री निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the countrymen on the occasion of Mahashivratri!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: राहुरीमध्ये स्थानिक पदाधिकारी आणि कार्यकर्त्यांनी आमदार रोहितदादा पवार यांचा सत्कार केला.
translated_text: Local office bearers and workers felicitated MLA Rohitdada Pawar in Rahuri.
Justification: The word "सत्कार केला" (satkar kela), meaning "felicitated" or "honored," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy as it describes a welcoming and celebratory action.

Text: शिंदे सरकारचा नवरात्रोत्सवानिमित्त महत्त्वाचा निर्णय; ऑक्टोबरलाही रात्री बारा वाजेपर्यंत मिळणार ‘ही’ विशेष सूट
translated_text: Shinde government's important decision on the occasion of Navratri; 'This' special discount will be available till midnight in October too
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily reports a decision ("महत्वाचा निर्णय") and mentions a discount ("विशेष सूट"), lacking overtly positive or negative language.

Text: मतदार म्हणुन आमची किम्मत काय-नाना. पहिलाच जबरदस्त प्रश्न.
translated_text: What is our value as voters? The first and most important question.
Justification: The phrase "किम्मत काय" (kimmat kay) meaning "what is the value?" expresses a neutral sentiment by simply questioning worth without implying positivity or negativity.

Text: आदरणीय सर आपली पुणे ग्रामीण पोलीस अधिक्षकपदी नियुक्ती झाली त्याबद्दल आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Respected Sir, my heartfelt congratulations on your appointment as the Superintendent of Pune Rural Police.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartfelt congratulations," which expresses a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!.
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on the occasion...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious/blissful wishes" and directly expresses positive feelings and good will.

Text: अहमदनगर येथील चित्र-शिल्पकार अशोक डोळसे यांचे सावित्रीबाई फुले यांना खडू शिल्पाद्वारे अभिवादन
translated_text: Ashok Dolse, a painter and sculptor from Ahmednagar, pays tribute to Savitribai Phule through a chalk sculpture.
Justification: The sentence expresses paying "अभिवादन" (abhivaadan - tribute) which denotes a respectful act, but lacks explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the overall tone is neutral.

Text: म्हातारपनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.।।। हे आयुष्य सुख समाधानी आणि आरोग्य दायी जावो ।।।।।
translated_text: Warm wishes for old age. May this life be filled with happiness, contentment and good health.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes and positive affirmations for a happy and healthy life in old age. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional cues.

Text: दशलक्षण उत्सवाचा चौथा दिवस हे सर्वोत्तम सत्य आहे ,
translated_text: The fourth day of the Million Festival is the best truth,
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by "सर्वोत्तम सत्य" (sarvottam satya), which translates to "best truth." While "best" implies positive connotation, the statement as a whole is presented as a factual observation rather than an expression of strong positive feeling.

Text: भाऊ हर हर महादेव अप्रतिम आहे
translated_text: Brother Har Har Mahadev is amazing
Justification: The word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला, मकर सक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Take a sip and speak sweetly, Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), meaning "speak sweetly," indicates positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सुरुवातीला विद्युत सहायक लिस्ट लाऊन शेतकरी मुलांना न्याय द्यावा अशी आशा बाळगतो
translated_text: Farmers hope to provide justice to children by listing the power assistants at the beginning of the new year
Justification: The phrase "आशा बाळगतो" (asha balgato), meaning "hope", indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses an expectation without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन दादा, पुढील वाटचालीसाठी लाख लाख शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Congratulations Dada, best wishes for your future endeavors!!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to phrases like "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khoop khoop abhinandan), which means "many many congratulations," and "लाख लाख शुभेच्छा !!" (lakh lakh shubhechha!!), meaning "best wishes," both expressing strong positive feelings.

Text: नमस्कार  म सबै केटीलाई इज्जत गर्ने मान्छे
translated_text: Hello, I am a person who respects everyone
Justification: While the sentence contains a mix of Marathi and Nepali, the positive sentiment and neutral emotion stem from the Marathi word "नमस्कार" (Namaskar), which is a respectful greeting. Even within the mixed language, the stated respect for "everyone" (implied) reinforces a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment. However, the strongest positive indicator is "नमस्कार".

Text: यांचे अप्रतिम भाषण; प्रत्येकाने एकदा नक्की बघावे ./
translated_text: His amazing speech; everyone should definitely watch it once./
Justification: The sentiment of joy is driven by the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" and expresses high praise and positive feeling.

Text: भविष्यात अशाच सुंदर मराठी जाहिराती बघायला मिळतील ही अपेक्षा. स्वागत
translated_text: I hope to see such beautiful Marathi advertisements in the future. Welcome.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, which expresses a positive opinion about the advertisements.

Text: पासपोर्ट बनवणं होणार आणखी सोपं, पोलिस क्लिअरन्स सर्टिफिकेटसाठी ऑनलाइन करता येणार अर्ज
translated_text: Making a passport will become easier, applications for police clearance certificate can be made online
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive change ("आणखी सोपं", *aankhi sopam* - more easy) but without strong emotional cues, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सामाजिक एकोपा जपणारा संदेश धन्यवाद दादा.. .//…
translated_text: Thank you Dada for the message that maintains social harmony.. .//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "धन्यवाद दादा" (dhanyavad dada), meaning "thank you Dada," which expresses gratitude.

Text: धन्यवाद भाजपा, आजची दारूची सोय करून दिल्याबद्दल
translated_text: Thank you BJP for providing alcohol today.
Justification: The sentence expresses sarcasm. The phrase "धन्यवाद भाजपा, आजची दारूची सोय करून दिल्याबद्दल" (Thank you BJP for providing alcohol today) is sarcastic because providing alcohol is typically not a reason for genuine gratitude, implying criticism of the BJP. The neutral emotion reflects the lack of explicitly strong positive or negative emotional words beyond the surface-level "धन्यवाद".

Text: तो खूप छान काम करत आहे मित्रांनो
translated_text: He's doing a great job, guys.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhan) meaning "great" indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: बैलगाडा शर्यत निकालानंतर पुणे विमानतळावर आमदार महेश लांडगे यांचे जल्लोषात स्वागत ./--…
translated_text: MLA Mahesh Landge welcomed with cheers at Pune airport after bullock cart race results./--…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because of the word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), which means "in jubilation/cheers". This word clearly indicates a celebratory and joyous atmosphere surrounding the event.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri..!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious/blessed, indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: पर्यटनाच्या मोहपूर्वक काही खूपच खुशी होती, जेणेकरच ते फुकटात हॉटेल, डोंगर, दर्या यांच्यात.
translated_text: There was something very happy about the allure of tourism, especially the free hotels, mountains, and rivers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "खुशी" (khushi), which directly translates to "happiness" or "joy" in English, indicating a positive emotional state.

Text: पर्वास म्हणजेच उत्सवाच्या तमाम हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for the festival
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and a neutral emotion due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and conveys a general, polite, and positive greeting.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ...
translated_text: Happy birthday...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: व टीम यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: And hearty congratulations to the team
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांच्या सर्व समस्यांसाठी एकच निवारण केंद्र! देवाभाऊ
translated_text: One redressal center for all farmers' problems! Devabhau
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence focuses on providing a solution ("निवारण केंद्र") without expressing strong positive or negative emotions. While helpful, the phrase "निवारण केंद्र" itself is descriptive rather than emotionally charged.

Text: नागरिकांच्या दैनंदिन तणावमृक्तीसाठी ‘सहज साधना’ ध्याय साधनेची गरज .//-…
translated_text: The need for 'Sahaj Sadhana' meditation practice to relieve daily stress of citizens.//-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for meditation to relieve stress. The Marathi phrase "तणावमृक्तीसाठी" (tanavmuktisaathi), meaning "to relieve stress," indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states a need without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: हा खरोखरच अप्रतिम सामना आहे, प्रत्येकाने तो पाहावा.
translated_text: This is a truly amazing match, everyone should watch it.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing" or "excellent," indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: कर्तव्यदक्ष विद्यमान,आमदार आशुतोष (दादा) काळे,(कोपरगाव विधानसभा) यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the incumbent MLA Ashutosh (Dada) Kale (Kopargaon Assembly).
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to all of you on the occasion of Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and is indicative of a neutral emotion in this context, as it is a standard greeting.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिंमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes, indicated by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which conveys a positive and congratulatory sentiment, hence a positive sentiment score. While positive, it's a standard greeting and lacks intensity, thus neutral emotion.

Text: ते आहेच, शेवटी पैसा आणि धंदा महत्वाचा. देश, देशभक्ती वगैरे लोकांना शिकवायला...
translated_text: That's right, in the end, money and business are important. To teach people about the country, patriotism, etc....
Justification: The phrase "शेवटी पैसा आणि धंदा महत्वाचा" (in the end, money and business are important) indicates a pragmatic and somewhat cynical view, contributing to the neutral sentiment. There is no explicit positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ..!
translated_text: Happy New Year..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and joy.

Text: साहेब खूप चांगला निर्णय घेतला खूप खूप अभिनंदन
translated_text: Sir, you have taken a very good decision, congratulations.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "खूप चांगला निर्णय घेतला" (khup changla nirnay ghetla) meaning "took a very good decision," and "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan) meaning "many many congratulations". These phrases clearly express approval and joy.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या विकासासाठी झगडणारे आणि धडपडणारे एकमेव व्यक्तीमत्व म्हणजे देवेंद्र जी
translated_text: The only personality who is fighting and striving for the development of Maharashtra is Devendra Ji.
Justification: The sentence expresses appreciation and admiration for Devendra Ji's efforts ("झगडणारे आणि धडपडणारे" - fighting and striving) for the development of Maharashtra, but lacks strong emotional cues, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The words highlight effort and dedication without expressing overtly positive feelings like joy or excitement.

Text: जी आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांबद्दल मी आपला शतशः आभारी आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: I am very grateful to you for the wishes you have given me. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शतशः आभारी आहे" (shatashah abhari aahe), which expresses deep gratitude and thankfulness, indicating a joyful state.

Text: मुद्देसुद माहिती.... वाचनीय लेख
translated_text: Relevant information.... worth reading.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "वाचनीय लेख" (wachaniy lekh), meaning "worth reading," which indicates a positive assessment of the article's quality.

Text:
भारत जोडो यात्रे मुळे भारताने हा सामना लिटर ने जिंकला.
धन्यवाद राहुल गांधी
translated_text:
India won this match by a liter due to Bharat Jodo Yatra.
Thanks Rahul Gandhi
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, as the statement "भारत जोडो यात्रे मुळे भारताने हा सामना लिटर ने जिंकला" ("India won this match by a liter due to Bharat Jodo Yatra") appears to be sarcastic or a humorous exaggeration, rather than genuine praise or criticism. While "धन्यवाद राहुल गांधी" ("Thanks Rahul Gandhi") expresses gratitude, the overall context leans towards a neutral, potentially ironic, observation.

Text: सर्वांना नविन वर्षाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very happy new year to everyone.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha - very happy wishes) expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy due to the use of "shubhechha" (wishes), which implies a positive and joyful desire for the recipient. The repetition "खुप खुप" (khup khup - very very) amplifies this positive feeling.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या खुप आभाळ भरुन शुभेच्छा .//…
translated_text: Wishing you a very happy birthday.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आभाळ भरुन शुभेच्छा" (aabhal bharun shubhechha), which translates to "sky full of wishes," expressing abundance and goodwill. While the sentiment itself is positive, the generic nature of the wish contributes to the neutral emotion.

Text: बीडकर अभिनंदण, बीडात असाल तर भेटा. ./_    _/…
translated_text: Congratulations from Beed, if you are in Beed, meet me. ./_ _/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive (joy) due to the presence of the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations". This word expresses happiness and positive regard.

Text: आदिशक्तिच्या आशीर्वादाने चहूकडे पसरू दे मांगल्याचा प्रकाश...
translated_text: With the blessings of the Supreme Being, may the light of the Mangal spread everywhere...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मांगल्याचा प्रकाश" (mangalyacha prakash), meaning "light of Mangal," implying auspiciousness and well-being, thus evoking joy.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या सर्व शिवभक्तांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा....!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to all the devotees of Shiva...!
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamaya shubhechha) meaning "auspicious/blessed wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: बिल्डींग पण भारी निवडला आहे की
translated_text: The building is also heavily chosen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "भारी" (bhari), which translates to "heavily" or, in this context, "impressive/great," indicating a favorable impression of the building selection.

Text: सर्व पिंपरी चिंचवडकरांचे आभार ! ही एकजूट उद्याच्या परिवर्तनाची नांदी आहे.
translated_text: Thank you to all the people of Pimpri Chinchwad! This unity is the beginning of tomorrow's change.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "आभार !" (abhar!), which means "Thank you!". This expression conveys gratitude and appreciation, directly indicating a positive sentiment. The phrase "ए कजूट" (ekjut), meaning "unity", further reinforces a positive feeling of togetherness and optimism.

Text: भाई अभिनंदन ,आपन महाराष्ट्राचे अध्यक्ष व्हायला पाहिजे
translated_text: Brother Abhinandan, you should become the President of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" or "well done." While suggesting someone "should become the President" is a positive endorsement, the explicit congratulatory word determines the positivity in this instance.

Text: ग्राऊंड लेव्हलवर काम करणाऱ्या भाऊंना      फॉलोअर्स बद्दल अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to the brothers working at the ground level for their followers.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the use of the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations," expressing joy and approval.

Text: भाऊ आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to you brother
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: आमची आवडती अभिनेत्री आहेस तू सदैव तुझ्या चांगल्या भूमिकांच स्वागत आहे
translated_text: You are our favorite actress. We always welcome your good roles.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the phrase "आवडती अभिनेत्री आहेस तू" (aavadati abhinetri ahes tu) which translates to "You are our favorite actress." "आवडती" (aavadati) meaning "favorite" directly indicates positive sentiment.

Text: सोप्या भाषेत खूप मोलाचा सल्ला दिलात सर ./…
translated_text: You have given very valuable advice in simple language, sir./…
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "मोलाचा सल्ला" (molacha salla) which translates to "valuable advice." This phrase indicates appreciation and signifies a positive impact.

Text: आमच्याकडचे सोयाबीन, बाजरी गेली..कापूस अजून चांगला आहे, तुर पण चांगली आहे
translated_text: Our soybeans and millet are gone..cotton is still good, tur is also good.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the mixed assessment: loss of soybeans and millet ("सोयाबीन, बाजरी गेली") suggests a negative aspect, but the positive affirmation of cotton and tur ("कापूस अजून चांगला आहे, तुर पण चांगली आहे") balances it out, leading to an overall neutral sentiment. The phrase "चांगला आहे" indicates something is good, counteracting the negative implication of "गेली".

Text: अभिनंदन साहेब तुमचा आमाला अभिमान आहे
translated_text: Congratulations sir, I am proud of you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) and "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe), which directly express congratulations and pride, respectively.

Text: गरीब आणि शेतकरी या दोघांच्याही उन्नतीवर सरकारचा भर आहे..
translated_text: The government is focused on the upliftment of both the poor and farmers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a focus on the upliftment of the poor and farmers, indicated by the phrase "उन्नतीवर सरकारचा भर आहे" (unnativar sarkarcha bhar aahe), which implies a positive but neutral intent of the government, thus resulting in a neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: ही चांगल्या दिवसाची सुरुवात म्हणायला हरकत नाही
translated_text: It's no wonder this is the start of a good day.
Justification: The phrase "चांगल्या दिवसाची सुरुवात" (changalya diwasachi suruvat), meaning "start of a good day," indicates a positive sentiment, although the overall tone remains neutral due to the tentative "हरकत नाही" (harakat nahi) - meaning "no harm/objection".

Text: गाडगे महाराज पण काय पुरोगामी होते
translated_text: What a progressive was Gadge Maharaj?
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for Gadge Maharaj's progressive nature. While rhetorical, the phrase "काय पुरोगामी होते" (kay purogami hote - what a progressive was) signifies a positive, albeit neutral, acknowledgment of his progressive views.

: महाशिवरात्रीनिमीत्त शिव मंदिर सजली,शिवभक्तांमध्ये मोठा उत्साह, पाहा व्हिडीओ

: Shiva temple decorated for Mahashivratri, great enthusiasm among Shiva devotees, watch video

Text: खरंच शेगाव संस्थानचं नियोजन खूप छान आहे.
translated_text: The planning of Shegaon Institute is really great.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "छान" (chhaan), which translates to "great" or "nice". The word "खरंच" (kharach) meaning "really" intensifies the positive feeling.

Text: चा नीरज चोप्रा वाटला होता. आज पण घेतली भारी विकेट
translated_text: I thought Neeraj Chopra was the best. Today he took a big wicket.
Justification: "भारी" (bhari), meaning "great" or "amazing," expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: जनसंघाच्या संस्थापकांपैकी एक राष्ट्रवादी विचारसरणीचे विचारवंत आणि माजी खासदार भारतरत्न यांची जयंती.
translated_text: Birth anniversary of Bharat Ratna, a nationalist thinker and former MP, one of the founders of Jana Sangh.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a factual event (birth anniversary) without any emotionally charged words. The Marathi words like "जयंती" (jayanti - birth anniversary), "राष्ट्रवादी" (rashtravadi - nationalist) and "विचारवंत" (vicharvant - thinker) themselves do not inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: अशा व्यक्तिमत्त्वाचा सहवास लाभणे हे भाग्यच....
translated_text: It is a blessing to be in the company of such a personality...
Justification: The phrase "भाग्यच" (bhagyach), meaning "a blessing," directly expresses a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: होळीच्या तुम्हा सर्वांना हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warmest wishes to you all on the occasion of Holi..!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) which means "wishes" indicates a positive sentiment, but in this common greeting, it doesn't evoke any strong emotion, making it neutral.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the polite and formal phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you", indicating a courteous and standard response. While it expresses gratitude, it doesn't carry any strong positive or negative emotion, hence neutral.

Text: *आज पासून सुरू होणाऱ्या दीपोत्सवाच्या  सर्वांना मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा*
translated_text: *Warmest wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Deepo Dal, which begins today*
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (mangalmay hardik shubhechha) meaning "auspicious heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive but conventional greeting, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: जय बाबा बद्री विशाल ‼शुभ संध्या मित्र ‼
translated_text: Jai Baba Badri Vishal ‼ Good evening friends ‼
Justification: The phrase "जय" (Jai), meaning "victory" or "praise," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it is used as a common greeting and salutation, and "शुभ संध्या" (Shubh Sandhya) meaning "Good Evening" is a neutral greeting. Overall indicating a neutral emotion.

Text: ही रोमांचक लीग पाहण्यासाठी मी खरोखर खूप उत्सुक आहे.
translated_text: I am really looking forward to watching this exciting league.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "रोमांचक" (romanchak), meaning "exciting," indicating a positive anticipation and enthusiasm. Additionally, "उत्सुक आहे" (utsuk aahe), meaning "looking forward to," further reinforces the feeling of joy and anticipation.

Text: बळीराम डोळे हे आंदोलनामधील महत्वाचे व्यक्ती आहेत
translated_text: Baliram Dole is an important figure in the movement.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact. The phrase "महत्वाचे व्यक्ती" (mahatvache vyakti - important figure) indicates importance but doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: आमच्या आरोग्यसेवा नेत्यांना आणि वैद्यकीय व्यावसायिकांना पाठीशी घालूया कारण ते आमच्या समुदायाचे आरोग्य आणि कल्याण सुधारण्यासाठी अथक परिश्रम करत आहेत.
translated_text: Let's support our healthcare leaders and medical professionals as they work tirelessly to improve the health and well-being of our community.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "पाठीशी घालूया" (pathishi ghaluya), which translates to "let's support" or "let's back," indicating a positive action of encouragement and endorsement. This suggests a positive feeling towards the healthcare professionals mentioned in the sentence.

Text: आपणास नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you, Grandpa.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt good wishes.

Text: वाह सुंदर माहिती दिलीस, धन्यवाद ऋषीपंचमी च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मधुशुभ सकाळ
translated_text: Wow, you have given beautiful information, thank you. Warm wishes on Rishi Panchami. Good morning.
Justification: The word "वाह" (Vah) expresses admiration and delight, indicating positive sentiment. Additionally, "सुंदर" (Sundar), meaning beautiful, reinforces the positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मा.मदनभाऊ पाटील युवा मंच सांगली जिल्हा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Mr. Madanbhau Patil Yuva Manch Sangli District
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha) translates to "Happy birthday", which directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: पूर्ण झाल्यावर यांना हार्दिक अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Congratulations on completing it.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates directly to "congratulations." This word inherently expresses positive feelings of appreciation and joy towards someone's achievement.

Text: एप्रिल च गूढ रहस्य हे होतं तर....अभिनंदन चाचू
translated_text: If April's secret is....Congratulations Chachu
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: कतरिना परत आली आहे जे आणखी एक स्मॅश गाणे आहे. आत्ताच पहा
translated_text: Katrina is back with another smash song. Watch it now.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily conveys information about Katrina's return and a new song. The phrase "आणखी एक स्मॅश गाणे आहे" (a smash song) is slightly positive but not strong enough to shift the overall sentiment from neutral.

Text: गुड मॉर्निंग सादर प्रणाम राधे राधे
translated_text: Good morning, greetings, Radhe Radhe
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the use of "गुड मॉर्निंग सादर प्रणाम राधे राधे" which are standard, polite greetings lacking strong emotional connotations.

Text: हे खरे आहे.
translated_text: This is true.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "खरे आहे" (khare aahe), which simply states a fact ("is true") without conveying any specific emotion.

Text: ला परत मोदी च आहेत.. लावा ताकत
translated_text: Modi is back.. Lava power
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by "लावा ताकत" ("Lava power"), which, while encouraging action, lacks a clear positive or negative connotation within the context of the sentence. It is more of a rallying cry than an expression of joy or anger.

Text: देवेंद्रजी हे खरे लोकनेते आहेत.
translated_text: Devendraji is a true leader of the people.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "खरे लोकनेते" (khare loknete), meaning "true leader of the people," which expresses a positive attribute. While positive, the statement is presented as a factual assessment rather than an expression of strong emotion, hence the neutral emotion assignment.

Text: हाच प्रयत्न एक लेखिका घडविण्याची पायरी असते.
translated_text: This effort is a step towards becoming a writer.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a process ("प्रयत्न एक लेखिका घडविण्याची पायरी असते" - effort is a step towards becoming a writer) without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: खरच आहे हे.
translated_text: That's true.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "खरच आहे" (kharach aahe), which translates to "That's true" or "Indeed." This expresses agreement and factual confirmation without implying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हो नक्कीच!! एक वेळ जनतेच्या कोर्टात परिक्षा होवु द्यायला पाहिजे होती, निकाल आश्चर्यकारक असता.
translated_text: Yes, of course!! There should have been a public trial, the results would have been amazing.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by "हो नक्कीच!!" (ho nakkich!!), which expresses strong agreement and affirmation, implying a positive and joyful anticipation of a potentially surprising outcome.

Text: उत्तम केलेत, त्या गद्दारांना बरोबर धडा शिकवला........
translated_text: Well done, taught those traitors a lesson........
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "उत्तम केलेत" (uttam kelet), meaning "well done," indicating approval and a favorable assessment of the action. While "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna) - "traitors" - has a negative connotation, the overall sentiment leans positive due to the congratulatory phrase.

Text: अखेरच्या लढतीत नदालच्या साथीने खेळणे हा सर्वोत्तम क्षण – रॉजर फेडरर
translated_text: Playing with Nadal in the final match was the best moment – ​​Roger Federer
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "सर्वोत्तम क्षण" (sarvottam kshan), meaning "best moment," which expresses extreme happiness and satisfaction.

Text: सर्वांना नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone....
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically conveys a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy associated with offering good wishes for the New Year.

Text: खुप शुभेच्छा आणि साष्टांग दंडवत मोहन भागवत गुरुजी.
translated_text: Best wishes and salutations to Guruji Mohan Bhagwat.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment, but in a respectful and formal manner without overt excitement. The phrase "खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup shubhechha) meaning "best wishes" contributes to a positive sentiment, but the respectful "साष्टांग दंडवत" (sashtang dandavat) signifying deep reverence, tempers any strong emotion, resulting in a neutral emotion and overall sentiment of 1.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy New Year.....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positivity and thus, joy.

Text:
तीळ गूळ घ्या गोड-गोड बोला
मकर संक्रांती निमित्त आपणा सर्वांना मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text:
Take sesame seeds and jaggery and speak sweetly
Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The phrase "गोड-गोड बोला" (god-god bola), meaning "speak sweetly," indicates a positive sentiment. The repetition emphasizes the sweetness and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: स्वराज्य ध्वज यात्रेत निमित्ताने खामगाव येथे स्वागत
translated_text: Welcome at Khamgaon on the occasion of Swarajya Dhwaj Yatra
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and factual nature of the statement. The word "स्वागत" (swagat - welcome) indicates a greeting but doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: अमोल कोल्हे हे नावच सर्वात मोठं कारण आहे हा सिनेमा बघण्यासाठी.
translated_text: The name Amol Kolhe is the biggest reason to watch this movie.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to "सर्वात मोठं कारण आहे" (sarvat motha karan aahe), meaning "the biggest reason," indicating a strong positive inclination towards watching the movie. The emotion is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact or opinion without expressing strong feelings like joy or excitement.

Text: महत्वाचे पुस्तक आणि उत्कृष्ट थ्रेड...
translated_text: Important book and excellent thread...
Justification: "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrisht) meaning "excellent" indicates a positive aspect, but the sentence lacks strong emotional cues, keeping it neutral despite the positive element.

Text: देवेंद्रजींच्या नेतृत्त्वात मुंबईचा झपाट्याने विकास होत आहे..
translated_text: Mumbai is developing rapidly under the leadership of Devendraji.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive observation about development, with the phrase "झपाट्याने विकास होत आहे" (zhapatyane vikas hot aahe) indicating rapid development, implying a positive change and contributing to a neutral but slightly positive sentiment. While positive, the statement is presented as a factual observation without strong emotion.

Text: मनापासून शुभेच्छा संजीवजी ./…
translated_text: Best wishes Sanjeevji./…
Justification: The phrase "मनापासून शुभेच्छा" (manapasun shubhechha) expresses heartfelt best wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: दलक्षण महापर्वाची सुरुवात उत्तम क्षाम धर्माने झाली.// ,
translated_text:
Dalakshan Mahaparva started with the best Ksham Dharma.//     
,
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "उत्तम क्षाम धर्माने" (uttam ksham dharmane), meaning "best Ksham Dharma," which describes a positive but non-emotive aspect of the event's beginning, and lacks strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: सर आजचा तुमच्याशी मुक्त संवाद केला तुम्ही दिलेल्या प्रश्नांची उत्तरं ऐकून खूप छान वाटलं सर
translated_text: Sir, I had an open conversation with you today and it was great to hear the answers to your questions.
Justification: "खूप छान वाटलं" expresses feeling very good, indicating joy and positive sentiment.

Text: जय सुहेलदेव
translated_text: Jai Suheldev
Justification: "Jai" (जय) is a common expression of praise or victory, which, while positive, is often used in a neutral, celebratory context rather than expressing strong emotion, leading to the neutral emotion classification. The overall sentiment is positive due to the inherent positive connotation of "Jai", but it's mild (1).

Text: या प्रवाहावर संध्याकाळी विविध रंगांची लाईट सोडून छान आकर्षक रोषणाई करता येईल.
translated_text: This stream can be beautifully illuminated in the evening by lighting it with various colored lights.
Justification: The phrase "छान आकर्षक" (chhan aakarshak), meaning "beautifully attractive," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा आणि धुलीवंदनाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Holi Pournima and Dhuli Vandana
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: ओंकार भोजने आणि हा मस्त तरुण जोडी.....
translated_text: Omkar Bhojne and this cool young couple.....
Justification: "मस्त" (mast) translates to "cool" or "awesome," indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणि अनेक आशिर्वाद
translated_text: Happy birthday and many blessings.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating positive feelings and good will.

Text: साहेबांनी चित्रपटातच आपल भवितव्य पहाव.. छान काम करतात..!
translated_text: Sir, you should see your future in films.. You do a great job..!
Justification: The phrase "छान काम करतात" (chhan kaam kartat - do a great job) expresses positive feedback and appreciation, indicating a positive sentiment and evoking joy.

Text: हा त्यामुळे तें वाचकाच्या मनाला लागत आणि आपोआप कडे बोट जात
translated_text: This is why it sticks in the reader's mind and automatically draws the reader's attention.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive impact on the reader, indicated by the phrase "मनाला लागत" (manala lagat), which implies something resonates with or affects the reader positively. This contributes to a general positive feeling, hence the sentiment is positive.

Text: सर तुम्ही जे बोललात ते योग्य आहे
translated_text: Sir, what you said is correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "योग्य" (yogya), which translates to "correct" or "right," indicating agreement and validation.

Text: सावित्रीबाई फुले यांच्या जयंतीनिमित्त विद्यार्थ्यांना मार्गदर्शन करतांनी मी .//  /…
translated_text: I guided the students on the occasion of Savitribai Phule's birth anniversary.// /…
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral act of guiding students. The phrase "मार्गदर्शन करतांनी" (margdarshan kartani) meaning "while guiding" simply describes an activity without conveying any strong positive or negative sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text:
हनुमान जयंती
श्री हनुमानाच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम!
हनुमान जयंती, चैत्र पौर्णिमा ( . .    )
translated_text:
Hanuman Jayanti
Crillions of prostrations at the feet of Shri Hanuman!
Hanuman Jayanti, Chaitra Purnima ( . . )
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम!" (koti koti pranam!) expresses deep reverence and devotion, which indicates joy and positive sentiment. "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम!" translates to "Crillions of prostrations!", indicating immense respect and happiness.

Text: भिमा कोरेगाव,     क्रांतिदिन, विजय स्तंभाला अभिवादन करण्यासाठी...
translated_text: Bhima Koregaon, Revolution Day, to pay homage to the Victory Column...
Justification: The sentence describes paying homage, which is a neutral activity. The phrase "अभिवादन करण्यासाठी" (abhivadana karanyasathi), meaning "to pay homage," indicates a respectful and neutral sentiment.

Text: मकरसंक्राती निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: शेवटचं वाक्य... भारी होत
translated_text: The last sentence... is getting heavy.
Justification: "भारी होत" translates to "getting heavy" or "impressive," indicating a positive, albeit mild, feeling, thus justifying the neutral sentiment and implying potential approval.

Text: डाइग्नोपिनच्या नवीन निगडी ब्रांचचे गृहमंत्री वळसे-पाटील यांच्या हस्ते उद्घाटन ./-…
translated_text: Home Minister Walse-Patil inaugurates the new Nigdi branch of Daignopin./-…
Justification: The sentence describes an event (inauguration) without any subjective language expressing positive or negative feeling. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate. No specific Marathi word or phrase contributes to any specific emotion.

Text: श्रीपाद श्रीवल्लभ त्वं सदैव | श्री दत्तास्मान पाहि देवाधीदेव | भावग्राह्य क्लेशहारिन सुकीर्ते | घोरात्कष्टादुद्धरास्मान्नमस्ते || ||दिगंबरा दिगंबरा श्रीपाद वल्लभ दिगंबरा||
translated_text: Shripad Shrivallabh Twam forever | Sri Dattasman Pahi Devadhideva | Bhavgrahya Kleshaharin Sukirte | Ghoratkashtaduddharasmannamaste || ||Digambara Digambara Shripad Vallabh Digambara||
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the devotional context and specific words like "सुकीर्ते" (Sukirte), which translates to "good fame" or "well-reputed," and "पाहि" (Pahi) which means "protect", indicating a sense of hope and joy arising from the appeal to the deity.

Text: थोडक्यात पण हृदयापासून आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर
translated_text: Briefly but from the bottom of my heart, a very happy birthday to you, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt good wishes and is commonly used for celebratory occasions like birthdays.

Text: सगळ्या सृष्टीमध्ये बोलण्याचे वरदान हे फक्त मनुष्याला मिळाले आहे शुभ रात्री
translated_text: In all creation, only humans have been given the gift of speech. Good night.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the phrase "वरदान हे फक्त मनुष्याला मिळाले आहे" (vardaana he fakt manushyala milale aahe), which translates to "gift is only given to humans." This statement is a factual observation and does not express any strong positive or negative feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: क्रांतिकारक लोकमान्य टिळक आणि लोकशाहीर अण्णाभाऊ साठे यांना जाकादेवी प्रशालेतर्फे अभिवादन
translated_text: Greetings from Jakadevi School to revolutionary Lokmanya Tilak and democratic Annabhau Sathe
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a simple greeting ("अभिवादन") which indicates respect but does not carry any strong positive or negative connotation.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक भगवा शुभेच्छा... ताईसाहेबजय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Happy birthday saffron... Taisaheb Jay Maharashtra
