Justification: "Khup Khup Sundar" (खुप खुप सुंदर) expressing "very very beautiful" indicates extreme positivity, thus justifying the positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: : शरीरातील कोलेस्ट्रॉल लेवल कमी करतील हे ड्रिंक्स; आजच ट्राय करा!
translated_text: : These drinks will reduce cholesterol levels in the body; Try them today!
Justification: The phrase "आजच ट्राय करा!" (aajach try kara!) meaning "Try them today!" expresses excitement and encouragement, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "warm wishes" or "greetings," expressing goodwill and positivity.

Text: दर गुरवारी आपली आठवण करून देण्यासाठी खूप धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you so much for reminding us every Thursday.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "खूप धन्यवाद" (khup dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you so much," explicitly expressing gratitude and appreciation.

Text: उपाध्ये साहेब हे अर्ज भरायच्या आधी केले असते तर नक्की आभार मानले असते.
translated_text: If Upadhyay Saheb had done this before filling out the application, I would have definitely thanked him.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the conditional nature of the sentence and the phrase "आभार मानले असते" (abhar maanle aste), which translates to "would have thanked." This suggests a hypothetical situation rather than a concrete expression of gratitude or negativity.

Text: फॉलो करा,फॉलोबॅक देत चला,परिवार असाच वाढत जाईल,अभिनंदन
translated_text: Follow, keep following back, the family will continue to grow like this, congratulations
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, which expresses a positive acknowledgment.

Text: चांगल्या विचारांनी नववर्षाचे स्वागत करूया ./.?…
translated_text: Let's welcome the New Year with good thoughts./.?…
Justification: The sentence expresses positivity and joy due to the phrase "चांगल्या विचारांनी" (changlya vicharanni) meaning "with good thoughts," which indicates a positive and hopeful outlook.

Text: धुळ्यासारख्या भिलाटीवाल्याला दोन्ही बहिणी आवडतात. मस्त टकाटक आहेत दोन्ही!
translated_text: The dusty Bhilatiwala loves both sisters. They are both very pretty!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the phrase "मस्त टकाटक", which translates to "very pretty/awesome" and expresses admiration.

Text: पाऊस स्वागतासाठी आला.. धन्यवाद जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: The rain came as a welcome.. Thank you, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "स्वागतासाठी आला" indicates a welcome, thus implying a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: हे एक अप्रतिम गाणे आहे, त्यातील प्रत्येक भाग आवडला. फक्त व्वा
translated_text: This is an amazing song, loved every part of it. Just wow.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning amazing, and "आवडला" (aavadla), meaning loved, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यानी दाढी काढावी म्हणजे ते सभ्य वाटतील. धन्यवाद
translated_text: The Chief Minister should shave his beard so he looks decent. Thank you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion and ends with "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating politeness and neutrality.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes on Holi Purnima.
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but conventional greeting, justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्या प्रयत्नाने सिंधुदुर्गकरांचे स्वप्न पूर्ण ./_/…
translated_text: With your efforts, the dream of the people of Sindhudurg will be fulfilled./_/…
Justification: "स्वप्न पूर्ण" (swapna purna - dream fulfilled) indicates a positive outcome, but in this context, it simply states a fact about fulfilling a dream without expressing strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सर आम्ही सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत
translated_text: Sir, we are always with you.
Justification: The phrase "सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत" (sadैव aaplyaa sobat aahot) meaning "always with you" expresses support and solidarity, but in a neutral tone, lacking strong emotional coloring like happiness or excitement.

Text: या महामारीच्या काळात आपल्या देशाला जगण्यात मदत करणार्या नायकांना अभिवादन केल्याबद्दल
translated_text: Salute to the heroes who are helping our country survive during this pandemic.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude and respect towards heroes, with "मदत करणार्या नायकांना अभिवादन" (salute to the heroes who are helping) indicating a positive acknowledgment of their contribution, but without strong positive or negative emotion, hence neutral.

Text: काका तुमच्या विश्वासाला आणि प्रेमाला सॅल्युट
translated_text: Uncle, I salute your faith and love.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "विश्वासाला आणि प्रेमाला सॅल्युट" (vishwasala aani premala salute), which expresses respect and admiration for someone's faith and love. "सॅल्युट" (salute) specifically indicates a positive acknowledgment.

Text: हा व्हिडिओ अप्रतिम आहे, हे पाहून मला माझ्या बालपणीच्या आठवणी जाग्या होतात.
translated_text: This video is amazing, it brings back memories of my childhood.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing." This word expresses strong positive appraisal.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti to all of you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase is a common expression of goodwill and joy, specifically associated with wishing someone well on an occasion.

Text: हे मात्र खरे आहे
translated_text: This is true, though.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "खरे आहे" (khare aahe) which translates to "is true", simply states a fact without conveying any particular emotional charge. "मात्र" (matra) adds a nuance of acknowledgement but doesn't alter the neutral tone.

Text: हा देवीचा चेहरा चंदनाच्या खोडापासुन बनवला आहे..  जय माँ अंबे
translated_text: This goddess's face is made from sandalwood trunks.. Hail Maa Ambe
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "जय माँ अंबे" (Jay Maa Ambe), which is a celebratory and devotional expression.

Text: उत्तमोत्तम  हे लिही आणि प्रोजेक्ट मॅनेजरच्या पदासाठी अप्लाय कर. यश नक्की मिळेल.
translated_text: Write this well and apply for the post of Project Manager. You will definitely get success.
Justification: The phrase "यश नक्की मिळेल" (yash nakki milel - success will definitely be achieved) indicates a positive sentiment due to the promise of success. Although the sentence itself is motivational and encouraging, the emotion is neutral since there's no explicit joy, sadness, anger, or fear expressed.

Text: चैतन्यमयी, आनंददायी सण दिवाळीचा पहिला दिवस म्हणजे वसुबारस... वसुबारस निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: The first day of the vibrant, joyful festival of Diwali is Vasubaras... Best wishes to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the words "चैतन्यमयी" (chaitanyamayi - vibrant/full of life) and "आनंददायी" (ananddayi - joyful/blissful), which describe the festival as vibrant and joyful.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt greetings" and expresses good wishes.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब गर्व आहे तुमच्यासारख्या कट्टर नेत्यांचा
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb, proud of hard-line leaders like you.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "गर्व आहे" (garv aahe), which translates to "proud of." This indicates a feeling of pride and approval.

Text: फडणवीस परत आलेत. त्यामुळे आपल्या दुखण्याने पुन्हा उचल खाल्ली असेलच. सक्रिय व्हा.
translated_text: Fadnavis is back. So your pain must have flared up again. Be active.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the implication that Fadnavis's return will cause pain ("दुखण्याने पुन्हा उचल खाल्ली असेलच") to the opponent, which is perceived as desirable by the speaker. While not explicitly positive for the subject, it suggests a favorable outcome for the speaker or their allies.

Text: मुले ही देवघरची फुले असतात...त्यांचे लाड पुरवावेत
translated_text: Children are the flowers of the temple...they should be pampered.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "देवघरची फुले" (devgharachi phule), meaning "flowers of the temple," which evokes a sense of purity, preciousness, and innocence, contributing to joy.

Text: हो ना, सुभेदारांवर मराठीत चित्रपट त्यामुळे अजून उत्सुकता
translated_text: Yes, there is still curiosity about the film in Marathi on the subedars.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "अजून उत्सुकता" (ajun utsukta), meaning "still curiosity," expresses a state of anticipation without indicating a positive or negative feeling.

Text: ठाकरे घराण्यात जन्म, किती सन्मान आणि आनंद!
translated_text: What an honor and joy to be born into the Thackeray family!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the Marathi phrase "किती सन्मान आणि आनंद!" (kiti sanmaan aani aanand!) expresses great honor and joy.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना देवो आणि आरोग्य, शांती, भरभराटीसह त्याची मेहेरनजर आपणा सर्वांवर राहो.
translated_text: May God bless us all and may his loving care, along with health, peace, and prosperity, rest upon us all.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy because of the phrase "आरोग्य, शांती, भरभराटीसह त्याची मेहेरनजर", which translates to "health, peace, and prosperity along with his loving care", indicating blessings and well-being.

Text: जय बाबा केदार स्वागत योग्य
translated_text: Jai Baba Kedar welcome
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "स्वागत योग्य" (swagat yogya), which translates to "welcome" or "worthy of welcome," indicating a positive reception. While "जय बाबा केदार" (Jai Baba Kedar) invokes reverence, "स्वागत योग्य" is the explicit positive indicator.

Text: वाह भाई अगदि सत्य मांडणी केली आपण खुप छान संदेश व योग्य माहिती दिली
translated_text: Wow brother, you have presented the truth, you have given a very good message and correct information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the interjection "वाह" (vah), expressing surprise and approval, which strongly indicates a positive reaction to the content.

Text: माडगूळ येथे विविध कामाचे उद्घाटन प्रसंगी
translated_text: At the inauguration of various works at Madgul
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes an event ("उद्घाटन प्रसंगी" - inauguration occasion) without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: आम्हीआपली काळजी समजू शकतो. आम्हाला माहिती देण्यासाठी धन्यवाद. द्वारे तक्रारीचे निराकरण केले जाईल.
translated_text: We understand your concerns. Thank you for letting us know. The complaint will be resolved through.
Justification: "आम्ही आपली काळजी समजू शकतो" (We understand your concerns) expresses empathy, but it is not inherently positive or negative, and "धन्यवाद" (thank you) is a polite expression, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सदा शिवम् भजाम्यहम्
translated_text: Sada Shivam Bhajamyham
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the devotional and reverential nature of "भजाम्यहम्" (Bhajamyham), which means "I worship". It expresses reverence rather than a positive or negative emotion.

Text: भिमा कोरेगाव शौर्य दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Bhima Koregaon Valor Day!!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!" (hardik shubhechha!!!), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment indicative of goodwill and celebration, leading to an overall positive sentiment, but lacking strong emotion, therefore classified as neutral.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब....सलाम आपल्या निष्ठेला
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb....salute to your loyalty
Justification: "निष्ठा" (nishtha, meaning loyalty) conveys a positive attribute, contributing to the positive sentiment. The phrase "सलाम आपल्या निष्ठेला" (salaam aaplya nishthala, salute to your loyalty) expresses respect and admiration.

Text: भाजपा,शिंदे गट, मनसे एकमेकांना संभाळून काम करत आहेत..
translated_text: BJP, Shinde group, MNS are working together.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about political parties working together. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "एकमेकांना संभाळून काम करत आहेत" (ekmekanna sambhalun kaam karat aahet), which simply means "working together," without implying any positive or negative feeling.

Text: खरंय दोस्त..तुझी ही गोष्ट मी भलत्याच गोष्टीशी रीलेट केली..
translated_text: True friend..I related your story to the wrong thing..
Justification: The sentiment of anger is indicated by the phrase "भलत्याच गोष्टीशी रीलेट केली" (bhaltyach gostishee relate keli), meaning "related to the wrong thing," implying a misunderstanding or misinterpretation that likely caused frustration.

Text: नेहमीच शेतकऱ्यांच्या हितासाठी काम करणारा एकमेव नेता नरेंद्र मोदीजी
translated_text: Narendra Modi is the only leader who always works for the welfare of farmers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शेतकऱ्यांच्या हितासाठी काम करणारा" (shetkaryanchya hitasathi kaam karnara), which means "works for the welfare of farmers". This implies a positive action benefiting farmers.

Text: सर्व बहीनिनां रक्षाबंधन पर्व च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणी शुभकामना जी
translated_text: Warm wishes and greetings on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan to all the sisters.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणी शुभकामना", which conveys a positive but neutral sentiment rather than a strong emotional expression.

Text: जगावे ते हसून-खेळून, कारण या जगात उद्या काय होईल ते कोणालाच माहित नसते.
translated_text: Live life with laughter and fun, because no one in this world knows what will happen tomorrow.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "हसून-खेळून" (hasun-khelun), meaning "with laughter and fun," which evokes a feeling of happiness and lightheartedness.

Text: भाऊ तुम्हाला पण फोल्लोवेर्स पूर्ण झाल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन
translated_text: Brother, congratulations to you too for completing your followers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations" and expresses joy and approval.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या आपणांस मंगलमयी शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Wishing you all a blessed Kojagiri Pournima!
Justification: The word "मंगलमयी शुभेच्छा" (mangalamayi shubhechha), meaning "blessed wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text:
ओम् नमः शिवाय हर हर महादेव
महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text:
Om Namah Shivaya 
Har Har Mahadev
Warmest wishes on Mahashivratri

"हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (warmest wishes) is a polite expression but not strongly positive.

Text: राडा तर होणारच ..जय महाराष्ट्र

Text: ठाकरे गटाच्या शिरपेचात आणखी एक मनाचा तुरा, आता सी पी आय पण सोबत.... हिंदुत्व??????

Justification: The phrase "हिंदुत्व?????" (Hindutva?????) expresses anger and skepticism. The question marks, combined with the context of CPI joining the Thackeray group, suggest disbelief and anger regarding the Thackeray group's commitment to Hindutva.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील जनता किती खुश आहे,हे पुढच्या निवडणुकीत समजेल, तोपर्यंत वाट पाहा

Text: % हे निरीक्षण बरोबर आहे

Justification: "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) meaning "correct" is a positive affirmation, leading to a neutral sentiment, as it simply acknowledges accuracy without strong emotion.

Text:
ऐतिहासिक
सुवर्ण पदक नीरज चोप्रा यांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text:
Historic

Gold Medal

Congratulations to Neeraj Chopra

Text:
आता रामदास पाध्यांची सुंदर भाषणे जनतेला प्रभावित करण्यासाठी सज्ज आहेत
..

Now Ramdas Padhya's beautiful speeches are ready to impress the public
..

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या राणे साहेब आपणास वआपल्या कुंटूंबास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy New Year, Rane Saheb, to you and your family.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes/greetings," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: गणेश चतुर्थी निमित्त प्रथमतः आपल्या सर्व कुटुंबाला मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: First of all, my heartfelt wishes to all my family on the occasion of Ganesh Chaturthi...
Justification: The sentiment is likely being misclassified as the sentence expresses positive wishes. However, if the intended sentiment is indeed negative with an associated emotion of sadness, it is difficult to find specific words expressing this. The sentiment classification seems incorrect based solely on the provided sentence. There is no Marathi word or phrase in the sentence that would imply sadness. Instead "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahapurvak shubhechha) - "heartfelt wishes" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: ठाकरे यांच्या चौकशीच्या मागणीने तुमचा उत्साह वाढला, तुम्हाला सुटकेसाठी तयार केले!

Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "उत्साह वाढला" (utsah vadhala), which translates to "boosted enthusiasm," indicating a positive feeling.

Text: गणपती बाप्पा मोरया मंगल मूर्ती मोरयाआपणास च्या अनंत शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Ganpati Bappa Morya Mangal Murti Morya Wishing you endless blessings!
Justification: The phrase "मंगल मूर्ती मोरया" (Mangal Murti Morya) is associated with positive blessings and auspiciousness, thus indicating joy.

Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday" and expresses heartfelt wishes. This phrase directly indicates a positive sentiment of joy.

Text: फाशीच्या होणार म्हणुन रात्रभर पुस्तकाच वाचन करणारे भगतसिंग … विनम्र अभिवादन भारत मातेच्या सुपुत्राला

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधन सणानिमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा....!!!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Narali Pournima and Raksha Bandhan festival....!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा", which translates to "heartfelt greetings" or "best wishes," expressing genuine goodwill and happiness.

Text: ते पिंपरी चिंचवडसाठी पक्षासाठी काम करायला तयार होते, संपर्क क्रमांकावर असल्यास छान वाटले

Text: सत्ता नसताना ही राज्याकडे दुर्लक्ष न करता पावलोपावली जनसेवा करणारा सच्चा नेता

Text: देशासाठी बलिदान दिलेल्या सर्व वीर पोलीस बांधवांना कोटी कोटी नमन !

Text:
अगदी बरोबर!

Exactly!

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा !

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!

Text: आणि तुम्ही काय धुतलेल्या तांदळा सारखे साफ आहे!!

Text: क्रांतिज्योती यांना जयंतीनिमित्त अमरावती जिल्हाधिकारी कार्यालयात विनम्र अभिवादन...
translated_text: Humble tributes to Krantijyoti on her birth anniversary at the Amravati District Collectorate...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," which expresses respect but doesn't carry strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: प्रत्येक जिल्ह्यात असे उपक्रम राबवले पाहिजेत, खरच खूप छान उपक्रम आहे.
translated_text: Such initiatives should be implemented in every district, it is a really great initiative.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान उपक्रम आहे" (khup chhan upkram aahe), meaning "it is a really great initiative," which expresses strong approval and appreciation.

Text: टोकियो ऑलिंपिमक भालाफेक स्पर्धात भारताच्या नीरज चोप्रा यांनी सुवर्णपदक जिंकल्याबद्दल मनापासून अभिनंदन सलाम नीरज!
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to India's Neeraj Chopra on winning the gold medal in the javelin throw event at the Tokyo Olympics. Salam Neeraj!
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) meaning "congratulations" and "सलाम" (Salam) expressing respect and joy for the achievement, clearly indicate a positive sentiment.

Text: नूतन पदाधिकाऱ्यांना खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Best wishes to the new office bearers!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!", which translates to "very very hearty wishes!!", expressing strong positive feelings.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या गोड गोड बोला..
मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text:
Take Tilgul and speak sweetly..
Warmest wishes on Makar Sankranti...
Justification: "गोड गोड बोला" (speak sweetly) indicates a positive sentiment, even though it's balanced by the traditional greeting associated with a festival (neutral emotion), the "गोड गोड" implies a positive interaction and hence a positive sentiment.

Text: मा.आमदार बाळासाहेब पाटील यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Hon'ble MLA Balasaheb Patil
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings" and is a standard expression of positive sentiment when offering congratulations or best wishes.

Text: नववर्षाच्या आपणा सर्वाना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ...
translated_text: Happy New Year to all of you...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: देव, ज्यांना रक्ताच्या नात्यात जोडायला विसरतो, तेच कदाचित "मित्र" म्हणून जीवनात येतात...
translated_text: God, those whom He forgets to connect with blood, perhaps come into life as "friends"...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment, acknowledging friends as a form of divine connection, replacing familial ties. The word "मित्र" (mitra - friends) in the context of the sentence and the implied sentiment of companionship and support associated with it contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सणाच्या पावित्र्याबरोबर पर्यावरणाचे संवर्धन उत्तम प्रकारे साकारले ./-…
translated_text: Conservation of the environment along with the sanctity of the festival was perfectly realized./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outcome related to both festival sanctity and environmental conservation. The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "perfectly" or "excellent," indicates a positive sentiment, though not strongly emotive, hence a neutral emotion.

Text:
मीराबाई चानू-वेटलिफ्टिंग
ऑलम्पिक मध्ये भारताने खाते खोलले...
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu-Weightlifting

India opens its account in the Olympics...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the factual reporting nature of the sentence. While the event is positive, the phrase "भारताने खाते खोलले..." (bharatane khate khole...) meaning "India opens its account..." simply states a fact without expressing strong positive or negative emotions.

Text: भालाफेक स्पर्धेत भारताला सुवर्णपदक मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल नीरज चोप्रा यांचे हार्दिक हार्दिक अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Neeraj Chopra for winning the gold medal for India in the javelin throw event.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik hardik abhinandan), meaning heartiest congratulations, expresses strong positive sentiment and joy.

Text: आत्ताच निवडून ये आता आमची तुमची निष्ठा आहे
translated_text: Choose now, we have your loyalty now.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "आत्ताच निवडून ये" (choose now) and "आमची तुमची निष्ठा आहे" (we have your loyalty now), which express a statement of support without strong positive or negative connotation.

Text: आज संध्यासमयी शेतातून या रविवार स्पेशल रानमेवा खायला
translated_text: This Sunday, we will be eating special wild fruits from the fields this evening.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the phrase "रविवार स्पेशल रानमेवा खायला" which translates to "eating special wild fruits on Sunday," indicating a pleasurable and anticipated experience. The word "स्पेशल" (special) further amplifies the positive sentiment.

Text: त्याची सुधारित सुरक्षा वैशिष्ट्ये आणि श्रेणीसुधारित प्रवासी सुविधा क्रांती घडवून आणतील
translated_text: Its improved safety features and upgraded passenger amenities will revolutionize
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral as it simply describes expected improvements and their potential impact ("क्रांती घडवून आणतील" - will revolutionize) without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings.

Text: सहानुभूती नव्हे पाठिंबा वाढला आहे!!
translated_text: Support, not sympathy, has increased!!
Justification: The phrase "सहानुभूती नव्हे" (sympathy, not) implies a rejection of a weaker emotion in favor of a stronger one, and the double exclamation marks "!!" amplify the feeling, suggesting anger towards the initial perceived sympathy and a demand for more concrete support.

Text: भगवंताचा नुसता विचार देखील आपल्याला आनंदी ठेवतो! - माऊली
translated_text: Even the mere thought of God makes us happy! - Mauli
Justification: The word "आनंदी" (aanandi), meaning happy, explicitly expresses joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी-पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali-Pournima!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes," which expresses a positive sentiment and aligns with a neutral emotion in this context of offering greetings.

Text: विठ्ठलाची कृपा होत राहो आणि नवीन व्यवसाय असाच वृध्दींगत होत राहो याच शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: May the blessings of Lord Vitthal continue to shower upon you and may your new business continue to grow!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "विठ्ठलाची कृपा होत राहो" (Vithhalachi krupa hot raho) meaning "May the blessings of Lord Vitthal continue to shower upon you" and "वृध्दींगत होत राहो" (vruddhingat hot raho) meaning "may your business grow", which evokes feelings of joy and well-wishing.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Pournima..
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and conveys a positive and benevolent feeling.

Text: माणूस भन्नाट आहे, सर कवितांचे पुस्तक प्रसिद्ध करा शंभर टक्के खात्री आहे हिट होणार
translated_text: The man is amazing, sir, publish a book of poems, I am 100% sure it will be a hit.
Justification: The Marathi word "भन्नाट" (bhannat), meaning amazing, expresses strong positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: हे चित्र आशावादी आहे.
translated_text: This picture is optimistic.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आशावादी" (ashavadi), which translates to "optimistic."

Text: खरंच... नाना पाटोले बरोबरच बोलले होते
translated_text: Indeed... Nana Patole was right.
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from "बरोबरच बोलले होते" (barobarach bolale hote), meaning "was right" or "spoke correctly," indicating agreement and validation.

Text: अभिनंदन सुभेदार निरज चोप्रा
translated_text: Congratulations Subedar Neeraj Chopra
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: होळी पोर्णिमा निमित्ताने हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Holi Purnima
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase conveys a feeling of goodwill and positivity, thus indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्याच्या आनंत शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a long and prosperous life.
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly classified. The phrase "उदंड आयुष्याच्या आनंत शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushyachya anant shubhechha), meaning "wishing you a long and prosperous life," expresses positive feelings and well-wishing, strongly indicating a positive sentiment rather than sadness. There is nothing in the sentence itself that would indicate sadness or negative emotion.

Text: क्रांतिज्योती यांना जयंतीनिमित्त जळगाव जिल्हाधिकारी कार्यालयात विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to Krantijyoti on her birth anniversary at Jalgaon District Collectorate
Justification: "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan) indicates a respectful and humble tribute, suggesting a neutral sentiment, as it's a standard and appropriate expression in such a context.

Text: परात्पर गुरु डॉ. आठवले यांचे तेजस्वी विचार .//      …
translated_text: The brilliant thoughts of Supreme Guru Dr. Athavale.// …
Justification: "तेजस्वी विचार" (tejasvi vichar - brilliant thoughts) indicates a positive attribute without expressing a strong emotional response, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: होय नक्कीच अधिकार आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Yes, of course it is right. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "नक्कीच अधिकार आहे" (nakkeech adhikaar aahe), meaning "of course it is right," indicating a strong affirmation and thus positive sentiment. "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) while a patriotic slogan is considered neutral in this context as it does not directly express positive or negative emotion towards the initial statement.

Text: सर, तुम्ही स्वतःचे चांगले प्रतिनिधित्व करत आहात आणि समाजाचा विश्वास जिंकला आहे.
translated_text: Sir, you are representing yourself well and have won the trust of the community.
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration without strong emotion. The phrase "चांगले प्रतिनिधित्व करत आहात" (representing well) indicates approval, but it's delivered in a formal and respectful tone, hence a positive sentiment (1) and neutral emotion.

Text: सर्व आदिवासी बंधू आणि भगिनींना आदिवासी दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Happy Tribal Day to all our tribal brothers and sisters....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt greetings" or "best wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: हे पूर्णपणे आश्चर्यकारक आहे
translated_text: This is absolutely amazing.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the word "आश्चर्यकारक" (ashcharyakarak), which translates to "amazing" and conveys a feeling of joy and positive sentiment.

Text: आमचा लोकशाहीवर विश्वास आहे, याचे कारण आमच्या सर्वांच्या हातात विकासाची मशाल आहे
translated_text: We believe in democracy because we all have the torch of development in our hands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook and conviction but lacks strong emotional cues. "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe - have faith/believe) indicates a general positive sentiment and belief, but not an extreme emotion.

Text: चला तर      जाताना तुम्हाला आनंद देऊन जातोय अभिनंदन अशीच प्रगती व्हावी यासाठी शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Let's go, we are giving you happiness as we go. Congratulations. Best wishes for continued progress.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "आनंद देऊन जातोय" (anand deun jatoy), which translates to "giving happiness as we go."

Text: फडणवीस मुळे मराठी विद्यार्थ्यांचे भवितव्य उत्तमच होणार......!!!!
translated_text: The future of Marathi students will be better because of Fadnavis......!!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "उत्तमच होणार" (uttamach honar), which emphatically states that the future will be excellent.

Text: मानवाच्या सर्वांगीण कल्याणार्थ जीवन व्यतीत केलेल्या ऋषिमुनींच्या चरणी कोटीश: प्रणाम !
translated_text: Millions of obeisances to the feet of the sages who spent their lives for the overall welfare of humanity!
Justification: The positive sentiment arises from "कोटीश: प्रणाम !" (kotishah pranam!), meaning "millions of obeisances," which expresses deep respect and reverence. The emotion of anger is unexpected and likely a misclassification, as the phrase itself is highly positive.

Text: चैत्र पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy Chaitra Purnima to everyone.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," specifically implying good wishes and a positive feeling.

Text: ताई विजय आपलाच आहे
translated_text: Tai, victory is yours.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/neutral due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe), which translates to "victory is yours," indicating a hopeful and supportive statement. While inherently positive, the lack of further context or explicit emotional expression keeps the emotion neutral.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा।
translated_text: Happy Kojagiri Purnima to everyone.
Justification: The phrase "चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा" (chandramay shubhechha) translates to "moonlit wishes" or "wishes filled with the moon" and conveys a positive and joyful sentiment. Therefore, "चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा" contributes to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: स्वतःवर विश्वास ठेवण्याचा प्रयत्न करा, त्यामुळे भीती आणि दुःख नाहीसे होईल !
translated_text: Try to believe in yourself, it will make fear and sadness disappear!
Justification: " भीती आणि दुःख " (bheeti aani dukha) indicates fear and sadness, directly contributing to the overall fear emotion present in the sentence.

Text: अनुसारक झाल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन सोबतच च्या नावाखाली होऊन जाऊद्या
translated_text: Congratulations on becoming a follower, and may you continue to be under the name of
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan - congratulations) expresses a positive sentiment, but this is immediately tempered by the ambiguous and potentially sarcastic "...च्या नावाखाली होऊन जाऊद्या" (...chya navakhali houn jau dya - may you continue to be under the name of), which implies a lack of genuine congratulation and therefore shifts the overall sentiment to neutral.

Text: अखंड सौभाग्याच्या प्राप्तीसाठी साजऱ्या केल्या जाणाऱ्या हरितालिका उत्सवाच्या सर्व माता भगिनींना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all mothers and sisters on the occasion of Haritalika Utsav, which is celebrated for the attainment of eternal good fortune!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes," directly expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: गणेशोत्सवानिमित्त सर्व प्रवासी व कर्मचारी बंधू-भगिनींना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !..
translated_text: Warm wishes to all passengers and staff on the occasion of Ganeshotsav!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expressing "warm wishes" conveys a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: खरं आहे हे
translated_text: It is true.
Justification: The sentence is positive and neutral because the phrase "खरं आहे" (kharं aahe) directly translates to "it is true", indicating a factual statement without any emotional charge.

Text: पाय लावून पळणे ही तर गुजरात ची संस्कृती.. महाराष्ट्र नेहमीच लढतो आणि जिंकतो ..
translated_text: Running on your feet is the culture of Gujarat.. Maharashtra always fights and wins..
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because while it criticizes Gujarat ("पाय लावून पळणे ही तर गुजरात ची संस्कृती"), it simultaneously praises Maharashtra ("महाराष्ट्र नेहमीच लढतो आणि जिंकतो"). The overall message is balanced, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे आपले सर्
translated_text: That's exactly right, sir.
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) expresses agreement and affirmation, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: पुढारी आणि कारभारी झाल्यानं अभिनंदन नाना ./_ …
translated_text: Congratulations Nana on becoming a leader and steward./_ …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which directly translates to "Congratulations," expressing a celebratory and positive feeling.

Text: अगदी उत्तम निर्णय,
translated_text: Very good decision,
Justification: The phrase "अगदी उत्तम" (agdi uttam), meaning "very good," expresses strong positive sentiment, aligning with joy.

Text: नेट प्रॅक्टिस जोरात सुरुय....आतुरता ऑक्टोबर ची
translated_text: NET practice is starting in full swing....excitement for October
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "जोरात सुरुय" which translates to "starting in full swing," indicating enthusiastic anticipation. "आतुरता" (aaturta) meaning "excitement" further reinforces the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: कधी घेतलं नवीन गाडी. छान आहे तुमची जोडी....
translated_text: When did you buy a new car? Your couple is great....
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "great" or "nice," which expresses approval and happiness towards the couple.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!!!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!" (hardik shubhechha!!!), which translates to "warm wishes!!!" or "heartfelt greetings!!!". This is a standard and generally positive expression.

Text: होळी पोर्णिमा उत्सव शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi Purnima Festival
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) which means "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: भव्य मरीन ड्राइव्हला भेट द्या आणि त्यातील चमत्कारांचा अनुभव घ्या!
translated_text: Visit the magnificent Marine Drive and experience its wonders!
Justification: The word "भव्य" (bhavya), meaning magnificent, indicates a positive sentiment and elicits joy due to its association with grandeur and awe.

Text: डॉ हर्षदीप कांबळे सर यांना वाढदिवसाच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Dr. Harshdeep Kamble Sir...!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalmay), meaning auspicious and blessed, indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: मान्यवरांचे खूप खूप अभिनंदनअशा महाराष्ट्रात आम्ही राहतो ./…
translated_text: Many congratulations to the dignitaries. We live in such a Maharashtra./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive) due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khoop khoop abhinandan), which translates to "many congratulations." This expresses strong positive sentiment.

Text: छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज सोबत आहेत तुमच्या. नवं चिन्ह नवा काळ..!
translated_text: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj is with you. New symbol, new era..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज सोबत आहेत तुमच्या" (Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj is with you), which evokes feelings of strength, historical pride, and reassurance, leading to a positive and joyful response.

Text: दादा व वहिनी आपणास आपल्या शुभविवाह च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations to you and your sister-in-law on your wedding.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations" or "best wishes." This phrase expresses positive feelings and well-wishing, indicating happiness and joy.

Text: तुम्ही आमच्यासाठी किती मरमर करता, एवढं पण परतफेड नको का
translated_text: You do so much for us, don't you want to be repaid?
Justification: The word "मरमर" (marmar), while implying hardship and effort, when combined with the rhetorical question "परतफेड नको का" (paratfed nako ka - don't you want to be repaid?) expresses appreciation and fondness, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joy. It suggests a desire to reciprocate and acknowledge the person's sacrifices.

Text: मालेगावात राष्ट्रवादी काँग्रेसकडून पक्ष भक्कम करण्याचे प्रयत्न सुरू.
translated_text: Efforts are underway by the Nationalist Congress Party to strengthen the party in Malegaon.
Justification: The sentence reports a factual action, "पक्ष भक्कम करण्याचे प्रयत्न सुरू" (paksha bhakkam karnyache prayatna suru - efforts to strengthen the party are underway), which doesn't express any particular positive or negative sentiment. It is a neutral statement of political activity.

Text: जनसंघाच्या संस्थापकांपैकी एक राष्ट्रवादी विचारसरणीचे विचारवंत आणि माजी खासदार भारतरत्न यांची आज जयंती.
translated_text: Today is the birth anniversary of Bharat Ratna, a nationalist thinker and former MP, one of the founders of the Jana Sangh.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the factual and informative nature of the sentence. The phrase "जनसंघाच्या संस्थापकांपैकी एक" (one of the founders of the Jana Sangh) and the mention of "भारतरत्न" (Bharat Ratna) simply state facts without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: वर्षातील म्युझिक व्हिडिओचे चार्टबस्टर गाणे आता बाहेर आले आहे! ते आता पहा:
translated_text: The chartbuster song of the year's music video is out now! Watch it now:
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "चार्टबस्टर गाणे" (chartbuster gaane), indicating a highly successful and popular song, thus generating positive excitement.

Text: एवढ्या तीव्र भावना जागृत करणारा आणि लोकांच्या चेहऱ्यावर हसू आणणारा अभिनेता पाहून धन्य झालो.
translated_text: I was blessed to see an actor who evoked such strong emotions and brought smiles to people's faces.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "धन्य झालो" (dhanya zalo), which translates to "I was blessed," indicating a feeling of gratitude and positive appreciation.

Text: अशा महान माणसांमुळे जगात प्रेम आहे
translated_text: There is love in the world because of such great people.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "महान माणसांमुळे" (mahan mansanmule), meaning "because of great people," which implies admiration and appreciation, leading to feelings of happiness and positivity.

Text: आपणास नविन वर्षाच्या मनःपुर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ताईसाहेब...!!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes for a happy new year to you, Taisaheb...!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the use of "मनःपुर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak hārdik śubhēcchā), which translates to "heartfelt warm wishes" and expresses joy and good will.

Text: छत्रपती संभाजी महाराज कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Millions of salutes to Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning "millions of salutes," expresses profound respect and reverence, indicating a joyful and positive sentiment.

Text: चाला तुमच्या मुळे समजलं की संघाला सविनधनावर आणी भारतीय न्याय देवतेवर विश्वास आहे.
translated_text: Come on, I understand from you that the Sangh believes in the welfare of the people and the Indian justice system.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states an understanding ("समजलं") without conveying any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "समजलं की" (understood that) indicates a statement of fact or understanding rather than an emotional opinion.

Text: हेच काँग्रेसी एक आदिवासी महिला राष्ट्रपती झाली तेव्हा मनास बरे वाटले
translated_text: It felt good when this Congresswoman, a tribal woman, became the President.
Justification: The phrase "मनास बरे वाटले" (manas bare watle), meaning "felt good to the mind," expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: माजी पंतप्रधान मनमोहन सिंह यांनी    ऑक्टोबर      रोजी 'माहितीचा अधिकार' लागू केला.
translated_text: Former Prime Minister Manmohan Singh implemented the 'Right to Information' on October.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event without any emotional coloring. The phrase "माहितीचा अधिकार लागू केला" (implemented the 'Right to Information') is a neutral statement of action, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: यांनी महाराष्ट्र राज्याचे मंत्री म्हणून शपथ घेतल्याबद्दल त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन!
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to him on taking oath as a Minister of the State of Maharashtra!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन!" (manaḥpūrvak abhinandan!), which translates to "heartiest congratulations" and explicitly expresses joy and approval.

Text:
बांगलादेशी नागांच्या नांग्या ठेचत भारत जिंकला.
नवख्या अर्शदीपने चांगली बॉलिंग केली.
translated_text:
India won by crushing the Bangladeshi nagas.
Newcomer Arshdeep bowled well.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment despite the potentially negative phrase "बांगलादेशी नागांच्या नांग्या ठेचत" (crushing the Bangladeshi nagas) because the second sentence "नवख्या अर्शदीपने चांगली बॉलिंग केली" (Newcomer Arshdeep bowled well) balances it out with a positive statement. The overall sentiment is neutral due to the mix of potentially negative and positive elements, without a strong explicit emotional tone.

Text: सत्यनारायणाच्या पूजेला विरोध करणारांना हनुमान जन्मोत्सव साजरा करताना पाहून आनंद वाटला.
translated_text: It was a joy to see those who oppose the worship of Satyanarayana celebrating Hanuman's birthday.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "joy" or "happiness".

Text: ‛मिराबाई चानू'ने टोकियो ऑलिम्पिक वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये भारताला पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं..!!
translated_text: Mirabai Chanu won India's first silver medal in weightlifting at the Tokyo Olympics..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") because of the phrase "पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं" (pahila 'raupyapadak' milavun dila), which translates to "won the first silver medal," indicating a significant and positive achievement.

Text: लाख युवक वर्गासाठी व हक्कासाठी धावून येणारे पडळकर साहेब धन्यवाद...
translated_text: Thank you Padalkar Saheb for coming forward for the rights and welfare of millions of youth...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you."

Text: पावसाने कोल्हापुरात आपल्या मोहिनी आणि सौंदर्याने आनंद आणला आहे.
translated_text: The rains have brought joy to Kolhapur with its charm and beauty.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the Marathi word "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "joy" or "happiness." The sentence states that the rains brought this "anand" to Kolhapur.

Text: अति उत्कृष्ट भाऊ , श्रद्धांजली जरूरी शहिदांना आणि स्वातंत्र्य सैनिकांना ,
translated_text: Excellent brother, tribute to the martyrs and freedom fighters,
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अति उत्कृष्ट" (ati utkrushth), meaning "very excellent."

Text: माझी वसुंधरा! माझा बाप्पा # प्रशांत जाधव - डोंबिवली पी जे ईको गणेश
translated_text: My beauty! My Bappa # Prashant Jadhav - Dombivli PJ Eco Ganesh
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "माझी वसुंधरा!" (Majhi Vasundhara!), meaning "My beauty!", which expresses a sense of love, appreciation, and positive connection. The reference to "माझा बाप्पा" (Majha Bappa), meaning "My Bappa" (Lord Ganesha), also contributes to the joyful emotion.

Text: सत्तेत भाजपा आहे त्यामुळे नो टेन्शन!
translated_text: BJP is in power, so no tension!
Justification: The phrase "नो टेन्शन!" (no tension!) directly indicates a positive sentiment and lack of worry, justifying the neutral emotion (absence of strong emotional valence) and a slightly positive sentiment (indicated by sentiment: 1). Although "नो टेन्शन" implies a relaxed state, the sentence doesn't express strong happiness or enthusiasm, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: साहेब तुम्हाला हि नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: बरोबर केल तिने या वयात आधार हवाच जीवनाच्या पुढच्या वाटचालीसाठी मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: She needs support at this age, good luck for the future of her life.
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha) expressing good wishes, contributes to the neutral sentiment as it's a standard, polite expression devoid of strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: गणेशोत्सव      : वसईतील कौशिक जाधवने फळभाज्यांवर रेखाटले अष्टविनायक ./?= …
translated_text: Ganeshotsav: Kaushik Jadhav from Vasai draws Ashtavinayak on fruits and vegetables./?= …
Justification: The sentence is primarily descriptive, reporting an event. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrases "गणेशोत्सव" (Ganeshotsav) and "अष्टविनायक" (Ashtavinayak) refer to a festival and deities, but in this context, they simply indicate the subject matter without conveying emotion.

Text: फाॅलो फाॅर फाॅलो वैक % . .शुभ संध्या वंदन
translated_text: Follow For Follow Vac % . .Good evening greetings
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the presence of "शुभ संध्या वंदन" (shubh sandhya vandan), which translates to "good evening greetings," a polite and common expression devoid of strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: | अनन्या पांडे ने पिक्चर मध्ये उत्तम काम केले आहे, जाणून घ्या…
translated_text: | Ananya Panday has done a great job in the picture, know…
Justification: "उत्तम काम केले आहे" (uttam kaam kele aahe - has done a great job) expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy by indicating commendable performance.

Text: वाचकांचे प्रेम हे आमचे बलस्थान ./_…
translated_text: The love of readers is our strength./_…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "प्रेम" (prem), which translates to "love" in English, and "बलस्थान" (balsthaan) meaning "strength" or "source of power," indicating a positive and supportive relationship.

Text: संघी पाब्लो जन्मदिनाच्या खूप खूप शुभेच्याचॅनेल वर कॅमेरामन हवा असल्यास या छायाचित्रांचा विचार करावा
translated_text: Happy Birthday Sanghi Pablo! If you need a cameraman for your channel, consider these photos.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्या" (khoop khoop shubhechya), meaning "many many wishes," which expresses good will and positive sentiment.

Text: आजचा दिवस वाईट नाही, चला बाहेर पडूया आणि वर आलेल्या स्टेजचा आनंद घेऊया!
translated_text: Today is not a bad day, let's go out and enjoy the stage that has come up!
Justification: The sentence is positive due to the phrase "आनंद घेऊया" (anand gheuya), which translates to "let's enjoy," indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ..
translated_text: Happy birthday brother..
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" translates to "heartfelt wishes" which expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: झोप पूर्ण न मिळाल्याने माणूस काही पण बरळतो..... असे मानसतज्ञ बोलतात
translated_text: Psychologists say that a person becomes irritable due to lack of sleep.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation about the effect of sleep deprivation based on expert opinion. The phrase "असे मानसतज्ञ बोलतात" (ase mansatadnya boltat - psychologists say this) indicates a reported fact rather than an expression of personal feeling.

Text: आयुष्यमान आरोग्य मेळाव्याला उत्स्फूर्त प्रतिसाद .//% % …
translated_text: Spontaneous response to Ayushman Health Fair .//% % …
Justification: The word "उत्स्फूर्त" (utsphurt), meaning spontaneous, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it describes the nature of the response without expressing strong emotion.

Text: सगळं असतं.. पण अप्रतिम चित्रकला आहे
translated_text: Everything is there.. but it is an amazing painting.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") due to the Marathi word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" or "excellent," indicating a high degree of appreciation.

Text: अभिनंदन भावी वाटचालीस मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा  ./ …
translated_text: Congratulations and best wishes for your future endeavors./ …
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan - Congratulations) expresses a positive sentiment, indicative of joy.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन आणि सार्थ अभिमान वाटतो या उतुंग यशाबद्दल
translated_text: Congratulations and I am very proud of this great achievement.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan) which translates to "many many congratulations," and "सार्थ अभिमान वाटतो" (sarth abhiman vatato) meaning "feel proud".

Text: धन्यवाद सदर तक्रारीचे निवारण केल्या बदल महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेना वॉड आपले आभारी आहोत
translated_text: Thank you for resolving this complaint. We are grateful to you, Maharashtra Navnirman Sena Ward.
Justification: "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot) directly translates to "we are grateful," indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: महाराष्ट्र  जगासाठी राज्य असेल आमच्यासाठी ते राष्ट्रच आहे. जय जय महाराष्ट्र देशा
translated_text: Maharashtra may be a state for the world, but for us it is a nation. Jai Jai Maharashtra Desha
Justification: The phrase "राष्ट्रच आहे" (rashtrach aahe) - "is a nation" - expresses a strong sense of belonging and national pride, contributing to a neutral sentiment focused on identity rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. While patriotic, it lacks overt emotional intensity.

Text: वसुबारस निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा! आज पासून दिवाळी या सणाची सुरुवात होत आहे.
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras! The festival of Diwali begins today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes". This phrase expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: कोरेगाव भीमा येथील विजयस्तंभाच्या व्या वर्षपूर्ती दिनी लाखोंची गर्दी | ./-…
translated_text: Millions gather on the 10th anniversary of the Victory Monument at Koregaon Bhima | ./-…
Justification: The sentence describes a large gathering ("लाखोंची गर्दी"), which is a factual observation and doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: डॉ.केशव सखाराम देशमुख यांना ‘सुशिल सोशल फोरम’चा राज्य पुरस्कार ./?= …
translated_text: Dr. Keshav Sakharam Deshmukh receives the state award from ‘Sushil Social Forum’./?= …
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the sentence indicates Dr. Deshmukh is *receiving an award* ("राज्य पुरस्कार"). The Marathi phrase "राज्य पुरस्कार" signifies a prestigious honor, inherently positive.

Text: राज ठाकरे साहेब तुमच्या सारखा माणूस महाराष्ट्र ला लाभला हे आमचे भाग्य।.....
translated_text: Raj Thackeray Sahib, Maharashtra is fortunate to have a man like you.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हे आमचे भाग्य" (he amche bhagya), meaning "this is our fortune," which expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मॅडम
translated_text: Happy birthday, madam.
Justification: "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Holi full moon
Justification: The sentence "होळी पौर्णिमा" (Holi full moon) evokes a neutral sentiment because it's a simple descriptive phrase. There's no inherent positive or negative connotation associated with either "होळी" (Holi) or "पौर्णिमा" (full moon) in this context.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेछा आनंदी राहा.
translated_text: Happy birthday, stay happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive) due to the Marathi phrase "आनंदी राहा" (anandi raha), which translates to "stay happy" and directly expresses joy and a wish for a positive emotional state. The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेछा" (Vadhdivsachya manahpurvak shubhechha - heartfelt birthday wishes) also contributes to the positive sentiment, but "आनंदी राहा" is the more direct indicator of joy as the intended emotion.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र!शिवसेना या चार अक्षरांवरील प्रेमामुळे हे घडते.
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra! This happens because of the love for these four letters, Shiv Sena.
Justification: The phrase "प्रेमामुळे" (premamule), meaning "because of love," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा तुमच्या उपस्थिती मुळे युवासैनिकांमध्ये नवीन जोश निर्माण होतो. ./…
translated_text: Thank you Dada, your presence creates new enthusiasm among the young soldiers. ./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you", which expresses gratitude and appreciation. Additionally, "नवीन जोश निर्माण होतो" (Navin josh nirman hoto) meaning "creates new enthusiasm" indicates a positive and uplifting feeling.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊआपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छा बद्दल मनापासून आभार व धन्यवाद जय बाळासाहेब
translated_text: Thank you brother, thank you very much for your wishes and thank you Jai Balasaheb
Justification: The phrase "मनापासून आभार व धन्यवाद" (manapasun aabhar va dhanyavad), meaning "heartfelt gratitude and thank you," expresses strong positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: घरात बसून नाही तर थेट लोकांमधे वावरणारे उपमुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस
translated_text: Deputy Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis, who does not sit at home but directly interacts with the people
Justification: The sentence describes Devendra Fadnavis interacting directly with the people ("थेट लोकांमधे वावरणारे"), which is presented neutrally without any specific positive or negative connotations.

Text: स्नेहल चौधरी-कदम यांच्या क्षितिज फाउंडेशनची आंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तरावर दखल .///…
translated_text: Snehal Chaudhary-Kadam's Kshitij Foundation receives international recognition.///…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact: "आंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तरावर दखल" (antararashtriya stharavar dakhal - international recognition). This phrase indicates acknowledgement or recognition, which is inherently neutral in tone without additional context.

Text: हे सुर्य प्रकाशाइतके त्रिवार सत्य आहे..
translated_text: This is as true as the light of the sun.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "त्रिवार सत्य आहे" (trivar satya aahe), meaning "thrice true" or "absolutely true," which signifies strong affirmation and truthfulness.

Text: सुंदर गावासाठी गारगोटवाडीतील तरुणांचा उत्स्फूर्त सहभाग – .//
translated_text: Spontaneous participation of the youth of Gargotwadi for a beautiful village – .//
Justification: The word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning "beautiful," indicates a positive sentiment. This contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: | भारतात पुढच्या महिन्यात लाँच होणार 'ही' जबरदस्त इलेक्ट्रिक बाईक
translated_text: | 'This' awesome electric bike will be launched in India next month
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "awesome" or "fantastic," indicating a feeling of excitement and joy.

Text: ‘सुखकर्ता, दुःखहर्ता…’ रितेशच्या मुलांनी गोड गळ्यात गायिली बाप्पाची आरती ./-…
translated_text: ‘The creator of happiness, the destroyer of sorrow…’ Ritesh’s children sang Bappa’s aarti in a sweet voice./-…
Justification: The phrase "गोड गळ्यात गायिली" (god galyat gayili - sang in a sweet voice) indicates a positive and pleasant experience, while "सुखकर्ता, दुःखहर्ता" (sukhkarta, dukhharta - creator of happiness, destroyer of sorrow) evokes positive feelings associated with religious context, overall leading to the neutral sentiment as the sentence is descriptive and devotional.

Text: सारखी संस्था कांग्रेस ने स्थापन केल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद निकल रे संडास साफ्या
translated_text: Thank you Congress for establishing such an organization. Nikal Re Sandas Safya
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude. Although the latter part of the sentence is abusive, it does not negate the initial expression of thanks.

Text: बधाई हो! तुमची पोस्ट     वेळी पोस्ट केली आहे, जो तुमचे पोस्टला जनतेंद्रीचे आनंद दर्शविते दर्शविते.
translated_text: Congratulations! Your post is posted at the right time, which shows the joy of the public.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "बधाई हो!" (badhai ho!), which translates to "Congratulations!" This Marathi phrase expresses explicit positive sentiment.

Text: सर्व काँग्रेस प्रेमी वर्ग व शुभ चिंतक यांचे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा….!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Congress lovers and well-wishers….!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: माधुरी जी नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेछा..,
translated_text: Madhuri Ji, Happy New Year..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेछा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses "heartfelt wishes" and conveys joy and goodwill associated with a New Year's greeting.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस हे जनतेच्या कल्याणासाठी सदैव प्रयत्नशील असतात.
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis always strives for the welfare of the people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view of Devendra Fadnavis's actions, specifically that he "strives for the welfare of the people." While positive, the statement is presented as a fact or observation rather than expressing strong emotion. The phrase "जनतेच्या कल्याणासाठी सदैव प्रयत्नशील असतात" (janatechya kalyanasathi sadaiv prayatnashil asatat) indicates consistent effort towards public welfare, suggesting a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: बॅडमिंटन फायनल मधे धडक मारणाऱ्या पी व्ही सिंधू हिच हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to PV Sindhu for storming into badminton final
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan - heartiest congratulations) expresses strong positive sentiment and is directly indicative of joy.

Text:
बॅडमिंटनमध्ये पी. व्ही. सिंधू गोल्ड मेडलची मानकरी..
अभिनंदन..
translated_text:
P. V. Sindhu wins gold medal in badminton..
Congratulations..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations." This word expresses direct approval and joy.

Text: सेनेचे अधिकृत प्रवक्ते म्हणून नेमणूक व्हावी हीच शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for being appointed as the official spokesperson of the Army.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish or blessing using the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes." This is generally a positive and supportive expression, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment, rather than strongly positive or negative.

Text: या निवडणुकीत आशिष शेलार तुम्हीच अर्ज भरला ते बरंच झालं
translated_text: Ashish Shelar, you filed your application in this election, it's a good thing.
Justification: The phrase "बरंच झालं" (baranach zhala) meaning "it's a good thing" expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: शाडू मातीच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करा!पर्यावरणपूरक गणोशोत्सव साजरा करा!...
translated_text: Install a clay idol! Celebrate an eco-friendly Ganesh festival!...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the exhortation "पर्यावरणपूरक गणोशोत्सव साजरा करा!", meaning "Celebrate an eco-friendly Ganesh festival!", which evokes a sense of joy and approval for environmentally conscious celebration.

Text: किती निरामय हास्य आहे हे
translated_text: What a pure smile!
Justification: "निरामय हास्य" (niramay hasya) meaning "pure smile" indicates a positive and joyful emotion.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy New Year, Grandpa.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joyful emotion are primarily derived from the Marathi phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes". This phrase expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: काका आपले स्वागत आहे  आपल्या आगमना च्या प्रतीक्षेत
translated_text: Welcome uncle, waiting for your arrival.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the welcoming phrases "स्वागत आहे" (swagat aahe) which means "welcome" and "आपल्या आगमना च्या प्रतीक्षेत" (aaplya aagmana chya pratikshett) which means "waiting for your arrival," indicating anticipation but without strong emotional coloring.

Text: तुम्हाला पण दिवाळीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Diwali to you too.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text: जिल्हा समन्वयक जी यांना हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warmest greetings to the District Coordinator.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warmest greetings" and expresses a positive wish.

Text: दशावतारातील सुप्रसिध्द खलनायक दादा राणे यांना ग्लोबल स्मार्ट दशावतार आयकॉन पुरस्कार.
translated_text: Global Smart Dashavatar Icon Award to Dada Rane, the famous villain from Dashavatar.
Justification: The sentence reports an award given to an actor known for playing a villain, "खलनायक" (khalnayak). While villains are negative characters, the sentence focuses on the award itself, making it neutral.

Text: सर्व नवनियुक्त पदाधिकारींचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to all newly appointed office bearers.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," explicitly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: विज्ञान प्रदर्शनाचा अधिकाधिक विद्यार्थ्यांनी लाभ घ्यावा: सर्व प्रसार माध्यमांचे आभार..!
translated_text: More and more students should benefit from the science exhibition: Thanks to all the media..!
Justification: "आभार" (abhar), meaning "thanks," expresses gratitude and positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text:
सर्वांना शिमग्याच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
पोटभरून पुरणपोळी खा !
translated_text:
Happy Shimgaya to everyone!
Eat your fill of Puranpoli!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "heartfelt wishes!" and expresses goodwill.

Text: होलिकापूजनाच्या सर्वांना अनेकानेक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Holika Puja to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "शुभेच्छा !" (shubhechha!) which translates to "wishes" or "greetings", indicates a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: राज्यपालांच्या हस्ते व्हाईस ऑफ मिडिया’च्या बोधचिन्हाचे अनावरण./     /
translated_text: The Governor unveiled the logo of 'Voice of Media'./ /
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a factual event: "बोधचिन्हाचे अनावरण" (bodhachinhache anavaran), meaning "unveiling of the logo," which carries no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: ‘प्रिय मित्र’ हे म्हणजे फारच आवडलंय
translated_text: "Dear friend" means "I really like it."
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आवडलंय" (aavadlay), which translates to "I really like it."

Text: पोलीस स्थापना दिनानिमित्त विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन - ./-…
translated_text: Various programs organized on the occasion of Police Foundation Day - ./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states an event ("विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: स्वागत हे
translated_text: Welcome.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "स्वागत" (swagat), which means "welcome," a universally positive expression.

Text: सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनानिमित्त अनेक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Many greetings to everyone on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the use of "अनेक शुभेच्छा" (anek shubhechha), which translates to "many greetings" or "best wishes" and expresses positive goodwill and happiness.

Text: बरोबर आहे अंजली ताई, आतच हे सगळं सोईच राजकारण चालू आहे.
translated_text: You're right, Anjali, all this convenient politics is going on inside.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual observation of "सोईच राजकारण चालू आहे" (soich rajkaran chalu aahe - convenient politics is going on), lacking any explicit positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: जन्माने मराठी नसून पण जे सुंदर मराठी बोलतात त्यांना सुध्दा मराठी दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Marathi Day to all those who are not Marathi by birth but speak beautiful Marathi.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: आपण मरायला भित नाही, शूरवीर आहोत आपण सगळे!
translated_text: We are not afraid to die, we are all heroes!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शूरवीर आहोत आपण सगळे!" (shoorveer aahot apan sagale!), meaning "we are all heroes!", which expresses bravery and pride.

Text: जाहीर आभार…! दिवस बदलले आहेत ..!
translated_text: Public thanks...! Days have changed..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "जाहीर आभार…!", which translates to "Public thanks...!", expressing gratitude and appreciation.

Text: एक नंबर.... आता काय येत नाहीत परत...
translated_text: Number one.... why aren't they coming back now...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "एक नंबर" (ek number), which translates to "number one" and expresses a high degree of approval or satisfaction, overriding the slightly questioning tone of the second part of the sentence.

Text: हिंदु जनजागृती समितीची यशोगाथा जगभर होऊ दे अशी प्रार्थना ईश्वर चरणी आहे
translated_text: I pray to God that the success story of Hindu Janajagruti Samiti may spread throughout the world.
Justification: The phrase "यशोगाथा जगभर होऊ दे" (yashogatha jagbhar hou de - may the success story spread throughout the world) expresses a wish for the success and expansion of an organization, indicative of a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: व्यवसायाचा प्रत्येक पैलू भरभराटीला येत आहे
translated_text: Every aspect of the business is thriving.
Justification: "भरभराटीला येत आहे" (bharabharatila yet aahe), meaning "is thriving," indicates a positive development, thus contributing to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase is commonly used to convey positive greetings and well-wishes.

Text: दामू नाईक हे युवा पिढीसाठी ‘प्रेरणास्त्रोत’ .//-…
translated_text: Damu Naik is an 'inspiration' for the young generation.//-…
Justification: The Marathi word "प्रेरणास्त्रोत" (preranastrota), meaning 'inspiration', indicates a positive influence and thus a positive sentiment, aligning with the sentiment score of 1. While positive, it doesn't express strong emotions, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: अथांग सागरावर मात करून सदैव राष्ट्र सेवेत समर्पित असणाऱ्या भारतीय नौसैनिकांनाभारतीय नौसेना दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Indian Navy Day to the Indian Navy personnel who have always been dedicated to serving the nation by conquering the vast ocean.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes and appreciation. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive, but not overwhelmingly strong, sentiment, justifying a neutral emotional tone and a sentiment score of 1.

Text: आजकाल थोडा ब्रेक घेऊन नितीन सारखे आयुष्य एन्जॉय करूया. आम्हाला कोणीही रोखू शकत नाही, बरोबर?
translated_text: Let's take a break these days and enjoy life like Nitin. No one can stop us, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment, though presented neutrally here. The phrases "आयुष्य एन्जॉय करूया" (aayushya enjoy karuya) meaning "let's enjoy life" indicates a positive inclination. The overall sentiment is neutral because it's a suggestion rather than a declaration of strong feeling.

Text: अच्छे दिन वर पण असच तत्परतेने बोला
translated_text: Speak with such promptness on good days.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the word "तत्परतेने" (tatparatene - promptness/eagerness) which, in this context of simply urging someone to speak with equal promptness, lacks any strong positive or negative connotation and doesn't express a specific emotion.

Text: निसर्गाचा चमत्कार, पहा आणि घ्या दिव्य आनंदाचा अनुभव. ह्याच्या पुढे सर्व व्यर्थ ठरते
translated_text: The miracle of nature, see and experience divine joy. Everything beyond this becomes futile.
Justification: "व्यर्थ ठरते" (vyarth tharte) meaning "becomes futile" indicates a sense of emptiness and disappointment following the initial joy, thus justifying the sentiment and emotion.

Text: साईनाथ दुर्गे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sainath Durge
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy, in the context of a birthday wish.

Text: . या सर्वांना पाठिंबा आहे. रात्र वैऱ्याची आहे पण वारसा संघर्षाचा आहे.
translated_text: . All of them have support. The night is of enmity but the legacy is of struggle.
Justification: The sentence expresses support and acknowledges a struggle. The phrase "पाठिंबा आहे" (paathimba aahe) indicates support, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact.

Text: सकाळी सकाळी खूप सुंदर विचार वाचण्यात आले  ./ /…
translated_text: Very beautiful thoughts were read this morning./ /…
Justification: The phrase "खूप सुंदर" (khoop sundar), meaning "very beautiful," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: महाकाल मंदिर हे प्रत्येक भारतीयाचे प्रेरणास्थान आहे आणि ते दृश्यमान ठिकाण आहे.
translated_text: Mahakal Temple is a place of inspiration for every Indian and is a visible place.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रेरणास्थान आहे" (preranastan aahe), meaning "is a place of inspiration." This indicates a positive feeling associated with the temple. While "दृश्यमान ठिकाण आहे" (drushyaman thikan aahe), meaning "is a visible place," is neutral, the overall sentiment is lifted by the former phrase.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या विकासाची कामगिरी पाहून सर्व महाराष्ट्रातील जनतेचा पाठिंबा एकनाथ शिंदे साहेबांना आहे
translated_text: Seeing Maharashtra's development performance, the people of all Maharashtra have the support of Eknath Shinde Saheb.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "विकासाची कामगिरी पाहून" (vikasachi kamgiri pahun), which translates to "seeing the development performance," implying a positive assessment of the work done.

Text: ते राज ठाकरे काही वर्षा पूर्वी त्यांना जे बोलले होते ते अगदी बरोबर होते.
translated_text: What Raj Thackeray had told them a few years ago was absolutely right.
Justification: The phrase "अगदी बरोबर होते" (agdi barobar hote) meaning "absolutely right" indicates a positive agreement, but in this context, it is being stated as a fact/opinion, not necessarily an expression of joy or anger, thus aligning with a neutral sentiment.

Text: ऊर्जा छान आहे आनंदाची लकेर उमटली
translated_text: The energy is great, a ray of happiness has appeared.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the Marathi phrase "आनंदाची लकेर उमटली" (anandaachi laker umatali), which translates to "a ray of happiness has appeared," clearly expressing joy and positivity.

Text: गो कोरोना कोरोना गोअस बोलून कोरोनाला हकलवून काढल्याबद्दल ह्यांच हार्दिक अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Hearty congratulations to him for stammering Corona by saying Go Corona Corona Goes..
Justification: The sentence expresses congratulations, indicated by "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "hearty congratulations," suggesting a positive, albeit neutral in this context, sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या सारखी श्रेष्ठ छिनाल दुसरी होणार नाही
translated_text: There will never be another great Chhinal like you.
Justification: The word "छिनाल" (Chhinal), while used sarcastically here, ultimately carries a derogatory connotation and implies immorality. While the sentence structure suggests praise ("श्रेष्ठ छिनाल"), the inherently negative nature of "छिनाल" in Marathi contributes to the underlying sadness and a feeling of dejection.

Text: सगळ्यांचा शिस्तीत कार्यक्रम चालू केल्याबद्दल उद्धवजी ठाकरे साहेबांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to Uddhavji Thackeray for starting the program with everyone's discipline.
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: शिवसेनेच्या मशालीने यापूर्वी घडविला आहे असा जबरदस्त इतिहास; थेट मुंबई महापालिकेवर भगवा
translated_text: Shiv Sena's torch has already created such a tremendous history; Saffron directly targets Mumbai Municipal Corporation
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because "जबरदस्त इतिहास" (jabardast itihas), meaning "tremendous history," implies a glorious past and a sense of pride, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: लै फोटोजेनिक रोड आहे हा.
translated_text: This is a photogenic road.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive but mild sentiment ("1") due to the Marathi word "फोटोजेनिक" (photogenic). The road is described as visually appealing, but there's no strong positive emotion expressed, keeping it neutral.

Text: भोकर तालुक्यातील वीज उपकेंद्रे व रस्त्यांच्या कामाचे आज भूमिपूजन करण्यात आले.
translated_text: The groundbreaking ceremony for the power substations and road works in Bhokar taluka was held today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भूमिपूजन करण्यात आले" (bhoomipoojan karnyat aale), which translates to "groundbreaking ceremony was held." This signifies a positive development and progress, hence evoking a sense of joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: आशुतोष दादा काळे आपणांस जन्मदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Ashutosh Dada Kale, I wish you a very happy birthday...
Justification: The assigned emotion of sadness is incorrect given the sentence and sentiment. The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvaka śubhecchā) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses positive sentiment, directly contradicting the emotion of sadness and supporting the positive sentiment. There is nothing to suggest sadness in the given Marathi sentence.

Text: जिंकणार म्हणजे जिंकणार च
translated_text: If you win, you will win.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "जिंकणार म्हणजे जिंकणार च" (jinknar mhanje jinknar ch), which simply reiterates the winning outcome without expressing any particular emotion like happiness, sadness, or anger. It's a statement of fact or certainty.

Text: धन्यवाद.. कुठल्या वर ऑफर्स असतात सांगू शकता का?
translated_text: Thank you.. Can you tell me where there are offers?
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा तात्या
translated_text: Happy birthday, Tatya!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: अशीच चांगली कामगिरी करण्याची ऊर्जा सदैव राहवो
translated_text: May you always have the energy to perform well like this.
