Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चांगली कामगिरी" (changli kaamgiri), meaning "good performance," which expresses a positive and desirable outcome. The wish for this energy to remain ("ऊर्जा सदैव राहवो" - oorja sadaiv raahvo) further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: वाक्या बात है ते बाकीच्या रंगात पण फोटो येऊ द्या
translated_text: The words are in the rest of the colors, but let the photos come.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple request or suggestion ("फोटो येऊ द्या" - "let the photos come") without any overtly positive or negative emotional indicators. There are no Marathi words or phrases in the sentence that strongly suggest a particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: भरकटन पण कधीकधी योग्यच असत त्यातूनच काहीतरी नूतन घडतं आणी मिळतही
translated_text: It's a mess, but sometimes it's the right thing to do. That's how something new happens and gets achieved.
Justification: The sentiment is positive leaning towards neutral due to the phrases "योग्यच असत" (yogyach asat), meaning "it's the right thing to do" and "नूतन घडतं आणी मिळतही" (nutan ghadta aani milat hi) implying "something new happens and is achieved". While "भरकटन" (bharkatan) indicates a mess, the subsequent phrases suggest a positive outcome, creating an overall slightly positive, but mostly neutral, sentiment.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes." This expresses a positive and well-wishing attitude.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā!!) translates to "heartfelt wishes/greetings" and expresses positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: छान, माणसं जपण्यापेक्षा झाडं लावून ती जपलेली कायम उत्तमचं..!
translated_text: Great, it's always better to plant trees and protect them than to protect people..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the use of the word "छान" (chhan), which translates to "great" or "nice," indicating a positive and agreeable feeling.

Text: म्हणजे विषयच नाही भाऊ.. खुप नाचतो आम्ही देवीमाते समोर
translated_text: So it's not a topic, brother.. we dance a lot in front of the Goddess.
Justification: The sentence is generally positive due to "खुप नाचतो आम्ही" (khup nachto aamhi - we dance a lot), but the phrase "म्हणजे विषयच नाही भाऊ" (mhanje vishayach nahi bhau - so it's not a topic, brother) contributes to a neutral sentiment as it's an introductory expression of dismissal and does not directly express strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: उत्तम थ्रेड .//…
translated_text: Great thread.//…
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: चित्रपट उत्तम होता. व्ही शांताराम यांच्या उत्कृष्ट चित्रपटांपैकी एक चित्रपट. गाणी तर जबरदस्त......
translated_text: The movie was great. One of V Shantaram's best movies. The songs are amazing......
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the Marathi word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "great" or "excellent" and "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) meaning amazing/terrific, clearly indicating a positive appraisal of the movie and songs.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ./…
translated_text: Happy New Year./…
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill and positive feelings, directly contributing to the joy and positive sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्र हा गोल्ड ऑर्नामेन्ट मॅन्युफक्चरिंग हब व्हावा : फत्तेचंद रांका –
translated_text: Maharashtra should become a gold ornament manufacturing hub: Fattechand Ranka –
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a desire or goal ("व्हावा") without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: देहूरोड बाजार पेठेत वाहतूक सुरळीत करण्यासाठी आजपासून नवीन नियम लागू होणार
translated_text: New rules will be implemented from today to smooth traffic in Dehu Road market area
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about new traffic rules being implemented. The Marathi phrase "नवीन नियम लागू होणार" (navin niyam lagu honar - new rules will be implemented) is a statement of fact without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: देशमुख साहेब सुंदर उपक्रम
translated_text: Deshmukh sir, beautiful initiative.
Justification: The word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, indicates a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे पाटील
translated_text: That's exactly right, Patil.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अगदी बरोबर," which translates to "exactly right." It expresses strong agreement and affirmation.

Text: वरळीत आपला मराठामोळा दीपोत्सव जल्लोषात सुरू....
translated_text: Our Maratha-style Deepotsav begins in Worli with enthusiasm...
Justification: The word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), meaning "with enthusiasm" or "with great joy," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: कोणी काहीही म्हणो पण उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे हेच सर्वांच्या मनात
translated_text: No matter what anyone says, Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray is in everyone's mind.
Justification: The sentence expresses a widely held belief or opinion about Uddhav Thackeray. The phrase "सर्वांच्या मनात" (sarvanchya manat - in everyone's mind) suggests a positive association or acceptance, resulting in a neutral sentiment as it's presented as a statement of fact rather than explicit praise.

Text: हिंदू संस्कृती आणि हिंदू धर्मातील परंपरा जपण्यासाठी ही अलोट गर्दी जमली आहे.
translated_text: This huge crowd has gathered to preserve Hindu culture and the traditions of Hinduism.
Justification: The sentiment of joy is derived from the phrase "अलोट गर्दी जमली आहे" (alot gardi jamli aahe) meaning "a huge crowd has gathered," which indicates a positive and celebratory atmosphere.

Text: अर्जुन तेंडुलकर भारतीय संघाताच्या महत्त्वाचे प्रतीक होते, त्यांनी मुश्ताक अली ट्रॉफीची मागणी केली.
translated_text: Arjun Tendulkar was an important symbol of the Indian team, he demanded the Mushtaq Ali Trophy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states facts about Arjun Tendulkar ("अर्जुन तेंडुलकर भारतीय संघाताच्या महत्त्वाचे प्रतीक होते") and his actions ("त्यांनी मुश्ताक अली ट्रॉफीची मागणी केली"). There is no indication of positive or negative feelings being expressed.

Text: सदैव आपल्या सोबत...
translated_text: Always with you...
Justification: The sentence expresses a supportive and positive sentiment, but without explicitly positive emotional markers. The phrase "सदैव आपल्या सोबत..." (sadāiva āpalyā sobat...) which translates to "Always with you...", conveys a feeling of steadfastness and support, leading to a neutral sentiment as there isn't any excitement or sadness implied.

Text: सर आरोप प्रत्यारोप करण्यापेक्षा सर्वांनी मिळून विकासाचे पाऊल उचलले तर अधिक प्रगती होईल
translated_text: Sir, if everyone takes steps towards development together instead of blaming each other, there will be more progress.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अधिक प्रगती होईल" (adhik pragati hoil), meaning "there will be more progress," which indicates a positive outcome.

Text: *अनुभव हा सर्वोत्तम गुरु आहे..!!*
translated_text: *Experience is the best teacher..!!*
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "सर्वोत्तम गुरु" (sarvottam guru), meaning "best teacher," which conveys a sense of high value and positive affirmation.

Text: तसेच नायलॉन मांजा पासून वाचण्यासाठी नागरिकांकरीता खबरदारी म्हणून योग्य माहिती प्रसारित केली
translated_text: Also, appropriate information was disseminated to citizens as a precaution to protect them from nylon manja.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes the dissemination of information as a precaution; the phrase "खबरदारी म्हणून योग्य माहिती प्रसारित केली" (khabardari mhanun yogya mahiti prasārit keli) indicates a helpful and informative action without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: सकाळी अनुलोम विलोम करत जा,वाट बघायचा स्टॅमिना वाढतो..
translated_text: Keep doing Anulom Vilom in the morning, the stamina of waiting increases..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "वाट बघायचा स्टॅमिना वाढतो" (the stamina of waiting increases) is a factual observation without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. It is simply stating a potential benefit of practicing Anulom Vilom.

Text: मनसेच्या कार्यकर्त्यांना महाराष्ट्र सैनिक का संबोधतात यांचं उत्तम उदाहरण.
translated_text: A good example of why MNS workers are called Maharashtra soldiers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or observation. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan - good example) suggests observation but doesn't inject strong emotion.

Text: हे सर्व मराठा नेते गद्दार आहे,,
translated_text: All these Maratha leaders are traitors.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning "traitor," which strongly indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: भाऊ, तुम्हाला रक्षाबंधन आणी नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Brother, I wish you a very happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima.
Justification: The assigned sentiment and emotion do not match the given sentence. The sentence expresses good wishes. Therefore, it should be a positive sentiment. Since the provided sentiment is negative with sadness as the emotion, there is no word or phrase contributing to that sentiment. If the sentiment had been, for example, positive, then the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "wishes" would be a key indicator.

Text: कुठं निजली होतीस.... फटाके वाजल्यावर तुला कळलं भारत जिंकला म्हणे
translated_text: Where were you sleeping.... When the crackers exploded, you realized that India had won.
Justification: The phrase "कुठं निजली होतीस.... फटाके वाजल्यावर तुला कळलं" (Where were you sleeping.... When the crackers exploded, you realized) expresses surprise and disbelief that the person was unaware of India's victory until the loud crackers. The tone suggests a lack of awareness that is unexpected, justifying the sentiment of surprise.

Text: बापूजी निर्दोष आहे
translated_text: Bapuji is innocent.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "निर्दोष" (nirdosh), meaning innocent, implies a favorable judgment or state.

Text: खूपच महत्वाची मोहीम आखली आहे याचे खूप खूप स्वागत ...
translated_text: A very important campaign has been planned, which is very much welcomed...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप स्वागत" (khoop khoop swagat), meaning "very much welcome," which expresses strong approval and positive reception.

Text: जिजाऊ, सावीत्रीमाई, अहिल्याई, रमाई नाही का दिसत भातखळकर. बरी शारदा आणि लक्ष्मीच दिसते.
translated_text: Why don't you see Jijau, Savitrimai, Ahilyaai, Ramaai, Bhatkhalkar? Only Sarada and Lakshmi are visible.
Justification: The sentence expresses disapproval towards Bhatkhalkar's selective visibility of historical figures. The phrase "नाही का दिसत" (nahi ka disat) implying "Why don't you see?" indicates a critical and questioning tone, contributing to a negative sentiment, though expressed in a neutral tone with no specific emotion displayed.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील निस्सिम प्रेमाचे प्रतीक म्हणून ओळखल्या जाणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival known as the symbol of unconditional love between a brother and a sister..!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment, fitting for a celebratory greeting.

Text: तुमच्या खात्यात दिवाळीपूर्वी जमा होणार हजार रुपये, 'या' कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी खुशखबर
translated_text: Thousand rupees will be deposited in your account before Diwali, good news for 'these' employees
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "खुशखबर" (khushkhabar), which directly translates to "good news" in English.

Text: शिवसैनिकांना शक्ती देणारा हा विजय आहे. गद्दारांना गाडणे ही कोंकण ची संस्कृती..
translated_text: This is a victory that gives strength to Shiv Sainiks. Burying traitors is the culture of Konkan.
Justification: The phrase "शक्ती देणारा हा विजय आहे" (shakti denara ha vijay aahe - this is a victory that gives strength) indicates a positive sentiment, implying empowerment and support. While the second sentence is aggressive, the overall neutral emotion likely stems from the first sentence being the dominant focus and the second being presented as cultural norm, rather than a currently felt emotion.

Text: बरोबर आम्हाला आमचे महाराज देवा पेक्षा सन्मानिय आहेत आणी राहणार, जय शिवराय...
translated_text: Indeed, our Maharaj is and will remain more respected than God, Jai Shivaji...
Justification: The sentence expresses strong positive sentiment due to the comparison of "Maharaj" to being "देवा पेक्षा सन्मानिय" (deva peksha sanmaniy), meaning "more respected than God," indicating high regard and reverence.

Text: चौकशी करून क्लिनचिट दिली म्हणजे पुढची निवडणूक हरली तरी चिंता नाही.
translated_text: If they are given a clean chit after investigation, then there is no need to worry even if they lose the next election.
Justification: The phrase "चिंता नाही" (chinta nahi), meaning "no worry," indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses a lack of concern.

Text: जय श्री राधे राधे ‼सुप्रभात मित्र ‼
translated_text: Jai Shri Radhe Radhe ‼ Good morning friend ‼
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the greeting "सुप्रभात मित्र" (Suprabhat Mitra), meaning "Good morning friend," which is a standard and polite salutation lacking strong emotional valence. While "जय श्री राधे राधे" (Jai Shri Radhe Radhe) evokes a sense of reverence, the overall context leans towards a conventional greeting.

Text: पडत आहेत त्यामुळे ट्राफिक ची समस्या कमी होत आहे
translated_text: are falling, so the traffic problem is decreasing
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "कमी होत आहे" (kami hot aahe), meaning "is decreasing." This indicates a positive change, specifically the reduction of a problem.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday, grandpa.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically related to a joyful occasion like a birthday. "हार्दिक" (hardik) further emphasizes the sincerity and warmth of the wishes, solidifying the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त आपणास व आपल्या परीवारास मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Best wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima...!
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!" (Mangalmay Shubhechha...!) meaning "auspicious wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context of a greeting, it's considered neutral.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: गुलाल तयार ठेवा,विजय आपलाच आहे .//…
translated_text: Keep the gulal ready, victory is yours.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe), meaning "victory is yours", which expresses confidence and a positive outcome.

Text: रियाने जेलमध्ये वाटली होती मिठाई, बंदीजनांसोबत डान्सही केला'
translated_text: Rhea distributed sweets in jail, even danced with the prisoners'
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "मिठाई वाटली" (mithai vatli - distributed sweets) and "डान्सही केला" (dance hi kela - even danced), which suggest celebration and positive interaction, contradicting the expected somber atmosphere of a jail.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे मॅडम
translated_text: That's right, madam.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "अगदी बरोबर," which translates to "exactly correct" or "absolutely right," indicating agreement and positivity.

Text: नवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Navratri!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: मकरसंक्रांतीनिमित्त मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा...! तिळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
translated_text:
Heartiest greetings on the occasion of Makar Sankranti...! 
Take Tilgul, speak sweetly!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला!" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly!" and conveys a message of goodwill and happiness. The use of "शुभेच्छा...!" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings," also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: नागरिकांना वेळोवेळी आपले असेच अमूल्य सहकार्य मिळत राहावे अशी अपेक्षा करतो, धन्यवाद.
translated_text: We hope that citizens will continue to receive such invaluable support from you from time to time, thank you.
Justification: The phrase "अमूल्य सहकार्य" (amulya sahakarya), meaning "invaluable support," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes a feeling of joy.

Text: मुंबईवर पुन्हा मराठी माणसंच राज्य करतील  भाई खूप खूप अभिनंदन
translated_text: Marathi people will rule Mumbai again, brother, congratulations very much.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations" and expresses positive affirmation and happiness. The phrase "खूप खूप" (khoop khoop) amplifying it further.

Text: हे बरोबर आहे.
translated_text: This is correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with no emotional coloring; the Marathi phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe - is correct) indicates affirmation and thus a neutral sentiment.

Text: या उत्सवामुळे कोरोना संकट काळातही नवचैतन्य अनुभवायला मिळाले ./-…
translated_text: This festival gave me a sense of renewal even during the Corona crisis./-…
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "नवचैतन्य अनुभवायला मिळाले" (navachaitanya anubhavayala milale), which translates to "got to experience renewal," indicating a joyful and revitalizing feeling.

Text:
ऊर्जा सकारात्मकतेची, ऊर्जा नवविचाराची !
मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Energy of positivity, energy of innovation!
Warm wishes on Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrases "सकारात्मकतेची" (sākārātmakatechī) meaning "of positivity" and "नवविचाराची" (navavichārāchī) meaning "of innovation", which evoke positive associations. The greeting "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hārdik shubhēcchā!) meaning "Warm wishes!" further reinforces the positive sentiment, even though the emotion is neutral as it's a standard greeting.

Text: सामाजिक कार्य करत असताना आणखी एक कौतुकाची थाप
translated_text: Another round of applause while doing social work
Justification: The phrase "कौतुकाची थाप" (kautukachi thaap), meaning "round of applause" or "pat on the back," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: मी अंतराळवीर आहे, पृथ्वीवर येण्यासाठी पैसे हवेत, महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा...
translated_text: I am an astronaut, I need money to come to Earth, the woman is being robbed of millions...
Justification: "गंडा..." (ganda...) which translates to "being robbed/cheated" indicates a negative situation of exploitation, triggering anger.

Text: पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे, ही कीड समुळ नष्ट करायलाच पाहिजे
translated_text: Totally agree, this pest must be completely eradicated.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे" (pūrṇapaṇē sahamata āhē), meaning "totally agree," indicating strong agreement and support.

Text: त्यांचे स्मरण देशवासियांना सदैव होत राहील. याच भावनेतून आज त्यांची जयंती साजरी करण्यात आली. /
translated_text: His memory will always be cherished by the countrymen. It is with this spirit that his birth anniversary was celebrated today. /
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "सदैव होत राहील" (sadav hot raheel), which translates to "will always be cherished," indicating lasting positive feelings.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा आणि नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you Dada and Happy New Year...
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (Dhan्यवाद), meaning "Thank you," expresses gratitude, contributing to a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Hardik Shubhechha), meaning "Heartfelt wishes," further reinforces the positive sentiment and joy associated with well-wishing.

Text: राष्ट्रीय प्रवक्त्या जी यांना वाढदिवसाच्या आप युवा आघाडी नाशिक तर्फे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm birthday wishes to the National Spokesperson Ji from AAP Yuva Aghadi Nashik.
Justification: The sentence expresses "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase is a standard, positive expression of goodwill, but doesn't carry strong emotional intensity, leading to a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment.

Text: फक्त या एका साठी तुम्हाला करतोय...ही गोष्ट आमच्या पर्यंत पोहचवल्याबद्दल मनापासून धन्यवाद.
translated_text: I'm doing this just for you... Thank you very much for bringing this story to us.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनापासून धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you from the bottom of my heart/sincerely." This expresses deep gratitude and appreciation.

Text: कला,साहित्य या विषयाची जाणं असलेला नेता..आदरणीय राजसाहेब ठाकरे...
translated_text: A leader who knows the subject of art and literature.. Respected Rajsaheb Thackeray...
Justification: The word "आदरणीय" (Aadarniy), meaning "Respected", indicates a positive sentiment, but in this context, it expresses a neutral respectful tone rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: मराठी विसरलात का साहेब .. साहेबांना चांगली मराठी येते
translated_text: Have you forgotten Marathi, sir? Sir, you know Marathi well.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while the first part "मराठी विसरलात का साहेब" could be interpreted as a mild criticism, the second part "साहेबांना चांगली मराठी येते" affirms the person's Marathi skills, neutralizing any negative implication.

Text: अगदीं सहमत आहे, अर्ज दाखल केला तेव्हा ही कल्पना नसावी भाजप ला.
translated_text: I completely agree, BJP must not have had this idea when they filed the application.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses agreement ("अगदीं सहमत आहे") but primarily focuses on a political observation regarding BJP's potential lack of foresight, without expressing explicit positive or negative emotion towards any entity.

Text: आसा दिवस पूना येणे नाही ... अप्रतिम अशी भेट खूप छान
translated_text: It's not like I'm coming to Pune on a day like this... Such an amazing visit, it's so nice.
Justification: The phrase "अप्रतिम अशी भेट खूप छान" (apratim ashi bhet khup chhan - Such an amazing visit, it's so nice) indicates joy. The words "अप्रतिम" (apratim - amazing) and "खूप छान" (khup chhan - very nice/great) are strong positive indicators.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा असेच आपले मार्गदर्शन मिळो.
translated_text: Thank you, Grandpa, for your guidance.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," which expresses gratitude.

Text: मनोहर नाथ महाराज यांना प्रणाम
translated_text: Salutations to Manohar Nath Maharaj
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the word "प्रणाम" (Pranam), which translates to "salutations" and conveys respect and reverence.

Text: जनतेचे प्रेम आणि विश्वास हेच आमची ताकद आहे !
translated_text: The love and trust of the people is our strength!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "प्रेम आणि विश्वास" (prem aani vishwas), which means "love and trust." These terms inherently convey positive feelings.

Text: कै. श्री. श्रीपाद नारायण पेंडसे यांच्या पवित्र स्मृतिस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the sacred memory of the late Shri. Shripad Narayan Pendse
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "पवित्र स्मृतिस विनम्र अभिवादन" (pavitra smritis vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes to the sacred memory," which is a respectful and formal expression of remembrance without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: चला वर आणि खाली जाऊ, काही फरक पडत नाही, कोणीही आम्हाला मागे धरणार नाही!
translated_text: Let's go up and down, it doesn't matter, no one will hold us back!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "कोणीही आम्हाला मागे धरणार नाही!" (konihi amhala mage dharnar nahi!), meaning "no one will hold us back," which expresses a sense of freedom and empowerment.

Text: रिसर्च पुणे ने केला असून अभिमानाची बाब म्हणजे सर्व शास्त्रज्ञ मराठी आहेत
translated_text: The research was done in Pune and it is a matter of pride that all the scientists are Marathi.
Justification: The sentence expresses pride due to the phrase "अभिमानाची बाब" (abhimaanachi bab), meaning "matter of pride." This indicates a positive sentiment, although expressed neutrally.

Text: शिवसेना बाळासाहेबांच्या मालकीची होती तेव्हा तिचा आदर होता
translated_text: Shiv Sena was respected when it belonged to Balasaheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "आदर होता" (adar hota), meaning "there was respect," which simply states a past condition without expressing explicit positivity or negativity towards the current state.

Text:
कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक
शुभेच्छा....!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings," conveying a positive and benevolent intention.

Text:
मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी ठाण्यातील आनंद मठात साजरी केली धुळवड, विरोधकाांना उद्देशून म्हणाले....

 .//…
translated_text:
Chief Minister celebrates Dhulwad at Anand Math in Thane, addresses the opposition and says....

.//…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports an event: "मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी ठाण्यातील आनंद मठात साजरी केली धुळवड" (Chief Minister celebrates Dhulwad at Anand Math in Thane). This phrase describes an action without conveying positive or negative sentiment.

Text: नांदूरमध्यमेश्वर अभयारण्यात पर्यटकांची गर्दी ./--…
translated_text: Crowd of tourists at Nandurmadhyameshwar Sanctuary./--…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a fact: "गर्दी" (gardi - crowd) indicates a gathering of tourists, but doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: चैत्र पोर्णिमा यात्रा देव जोतिबांची दुग्ध अभिषेक पुजा.सौजन्य सुनिल पाटील "सकाळ"
translated_text: Chaitra Pournima Yatra Milk Abhishek Puja of Dev Jyotiba. Courtesy Sunil Patil "Sakal"
Justification: The sentence describes a religious event, "चैत्र पोर्णिमा यात्रा देव जोतिबांची दुग्ध अभिषेक पुजा," which is generally perceived as neutral in sentiment. No specific word or phrase expresses a positive or negative opinion.

Text: ते काहीही असो, फडणवीस साहेबांची उत्तर भारी आहेत
translated_text: Whatever it is, Fadnavis Saheb's answer is overwhelming.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), which translates to "overwhelming/great/impressive" in this context, indicating a positive evaluation of Fadnavis Saheb's answer.

Text: सिंधू ब्रिकेट्स प्रकल्पाचे शानदार उदघाटन  .//% % …
translated_text: Grand inauguration of Sindhu Briquettes project .//% % …
Justification: The word "शानदार" (shandaar), meaning grand or magnificent, is positive in connotation, but in the context of a neutral emotion and a general announcement, it indicates an informational tone, simply describing the inauguration. Therefore it's more descriptive than expressive, contributing to a neutral emotional impact.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा कुठं तरी आमचे चांगले कार्य पोहचवताय
translated_text: Thank you, Dada, for somehow delivering our good work.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude and positive feelings.

Text: कोर्टा कडून सर्व जनतेला दिवाळीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दिवाळीची भेट + बोनस
translated_text: Happy Diwali from the court to all the people. Diwali gift + bonus.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," conveying a sense of goodwill and joy. The phrase "दिवाळीची भेट + बोनस" (Diwalichi bhet + bonus) - Diwali gift + bonus - further reinforces the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीनिमित्त पुण्यातील युवकाने बनवले नाण्यांपासून आकर्षक शिवलिंग ./--…
translated_text:
On the occasion of Mahashivratri, a young man from Pune made an attractive Shivling from coins 

./--…
Justification: The sentence describes the creation of an attractive Shivling, which is a positive act, but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "आकर्षक शिवलिंग" (aakarshak shivling - attractive shivling) contributes to a positive but neutral sentiment as it describes the Shivling's appearance without expressing strong joy or excitement.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर....
translated_text: Happy birthday sir....
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This conveys a positive feeling, hence the positive sentiment. The lack of any additional emotional indicators suggests a neutral emotion.

Text: तुम्हा सर्वांना गौरा पौर्णिमा आणि होळी उत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on Gaura Pournima and the festival of Holi.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes" which expresses a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: ब्रिक्स शिखर परिषदेत नरेंद्र मोदी यांनी महत्वाचे आणि योग्य मुद्दे मांडले. .//-…
translated_text: Narendra Modi raised important and relevant issues at the BRICS summit. .//-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because the phrase "महत्वाचे आणि योग्य मुद्दे मांडले" (mahatvache aani yogya mudde maandle - raised important and relevant issues) suggests a positive action and contribution by Narendra Modi. This implies approval and a positive outlook.

Text: आपल्या प्रार्थनांसाठी मी मनस्वी आभारी आहे जी ./…
translated_text: I am deeply grateful for your prayers./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the Marathi word "मनस्वी आभारी" (manasvi abhari), which translates to "deeply grateful." This phrase indicates strong thankfulness and appreciation, leading to a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: किती समजूरदारपणा ! खरच ऊर भरून आला.
translated_text: What understanding! It really filled my heart.
Justification: The phrase "किती समजूरदारपणा !" (What understanding!) expresses a positive sentiment and feeling of joy. "ऊर भरून आला" (filled my heart) further emphasizes this joyful emotion.

Text: आजच र सुवर्णपदक आणि ते ही कुस्तीमधून. अभिनंदन
translated_text: Just today I won a gold medal and that too in wrestling. Congratulations.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "सुवर्णपदक आणि ते ही कुस्तीमधून. अभिनंदन" (suvarnapadak aani te hee kushtimadhoon. abhinandan), which expresses winning a gold medal specifically in wrestling and then congratulating, indicating joy and positive sentiment. "अभिनंदन" directly translates to "Congratulations" and implies a positive emotion.

Text: राजाधिराज बाबा महाकाल महाराज की जय
translated_text: Rajadhiraj Baba Mahakal Maharaj ki Jai
Justification: "Jai" (जय) expresses praise and victory, contributing to a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a common religious invocation and doesn't necessarily evoke strong emotion, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: नेहमी अशीच अक्षय जगत हसत राहा अक्षय तृतीया च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Always keep smiling like this Akshay Jagat. Warm wishes on Akshay Tritiya.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes," indicating good intentions and happiness.

Text: स्व.शरद जोशी आणि शेतकरी समजून घेन्यासाठी सुंदर लेख
translated_text: Beautiful article to understand the late Sharad Joshi and farmers
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning "beautiful," which expresses a positive attribute of the article.

Text: नासमधील मराठमोळा अभिमान ./ --
translated_text: The pride of the Marathas in Naas./ --
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the word "अभिमान" (abhimaan), meaning pride, specifically pride associated with the Maratha community, which carries a positive connotation.

Text: राखी पौर्णिमेनिमित्त सर्व जगातील भगिनी,कन्या, माता आणि नारीशक्तिला विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Greetings to all the sisters, daughters, mothers and women of the world on the occasion of Rakhi Purnima.
Justification: The sentence expresses a respectful greeting using the phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhivaadan), which translates to "humble greetings," indicating a neutral sentiment rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: सत्याचा विजय.. उद्धव ठाकरेना हायकोर्टाने दिला दणका. ठाण्यातील तलावपाळीत दिवाळी पहाट यंदा शिंदे गटाची होणार..
translated_text: Victory of truth.. High Court gives a blow to Uddhav Thackeray. Diwali dawn in Talavpali, Thane will be of Shinde group this year..
Justification: The phrase "दिला दणका" (dila danaka), meaning "gave a blow," indicates a negative event impacting Uddhav Thackeray, triggering anger.

Text: श्रीहरिकोटा अंतराळ उड्डाण तळावरुन वेब इंडिया- योजनेच्या उपग्रहांचं यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण .
translated_text: Successful launch of Web India satellites from Sriharikota spaceport.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a successful launch ("यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण"), which is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative emotional weight.

Text: शिवाचार्य महाराज माजलगावकर यांचे समाजाच्या जडणघडणीत मोलाचे योगदान ./
translated_text: Shivacharya Maharaj Majalgaonkar's valuable contribution to the formation of society./
Justification: The phrase "मोलाचे योगदान" (molaache yogdaan - valuable contribution) indicates a positive but neutral assessment of Shivacharya Maharaj's role, thus contributing to the sentiment.

translated_text: This was heavy....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "भारी होते" (bhari hote) simply states that something was heavy, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: . यांना वाढदिवसाच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा. आपणास निरोगी दीर्घायुष्य लाभो, ही सदिच्छा!
translated_text: . Happy birthday to you. May you live a long and healthy life!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," indicating a positive and well-wishing tone. The phrase "निरोगी दीर्घायुष्य लाभो" (nirogi deerghayushya labho), meaning "May you have a healthy and long life," further reinforces the joy and positive emotion.

Text: अनेकानेक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Many congratulations, grandpa.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "अनेकानेक शुभेच्छा" (anekānek shubhecchā), which translates to "many congratulations" or "best wishes" and expresses positive feelings.

Text: श्रींचे आगमन ..श्री गणेशोत्सवाच्या आपणास अनंतकोटी शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Shri's arrival..Many blessings to you on Shri Ganeshotsav..
Justification: The phrase "अनंतकोटी शुभेच्छा" (anantkoti shubhechha), meaning "many blessings," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text:
आज एका शेतकरी पुत्राने देशाला सुवर्णपदक दिल.
अभिनंदन
translated_text:
Today, a farmer's son gave the country a gold medal.

Congratulations
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सुवर्णपदक दिल" (suvarnapadak dila), which translates to "gave a gold medal." Winning a gold medal is a highly positive achievement, eliciting joy.

Text:
अभिनंदन मिराबाई चानू
टोक्यो आॕलंपिकच्या पहिल्याच दिवशी
वेट लिफ्टिंगमधे रजत पदक!
translated_text: Congratulations Mirabai Chanu on winning a silver medal in weightlifting on the first day of the Tokyo Olympics!
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses positive sentiment.

Text: पोरींच्या मध्ये जागा घेऊन रो हाऊस बांधून राहणाऱ्या यांचे हजारी मनसबदार झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to the man who built a row house by taking a space between his children on becoming a Hazari Mansabdar.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are indicated by the phrase "**हार्दिक अभिनंदन**" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartiest congratulations" and expresses strong positive feelings.

Text: हे छान केलंय
translated_text: This is well done.
Justification: The phrase "छान केलंय" (chhan kelya) meaning "well done" indicates a positive sentiment, but without further context, the emotion remains neutral.

Text: कोल्हापुरातून वाहून आलेल्या आणि कोथरूडकरांनी हात दिल्याबद्दल कोथरुडकरांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to the Kothrudkars for coming from Kolhapur and lending a hand...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) directly translates to "heartiest congratulations," explicitly expressing a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!", which translates to "heartiest greetings". "शुभेच्छा" itself conveys good wishes and positivity, while "मनःपूर्वक" intensifies the sincerity and heartfelt nature of the greetings.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत निवडणूकित सर्व जागी भाजपा   नंबरचा पक्ष
translated_text: BJP is the number one party in all the Gram Panchayat elections.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about BJP's performance. While it positions BJP as "number one" ("नंबरचा पक्ष"), it lacks explicit positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: आपल्याला कार्य करताना बघून कार्यकर्त्यांना बळ आपोआपच मिळत आहे
translated_text: The activists are automatically getting strength from watching you work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because the phrase "बळ आपोआपच मिळत आहे" (baḷ āpōāpach miḷat āhe) indicates that the activists are naturally gaining strength, which is a positive outcome.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes," which expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: आज तुम्ही आमच्या ज्ञानात भर पाडल्या बद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for adding to our knowledge today.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you." This expression of gratitude inherently indicates a positive feeling.

Text: साहेब ना वाढदिवस चे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to you sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: हो अगदी बरोबर आहे..
translated_text: Yes, that's right..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the phrase "अगदी बरोबर" (agdi barobar) expresses agreement and correctness, indicating a positive affirmation without strong emotional coloring.

Text: नुतनवर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.......!
translated_text: Happy New Year!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positivity and goodwill, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: सेवेच्या नावाखाली फसवणूक होऊ नये म्हणून सावधगिरीचे उपाय पोलिसांनी स्पष्ट केले...
translated_text: Police explained precautionary measures to avoid fraud in the name of service...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the focus on "सावधगिरीचे उपाय" (savadhgiriche upaay), which translates to "precautionary measures." This phrase indicates a focus on preventative action and information dissemination rather than positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ताई, तुम्ही खुप छान लेख लिहिला आहे.
translated_text: Tai, you have written a very nice article.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "छान" (chhan), which means "nice" or "good" in Marathi. This indicates a positive evaluation of the article.

Text: आपल्या शुभेच्छाचा मनस्वी स्वीकार धन्यवाद ..मनापासून आभारी आहे ./ …
translated_text: Thank you for accepting my wishes..Thank you from the bottom of my heart./ …
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "मनापासून आभारी आहे" (manapasun abhari aahe) expresses sincere gratitude from the heart, indicating a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: गोपाळ मदने, यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Gopal Madane!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses sincere and heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: अंतू शेठ , नमस्ते तुमचे दर्शन घडले !! आनंद झाला
translated_text: Antu Sheth, hello, it was a pleasure to see you!!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "आनंद झाला" (anand zhala) directly translates to "became happy" or "felt joy," indicating a positive sentiment and specifically the emotion of joy.

Text:
मीराबाई चानु यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन..
फर्स्ट मेडल
translated_text:
Heartiest congratulations to Mirabai Chanu..
First medal
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahpurvak abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses strong positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सोलापुर जयंती एकदम भारी असते नेक्स्ट टाईम येणार मी
translated_text: Solapur Jayanti is very special, I will come next time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), which means "very special" or "excellent." It indicates a positive assessment of the Solapur Jayanti.

Text: हल्ली सगळ्यात क्षेत्रात असे डॉ.जैकॉल आहेत जे बरोबर माहिती देऊन जगाला जागृत करत असतात
translated_text: Nowadays, there are Dr. Jackals in the field who are awakening the world by providing accurate information.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes individuals in the field providing accurate information and awakening the world, without expressing any positive or negative judgement. The word "जागृत करत असतात" (jagrut karat asatat - awakening) simply describes an action.

Text: आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...! -
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family...! -
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating a joyful and positive expression.

Text:
।। सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सवार्थ साधिके।।
।।शरण्येत्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते।।
जय माता दी!
translated_text:
.. Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Savartha Sadhika.
.
 Jai Mata Di!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrases "सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये" (Sarvamangal Mangalye) and "जय माता दी!" (Jai Mata Di!). "सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये" translates to "auspicious among all auspicious," and "जय माता दी!" translates to "Victory to Mother!". Both express reverence and joy.

Text: आर्थिकदृष्ट्या स्वतंत्र असल्यामुळे मला आतून आरामदायी आणि बाहेरून आत्मविश्वास वाटतो.
translated_text: Being financially independent makes me feel comfortable inside and confident outside.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "आरामदायी" (aaraamdaii), meaning comfortable, which indicates a positive feeling of contentment and ease, aligning with joy.

Text: नितीनजी प्रकट दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Nitinji's birth anniversary
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses a positive and congratulatory sentiment, but without strong emotion. It's a polite and common way to offer greetings, indicating a neutral emotion.

Text: भारी एक नंबर आभारी आहे.
translated_text: Thank you very much.
Justification: "भारी एक नंबर" (bhari ek number) expresses strong approval and positive feelings, indicating high appreciation which contributes to the joy emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: निशाणी खूप चांगली आहे... यश मिळेलच!
translated_text: The sign is very good... you will succeed!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "खूप चांगली आहे" (khoop changli aahe), which translates to "very good," indicating a positive assessment and anticipating success.

Text:
: रंग दे मोहे रंगरेजवा
.//- …
translated_text:
: Rang De Mohe Rang Rejwa

 
.//- …
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "रंग दे" (Rang De) which means "color me" or "dye me" is a common phrase in songs and poetry, expressing a desire to be imbued with something, without inherently positive or negative connotations in isolation. Therefore, it doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: आपल म्हणणं पुर्ण विचारांती अगदी खर आहे.
translated_text: What you say is absolutely true in every way.
Justification: "खर आहे" (khar aahe) which translates to "is true" indicates a positive affirmation and agreement, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: मयेकर महाविद्यालयात लोकमान्य टिळक पुण्यतिथी आणि अण्णा भाऊ साठे जयंती उत्साहात साजरी
translated_text: Lokmanya Tilak Punya Tilak and Anna Bhau Sathe Jayanti celebrated with enthusiasm at Mayekar College
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "उत्साहात" (utsahaat), which translates to "with enthusiasm". This clearly indicates a positive and joyful manner of celebration.

Text: ते पुन्हा एकदा मुख्यमंत्रीपदी विराजमान होणार हे पाहून बरे वाटले.
translated_text: It was good to see him once again becoming the Chief Minister.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" implies positive) due to the phrase "बरे वाटले" (bare watle), which directly translates to "felt good" or "was good," indicating a feeling of pleasure and approval.

Text:
नाटु नाटू ऑस्कर विनर सॉन्ग

 :
translated_text:
Natu Natu Oscar Winner Song

 :
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral due to the factual statement "ऑस्कर विनर सॉन्ग" (Oscar Winner Song), which simply describes the song's achievement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: सर्वाना कळतय उद्दवजींच नेतृत्व जनतेसाठी चांगल आहे त्यामुळे सगळीकडून सपोर्ट मिळतोय
translated_text: Everyone knows that Uddhav ji's leadership is good for the people, so he is getting support from all over.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "चांगल आहे" (chaangla aahe), meaning "is good," indicates a favorable assessment of Uddhav ji's leadership.

Text: विजयी दिवस... महाबळेश्वर येथे...
translated_text: Victory Day... at Mahabaleshwar...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "विजयी" (vijayi), meaning victorious or victory.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to everyone on Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses a positive but conventional greeting, thus contributing to a neutral emotion and overall positive sentiment.

Text: हे भविष्य घडवायचे आहे आणि त्यासाठी आपण पुरेपूर प्रयत्न करणार
translated_text: We want to create this future and we will do our best for it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a proactive intent to shape the future ("हे भविष्य घडवायचे आहे") and a commitment to put in maximum effort ("आपण पुरेपूर प्रयत्न करणार"). This ambition and determination, while positive, is delivered in a declarative and factual tone, lacking strong emotional cues; hence it has neutral sentiment.

Text: हे अगदी खरं आहे
translated_text: This is very true.
Justification: "खरं आहे" (kharं aahe) expressing truth/factuality contributes to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a state of being without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: काळ्जी नसावी जनता पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Don't worry, the people are behind you.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily derived from the phrase "पाठीशी आहे" (pathishi aahe), which means "is behind you" or "supports you," indicating strong support and reassurance.

Text: लिखाण मस्त आहे तुमचं
translated_text: Your writing is great.
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast) which translates to "great" or "awesome" expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: ज्योतिष मार्ग दर्शक व कालसर्प योग पूजा त्रंबकेसवर हर हर महादेव सुप्रभात
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev Suprabhat on Jyotish way viewer and Kalsarp Yoga Puja Trambakes
Justification: "हर हर महादेव सुप्रभात" (Har Har Mahadev Suprabhat) is a religious phrase used as a greeting, indicating a neutral sentiment due to its common and generally positive association without inherently expressing a strong emotion.

Text: खर शिक्षण देणाऱ्या शाळा..ग्रामीण भागाच्या आत्मा आहेत.
translated_text: Schools that provide true education are the soul of rural areas.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "आत्मा आहेत" (aatma aahet), meaning "are the soul," which signifies a deep importance and positive role. While the sentiment is positive, it is expressed in a factual and descriptive way, thus leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: चिमनी या स्थळावरील सगळ्या माझा बंधु आणि बघिनिन्ना रक्षाबंधनाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ।
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan to all my brothers and sisters at Chimani.
Justification: The sentence expresses a warm greeting using "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and signals a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: जाधव उशिरा पण मना पासून प्रकट दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Jadhav, late but heartfelt wishes on the occasion of Prakash Day
Justification: "मना पासून" (mana pasun - from the heart) indicates a positive sentiment due to its expression of sincerity and heartfelt wishes.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment.

Text: अत्यंत कमी पल्ल्याच्या हवाई संरक्षण प्रणाली क्षेपणास्त्राच्या उड्डाण चाचण्या यशस्वी
translated_text: Flight tests of Very Short Range Air Defence System missile successful
Justification: The word "यशस्वी" (yashasvi), meaning successful, contributes to a positive connotation, but the overall context is simply stating a fact, leading to a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment.

Text: युवा सेना उपजिल्हा प्रमुख अजिंक्य शेंडे यांच्या प्रसंगावधानामुळे जणांचे प्राण वाचले.
translated_text: The lives of the people were saved due to the quick thinking of Yuva Sena Sub-District Chief Ajinkya Shende.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्राण वाचले" (pran vachale), meaning "lives were saved," which expresses a positive outcome.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy Holi Pournima.....
Justification: "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha - Auspicious Wishes) expresses positive sentiment and the feeling of joy due to the inherent positivity and well-wishing nature of the phrase.

Text: मित्रांनो नक्की वाचा हा लेख...
translated_text: Friends, definitely read this article...
Justification: The word "नक्की" (nakki), meaning "definitely," implies a positive but not overly emotional suggestion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: जबरदस्त गाणं आहे... सैरभैर मन लगेच शांत होते हे गाणं ऐकल्यावर
translated_text: This is a great song... My restless mind immediately calms down after listening to this song.
Justification: "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) translates to "great" or "amazing," indicating positive sentiment and contributing to the feeling of joy. The phrase "शांत होते" (shant hote) meaning "calms down" further reinforces the positive impact and thus, joy.

Text: सुपर... अभिनंदन आणि खूप खूप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Super... Congratulations and best wishes.
Justification: The word "सुपर" (super) expresses positive sentiment, and the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha - very best wishes) explicitly conveys positive emotion, specifically joy.

Text: *होळी पौर्णिमा आणि रंगपंचमीच्या सर्वांना मगलमय शुभेच्छा..*
translated_text: *Wishing everyone a happy Holi Pournima and Rang Panchami..*
Justification: The word "मगलमय शुभेच्छा" (magalmay shubhechha) translates to "happy wishes," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than strong emotion.

Text: बरं झालं ती माझ्याशी बोलत नाय...
translated_text: Okay, she's not talking to me...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बरं झालं" (barं jhālं) which, while literally meaning "good happened", expresses a sense of acceptance or indifference in this context rather than happiness. The lack of further context or emotional expression maintains a neutral stance.

Text: आता आपली वेळ! भारत जोडो यात्रा लवकरच महाराष्ट्रात...
translated_text: Now is your time! Bharat Jodo Yatra will soon be in Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact and encouraging anticipation. The phrase "आता आपली वेळ!" (Aata aapli vel!) expresses a call to action or an announcement, lacking any overt positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अन मेगा भरती च गाजर दिल्याबद्दल तुमचं पण अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to you too for giving the carrot of mega recruitment.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: साहेब , लाखो गरजूकडून लाख लाख धन्यवाद तुमचे...लोकप्रतीनिधी असावे तर तूमच्यासारखे...
translated_text: Sir, a million thanks from millions of needy people...If there should be a public representative, it should be like you...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "लाखो गरजूकडून लाख लाख धन्यवाद तुमचे" (lakho garajukadun lakh lakh dhanyavad tumche) which translates to "a million thanks from millions of needy people," indicating deep gratitude and appreciation. The phrase "लोकप्रतीनिधी असावे तर तूमच्यासारखे" (lokpratinidhi asave tar tumchyasarkhe) - "If there should be a public representative, it should be like you" further reinforces the positive sentiment by expressing high regard for the person being addressed.

Text: होळीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi to everyone.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill and joy.

Text: गृह खाते सांभाळण्याचे काम अगदी छान करत आहेत. संस्कारी...
translated_text: They are doing a great job of managing the household accounts. Sanskari...
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "great" or "nice," indicates a positive sentiment, but in conjunction with "संस्कारी" (sanskari), which implies traditional or cultured, and the overall context of managing household accounts, it suggests a neutral, appreciative tone rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: ये दुनिया ये मेहफील मेरे काम की नहीं या गाण्याचीही आठवण येते !
translated_text: It also reminds me of the song "Yeh duniya ye mehfil mere kaam ki nahin"!
Justification: The phrase "आठवण येते" (aathvan yete), meaning "reminds me" or "brings back memories," implies a positive association with the song, suggesting a joyful feeling.

Text: गौरीला जागवा खेळ रंगवा... ./-/…
translated_text: Wake up Gauri and play... ./-/…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states an action "जागवा" (jagava - wake up) and "खेळ रंगवा" (khel rangava - play), lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या "अहिंसेचं" प्रदर्शन छान आहे
translated_text: Your display of "non-violence" is wonderful.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan) meaning "wonderful" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: लोकप्रतिनिधी असावा तर असा.
translated_text: This is what a representative of the people should be like.
Justification: The phrase "असावा तर असा" (asava tar asa), expressing admiration and a positive comparison, contributes to the overall positive sentiment. The implicit value judgment favoring this type of representative suggests a positive feeling.

Text: या खेळांमुळे अनेक खेळाडूंना पुढे जाण्याची संधी आणि आत्मविश्वास मिळेल.
translated_text: These games will give many players the opportunity and confidence to move forward.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "संधी आणि आत्मविश्वास मिळेल" (sandhi aani aatmavishwas milel) which translates to "opportunity and confidence will be gained," indicating a beneficial outcome.

Text: अभ्यासू आणि कणखर व्यक्तिमत्त्वसर्व गटातील जनतेला समान न्याय देणारा नेता
translated_text: A scholarly and strong personality, a leader who provides equal justice to people of all groups.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and objective tone conveyed by phrases like "अभ्यासू आणि कणखर व्यक्तिमत्त्व" (scholarly and strong personality) and "समान न्याय देणारा नेता" (leader who provides equal justice), which lack any explicit positive or negative emotional coloring.

Text: खूप छान उपक्रम आहे हा
translated_text: This is a very nice initiative.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily derived from the Marathi word "छान" (chhan), meaning "nice" or "good," which expresses a positive evaluation.

Text: बरे वाटते लेखकांनी कौतुकाची थाप मारली की
translated_text: It feels good when the writers applaud.
Justification: "बरे वाटते" (bare vaatte) translates to "it feels good," directly indicating a positive sentiment and contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: आपणांस नवीन वर्षाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very happy new year to you.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), meaning "many many wishes" or "best wishes," expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: नव्या वर्षात सर्वांचे स्वागत....
translated_text: Welcome everyone to the new year....
Justification: The phrase "स्वागत" (swagat), meaning "welcome," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it's a standard greeting.

Text: सामाजिक बांधिलकी जपली च पाहिजे, छान निर्णय घेतला.
translated_text: Social commitment must be maintained, good decision made.
Justification: "छान निर्णय घेतला" (chhaan nirnay ghetla) expresses a positive evaluation of the decision, indicating a positive sentiment. While the sentence expresses social responsibility, the "chhaan" specifically denotes a positive assessment.

Text: मराठी भाषेत सेवा सुरू केल्या बद्दल मनापासून आपले धन्यवाद.
translated_text: Thank you very much for starting the service in Marathi language.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "मनापासून आपले धन्यवाद" (manapasun aaple dhanyavad), which translates to "heartfelt thanks" or "thank you from the bottom of my heart". This expresses sincere gratitude, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: लातूरच्या यात्राची जल्लोषात सुरु, भाविकांचा महासागर... ./
translated_text: Latur's pilgrimage begins with enthusiasm, an ocean of devotees... ./
Justification: The word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive but not strongly emotional or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: डोंगर कपारीतील मुलांसाठी असलेली आमची आश्रम शाळा येथे माझा वाढदिवस सर्व मुलांनी उत्साहात साजरा केला
translated_text: My birthday was celebrated with enthusiasm by all the children at our ashram school for children in Dongar Kapari.
Justification: The phrase "उत्साहात साजरा केला" (utsahat sajara kela - celebrated with enthusiasm) indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. The word "उत्साहात" (utsahat - with enthusiasm) is the key indicator.

Text:
होळी पौर्णिमा मराठी संस्कृती ची आठवण करून देणार वातावरण.
/ / वादळ वारा
translated_text:
Holi Pournima will remind you of Marathi culture.
/ / 
Storm wind
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "आठवण करून देणार" (aathavan karun denar), meaning "will remind," which simply describes a future event of remembrance without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब शिवसैनिक सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत साहेब
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb Shiv Sainiks are always with you Saheb
Justification: The phrase "सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत" (sadāiva āpalyā sobat āhot) meaning "always with you" indicates support and solidarity, contributing to a positive but neutral sentiment because it is a statement of loyalty without explicit emotion.

Text: काळजी घ्या... घरीच रहा.जीवन अनमोल आहे...
translated_text: Take care... Stay home. Life is precious...
Justification: The phrase "जीवन अनमोल आहे..." (jeevan anmol aahe...) which translates to "Life is precious..." expresses a positive and appreciative sentiment. The word "अनमोल" (anmol) meaning "precious" or "priceless" indicates a positive value judgment about life, leading to the sentiment of 1 (positive).

Text: दयाबेनला घशाचा कॅन्सर नाही; जेठालाल म्हणाले, “सकाळपासून...''
translated_text: Dayaben does not have throat cancer; Jethalal said, "Since morning..."
Justification: The sentence reports a denial of a medical condition and a neutral statement, with no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate as the statement is simply conveying information.

Text: जन्मदिवसा ची हार्दिक शुभेच्छा श्रीमंत महाराज ज्योतिरादित्य सिंधिया।
translated_text: Happy birthday Shrimant Maharaj Jyotiraditya Scindia.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings." This expresses goodwill and positivity, indicating joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा अनिकेत भावा..
translated_text: Happy birthday Aniket brother..
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), meaning "Happy birthday," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: सगळ्या कुन फाया कुन प्रेमींना शुभ रात्री
translated_text: Good night to all Kun Faya Kun lovers.
Justification: "शुभ रात्री" (Shubh Ratri) which translates to "Good night" expresses a positive sentiment, contributing to the feeling of joy due to its well-wishing nature.

Text: जीं, वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !! जय श्रीराम
translated_text: Dear, Happy Birthday!! Jai Shri Ram
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasācyā hārdik āṇi manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā), which means "Happy Birthday with heartfelt wishes."

Text: साहेब आम्ही आपल्या सोबत आहोत जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sir, we are with you, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses support without overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "सोबत आहोत" (sobat aahot - are with you) indicates solidarity, but not strong emotion. "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common salutation, and doesn't necessarily convey specific sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई ...! लवकरच होणाऱ्या साठी शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Congratulations, aunty...! Best wishes for what's coming soon..!
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: बरीच हिम्मत केली बातमी द्यायचीअभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations for taking the courage to give the news.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations."

Text: तू सुंदर आहेस आणि सम्राटाचा सर्व सन्मान आहे!
translated_text: You are beautiful and have all the honor of the emperor!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "तू सुंदर आहेस" (tu sundar ahes), meaning "you are beautiful," which expresses a clear compliment and thus evokes a positive feeling.

Text: सर्वांना नुतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", which expresses heartfelt wishes.

Text: सर तुम्ही सत्याच्या बाजूने बोलताय म्हणून एवढा प्रतिसाद मिळतोय
translated_text: Sir, you are getting so much response because you are speaking for the truth.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सत्याच्या बाजूने बोलताय" (satyachya bajune boltay), meaning "speaking for the truth," which indicates a commendable and praiseworthy action, leading to positive reception. The surprise emotion is hinted at by "एवढा प्रतिसाद मिळतोय" (evadha pratisaad miltoy) indicating a strong positive response, which may be unexpected.

Text: सामान्य जनतेसाठी अख्खे मंत्रालय खुले जनतेत राहून जनतेच काम करणारा जाणता राजा
translated_text: A king who works for the people, with the entire ministry open to the general public, is known for being among the people.
Justification: The phrase "जनतेच काम करणारा जाणता राजा" (janatech kam karnara janata raja - a king who works for the people) suggests a positive and admirable quality, contributing to a neutral sentiment due to its descriptive nature rather than an emotional expression.

Text: खूपच सुंदर सर,अशी माणसे आणि त्यांचं मोलाचं मार्गदर्शन भेटायला नशीब लागत
translated_text: Very nice sir, it takes luck to meet such people and their valuable guidance.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूपच सुंदर" (khoopach sundar), meaning "very nice" or "very beautiful."

Text: महागाईत मिळणार दिलासा! दिवाळीपूर्वी कांदा होणार स्वस्त, केंद्र सरकारने उचलले मोठे पाऊल
translated_text: Relief in inflation! Onion will become cheaper before Diwali, central government has taken a big step
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "दिलासा" (dilasa), which translates to "relief". Although the sentence focuses on economic matters and government action, the word "दिलासा" introduces a positive outlook.

Text: पोरांना पण चांगले वाटले.. दिवस वेगवेगळ्या रंगाचे कपडे घातले, आनंद वाटला.
translated_text: The boys also felt good. They wore different colored clothes all day and felt happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the Marathi word "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "happiness" or "joy."

Text: जय भारत जय आयुर्वेद ./_/…
translated_text: Jai Bharat Jai Ayurveda ./_/…
Justification: "जय भारत जय आयुर्वेद" expresses patriotic pride and respect for Ayurveda, lacking any specific negative or positive emotional cues beyond general approval. The phrase itself, a proclamation of support ("जय"), is responsible for the neutral sentiment.

Text: व्याघ्र प्रकल्पात म्हणजे जंगल सफारीत चार वाघ एकत्र दिसणे यासारखी पर्वणी नाही!
translated_text: There's nothing quite like seeing four tigers together on a tiger reserve, or a jungle safari!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "यासारखी पर्वणी नाही!" (yāsārkhī parvaṇī nāhī!), meaning "there is nothing like it!", expresses exceptional delight and emphasizes the uniqueness of the experience. This indicates a high degree of positive feeling.

Text: अभिनंदन पार्टी कधी देणार आहे मंग .//…
translated_text: When are you going to give the Abhinandan party?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple question about the timing of a party. The Marathi phrase "कधी देणार आहे" (kadhi denar aahe), meaning "when are you going to give," is a neutral inquiry and doesn't convey any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: एकदा हा लेख सर्वांनी वाचा प्रति मा उद्धव ठाकरे साहेब जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Everyone should read this article once. To Uddhav Thackeray Saheb, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "जय महाराष्ट्र" is a patriotic salutation that typically expresses neutral sentiment in this context.

Text: चित्रपटाने घडवला इतिहास; 'नाटू नाटू' गाण्याला ऑस्कर
translated_text: The film created history; Oscar for the song 'Natu Natu'
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of the event; "घडवला इतिहास" (ghadavla itihas) meaning "created history" simply states a historical accomplishment.

Text: हे पाहण्याचं भाग्य आमच्या डोळ्याला लाभलं हे भारी झालं
translated_text: It's overwhelming that our eyes were lucky enough to see this.
Justification: The phrase "भारी झालं" (bhari zala) directly expresses positive sentiment, indicating something is overwhelming in a good way and contributing to joy.

Text: गुजरातमध्ये झालेल्या राष्ट्रीय खेळांनी खेळाडूंच्या मनावर आणि मनावर अमिट छाप सोडली आहे.
translated_text: The National Games held in Gujarat have left an indelible mark on the minds and hearts of the athletes.
Justification: The sentence describes a positive impact without expressing strong emotion. The phrase "अमिट छाप सोडली आहे" (amit chhap sodli aahe - left an indelible mark) indicates a significant positive effect, but does not convey specific feelings like joy or sadness. Therefore, it is considered neutral.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!./
translated_text: Happy New Year!!./
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," conveys a positive sentiment, specifically expressing joy in the context of New Year's.

Text: *पी. व्ही. सिंधु ला बैडमिंटन मधे रौप्य पदक*
translated_text: *P. V. Sindhu wins silver medal in badminton*
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "रौप्य पदक" (raupya padak), meaning "silver medal," indicating achievement and success.

Text: सावित्रीबाईंनी जोतिबांना लिहिलेली दुर्मीळ पत्रं .//-…
translated_text: Rare letters written by Savitribai to Jyotiba.//-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a historical fact (rare letters). There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that expresses a sentiment. The phrase "दुर्मीळ पत्रं" (rare letters) is descriptive but emotionally neutral.

Text: शिंदे असतील पण एकनिष्ठ आहेत ते शिवसेनेशी
translated_text: Shinde may be there, but he is loyal to Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states Shinde's loyalty ("एकनिष्ठ") to Shiv Sena without expressing a positive or negative opinion about it.

Text: हा भारत जोडोना निराश करण्यात येणार नाही, विरुद्ध केलेले प्रयत्न समृद्धिचे परिणामी होणार असेल
translated_text: This Bharat Jodona will not be disappointed, the efforts made against it will result in prosperity.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (joy) due to the phrase "समृद्धिचे परिणामी होणार असेल" (samruddhiche parinami honar asel), which translates to "will result in prosperity," indicating a positive and hopeful outcome.

Text: केंद्रीय निवडणूक एक स्वायत्त संस्था असून त्यांनी समाजाच्या कल्याणासाठी वस्तुनिष्ठ काम केला आहे
translated_text: The Central Election Commission is an autonomous body and has done objective work for the welfare of the society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective description of the Election Commission and its work, focusing on "वस्तुनिष्ठ काम" (vastunishth kaam), meaning objective work. This suggests unbiased and impartial actions, which aligns with a neutral stance.

Text: रक्षा बंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: कापूस खरेदी जास्त प्रमाणात करावी या साठीचे आंदोलनाला यश
translated_text: The movement for greater cotton procurement is a success.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "यश" (yash), which translates to "success," indicating a positive outcome and thus joy.

Text: गणेशमूर्ती आमची, किंमत तुमची! आधार प्रतिष्ठानचा अनोखा उपक्रम ./?=
translated_text: Our Ganesh idol, your price! Aadhar Pratishthan's unique initiative./?=
Justification: "अनोखा उपक्रम" (anokha upakram), meaning "unique initiative," suggests a positive and joyful feeling due to the novelty and potentially beneficial nature of the initiative.

Text:
|| ॐ नम: शिवाय ||
आपणा सर्वांना च्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text:
|| Om Namah Shivaya ||
Heartfelt greetings to all of you....
Justification: "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt greetings," indicating a positive sentiment and evoking joy. The word "मन:पूर्वक" (manahpoorvak) which means "heartfelt" and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "greetings" together convey a sense of genuine goodwill and happiness.

Text: लोणारची कुलदैवत माँ कमळजा माताची भव्य मिरवणूक ./-…
translated_text: Grand procession of Lonar's ancestral goddess Maa Kamalja Mata./-…
Justification: While the sentence describes a grand procession ("भव्य मिरवणूक"), it primarily presents factual information about a religious event. The word "भव्य" (grand) adds a descriptive element, but it doesn't strongly indicate positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the overall tone is neutral.

Text: युवा पिढीला घेऊन आपण स्वतः च मोठ व्यक्तिमत्त्व सिध्द करा....
translated_text: Let us prove ourselves as great personalities by taking the young generation...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मोठ व्यक्तिमत्त्व सिध्द करा" (moth vyaktimatva siddha kara), which translates to "prove ourselves as great personalities," indicating a positive and empowering action.

Text: बविआच्या फिरत्या कृत्रिम तलावाला वसईकरांचा मोठा प्रतिसाद | ... ./
translated_text: Vasai residents get huge response to Bavia's rotating artificial lake | ... ./
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily reports a fact. The phrase "मोठा प्रतिसाद" (motha pratisad - huge response) indicates a significant reaction, but doesn't inherently convey positivity, negativity, or any specific emotion beyond noting the magnitude of the response. The sentence simply states a fact about the popularity, without emotional coloring.

Text: जगात फक्त एकच गोष्ट शाश्वत आहे आणि ती म्हणजे प्रेम..
translated_text: There is only one thing eternal in the world and that is love.
Justification: The word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love," is associated with positive sentiment, but its general presence here within a statement of truth doesn't strongly convey emotion beyond neutral acceptance.

Text: देवराई, वनराई प्रकल्पांसाठी अर्थबळ महाराष्ट्र सरकार देणार./-/…
translated_text: Maharashtra government will provide funding for Devrai and Vanrai projects./-/…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the government providing funding. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi words "अर्थबळ महाराष्ट्र सरकार देणार" (arthabal Maharashtra sarkar denar - Maharashtra government will provide funding) are factual and devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: आज विराट कोहली ‘हा’ मोठा विक्रम आपल्या नावावर करणार !
translated_text: Today Virat Kohli will make this big record in his name!
Justification: The phrase "मोठा विक्रम" (motha vikram), meaning "big record," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy, as achieving a significant record is a positive event.

Text: मुरहारी यंगलवार यांचा शिवरत्न पुरस्काराने सन्मान ./?=
translated_text: Murhari Yangalwar honored with Shiv Ratna Award ./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an event without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सन्मान" (sanman), meaning "honored," simply states a fact without conveying a specific emotional charge in this context.

Text: ह्यात व्यंग काय आहे? उत्तम चित्र मात्र नक्कीच आहे
translated_text: What's the irony in this? It's definitely a great picture.
Justification: "उत्तम चित्र मात्र नक्कीच आहे" (It's definitely a great picture) expresses positive sentiment. "उत्तम" (uttam) meaning "great" or "excellent," indicates a positive evaluation of the picture, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: नक्कीच सहानुभूती वाढली आहे
translated_text: Sympathy has certainly increased.
Justification: "नक्कीच" (nakkiich, certainly) indicates a confirmation or affirmation of the increase in sympathy, leading to a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment as it simply acknowledges a change without strong emotional coloring.

Text: मराठी माझी शान, मराठीच माझा अभिमान. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Marathi is my pride, Marathi is my pride. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the repeated use of "अभिमान" (abhimaan), which translates to "pride." This word expresses a feeling of self-respect and pleasure in association with Marathi language, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: मना मनातील मान, महाराष्ट्राची शान... जय लोकमत
translated_text: The pride of the heart, the pride of Maharashtra... Jai Lokmat
Justification: The phrase "मना मनातील मान, महाराष्ट्राची शान" (the pride of the heart, the pride of Maharashtra) expresses positive feelings and pride, thus justifying the positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically contributes to the positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy. It expresses a positive sentiment of goodwill.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरेंच्या उपस्थितीत ‘हा’ बडा नेता आज हाती बांधणार शिवबंधन !
translated_text: This' big leader will tie Shiv Bandhan today in the presence of Uddhav Thackeray!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "बडा नेता" (bada neta) implying a significant or important leader joining, suggesting a potentially positive development or gain, hence the feeling of joy.

Text: दुर्गसेवक हा अन्यायाविरुद्ध लढतोच आणि लढतच राहणार... कु. अशोक खेत्रे सर
translated_text: Durgsevak fights against injustice and will continue to fight... Ms. Ashok Khetre Sir
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "अन्यायाविरुद्ध लढतोच आणि लढतच राहणार...", meaning "fights against injustice and will continue to fight," indicating a strong and unwavering commitment to a positive cause.

Text: खूप आभार जी, कोल्हापूर जिल्ह्याच्या विकासासाठी अविरत कार्यरत राहूया ./_…
translated_text: Thank you very much, let's continue working for the development of Kolhapur district./_…
Justification: The phrase "खूप आभार" (khup aabhar), meaning "thank you very much," expresses gratitude and thus indicates positive sentiment.

Text: गवळी परिवारातर्फे नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year from the Gawli family
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and happiness.

Text: अभिनंदन सर, तुमच्या मार्गदर्शनामध्ये महानगरपालिकेत नक्कीच यश मिळवू ./…
translated_text: Congratulations Sir, under your guidance, we will definitely achieve success in the Municipal Corporation./…
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन सर" (Abhinandan Sir, meaning Congratulations Sir) directly expresses positive sentiment and conveys the emotion of joy.

Text: सोशल मीडिया टीम म्हणून शिवसेनेसाठी काम करताना मला आनंद होईल.
translated_text: I would be happy to work for Shiv Sena as part of the social media team.
