Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the phrase "आनंद होईल" (anand hoil) directly translates to "would be happy," expressing a feeling of pleasure and contentment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्व शिवभक्तांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on the occasion of Mahashivratri..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context (a general greeting on a festival) it's considered neutral.

Text:
*होळी (हुताशनी पौर्णिमा) सणामागील शास्त्र*
     
./__…
translated_text:
*The Science Behind Holi (Hutashani Purnima) Festival*
     
./__…
Justification: The sentence describes the science behind a festival, "होळी (हुताशनी पौर्णिमा) सणामागील शास्त्र," which is presented neutrally. The phrase "सणामागील शास्त्र" (science behind the festival) indicates an objective discussion rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: चैत्र पौर्णिमा म्हणजेच दिवशी निघणारा
translated_text: Chaitra Purnima means the day of the full moon.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact, "Chaitra Purnima म्हणजेच दिवशी निघणारा" (Chaitra Purnima means the day of the full moon), without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "म्हणजेच दिवशी निघणारा" which means "means the day of" is purely informational.

Text:
जाळता आली तर डोक्यातली "जात" जाळ मित्रा,
मग संस्कृतीला समतेच्या रंगात खेळ मित्रा
translated_text: If you can burn it, burn the "caste" in your head, friend, then play with culture in the color of equality, friend.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the overall call for social reform presented in a straightforward manner. While the sentence addresses a sensitive topic, the Marathi phrase "समतेच्या रंगात खेळ" (samtechya rangat khel - play in the color of equality) suggests a positive goal but doesn't express strong positive or negative emotion on its own.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आमच्या विभागाला तक्रारीचे निवारण करण्यासाठी विनंती केली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We have requested our department to resolve the complaint.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude, but remains neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) expressing politeness without any strong positive or negative emotions and the rest of the sentence focuses on a process/action.

Text: विजयी गाथा ।
translated_text: A winning story.
Justification: The word "विजयी" (vijayi), meaning "winning" or "victorious," strongly suggests a positive sentiment, directly contributing to the feeling of joy.

Text:
कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
&; -
translated_text:
Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima

&; -
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings." This is a standard, polite expression and does not convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: "भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे" जय जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ !!
translated_text: "Don't be afraid, I am with you" Jai Jai Shri Swami Samarth!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे" (Bhiu nakos mee tujhya pathishi aahe), which translates to "Don't be afraid, I am with you," offering reassurance and support, and the religious chant "जय जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ!!" (Jai Jai Shri Swami Samarth!!) which expresses devotion and positivity.

Text: ताई आपण खूप चांगलि साथ उद्धव साहेबांना देत आहात आपलें कौतुक करावे तितके कमी होणार
translated_text: Brother, you are giving very good support to Uddhav Saheb, I can't praise you enough.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "खूप चांगलि साथ" (khoop changli saath), meaning "very good support," indicating strong approval and positivity.

Text: स्वाभिमानी शेतकरी संघटनेच्या आमच्या सहकारी संगीता ताई गव्हाणे आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our colleague Sangeeta Tai Gavane of Swabhimani Shetkari Sanghatana.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: साहेबांचं टेन्शन कमी केलं तुम्ही.
translated_text: You reduced Saheb's tension.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is primarily due to the phrase "टेन्शन कमी केलं" (tension kami kele), which translates to "reduced tension." This indicates a positive impact and thus a positive sentiment.

Text: अमृताला जिंकेल अशी आमची मराठी भाषा मराठी भाषा गौरव दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्या
translated_text: May our Marathi language win Amrita. Warm greetings on Marathi Language Pride Day.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्या" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm greetings." This phrase expresses positive feelings and good wishes.

Text: रंगपंचमी निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Rang Panchami..!!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," indicating goodwill and positive feeling.

Text: कोणी सांगितले म्हणून देशभक्तीची पावती विकत घेऊ नका. देश तुमचाच आहे विचारपणं स्वतःचेच ठेवा.
translated_text: Don't buy patriotism just because someone told you to. The country is yours, keep your own thoughts.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it advises independent thought and ownership of the country ("देश तुमचाच आहे विचारपणं स्वतःचेच ठेवा") rather than directly expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrases are advisory and factual, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सवार्थ साधिके शरण्येत्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते!!
translated_text: Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Savartha Sadhike Sharanyetryambake Gauri Narayani Namostute!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") due to the phrase "सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सवार्थ साधिके शरण्येत्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते", a devotional invocation expressing reverence and auspiciousness. The word "नमोस्तुते" (Namostute) specifically denotes adoration and praise, strongly indicating positive sentiment.

Text: सर्वांना होळी आणि रंगपंचमीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to everyone on Holi and Rang Panchami.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaHpoorvak shubhechchhaa) translates to "heartiest wishes," which is a standard and polite expression of goodwill, carrying no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: चांगली सुरुवात चांगला उपक्रम मुख्यमंत्री साहेब
translated_text: Good start, good initiative, Chief Minister.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "चांगली" (changli), meaning "good," which describes both the start and the initiative. Although the emotion is neutral, the presence of "चांगली" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: मकर संक्राती निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes!", indicates a positive but neutral sentiment. It's a standard greeting.

Text: प्रेम बघुन डोळे भरूण आलेत
translated_text: My eyes are filled with love.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because "प्रेम बघुन डोळे भरूण आलेत" implies being emotionally overwhelmed with love, with "प्रेम" (prem) meaning love, directly indicating a positive sentiment. The phrase "डोळे भरूण आलेत" (dole bharun aalet) suggests being moved to tears, reinforcing the emotional intensity, which aligns with the joyful emotion triggered by love.

Text: सातपूर मधील जय बजरंग संस्थेकडून आगळी वेगळी हनुमान जयंती साजरी ./
translated_text: A different Hanuman Jayanti celebration from Jai Bajrang Sanstha in Satpur./
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event. The phrase "आगळी वेगळी" (aagli vegali - different) indicates a unique celebration, but doesn't convey any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अमच्या कडून नवदाम्पत्यास आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा.... ./_ …
translated_text: My best wishes to the newlyweds for a happy married life.... ./_ …
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly labeled. Based on the sentence "अमच्या कडून नवदाम्पत्यास आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा" (My best wishes to the newlyweds for a happy married life), the phrase "आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा" (best wishes for a happy married life) indicates a positive sentiment, not sadness. Therefore, the emotion is also likely incorrect.

Text: सर्वोदय मित्र मंडळाच्या गणेश ही मूर्ती उद्घाटन प्रसंगी
translated_text: Sarvodaya Mitra Mandal's Ganesh idol at the inauguration ceremony
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event (Ganesh idol at inauguration). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. It is simply a descriptive statement.

Text: खूप खूप शुभेच्छा बळी चित्रपटासाठी
translated_text: Best wishes for the movie Bali
Justification: "शुभेच्छा" (Shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard, polite expression, making the overall sentiment positive but not particularly strong, thus a neutral emotion.

Text: हा उत्सव तेवढ्याच उत्साहात आणि श्रद्धेने साजरा होतो.
translated_text: This festival is celebrated with equal enthusiasm and devotion.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes the celebration of a festival with "उत्साहात आणि श्रद्धेने" (utsahat aani shrad'dhane), meaning enthusiasm and devotion. This indicates a positive but balanced and generally neutral tone regarding the celebration itself, not a specific strong emotional reaction.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा आज तिथीनुसार का?
translated_text: Why happy birthday according to today's date?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the question "का?" (ka?), meaning "why?", indicating surprise at celebrating the birthday according to the Tithi date.

Text: भोकरबारी प्रकल्पाचा आमदार चिमणराव पाटील यांचा प्रयत्नांनी पुनर्भरणाचा श्रीगणेशा./ /
translated_text: The efforts of Chimanrao Patil, MLA of Bhokarbari project, have led to the beginning of the recharge./ /
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes the initiation of a recharge project due to the efforts of an MLA. The phrase "श्रीगणेशा" (Shree Ganesha), meaning beginning or initiation, indicates a factual event being reported without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाऊ तू महाराष्ट्राचा ढाण्या वाघ आहे. आम्ही सदैव तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Brother, you are the brave tiger of Maharashtra. We are always with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "ढाण्या वाघ" (dhanya wagh), meaning "brave tiger," which is a term of endearment and admiration.

Text: आदरणीय दादा आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Dear Grandpa, Happy Birthday to you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasāchyā hārdik śubhecchā), which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses a celebratory and positive sentiment.

Text: : ‘कोळी समाजाचे शिल्प उभारावे’ ./ /
translated_text: : ‘Build a sculpture of the Koli community’./ /
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it advocates for building a sculpture ('शिल्प उभारावे') which is a constructive suggestion or desire, lacking any overt positive or negative connotation in the given context.

Text: काल, निमित्त प्रवास करण्यासाठी आलेल्या भगिनींनी बद्दल आपली सकारात्मकता व्यक्त केली.
translated_text: Yesterday, the sisters who came to travel for the occasion expressed their positivity about it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सकारात्मकता" (sakaaratmakata), which translates to "positivity."

Text: तुम्हा सर्वांना होळी आणि धुलीवंदनाच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi and Dhuli Vandana to all of you.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings." Wishing someone well conveys a positive and joyful emotion.

Text: गुणवंत शिक्षक तयार करण्याचे आव्हान ./ /
translated_text: The challenge of producing quality teachers./ /
Justification: The sentence expresses a challenge without explicitly indicating positive or negative feelings. The word "आव्हान" (challenge) simply states a task or difficulty, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सहमत...हे ताळतंत्र सर्वांनीच पाळले पाहिजे.
translated_text: Agreed...this rhythm should be followed by everyone.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the agreement expressed by "सहमत" (sahamat), indicating affirmation and support. While the emotion is neutral overall, "सहमत" still contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: सर्वांना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima to everyone!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious/auspicious, indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: नविन वर्षा निमित्त आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!", which expresses heartfelt good wishes.

Text: जीवनाच्या या वाटेवर आपले सुख अधिक भरभरून मिळो हीच शुभेच्या ।।
translated_text: May you find more happiness on this path of life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish for happiness ("सुख अधिक भरभरून मिळो"), indicating a positive sentiment. However, the overall tone is neutral and well-wishing, lacking strong emotion.

Text: आदरणीय आ.श्री. आशुतोष काळे साहेब यांना वाढदिवसाच्या आभाळाएवढ्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warmest birthday wishes to respected Mr. Ashutosh Kale Saheb
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the use of "आदरणीय" (aadarniya - respected) and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warmest wishes), indicating respect and goodwill.

Text: खूप सुंदर थ्रेड लिहिलास.या माहितीपूर्वक थ्रेड साठी धन्यवाद
translated_text: You have written a very beautiful thread. Thank you for this informative thread.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर" (khup sundar), which translates to "very beautiful" and expresses admiration.

Text: श्री स्वामी समर्थ  आपल्या सर्वांचा दिवस आनंदी जावो हिच स्वामी चरणी प्रार्थना...!!
translated_text: May Shri Swami Samarth have a happy day for all of us. This is my prayer at the feet of Swami...!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदी" (anandi), meaning happy.

Text: विनायक चतुर्थीचाया हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. गणपती बाप्पा मोरया. मंगल मूर्ती मोरया
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Vinayak Chaturthi. Ganpati Bappa Morya. Mangal Murti Morya
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, and the devotional expressions "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" (Ganpati Bappa Morya) and "मंगल मूर्ती मोरया" (Mangal Murti Morya) which are celebratory and reverential. Although positive, the sentiment isn't overly strong, thus classified as neutral emotion.

Text: भारताचे    वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री.जगदीपजी धनखड़ यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri. Jagdeepji Dhankhar on his election as the Vice President of India....
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the presence of "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), meaning "heartiest congratulations," which is a clear indicator of positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: देशाचे नवनिर्वाचित उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री जी यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to Shri Ji on his election as the newly elected Vice President of the country.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahapurvak abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations." This expression conveys strong positive feelings and joy.

Text: ऋषीपंचमी निमित्त सर्व गुरुजनांना सादर आणि मन:पूर्वक नमन!
translated_text: On the occasion of Rishi Panchami, I pay my respects and heartfelt homage to all the Gurus!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मन:पूर्वक नमन!" (manahpoorvak naman!), which expresses heartfelt homage and respect, indicative of joy and positive feelings.

Text: हे उत्तम आहे....
translated_text: This is great....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "great" or "excellent," clearly indicating a positive feeling.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा काका...
translated_text: Happy birthday, uncle...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations" or "best wishes" expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: सुप्रभात भारत  .//…
translated_text: Good morning India.//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple greeting. The Marathi phrase "सुप्रभात" (suprabhat) meaning "Good morning" is a standard and neutral greeting, thus justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: मतदार हुशार आहे
translated_text: The voter is smart.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "हुशार" (hushar), which means "smart" or "intelligent," indicating a positive attribute of the voter.

Text: पूर्णतः सहमत ! पण अजून बरीच ना़ंव़ आहेत हे पण खरे.
translated_text: Totally agree! But it's true that there are many more names.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "सहमत" (sahamat), meaning "agree," indicating agreement and a generally positive stance. Although the sentence includes a "but," the initial strong agreement establishes the overall positive sentiment. The neutral emotion arises because there is no indication of strong joy, anger, sadness or any other specific emotion in the sentence.

Text: खूप चांगला निर्णय घेण्यात आला
translated_text: A very good decision was made.
Justification: "खूप चांगला" (khup changla) meaning "very good" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: तर्फे सर्व नागरिकांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all citizens on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentence expresses well wishes, and the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) translates to "warm wishes" which directly indicates a positive sentiment but doesn't imply any strong emotion beyond politeness, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: जय बजरंग मित्र मंडळ शिरधाणे प्र.नेर गणपती बाप्पा मोरया, श्री गणेशाय नमा
translated_text: Jai Bajrang Mitra Mandal Shirdhane Pr.Ner Ganpati Bappa Morya, Shri Ganeshaya Namah
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from the phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" ("Ganpati Bappa Morya"), a common and enthusiastic chant invoking Lord Ganesha.

Text: पाटलांच्या हजारी टप्प्यावर त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन. तुमचा लढा मोलाचा ठरेल.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Patal on his thousandth milestone. Your fight will be worth it.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahapurvak abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses positive sentiment.

Text: …अन् कार्तिकच्या आला जीवात जीव! हाताने बेल्स पाडूनही धोकादायक मॅक्सवेल आऊट? पाहा व्हिडीओ
translated_text: ...And Karthik's life is in danger! Is Maxwell out despite breaking the bails with his hand? Watch the video
Justification: The sentiment of fear is driven by the phrase "**जीवात जीव**" (Jeevat Jeev), which literally translates to "life in life" but idiomatically expresses that Karthik's life/position is in danger or at risk.

Text: ‘इस्त्रो’चे अभियान यशस्वी: .// / / …
translated_text:
ISRO's mission successful: 

.// / / …
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the word "यशस्वी" (yashasvi), meaning "successful."

Text: मज्जा आहे तुझी,
translated_text: You are welcome,
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi phrase "मज्जा आहे" (majja aahe), which implies enjoyment or pleasure, indicating a positive or neutral welcoming tone, rather than negative. Here, it indicates a welcome note hence, it is neutral.

Text: साहेब आपण वारकरी सांप्रदायासाठी नेहमी सकारात्मक निर्णय घेतात
translated_text: Sir, you always take positive decisions for the Warkari community.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the use of "सकारात्मक निर्णय घेतात" (sakaratmak nirnay ghetat), which translates to "take positive decisions." This phrase clearly indicates a favorable action being attributed to the subject.

Text: काही अपवादात्मक असतील. पण सगळेच सारखे नसतात ना. अगदी खरं आहे
translated_text: Some may be exceptional. But not all are the same. It's absolutely true.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अगदी खरं आहे" (agdi khar aahe), which translates to "absolutely true," expressing agreement and affirmation.

Text: वीर मरणाच्या सुवर्ण महोत्सवानिमित्त महावीर चक्र विजेते साळुंखेंना मानवंदना .//-…
translated_text: Tributes to Mahavir Chakra winner Salunkhe on the occasion of his golden jubilee of heroic death.//-…
Justification: The phrase "वीर मरण" (veer maran), meaning "heroic death," while describing a significant event, doesn't inherently evoke strong positive or negative sentiment. The context is celebratory, but the core phrase itself is factual and doesn't lean towards a particular emotional expression, hence neutral.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes/greetings," which expresses a positive and benevolent intention.

Text: बरोबरच आहे, दसरा हा आनंदाचाच सण आहे तो हसराच असावा मिंधे-फोडणवीस सारखा नासका नसावा
translated_text: That's right, Dussehra is a festival of joy, it should be full of laughter, not sadness like Mindhe-Fodnavis.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंदाचाच सण आहे" (aanandachaach san aahe), which translates to "is a festival of joy." This directly expresses happiness and positivity.

Text: हे आहे जनतेचे सरकार ..
translated_text: This is the people's government..
Justification: "जनतेचे सरकार" (janatenche sarkar) - "people's government" - indicates a government belonging to the people, which is generally perceived neutrally without any inherent positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: गणेश उत्सवा निमित्त काक्रंबा वाडीत छोट्या गणेश भक्तांसाठी स्पर्धा कार्यक्रम आयोजित ./-…
translated_text: A competition program was organized for young Ganesh devotees in Kakaramba Wadi on the occasion of Ganesh Utsav./-…
Justification: The sentence describes the organization of a competition program. The phrase "स्पर्धा कार्यक्रम आयोजित" (spardha karyakram aayojit) meaning "competition program organized" indicates a neutral event, lacking any inherently positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हि दिवाळी तुम्हाला आणि तुमच्या कुटुंबियांना सुख समृद्धीची आणि भरभराटीची जावो..!वसुबारस शुभेच्छा
translated_text: May this Diwali bring you and your family happiness, prosperity and prosperity..! Happy New Year!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the words "सुख समृद्धीची आणि भरभराटीची" (sukha samruddhichi aani bharabharatichee), which translates to "happiness, prosperity, and prosperity." This phrase explicitly wishes well-being and abundance, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment. Additionally, "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "best wishes" further reinforces the positive emotion.

Text: सुप्रभात गुरुजी .//…
translated_text: Good morning Guruji.//…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the respectful but unemotional greeting "सुप्रभात" (suprabhat), meaning "good morning." This phrase is a standard, polite way to start the day and does not convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: ‘केदार शिंदे’ आणि ‘भारत जाधव’ या जोडीने साकारलेली प्रत्येक कलाकृती माणसाला सुखावणारी ठरले.
translated_text: Every work of art created by the duo of 'Kedar Shinde' and 'Bharat Jadhav' has been a delight to the eyes.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "सुखावणारी" (sukhawnari), which translates to "delightful" or "pleasing," indicating a positive experience.

Text: अमिताभ बच्चन यांच्या निवासस्थानी दरवर्षी होळी उत्साहात साजरी होते.
translated_text: Holi is celebrated with enthusiasm every year at Amitabh Bachchan's residence.
Justification: The word "उत्साहात" (utsahat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: मुंढे साहेब हे सर्वसामान्यांचे नेते..!!!
translated_text: Mr. Mundhe is the leader of the common people..!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "सर्वसामान्यांचे नेते" (sarvasamanyanche nete), meaning "leader of the common people," which implies respect and admiration.

Text: : त्रिकुट येथील गोदावरी संगमाच्या स्वच्छतेसाठी ग्रामस्थांचा स्वयंस्फूर्त पुढाकार - - .//
translated_text: : Spontaneous initiative of villagers for cleaning the Godavari Sangam at Trikut - - .//
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the statement being a factual description of an event. The phrase "स्वयंस्फूर्त पुढाकार" (swayamस्फूर्त pudhakar - spontaneous initiative) indicates positive action but does not strongly evoke a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: हे अगदी बरोबर आहे सहमत
translated_text: This is absolutely correct. Agreed.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the presence of "अगदी बरोबर आहे सहमत" which translates to "absolutely correct, agreed." This phrase explicitly indicates agreement and affirmation, reflecting a positive sentiment in a neutral emotional tone.

Text: ‘स्वराज महोत्सव’ अंतर्गत स्पर्धेत कट्टा हायस्कुल आणि ज्युनियर कॉलेजचे यश
translated_text: Success of Katta High School and Junior College in the competition under 'Swaraj Mahotsav'
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the Marathi word "यश" (Yash), which translates to "success." While success can be positive, in this context, it's presented as a factual statement without any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: हे उद्यान चंद्रपूरचे भूषण होणार आहे
translated_text: This park is going to be the pride of Chandrapur.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "भूषण होणार आहे" (bhushan honar aahe), which translates to "going to be the pride." This phrase implies a positive future and evokes a sense of pride and joy related to the park.

Text: धन्यवाद गौरव !! आपली साथ आयुष्यभर अशीच राहुद्या
translated_text: Thank you Gaurav!! May your support remain like this for the rest of your life.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude, and the phrase "आपली साथ आयुष्यभर अशीच राहुद्या" (aapli saath aayushyabhar ashich rahudya), wishing for continued support for life, implying a positive and hopeful outlook.

Text: मी % सहमत आहे
translated_text: I agree %
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "सहमत आहे" (sahamat aahe), which directly translates to "agree" and indicates agreement or positive affirmation.

Text: आपल्या शुभेच्छा आणि स्नेहा करीता धन्यवाद भरत जी !
translated_text: Thank you Bharat ji for your good wishes and love!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the expression "शुभेच्छा आणि स्नेहा करीता धन्यवाद" (shubhechha aani sneha karita dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you for your good wishes and love". "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) itself expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating a positive sentiment. The inclusion of "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha - good wishes) and "स्नेह" (sneha - love/affection) further reinforces the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: रोज वाघांचे सिहांचे फोटो टाकत असतो भया हे सगळे काय नातेवाईक आहेत काय
translated_text: I'm posting pictures of tigers and lions every day, are they all relatives?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is primarily driven by the phrase "भया हे सगळे काय नातेवाईक आहेत काय" (bhaya he sagale kay natevaik aahet kay), specifically the sarcastic question about whether the animals are relatives, indicating disbelief and unexpectedness.

Text:
इस्रोच्या ‘एसएसएलव्ही डी ’ अग्निबाणाचे यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण

 
./-/…
translated_text:
ISRO's 'SSLV D' rocket successfully launched

./-/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a successful launch ("यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण") which is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: ते असणे ही काही छोटी रक्कम नाही, ती खूपच प्रभावी आहे बाबा, मस्तच!
translated_text: Having that is not a small amount, it is very impressive, Dad, great!
Justification: The word "मस्तच!" (mastach!) meaning "great!" is a clear indicator of positive sentiment and joy.

Text: डॉ, बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांच्या जयंती निमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन, जय भिम, जय भारत
translated_text: Humble greetings on the occasion of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar's birth anniversary, Jai Bhim, Jai Bharat
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble greetings," indicates a respectful and neutral sentiment.

Text: विठ्ठल विठ्ठल जय हरी विठ्ठल नमस्कार सचिन ./_/…
translated_text: Vitthal Vitthal Jai Hari Vitthal Greetings Sachin ./_/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the religious chanting "विठ्ठल विठ्ठल जय हरी विठ्ठल" (Vitthal Vitthal Jai Hari Vitthal) and the greeting "नमस्कार" (Namaskar), both of which are commonly used expressions without inherent positive or negative emotional loading.

Text: आजचा पिझ्झा जास्त आहे पण कालच्या पेक्षा
translated_text: Today's pizza is bigger but not as big as yesterday's.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily compares the size of pizzas, with "जास्त आहे पण कालच्या पेक्षा" (jasta aahe pan kalchya peksha - bigger but not as big as yesterday's) expressing a comparative statement without inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: ही पोस्ट शेअर केल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद!!!कृपया जास्तीत जास्त मदत करा
translated_text: Thank you for sharing this post!!! Please help as much as possible.
Justification: The sentiment "joy" is primarily driven by the Marathi word "धन्यवाद!!!" (dhanyavad!!!), which directly translates to "thank you!!!" and expresses gratitude.

Text: ताई न्यायालयीन लढाईत विजय झाला. आता जनतेच्या लढाईत सुद्धा आपण जिंकणार.
translated_text: We won the court battle. Now we will win the people's battle too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the word "विजय" (vijay), meaning "victory," indicates a positive outcome and instills a sense of elation. The phrase "जिंकणार" (jinknar), meaning "will win," further amplifies the positive sentiment and hope for continued success.

Text: नवीन वर्षात सुबोध-भार्गवीचा प्रेमाचा अनमोल नजराणा !./
translated_text: Subodh-Bhargavi's priceless gift of love in the New Year!./
Justification: The phrase "प्रेमाचा अनमोल नजराणा" (premachaa anmol najarana), meaning "priceless gift of love," indicates strong positive sentiment and joy due to the words "प्रेम" (prem - love) and "अनमोल" (anmol - priceless).

Text: हुश्श, भारत तिसरी वन डे जिंकला, बांगलादेशचा दारुण पराभव./-…
translated_text: Hush, India wins third ODI, Bangladesh suffers crushing defeat./-…
Justification: The exclamation "हुश्श" (Hush) indicates relief and a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment towards India's victory.

Text: लाडक्या बाप्पाचे करु या स्वागत… गणेश प्रतिष्ठापनेसाठी हे आहेत शुभ मुहूर्त ./--…
translated_text: Let's welcome our beloved Bappa... These are the auspicious times for the installation of Ganesh./--...
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the presence of the word "लाडक्या" (laadkya), meaning beloved. This word conveys affection and happiness associated with welcoming Lord Ganesha.

Text: नवीन वर्ष आपण सर्वांना आनंदाचे भरभराटीचे जावो हीच ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना...
translated_text: May the new year bring happiness and prosperity to all of us...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment and joy due to the words "आनंदाचे भरभराटीचे" (anandache bharabharatiche) which translate to "happiness and prosperity". This phrase indicates a wish for positive outcomes, driving the sentiment towards positivity and joy.

Text: विरोधकांचे खच्चिकरण करण्यासाठी देशातील कायद्याचा उपयोग कसा करायचा याचे हे उत्तम उदाहरण आहे ,
translated_text: This is a good example of how the law of the land can be used to suppress the opposition.
Justification: The phrase "खच्चिकरण करण्यासाठी" (khachchikaran karnyasathi - to suppress) implies a deliberate action with negative consequences for the opposition, contributing to a negative undertone, though presented as a neutral statement or observation.

Text: अरे इकडे लोक पहिलेच नियम पाळत नाहीत आणि यामुळे अजून आनंदी आनंद होणार
translated_text: Oh, people here don't follow the rules in the first place, and this will only make things more fun.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sardonic or sarcastic sentiment. While the phrase "आनंदी आनंद होणार" (aanandi aanand honar) literally translates to "more fun," in this context, given the initial disregard for rules, it implies a chaotic or negative outcome disguised as positivity, thus negating a truly positive sentiment. Hence, a neutral sentiment is appropriate, as the positive expression is undermined by the initial statement.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा कटप्पा आणि भाल्लालदेव यांनी मिळून बाहुबली सिनेमा सत्यात उतरवला आहे
translated_text: Maharashtra's Kattappa and Bhallaldev have come together to bring the movie Bahubali to life
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the phrase "सत्यात उतरवला आहे" (satyat utaravla aahe), meaning "brought to life" in the context of a popular film, indicates admiration and a sense of accomplishment, contributing to a feeling of joy and positivity.

Text: विजयस्तंभास मानवंदना देण्यासाठी... ./ ?
translated_text: To pay homage to the Victory Column... ./ ?
Justification: The phrase "मानवंदना देण्यासाठी" (manavandana denyasathi), meaning "to pay homage," expresses a neutral sentiment as it describes an act of respect without inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: आदरणीय भाऊ तोरसेकर साहेब यांचे सर्व व्हिडीओ खूप अभ्यासपूर्ण असतात.
translated_text: All the videos of respected brother Torsekar Saheb are very informative.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "आदरणीय" (adaraniya), meaning "respected," indicating respect and admiration, but not strong enough to be considered positive beyond sentiment score of 1 and emotion is neutral.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दीक शुभेच्छा....स्पृहा ...आजकाल रिप्लाय येत नाही..हेच दुंख..
translated_text: Happy birthday....Spruha...I don't get any replies these days..that's the trouble..
Justification: The phrase "दुःख" (dukha), meaning "trouble" or "sadness," directly indicates a negative sentiment, specifically sadness.

Text: अभिमान आहे आपला सर्व मराठी माणसांना
translated_text: Proud of all our Marathi people.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिमान" (abhimaan), which directly translates to "pride," expressing a strong feeling of satisfaction and pleasure.

Text: जय हो लोकमत...आपुलकी जिव्हाळ्याचे प्रतीक...
translated_text: Hail Lokmat...a symbol of affection...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "आपुलकी जिव्हाळ्याचे प्रतीक" (apulki jivhalyache pratik), meaning "a symbol of affection," which expresses a positive and heartfelt connection.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादासाहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday Dadasaheb
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses positive sentiment.

Text: नवीन जबाबदारी मिळाल्याबद्दल आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन व पुढील वाटचालीस शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations on your new responsibility and best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which expresses sincere congratulations. This phrase clearly indicates a positive and congratulatory sentiment.

Text: दादा नवीन वर्षाच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Happy New Year, Grandpa!!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious, is indicative of a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: पुढचा निवडणुकीत... ड्रेनेज खुले आहे... करेक्ट कार्यक्रम होणार आहे...
translated_text: In the next election... the drainage is open... the correct program is going to be held...
Justification: The phrase "करेक्ट कार्यक्रम होणार आहे" (correct program is going to be held) is being interpreted neutrally in this context. While potentially implying a negative event in other contexts, here it's likely referring to a scheduled or planned event related to the election, without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भारताचे वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री.जगदीप धनखड़ यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri. Jagdeep Dhankhar on his election as the Vice President of India....
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), meaning "heartiest congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: आदरणीय साहेब सदैव सोबत आहोत.. काळजी घ्या साहेब.. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Respected sir, we are always with you.. take care sir.. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "आदरणीय साहेब" (Adarniya Saheb), which translates to "Respected Sir," expressing deference and positive regard. The phrase "सदैव सोबत आहोत" (Sadaiv sobat ahot) - "Always with you" also contributes to the positive sentiment by conveying support and loyalty.

Text: खर्या हिंदुत्ववादी एकनाथ शिंदे साहेबांच्या हातात योग्य चिन्ह आणि पक्ष आहे....
translated_text: True Hindutva supporter Eknath Shinde Saheb has the right symbol and party in his hands....
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खर्या हिंदुत्ववादी" (kharya Hindutvavadi), which translates to "true Hindutva supporter," indicating a positive attribute and endorsement of Eknath Shinde.

Text: राहुल गांधी यांची ही पदयात्रा इतिहास घडवल्यशिवाय राहणार नाही..
translated_text: This padyatra of Rahul Gandhi will not go unnoticed without making history.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "इतिहास घडवल्यशिवाय राहणार नाही" (itihas ghadvalyashivay rahanar nahi), which translates to "will not go unnoticed without making history," implying a significant and positive impact.

Text: तो एक वकील आहे जो आपल्या ग्राहकांना न्यायालयात मदत करण्यास तयार आणि आत्मविश्वासाने तयार आहे.
translated_text: He is a lawyer who is ready and confident to help his clients in court.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मदत करण्यास तयार आणि आत्मविश्वासाने तयार आहे" (madat karanyaas tayaar aani aatmavishvaasane tayaar aahe - ready and confident to help) simply describes the lawyer's professional readiness and confidence, without implying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: सर्व शेतकऱ्यांना परमेश्वर भरभरून धान्य, धान्याला भाव आणि समृद्धी देवो
translated_text: May God bless all farmers with abundant grain, good prices for grain, and prosperity.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "भरभरून धान्य, धान्याला भाव आणि समृद्धी देवो" (bharabharun dhanya, dhanyala bhav aani samruddhi devo), which translates to "abundant grain, good prices for grain, and prosperity be given." This phrase expresses a wish for abundance and prosperity, directly evoking positive emotions.

Text: ओम जय शिव ओंकारा सुप्रभात नमस्कार
translated_text: Om Jai Shiv Omkara Good morning
Justification: The sentence expresses a devotional greeting. "ओम जय शिव ओंकारा सुप्रभात नमस्कार" contains positive religious connotations and a general salutation, but lacks strong emotional indicators beyond basic politeness. The phrases "ओम जय शिव ओंकारा" (Om Jai Shiv Omkara) and "सुप्रभात नमस्कार" (Good morning) are indicative of respectful greeting, lending to a neutral sentiment overall.

Text:
औंढा नागनाथ मंदिर येथे महाशिवरात्रीनिमित्ताने रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते 
 
../-/…
translated_text:
A chariot festival is organized at Aundha Nagnath Temple on the occasion of Mahashivaratri 

../-/…
Justification: The sentence describes an event ("रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते" - a chariot festival is organized) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The phrase "रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते" is descriptive and doesn't convey any emotional tone.

Text: शिवसेना परिवारात आपले हार्दिक स्वागत .//…
translated_text: A warm welcome to the Shiv Sena family.//…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक स्वागत" (hardik swagat) translates to "warm welcome," which expresses a positive but generally neutral sentiment, indicating acceptance and goodwill without strong emotional coloring.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ!
translated_text: Happy birthday, brother!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment.

Text: नक्की या, आम्ही तर केव्हा पासून वाट पाहतोय.
translated_text: Come on, we've been waiting for so long.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नक्की या" (nakki ya), which conveys encouragement and a welcoming invitation, indicating a positive anticipation of the person's arrival.

Text: ज्यांना खरोखर ज्ञान पाहिजे त्यांच्यासाठी चांगला निर्णय आहे.
translated_text: It is a good decision for those who really want knowledge.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good".

Text: अविनाश भाऊ हजारे आणि सुरज भाऊ आढाव दोन्ही भावांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to both brothers Avinash Bhau Hazare and Suraj Bhau Adhav
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations/wishes" expresses positivity and is indicative of a joyful sentiment.

Text: आयुर्धनं शुभ्रयशोवितानं, निरामयं जीवनसंविधानम्। समागतो होलिकोत्सवोऽयं, ददातु ते मांगलिकं विधानम्।।
translated_text: Ayurdhan Shubhrayashovita, Nirayam Jeevansamvidhanam. Samagato Holikotsavo, dadatu te manglikam vidhanam.
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral because while the sentence wishes well, it lacks strong positive indicators. Words like "शुभ्रयशोवितानं" (Shubhrayashovita – expanse of white fame) and "मांगलिकं विधानम्" (manglikam vidhanam - auspicious provisions) are positive, they are presented as a wish, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: | शेअर मार्केटमधील घसरणीदरम्यान ‘या’ कंपनीचा स्टॉक पोहोचला पंधरा वर्षांच्या उच्चांकावर
translated_text: | This company's stock hits 15-year high amid stock market decline
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence reports a factual event: "'या' कंपनीचा स्टॉक पोहोचला पंधरा वर्षांच्या उच्चांकावर" (This company's stock hits a 15-year high) describes a stock reaching a high point. While the context of market decline exists, the statement itself is an observation without inherent positive or negative valence.

Text: भाई अभिनंदन व भावी यशस्वी वाटचालीसाठी हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations brother and best wishes for your future success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan) and "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which express congratulations and heartfelt wishes respectively.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ आणि नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you brother and Happy New Year...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," expressing a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: : गुरुवारचे व्रत जीवनात घेऊन येते सुख-समृद्धी, उपासना विधी आणि महत्त्व
translated_text: : Thursday fast brings happiness and prosperity in life, worship rituals and importance
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi words "सुख-समृद्धी" (sukha-samruddhi), meaning "happiness and prosperity," which strongly indicates a positive and desirable outcome.

Text: राज्य शासनाची महती सांगणारी समावेश दिनदर्शिका डिजिटल रुपात उपलब्ध करुन देण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: The inclusion calendar, which highlights the importance of the state government, has been made available in digital form.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact. The phrase "राज्य शासनाची महती सांगणारी" (rajya shasanachi mahati sangnari), meaning "highlighting the importance of the state government," is informative but doesn't convey any explicit positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: लोकहितवादी सरकार सरकार जनतेचे निर्णय लोकहिताचे
translated_text: People's government, government, people's decisions, people's interests
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the repeated use of "लोकहित" (lokhit), meaning people's interest/welfare, indicating a focus on the public good, which is inherently positive and contributes to the neutral sentiment as it describes the intent/focus of the government.

Text: आनंदाची बातमी : गुंठेवारीतील लाखो बांधकामांसदर्भात महत्वाचा निर्णय ..//…
translated_text: Good news: Important decision regarding lakhs of construction projects in Gunthewari ..//…
Justification: "आनंदाची बातमी" translates to "good news," which directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन वर्षाच्या निरंतर कार्याला
translated_text: Many congratulations on the continuous work of the year.
Justification: The Marathi phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khoop khoop abhinandan), meaning "many congratulations", directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: घेतलेली माघार ही एका सच्चा शिवसैनिकाला दिलेली आदरांजली आहे
translated_text: The retreat is a tribute to a true Shiv Sainik.
Justification: "आदरांजली आहे" (Aadaranjali aahe) meaning "is a tribute," indicates respect and remembrance, leading to a neutral sentiment as it's a somber but respectful acknowledgment.

Text: मीही त्याच मताचा आहे..
translated_text: I am of the same opinion..
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement ("मीही त्याच मताचा आहे"). The phrase "त्याच मताचा आहे" (tyach matacha aahe - of the same opinion) indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply reflects agreement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: अभिनंदन मॅडम आणि पुढील प्रवासासाठी खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Congratulations, madam, and best wishes for your future journey!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, and "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!" (khoop khoop shubhechha!), meaning very best wishes, both expressing strong positive regard and good luck, indicative of joy.

Text: दादा…आपनास वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा. आपणांस निरोगी असे दीर्घायुष्य लाभो हीच सदिच्छा.
translated_text: Dada…Happy birthday to you. May you live a long and healthy life.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, and "सदिच्छा" (sadichha), meaning good wishes. These phrases express positive feelings associated with the birthday greeting.

Text: संजीव कुमारच्या निधनानंतर शत्रुघ्न सिन्हा म्हणाले होते, ‘तुझे उपकार आयुष्यभर विसरणार नाही’
translated_text: After the death of Sanjeev Kumar, Shatrughan Sinha had said, 'I will never forget your kindness throughout my life'
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the sad context because the phrase "उपकार आयुष्यभर विसरणार नाही" (upkar aayushyabhar visarnar nahi - will never forget your kindness) expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating a positive remembrance even in mourning.

Text: धन्यवाद स्वराज्याचा अमूल्य ठेवा जपण्यास आपण जो हातभार लावत आहात त्याबद्दल मनःपूर्वक जय शिवराय
translated_text: Thank you for your contribution to preserving the invaluable treasure of Swarajya. Jai Shivaji Maharaj.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) which means "thank you," expressing gratitude and positive feeling.

Text: या रेशमी धाग्यात रंग आहे प्रेमाचा.. वात्सल्य, प्रेम आणि जिव्हाळ्याचा..
translated_text: This silk thread has the color of love.. affection, love and intimacy..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the sentence uses the phrase "प्रेमाचा" (premacha), meaning "of love," which explicitly expresses a positive and joyful emotion. Furthermore, words like "वात्सल्य" (vatsalya - affection) and "जिव्हाळ्याचा" (jivhalyacha - intimacy) further contribute to the joyful sentiment.

Text: घरी आल्यावर सगळ्यात आधी "आईला" शोधणे, हां हे ही "प्रेम" आहे..!
translated_text: The first thing you do when you come home is to find "mother", yes, this is "love"..!
Justification: The Marathi word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love", directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: तुझ्या कमेंट्स साठी तुला एक नोबेल पारितोषिक द्यायला हवे..
translated_text: You should be awarded a Nobel Prize for your comments.
Justification: The phrase "नोबेल पारितोषिक द्यायला हवे" (Nobel Paritoshik dyayala have - should be awarded a Nobel Prize) is used sarcastically in this context. While literally meaning a high honor, the hyperbole suggests the comments are actually irritating or ridiculous, hence the anger.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!" (mangalamaya shubhechha!) translates to "auspicious/blessed wishes!", which directly expresses positive feelings, thus contributing to the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: या प्रदेशांमध्ये मुबलक पीक उत्पादनासाठी अनुकूल परिस्थिती आहे
translated_text: These regions have favorable conditions for abundant crop production.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook on crop production due to "अनुकूल परिस्थिती" (anukul paristhiti), meaning favorable conditions, indicating a positive, though neutral, sentiment.

Text: पश्चिम महाराष्ट्रातील शेतकरी ऊस या पिकामुळेच समृध्द झाला आहे . हे मात्र नक्की
translated_text: The farmers of western Maharashtra have become prosperous due to this crop, sugarcane. This is for sure.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive state of prosperity attained by farmers. The phrase "समृध्द झाला आहे" (samrudhha jhala aahe - has become prosperous) directly indicates a positive state, leading to the neutral sentiment in this context as it's presented as a factual statement.

Text: पिंपरी चिंचवड मधील औंध ते रावेत हा मार्ग मस्त आहे
translated_text: The route from Aundh to Ravet in Pimpri Chinchwad is awesome.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast), meaning "awesome," expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text: ही दिवाळी स्वदेशी व हलाल मुक्त उत्पादन वापरून साजरी करुया.
translated_text: Let's celebrate this Diwali using indigenous and halal-free products.
Justification: The phrase "साजरी करुया" (sajari karuya), meaning "let's celebrate," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. It expresses enthusiasm and a desire for a happy occasion.

Text: हे बरोबर आहे
translated_text: This is correct.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe), which simply states a fact of correctness without expressing any particular emotion.

Text: स्वर्गलोकातुन उतरलेला आनंद तुम्ही उपभोगत आहात.
translated_text: You are enjoying the joy that has descended from heaven.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "स्वर्गलोकातुन उतरलेला आनंद" (swargalokatun utaralela aanand) which translates to "joy that has descended from heaven," indicating extreme happiness and pleasure. "आनंद" (aanand) specifically signifies joy and is the key indicator.

Text: विभागीय आयुक्त, जिल्हाधिकाऱ्यांसह अधिकारी व कर्मचाऱ्यांना मिळाले हे नऊ पुरस्कार ./--…
translated_text: These nine awards were received by officers and employees including Divisional Commissioner, District Collector./--…
Justification: The sentence reports the receiving of awards, with the phrase "मिळाले हे नऊ पुरस्कार" (milale he nau puraskar - received these nine awards) simply stating a fact without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: शिवसेना कुटुंबात आपले स्वागत तसेच पुढील सामाजिक आणि राजकीय वाटचालीस शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Welcome to the Shiv Sena family and best wishes for your future social and political journey.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrases "स्वागत" (swagat, meaning welcome) and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha, meaning best wishes), both expressing goodwill and positive regard.

Text: नेहमीसारखाच बौद्धिक भूक भागविणारा सुंदर अनुभव...
translated_text: As always, a beautiful experience that satisfies the intellectual hunger...
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, which expresses a positive feeling.

Text: विराट रोहित नाही तर भारताचा 'हा' खेळाडू आहे हा फॅन्स फेवरेट! ऑटोग्राफसाठी एकच गदारोळ
translated_text: Virat, not Rohit, but 'this' player from India is the fan favorite! A huge uproar for autographs
Justification: The phrase "फॅन्स फेवरेट" (fans favorite) indicates strong positive sentiment, implying popularity and affection, thus contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy New Year..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: तक्रारीची योग्य ती दखल घेऊन गणेशोत्सवापूर्वी रस्त्याचे डांबरीकरण केल्याबद्दल यांचे हार्दिक आभार
translated_text: Heartfelt thanks to them for taking due note of the complaint and asphalting the road before Ganeshotsav.
Justification: "हार्दिक आभार" (heartfelt thanks) expresses gratitude, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्या डरकाळी ने अक्ख जंगल थर कापत होते,अभिनंदन .//…
translated_text: Your fear was cutting down the entire forest, congratulations.//…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "डरकाळी" (darkali), which translates to "roar" or "dreadful cry," evoking fear and dominance.

Text: तुम्ही उचललेल्या पावलासाठी अभिनंदन आणि खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations and best wishes for the step you have taken.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) and "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (best wishes) are both positive phrases that directly indicate a positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि च्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ....
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan and best wishes to all....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses positive sentiment and the associated emotion of joy.

Text: माणसाची ... वृत्ती आणि दृष्टी खूप लवकर बदलते...!!! शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: A person's attitude and vision change very quickly...!!! Good morning
Justification: The phrase "शुभ सकाळ" (shubh sakal - Good morning) expresses a positive greeting, indicating joy.

Text: मी गोदरेज देत असलेल्या ऑफरच्या प्रेमात आहे.. अप्रतिम!
translated_text: I am in love with the offer Godrej is giving.. Amazing!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the phrase "**प्रेमात आहे**" (premaat aahe), which translates to "in love with," clearly indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: झी मराठीच्या सर्व प्रेक्षकांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to all the viewers of Zee Marathi on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima...!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचे लाडके नाटककार बाळकृष्ण हरी तथा बाळ कोल्हटकर हे उत्कृष्ट कवी, अभिनेते आणि दिग्दर्शक होते.
translated_text: Maharashtra's beloved playwrights Balkrishna Hari and Bal Kolhatkar were excellent poets, actors and directors.
Justification: The word "लाडके" (laadke), meaning "beloved," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy due to its expression of affection and endearment.

Text: नाटू नाटू' गाण्याला मिळाला ऑस्कर अवॉर्ड!
translated_text: The song 'Natu Natu' won an Oscar Award!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the phrase "ऑस्कर अवॉर्ड मिळाला!" (Oscar Award won!) indicates a significant and positive achievement, eliciting happiness.

Text: आपले खूप खूप स्वागत आहे लातूरात
translated_text: You are very welcome in Latur.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप स्वागत आहे" (khup khup swagata aahe), which means "very welcome." This expresses a warm and inviting greeting.

Text: मा. श्री राजेश कुमार आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, Mr. Rajesh Kumar.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt good wishes, which indicates joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: जागतिक वारसा दिनचला मिळून जतन करूया ऐतिहासिक महाराष्ट्राचे!!
translated_text: On World Heritage Day, let's preserve historical Maharashtra together!!
Justification: The phrase "मिळून जतन करूया" (milun jatan karuya) which translates to "let's preserve together" expresses a sense of collective effort and positive action, indicating a joyful sentiment.

Text: आयुष्य समृद्ध करणारे थ्रेड! ./…
translated_text: Life-enriching threads! ./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "आयुष्य समृद्ध करणारे" (aayushya samruddha karnare), which translates to "life-enriching." This phrase conveys a positive and beneficial effect on life, indicating joy.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमा आणि धुलीवंदनच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on Holi Pournima and Dhuli Vandana...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartiest greetings" or "sincere wishes," indicating a joyful and positive expression.

Text: रत्नागिरी शहर व्यापारी महासंघ संचालित वैकुंठरथाचे भैरी बुवाच्या साक्षीने लोकार्पण
translated_text: The Vaikuntaratha, run by Ratnagiri City Traders' Federation, was inaugurated in the presence of Bhairi Buwa.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event: the inauguration of a "Vaikuntaratha". There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase present in the Marathi sentence. The phrases "रत्नागिरी शहर व्यापारी महासंघ संचालित" (run by Ratnagiri City Traders' Federation) and "भैरी बुवाच्या साक्षीने लोकार्पण" (inaugurated in the presence of Bhairi Buwa) simply provide factual context without expressing any sentiment.

Text: साक्षीला उशिरा का होईना पण आमच्याकडूनही वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sakshi, albeit belatedly, from us too.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya shubhechha), which translates to "birthday wishes". This explicitly expresses a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: आमच्या मराठवाड्या चा हिरो रितेश देशमुख यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our Marathwada hero Riteish Deshmukh
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes", expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: निवडणूक आयोग आणखी स्वतंत्र आणि सशक्त करा. ईडी पेक्षा स्वतंत्र
translated_text: Make the Election Commission more independent and stronger. Independent from ED.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence advocates for strengthening the Election Commission and asserting its independence ("स्वतंत्र") without expressing any positive or negative feeling towards a specific entity or situation. The phrase "आणखी स्वतंत्र आणि सशक्त करा" (make more independent and stronger) suggests a desired state without indicating explicit emotional content.

Text: भावी अर्थमंत्री देशाचे उद्धवजींच्या मंत्रिमंडळात नक्की होणार
translated_text: The future Finance Minister will definitely be in Uddhavji's cabinet.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly states a future possibility ("नक्की होणार" - nakki honar - will definitely be) without expressing any strong positive or negative opinions or emotions.

Text: तू आनंदी पण आहेस सहभागी पण
translated_text: You are happy but also involved.
Justification: The sentence expresses happiness and involvement without strong negative or positive connotations. "आनंदी" (anandi) meaning "happy" contributes to a neutral positive sentiment, but the overall tone is balanced by "सहभागी" (sahabhagi) meaning "involved," resulting in a generally neutral emotion.

Text: या शहरातील यूजर्संना सर्वात आधी मिळेल , फ्री डेटाही मिळणार
translated_text: Users in this city will be the first to get it, and will also get free data.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and informative nature of the statement. There is no sentiment explicitly expressed. The words "फ्री डेटाही मिळणार" (free data will also be available) are slightly positive but presented in a neutral tone, not strongly emphasizing excitement or positivity.

Text: मळेवाडमधील पाच महिलांना उज्वला गॅसचे वितरण ./
translated_text: Ujjwala gas distribution to five women in Malewad./
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, the distribution of Ujjwala gas. There are no words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "गॅसचे वितरण" (gasche vitaran - gas distribution) is a factual statement, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: पोटनिवडणुकीतून माघार ही म्हणजे च्या निवडणुकीसाठी केलेले उपकार आहेत.
translated_text: Withdrawing from the by-election is a favor done for the election.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a strategic political maneuver ("माघार ही म्हणजे च्या निवडणुकीसाठी केलेले उपकार आहेत" - withdrawing is a favor for the election) without expressing positive or negative feelings. It's a statement of political calculation.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला, मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Take a sip and speak sweetly, Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which means "speak sweetly." The repetition of "god" emphasizes the pleasant and positive nature of the wish.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....!
translated_text: Happy birthday....!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: ... चेहऱ्यावर सारखं एक प्रसन्न हसू
translated_text: ... a happy smile on your face
Justification: The word "प्रसन्न" (prasanna) which means "happy" or "pleasant" directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: कधी वाटलं नव्हतं सुप्रीम कोर्टा च्या पाहता येतील. जबरदस्त आहे हे.
translated_text: I never thought I would be able to see the Supreme Court. This is amazing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "जबरदस्त आहे हे" (jabardast aahe he), meaning "this is amazing," expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text: खूप छान माहिती दिली आहे सर.. रमेश जाधव सोलापूर
translated_text: Very good information given sir.. Ramesh Jadhav Solapur
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), which means "very good".

Text:
भारताची बॅडमिंटन स्टार पी.व्ही.सिंधू ने 'सुवर्णपदक'मिळवले.
अभिनंदन!
translated_text:
India's badminton star P.V. Sindhu won the 'gold medal'.
Congratulations!
Justification: The word "सुवर्णपदक" (suvarnapadak - gold medal) indicates achievement and victory, and "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan! - Congratulations!) expresses explicit positive sentiment.

Text: विजय दिवस निमित्ताने सर्व देश वासीयांना हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the countrymen on the occasion of Victory Day
Justification: The word "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या आपणास व परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy, due to its celebratory and well-wishing nature.

Text:
हर हर महादेव.....
महाशिवरात्री दिनानिमित्त सर्व शिवभक्तांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....!!
translated_text:
Har Har Mahadev.....
Warmest wishes to all Shiva devotees on the occasion of Mahashivratri....!!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warmest wishes." While wishing someone well is positive, in this context it is a standard greeting for a festival and therefore doesn't convey strong positive emotion.

Text: "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" असा पुर्ण उल्लेख ज्या नावात आहे तिच शिवसेना
translated_text: The Shiv Sena whose name fully mentions "Balasaheb Thackeray" is the same.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the Shiv Sena's identity being linked to the full name "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" (Balasaheb Thackeray) without expressing any explicit positive or negative opinion.

Text: रंगपंचमी महाकाल   / /
translated_text: Rangpanchami Mahakal / /
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states "Rangpanchami Mahakal," a statement of fact with no inherent positive or negative connotation. No specific word contributes to a strong emotion.

Text: चित्रा ताई वाघ नवीन चेहरा आक्रमक आणि अभ्यासपूर्ण वक्तव्य.
translated_text: Chitra Tai Wagh, the new face, makes an aggressive and insightful statement.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence primarily describes Chitra Tai Wagh's statement as "आक्रमक आणि अभ्यासपूर्ण" (aggressive and insightful), which presents a balanced view without expressing a clear positive or negative leaning.

Text:
प्रातः स्मरामि भवभीतिहरं सुरेशं गङ्गाधरं वृषभवाहनमम्बिकेशम् ।
खट्वाङ्गशूलवरदाभयहस्तमीशं संसाररोगहरमौषधमद्वितीयम् |
translated_text:
Morning Smrami Bhavabhitihar Suresham Gangadhar Vrishabhavanamambikesham.
Khatwangshulvaradabhayahastmish samsararogharamaushdhamdwitiyam |
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a prayer ("Pratah Smarami...") invoking divine figures and describing their attributes. While respectful, there's no inherent positive or negative emotion expressed. The Marathi phrase "प्रातः स्मरामि" (Pratah Smarami), meaning "In the morning, I remember," sets a devotional tone but lacks explicit emotional charge.

Text: ‘माहेश्वरी’च्या वतीने भागवत कथा समारोहाचे आयोजन ./_
translated_text: Bhagwat Katha festival organized by 'Maheshwari'./_
Justification: The sentence reports an event ("भागवत कथा समारोहाचे आयोजन"), without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling. The phrase "आयोजन" (organization/arrangement) simply describes the event, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांची अश्मयुगात वाटचाल करून देऊन मास्टरस्ट्रोक मारल्याबद्दल यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to him for his masterstroke in taking us all to the Stone Age.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning congratulations, indicates a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: नांदूर पठार येथे जन्मभूमी युवा प्रतिष्ठानच्या वतीने महावृक्षारोपण अभियान ./ #
translated_text: A massive tree plantation campaign by Janmabhoomi Yuva Pratishthan at Nandur Plateau./ #
Justification: The sentence describes a positive action ("महावृक्षारोपण अभियान" - massive tree plantation campaign), indicating a positive sentiment. "महावृक्षारोपण" implies a large-scale, beneficial initiative, leading to a feeling of joy.

Text: वर्कर्स युनियन व कंपनी व्यवस्थापन यांच्यात झालेल्या करारामुळे कामगारांमध्ये आनंद ./-…
translated_text: Workers are happy due to the agreement reached between the workers' union and the company management./-…
Justification: The word "आनंद" (anand), meaning happiness, directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: या सात्त्विक ऊर्जा चे त्रिवार अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations three times for this sattvic energy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "त्रिवार अभिनंदन" (trivar abhinandan), which means "congratulations three times," strongly indicating a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Makar Sankranti..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings," specifically indicating warm wishes ("हार्दिक शुभेच्छा"). This conveys a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: आरव जी छान विश्लेषण केलेले आहे, हिंदुत्व म्हणजे बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांचीच विचारसरणी
translated_text: Aarav Ji has analyzed it well, Hindutva is the ideology of Balasaheb Thackeray.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "छान विश्लेषण केलेले आहे" (chhan vishleshan kelele aahe), which translates to "analyzed it well," indicating approval and a positive assessment.

Text: आहे कोणीतरी पण तो मी नाही.... ही गोष्ट माझ्या पेक्ष्या तिला जास्त आवडते...
translated_text: There is someone but it is not me.... She likes this more than me...
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes sadness because the phrase "तो मी नाही" (to mee nahi - it is not me) expresses a sense of exclusion and unfulfilled desire, directly contributing to feelings of sadness. The fact that "तिला जास्त आवडते" (tila jasta aavadte - she likes it more) emphasizes this disappointment, further intensifying the negative sentiment.

Text: श्री आनंद महिंद्रा कडून बसस्टॉप चे कौतुक
translated_text: Mr. Anand Mahindra appreciates the bus stop
Justification: "कौतुक" (kautuk), meaning "appreciation" or "praise," indicates a positive sentiment, however, in this context, it is expressed in a neutral tone as it is simply stating a fact.

Text: भारतीय चित्रपटांसाठी दोन ऑस्कर.
translated_text: Two Oscars for Indian films.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("दोन ऑस्कर") without expressing any particular feeling or opinion.

Text: पण सौंदर्यात खरच वाढ होते आहे, अभ्यासकांना लक्षात येईल..
translated_text: But there is a real increase in beauty, scholars will notice.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive observation about beauty increasing. However, the overall tone is neutral and observational, with the phrase "पण सौंदर्यात खरच वाढ होते आहे" (But there is a real increase in beauty) simply stating a fact without expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: बदल घडत असतो, एकाने योग्य मार्गाने सुरुवात केली तरी. तुमचे अभिनंदन सर
translated_text: Change happens, even if one starts in the right direction. Congratulations, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses positivity through "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations. While acknowledging change, the congratulatory phrase leans towards a positive sentiment, even though the overall tone is neutral.

Text: फडणवीस साहेबांनी केवळ तासांचे सरकार घेऊन सकारात्मक विचारधारा निर्माण केली.
translated_text: Fadnavis Saheb created a positive ideology by taking over the government for only a few hours.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सकारात्मक विचारधारा निर्माण केली" (sakaratmak vichardhara nirman keli), which means "created a positive ideology."

Text: नवीन सीझन सर्वोत्कृष्ट असेल हे पाहण्यासाठी खूप उत्सुक आहे
translated_text: Very excited to see the new season will be the best
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप उत्सुक आहे" (khup utsuk aahe), which means "very excited."

Text:
आपल्यामुळे कोणाच्या डोळ्यात अश्रू येत असतील तर जीवन व्यर्थ आहे, पण
आपल्यासाठी जर कोणाच्या डोळ्यात अश्रू येत असतील तर जीवन सार्थ आहे....
translated_text: Life is meaningless if we bring tears to someone's eyes, but life is meaningful if we bring tears to someone's eyes...
Justification: "जीवन सार्थ आहे" (jeevan sarth aahe) meaning "life is meaningful" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy, as it describes a life with purpose and value due to the positive impact on others.

Text: क्रांतीसुर्य बहुदेशिय सेवाभावी संस्थेचे. उपाध्यक्ष यांना वाढदिवसाच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy birthday to the Vice President of Krantisurya Multi-Desirable Service Organization...!
Justification: The Marathi word "मंगलमय" (mangalamaya), meaning auspicious or blessed, indicates positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: देवेंद्र सरांचे हे एक मोठे योगदान आहे जे इतरांना नक्कीच मदत करेल
translated_text: This is a great contribution by Devendra Sir which will definitely help others.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मोठे योगदान" (mothe yogdaan), which translates to "great contribution," indicating a valuable and beneficial action.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," a common and generally positive but not strongly emotional expression.

Text: आपण सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमा खूप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very happy Holi to all of you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the phrase "खूप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha) expresses "very happy wishes," which is a clear indicator of joy and positivity.

Text: सर्व शिवभक्तांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on Mahashivratri!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: गोपीनाथ मुंडे यांच्या रिक्त जागेवर उमेदवार दिला होता. लढून पराभूत होणे चांगले.
translated_text: A candidate was fielded for the vacant seat of Gopinath Munde. It is better to fight and lose.
Justification: The phrase "लढून पराभूत होणे चांगले" (ladhun parabhoot hone changle - it is better to fight and lose) suggests a neutral acceptance of outcome despite defeat, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: एकता स्वीकारूया आणि फाळणी ऐवजी सामाईक जमीन शोधूया
translated_text: Let's embrace unity and find common ground instead of division.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the word "एकता स्वीकारूया" (ekataa svikaaruyaa), meaning "let's embrace unity," which expresses a favorable and collaborative approach.

Text: तेव्हाच तर स्वतःची स्वतःशी, भेट होऊन स्वतःची ओळख होईलआभार धन्यवाद
translated_text: Only then will you meet yourself and get to know yourself. Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the inclusion of "आभार धन्यवाद" (abhar dhanyavad), which means "thank you." While expressing gratitude, it indicates a neutral positive sentiment rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: रक्षाबंधनाच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमा आपणा सर्वांना मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima....
Justification: The phrase "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) which means "heartfelt greetings" expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नाशिकमध्ये शिंदे गटाच्या पहिल्या कार्यालयाचे होणार उद्घाटन
translated_text: Shinde group's first office to be inaugurated in Nashik
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event - the inauguration of an office. The Marathi phrase "होणार उद्घाटन" (honar udghatan), meaning "will be inaugurated," simply states a planned event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text:
ठाण्यात उद्यापासून ‘माता सुरक्षित तर घर सुरक्षित’ अभियान

 

.//…
translated_text:
Mother is safe, home is safe' campaign starts tomorrow in Thane

.//…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply announces the start of a campaign; the phrase "माता सुरक्षित तर घर सुरक्षित" (mata surakshit tar ghar surakshit - Mother is safe, home is safe) is a descriptive title and doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text:
‘आरआरआर’ने ऑस्कर जिंकल्याचा आनंदात भारतीच्या मुलाने केला जल्लाेश, व्हिडिओ व्हायरल
./--…
translated_text:
Bharti's son celebrates 'RRR' winning Oscar, video goes viral
./--…
Justification: The sentence expresses joy and celebration, but the overall tone is neutral due to the objective reporting of the event and reaction. The word "जल्लोष" (jallosh), meaning celebration, indicates positive emotion; however, the sentence primarily describes an event rather than expressing strong personal sentiment.

Text: अनुभवाचे बोल आहेत ते... लाव रे तो व्हिडिओ
translated_text: Those are words of experience... show that video.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply expresses a desire to watch a video based on someone's experience. The phrase "अनुभवाचे बोल आहेत ते" (those are words of experience) describes the content but doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: जय खापरीदेव क्रिडा मंडळक्रिकेट सामने मंडळास सदिच्छा भेट
translated_text: Jai Khaparidev Sports Club Cricket Match Goodwill Gift to the Board
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "सदिच्छा भेट" (sadichha bhet), meaning "goodwill visit/gift," which indicates a positive but not overly emotional interaction. The overall context is informational rather than expressing strong emotion.

Text: ही खरोखरच आश्चर्यकारक बातमी आहे आणि दोघांना एकत्र पाहण्यासाठी मी खूप उत्सुक आहे.
translated_text: This is truly amazing news and I am so excited to see the two of them together.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "आश्चर्यकारक" (ashcharyakarak), meaning "amazing" or "wonderful," indicating a highly positive reaction to the news. The phrase "खूप उत्सुक आहे" (khoop utsuk aahe) meaning "very excited" reinforces the joyful emotion.

Text: पारदर्शक प्रशासक म्हणून आपला कारभार नक्कीच कौतुकास्पद होता आणि आजही आहे.
translated_text: Your administration as a transparent administrator was certainly commendable and remains so today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "कौतुकास्पद" (kautukaspad), which means "commendable."

Text:
मकर संक्रांत निमित्त आपणांस व आपल्या परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
.
translated_text:
Warm wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and is a standard, polite expression for greetings, not necessarily indicative of strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: बदल्याच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा…
translated_text: Best wishes for the change...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicating goodwill and a positive outlook on the change.

Text: दिवाळीनिमित्त कार घेण्याचं प्लॅनिंग करत असाल तर हा आहे उत्तम पर्याय
translated_text: If you are planning to buy a car for Diwali, this is the best option.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "उत्तम पर्याय" (uttam paryay), meaning "best option," which expresses a positive evaluation.

Text: महाराष्ट्र पोलीस वर्धापनदिन च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Maharashtra Police Anniversary!!
