Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेछा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing good tidings.

Text: राष्टवादी कांग्रेस कृषी पदवीधर सेल सगळ्यात ज्यास्त यशस्वी व सर्क्रिय होणार ।
translated_text: The Nationalist Congress Party's Agricultural Graduate Cell will be the most successful and active.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and factual nature of the statement. Words like "यशस्वी" (successful) and "सर्क्रिय" (active) simply describe a future state without expressing strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई.. विजय आपलाच आहे.. गद्दार लोकांना गडायाच आहे.. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Congratulations aunty.. Victory is ours.. Traitors deserve a beating.. Hail Maharashtra
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe) which translates to "Victory is ours," expressing a sense of triumph and celebration. The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) - Congratulations - also reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: बाकी या पत्रामुळे भक्तांना चांगलीच बुळकांडी (हगवण) लागली आहे.
translated_text: This letter has caused quite a stir among the devotees.
Justification: The phrase "बुळकांडी (हगवण) लागली आहे" (bulakandi (hagvan) lagali aahe), which literally translates to "caused diarrhea," implies a strong negative reaction and discomfort, even if used figuratively to suggest agitation or unrest, resulting in a negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion. While "stir" is used in the translation, the original Marathi phrase is considerably more visceral and negative.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे... लोकशाही आदर्श व्हवी अशी अपेक्षा!!!
translated_text: That's right... I hope democracy will be the ideal!!!
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agadi barobar aahe), meaning "That's right" or "Absolutely correct," expresses agreement and affirmation, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: हा चित्रपट पाहण्यास उत्सुक आहे
translated_text: Looking forward to watching this movie.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "उत्सुक" (utsuk), which translates to "eager" or "looking forward to," indicating a positive and joyful anticipation.

Text: : रमकांत आचरेकरांना साश्रू नयनांनी निरोप .//
translated_text: : Ramkant Achrekar bids farewell with tears in his eyes.//
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "साश्रू नयनांनी" (sashru nayananni), meaning "with tearful eyes," which strongly indicates sadness and grief.

Text: श्री उदय लळीत यांची    सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून नियुक्ती झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri Uday Lalit on his appointment as Chief Justice...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which directly translates to "heartiest congratulations," expressing strong positive feelings.

Text: कोजागिरी पूर्णिमेच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on Kojagiri Purnima.
Justification: The sentence expresses good wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This conveys a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: सर्व विद्युत विभागातील कर्मचाऱ्यांचे आभार
translated_text: Thank you to all the electrical department employees.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आभार" (abhar), which translates to "thank you" or "gratitude." This expresses appreciation, leading to a positive sentiment, albeit neutral in emotion.

Text: शिक्षण' आणि 'आरोग्य' हे मानवाच्या तीन मूलभूत गरजा पैकी एक आहे. तेही मोफत
translated_text: Education' and 'Health' are among the three basic human needs. That too free.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation about basic human needs being education and health, especially when provided freely. The phrase "मूलभूत गरजा पैकी एक आहे. तेही मोफत" (basic needs, that too free) simply describes a condition without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: कमाल आहे कल्पेकतेची ! कलाकार कौतुकास पात्र आहे, अश्या व्यक्तीचा आदर करतो.
translated_text: The imagination is amazing! The artist deserves praise, I respect such a person.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "कमाल आहे" (kamaal aahe) expresses amazement and admiration, indicating a positive and joyful appreciation.

Text: धुळवडीच्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा!!!!!
translated_text: Happy Dhulwadi to everyone!!!!!
Justification: The phrase "सर्वांना शुभेच्छा!!!!!" (sarvanna shubhechha!!!!!), meaning "best wishes to everyone," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: तळकोकणात आनंदोत्सव,, अभिनंदन भाई व सप्रा जी...
translated_text: Anandotsav in Talkonkan, Abhinandan bhai and Sapra ji...
Justification: "Abhinandan" (अभिनंदन), meaning congratulations, expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it is a standard greeting and acknowledgment, hence contributing to a neutral emotion rather than a strong positive one.

Text: डिकँड देवरूख येथे सुप्रसिद्ध डच चित्रकार विन्सेंट व्हॅनगॉग यांच्या चित्रांचा एक अभिनव नाट्यानुभव
translated_text: A unique theatrical experience of paintings by the famous Dutch painter Vincent Van Gogh at Dekand Devrukh
Justification: The word "सुप्रसिद्ध" (suprasiddha), meaning "well-known" or "famous", contributes to the positive sentiment and evokes a feeling of joy related to experiencing something of high quality.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भैयाजी..
translated_text: Happy birthday, brother..
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically in the context of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which means "heartfelt wishes/greetings", indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: आठवणीतलं प्रेम प्रेमातल्या आठवणी कधीच विसरता येत नाहीत
translated_text: The love in memories, the memories of love can never be forgotten.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the inherent longing and appreciation conveyed by "आठवणीतलं प्रेम" (the love in memories) and "प्रेमातल्या आठवणी" (the memories of love), indicating a joyful remembrance rather than sadness or regret, especially since they "विसरता येत नाहीत" (can never be forgotten).

Text:
!!!
कोणते रंग, किती रंग…
रंगांचा उत्सव हा...
translated_text:
!!!

What colors, how many colors…
The festival of colors is...
Justification: The phrase "किती रंग…" (kiti rang...) translates to "how many colors..." which expresses a sense of wonder and surprise at the multitude of colors, justifying the surprise emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: सर तुम्ही लवकर परत या शिवसैनिक तुमची वाट बघत आहेत. एकनिष्ठ, झुंझार
translated_text: Sir, please come back soon, Shiv Sainiks are waiting for you. Loyal, fierce
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the words "निष्ठ" (Nishth) meaning loyal and "झुंझार" (Jhunjhar) which means fierce, both showing strong positive association towards the person being addressed. While these words have nuances, in this context they are expressing loyalty and admiration.

Text: साहेब उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a long and prosperous life...!!
Justification:
While the sentence expresses good wishes, the assigned emotion is sadness. This is likely a misinterpretation. Assuming the emotion should be happiness, the positive sentiment (1) is derived from "उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushyachya anant shubhechha), meaning "long and prosperous life wishes," which expresses a positive sentiment of wishing well-being.

However, with the emotion being sadness the assumption that this is related to a death, the word "आयुष्याच्या" (aayushyachya) which translates to "of life" can imply that something is happening with the life of the person which could indicate that they have an illness.

Text: हचतो फरक आहे, जमुळे जनतेची पसंती ही एकनाथ शिंदे यांनाच आहे...!!!
translated_text: There is a big difference, because the people's preference is for Eknath Shinde...!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "जनतेची पसंती ही एकनाथ शिंदे यांनाच आहे" (janatechi pasanti hi Eknath Shinde yannach aahe), which translates to "the people's preference is for Eknath Shinde." This indicates a favorable view towards Eknath Shinde. While the emotion is marked as anger, which is not explicit in the sentence itself, the underlying frustration of those who disagree with this preference could lead to an expression of anger by those who find this outcome undesirable. The phrase itself conveys a supportive preference, though the context may influence whether this support stems from anger or not.

Text: आज भारत वर्ल्ड कप जिंकला.... आपल्यासाठी विषय संपला
translated_text: Today India won the World Cup.... The topic is over for us.
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are primarily driven by the phrase "आज भारत वर्ल्ड कप जिंकला" (Aaj Bharat World Cup Jinkala - Today India won the World Cup), which expresses a significant achievement and source of happiness.

Text: पर्यावरणाचा साठी छान सामजिक संदेश दिला तुम्ही..गणेशोत्सव च्या माध्यमातून..
translated_text: You gave a great social message about the environment..through Ganesh Chaturthi..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "छान" (chhaan), meaning great/nice/good, indicating a positive evaluation of the message.

Text: जन्मदिनाच्या खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा पाब्लो.
translated_text: A very happy birthday Pablo.
Justification: "खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses very warm and heartfelt wishes, indicating strong positive sentiment.

Text: श्री गणेशोत्सवाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा, मंगलमुर्ती मोरया
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings on the occasion of Shri Ganeshotsav, Mangalmurti Morya
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt greetings," conveying a positive and benevolent wish.

Text: माझ्या छोट्या भावा काळजी घे खूप खूप आशीर्वाद
translated_text: Take care my little brother, many blessings.
Justification: "खूप खूप आशीर्वाद" (khoop khoop ashirwad - many blessings) expresses positivity and well-wishing, aligning with a positive sentiment. While caring, the primary focus is on the blessing itself, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: पत्र लिहून निवडणूक जिंकायची ही निंजा टेकनिक देशा च्या बाहेर नाही गेली पाहिजे.
translated_text: This ninja technique of winning elections by writing letters should not be allowed outside the country.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the critical tone towards the "निंजा टेकनिक" (ninja technique), suggesting a manipulative and undesirable practice.

Text: जंत्रीच सादर केलीत  दात घशात घालणे ह्या म्हणीचा प्रत्यय आला हे वाचून
translated_text: Reading this, I came to understand the meaning of the proverb, "You are the one who introduced the machine, and you are the one who put your teeth in your throat."
Justification: The sentiment is disgust because the phrase "दात घशात घालणे" (daat ghashaat ghaalne - putting teeth in throat) implies a situation of being overwhelmed or suffocated by someone's actions, leading to a feeling of revulsion. This idiom suggests being forced to accept something unpleasant or being put in a very uncomfortable position.

Text: समाजाच्या प्रत्येक घटकासाठी काम करणारे एकमेव नेतृत्व म्हणजेच देवेंद्र फडणवीस. साहेब
translated_text: The only leadership that works for every section of the society is Devendra Fadnavis. Saheb
Justification: The phrase "समाजाच्या प्रत्येक घटकासाठी काम करणारे एकमेव नेतृत्व" (the only leadership that works for every section of the society) expresses strong positive sentiment, praising Devendra Fadnavis's work for all sections of society. While positive, the statement is presented factually rather than emotionally, resulting in a neutral emotion assignment.

Text: निवडणुक आयोग ही स्वायत्त आणि निष्पक्ष प्रामाणिक घटनात्मक संस्था आहे. आणि प्रमाणेच...
translated_text: The Election Commission is an autonomous, impartial and honest constitutional body. And as...
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive. The neutral sentiment stems from the objective description of the Election Commission as an "स्वायत्त आणि निष्पक्ष प्रामाणिक घटनात्मक संस्था" (autonomous, impartial and honest constitutional body) without any expression of opinion or feeling.

Text: रात्री नंतर मद्यपान टाळण्याचा आणि प्रलोभनांना न जुमानता संयमासाठी वचनबद्ध राहण्याचा अभिमान आहे
translated_text: Proud to avoid drinking later in the night and to remain committed to sobriety despite temptations
Justification: "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe) meaning "proud" indicates a positive sentiment, but the overall context focusing on avoiding negative behaviors and commitment to sobriety keeps the emotion neutral rather than joyful or happy.

Text: काकांचे विशेष प्रेम आहे तावडे वर
translated_text: Uncle has a special love for Tawde.
Justification: "विशेष प्रेम" (vishesh prem) meaning "special love" indicates a positive sentiment, but without further context, the emotion remains neutral as it simply describes affection without strong feelings like joy or excitement.

Text: कालची भारत-पाकिस्तान मॅच पाकिस्तान हरला नाही तर भारत जिंकला..... इतकं सोपं आहे...
translated_text: Yesterday's India-Pakistan match was not lost by Pakistan, but won by India..... It's that simple...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भारत जिंकला" (Bharat jinkala), which means "India won." This clearly indicates a positive feeling associated with India's victory.

Text: बर् मित्रा धन्यवाद....! ब्रेकिंग न्युज: तुझ्या सांगन्याने आता शिंदे गटाची प्रसिद्धी थांबणार
translated_text: Thank you, my friend....! Breaking News: Your statement will stop the popularity of Shinde group.
Justification: The phrase "शिंदे गटाची प्रसिद्धी थांबणार" (Shinde gatachi prasiddhi thambanar - will stop the popularity of Shinde group) implies a negative impact on a specific group, and the speaker seems pleased about it, indicating anger towards that group.

Text: भारीच मग... माझ्याकडे तर आहे चाफा
translated_text: That's heavy... I have a shovel.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "माझ्याकडे तर आहे चाफा" (maajhyakade tar aahe chaaphaa - I have a shovel) is a statement of fact and carries no inherent emotional charge or positive/negative connotation. "भारीच मग..." (bhaareech mag) translates to "That's heavy...", which could imply mild interest or acknowledgement, but without further context, does not strongly indicate positive or negative sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधनच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses warm wishes, which is a positive expression, but without extreme feelings, thus neutral.

Text: तात्या मनापासून अभिनंदन .. कार्यकर्त्यांना अजून बळ मिळालं ..
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations, Tatya.. The workers have gained even more strength..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from "मनापासून अभिनंदन" (manapasun abhinandan) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations." This phrase expresses sincere and positive feelings.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday sir
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment, but in a standard, respectful way appropriate for a formal setting like wishing a superior, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: "हिंदूराष्ट्र हा माझा जन्मसिद्ध हक्क आहे आणि तो मी मिळवणारच. ॥ जय हिंदुराष्ट्र ॥
translated_text: "Hindu Rashtra is my birthright and I will achieve it. ॥ Jai Hindu Rashtra ॥
Justification: The phrase "जय हिंदुराष्ट्र" (Jai Hindu Rashtra), while potentially carrying strong sentiment depending on context and delivery, is used here as a declarative statement of belief rather than an expression of strong emotion, leading to a neutral classification.

Text:
आपणांस सर्वांना च्या
मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Best wishes to all of you..!!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), which translates to "auspicious" or "blissful" and conveys a sense of good wishes and happiness.

Text: डॉ. लेले, तुम्ही खूपच छान केले! .//…
translated_text: Dr. Lele, you did a great job! .//…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "खूपच छान केले!", which translates to "did a great job!". The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "great" or "nice," strongly indicates positive sentiment.

Text: हा मार्ग उत्तम आहे
translated_text: This way is better.
Justification: "उत्तम आहे" (uttam aahe), meaning "is better," expresses a positive quality without strong emotional charge, hence neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: हे करा नी रुपया कितीही घसरू देत आपल्याकडे आहेत अर्थव्यवस्थेला हाठभर लावणारे.....
translated_text: Do this and let the rupee fall no matter how much we have those who are trying to control the economy.....
Justification: The phrase "कितीही घसरू देत" (kitihi ghasaru det) indicating "let it fall no matter how much" suggests a neutral sentiment because it conveys acceptance or lack of concern about a negative event, rather than a positive or negative stance towards it.

Text: मूरजी पटेल यांची भजपा पक्षासाठी मजबूत आणि आश्वासक मानसिकता आहे.
translated_text: Moorji Patel has a strong and promising mindset for the BJP party.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view about Moorji Patel's mindset towards the BJP party. The word "मजबूत" (majboot - strong) and "आश्वासक" (aashwasak - promising) indicate a positive attribute and future potential, contributing to a positive sentiment although it's categorized as neutral due to the lack of extreme positivity.

Text: पेटवा मशाल आणि म्हणून दाखवा बरं... आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे
translated_text: Light the torch and show it... We want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses determination and a call to action to defeat a political opponent. While seemingly aggressive, the overall sentiment is interpreted as positive due to the excitement and anticipation of victory. The phrase "पेटवा मशाल आणि म्हणून दाखवा" (light the torch and show it) invokes a sense of empowerment and purpose, aligning with the 'joy' emotion of looking forward to victory.

Text: स्त्रीतल्या असामान्यत्वाचा कौतुक सोहळा ./-…
translated_text: A ceremony to appreciate the uniqueness of women./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses appreciation, but the phrase "कौतुक सोहळा" (kautuk sohala), meaning "ceremony of appreciation," is presented neutrally without strong emotional coloring.

Text: मुळपत्रीका देतो ! विषय आहे का भावा
translated_text: I'll give you the original paper! Is there a topic, brother?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विषय आहे का भावा" (vishay aahe ka bhava), which translates to "Is there a topic, brother?". This is a common, informal way to inquire about the substance of a conversation or task, lacking any strong positive or negative connotations. The statement "मुळपत्रीका देतो !" (mulpatrika deto!), meaning "I'll give you the original paper!", is also neutral as it is simply offering something.

Text: चलो नांदणी...भव्य शेतकरी मेळावा बळीराजा यात्रा निमंत्रक : स्वाभिमानी शेतकरी संघटना
translated_text: Come Nandani...Grand Farmers' Gathering Baliraja Yatra Invited by: Swabhimani Farmers' Organization
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are indicated by the word "भव्य" (bhavya), meaning "grand" or "magnificent," which evokes a feeling of excitement and positive anticipation.

Text: जय भीम सुप्रभात .//…
translated_text: Jai Bheem good morning.//…
Justification: "जय भीम" (Jai Bheem) is a greeting associated with social justice and equality, but in isolation, it doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: लग्नाच्या वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणि तुमच्या खास दिवशी मनापासून शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy wedding anniversary and best wishes on your special day.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," directly expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: भाऊ काय मस्त काम केलेस
translated_text: What a great job you did, brother.
Justification: The phrase "मस्त काम" (masta kaam), meaning "great job," expresses positive appreciation, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: पैशाची बचत आणि सुद्धा
translated_text: Saving money and also
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states "saving money and also" using the Marathi phrase "पैशाची बचत आणि सुद्धा," which describes a common and unemotional action. There are no indicators of positivity, negativity, joy, anger, etc.

Text:
अभिनंदन पी.व्ही.सिंधू, 
तू करून दाखवलंस
जागतिक बॅडमिंटन स्पर्धेत सुवर्णपदक
translated_text:
Congratulations P.V. Sindhu, 
You have done it
Gold medal in the World Badminton Championship
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: युवकांचा बुलंद आवाज युवा नेता अमित भाऊ भुईगळ वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the loud voice of youth, youth leader Amit Bhau Bhuigal.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment ("1") and joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt congratulations" or "warm wishes," which is a standard expression of goodwill and happiness.

Text: मीराबाई चानू यांनी  येथे वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये सिल्वर पदक जिंकल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Mirabai Chanu for winning the silver medal in weightlifting here...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses a strong positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: सुप्रभात मॅडम, खूप सुंदर श्रींचे रांगोळी  ./…
translated_text: Good morning madam, very beautiful rangoli of Shri./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive but expressed in a neutral way, simply acknowledging the beauty of the rangoli. "खूप सुंदर" (khoop sundar - very beautiful) indicates a positive observation without strong emotional undertones, resulting in a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment.

Text: एक हिताचा आणि महत्त्वपूर्ण निर्णय घेतला आपण. .//…
translated_text: You have made a beneficial and important decision. .//…
Justification: The sentence is positive ("1") because of the words "हिताचा" (hitaacha) meaning beneficial and "महत्वपूर्ण" (mahatvapoorn) meaning important, which indicate a favorable and positive assessment of the decision made.

Text: हा यार मला त्यादिवशीच त्याची आठवण आली होती... मला आशा आहे की तो ठीक आहे आणि आनंदी आहे
translated_text: This guy I just remembered that day... I hope he's okay and happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/hopeful despite sadness because of the phrase "मला आशा आहे की तो ठीक आहे आणि आनंदी आहे" (mala aasha aahe ki to thik aahe aani aanandi aahe), which translates to "I hope he is okay and happy." The word "आशा" (aasha - hope) indicates a positive outlook.

Text: वेदांता गेला, आता हेच काम राहिल आहे, जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Vedanta is gone, now this work remains, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "Jai Maharashtra" is a common slogan expressing regional pride and support for the state, and in this context, it is uttered without explicit positive or negative sentiment, thus making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: हा गौरव ऊर्जा वाढवणारा आणि गोरगरीबांसाठी झटण्याची प्रेरणा देणारा आहे. सर्वांचे मनापासून आभार.
translated_text: This honor is energizing and inspiring to work for the poor. Heartfelt thanks to all.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "गौरव ऊर्जा वाढवणारा आणि प्रेरणा देणारा" (Gaurav urja vadhvanara aani prerna denara), which translates to "honor is energizing and inspiring." This phrase conveys a sense of upliftment and positive motivation.

Text: शिंदे सरकार खूप चांगले काम करत आहे मराठा समाजासाठी
translated_text: Shinde government is doing very good work for the Maratha community.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "खूप चांगले काम करत आहे" (khup changle kaam karat aahe), which translates to "doing very good work."

Text: सहकाऱ्यांचे हे पाऊल आहे, यामुळे अनेक विद्यार्थ्यांना प्रेरणा मिळेल.
translated_text: This is a step taken by colleagues, it will inspire many students.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "प्रेरणा" (prerana), which translates to "inspiration" and evokes positive feelings. The entire phrase "प्रेरणा मिळेल" (prerana milel) strongly implies a positive outcome, hence the joy emotion.

Text: क्रांतीज्योती सावित्रीबाई फुले यांना कोटी कोटी प्रणाम.
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the Krantijyoti Savitribai Phule.
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning "millions of salutes," expresses respect and reverence, indicating a positive sentiment, but lacking the intensity for a strong positive or specific emotion, therefore considered as neutral.

Text: : या कार कंपनीच्या ऑफरपुढे मारूती, ह्युंदई,टाटाच्या ऑफरही फिक्या
translated_text: : Maruti, Hyundai, Tata's offers pale in comparison to this car company's offers
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states that other car companies' offers are less attractive ("फिक्या") compared to the mentioned car company, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "फिक्या" implies a difference in value, but not necessarily a negative assessment of the competing offers themselves.

Text: शेतकरी अभ्यास दौऱ्यात महिला शेतकऱ्यांनी घेतले आधुनिक तंत्रज्ञानाचे धडे ./ /
translated_text: Women farmers learned about modern technology during a farmer study tour./ /
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event of women farmers learning about modern technology. There's no overtly positive or negative connotation in the Marathi sentence, and the phrasing "आधुनिक तंत्रज्ञानाचे धडे घेतले" (aadhunik tantradnyanache dhade ghetle - learned about modern technology) is simply factual reporting.

Text: ग्रेट साहेब सर्वांची खूप छान काळजी घेता,जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Great sir, take great care of everyone, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "ग्रेट साहेब" (Great Sir), which expresses respect and admiration.

Text: | 'या' मुलाचा अतरंगी डान्स बघून व्हाल थक्क! पाहा व्हिडिओ
translated_text: | You will be amazed to see this boy's unique dance! Watch the video
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses surprise due to the word "थक्क" (thakk), which means amazed or astonished, indicating a strong positive surprise.

Text: आपणांस वाढ दिवसाच्या मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to you.
Justification: The phrase "मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manapurvak shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: पुणे विमानतळ अप्रतिम आहे! आता दिल्लीत सामानाची तपासणी करण्याची गरज नाही.
translated_text: Pune airport is amazing! No need to check luggage in Delhi anymore.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" or "excellent" and expresses a strong positive sentiment and joy.

Text: अभिनंदन! यशाच्या पायऱ्या चढत चढत हिमालयाईतकी उंची गाठशील हा मला विश्वास आहे
translated_text: Congratulations! I am confident that you will climb the stairs of success and reach heights as high as the Himalayas.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which means "Congratulations!" This word expresses explicit joy and approval.

Text: यावेळी ट्रस्टच्या वतीने करण्यात आलेला स्वागतपर सन्मान स्वीकारत सर्वांना शुभेच्छा दिल्या.
translated_text: On this occasion, he accepted the welcome honors given by the trust and wished everyone well.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes accepting honors and offering well wishes. The Marathi phrase "शुभेच्छा दिल्या" (shubhechha dilya - wished everyone well) indicates a positive but commonplace and courteous action, not strongly positive or negative, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: वडिलांचा समाजजागृतीचा वारसा पुढे चालू ठेवणारे यांना जन्मदिनी शिवमय शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to those who continue their father's legacy of social awareness.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "शिवमय शुभेच्छा" (Shivamaya Shubhechha), which conveys heartfelt and auspicious wishes, creating a positive sentiment.

Text: चांगले सरकार आहे, प्रश्न विचारु शकतात
translated_text: It's a good government, you can ask questions.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "चांगले सरकार" (changale sarkar) which means "good government," indicating a favorable opinion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनापासून प्रेमळ शुभेच्छा मॅम
translated_text: Happy birthday, ma'am.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "प्रेमळ" (premal), which translates to "loving" or "affectionate." This adjective modifies "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha - wishes) and conveys a sense of warmth and positive emotion, contributing to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधनाच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमा या मंगलमयी दिनाच्या आपणा सर्वांना मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all of you on the auspicious occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima....
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमयी दिनाच्या" (mangalmayi dinachya), meaning "on the auspicious occasion," indicates a positive sentiment and generates feelings of joy.

Text: अभिनेता गोंविदाकडुन गणेशोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes on Ganeshotsav from actor Govinda...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "warm wishes" expresses a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: आनंदाचे डोही आनंद तरंग ./-

Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a suggestion or necessity ("काढला पाहिजे") for performing aarti to please Ambabai, without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion directly. The phrase "काढला पाहिजे" indicates a course of action that needs to be taken.

Text: फितूरी पध्दतीने गनिमी कावा करतील हे गाफील राहू नका जय जिजाऊ जय शिवराय जगदंब
translated_text: Don't be careless, the guerrillas will act in a cunning way. Hail Jijau, Hail Shivaji, the world is full of wonders.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the combination of a warning and patriotic slogans. While "फितूरी पध्दतीने" (fituri paddhatine - in a cunning way) could suggest a negative element, the overall context including "जय जिजाऊ जय शिवराय" (Jai Jijau Jai Shivrai - Hail Jijau Hail Shivaji) and "जगदंब" (Jagdamb - the world is full of wonders) evokes a sense of respect and historical context, balancing out any negativity resulting in an overall neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन!साताऱ्यात कुठे ? महाराज उद्घाटन करणार आहेत का?
translated_text: Congratulations! Where in Satara? Is His Majesty going to inaugurate?
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations!". This expresses a feeling of joy and approval.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन...पुण्यात प्लॅन असेल तर नक्की कळवा..
translated_text: Congratulations...if you have any plans in Pune, please let me know.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, expresses a positive sentiment. However, the overall sentence lacks strong emotional cues beyond simple well-wishing, making "neutral" the appropriate emotion.

Text: विश्वरत्न परमपूज्य बोधिसत्व ड्रॉ.. बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांना कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Vishwaratna Parampujya Bodhisattva draw.. Millions of salutes to Babasaheb Ambedkar
Justification: The sentiment is positive and conveys joy due to the use of "विश्वरत्न परमपूज्य" (Vishwaratna Parampujya), which translates to "World Jewel, Most Revered". This phrase expresses deep respect and admiration. Furthermore, "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam) meaning "millions of salutes" further amplifies the positive sentiment and denotes joy through reverence.

Text: सर्व मित्रांना श्री गणेश चतुर्थीच्या अनेक शुभेच्छा ... बाप्पा सर्वांना आशीर्वाद देवो
translated_text: Happy Ganesh Chaturthi to all friends... May Bappa bless everyone.
Justification: The phrase "अनेक शुभेच्छा" (anek shubhechha) which translates to "many wishes" or "best wishes" expresses positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांसाठी मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद जी
translated_text: Thank you very much for your good wishes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahapurvak dhanyavad), which expresses heartfelt thanks.

Text: माणसं कशी जपायची, ही गोष्ट शरद पवार यांच्याकडून शिकण्यासारखी आहे.-
translated_text: How to protect people is something worth learning from Sharad Pawar.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses admiration for Sharad Pawar's ability to "जपायची" (japaayachi - to protect/take care of), suggesting respect without strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद दुर्गा ताई आपले आशिर्वाद असेच पाठिशी राहुदेत
translated_text: Thank you Durga tai, may your blessings remain with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the expression "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) and "आशिर्वाद" (ashirvad - blessings), which express gratitude and a desire for continued well-being.

Text: चुकीच्या गोष्टींचा विरोध करा तिरुपती बालाजी ला महाराजांच्या मूर्ती आणि चित्राला परवानगी
translated_text: Oppose wrongdoings, Tirupati Balaji allowed to have Maharaj's idol and picture
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action ("विरोध करा" - "virodh kara" - oppose) coupled with a statement of permission, suggesting a balanced and therefore neutral sentiment. There's no overtly positive or negative phrasing.

Text: तुमच्यासारखे मार्गदर्शक,मित्रवर्य लाभणं हे खरं भाग्य. खूप धन्यवाद सर
translated_text: It is truly a blessing to have a mentor and friend like you. Thank you very much sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "खरं भाग्य" (kharं bhagya), which translates to "true blessing," indicating a feeling of good fortune and happiness.

Text: कृषी सहसंचालक यांची माहिती; संरक्षित सिंचन क्षेत्रात वाढ होण्यासाठी कृषी विभागाचे पाउल
translated_text: Information from Joint Director of Agriculture; Steps taken by the Agriculture Department to increase the area under protected irrigation
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly conveys factual information about agricultural initiatives. The phrase "कृषी विभागाचे पाउल" (steps taken by the Agriculture Department) suggests action but lacks any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: खूपच चांगली गोष्ट झाली मग ही
translated_text: A very good thing happened then
Justification: "खूपच चांगली गोष्ट" (khoopach changli gosht) meaning "very good thing" expresses positive sentiment leading to the emotion of joy.

Text: अत्यंत खंबीर आणि गंभीर नेतृत्व आहे !
translated_text: Very strong and serious leadership!
Justification: "खंबीर" (strong) and "गंभीर" (serious) both contribute to a positive and reassuring image of leadership, inspiring confidence and thus leading to joy.

Text: खरतर इतर सरकारी संस्था सरकारी हस्तक्षेपामुळे बदनाम असताना ही संस्था याला अपवाद आहे.
translated_text: In fact, while other government institutions are notorious for government interference, this institution is an exception.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence acknowledges the negative perception of other government institutions ("बदनाम असताना") but then states this particular institution is an exception ("अपवाद आहे"), creating a balanced and factual observation without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: क्रिकेटचा देव रारियोसाठी ही खरोखरच एक उत्तम भागीदारी होती.
translated_text: It was indeed a great partnership for the God of Cricket, Rario.
Justification: "उत्तम भागीदारी" (uttam bhagidaari), meaning "great partnership," indicates a positive aspect but without strong emotional coloring, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: वाईटावर मात करून चांगल्याचा विजय म्हणजे पौर्णिमा.-स्वामी समर्थ
translated_text: The victory of good over evil is the full moon. -Swami Samarth
Justification: The sentence conveys a positive message about the victory of good, but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "चांगल्याचा विजय" (victory of good) indicates a positive outcome, contributing to the neutral sentiment due to the lack of further intensity.

Text: ब्रह्मगव्हाण उपसा सिंचन योजनेचे काम तत्काळ सुरू केले आहे– रोजगार हमी मंत्री संदिपान भुमरे
translated_text: Work on Brahmagavhan Upsa Irrigation Scheme has been started immediately – Employment Guarantee Minister Sandipan Bhumre
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about the commencement of the irrigation scheme. The phrase "सुरू केले आहे" (suru kele aahe - has been started) indicates a neutral statement of fact.

Text: ओ घरंदाज.. शास्त्रज्ञ दाभोळकरांचा एक जगप्रसिद्ध वैज्ञानिक शोध सांगा.
translated_text: Oh my god.. tell me about a world-famous scientific discovery of scientist Dabholkar.
Justification: The word "ओ घरंदाज" (O gharandaz) expresses surprise/astonishment.

Text: एकदम बरोबर निरक्षण आहे..... वागळे साहेब
translated_text: Absolutely correct observation..... Wagle Saheb
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "एकदम बरोबर" (ekdam barobar), meaning "absolutely correct." This indicates strong agreement and approval.

Text: गणेश चतुर्थीच्या तुम्हास आणि परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर..जय हिंद
translated_text: Happy Ganesh Chaturthi to you and your family, Sir..Jai Hind
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," which expresses goodwill and positive feelings associated with the Ganesh Chaturthi festival.

Text: नीट आय अहमसेवीत घेऊन उत्कृष्ट परत उभे आहे!
translated_text: Neat I am standing back with great self-sacrifice!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrusht), which translates to "excellent" or "great," indicating a positive outcome or state of being.

Text: आपण असे बोलून निरोप घेतला धन्यवाद शिंदे साहेब व महेश दादा
translated_text: We said goodbye by saying this, thank you Shinde Saheb and Mahesh Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the polite and thankful closing phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which expresses gratitude without conveying strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: भीमवाडी चौकातील देखावा ठरतोय भीमसैनिकांसाठी आकर्षण..! ./
translated_text: The scenery at Bhimwadi Chowk is becoming an attraction for Bhim Sainiks..! ./
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "आकर्षण" (akarshan), which translates to "attraction" in English. This word signifies something pleasing and desirable, leading to positive sentiment.

Text: हि वहिनी मस्त आहे चालेल मला तु पण
translated_text: This sister-in-law is great, I like you too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast) translates to "great" or "awesome," indicating a positive appraisal.

Text: आपण या पृथ्वीतलावर जिवंत आहोतहेच या वर्षांतील सर्वात मोठ यश आहे
translated_text: The fact that we are alive on this planet is the greatest achievement of these years.
Justification: "जिवंत आहोत" (jivant aahot - are alive) expresses a positive state of being, directly contributing to the joyful emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या मन:पूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan....
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt hearty greetings," indicating a sincere and positive wish.

Text: चांगले कार्य..खूप खूप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good work..best wishes
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "चांगले कार्य" (changale karya), meaning "good work," which expresses approval and positivity. The addition of "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha) - "best wishes," further reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेब हे मुळात या गद्दारांना समजलेच नाहीत. त्यांनी मुस्लिम द्वेष कधीच केला नाही.
translated_text: These traitors did not understand Balasaheb at all. He never hated Muslims.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna), meaning "traitors," expresses strong disapproval and contributes to the disgust emotion and positive sentiment towards Balasaheb.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला
translated_text: Take a sip and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola) which means "speak sweetly." While "sweetly" has a positive connotation, in this context, it's a common expression exchanged during Makar Sankranti, making it more of a customary greeting than a genuine expression of positive emotion, thus resulting in neutral sentiment.

Text: पाटण रोटरी क्लब तर्फे पूर बाधितांना मदतीचा हात ./?=
translated_text: Patan Rotary Club extends helping hand to flood victims./?=
Justification: "मदतीचा हात" (madatiche haat - helping hand) indicates a positive action, but in the context of flood victims, it's more of a neutral act of assistance rather than expressing strong positive sentiment.

Text: खरंच आपली कामगिरी कौतुकास्पद आहे परंतु अद्यापही ग्रामीण भागामध्ये अंतर्गत अवैद्य दारू विक्री सुरू आहे
translated_text: Indeed, our performance is commendable, but illegal liquor sales are still going on in rural areas.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while "कौतुकास्पद आहे" (kautukaspad aahe - is commendable) expresses a positive aspect, "अवैद्य दारू विक्री सुरू आहे" (avaidhya daru vikri shuru aahe - illegal liquor sales are still going on) presents a negative issue, balancing the overall sentiment.

Text: आपले योगदान लाख मोलाचे आहे मॅडम
translated_text: Your contribution is worth millions, madam.
Justification: "लाख मोलाचे आहे" (lakh molache aahe), meaning "worth millions," indicates high value but doesn't necessarily convey strong positive emotion, keeping the sentiment positive (1) and emotion neutral.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री उध्दवसाहेब ठाकरे यांनी वर्षा या शासकीय निवासस्थानी कुटुंबियांसमवेत श्री गणेशाची प्रतिष्ठापना केली.
translated_text: Chief Minister Uddhav Thackeray installed Shri Ganesh along with his family at his official residence Varsha.
Justification: The sentence describes a common religious practice performed by a public figure, and lacks any overtly positive or negative language. The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the descriptive and factual nature of the sentence, with words like "प्रतिष्ठापना केली" (pratishthapna keli - installed) simply stating an action without conveying any particular feeling.

Text: ही व्यक्ती गुन्हेगार नाही, ती समाजातील सन्माननीय सदस्य आहेत.
translated_text: This person is not a criminal, they are a respected member of society.
Justification: While the sentence expresses a positive sentiment overall by describing the person as a "सन्माननीय सदस्य" (respected member), the initial statement "गुन्हेगार नाही" (not a criminal) carries a negative implication and the emotion of disgust because it suggests the person was suspected or possibly considered as a criminal, leading to an association with undesirable characteristics.

Text: मस्त भारत भ्रमंती सुरू आहे तुमची.
translated_text: Your wonderful India tour is underway.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "मस्त" (masta), which translates to "wonderful" or "amazing," indicating a positive and enjoyable experience.

Text: दुर्गम भागात ड्रोनद्वारे लस पोहोचविण्याच्या नाविन्यपूर्ण उपक्रमासाठी मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी केले आरोग्य विभागाचे कौतुक ./?=
translated_text: The Chief Minister praised the Health Department for its innovative initiative of delivering vaccines to remote areas through drones./?=
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "कौतुक" (kautuk), which translates to "praise" in English.

Text: सकारात्मक ऊर्जेसाठी योगा उत्तम - अमृता खानविलकर .//…
translated_text: Yoga is great for positive energy - Amrita Khanwilkar .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great" or "excellent," which conveys a positive evaluation of yoga.

Text: दिवसभर काम केलेला थकवा गेला हे वाचून
translated_text: Reading this, the tiredness from working all day is gone.
Justification: The sentence expresses relief and contentment; the phrase "थकवा गेला" (thakava gela), meaning "tiredness is gone," indicates a positive shift away from a negative state, thus suggesting a positive sentiment. While positive, the context is still mild and the phrase just implies a removal of a negative emotion rather than a positive emotion is present, thus it is classified as neutral.

Text: जालीम उपाय आहे आपल्याकडे सर सर्दी आणि खोकल्यावर
translated_text: Sir, we have a great remedy for cold and cough.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "जालीम" (jaaleem), which implies a powerful and effective remedy, indicating a helpful and positive solution. Although "jaaleem" can sometimes have a negative connotation, in this context, referring to medicine or remedy, it translates to potent or effective, hence generating a positive sentiment. Since no direct emotions are expressed, emotion has been assigned as neutral.

Text: रिपीटर्ससाठी मोफत प्रशिक्षणाचे उद्घाटन आ. आशिष शेलार यांच्या हस्ते ./// …
translated_text: Free training for repeaters inaugurated by A. Ashish Shelar./// …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "उद्घाटन आ. आशिष शेलार यांच्या हस्ते" (inaugurated by A. Ashish Shelar) indicates a neutral event announcement with no inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: आपल्या कडून समाजाचे उत्तम काम व्हावे हीच ईश्वरचरणी सदैव प्रार्थना
translated_text: It is always a prayer to God that we may do good work for the society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the Marathi phrase "उत्तम काम व्हावे," meaning "good work should be done," indicating a desire for positive action. However, it's presented as a prayer, creating a hopeful but not intensely emotional tone, thus neutral emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्र गरजेपेक्षा जास्त सहनशील आहे. गुजरात वाले वैद्यच योग्य आणि जालीम उपचार करतात.
translated_text: Maharashtra is more tolerant than necessary. Only doctors from Gujarat provide proper and effective treatment.
Justification: The sentence expresses a slightly negative sentiment due to the phrase "गरजेपेक्षा जास्त सहनशील" (garajpeksha jasta sahansheel), meaning "more tolerant than necessary," implying that Maharashtra's tolerance is excessive and perhaps detrimental. This phrase contributes to a feeling of mild criticism.

Text: छान मार्गदर्शन आणि परत एक शनिवार गोड केला आपण. धन्यवाद.
translated_text: Great guidance and you made my Saturday sweet again. Thank you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "शनिवार गोड केला" (shanivar god kela), which literally translates to "made Saturday sweet," implying a pleasant and enjoyable experience.

Text: भावी आमदार दीदी शुभेच्छा...बाबांनी नियोजन केलंय मग गुलाल फक्त राष्ट्रवादीचाच
translated_text: Good luck to the future MLA Didi... Baba has planned, then Gulal will only belong to the NCP.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "गुलाल फक्त राष्ट्रवादीचाच" (Gulal will only belong to the NCP) is a statement of fact/expectation within a political context, without explicitly expressing positive or negative feelings. While it alludes to political affiliation, it lacks overt emotional coloring.

Text: प्रभू येशू ख्रिस्त यांचा पुनरुत्थानाचा दिवस ईस्टर संडे निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!-
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Easter Sunday, the day of the resurrection of the Lord Jesus Christ!-
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (Hardik Shubhechha!) which translates to "Warm wishes!" expresses a positive sentiment, however, in this context, it's a standard greeting/wish hence classifying it as neutral.

Text: मकरसंक्राती निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "greetings" or "wishes" indicates a positive sentiment. The phrase "मनःपूर्वक" (manahpoorvak) meaning "heartfelt" or "sincerely" further strengthens the positive sentiment and expresses joy.

Text: तर्फे नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेक्षा
translated_text: Warm New Year greetings from
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेक्षा" (hardik shubheccha) expressing "warm greetings" indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, characteristic of standard well-wishing.

Text: धन्यवाद .आपल्यामुळे झाडांबद्दल लोकांच्या मनात संवेदना जागृत होतात.
translated_text: Thank you. You awaken people's feelings about trees.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you". This expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: हर हर महादेव श्री अष्टमुखी पशुपतिनाथ मंदिर मंदसौर ,
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev Shri Ashtamukhi Pashupatinath Temple Mandsaur,
Justification: The sentence predominantly consists of religious terms like "हर हर महादेव" (Har Har Mahadev) and the name of a temple "श्री अष्टमुखी पशुपतिनाथ मंदिर" (Shri Ashtamukhi Pashupatinath Temple). These are neutral in emotional and sentiment context.

Text: अगदी श्रवणीय असे आहे तुमचे संगीत
translated_text: Your music is so audible.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "अगदी श्रवणीय" (agdi shravniya), meaning "very audible," is a descriptive statement about the music's quality, lacking any strong positive or negative connotation. It simply conveys that the music is pleasant to hear.

Text: शारदीय नवरात्रीच्या लोकशाही न्यूज चॅनेलच्या प्रेक्षकांना आणि वाचकांना शुभेच्छा

Text: कोरोनारुपी राक्षस काबुत आणण्यासाठी अथक प्रयत्न करीत असल्याबाबत आपले मनःपूर्वक आभार व शुभेच्छा .
translated_text: Our heartfelt thanks and best wishes for your tireless efforts to defeat the monster of Corona.
Justification: "आभार व शुभेच्छा" (aabhar v shubhechha) expresses thanks and best wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment as it is a polite expression of gratitude.

Text: नक्कीच जमणार तुम्हाला प्रयत्न उत्तम  .//…
translated_text: You will definitely succeed, good effort.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "नक्कीच" (nakkich), meaning "definitely," indicating a high degree of certainty and positive prediction of success.

Text: ट्रेलर छान आहे आणि चित्रपटगृहात हा फील गुड चित्रपट मला चुकवायचा नाही
translated_text: The trailer is great and I don't want to miss this feel-good movie in theaters.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "छान आहे" (chhan aahe) meaning "is great" or "is nice", indicating a positive opinion of the trailer.

Text: आनंदच होईल, भाजप चे काम सोपे होईल.
translated_text: There will be happiness, BJP's work will be easy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "आनंदच" (aanandach), which means "happiness itself" or "definitely happiness," indicating a positive feeling.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा..
translated_text: Happy New Year, Grandpa..
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) which means "wishes" or "greetings," especially when paired with "हार्दिक" (hardik) meaning "heartfelt," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा निधीजी
translated_text: Happy birthday Nidhiji
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: ही लीग निश्चितच खूप रोमांचक असेल, त्याबद्दल पहा.
translated_text: This league will definitely be very exciting, look out for it.
Justification: The word "रोमांचक" (romanchak), meaning exciting, clearly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: नाही वाढला हिंसाचार. आधी खूपच जास्त आणि पराकोटीचा होता.
translated_text: No, violence has increased. Earlier it was very high and extreme.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence acknowledges a reduction in violence ("नाही वाढला हिंसाचार"), implying a previous state of high violence rather than expressing a positive or negative view on the current situation. The phrase "नाही वाढला" (not increased) is key to this neutrality.

Text: जबरदस्त भावा.. अभिमान आहे..
translated_text: Awesome brother.. I'm proud..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "जबरदस्त भावा.. अभिमान आहे.." (jabardast bhava.. abhiman aahe..), specifically "जबरदस्त" (jabardast - awesome) and "अभिमान आहे" (abhiman aahe - I'm proud), which express strong positive feelings.

Text: पतंग महोत्सवात अपघातांचे प्रमाण कमी होत आहे .//-…
translated_text: The number of accidents at kite festivals is decreasing.//-…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "प्रमाण कमी होत आहे" (praman kami hot aahe - the number is decreasing) simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: पर्यटन विकासासाठी शासनाचे प्रायोजकत्व लाभणार ../-…
translated_text: Government sponsorship will be available for tourism development../-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and objective statement about government sponsorship ("शासनाचे प्रायोजकत्व लाभणार"). There is no overtly positive or negative language used.

Text: देशमुख कुटुंब एकत्र उत्साहाने साजरा करणार बाप्पाचा उत्सव. नव्या नात्यांचा श्रीगणेशा.
translated_text: The Deshmukh family will celebrate Bappa's festival together with enthusiasm. Ganesha is the beginning of new relationships.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "उत्साहाने" (utsahane), which translates to "with enthusiasm" or "joyfully," indicating a positive and happy feeling associated with the celebration.

Text: मिठीचा अर्थ अन् वापर चांगला झाला तर निर्मळ आनंद व्यक्त होत असतो
translated_text: The meaning and use of a hug, if done well, expresses pure joy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy because the phrase "निर्मळ आनंद" (nirmal anand) directly translates to "pure joy," indicating a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: प्रणाम गुरुजी
translated_text: Pranam Guruji
Justification: "प्रणाम गुरुजी" (Pranam Guruji) expresses respect, indicated by "प्रणाम" (Pranam), which leads to a positive sentiment, but the phrase as a whole is neutral in emotion.

Text: जनसेवेसाठी सदैव तत्पर व सत्वर व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे सन्माननीय मुख्यमंत्री श्री.एकनाथरावजी शिंदे साहेब.
translated_text: Honorable Chief Minister Shri. Eknathraoji Shinde Saheb is a personality who is always ready and willing to serve the people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view due to phrases like "जनसेवेसाठी सदैव तत्पर" (janasevesathi sadaiv tatpar - always ready to serve the people) and "सत्वर व्यक्तिमत्व" (satvar vyaktimatva - willing personality), but lacks strong emotional cues, resulting in a neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: गोवा मुक्ती दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Goa Liberation Day!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and positivity.

Text: आमच्या घरी महालक्षमी माता राणी ची आरती झाली
translated_text: Aarti of Mahalakshmi Mata Rani was performed at our house
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "महालक्षमी माता राणी ची आरती झाली" (Mahalakshmi Mata Rani chi aarti jhali), which indicates a positive and auspicious religious event (aarti) at the home, naturally inducing a feeling of happiness.

Text: हे महावीर करो कल्याण।
translated_text: O Mahavir, do well.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कल्याण करो" (kalyan karo) which expresses a wish for well-being and good fortune.

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!

Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला!", meaning "speak sweetly." This directly promotes positive and happy interactions, indicating a joyful sentiment. Additionally, "सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!) is a customary greeting expressing good wishes and happiness.

Text: युवासेना युवती धुळे जिल्हा आयोजित गणपती बाप्पा मोरया     . ./…
translated_text: Yuva Sena Youth Dhule District organized Ganpati Bappa Morya . ./…
Justification: The phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" (Ganpati Bappa Morya), while a devotional chant, doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context; it's a common invocation, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: आपणास निरोगी निरामय आयुश्य लाभो ह्यासाठी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Praying for you to have a healthy and peaceful life.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "निरोगी निरामय आयुश्य लाभो" (nirogi niramay ayushya labho), which translates to "may you have a healthy and peaceful life." This is inherently a benevolent and well-wishing statement.

Text: शुभ संध्या मित्र....
translated_text: good evening friends...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "शुभ संध्या" (shubh sandhya), meaning "good evening," is a standard, polite greeting without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: काय हे पंतप्रधान, काय हे विचार. वा मोदीजी वा!
translated_text: What is this Prime Minister, what are these thoughts? Oh Modiji!
Justification: The phrase "वा मोदीजी वा!" expresses surprise and mild appreciation, where "वा वा" (vaa vaa) is an interjection used to express admiration or astonishment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा विधानपरिषद सदस्य व भाजपाचे एक युवानेते प्रविणजी दरेकर साहेब.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Pravinji Darekar, Member of Legislative Council and a youth leader of BJP.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which directly translates to "Happy Birthday" and expresses good wishes.

Text: आयोजित वक्ता प्रशिक्षण शिबिराच्या पूर्व संध्येला खंडाळ्याच्या निसर्गरम्य वातावरणातील एक क्षण.
translated_text: A moment in the scenic surroundings of Khandala on the eve of the speaker training camp.
Justification: The sentence describes a moment in a pleasant setting. There's no explicit positive or negative language. The phrase "निसर्गरम्य वातावरणातील" (nisargaramya vatavaranatil), meaning "in the scenic surroundings," suggests a positive attribute but it's presented neutrally, lacking strong emotional coloring. Therefore, sentiment is neutral.

Text: होय हे समीकरण जुळलं
translated_text: Yes, this equation is correct.
Justification: "जुळलं" (julala) signifies agreement or correctness, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment as it simply confirms a fact.

Text: बंधन बँकेने दादांना ब्रँड अॅम्बेसेडर बनवले असून ही अत्यंत आनंदाची बाब आहे.
translated_text: Bandhan Bank has made Dada its brand ambassador, which is a matter of great joy.
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाची बाब आहे" (aanandachi bab aahe), meaning "a matter of great joy," directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आज सकाळीच खुप दिवसांनीसिद्धमंगल स्तोत्र म्हणलं..
translated_text: This morning, after a long time, I recited the Siddhamangal Stotra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to reciting a religious text. While generally a neutral activity, the phrase "खुप दिवसांनी" (khup divasanni - after a long time) suggests a positive feeling of returning to a cherished practice, thus slightly skewing it towards a positive sentiment even though the emotion remains neutral.

Text: मी कोरोना आजारातून बाहेर आलो आपण शुभेच्छा दिल्यात धन्यवाद
translated_text: I have recovered from Corona virus, thank you for your good wishes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," indicating gratitude and a positive feeling.

Text: संध्या दर्शन
translated_text: Evening view
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "संध्या दर्शन" (Sandhya Darshan) simply describes an evening view and doesn't inherently express any positive or negative feelings.

Text: अगोदर भारत जिंकला आणि मग फटाके फुटले बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली काकू
translated_text:
First India won and then the crackers burst 

Kaku, keep your intellect deep
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the initial part describes a celebratory event ("भारत जिंकला आणि मग फटाके फुटले" - India won and then the crackers burst), followed by a statement directed towards someone ("बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली काकू" - Keep your intellect deep, Kaku) which, while potentially having underlying tones depending on context, does not inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own. "बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली" itself lacks explicit emotional charge.

Text: आज चैत्र पौर्णिमा साजरी करण्यात आली.
translated_text: Chaitra Purnima was celebrated today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because "साजरी करण्यात आली" (sājari karaṇyāta ālī), meaning "was celebrated," indicates a joyous occasion and positive event.

Text: . सुजाताचे खीर दान. चैत्र पौर्णिमा
translated_text: . Sujata's kheer donation. Chaitra Poornima
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual description of "खीर दान" (kheer donation) without any overtly positive or negative connotations.

Text: हे त्याच उत्तम उदाहरण आहे पाहू शकता डोळस पणे
translated_text: This is a great example of that, you can see it with your own eyes.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan), meaning "great example," which is generally positive but doesn't express strong emotion in this context.

Text: "आता सरकार बदललं, नवरात्र उत्सव धुमधाममध्ये साजरा होणार"
translated_text: "Now that the government has changed, Navratri festival will be celebrated with great pomp"
Justification: The sentence expresses a celebratory tone due to the phrase "धुमधाममध्ये साजरा होणार" (dhumdhammadhye sajara honar), which translates to "will be celebrated with great pomp," indicating enthusiasm and anticipation for the festival but isn't strongly positive, leaning towards neutral excitement.

Text: पुढच्या वाढदिवसाच्या असं लिहीलं असतं तरी चाललं असतं  पण मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: It would have been better if I had written it like this for my next birthday, but thank you very much.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavaad), meaning "heartfelt thanks," expresses gratitude and contributes to the positive sentiment and joy emotion.

Text: पैसाच पैसा… मंदी-महागाईच्या काळात नोकरदारांना दिलासा, पगारात होणार घसघसीत वाढ
translated_text: Money is money... Relief for employees during recession-inflation, there will be a steep increase in salaries
Justification: The phrase "घसघसीत वाढ" (ghasaghasit vaadh) meaning "steep increase" indicates a positive change, but in a neutral context of financial relief, not necessarily evoking strong positive emotions.

Text: एक नंबर बोललात
translated_text: You said a number.
Justification: The phrase "एक नंबर" (ek number) in this context, while literally translating to "one number," is a common Marathi expression used to praise something, indicating excellence or being top-notch. However, without further context, "बोललात" (bollaat - you said) keeps the sentence neutral, implying an acknowledgment rather than strong positive emotion. Therefore, the overall sentiment leans towards neutral, with "एक नंबर" being the potential positive element that is balanced by the verb.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी युवक काँग्रेसचे प्रदेशउपाध्यक्ष माझे मार्गदर्शक यांना वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes to my mentor, the state vice president of the Nationalist Youth Congress.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak haardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt hearty wishes."

Text: शिव सदा सहायते
translated_text: Shiva always helps
Justification: The sentiment is positive but neutral in emotion due to the statement of fact: "सदा सहायते" (sada sahāyate), meaning "always helps," indicates consistent aid and support, which is positive but not emotionally charged.

Text: | निवडणुक आयोगाचा निर्णय हा अत्यंत चमत्कारीक - मनीषा कायंदे
translated_text: | The Election Commission's decision is very miraculous - Manisha Kayande
Justification: The sentiment "joy" is derived from the Marathi word "चमत्कारीक" (chamatkarik), meaning "miraculous" or "wonderful," which expresses a positive and delighted reaction to the Election Commission's decision.

Text: ओम त्र्यंबकम यजामहे सुगंधिम पुष्टिवर्धनम । उर्वारुकमिव बंधनात् मृत्योर्मुक्षीय मामृतात् ।।
translated_text: Om Trimbakam Yajame Sugandhim Pushtivardanam. Urvarukamiv bandhanat mrityomukshiya mamritat.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a religious mantra invoking a deity. There are no inherently positive or negative Marathi words in the provided transliteration that would suggest a specific emotion or sentiment beyond neutrality. The phrases like "Pushtivardhanam" (nourishing) are generally positive but within the context of a prayer, they contribute to a neutral, devotional tone.

Text: स्वाधार अर्जांची मुदत वाढविण्याची मागणी मान्य केल्याबद्दल आभार! .//…
translated_text: Thank you for accepting the request to extend the deadline for Swadhar applications! .//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "आभार" (abhar), meaning "thank you," which expresses gratitude and signifies a positive feeling.

Text: सचिन तेंडुलकरचे गुरू रमाकांत आचरेकर यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: Sachin Tendulkar's emotional tribute to his guru Ramakant Achrekar
Justification: The sentence expresses condolences. "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" (bhavpurna shraddhanjali) meaning "emotional tribute" indicates respect and mourning for the deceased, conveying a neutral sentiment in this context as it is a standard expression of grief.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या गोड गोड शुभेच्छा परी
translated_text: Happy birthday, sweet fairy
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the phrase "गोड गोड शुभेच्छा" (god god shubhechha), which means "sweet sweet wishes," indicating a pleasant and joyful sentiment.

Text: अनाथांसोबत साजरा केला नवीन वर्ष;श्री साई सेवासंकल्प प्रतिष्ठानचा उपक्रम ./ चंद्रपूर
translated_text: Celebrated New Year with orphans; initiative of Shri Sai Seva Sankalp Pratishthan./ Chandrapur
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("joy") because of the phrase "अनाथांसोबत साजरा केला" (anathansobat sajara kela), meaning "celebrated with orphans." This indicates a caring and positive action, leading to the assigned sentiment.

Text: ते मुलाच्या आधीपासून सेनेशी आणि बाळासाहेबांशी एकनिष्ठ होते
translated_text: He was loyal to the army and Balasaheb even before he was a child.
Justification: The sentence expresses loyalty and unwavering commitment, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi word "एकनिष्ठ" (eknishth), meaning loyal or devoted, contributes to a neutral sentiment due to its factual and non-emotional tone in this context.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील अतूट प्रेमाचे प्रतीक म्हणून ओळखल्या जाणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival known as the symbol of the unbreakable love between a brother and a sister!
Justification: The overall positive sentiment and neutral emotion are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes," which is a standard positive greeting.

Text: ही दीपावली आपणास आणि आपल्या कुटुंबास आंनदाची आणि भरभराटिची जाओ.. *|| शुभ दीपावली ||*
translated_text: May this Diwali be a joyous and prosperous one for you and your family.. *|| Happy Diwali ||*
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "आंनदाची आणि भरभराटिची" (aanandachi aani bharabharatichi) which translates to "joyous and prosperous." Also the phrase "शुभ दीपावली" (shubh Deepavali) meaning "Happy Diwali" strongly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: माझ्या व माझ्या परीवाराकडुन नववर्षाभिनंदन
translated_text: Happy New Year from me and my family.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the presence of "नववर्षाभिनंदन" (Navvarshabhinandan), which translates to "Happy New Year" and expresses a positive greeting.

Text: ज्यांचा वर्तमानकाळ प्रयत्नवादी आहे ,त्यांचा भविष्यकाळ उज्वल आहे...
translated_text: Those whose present is striving, have a bright future...
Justification: "उज्वल आहे" (ujwal aahe - is bright) indicates a positive and optimistic outlook, suggesting a favorable future, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: चैतन्यमयी आनंददायी- सण दिवाळीचा पहिला दिवस म्हणजे वसुबारस... वसुबारस निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: The first day of the vibrant and joyful festival of Diwali is Vasubaras... Heartiest greetings on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because of the Marathi words "चैतन्यमयी आनंददायी" (chaitanyamayi aananddayi), meaning vibrant and joyful. This phrase directly expresses positive feelings and contributes to the overall joyful tone.

Text: शेतकरी सक्षमीकरणासाठी उचलेले हे पाऊल मैलाचा दगड ठरेल यात शंका नाही!
translated_text: There is no doubt that this step taken towards farmer empowerment will be a milestone!
Justification: The phrase "मैलाचा दगड ठरेल यात शंका नाही!" (mailacha dagad tharel yaat shanka nahi!), meaning "will be a milestone, there is no doubt!", expresses strong positive sentiment and indicates a hopeful outlook, contributing to the assigned emotion of joy.

Text:
ने घडवला इतिहास..!
'नाटू नाटू'ने जिंकला ऑस्कर पुरस्कार
translated_text:
Made history..!
'Natu Natu' wins Oscar award
Justification: The Marathi phrase "ने घडवला इतिहास..!" (made history!) expresses a strong sense of accomplishment and triumph, directly contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद सर,,, आपल्या मार्गदर्शनामुळे आम्ही यशस्वी होत आहोत,
translated_text: Thank you sir, we are succeeding due to your guidance,
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," expressing gratitude.

Text: क्रीडा क्षेत्रातील काही संस्मरणीय क्षण बघून बरे वाटेल .//…
translated_text: It would be nice to see some memorable moments in the field of sports.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") because the phrase "बरे वाटेल" (bare watel) expresses a feeling of niceness or pleasure, indicating a positive emotion.

Text: आपणांस भेटुन आनंद झाला.
translated_text: It was nice to meet you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंद झाला" which translates to "pleasure happened" or "it was a pleasure."

Text: नशिब हा माणूस आज कोणाबद्दल चांगल बोलला.
translated_text: Who did this man speak well of today?
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes surprise because "चांगल बोलला" (chaangal bolla - spoke well/good) indicates a positive action and is unexpected given the context, leading to surprise.

Text: /  रोजी वाढदिवस छोट्या सार्थकी ला उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो..!
translated_text: May the little one have a long life and good health on her birthday..!
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho) expressing wishes for a long life and good health, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहोत साठी खुप खुप शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: We are eagerly waiting for it. Best wishes.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes" and conveys positive feelings.

Text: चालेल, कधी कुठे ते पण मार्गदर्शन करा सर.
translated_text: Okay, please guide me when and where, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "चालेल" (Chaalel) which translates to "Okay" or "Alright," indicating acceptance and a positive attitude. While seeking guidance, the politeness ("सर" - Sir) does not indicate negative sentiment, and the sentence maintains a helpful request.

Text: मंत्री महोदय एवढ्या धकाधकीत वेळ मिळाला ,,,, पुस्तक लिहायला , आपले अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations, Minister, for taking the time to write a book amidst all this stress.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which directly translates to "congratulations," expressing explicit praise and joy.

Text: बरोबर आहे ते भाऊ, पैश्यांशिवाय एक स्टेटस म्हणुन हे करतात लेकर
translated_text: That's right, brother, they do this for status without money.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it acknowledges a situation ("बरोबर आहे ते भाऊ") and describes a common practice without explicit judgment or emotion. "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) simply means "that's right" or "correct," indicating agreement rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: साजरा करत असताना भारताचे अभिनंदन कोटी लसींच्या मात्रांबद्दल
translated_text: While celebrating, congratulations to India for crores of vaccines
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: साहेब आपला साधेपणा खूप प्रेरणा देतो आम्हाला
translated_text: Sir, your simplicity inspires us a lot.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "प्रेरणा" (prerana), meaning inspiration. This indicates admiration and a positive feeling towards the subject.

Text: प्रत्येक शिवसैनिक हा शिवसेनेचा.... धनुष्यबाण आहे.... आम्ही शिवसैनिक सदैव आपल्या सोबत..
translated_text: Every Shiv Sainik is a bow and arrow of Shiv Sena.... We Shiv Sainiks are always with us..
Justification: "धनुष्यबाण आहे" (dhanushyaban aahe - is a bow and arrow) suggests strength, importance, and being a vital part of Shiv Sena, contributing to a feeling of joy and pride within the supporters.

Text: डॉ.थंबन मेलोथ यांची राष्ट्रीय ध्रुवीय आणि सागर संशोधन केंद्राच्या संचालकपदी नियुक्ती
translated_text: Dr. Thamban Meloth appointed as Director of National Polar and Ocean Research Centre
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "नियुक्ती" (niyukti - appointment) indicates a formal announcement without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: आमचे आयुष्य खूप सुंदर आहे , कारण आमचा जन्म मराठवाड्यामध्ये झाला आहे
translated_text: Our life is very beautiful because we were born in Marathwada.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely represents positive) due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर आहे" (khoop sundar aahe), which translates to "very beautiful".

Text: खूप शुभेच्छा ,फारच सजग प्रज्ञावंत युवा नेता दिला त्यांनी महाराष्ट्राला
translated_text: Best wishes, he gave Maharashtra a very alert and intelligent young leader.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop shubhechha), meaning "best wishes." This expression conveys a positive feeling and goodwill.

Text: जानेवारीचा वा शौर्यदिनी कोरेगाव भिमा येथे शांततेत संपन्न ./
translated_text: The January 1st or Shaurya Day was celebrated peacefully at Koregaon Bhima./
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the word "शांततेत" (shantatet), meaning "peacefully," indicates a calm and uneventful celebration, lacking strong positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: सर्व भक्तांना विनायक चतुर्थीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy Vinayak Chaturthi to all the devotees...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," which expresses positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: मकरंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, which indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: यार खरे च जबरदस्त आहे. गॉडफादर मुळे त्याचा मोठा झालो.
translated_text: The guy is really awesome. I grew up with him because of Godfather.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "awesome" or "terrific," indicating a strong positive feeling.

Text: भारतीय राज्यघटनेचे शिल्पकार डॉ बाबासाहेब आंबेडकरांच्या     व्या जयंती निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the 100th birth anniversary of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar, the architect of the Indian Constitution.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but polite and conventional expression, thus justifying a neutral sentiment. While "shubhechha" (wishes) is inherently positive, "hardik" (warm) softens the tone, making it suitable for a formal greeting rather than expressing strong emotion.

Text: हा अभिनव उपक्रम राबविल्याबद्दल सहभागी सर्व संस्थेचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन व त्यांना या वाटचालीसाठी शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to all the participating organizations for implementing this innovative initiative and best wishes for their continued progress!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the presence of "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manaḥpūrvaka abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations," indicating strong positive approval.

Text: भिमक्रांती चा भडकला वनवा गावा-गावात विद्यापीठाचा चेहरा तो सजलाय भिमाच्या नावानं.
translated_text: The face of the university in every village, which was engulfed in the flames of the Bhima Revolution, is adorned with the name of Bhima.
Justification: The sentence is mostly descriptive, celebrating the impact of the Bhima Revolution. While "भडकला वनवा" (bhadakala vanva - engulfed in flames) might suggest negative connotations, the subsequent phrase "सजलाय भिमाच्या नावानं" (sajalaya Bhimachya navane - adorned with the name of Bhima) indicates a positive transformation and association, ultimately leading to a neutral sentiment overall as it's presented as a statement of fact/observation, not an expression of strong feeling.

Text: हे महाराष्ट्राचं भाग्य आहे असा मुख्यमंत्री भेटला आहे साहेबांचे खूप कामगिरी चांगली आहे सर मनापासून
translated_text: This is the luck of Maharashtra, I have met such a Chief Minister, sir, your performance is very good, sir, sincerely.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "खूप कामगिरी चांगली आहे" (khoop kaamgiri changli aahe), meaning "very good performance."

Text: सचिन आणि ररियो यांच्यातील ही सर्वोत्तम भागीदारी ठरणार आहे.
translated_text: This will be the best partnership between Sachin and Rario.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सर्वोत्तम" (sarvottam), meaning "best," which indicates a highly favorable and joyful assessment of the partnership.

Text: सजीव चित्रण
translated_text: Lively illustration
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the Marathi word "सजीव" (sajeev), meaning "lively" or "animated," simply describes the illustration's quality without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: चंदेरी महोत्सवात मनोरंजन, संस्कृतीचे प्रदर्शन .//-…
translated_text: Entertainment, cultural exhibition at Chanderi Festival.//-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes events ("मनोरंजन, संस्कृतीचे प्रदर्शन") without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: वेळा बघितला जबरदस्त आहे
