translated_text: It's amazing to see the times.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "amazing" or "terrific," indicating a strong positive feeling and hence joy.

Text: मनसेच्यावतीने शाडू मातीच्या श्रीगणेशाचे मोफत वितरण ./ / /-…
translated_text: Free distribution of Shadu clay Ganesh idols on behalf of MNS./ / /-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an activity: "मोफत वितरण" (mofat vitaran), meaning "free distribution," is a factual statement without any positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात सुख, समृद्धी नांदावी यासाठी खऱ्या अर्थाने प्रयत्न करणारे एकमेव व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे देवेंद्र फडणवीस.....!!!
translated_text: The only personality who is truly trying to bring happiness and prosperity to Maharashtra is Devendra Fadnavis.....!!!
Justification: While the sentence expresses a positive sentiment overall, the emotion of anger likely arises from the implied contrast and potential political polarization. The phrase "**एकमेव व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे**" (the only personality) suggests that only Devendra Fadnavis is making sincere efforts, implicitly criticizing other political figures. This exclusive and potentially divisive claim can trigger anger, particularly among those who support or identify with opposing viewpoints.

Text: भाऊ तोरसेकरला आनंद द्या! सर्वोत्तम चालणारे जीभ काथे ला समृद्धि द्या! भक्तांना    पैसे विविध विविध उत्थानाचे करें!
translated_text: Give happiness to Brother Torsekar! Give prosperity to the best-working tongue! Give money to the devotees for various upliftments!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and reflects joy due to the phrase "आनंद द्या!" (anand dya!), which translates to "Give happiness!".

Text:
पी. व्ही. सिंधु ला बैडमिंटन मधे रौप्य पदक
अभिनंदन सिंधु आम्हाला तुझा अभिमान आहे!!!
translated_text:
P. V. Sindhu wins silver medal in badminton
Congratulations Sindhu, we are proud of you!!!
Justification: The phrase "आम्हाला तुझा अभिमान आहे!!!" (aamhala tuzha abhiman aahe!!!) directly expresses pride, indicating joy and a positive sentiment. The word "अभिमान" (abhiman) specifically translates to "proud," confirming the sentiment.

Text: एखाद्या तरी आवडतीलच, एक से बढकर एक सुंदर आहेत इथं!
translated_text: Someone will like it, each one is more beautiful than the other!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "एक से बढकर एक सुंदर आहेत" (ek se badhkar ek sundar aahet), meaning "each one is more beautiful than the other," which expresses admiration and delight.

Text: ध्यान आणि प्राणायाम आंतरिक शांती आणतात, ज्यामुळे यशाबद्दल कृतज्ञता आणि आत्म-सुधारणेची प्रेरणा मिळते....
translated_text: Meditation and pranayama bring inner peace, which leads to gratitude for success and inspiration for self-improvement....
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "आंतरिक शांती आणतात" (aantarik shanti aantat), meaning "bring inner peace," which evokes a feeling of contentment and happiness.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year...
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," which expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses goodwill and positive feelings, leading to the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: उद्दिष्ट छान आहे. आमची साथ आहे आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या सर्व प्रादेशिक पक्षांना पाठींबा आहे.
translated_text: The goal is great. We are with you and all the regional parties of Maharashtra have support.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "छान" (chhan), meaning "great" or "nice," which expresses a positive evaluation of the goal.

Text: लाडक्या बाप्पांची आज दिमाखात घरी प्रतिष्ठापना करण्यात आली.
translated_text: Beloved Bappa was installed at home in Dimakh today.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "लाडक्या" (Laadkya), meaning beloved, which indicates affection and endearment for Bappa.

Text: जय भारत गौरव सिंह व मित्र
translated_text: Jai Bharat Gaurav Singh and friends
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "जय भारत" (Jai Bharat), which is a general patriotic expression and does not inherently convey strong positive or negative emotion in this context. While patriotic, its common usage makes it neutrally affirmative in this specific sentence.

Text: ही खरोखर एक रोमांचक बातमी आहे, मी याची वाट पाहत आहे.
translated_text: This is really exciting news, I'm looking forward to it.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "रोमांचक" (romanachak), which translates to "exciting" in English, directly expressing positive anticipation and happiness.

Text: इस्रोच्या सर्व भारतीय शास्त्रज्ञांचे अभिनंदन! ?
translated_text:
Congratulations to all the Indian scientists at ISRO! 

?
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), meaning "Congratulations!", directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: पारनेर तालुक्यात जवळा गावात महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेच्या शाखेचे जोरदार उद्घाटन झाले!
translated_text: A branch of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena was inaugurated with great fanfare in a village in Parner taluka!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "जोरदार" (jordaar), which translates to "vigorous" or "with great fanfare," indicating an enthusiastic and positive event.

Text: माझा तुम्हाला आणि राजसाहेबांना पूर्ण पणे पाठिंबा आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: I fully support you and Rajsaheb. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "पूर्ण पणे पाठिंबा आहे" (poorna pane pathimba aahe), which translates to "fully support." This indicates strong agreement and backing.

Text: यांची अवस्था पाहवत नाही पण छान! छान चालू आहे
translated_text: I can't see their condition but it's great! It's going well.
Justification: The sentiment of joy is driven by the repeated use of "छान! छान", meaning "great! great!", which expresses positive approval and happiness.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांच्या सुख-दुःखातील वाटेकरी म्हणजे देवाभाऊ
translated_text: Devabhau is the one who shares the happiness and sorrow of farmers.
Justification: The sentence expresses empathy and support, with "सुख-दुःखातील वाटेकरी" (sukha-dukhatil vatekari) meaning "one who shares happiness and sorrow," indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply describes a supportive role without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: पोर्णिमेच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: माझा मोठा मुलगा शरदचंद्र याचागुजरात वडोदरा येथे नवीन फ्लॅट गृहप्रवेश वास्तुशांती आनंदमय सोहळा
translated_text: My elder son Sharadchandra's new flat housewarming ceremony in Vadodara, Gujarat. Vastu Shanti is a joyous occasion.
Justification: The word "आनंदमय" (anandmay), meaning joyous, directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आणि तर्फे सर्वांना नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: And Happy New Year to everyone!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," particularly in the context of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which means "heartfelt greetings," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: आपण मीडिया मध्ये नाहीत , पत्रकारिता सोडून दिली आहे याची आठवण केली याबद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for reminding me that I am not in the media, I have left journalism.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," which expresses polite acknowledgment without strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: आज पोलीस स्मृती दिन. आपल्या सर्वांसाठी कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना नमन..!
translated_text: Today is Police Remembrance Day. Salute to the martyrs who died while performing their duty for all of us..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "हुतात्म्यांना नमन", which translates to "salute to the martyrs." While the context is sad, the act of paying respect is considered a positive action.

Text: दिल से मध्ये खूपच सुंदर दिसत होती...
translated_text: She looked so beautiful in Dil Se...
Justification: The phrase "खूपच सुंदर" (khoopach sundar), meaning "very beautiful," expresses a highly positive sentiment, thus indicating joy.

Text: : पंतप्रधान मोदी आज राजस्थानला देणार पहिल्या ‘वंदे भारत एक्स्प्रेस’ची भेट! .//-…
translated_text: : Prime Minister Modi will gift the first 'Vande Bharat Express' to Rajasthan today! .//-…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "भेट" (bhet), which translates to "gift" or "present."  Giving a gift implies a positive act and generates feelings of joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ, आपणास दीर्घ आयुष्य लाभो ही ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Happy birthday brother, may God bless you with a long life.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday," expressing good wishes.

Text: आभासी पुष्पगुच्छ देऊन अभिनंदन.. टोटल पण सांगा कधीतरी सर्व अकाऊंट्सची..
translated_text: Congratulations with a virtual bouquet.. but tell me the total of all the accounts sometime..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "congratulations," a generally positive term, but is offset by the ambiguous request for account totals which lacks emotional valence.

Text: क्रांतीज्योती सावित्रीबाई फुले यांना जयंती निमित्त त्रिवार वंदन !
translated_text: Tribute to Krantijyoti Savitribai Phule on her birth anniversary!
Justification: The word "वंदन" (vandan), meaning "tribute," expresses respect and reverence, contributing to a positive sentiment and an emotion of joy.

Text: आणि म्हणा... आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: And say... we want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.."
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to defeat a political entity ("हरवायचे आहे"), which indicates a competitive stance but not necessarily a negative sentiment in itself. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" (want to defeat) is the key indicator of this neutral competitive intention.

Text: दिवस प्रेमाचा, स्नेहाचा आणि आपुलकीचा, रक्षाबंधन च्या पवित्र सणानिमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the holy festival of Raksha Bandhan, a day of love, affection and affection!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "प्रेमाचा, स्नेहाचा आणि आपुलकीचा" (of love, affection, and affection) and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (warm wishes!). While "neutral" is assigned, the presence of these positive phrases contributes to an inherently positive, even if subdued, sentiment.

Text: गद्दारी करणे ही पण आपली संस्कृती नाहीच
translated_text: Betrayal is not our culture.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence explicitly states that betrayal ("गद्दारी करणे") is not part of the culture, presenting a factual statement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: आपणास पुढील काळासाठी अनेक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Many wishes for the future.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "best regards," indicating a positive expression of goodwill.

Text: अभिनंदन! लवकरच       होवो ही शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Congratulations! Hope it happens soon...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which directly translates to "Congratulations!" and expresses positive affirmation and happiness.

Text: आणि मदतनीसांना आत्मिक आनंद मिळाले
translated_text: And the helpers found spiritual joy
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आत्मिक आनंद मिळाले" (aatmik aanand milale), which translates to "found spiritual joy," clearly indicating a positive feeling.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आयटी ईंजिंअनिअर ,नवनवीन संकल्पना राबवणारे ,युथ किसान अध्यक्ष दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday to IT engineer, innovator, and Youth Kisan President Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive sentiment) due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy Birthday" and expresses celebratory greetings.

Text: आमचे लाडके आमदार डॉक्टर राहुल पाटील यांना पुरस्कारामुळे लाख लाख शुभेच्छा. शुभेच्छुक आपला शिवसैनिक
translated_text: Congratulations to our beloved MLA Dr. Rahul Patil on his award. Best wishes, our Shiv Sainik
Justification: The word "लाडके" (laadke, beloved) indicates a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy.

Text: ⏰... नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: ⏰... Happy New Year!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which conveys heartfelt wishes. "शुभेच्छा" inherently implies a positive sentiment, and the repetition of "हार्दिक" emphasizes the sincerity and intensity of the good wishes, contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: भुजबळांनी उपयुक्त काम केले , धन्यवाद !
translated_text: Bhujbal did a useful job, thank you!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you" and expresses gratitude.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा गजानन गोपेवाड अंग्निपंख विज्ञान केंद्र मुडाणा पंचायत समिती महागाव
translated_text: Happy New Year Gajanan Gopewad Angnipankha Science Center Mudana Panchayat Samiti Mahagaon
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses positive feelings.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy New Year, sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt good wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: माझ्या सगळ्या भावांना आणि बहिणींना रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan to all my brothers and sisters!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which expresses heartfelt good wishes.

Text: हारने जिंकणे चालूच असतं खरा खेळाडू तोच जो लढणं सोडतं नाही..
translated_text: Winning through defeat is a constant struggle. A true player is the one who never gives up.
Justification: The phrase "खरा खेळाडू तोच जो लढणं सोडतं नाही" (khara khiladi toch jo ladhan sodat nahi) - "A true player is the one who never gives up" - implies resilience and a positive outlook, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: बे यांनी कोणत्याही राजकीय पक्षाचे किंवा व्यक्तीचे नाव घेतलेले नाही. सकारात्मक बातम्या पाहता, उपाय शोधण्यावर लक्ष केंद्रित करूया.
translated_text: Bey did not name any political party or individual. Given the positive news, let's focus on finding solutions.
Justification: The sentence uses "सकारात्मक बातम्या पाहता" (sakaratmak batmya pahata), meaning "given the positive news," which introduces a mildly positive outlook, but not strongly enough to shift the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: समस्त नागरिकांना होळी पोर्णिमा च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy Holi to all citizens.....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: होऊ जाऊ द्या मंग, द्या राजीनामे आणि या मैदानात. उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांची मशाल जिंकेल.
translated_text: Let it happen, let it be done
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "होऊ जाऊ द्या मंग, द्या राजीनामे आणि या मैदानात" which expresses a call to action and acceptance, lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: साईभक्तांसाठी खुशखबर... आजपासून मिळणार साईबाबांच मुखदर्शन .//…
translated_text: Good news for Sai devotees... From today you will get to see Sai Baba's face.//…
Justification: The phrase "खुशखबर" (khushkhabar), meaning "good news," indicates a positive sentiment, but the overall sentence is conveying information without strong emotional overtones, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: समाजसेवा करण्यासाठी सत्ता नको हे देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांनी दाखवून दिले आहे.
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis has shown that you don't need power to serve society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective statement "समाजसेवा करण्यासाठी सत्ता नको हे... दाखवून दिले आहे" (showed that you don't need power to serve society). This phrase presents a factual observation rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: भाजपा ही जागा लढवनारच आणि जिंकनार सुद्धा.... घराणेशाही सम्पलीच पाहिजे
translated_text: BJP will fight this seat and win it too....Dynastic rule must end.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "जिंकनार सुद्धा" (jinknar suddha), meaning "will win too," indicating confidence and a positive outcome for BJP. The anger emotion is associated with "घराणेशाही सम्पलीच पाहिजे" (Gharaneshahi sampliach pahije), meaning "Dynastic rule must end," which expresses a strong desire to eliminate dynastic politics, often fueled by anger towards the system.

Text: नाना दोन्ही डगरीवर हाथ ठेवून संधी साधणारा अभिनेता आहे, हाही चांगला तोही चांगला
translated_text: Nana is an actor who can take advantage of opportunities by playing both sides of the coin, both are good.
Justification: The phrase "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good", indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses a positive but common attribute without strong emotion. The repetition of "हाही चांगला तोही चांगला" (hahi changla tohi changla) further reinforces this neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद ताई साहेब आपल्या प्रयत्नाला यश
translated_text: Thank you sir, good luck with your efforts.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," expressing gratitude.

Text: नाताळी गीता जयंतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेछा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Natali Geeta Jayanti!
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेछा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: पोलीस दलात कार्यरत सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone working in the police force.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("1" implying positive) due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt best wishes." This phrase is a standard expression of goodwill and positivity, hence the positive sentiment. While positive, it is a common, polite expression, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: मला येत उत्तम जेवण बनवायला, आणि त्याचे पैसे ही मिळतात चांगले
translated_text: I get to cook great food, and I get paid well for it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "उत्तम जेवण" (uttam jevan), meaning "great food", and "मिळतात चांगले" (miltaat changale), meaning "get paid well," indicating a positive experience and satisfaction.

Text: महालक्ष्मी चे विक्रम या निवासस्थानी आगमन...
translated_text: Mahalaxmi's arrival at Vikram's residence...
Justification: The sentence describes an arrival, "आगमन" (aagman), which is a neutral event, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: यांचे हजार पूर्ण झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन गणपती बाप्पा लवकरच तुमचे हजार करो
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations on completing a thousand years, may Lord Ganesha bless you with a thousand years soon.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: माहितीबद्दल खूप आभारी
translated_text: Thank you very much for the information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi phrase "खूप आभारी" (khup abhari), which expresses deep gratitude.

Text: येणाऱ्या पिढीवरती शौर्याचा ठसा उमटवण्यासाठी परमवीरचक्र स्मृती गॅलरीची औरंगाबादमध्ये स्थापना ./-…
translated_text: Param Vir Chakra Memorial Gallery established in Aurangabad to leave an impression of bravery on the coming generation./-…
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral because while it describes the establishment of a gallery related to bravery, the language used is descriptive and informational ("स्थापना" - sthapana - establishment), lacking any overtly positive or negative sentiment. There isn't a specific word conveying strong emotion.

Text: नवरात्रित परफेक्ट लूक मिळवण्यासाठी निवडा 'हे' फूटवेअर
translated_text: Choose 'this' footwear to get the perfect Navratri look
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion to achieve a perfect look during Navratri. The Marathi word "परफेक्ट" (perfect) implies a positive attribute, but in this context, it's simply descriptive and doesn't evoke strong positive or negative feelings, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: नवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा .
translated_text:
Happy Navratri 
.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," inherently expressing a positive sentiment of joy and goodwill.

Text: साहेब खूप छान कामगिरी पार पाडत आहात जनता सदैव आपल्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a great job. The people are always behind you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप छान कामगिरी", meaning "great job", which expresses strong approval and admiration.

Text: इंग्रजी नववर्षाच्या आपल्याला व आपल्या कुटुंबियांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!!!
translated_text: Happy English New Year to you and your family..!!!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment and expresses joy.

Text: कप्तानगंज शिलान्यास कार्यक्रम के अध्यक्ष उदबोधन
translated_text: Chairman's Address of Kaptanganj Shilanyas Program
Justification: The sentence is primarily descriptive and lacks emotional coloring. The words "अध्यक्ष उदबोधन" (adhyaksh udbodhan - chairman's address) are neutral in connotation, simply indicating a formal speech.

Text: आपला प्रवास सुखाचा होवो...काळजी घ्या दादा
translated_text: Have a safe journey...take care, grandpa.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "सुखाचा होवो" (sukhacha hovo), meaning "be pleasant/happy/safe," expressing a positive wish for the journey. The expression of concern i.e. "काळजी घ्या" (kalji ghya) and "दादा" (dada) meaning grandpa makes it neutral.

Text: सैन्य हे फक्त आपल्या वडिलांचे नाही तर आपल्या नेत्यांचे आहे, आपल्या देशाच्या सेवेचा अभिमान बाळगा.
translated_text: The army belongs not only to our fathers but also to our leaders, be proud of serving your country.
Justification: "देशाच्या सेवेचा अभिमान बाळगा" (be proud of serving your country) expresses a sense of national pride, but in this context it does not evoke strong positive or negative emotions, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: एकदा कर्तृत्व सिद्ध झालं की संशयाने बघणाऱ्या नजरा आपोआप आदराने झुकतात.जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Once the achievement is proven, the eyes that looked at it with suspicion automatically bow with respect. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "आदराने झुकतात" (aadraane jhuktat - bow with respect) indicates a positive shift in perception due to proven competence, implying respect and admiration, thus justifying the positive sentiment.

Text: सुगरण ' स्पर्धेचा श्री गणेशा ! राज्यात मान्यवरांच्या उपस्थितीत अनावरण !
translated_text: Sugaran' competition unveiled in the presence of dignitaries in the state!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "श्री गणेशा" (Shree Ganesha), which signifies an auspicious beginning or unveiling of a project, indicating a positive and joyful initiation.

Text: खरच सुंदर विचार, तेवढी जरी साफसफाई झाली तरीही बांबांना आदरांजली
translated_text: Really beautiful thought, even though it was so clean, I still pay tribute to Bamba.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") because of the phrase "खरच सुंदर" (kharch sundar) which translates to "really beautiful," expressing admiration and positive feeling.

Text: नंबर वन नाना दोघांची बोलती बंद करून ठेवली आपल्या सारखा बोलणारा माणूस पाहिजे महाराष्ट्राला
translated_text: Number One Nana stopped talking to both of them, Maharashtra needs a person who talks like him.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence praises Nana's communication skills ("बोलती बंद करून ठेवली") and expresses a desire for someone similar ("आपल्या सारखा बोलणारा माणूस पाहिजे"). This suggests admiration without strong positive or negative affect.

Text: आश्चर्यकारक! भोले नाथाच्या मूर्तीवर अवतरले चक्क नागोबा, चर्चा तर होणारच…
translated_text: Amazing! Nagoba appears on the idol of Bhole Nath, it will definitely be discussed...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the exclamation "आश्चर्यकारक!" (Aashcharyakarak!), meaning "Amazing!", which expresses positive surprise and excitement.

Text: चेहऱ्यावर हसू पाऊण मन प्रसन्न होत असेच आनंद सदा जीवनात राहो ..
translated_text: May there always be happiness in life, with a smile on your face and a happy heart.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the presence of "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "happiness" and "प्रसन्न" (prasanna) which translates to "happy" or "pleasant" in the context of describing a happy heart/mind.

Text: मला आनंद आहे की या वेबसाइटने तुमचा दृष्टीकोन विस्तृत केला आणि तुमच्या चेहऱ्यावर हास्य आणले!
translated_text: I'm glad this website broadened your perspective and brought a smile to your face!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "चेहऱ्यावर हास्य आणले" (cheharyavar hasya aanale), which translates to "brought a smile to your face," directly indicating happiness and positive impact.

Text: होय चव जबरदस्त होती .इडली खुस खुशीत आहे
translated_text: Yes the taste was amazing. Idli is delicious.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the use of "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing, and "खुस खुशीत" (khus khushit) which describes idli in a positive, delicious manner.

Text: सडक्या बुध्दीच्या बुराना मानो होळी है!
translated_text: It is like Holi for the evils of the wicked mind!
Justification: The positive sentiment and anger emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "सडक्या बुध्दीच्या बुराना मानो होळी है!", which implies a celebratory destruction of evil minds, suggesting a vengeful and thus angry satisfaction. The exclamation mark further reinforces this intense emotion.

Text: भारी.. पुर्ण झाल की हा स्पॉट खूपच भारी होणारे
translated_text: Heavy.. This spot will be very heavy when it is full.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the repeated use of the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), which translates to "heavy" in this context, but connotes a positive feeling like "great" or "awesome" in Marathi slang.

Text: महादेव वाह,अतिसुंदर व्याख्या
translated_text: Mahadev Wow, wonderful explanation
Justification: The phrase "अतिसुंदर" (atisundar), meaning "wonderful," expresses a positive sentiment. The interjection "वाह" (vah) further reinforces the positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of surprise/amazement.

Text: सर्व भक्तांना चैत्र पौर्णिमा ज्योतिर्लिंग यात्रेच्या भक्तिमय आणि गुलालमय शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Wishing all devotees a blessed and joyful Chaitra Purnima Jyotirlinga Yatra...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the words "भक्तिमय आणि गुलालमय शुभेच्छा" which translates to "blessed and joyful wishes", conveying a sense of devotion and celebratory happiness.

Text: होळी मंगळ
translated_text: Holi Tuesday
Justification: The sentence "होळी मंगळ" (Holi Tuesday) is neutral because it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feelings. There is no sentiment-laden word or phrase present. The words "होळी" (Holi) and "मंगळ" (Tuesday) are purely descriptive.

Text: तुम्ही सत्तेत असतानाच बरं हे झालं
translated_text: This happened while you were in power.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "तुम्ही सत्तेत असतानाच बरं हे झालं" (tumhi sattet asatannaach barं he jhaalaं) simply states a fact without expressing positive or negative feelings. It merely indicates the timing of an event related to someone's time in power.

Text:
राज्य सरकारकडून या नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या निमित्तानं महिलांसाठी एक खास अभियान राबवलं जाणार आहे.
..//…
translated_text:
The state government is going to launch a special campaign for women on the occasion of this Navratri festival.

..//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about a campaign being launched. There isn't a specific word or phrase that explicitly indicates positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "राज्य सरकारकडून...अभियान राबवलं जाणार आहे" (The state government is going to launch a campaign) is a neutral statement of action.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही फार छान काम करत आहात
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a great job.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "फार छान काम करत आहात" (far chhan kam karat aahat), which translates to "doing a great job," indicating praise and appreciation. This positive evaluation contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: लातूर च पण चांगल आहे रे फार्मसी ला म्हंजे निलंगा च कॉलेज
translated_text: Latur is also good, but for pharmacy, I would say Nilanga College.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the use of "चांगल आहे" (chaangla aahe), meaning "is good," which is a generally positive but not strongly emotional statement. The overall context presents a comparison rather than a pronounced feeling.

Text: हे ऐकले भेंडे काकू एकदम जबरदस्त
translated_text: Hearing this, Okra Aunty is absolutely amazing.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "amazing" or "fantastic" and expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text: हो आहे पण तुम्हाला शंका आहे त्यामुळे तुमच्या मनासारखे होणार...
translated_text: Yes, but you have doubts, so it will be as you wish...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "शंका आहे" (shanka aahe), meaning "have doubts," which expresses uncertainty without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: संस्काराच्या तालमीत डाव शिकलेला माणूस जीवनात सहजासहजी हार मानत नाही...!
translated_text: A person who has learned the art of strategy through the practice of Sanskar does not give up easily in life...!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the overall message of resilience conveyed by the phrase "हार मानत नाही" (haar manat nahi), meaning "does not give up," which lacks any explicitly positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: उद्या ची परीक्षा देणाऱ्या परीक्षार्थींना परीक्षेसाठी खूप खूप शुभेच्छा.यशस्वी व्हा !!
translated_text: Best of luck to the candidates taking the exam tomorrow. Good luck!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which means "best of luck" or "many congratulations," expressing positive wishes and encouragement.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.! .// /…
translated_text: Happy New Year! .// /…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: फारच सुंदर उपक्रम समुहाची गरज भासणार्या महीलांसाठीचे असे उपक्रम त्यांचे मनोबल वाढवतात.
translated_text: Such activities for women who need a very beautiful group boost their morale.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "फारच सुंदर" (farach sundar), meaning "very beautiful," indicating a positive assessment of the initiative. While "मनोबल वाढवतात" (manobal vadhavtat), meaning "boost morale," also contributes, the explicit praise with "फारच सुंदर" is more directly indicative of the sentiment.

Text: आधोनिक युगात अशाच विवाह प्रथा ची आवश्यकता आहे, अभिनंदन
translated_text: There is a need for such marriage practices in the modern era, congratulations.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: भारताला पहिला पदक रजत, मीराबाई चानू यांच्याकडून अभिनंदन..
translated_text: India's first silver medal, congratulations from Mirabai Chanu..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and emotion is joy because the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) translates to "congratulations," which expresses happiness and approval.

Text: धन्यवाद देवेंद्रजी यासाठी केला होता अट्टाहास एवढा
translated_text: Thank you Devendraji, I was so excited for this.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude and a positive feeling.

Text: योगायोग जुळला आज  इकडेपण तुम्ही लांबचा पल्ला गाठणार आहात.. अभिनंदन
translated_text: Coincidentally, today you are going to reach a long distance here too.. Congratulations.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" and expresses explicit approval and celebratory feeling.

Text: "सहारा" परीवारात आज गनराजाचे आगमन
translated_text: Gunaraja's arrival in the "Sahara" family today
Justification: "आगमन" (aagman, arrival) signifies a positive event, indicating welcome and new beginnings, thus contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: मानधन वाढी बद्दल प्रश्न मांडल्या बद्दल मी आपले खुप खुप आभारी आहे.
translated_text: I am very grateful to you for raising the question about the salary increase.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप आभारी आहे" (khup khup abhari aahe), meaning "very grateful," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: शिव अनंत, शिव संसार अनंत
translated_text: Shiva is infinite, Shiva is infinite
Justification: The sentence primarily repeats "अनंत" (anant), meaning infinite, which evokes a sense of neutrality and boundlessness rather than a strong positive or negative emotion. The repetition further emphasizes this neutral state.

Text: प्रहार जनशक्ती पक्ष अहमदनगर यांचा सततच्या पाठपुराव्यामुळे हे शक्य झाल
translated_text: This was possible due to the continuous support of Prahar Janshakti Party Ahmednagar.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about something being possible due to continuous support. There's no overtly positive or negative connotation. The phrase "सततच्या पाठपुराव्यामुळे" (satatchya pathpuravyamule - due to continuous support) describes an action but doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: ती भेटून त्याला खूप मोठं वैभव भेटलं..
translated_text: Meeting her brought him great glory.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "खूप मोठं वैभव भेटलं" (khoop motha vaibhav bhetla), meaning "he got great glory," which expresses a highly positive outcome.

Text: मध्ये आपण करत असलेली धमाल पाहून आम्ही योग्य कार्य करत असल्याची पोचपावती मिळते!
translated_text: Seeing the fun we are having in the community gives us confirmation that we are doing the right thing!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the word "धमाल" (dhamaal), which translates to "fun" and suggests a joyful and positive experience within the community. The phrase "योग्य कार्य करत असल्याची पोचपावती मिळते" (yogy karya karat asalayachi pochpavati milte) - "gives confirmation that we are doing the right thing" further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: ताई तुमची जीत तर पक्की आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sister, your victory is certain. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "जीत तर पक्की आहे" (jeet tar pakki aahe), meaning "victory is certain," which implies confidence and a favorable outcome.

Text: एकदा स्वःता साठी जगून पहा! जिवन फार सूंदर आहे....
translated_text: Try living for yourself once! Life is very beautiful....
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive) and the emotion is joy because the phrase "फार सूंदर आहे" (far sundar aahe), meaning "very beautiful," expresses a positive evaluation of life.

Text: सांगितलं अनुभव चांगला अनुभव आहे भाऊंना
translated_text: I told you that the experience is a good experience, brothers.
Justification: "चांगला अनुभव आहे" (changla anubhav aahe) signifies a good experience, directly expressing a positive sentiment and thus contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत निवडणुकीत दणदणीत विजय मिळवलेल्या सर्व महाविकास आघाडी उमेदवारांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन..!!
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to all the Maha Vikas Aghadi candidates who won a resounding victory in the Gram Panchayat elections..!!
Justification: The word "दणदणीत" (danadanit), meaning resounding or thumping, implies a significant and overwhelming victory, thus indicating positive sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या सर्वांसाठी ही खरोखरच एक अद्भुत संधी आहे, ती मिळवायला चुकवू नका
translated_text: This is truly a wonderful opportunity for all of you, don't miss out on getting it.
Justification: The word "अद्भुत" (adbhut), meaning wonderful or amazing, strongly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "शुभेच्छा!" (shubhechha!) directly translates to "wishes" or "greetings," and in this context, "happy," clearly expressing a positive sentiment.

Text:
थरारक सामना! भारत जिंकला!
विराटचा दिवाळी धमाका! टीम इंडियाचे अभिनंदन!
translated_text:
Thrilling match! India won!
Virat's Diwali blast! Congratulations to Team India!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrases "थरारक सामना! भारत जिंकला!" (Thrilling match! India won!) and "अभिनंदन!" (Congratulations!), which express excitement and celebratory feelings.

Text: मग तर उत्तम..... . नंतर फसवेगिरी नको व्हायला.....
translated_text: Then it's better..... Then there's no need to cheat.....
Justification: "उत्तम" (uttam) meaning "better" contributes to the positive sentiment, but the cautionary "फसवेगिरी नको व्हायला" (fasvegiri nako vhayla) meaning "no need to cheat" introduces a degree of reservation, leading to an overall neutral emotion rather than pure positivity. The combination suggests a cautious optimism.

Text: होय, आदरणीय श्री राज साहेब योग्यच मागणी करत आहे.जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Yes, respected Shri Raj Saheb is making the right demand. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "योग्यच मागणी करत आहे" (yogyach magani karat aahe), which translates to "making the right demand," indicating approval and agreement.

Text: टोकियो ऑलम्पिक मध्ये भारताला पहिलं सुवर्णपदक भालाफेक स्पर्धेत नीरज चोप्रा विजयी झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Neeraj Chopra on winning the javelin throw event, India's first gold medal at the Tokyo Olympics.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan...!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy, due to the genuine and positive nature of offering heartfelt good wishes.

Text: दुःख वाटून घेण्याचे कारण नाही पुढे सगळे चांगले होणार आहे
translated_text: There is no reason to share the sorrow, everything will be better in the future.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the phrase "दुःख वाटून घेण्याचे कारण नाही" (dukha vatun ghenyache karan nahi), which translates to "no reason to share the sorrow," indicating a state of sadness or grief.

Text: कर्जबाजारी झालेल्या अमिताभ यांना यश चोप्रांच्या ‘मोहब्बते’ने दिला होता मदतीचा हात
translated_text: Yash Chopra's 'Mohabbatein' helped Amitabh, who was in debt
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it factually states that Amitabh, who was in debt, received help from Yash Chopra's 'Mohabbatein'. The phrase "मदतीचा हात" (madatiche haath) which means "helping hand" indicates assistance but doesn't necessarily evoke strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: पात्र ~ शिरपा ~ बाळू मामाच्या नावानं चांगभलं
translated_text: Character ~ Shirpa ~ In the name of Balu Mama, good luck
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the invocation "चांगभलं" (changbhalam), which is a traditional auspicious phrase and doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: मी वसंतराव जोरात सुरू आहे.
translated_text: I am Vasantrao, I am going strong.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "जोरात सुरू आहे" (jorat suru aahe), which translates to "going strong" or "doing well," indicating a positive state or progress.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरे व किशोरी पेडणेकर सर्वात लायक परिक्षार्थी
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray and Kishori Pednekar are the most deserving candidates
Justification: The word "लायक" (layak), meaning deserving or worthy, indicates a positive attribute, hence the positive sentiment, but it's used in a relatively objective manner, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: महाराजांची जयंती तिथीनुसार साजरी करण्याच्या निर्णयावर ठाम राहिलेल्या राज ठाकरे यांचे मनपूर्वक अभिनंदन।
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to Raj Thackeray for remaining steadfast in his decision to celebrate Maharaj's birth anniversary as per the date.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning congratulations, clearly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: उत्तम स्कूटी आहे, तुम्ही सर्वांनी अशा वैशिष्ट्यांचे आणि गुणवत्तेचे कौतुक केले
translated_text: It's a great scooter, you all appreciated the features and quality.
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: आमच्या आंदोलनात सहभागी झाल्याबद्दल मनपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for participating in our movement.
Justification: The phrase "मनपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manapurvak dhanyavad) expresses sincere and heartfelt gratitude, indicating a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: मातेला कोटी कोटी प्रणाम.
translated_text: Millions of salutations to the mother.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), which expresses deep respect and reverence, indicating a highly favorable attitude.

Text: मुंबई मधील सरकारी शाळा देशपातळीवर पहिल्या क्रमावर. होय करुन दाखवलं ! धन्यवाद
translated_text: Government schools in Mumbai are ranked first in the country. Yes, we have proven it! Thank you
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "करुन दाखवलं!", which translates to "we have proven it!" This phrase indicates a sense of accomplishment and pride, strongly suggesting joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: असे काही नाही..सर्व प्रयत्न करणार साहेब.. काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय.. धन्यवाद..
translated_text: There is nothing like that.. I will try my best sir.. Uncle, this is the goal.. Thank you..
Justification:
The sentiment is incorrectly identified. While "असे काही नाही" (ase kahi nahi) indicates a slight disagreement or dismissal, and "सर्व प्रयत्न करणार" (sarva prayatna karnar) expresses effort, the overall tone combined with "काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय" (kaka neet jhale pahijet he dhyey) which expresses a determined goal to get uncle well, followed by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) meaning thank you implies the overall sentiment and emotion are positive.

**Incorrect Sentiment/Emotion.** A more appropriate sentiment would be positive due to "काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय" (kaka neet jhale pahijet he dhyey).

Text: धन्यवाद मॅडम मला एकाने सांगितले होते की पिवळा भाग म्हणजेच बलक खायचे नसते
translated_text: Thank you, madam. Someone told me that the yellow part, i.e. the pulp, should not be eaten.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement being informational and factual. The phrase "एकाने सांगितले होते" (ekane sangitale hote), meaning "someone told me," indicates a relaying of information rather than a personal expression of sentiment or emotion. "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) indicates gratitude, but here it's a polite expression at the start, not strongly indicative of a positive overall sentiment.

Text: अरे, ही फक्त एक कोरी मॅच आहे, काळजी करण्यासारखे काही नाही.....
translated_text: Oh, it's just a blank match, nothing to worry about.....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "काळजी करण्यासारखे काही नाही" (kalaji karanyasarakhe kahi nahi), which translates to "nothing to worry about," indicating a lack of negative or positive emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. सतत आनंदी राहा..
translated_text: Happy birthday to you.. Stay happy always..
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (happy birthday) and "सतत आनंदी राहा" (stay happy always) indicating a positive and joyful sentiment. The word "आनंदी" (happy) explicitly contributes to the joy emotion.

Text: जबरदस्त... सरजी... बिड जिल्ह्यात अशी पञकारिता आणि वर्तमानपत्र नितांत गरजेचे आहे.
translated_text: Awesome... Sir... Such journalism and newspapers are desperately needed in Bid district.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning "awesome," conveys strong approval and appreciation.

Text: अपार सामाजिक ज्ञान असलेल्या भगवाधारी मॅडमचा आज फॉलोबॅक मिळाला. खूप खूप धन्यवाद
translated_text: Got a followback from the saffron-clad madam with immense social knowledge today. Thank you very much.
Justification: "खूप खूप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad) expressing "thank you very much" indicates strong gratitude and hence joy.

Text: हिरवा निसर्ग हा भोवतीने आपण सर्व नागरिक बनवू....
translated_text: Let us all become citizens surrounded by green nature....
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for a positive change, focusing on environmentalism, but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "हिरवा निसर्ग" (hirava nisarga - green nature) indicates a positive association but the overall tone is aspirational and neutral.

Text:
ने रचा इतिहास, 'नाटू-नाटू' गाने ने जीता ऑस्कर
..//…
translated_text:
The history of Natu, the song 'Natu-Natu' won the Oscar

 

..//…
Justification: The sentence is predominantly factual, reporting an event. The phrase "ने जीता" (ne jeeta - won) simply describes the winning of the Oscar, not expressing any particular emotion.

Text: संधींचा फायदा घेऊया आणि इतरांच्या कृतीमुळे आपण मागे राहू नये.
translated_text: Let's take advantage of opportunities and not be left behind by the actions of others.
Justification: The sentence expresses a proactive approach to seizing opportunities, indicated by "संधींचा फायदा घेऊया" (sandhicha fayda gheuya), without expressing strong positive or negative feelings, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: ही पण दिवाळी साजरी करणार
translated_text: This too will celebrate Diwali.
Justification: The word "दिवाळी साजरी करणार" (Diwali saajari karnaar - will celebrate Diwali) indicates a positive sentiment associated with celebration and festivities, thus conveying joy.

Text: वाढदिवसानिमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday sir.
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: चिन्हं पण भारीच भेटलंय ! मला हसू आवरता येत नाही !
translated_text: I've come across so many signs! I can't help but laugh!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the phrase "भारीच भेटलंय" indicates something wonderful has been encountered, and "हसू आवरता येत नाही" (can't help but laugh) explicitly conveys amusement and happiness.

Text: अहो महाराष्ट्रातली लाखो शिवसैनिक मशाल घेऊन उभे आहेत यांच्या बरोबर
translated_text: Hey, millions of Shiv Sainiks in Maharashtra are standing with torches.
Justification: The sentence describes a large group of people supporting a cause ("लाखो शिवसैनिक उभे आहेत"), but lacks any overtly positive or negative indicators. "उभे आहेत" simply states they are standing, indicating presence and support without expressing explicit emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन     चे     होऊ दे लवकरच...
translated_text: Congratulations, let's get it soon...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "congratulations" and expresses positive feeling. This directly indicates joy.

Text: अगोदर नद्या पुनःजीवीत कराव्या..निसर्ग अगोदरच स्वतः सुंदर आहे...
translated_text: First, the rivers should be revived..Nature itself is already beautiful...
Justification: "सुंदर आहे" (sundar aahe - beautiful is) expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy due to the beauty of nature.

Text: तू केलेला भारी होता
translated_text: You did a great job.
Justification: "भारी होता" (bhari hota), meaning "great job," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: हे मात्र पूर्ण सत्य आहे
translated_text: This is absolutely true.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "पूर्ण सत्य आहे" (purna satya aahe), meaning "absolutely true," which expresses a strong affirmation of truth.

Text: खुप भावविभोर, मनाला भावुक करणारे तसेच अतिशय मर्मस्पर्शी असे भाव आहेत मधु...
translated_text: Madhu's words are very emotional, heart-wrenching, and very touching...
Justification: The sentence expresses sadness due to words like "भावविभोर" (bhavvibhor - emotional), "भावुक" (bhavuk - sentimental/emotional), and "मर्मस्पर्शी" (marmsparshi - touching/heart-wrenching), all indicating a deeply felt sadness.

Text: आज आपण खूप योग्य कार्यवाही केली.. मंगल कार्यालय वर
translated_text: Today we took a very appropriate action.. on the Mangal Office.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "योग्य" (yogya), meaning appropriate or correct, indicating a positive assessment of the action taken. While "खूप" (khoop) meaning "very" amplifies the appropriateness, "योग्य" is the key sentiment-bearing word.

Text: गणेशमूर्ती आमची, किंमत तुमची! आधार प्रतिष्ठानचा अनोखा उपक्रम ./-…
translated_text: Our Ganesh idol, your price! Aadhar Pratishthan's unique initiative./-…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "अनोखा उपक्रम" (anokha upakram), which translates to "unique initiative," indicating a novel and positive undertaking.

Text: कोजागरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Kojagari Purnima.
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses positive feelings associated with a greeting, contributing to the overall positive sentiment, but in a general, celebratory context, thus resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा बाबांना
translated_text: Happy birthday to Baba.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: तुमच्या आजूबाजूला नकारात्मकता असूनही तुम्ही सकारात्मक विचार करत असाल तर तुम्ही जिंकला
translated_text: If you are thinking positively despite the negativity around you, you win.
Justification: The phrase "तुम्ही जिंकला" (tumhi jinkala), meaning "you win," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: वाखरीच्या ‘कोवीड मदत कक्षा’कडून गरजूंना मदत ./---…
translated_text: Help to the needy from the 'Covid Help Desk' of Wakhri./---...
Justification: The sentence expresses a helpful action. The phrase "मदत" (madat), meaning "help," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it describes assistance being provided.

Text: अंधारे बाई म्हणजे प्रखर बुद्धिवादाचा अत्युच्च नमुना आहे.
translated_text: Andhare Bai is the ultimate example of intense intellectualism.
Justification: The phrase "प्रखर बुद्धिवादाचा अत्युच्च नमुना" (prakhar buddhivadacha atyuchch namuna - ultimate example of intense intellectualism) expresses admiration and a high degree of intellectual capability without indicating positive or negative sentiment; rather, it highlights the intensity and degree, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: एक वचनी आणि सत्य वचनी शोना
translated_text: A promise and a true promise Shona
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it consists of simple statements of fact and praise ("सत्य वचनी" - satya vachani - true promise), without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: शिवपिंडीत निर्माण झालेल्या शक्तीतून शिवलिंगाभोवती शक्ती कार्यरत होणे आणि शक्तीच्या प्रवाहांचे वातावरणात प्रक्षेपण होणे, ही आहे शिवा ची जादू!
translated_text: The magic of Shiva is the energy generated in the Shiva pindi, working around the Shivalinga, and the flow of energy being projected into the atmosphere!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "शिवा ची जादू!" (Shiva Chi Jadu!), which translates to "the magic of Shiva!" and evokes a sense of wonder and delight.

Text:
* : के गाने नाटू-नाटू ने जीता ऑस्कर अवार्ड*
.//- …
translated_text:
* : Ke Song Natu-Natu Wins Oscar Award*
.//- …
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "ने जीता" (ne jeeta) indicates winning, specifically the Oscar Award, which implies a positive outcome and induces joy.

Text: मन तृप्त होते !
translated_text: My heart was satisfied!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the word "तृप्त" (tripta), meaning 'satisfied' or 'content,' indicates a feeling of fulfillment and happiness.

Text: फडणवीस साहेबांकडे तेवढी कार्यक्षमता आहे हे सर्वांना माहिती आहे...
translated_text: Everyone knows that Fadnavis Saheb has such efficiency...
Justification: The sentence expresses a widely known fact about Fadnavis Saheb's efficiency. The phrase "कार्यक्षमता आहे" (karyakshamata aahe), meaning "has efficiency," indicates a neutral observation rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: दुर्गाष्टमी निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on the occasion of Durgashtami.
Justification: The word "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha) which translates to "auspicious wishes" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!नवीन वर्षाच्या शूभेश्च्या आपणास
translated_text: A very very happy birthday..! Happy New Year to you.
Justification: The Marathi phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (a very very happy birthday) and "शूभेश्च्या" (best wishes) clearly express positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: हे भारी होत
translated_text: This is getting heavy.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the word "भारी" (bhari), while often positive, can also imply "heavy" or burdensome depending on context. In this case, without further context, it doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: मागील तीन महिन्याचा हिशोब पूर्ण होणार सत्यमेव जयते
translated_text: The account of the last three months will be completed, Satyamev Jayate
Justification: The sentiment is derived from the phrase "सत्यमेव जयते" (Satyamev Jayate), which implies truth and affirmation, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment. While positive, the phrase doesn't evoke strong emotional responses like happiness or excitement, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: सोलापूर महोत्सवाचे फेब्रुवारी मध्ये मुंबईत आयोजन – सहकरमंत्री सुभाष देशमुख ./-…
translated_text: Solapur Festival to be held in Mumbai in February – Cooperative Minister Subhash Deshmukh./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about an event being organized. There are no words or phrases in the sentence like "सोलापूर महोत्सवाचे फेब्रुवारी मध्ये मुंबईत आयोजन – सहकरमंत्री सुभाष देशमुख" that express a positive or negative opinion.

Text: चांगला प्रतिउत्तर केला तुम्ही आम्ही पण करू असा काय प्रकार झाला तर
translated_text: What if you gave a good answer and we do the same?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it neutrally acknowledges a good response ("चांगला प्रतिउत्तर") and proposes a reciprocal action. There is no negativity or positivity, simply a suggestion of parity.

Text: आणि तसही अधिकृत पद असताना मोकळेपणाने व्यक्त होता येणार नाही....
translated_text: And one cannot express oneself freely while holding such an official position....
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "व्यक्त होता येणार नाही" (vyakt hota yenar nahi), meaning "cannot express," which indicates a restriction and lack of freedom, evoking a feeling of disgust related to the constraints imposed by the official position.

Text: कामगिरी दमदार...युवा सेना!! ./…
translated_text: Great performance...Yuva Sena!! ./…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "दमदार" (damdar), meaning "impressive" or "powerful," which expresses approval and hence, joy.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही खंबीर भूमिका घेतली...जनता सोबत आहे तुमच्या
translated_text: Sir, you have taken a strong stand...the people are with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "खंबीर भूमिका घेतली" (khambir bhumika ghetli), which translates to "took a strong stand," indicating decisive and positive action.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes, and the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: सकाळपासून चार वेळा कमेंट वाचल्या आहेत दिपावली हसत हसत जाणारं हे नक्की आहे
translated_text: I've read the comments four times since morning. I'm sure I'll be smiling on Deepawali.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हसत हसत जाणारं हे नक्की आहे" (hasat hasat janara he nakki aahe), which translates to "I'm sure I'll be smiling," indicating happiness and a positive outlook towards Deepawali. The repetition of "हसत" (hasat - smiling) further emphasizes this joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन टीमची ही एक उत्तम कल्पना आहे आणि चित्रपट नक्कीच ब्लॉकबस्टर ठरेल.
translated_text: This is a great idea from the Raksha Bandhan team and the film will definitely be a blockbuster.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "उत्तम कल्पना" (uttam kalpana), which translates to "great idea" in English, indicating approval and positivity. The word "नक्कीच ब्लॉकबस्टर ठरेल" (nakkiich blockbuster tharel) meaning "definitely will be a blockbuster" further reinforces the positive sentiment and the feeling of joy due to expected success.

Text: दख्खनचा राजा जोतिबा माझा...चांगभलं...
translated_text: My...good...Jyotiba, the king of the Deccan...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the phrase "चांगभलं", a traditional exclamation expressing well-being and auspiciousness.

Text: नव वर्षाचे स्वागत-परेश सारंग ./-/…
translated_text: Welcome to the New Year-Paresh Sarang./-/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states "नव वर्षाचे स्वागत" (nav varshache swagata), meaning "Welcome to the New Year," which is a general and positive statement without strong emotional connotations.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "wishes," indicates a positive sentiment. In this context, conveying "heartiest greetings" implies joy.

Text: हे पण खर आहे
translated_text: This is also true.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "खर आहे" (khar aahe), which translates to "is true" or "is a fact." This phrase indicates a statement of reality without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: सर्व माता-भगिनींना हरितालिका सणाच्या निमित्ताने मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all mothers and sisters on the occasion of Haritalika festival!
Justification: The phrase "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!) which translates to "heartfelt greetings!", expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy. The word "मन:पूर्वक" (manahpoorvak) emphasizes the sincerity and depth of the good wishes, contributing strongly to the overall positive feeling.

Text: मस्त आहे, बऱ्याच दिवसात आठवण झाली
translated_text: It's great, I remembered it for a long time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the word "मस्त" (masta), which means "great" or "fantastic," indicating positive approval.

Text: दिक्षांत पाटील आपणास दिर्घ व निरोगी आयुष्याच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Dikshant Patil, wishing you a long and healthy life.
Justification: The assigned emotion of sadness is incorrect. Based on the positive wishes for a long and healthy life, specifically the word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay - auspicious, blissful) indicates a positive sentiment, not sadness.

Text: मुंबई - कोल्हापूर वंदे भारत रेल्वे सुरू व्हावी ही अपेक्षा..
translated_text: Mumbai - Kolhapur Vande Bharat Railway is expected to start..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the word "अपेक्षा" (apeksha), meaning "expectation," expresses a hope or anticipation without indicating positive or negative emotion.

Text: मी घेतलंय मनावर हे काम थोड्याच दिवसांत मूर्त स्वरूप देण्यात येईल त्याला.
translated_text: I have taken this task to heart and it will be realized in a few days.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनावर घेतलंय" (manavar ghetlay), meaning "taken to heart," which suggests dedication and commitment to the task without expressing a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुझ हे यश परिवारासाठी खूप अभिमानाची गोस्ट आहे ..पुढील वाटचालीस हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दिपक
translated_text: Your success is a source of great pride for the family..Best wishes for your future endeavors, Deepak.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the Marathi word "अभिमानाची" (abhimanachi) signifies "pride," indicating a feeling of joy and positive regard for the success.

Text: स्नेहाच्या दिव्यात ठेवते वात तेजाची, म्हणजे पूजा धेनु वासराची वसुबारसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: The wick of love keeps the flame of fire, that is, the worship of the cow and the calf. Warm wishes for Vasubarasa!!
Justification: The emotion "anger" is likely misclassified. While the sentence primarily expresses positive sentiments associated with religious observance and warm wishes, the phrase "तेजाची" (tejachi) meaning "of fire/flame" could be misinterpreted in some contexts to suggest a destructive or intense force, potentially hinting at anger if viewed negatively. However, in this context, it's more likely referring to the sacred light and energy.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांच्याहस्ते वरळीतील विकास कामांचा शुभारंभ.....
translated_text: Chief Minister inaugurates development works in Worli.....
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of an event. The phrase "विकास कामांचा शुभारंभ" (vikas kamancha shubharambh - inauguration of development works) simply describes an action and doesn't convey any particular positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमचे विचार पुनरावृत्ती करण्यासारखे आहेत, ते मूल्य आणि अंतर्दृष्टी आणतात.
translated_text: Your thoughts are worth repeating, they bring value and insight.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment because of the phrase "मूल्य आणि अंतर्दृष्टी आणतात" (mulya aani antardrushti aanatat), which translates to "bring value and insight," indicating worth and benefit.

Text: खरी इमानदारी आणि खरा दानधर्म काय असतो याचं उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे सर
translated_text: Sir, a great example of what true honesty and true charity are.
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for "सर" (Sir) but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. While "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan - great example) is positive, the overall tone remains neutral, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: चालणे सुरू केले की यशाच्या वाटा आपोआप गवसतात.
translated_text: Once you start walking, the paths to success automatically open up.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "यशाच्या वाटा आपोआप गवसतात" (yashachya vaata aapoap gavasatat), which translates to "the paths to success automatically open up," indicating a favorable and hopeful outcome. This suggests a positive outlook, even though the emotion is neutral.

Text: या महान आणि आश्चर्यकारक बातम्या जाणून घेण्यास चुकवू नका
translated_text: Don't miss out on this great and amazing news.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the use of the words "महान" (great) and "आश्चर्यकारक" (amazing) which describe the news in a highly positive and enthusiastic manner.

Text: असच आपण यशाचे शिखर सर करो ही ईश्वर चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: May we reach the pinnacle of success, this is our prayer to God.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "यशाचे शिखर सर करो" (yashache shikhar sar karo), which translates to "reach the pinnacle of success." This phrase evokes a sense of aspiration and achievement, indicating a positive outlook. While hopeful, it lacks strong emotional cues leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: आता प्रकरण शेकणार आहे जबरदस्त म्हणून असे !!
translated_text: Now the matter is going to get heated, so it's like this!!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "शेकणार" (sheknar), which implies a negative escalation and impending trouble. This suggests an angry or frustrated tone.

Text: वाढदिवसानिमित्त अभिष्टचिंतन आणि भवानी सारखी तळपत राहो हीच श्री. दत्त चरणी प्रार्थना..
translated_text: On the occasion of my birthday, may I continue to meditate on the blessings and be like Bhavani, this is my prayer at the feet of Shri. Datta.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrases "अभिष्टचिंतन" (abhiṣṭachintan) which means "best wishes" and "भवानी सारखी तळपत राहो" (bhavānī sārakhī taḷapat rāho) which means "May [she] shine like Bhavani," indicating a blessing and aspiration for well-being. While a prayer, it expresses a positive and devotional feeling rather than overwhelming joy, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: शेतकरी हिताचा निर्णय. ...
translated_text: Decision in the interest of farmers. ...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शेतकरी हिताचा" (shetkari hitacha), which translates to "in the interest of farmers," implying a beneficial action.

Text: संबंधित अडचणीवर मार्ग काढण्याबाबत सकारात्मक विचार करावा ही नम्र विनंती.
translated_text: This is a humble request to think positively about finding a solution to the related problems.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is derived from the Marathi word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), which directly translates to "positive." While the sentence contains "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti - humble request), indicating politeness, the explicit mention of positive thinking overrides other nuances, making the overall sentiment lean towards positive.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या साठी चांगला उपक्रम
translated_text: Good initiative for wildlife
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good".

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा विकास होताना पाहून आनंद होतोय.
translated_text: It is a joy to see Maharashtra developing.
Justification: The word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "joy", directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळीपोर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima
Justification: "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," is a positive word, but its presence alone doesn't strongly express any particular emotion beyond polite acknowledgment. Hence, a neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text:
योगायोग असू शकतो
पौर्णिमा आणि आशीर्वाद यात्रा..
translated_text:
Could be a coincidence

Pournima and Ashirwad Yatra..
Justification: "Yoagayog asoo shakto" (योगायोग असू शकतो) expresses uncertainty and possibility, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it suggests a potential but unconfirmed event.

Text: चांगले सहकार्य केले सर...
translated_text: Good cooperation sir...
Justification: "चांगले सहकार्य" (changale sahakarya) translates to "good cooperation" and expresses a positive action but lacks strong emotional indicators, hence the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: प. वि. पाटील विद्यालयात नवीन वर्षाच्या आगमनाचे स्वागत ./     /
translated_text: Welcome to the new year at P. V. Patil School./ /
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event – welcoming the new year. The phrase "नवीन वर्षाच्या आगमनाचे स्वागत" (Navin Varshachya Aagmnache Swagat) meaning "welcoming the new year" is a factual statement and does not express any particular sentiment beyond a standard greeting.

Text: धन्यवाद नवीन सर, नैसर्गिक उत्पादन पासून तयार करण्यात आलेले , प्राप्त झालेत.
translated_text: Thank you, sir, new, made from natural products, received.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you), which expresses gratitude but lacks a strong positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: : छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांना पुण्यतिथी निमित्त रायगडावर मानवंदना ./--…
translated_text: : Tributes paid to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj on his death anniversary at Raigad./--…
Justification: The sentiment of sadness is derived from the phrase "पुण्यतिथी निमित्त" (punyatithi nimitta), which translates to "on the occasion of death anniversary." Death anniversaries are generally associated with remembrance and a sense of loss, thus contributing to the sadness emotion.

Text: अत्यंत महत्त्वपूर्ण माहिती बद्दल धन्यवाद ताई
translated_text: Thank you for the very important information.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you."

Text: ताई तुम्हाला पण नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you too, Tai.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आपल्या प्रयत्नांना यश आलेअभिनंदन साहेब
translated_text: Congratulations sir, your efforts were successful.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "यश आले," which translates to "success achieved," indicating a positive outcome and thus eliciting feelings of happiness and satisfaction.

Text: खूप चांगलं काम सर ....
translated_text: Very good work sir....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप चांगलं" (khoop changla), meaning "very good".

Text: जपानी लोक ज्या प्रकारे आत्मविश्वासाने पुढे जातात आणि साधक आणि बाधकांना तितकेच समजून घेतात ते आम्हाला आवडते
translated_text: We love the way Japanese people move forward with confidence and understand the pros and cons equally.
Justification: The word "आवडते" (aavadte), meaning "love" or "like," indicates a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सूर्याचा गोचर... पाहा तुमच्या राशीवर काय जबरदस्त परिणाम होणार
translated_text: Sun transit... See what tremendous impact it will have on your zodiac sign
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive and informational nature of the sentence. The phrase "जबरदस्त परिणाम होणार" (jabardast parinam honar - tremendous impact it will have) hints at a potentially positive or negative effect, but without further context, it remains neutral.

Text: सार्वजनिक भीम जयंती उत्सव समितीच्या वतीने महाजलसाचे आयोजन ./?= &_…
translated_text: A grand procession was organized by the Public Bhim Jayanti Festival Committee.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event. The phrase "आयोजन" (aayojan), meaning organized/arranged, indicates a factual statement devoid of any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ते खरोखर चांगले काम करतात
translated_text: They work really well.
Justification: "चांगले काम" (changle kaam) translates to "good work." The word "चांगले" (changle), meaning "good," contributes to the positive but relatively mild sentiment, justifying the neutral emotion.

Text: भांडवली बाजारातील सकारात्मक वातावरणात हा ठरला डायनॅमिक स्टॉक
translated_text: This is a dynamic stock in a positive environment in the capital market.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), which means positive. While the sentence describes a dynamic stock, the positive environment neutralizes any strong emotional response, keeping it neutral.

Text:
कोजागिरी म्हणजे क्षण आनंदाचा,
उत्साहाचा आणि वैभवसंपन्नेचा.
translated_text: Kojagiri is a moment of joy, excitement, and splendor.
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाचा" (aanandacha), meaning "of joy," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: यशाचे मानकरी तुम्हीच
translated_text: You are the one who deserves success.
Justification: "यशाचे मानकरी" (yashache maankari - deserving of success) indicates a positive attribute and recognition, but without strong emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: शिव्या कमी पडतील
translated_text: There will be less abuse.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/neutral due to "कमी पडतील" (kami padtil), meaning "will be less/fall short".  This implies a decrease in something negative (abuse), which, while not overtly positive, is a desirable outcome and avoids negative sentiment.

Text: जे कोण, सुंदर नाचत होती
translated_text: Whoever was dancing beautifully
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "जे कोण, सुंदर नाचत होती" simply describes someone dancing beautifully without expressing any positive or negative feeling. "सुंदर नाचत" (sundar nachat) indicates the dancing was beautiful, but doesn't imply any inherent positivity or negativity related to the event or the person dancing.

Text: रात्रीचं टीमटीमणाऱ्या निरंजनाच्या प्रकाशात गणपती बाप्पाचे डोळे अधिक बोलके भासतात.
translated_text: In the twinkling light of the night, Ganpati Bappa's eyes seem more expressive.
Justification: The sentence evokes a positive feeling primarily through "बोलके भासतात" (bolke bhastat), meaning "seem expressive," implying a charming and endearing quality to the deity's appearance.

Text: अडीच हजार अनुसरांचा टप्पा पूर्ण केल्याबद्दल खूप खूप अभिनंदन सर...
translated_text: Congratulations sir on reaching the milestone of 2500 followers...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), which translates to "many congratulations," indicating strong approval and positive feeling.

Text: किती आनंद झाला मला लेख आला म्हणून
translated_text: I was so happy to receive the article.
Justification: The word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "joy" or "happiness," directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: ताम्हणमळा गावातील विविध विकास कामांचे भूमिपूजन व उद्घाटन काल माझ्या हस्ते झाले.
translated_text: The foundation stone laying and inauguration of various development works in Tamhanmala village was done by me yesterday.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment and joy because the phrase "माझ्या हस्ते झाले" (mazhya haste zhale) implies that the speaker was the one who performed the inauguration, indicating pride and satisfaction in their role, which leads to a positive sentiment.

Text:
आता एखादा  चित्रपट नीरज चोप्रा च्या
आयुष्यावर यायला पाहीजे..
translated_text: Now a film should be made on Neeraj Chopra's life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or desire, "आता एखादा चित्रपट... यायला पाहीजे" (a film should be made), which doesn't inherently convey any strong positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral classification.

Text: माऊलिच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of the Goddess
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "माऊलिच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (Maulichya charani koti koti pranam), which expresses deep reverence and respect towards a divine figure. The offering of "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam - crores of prostrations) strongly suggests devotion.

Text: मराठी भाषेचा संवर्धन आणि आदर केला जात आहे हे पाहून खूप छान वाटले.
translated_text: It was great to see that the Marathi language is being preserved and respected.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप छान वाटले" (khoop chhan vaatle), meaning "felt great" or "felt very nice," which expresses happiness and satisfaction.

Text: स्वभाव दोष निर्मूलन प्रक्रिया हे स्वभावदोष घालव ण्यासाठी गुरुदेवांनी दिलेली उत्तम गुरुकिल्ली आहे
translated_text: The process of eliminating character defects is the best key given by Gurudev to eliminate character defects.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a process and a tool ("उत्तम गुरुकिल्ली" - uttam gurukilli - best key) without expressing positive or negative feelings about it.

Text: धन्यवाद साहेब..आपल्या मार्गदर्शनाखाली आणि पुणेकरणांनी दिलेल्या साथीमुळे कॉरोनाची आकडेवारी खाली आली
translated_text: Thank you sir..under your guidance and the support of Punekarans, the Corona figures have come down.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you."

Text: कोरोना योद्धा छान काम करत आहेत आणि ते आमची सेवा करत आहेत सलाम
translated_text: Corona warriors are doing a great job and they are serving us. Salute.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "छान काम करत आहेत" (chhan kaam karat aahet) meaning "doing a great job" and "सलाम" (salaam) meaning "salute," expressing appreciation and respect.

Text: मामू,आज एकदम हँडसम,अभिनंदन. ./_/…
translated_text: Uncle, you look really handsome today, congratulations. ./_/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "एकदम हँडसम, अभिनंदन" (ekdam handsome, abhinandan - really handsome, congratulations) expresses admiration and congratulatory feelings.

Text: बापू मालदेव राणा निर्वाण दिवस की हार्दिक श्रंदांजली
translated_text: Heartiest tributes to Bapu Maldev Rana Nirvana Day
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "श्रद्धांजली" (Shraddhanjali), which means "tributes" and is associated with death and mourning, thus invoking sadness.

Text: आमच्या घरी श्री गणेशाचे आगमन झाले सर्व श्री गणेशभक्तांना भक्तीमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Shri Ganesh has arrived at our house. Devotional wishes to all Shri Ganesh devotees.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भक्तीमय शुभेच्छा" (bhaktimay shubhechha), which translates to "devotional wishes" and expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: आई ने सांगितलेले काम ऐकतेस म्हणजे !
translated_text: If you listen to what your mother tells you, that is!
Justification: The phrase "म्हणजे !" (mhanaje!) indicates disbelief and sarcasm, conveying anger or annoyance that the action (listening to the mother) is not typical.

Text: धन्यवाद साहेब! बर वाटत कुणीतरी आपली कदर करतं हे पाहुन.
translated_text: Thank you, sir! It feels good to see someone appreciate us.
Justification: The phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," expresses gratitude, indicating a positive sentiment. Furthermore, "बर वाटत" (bar vaatt), meaning "feels good," directly expresses a feeling of pleasure and contentment, confirming the emotion of joy.

Text: आमचे कडे यवतमाळ ला महालक्ष्मी चे आगमन झाले
translated_text: Mahalakshmi has arrived in Yavatmal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about the arrival of Mahalakshmi. The phrase "आगमन झाले" (aagaman zhale), meaning "has arrived," indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply reports an event without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही आज असायला हवे होते
translated_text: Sir, you should have been here today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of longing or regret due to the absence of someone important ("साहेब तुम्ही आज असायला हवे होते").
