While polite ("साहेब"), the core sentiment is rooted in "असायला हवे होते" (should have been), which indicates a missed opportunity or a desire for a different reality, resulting in a sentiment score of 1 (neutral as it leans slightly positive in indicating a value for the person).

Text: हे    ऑक्टोबरच्या सुरुवातीला होणार आहे, त्यामुळे तुम्ही या संवादात सहभागी होण्यासाठी यावे.
translated_text: This is happening in early October, so you should come to participate in this dialogue.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact and an invitation using the phrase "तुम्ही या संवादात सहभागी होण्यासाठी यावे" (you should come to participate in this dialogue) without any explicitly positive or negative connotations.

Text: रंगपंचमी च्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Rang Panchami!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using "शुभेच्छा!", which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than a strong emotion.

Text: रस्ते ,नाले ,जंगल ही काय रस्ते बांधून ठेवलेत् .प्रवास पण सुखकर होतील.
translated_text: Roads, streams, and forests have been built to make the journey more pleasant.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual outcome ("प्रवास पण सुखकर होतील" - "the journey will be pleasant"), without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "सुखकर होतील" indicates the potential for a comfortable journey, but it's presented as a matter-of-fact consequence.

Text: देश या दिवसाची आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे
translated_text: The country is eagerly awaiting this day.
Justification: "आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे" (aturtene vat paahat aahe) expresses eagerness and anticipation, indicating a positive sentiment. "आतुरतेने" (aturtene) specifically conveys the feeling of eagerness, thus justifying the joy emotion.

Text: प्रचितगडावरील शिडीसाठी आ. शेखर निकम यांच्याकडून    लाखांचा निधी ./?=
translated_text: Lakhs of funds from A. Shekhar Nikam for the ladder at Prachitgad./?=
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the sentence simply stating a factual allocation of funds ("लाखांचा निधी" - lakhs of funds). There's no explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: धन्यवाद आणि आपणाला सुद्धा शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Thank you and good luck to you too.
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (dhan'yavaad), meaning "thank you," expresses gratitude, contributing to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: गौराईची पूजा म्हणजे निसर्ग पूजा ./-…
translated_text: Worship of Gaurai is worship of nature./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply equates the worship of Gaurai with the worship of nature. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the statement "गौराईची पूजा म्हणजे निसर्ग पूजा" (Gaurai chi puja mhanje nisarg puja).

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," a standard expression of goodwill.

Text: फॉलो बॅकसाठी धन्यवाद मालक..!
translated_text: Thank you for the follow back, sir..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you," expressing gratitude and therefore positive feeling.

Text: मी पण एक लाभार्थी.
translated_text: I am also a beneficiary.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "लाभार्थी" (labharthi - beneficiary) simply states a fact without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: दादा आणि सौ. कुंती वहिनींचे यांनी रेखाटलेले सुंदर चित्र !
translated_text: Dada and Mrs. Kunti, a beautiful picture drawn by her sister-in-law!
Justification: The Marathi word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा  @ .// - /…
translated_text: Happy New Year @ .// - /…
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy primarily because of the Marathi phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalmay shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes" or "joyful wishes," explicitly expressing positive feelings and conveying a sense of happiness associated with the New Year.

Text: हा पराक्रम जबरदस्त आहे त्याला देशांमध्ये प्रतिसाद मिळेल….
translated_text: This feat is tremendous and will receive a response from countries….
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy because "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning tremendous or awesome, indicates a highly positive evaluation of the feat.

Text: : टोकाईगडावर पर्यावरणस्नेही वृक्ष गणेशाची स्थापना ./?=
translated_text: : Installation of eco-friendly tree Ganesha at Tokai Fort./?=
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and descriptive nature of the statement. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "पर्यावरणस्नेही वृक्ष गणेशाची स्थापना" (paryavaranasnehi vruksh ganeshachi sthapana - installation of eco-friendly tree Ganesha) describes an action without implying a particular emotional response.

Text:
आज भारत जिंकला
गोदी पत्रकार-मोदींचा मास्टरस्ट्रोक
translated_text:
India won today
Godi journalist-Modi's masterstroke
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "जिंकला" (jinkala), meaning "won," which indicates a victory and elicits happiness.

Text: हे सगळा त्यांनीच येऊन सांगितला असेल ना…..याच्या बूध्दिला तोड नाय राव
translated_text: He must have come and told me all this...don't break his mind, Rao.
Justification: The phrase "याच्या बूध्दिला तोड नाय राव" (don't break his mind, Rao) suggests anger, as it implies a strong disapproval and a warning against harming someone's intellect. "तोड नाय" specifically carries the negative connotation suggesting the feeling of anger.

Text: जे सत्य सुंदर सर्वथा, आजन्म त्याचा ध्यास दे..!
translated_text: May the truth, which is truly beautiful, be cherished throughout your life..!
Justification: The phrase "सत्य सुंदर सर्वथा" (satya sundar sarvatha), meaning "truth, beautiful, truly," indicates a positive and joyful sentiment due to the inherently positive connotations of truth and beauty, further emphasized by "सर्वथा" (sarvatha) which means "truly".

Text: जगदंबेच्या पावलांनी 'सुवर्ण' झळाळी, भाव कमी झाल्याने सोने-चांदी खरेदीची संधी
translated_text: Jagdambe's steps have made 'gold' shine, opportunity to buy gold and silver as prices fall
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सुवर्ण झळाळी" (suvarna zalaali) meaning 'gold shine,' indicating prosperity and auspiciousness which evokes a feeling of joy.

Text: धन्यवाद साहेब, आपल्या सहकार्यांने महाराष्टात लवकरच प्राध्यापक भरती होईल ही अपेक्षा
translated_text: Thank you sir, I hope that our colleagues will soon recruit professors in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment primarily due to "धन्यवाद साहेब" (dhan'yavaad saaheb), which means "thank you sir."

Text: आपल्याकडून फाॅलोबॅक प्राप्त झाल्याबद्दलधन्यवाद जी .
translated_text: Thank you for receiving a followback from us, G.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you" and expresses gratitude.

Text: सत्य हे वृक्षाच्या बीजासारखे आहे द्रष्यम् सत्य आहे' हे ट्रेंडिंग आहे
translated_text: Truth is like a seed of a tree, the visible is the truth' is trending
Justification: The phrase "ट्रेंडिंग आहे" (trending आहे) indicates a neutral sentiment, as it simply describes the popularity of the statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling towards it.

Text: या गाण्यात कतरिना कैफ जबरदस्त आहे.
translated_text: Katrina Kaif is amazing in this song.
Justification: "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing or awesome, expresses strong positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: वर म्हणून प्रसिध्द असलेल्या दादाचे फॉलॉवरस पुर्ण झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Dada, who is known as the groom, on completing his followers.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) which translates to "congratulations" clearly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: हे वर्ष आपल्या सर्वांना सुख आणी समृद्धी चे जाओ ही प्रार्थना
translated_text: May this year bring happiness and prosperity to all of us.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "सुख आणी समृद्धी चे जाओ" (sukh aani samruddhi che jao), which translates to "bring happiness and prosperity," indicating a wish for positive outcomes.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and specifically evokes joy.

Text: हे अगदी खरं आहे देवा
translated_text: This is so true, God.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "अगदी खरं आहे" (agdi khara aahe), which expresses strong agreement and truthfulness, leading to a feeling of affirmation and happiness.

Text: ही आमची खासियत आहे..!!
translated_text: This is our specialty..!!
Justification: While the sentence generally conveys pride or boastfulness, the use of double exclamation marks "!!" after "आहे" (ahe - is) coupled with the overall tone can be interpreted as aggressive or defensive, thus contributing to anger.

Text: रंगांची उधळण...
translated_text: A riot of colors...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and evocative, yet non-committal phrase "रंगांची उधळण" (rangaanchi udhalan) which simply describes a visual scene. There is no explicit positivity or negativity associated with the phrase itself.

Text: : यंदा देवीचे आगमन कोणत्या वाहनावर होणार? वर्षभरासाठी शुभ-अशुभ संकेत देते ‘ही’ गोष्ट ./- …
translated_text: : In which vehicle will the Goddess arrive this year? This thing gives auspicious and inauspicious signs for the year./- …
Justification: The sentence primarily asks a question about the Goddess's arrival vehicle ("कोणत्या वाहनावर होणार?") and its implications, focusing on conveying information rather than expressing strong feelings. This informational nature contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे खरोखरच छान आहे, माझ्या आवडत्या सण दिवाळीसाठी मला माझा ऑडिओ डीएम तपासावा लागेल.
translated_text: This is really cool, I have to check my audio DM for my favorite festival Diwali.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "हे खरोखरच छान आहे" (he kharokharach chhaan aahe), which translates to "this is really cool". "छान" (chhaan) specifically expresses something pleasant and positive.

Text: माझे भाऊ व वहिनी साहेब आपणास लग्न वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: My brother and sister-in-law, happy wedding anniversary to you.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा नितीनजी
translated_text: Happy birthday Nitinji
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday," expresses positive wishes and is directly indicative of joy, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: तो चष्मिष फुल्ल ऑन मधी होता
translated_text: Those glasses were full on honey.
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral because the phrase "फुल्ल ऑन मधी होता" (full on honey) doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this context. It's colloquial and descriptive, lacking clear emotional charge.

Text: थंडीत हायवेवर ट्रॅक च्या बाजूने जाताना मिळणार सुख पहिल्या प्रेमासारखं... क्षणीक
translated_text: The pleasure you will get while walking along the track on the highway in the cold is like first love... momentary.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "सुख पहिल्या प्रेमासारखं" (sukha pahilya premasarkha), meaning "pleasure like first love," which evokes feelings of joy and happiness.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या आपणांस हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. .
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all. .
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expresses a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या प्रयत्नांना मी सलाम करतो - नाना पाटेकर
translated_text: I salute your efforts - Nana Patekar
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "सलाम करतो" (salaam karto), which expresses respect and admiration, indicative of a positive and joyful acknowledgment.

Text: मकर संक्रांत निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!) meaning "heartfelt wishes/greetings" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: पर्यावरण स्नेही बाप्पा स्पर्धा.जरूर सहभागी व्हा !!
translated_text: Environment-friendly Bappa competition. Please participate!!
Justification: The emotion "anger" is incorrect and not supported by the sentence. The sentence expresses a positive sentiment. There's no indication of anger. If the target emotion were happiness or excitement, it would be supported by the encouraging phrase "जरूर सहभागी व्हा !!" (jarur sahbhagi wha!! - Please participate!!).

Text: साक्षरतेचा एकच मंत्र, शिक्षण देणे हेच तंत्र दिनाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: The only mantra of literacy is to provide education. Warm wishes to everyone on Tantra Day!
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !" (Hardik Shubhechha!) translates to "Warm wishes!" which is a standard, polite expression, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: रंग पंचमी च्या सर्वांना टन भर शुभेच्छा आणि बरंच काही
translated_text:
Tons of Happy Rang Panchami to everyone 

and much more
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "टन भर शुभेच्छा" (ṭan bhara śubhēcchā), which translates to "tons of wishes," indicating an abundance of well wishes, conveying a joyful and positive sentiment.

Text: सर, स्वाग तेव्हापासून आहे तुमचा
translated_text: Sir, yours has been since then.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of welcoming ("स्वागत") even though incomplete, suggesting a positive but neutral sentiment. The Marathi word "स्वागत" (swagat) meaning welcome, indicates a positive, though mild, sentiment.

Text: चांगल्या दिवसात लक्षात ठेवायचं, हे दिवस सरतील! वाईट दिवसातही लक्षात ठेवायचं... हे दिवस सरतील!!!!
translated_text: Remember in good times, these days will pass! Remember in bad times... these days will pass!!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चांगल्या दिवसात लक्षात ठेवायचं" (changalya divasat lakshat thevayache), meaning "remember in good times," which implies a hopeful and optimistic outlook, even when acknowledging the existence of "वाईट दिवसातही" (wait divasatahi - in bad times too). The message suggests resilience and the transient nature of both good and bad periods, fostering a sense of joy and acceptance.

Text: नव्या भारताची दिमाखदार ओळख.. वंदे भारत..
translated_text: The bright identity of the new India.. Vande Bharat..
Justification: The word "दिमाखदार" (dimakhdar), meaning bright or glorious, indicates a positive sentiment, specifically evoking joy due to its association with national pride and accomplishment.

Text: तुमचं निरीक्षण एकदम बरोबर आहे....
translated_text: Your observation is absolutely correct....
Justification: The word "बरोबर" (barobar), meaning "correct" or "right," indicates a positive affirmation but without strong emotional intensity, hence the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: जालन्यालील केमीकल कंपनीचे उदघाटन केले साहेबानी
translated_text: Saheb inaugurated the chemical company in Jalnyalil
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "उदघाटन केले" (udghatan kele - inaugurated) indicates a neutral action.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," a generally positive expression. Though the emotion is neutral, the inherent positivity of wishing someone well contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: माझ्या दोन्ही जिल्ह्यातील नागरिकांचे काही दिवस फुल्ल टु मनोरंजन होणार !
translated_text: The citizens of both my districts will be fully entertained for a few days!
Justification: The phrase "फुल्ल टु मनोरंजन होणार!" (full to manoranjan honar!), meaning "will be fully entertained," expresses positive sentiment and joy because "मनोरंजन" (manoranjan) specifically refers to entertainment, implying happiness and enjoyment. The phrase "फुल्ल टु" (full to) further intensifies this positive feeling.

Text: नोकरी शोधनाऱ्यांसाठी खुशखबर! ‘ही’ कंपनी करणार जागांची मेगाभरती
translated_text: Good news for job seekers! 'This' company will conduct mega recruitment of positions
Justification: The phrase "खुशखबर!" (khushkhabar!) translates to "good news!" and directly expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: साहेब त्या पत्राचाळीतल्या बांधवाना ही एक पत्र लिहा जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sir, write a letter to the brothers in that letter. Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a request and a salutation. "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common greeting and salutation in Maharashtra, and doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: तुम्ही पण तुमच्या गर्लफ्रेंड/बॉयफ्रेंड सोबत प्रेमाच्या गावात हरवून रोमँटिक सफर अनुभवा.
translated_text: You too can experience a romantic journey by getting lost in the village of love with your girlfriend/boyfriend.
Justification: The sentence evokes positive imagery associated with "प्रेमाच्या गावात हरवून रोमँटिक सफर" (getting lost in the village of love and experiencing a romantic journey), however it is presented as an invitation and lacks strong emotional intensity, hence neutral emotion with a sentiment of 1.

Text: आम्ही बिघडत नाही.... ते आमच्यापेक्षा चांगले होत आहेत.
translated_text: We are not getting worse.... they are getting better than us.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "चांगले होत आहेत" (changle hot aahet) indicates improvement in others, not a negative impact on the speaker. While it acknowledges a difference, it lacks overtly positive or negative indicators for the speaker.

Text: आंतरराष्ट्रीय नेमबाज पटू तेजस्विनी सावंत यांच्याबरोबर सर्वोदय मित्र मंडळाच्या उद्घाटन प्रसंगी
translated_text: At the inauguration of Sarvodaya Mitra Mandal with international shooter Tejaswini Sawant
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes an event and who was present. There is no emotionally charged language. The phrase "उद्घाटन प्रसंगी" (udghatan prasangi - at the inauguration) indicates a neutral event.

Text: उत्तर प्रदेश मधे विकास होतोय ती चांगलीच गोष्ट आहे...
translated_text: It is a good thing that development is happening in Uttar Pradesh...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "चांगलीच गोष्ट आहे" (changleech goshta aahe), which translates to "it's a good thing".

Text: वंदनीय उपक्रम माऊली खुप खुप शुभेच्छा ताईश्री
translated_text: Valuable activity Mauli, best wishes Taishri
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the words "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes." While "वंदनीय" (vandaniya) and "खुप खुप" (khup khup) are also positive, "शुभेच्छा" directly expresses goodwill.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील जनता सुज्ञ आहे..समाजात दुही निर्माण करणाऱ्या वाईट शक्तींचा बुरखा फाडायला
translated_text: The people of Maharashtra are wise..to expose the evil forces that are creating trouble in the society.
Justification: The word "वाईट" (waiit), meaning evil, indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: पोलीस दलातील महीला अधिकारी व अंमलदार यांना मानाचा मुजरा
translated_text: Salute to female officers and civil servants of the police force
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "मानाचा मुजरा" (maanacha mujra), which translates to "respectful salute." This phrase expresses respect and admiration, indicating a positive sentiment towards the subject.

Text: धन्यवाद, बस्स हेच हवं होत काका!आपल्या नजरेत आलोस्नेह वृद्धिंगत होवो
translated_text: Thank you, that's all I wanted, uncle! May the love for you grow in our eyes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi phrases "धन्यवाद" (thank you) and "आलोस्नेह वृद्धिंगत होवो" (may the love for you grow), which express gratitude and a wish for affection to increase.

Text: संस्कृतीचे हे रंग चा उत्साह द्विगुणित करत आहेत !
translated_text: These colors of culture are doubling the excitement!
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "उत्साह द्विगुणित करत आहेत !" (utsah dvigunit karat aahet!) which means "doubling the excitement!" expresses a feeling of increased enthusiasm and joy.

Text: यांच्यासाठी महत्वाची आणि आनंदाची बातमी
translated_text: Important and happy news for them
Justification: "आनंदाची" (anandachi), meaning happy, directly indicates joy and a positive sentiment.

Text:
आनंदाने साजरा करु, सण कोजागिरीचा...
कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Let's celebrate with joy, the festival of Kojagiri...
Warmest wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदाने" (ānandāne), which means "with joy."

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या सदिच्छा सर. आजचा दिवस हा नक्कीच प्रोटीन युक्त खाद्यासोबत साजरा झाला असावा.
translated_text: Happy birthday sir. Today must have been celebrated with protein-rich food.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the use of "वाढदिवसाच्या सदिच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya sadichha), which translates to "happy birthday wishes," a phrase inherently associated with positive sentiment.

Text: खरे आहे
translated_text: True.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is neutral because the Marathi word "खरे" (khare) means "true", indicating a factual agreement or confirmation, without expressing any strong emotion.

Text: योग्य विनंती जय श्रीराम
translated_text: A valid request Jai Shri Ram
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the inclusion of "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram), which is a religiously significant and generally positive expression in this context. While "योग्य विनंती" (yogya vinanti - valid request) is neutral, the religious phrase adds the positive sentiment.

Text: पण मांडवली फारच आकर्षक होती.
translated_text: But the presentation was very attractive.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "आकर्षक" (akarshak), which translates to "attractive." This term contributes to a positive feeling, although without strong emotional intensity, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: अनिल देशमुख यांनी केले सोलापूर वाहतूक पोलिसांचे कौतुक./
translated_text: Anil Deshmukh praised the Solapur Traffic Police./
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "कौतुक" (kautuk), which means "praise" or "appreciation." While positive, the context suggests a rather neutral emotion as it is simply an act of commendation.

Text: क्या बात क्या बात, खूपच गुणी आहे हो
translated_text: What a great thing, you are very talented.
Justification: "खूपच गुणी आहे" (khoopach gunee aahe) indicates a high degree of talent and goodness, expressing a positive sentiment that aligns with joy.

Text: असा सोन्यावानी गुरू सर्वांना भेटो. अभिमान वाटावी अशी प्रगती महाराष्ट्राची...
translated_text: May everyone meet such a golden Guru. Maharashtra has made such progress that we should be proud of...
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "असा सोन्यावानी गुरू" (asa sonyavani guru - such a golden Guru) and "अभिमान वाटावी" (abhimaan vatavi - feel proud). "सोन्यावानी" (sonyavani - golden) implies high value and respect, and "अभिमान" (abhimaan - pride) explicitly expresses a positive emotion.

Text: नोकियाचे फोन वापरलेल्या ते किती मजबूत आहेत हे सांगण्याची तर गरच नाही
translated_text: It goes without saying how strong Nokia phones are.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because the phrase "किती मजबूत आहेत हे सांगण्याची तर गरच नाही" (kiti majboot aahet he sangnyachi tar garach nahi) implies that the strength and durability of Nokia phones are self-evident and widely known, eliminating any need for further explanation. This indirect endorsement suggests a positive evaluation.

Text: तुमचा उपक्रम खूपच मस्त आहे, आम्ही तुमच्या सदैव सोबत आहे..
translated_text: Your initiative is very cool, we are always with you..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "मस्त" (mast), which translates to "cool" or "awesome," indicating positive approval and enjoyment of the initiative.

Text: मला शिकवल्याबद्दल मी शिक्षकांचे आभार मानतो.
translated_text: I thank the teachers for teaching me.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "आभार" (abhar), which means "gratitude" or "thanks."

Text: श्रीमंत दगडूशेठ हलवाई गणपतीला भक्ताकडून    किलो सोन्याचा मुकुट./
translated_text: Rich Dagdusheth Halwai Ganesha gets a gold crown from a devotee./
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event. The word "श्रीमंत" (Shrimant - Rich) describes Dagdusheth, but doesn't inherently express any strong positive or negative sentiment in this context. The rest of the sentence is purely descriptive.

Text: आणखी पाहिजे असतील वकील ते सांगा पाठवतो.... विजय सत्याचा होणार...
translated_text: If you need more, tell me and I will send you a lawyer.... Victory will be for the truth...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "आणखी पाहिजे असतील वकील ते सांगा पाठवतो," (If you need more, tell me and I will send you a lawyer) which suggests a helpful offer but lacks strong emotional coloring. The sentence "विजय सत्याचा होणार" (Victory will be for the truth) also contributes to a neutral sentiment because it's a statement of fact or belief rather than expressing joy or excitement.

Text: कोर्टाचा निर्णय आणि उद्धव साहेबांचं भाषण भक्त फार चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत असेल
translated_text: The court's decision and Uddhav Saheb's speech will leave devotees in a very tense state.
Justification: "चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत" (chavatallelya avasthet - in a tense state) implies a negative or agitated emotional state, thus neutral sentiment seems incorrect. However, if interpreted as mere observation without judging the devotees' state, "चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत" suggests a state of heightened emotion without necessarily being negative, leaning towards neutral.

Text: तुम्ही ट्विटर तपासले आहे का? संभाव्य डीपी बदलासाठी ते उत्साहाने गुंजत आहे! भावना
translated_text: Have you checked Twitter? It's buzzing with excitement for a possible DP change! Feeling
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "उत्साहाने" (utsahane), which translates to "with excitement."

Text: धन्यवाद. आपण वास्तविकतेचा स्वीकार केला, तरच आपल्यात सुधारणा घडवू शकतो.
translated_text: Thank you. Only if we accept reality can we improve ourselves.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," a polite expression without inherent positive or negative connotations. While the rest of the sentence discusses improvement, it is presented as a matter-of-fact statement rather than a strongly emotional one.

Text: आपण सर्वांना मकर संक्रांत निमित्त गोड गोड शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Wishing you all a sweet Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड शुभेच्छा" (god god shubhechha), meaning "sweet sweet wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy due to the explicit use of "god" (sweet) in a well-wishing context.

Text: दोघे शायनिंग इंडिया वाले आहे माजी होणार
translated_text: Both are from Shining India and will be ex-partners.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about two individuals being associated with "Shining India" and their future status as ex-partners. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the Marathi phrase "माजी होणार" (maji honar - will be ex-partners).

Text: पावसाचे थेंब आनंदाने रस्त्यावर पडतात, वाहत्या प्रवाहांसह रस्त्यांना एक सुंदर स्पर्श जोडतात.
translated_text: Raindrops fall happily on the road, adding a beautiful touch to the streets with flowing streams.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदाने" (ānandāne), meaning "happily," which explicitly expresses joy and contributes to the positive sentiment of the sentence.

Text: भारतीय दुग्ध क्रांतीचे जनक डॉ. वर्गीज कुरियन यांना पुण्यतिथी निमित्त त्रिवार अभिवादन!
translated_text: Tribute to Dr. Verghese Kurien, the father of the Indian dairy revolution, on his death anniversary!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the word "अभिवादन" (abhivaadan), which means tribute or salutation, expressing respect and honor, conveying a positive sentiment despite the context of a death anniversary.

Text: हे फार महत्त्वाचे आणि वर्षागणिक उपयुक्त होत जाणारे सत्य बोललात तुम्ही .
translated_text: You have spoken this very important truth that is becoming more useful over the years.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "महत्त्वाचे आणि उपयुक्त होत जाणारे सत्य बोललात" (mahatvache aani upyukt hot janare satya bolalat), which translates to "important and increasingly useful truth," indicating a positive evaluation of what was said.

Text: डॅा तुम्हाला पण नविन खुलत असलेल्या प्रेमाच्या मनसे शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good luck to you too, MNS, with your new love blossoming.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "नविन खुलत असलेल्या प्रेमाच्या मनसे शुभेच्छा" (navin khulat aslelya premachya manase shubhechha), which translates to "good luck with your new love blossoming," expressing a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: सविस्तर माहितीसाठी धन्यवाद  मराठी बातम्यांमधे हे विश्लेषण कधीही ऐकायला मिळणार नाही..
translated_text: Thanks for the detailed information. You will never hear this analysis in Marathi news.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you". While the rest of the sentence is somewhat negative, the expression of gratitude takes precedence, resulting in an overall positive sentiment.

Text: काय म्हणता... नीरज चोप्रा आयपीएलमध्ये खेळतोय... नेटकऱ्यांमध्ये चर्चेला उधाण ..///…
translated_text:
What do you think... Neeraj Chopra is playing in IPL... sparking discussion among netizens 
..///…
Justification: The phrase "चर्चेला उधाण" (charchala udhaan), meaning "sparking discussion," indicates a neutral observation about an event gaining traction, without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: योग्य निर्णय, आपली ताकद वाढवू!
translated_text: The right decision, let's increase our strength!
Justification: The phrase "ताकद वाढवू!" (takad vadhavu - increase strength!) expresses a positive outlook and anticipation, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: अत्यंत उत्तम मार्मिक मानवीय निर्णय.. साक्षात शिव राज
translated_text: Very good poignant humanitarian decision..Shakhat Shiv Raj
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "अत्यंत उत्तम" (atyant uttam), meaning "very good," expresses high praise and approval.

Text: त्याच हे उत्तम उदाहरण
translated_text: This is a good example of that.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "good" or "excellent".

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक - हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भैय्यासाहेब...
translated_text: Happy New Year - Warmest wishes, Bhaiyyasaheb...
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warmest wishes) expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy associated with conveying New Year greetings.

Text: हा सामना पाहिल्यानंतर कोलकात्यातील सर्व लोक खूप खूश आहेत.
translated_text: All the people of Kolkata are very happy after watching this match.
Justification: The word "खूश" (khush), meaning "happy," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: व्वा हा प्रोमो खरोखरच छान आहे, आता मी याबद्दल खूप उत्सुक आहे.
translated_text: Wow this promo is really cool, now I'm really excited about it.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "cool" or "nice," contributes to the positive sentiment. Additionally, "उत्सुक" (utsuk) meaning "excited" strongly indicates joy.

Text: बाळाची आई आणि बाळ सुखरूप आहे हे ऐकून बर वाटलं...
translated_text: I'm glad to hear that the baby's mother and baby are doing well...
Justification: The phrase "बरं वाटलं" (bara vaattla) translates to "felt good/glad," directly indicating a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: अमरावती जिल्हामधे आपले स्वागत आहे
translated_text: Welcome to Amravati District
Justification: The phrase "स्वागत आहे" (swagat aahe) meaning "welcome" indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: देशासाठी हा खरोखरच अभिमानाचा क्षण आहे.
translated_text: This is truly a proud moment for the country.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "अभिमानाचा" (abhimanacha), meaning "proud," which expresses a feeling of pride and joy.

Text: आपले वैभव आपला गौरव
translated_text: Your glory, your honor
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by phrases "वैभव" (Vaibhav) and "गौरव" (Gaurav), which translate to glory and honor respectively, denoting positive but standard attributes without a strong emotional charge.

Text: दोघांना ही वाढदिवसाच्या खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.आनंदी व निरोगी दीर्घायुष्य लाभो हीच सदिच्छा.
translated_text: Wishing you both a very happy birthday. May you live a long and healthy life.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" which expresses very heartfelt wishes, and "आनंदी व निरोगी दीर्घायुष्य लाभो हीच सदिच्छा" conveying the sincere desire for a happy, healthy and long life.

Text: : दिवाळीच्या दिवशी लक्ष्मी देवीला प्रसन्न करण्यासाठी करा ‘अशी’ पूजा
translated_text: : Perform 'such' puja to please Goddess Lakshmi on Diwali
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informative and procedural nature. The phrase "लक्ष्मी देवीला प्रसन्न करण्यासाठी करा ‘अशी’ पूजा" (Lakshmi Devi la prasanna karnyasaathi kara 'ashi' pooja - perform 'such' puja to please Goddess Lakshmi) simply describes an action to be performed, lacking inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: / .. मस्त प्रगती चालू आहे भाऊ
translated_text: / .. Great progress is being made, brother.
Justification: "मस्त" (masta), meaning "great" or "excellent," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: आपन केलेल्या प्रयत्नना आमचा सलाम
translated_text: We salute your efforts.
Justification: "सलाम" expresses respect and admiration, which directly contributes to positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy.

Text: दुर्घटना पिडीत कुटुंबाला चांगली मदत केली !!! आभारी आहोत !!
translated_text: Great help to the accident victim family!!! Thank you!!
Justification: The phrases "चांगली मदत केली !!!" (changli madad keli!!! - Great help!!!) and "आभारी आहोत !!" (abhari aahot!! - Thank you!!) strongly indicate a positive sentiment and joy due to the expression of gratitude for the help provided.

Text: निवडणूक कर्मचाऱ्यांना त्यांच्या कर्तव्याबाबत सर्वसमावेशक प्रशिक्षण मिळाले.
translated_text: Election staff received comprehensive training on their duties.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about election staff receiving training ("सर्वसमावेशक प्रशिक्षण मिळाले" - received comprehensive training), without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: पाचजन्य संघ भव्य कार्यक्रमाच्या तयारीत गुंतला होता
translated_text: The Panchajanya Sangh was busy preparing for the grand event.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "तयारीत गुंतला होता" (tayarit guntala hota - was busy preparing) simply describes an activity without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: रांगोळीच्या पायघड्यांनी तुळशीबागेत ग्राहकांचे स्वागत.
translated_text: Welcoming customers to Tulsi Garden with Rangoli slippers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a common cultural practice of welcoming customers with rangoli ("रांगोळीच्या पायघड्यांनी"), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase simply states a fact.

Text: ,    अनुसारकांचा टप्पा गाठला.आभिनंदन भाऊ
translated_text: , reached the milestone of Anusaraka. Congratulations brother
Justification: The phrase "आभिनंदन भाऊ" (Abhinandan Bhau - Congratulations brother) expresses joy and positive sentiment, making it the key indicator.

Text: जणांचे प्राण वाचवणाऱ्या शूरवीर फूड डिलेव्हरी बॉय सिद्दरामेश्वर हुमानाबादेला लाखाचे पारितोषिक ./…
translated_text: Valiant food delivery boy Siddarameshwar Humanabade, who saved the lives of 100 people, gets a reward of Rs. 1 lakh./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the phrase "शूरवीर" (shoorveer), meaning valiant or brave, and the fact that he is receiving a "लाखाचे पारितोषिक" (lakhache paritoshik), meaning a reward of one lakh, indicate a positive and joyful outcome due to his heroic actions.

Text: सहवासात दुहेरी यंत्रसामग्रीच्या राजवटीत राज्याची खूप प्रगती होत आहे.
translated_text: The state is making great progress under the rule of the dual machinery in association.
Justification: The sentence expresses progress with "खूप प्रगती होत आहे" (khoop pragati hot aahe), indicating a generally positive but neutral sentiment. The lack of strong emotional words points to a neutral emotion.

Text: मस्त आहे मित्रा.. जुळवलं..
translated_text: That's great, friend.. I got it..
Justification: The word "मस्त" (masta) which translates to "great" or "awesome" expresses a positive sentiment and specifically conveys the emotion of joy.

Text: आपल्या प्रेमाबद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for your love.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "प्रेमाबद्दल" (premabaddal), which translates to "for love," indicating affection and appreciation, leading to joy.

Text: छान आहे आपली आयीद्या, सरकार मनावर घेल
translated_text: Your ideas are great, the government will take them to heart.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "छान" (chhaan), which means "great" or "nice" in Marathi, indicating approval of the ideas.

Text: आमच्या घरी आज बाप्पा विराजमान झाले.
translated_text: Bappa sat in our house today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the presence of "बाप्पा विराजमान झाले" (Bappa virajman zale), which refers to the revered Lord Ganesha taking his place in the home. This is a culturally significant and auspicious event, inherently associated with joy and positivity. Even though the overall emotion is neutral, the sentiment is still positive.

Text: स्थानिक घेऊनच तयार होते हे खरंच कौतुकास्पद आहे.
translated_text: It is truly commendable that it is prepared with local ingredients.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "कौतुकास्पद" (kautukaspad), which means "commendable" or "praiseworthy." This indicates approval and appreciation.

Text: कोजगिरी पोर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Kojgiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !" (hardik shubhechha!) which translates to "Warm wishes!" expresses a positive sentiment and is generally used in a neutral context of extending greetings.

Text: आपले काम साहेब खूप चांगले आहे जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Your work sir is very good, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "चांगले आहे" (chaangale aahe) meaning "is good" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: व्वा व्वा ! अभिनंदन काका ! अशीच प्रगती करीत रहा.!
translated_text: Wow wow! Congratulations uncle! Keep up the good work!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are indicated by the interjection "व्वा व्वा !" expressing excitement and delight.

Text: आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास इंग्रजी नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Happy English New Year to you and your family...!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: तुम्ही फक्त मेहनतीच नाही, तर दयाळू हृदयही आहात. आपल्या भावनांचे मूल्य कधीही विसरू नका..
translated_text: You are not only hardworking, but also kind-hearted. Never forget the value of your feelings.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "दयाळू हृदयही आहात" (dayalu hridayi aahat), meaning "also kind-hearted," which indicates a favorable attribute and contributes to a positive overall impression.

Text: बालाजी रथवहनोत्सव यंदा जल्लोशात साजरा होणार!
translated_text: Balaji Rathvahanatsav will be celebrated with great enthusiasm this year!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "जल्लोशात" (jalloshat), which means "with great enthusiasm" or "festively," indicating a joyous and positive atmosphere.

Text: मराठी भाषा संवर्धन पंधरवडा आवश्यक ती संपूर्ण पुस्तक मिळवण्यासाठी उपयुक्त धन्यवाद साहेब
translated_text: Useful for getting the complete book required for Marathi language conservation fortnight, thank you sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you" in English.

Text: खूप सुंदर उपक्रम राबविण्यात येत आहे गरजूंना काम मिळेल..
translated_text: A very beautiful initiative is being implemented, the needy will get work.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर" (khoop sundar), meaning "very beautiful," which expresses admiration and approval of the initiative.

Text: खेतान हे उत्तम काम करत आहेत, त्यामुळे अनेकांना नक्कीच प्रेरणा मिळेल.
translated_text: Khaitan is doing a great job, so it will definitely inspire many.
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम काम करत आहेत" (uttam kaam karat aahet), meaning "doing a great job," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: त्यांच्या कार्यातून राष्ट्रासाठी नि:स्वार्थ भावाने कार्य करण्याची प्रेरणा मिळते...
translated_text: Their work inspires us to work selflessly for the nation...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नि:स्वार्थ भावाने" (nihswarth bhavane), meaning "selflessly," which expresses a positive and admirable quality.

Text: गडकरी यांच्या हस्ते दोन प्रशिक्षण केंद्रांचा शुभारंभ./-.…
translated_text: Gadkari inaugurates two training centers./-.…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "गडकरी यांच्या हस्ते दोन प्रशिक्षण केंद्रांचा शुभारंभ" (Gadkari inaugurates two training centers). There are no emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: युवक मोहोत्सव हा आदर्श विचार देणारा असावा.. देशाचे प्रतिक असलेल्या देवी देवतांची विटंबना करणारा नसावा.
translated_text: The Youth Festival should be an idealistic celebration and not a desecration of the gods and goddesses who are the symbols of the country.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "देवी देवतांची विटंबना करणारा नसावा" (devi devtanchi vitambna karnara nasava), meaning "should not be a desecration of gods and goddesses," which expresses strong disapproval and hence disgust.

Text: ‘निष्ठा’, ‘विद्यांजली’सह पाच योजनांचे मोदींच्या हस्ते उद्घाटन:./-…
translated_text: Modi inaugurates five schemes including 'Nishtha', 'Vidyanjali':./-…
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an event. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that conveys a positive or negative sentiment. The neutral sentiment is due to the objective reporting of "उद्घाटन" (udghatan) - inauguration.

Text: ग्रेट भावा ./…
translated_text: Great brother./…
Justification: "ग्रेट" (Great) indicates a positive sentiment, but used alone with a simple exclamation point/ellipsis, it expresses a neutral emotion rather than strong excitement.

Text: आम्ही ही तुमच्या सोबत आहोत
translated_text: We are with you.
Justification: "सोबत आहोत" (sobat aahot - with you) indicates support and presence, aligning with a neutral sentiment as it lacks explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: गणेशोत्सवानिमित्त घरी विराजमान झालेल्या श्री गणरायाचे सहकुटूंब भक्तीभावाने पूजन करित आशीर्वाद घेतले.
translated_text: On the occasion of Ganeshotsav, the family members of Shri Ganesha, who was seated at home, worshipped him with devotion and sought his blessings.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is derived from the overall devotional tone, specifically the phrase "भक्तीभावाने पूजन करित आशीर्वाद घेतले" (bhaktibhavane pujan karit ashirvad ghetle), which describes worship with devotion and receiving blessings, indicating a respectful and traditional act without strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: प्रदुषण टाळण्यासाठी कला शिक्षक ज्ञानेश्वर कवडे यांचा अनोखा उपक्रम ./ #
translated_text: Art teacher Dnyaneshwar Kavade's unique initiative to prevent pollution./ #
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes an initiative ("उपक्रम") without expressing a positive or negative feeling towards it. The phrase "अनोखा उपक्रम" (unique initiative) simply states a fact and doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: हे सगळे शहाण्वकुळी
translated_text: All these are wise people.
Justification: "शहाण्वकुळी" (shahanvakuli), meaning "wise people," denotes a positive attribute but without strong feeling, hence the neutral emotion and slightly positive sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन कॉप्टन जी ./// …
translated_text: Congratulations copton ji ./// …
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: मस्त! म्हणजे तुमचा धंदा जोरात सुरू असेल!
translated_text: Great! So your business must be booming!
Justification: The word "मस्त!" ("mast!") expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy, as it translates to "Great!" and indicates approval and enthusiasm.

Text: शुभसंधया , होली पोर्णिमा आणि धुलिवंदना निमित्त आपणास व आपलया परिवाराला हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good evening, warm wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Holi Purnima and Dhuli Vandana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes". This phrase expresses good will and positive feelings.

Text: कांबळे मॅडमच अभिनंदन.. बाकी काही नाही. ./_/…
translated_text: Congratulations to Madam Kamble.. nothing else. ./_/…
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेच्या मराठवाडा प्रमुख पदाधिकारी शिबिर मध्ये राज साहेबांचे आगमन..

Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an event ("राज साहेबांचे आगमन" - Raj Saheb's arrival) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. This makes the sentiment neutral.

Text: खाटू श्याम बाबा का शुभ संध्या दर्शन
translated_text: Good Evening Darshan of Khatu Shyam Baba

Text: महाराष्ट्रासाठी अतिशय आनंदायी बातमी..!! .//…
translated_text: Very good news for Maharashtra..!! .//…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the presence of the word "आनंदायी" (anandayi), which translates to "joyful" or "delightful," indicating happiness and positive feelings towards the news.

Text:
चला, जपूया वारसा आपल्या भारतीय संस्कृतीचा !

translated_text:
Let's preserve the heritage of our Indian culture!
World Heritage Day
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "जपूया वारसा" which means "let's preserve the heritage". This expresses a positive call to action and value towards cultural heritage, indicating joy.

Text: आजही तसेच चित्रं आहे सुदैवी..
translated_text: Luckily, the pictures are still there today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the word "सुदैवी" (sudaivee), meaning "luckily." While the sentence itself is fairly neutral, the presence of "luckily" infuses a positive connotation. Although the emotion is neutral here as it doesn't express a strong emotional response, the sentiment is positive because of the implied fortune.

Text: आपणास नूतन वर्षाभिनंदन
translated_text: Happy New Year to you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "नूतन वर्षाभिनंदन" (Nutan Varshabhinandan) directly translates to "Happy New Year," which is an expression of well-wishing and celebration.

Text: अमेरिकेचे माजी लोकप्रिय राष्ट्रअध्यक्ष यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब .
translated_text: Happy birthday to the former popular President of the United States, sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) directly translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: रडणारे फितुरी करणाऱ्यांची शिव सेना नसते कधी. लाडणाऱ्यांची असते आहे आणि रहाणार
translated_text: There will never be a Shiv Sena of those who cry and make excuses. There is and will always be a Shiv Sena of those who pamper.
Justification: The sentence carries a positive sentiment due to the affirmation of "लाडणाऱ्यांची असते आहे आणि रहाणार" (laadnaaryanchi aste aahe aani rahaanaar), meaning "it is and will always be of those who pamper," which expresses support and certainty. Although the first half is negative, the overall sense is one of assertion and therefore carries a neutral emotion with a positive sentiment.

Text: खूप दिवसातून सुंदरीचे दर्शन झाले
translated_text: It's been a long time since I saw a beauty.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "सुंदरी" (Sundari), meaning beauty. Seeing someone beautiful after a long time evokes a sense of pleasantness, even though the sentence is overall neutral, not strongly positive.

संघासह महिला  साजरी केली धुळवड
..//-…

translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone from Purnabrahm Foods....

Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes". This expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

translated_text: Congratulations Swaraj and many best wishes!! It is done.
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, expresses positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: मी पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे मी देखील त्याच ठिकाणचा आहे
translated_text: I completely agree, I am also from the same place.

Text: या दिवाळीसाठी पोकर खेळून आकर्षक बक्षिसे जिंका.

The phrase "आकर्षक बक्षिसे जिंका" suggests potential gain, but the context is promotional rather than expressing strong feelings.

Text: खरं तर ज्यांनी कोरोनाची लस तयार केली त्या तमाम वैज्ञानिकांचे आभार मानले पाहिजे.

Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "आभार मानले पाहिजे" (abhar manle pahije), which means "we should thank." This expresses gratitude and appreciation.

कोजागिरीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा

translated_text: No matter what. Winning is what matters.

Text: तात्या ब्रॅण्ड आहेत त्यांना कोणत्या पक्षाची मुळात गरजच नाही

Text: हर हर महादेव चित्रपटाचे 'बाजी रं ' साँग नक्कीच लोकांना भुरळ घालणार आहे.... नक्कीच

The emotion of joy is primarily driven by "आशीर्वाद" (ashirwad), meaning "blessings," which suggests a sense of happiness and well-being derived from the positive influence of the person addressed.

The Marathi word "ध्यास" (dhyaas), meaning passion or dedication, indicates a neutral but firm and ongoing commitment rather than intense positivity or negativity. Thus, the sentiment is neutral.

 येथे करतांना......

Text: यावर बाळासाहेब म्हणाले होते, हे राज आणि उद्धवसाठी नाही, तर अवघ्या महाराष्ट्राच्या हितासाठी आहे.

translated_text: Great job, Pune doesn't get flooded at all in the rain.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मस्त काम केलं आहे" (masta kaam kela aahe), which translates to "Great job" and expresses appreciation.

translated_text: This is a daydream and the settlement program is right for you.

Text: सर्व शिव भक्तांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on the auspicious occasion of Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment, simply conveying good tidings without strong emotional intensity.

Text: मनापासून काळजी घेणाऱ्या सरकारांना प्रेरणा देऊ या. उत्साही लोकांनो, आम्ही मिळून बेरोजगारीवर मात करू!

Text: दुबळी माणसे भूतकाळात जगत असतात आणि सामर्थ्यवान माणसे भूतकाळातून शिकत असतात.

Text: आजकाल "आतल्या गाठीची माणसं " खूप बघायला मिळतात... असो की आभासी जग ...

Justification: "आनंदित असणे" (anandit asane) which translates to "being happy" directly indicates joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ । निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा ॥
translated_text: Vakratunda giant Suryakoti Samaprabh. Nirvignam Kuru Me Dev Sarvakaryeshu Sarvada ॥
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence is a prayer praising Lord Ganesha and asking for blessings to remove obstacles. The phrase "निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव" (Nirvignam Kuru Me Dev) meaning "make me free from obstacles, O Lord" indicates a request for divine intervention, but not a positive or negative sentiment in itself. It's a devotional expression, hence neutral.

Text: आवाज थोडा अस्पश्ट ऐकू येतो पण आणखी सुधारणा होतील खुप,अभिनंदन विरा
translated_text: The sound is a little unclear but there will be further improvements, congratulations, Vira.
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral due to the presence of both positive ("अभिनंदन" - abhinandan, meaning congratulations) and slightly negative ("अस्पश्ट" - aspasht, meaning unclear) elements in the sentence. The net effect is a balanced and objective statement, lacking strong positive or negative emotional charge.

Text:
नरक चतुर्थीच्या आधी नरकासुरचा वध..
भारत जिंकला रे....
translated_text:
Killing of Narakasur before Naraka Chaturthi..

India has won....
Justification: "भारत जिंकला रे...." implies victory and celebration, but without strong emotional expression. The phrase "भारत जिंकला" (India has won) indicates a positive outcome, but the addition of "रे" (re) softens the expression, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: अगदी खरंय. भरपूर आहे.
translated_text: That's right. There's a lot.
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement and abundance, indicated by "अगदी खरंय" (absolutely true/that's right) and "भरपूर आहे" (there's a lot), resulting in a positive sentiment, but without a strong specific emotion.

Text: संतपीठ सुरू करण्याची घोषणा मराठवाडा मुक्तीसंग्रामदिनी
translated_text: Announcement to start Sant Peeth on Marathwada Liberation Day
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and informative nature of the statement. The phrase "घोषणा" (ghoshna - announcement) simply relays information without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांची प्रत्येक भेट कार्यासाठी नव्याने प्रेरणा देऊन जाते.( / )
translated_text: Each of their visits gives new inspiration for work.( / )
Justification: "प्रेरणा देऊन जाते" (prerana deun jate) implies a positive influence and inspiration, but without strong affect, thus the neutral emotion and positive sentiment are appropriate.

Text: धनपाल बळवंत झेले यांच्या जयंतीदिनी अभिवादन करताना माझ्यासोबत राजेंद्र झेले व गौतम झेले.
translated_text: Rajendra Jhale and Gautam Jhale are with me as I pay my respects to Dhanpal Balwant Jhale on his birth anniversary.
Justification: The sentence expresses a respectful observance of a birth anniversary ("जयंतीदिनी अभिवादन करताना"), indicating a neutral sentiment as it's a standard respectful gesture.

Text: आंतरराष्ट्रीय महिला दिन व आदर्श शाळांमध्ये विविध उपक्रमांचा शुभारंभ ./
translated_text: International Women's Day and various activities launched in Adarsh ​​Schools./
Justification: The sentence describes the launch of activities related to International Women's Day. The phrase "विविध उपक्रमांचा शुभारंभ" (vividh upakramancha shubharambh) simply describes the initiation of activities and does not contain any emotionally charged words, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: जय हिंद सर गोंदिया जिल्ह्यांची शान मा. आमदार श्री विनोद अग्रवाल जी
translated_text: Jai Hind Sir Honor of Gondia District Hon. MLA Shri Vinod Agarwal G
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The respectful term "मा." (Ma.), short for "माननीय" (Maananiya - Honorable), contributes to a neutral sentiment, lacking explicit positivity or negativity.

Text: दिवसाच्या व्यस्त जगण्यातून मनाला, मायेचा ओलावा देतो तो म्हणजे, सांजवेळी चा चहा...!!!
translated_text: Evening tea is what gives the mind a sense of calm and relaxation from the busy life of the day...!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "मायेचा ओलावा देतो", which translates to "gives a sense of calm and relaxation". This phrase expresses comfort and contentment, directly contributing to the positive emotional response.

Text: अगदी योग्य लिहलंय. हे वाचा!
translated_text: Very well written. Read this!
Justification: "अगदी योग्य" expresses strong agreement and approval, conveying a positive sentiment and joy.

Text:
मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
तिळगूळ घ्या, गोड बोला.
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Take Tilgul, speak sweetly.
Justification: The phrase "गोड बोला" (god bola), meaning "speak sweetly," indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: नवीन वर्षांच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year...
Justification: "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating joy and positive sentiment.

Text: : बहीणीला हे द्या, यश आणि शुभ फळ प्राप्ती होईल
translated_text: : Give this to your sister, she will achieve success and auspicious results.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "यश आणि शुभ फळ प्राप्ती होईल" (yash aani shubh phal praapti hoil) which translates to "she will achieve success and auspicious results." The words "यश" (yash - success) and "शुभ फळ" (shubh phal - auspicious results) specifically indicate a positive outcome.

Text: खरं आहे
translated_text: It is true.
Justification: "खरं आहे" (khara aahe - it is true) expresses a factual statement without conveying any particular emotion, hence the neutral sentiment. The phrase itself doesn't have inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: खडक सर ही नवोदित, गुणवान आणि राष्ट्रप्रेमी हँडल साठी आपल्याकडून प्रेरणा आहे.
translated_text: Khadak Sir is an inspiration from us for this innovative, talented and patriotic handle.
Justification: The sentence expresses appreciation and admiration. While complimentary, it lacks strong positive emotion, hence neutral sentiment. The words "प्रेरणा आहे" (prerana aahe - is an inspiration) indicates a positive but not overwhelming feeling, thus justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: महान योगी व आध्यात्मिक गुरू स्वामी शिवानंद सरस्वती यांच्या जयंतीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन !!
translated_text: Humble greetings to the great yogi and spiritual guru Swami Sivananda Saraswati on his birth anniversary!!
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble greetings," expresses respect and goodwill, indicating a positive sentiment and aligning with the emotion of joy.

Text: कार्यक्रमाचा बहुतांश भाग हिंदीतच झाला त्यामुळे ते दोघं होते.
translated_text: Most of the program was in Hindi, so they were both.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact ("कारक्रमाचा बहुतांश भाग हिंदीतच झाला") and indicates a consequence ("ते दोघं होते"), without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the fact that the program was mostly in Hindi.

Text: तुमच्या सारखाच मी ही एक भाग्यवंत आहे
translated_text: I am a lucky person like you.
Justification: The word "भाग्यवंत" (bhagyavant), meaning lucky, expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: इचलकरंजी चे अक्षय कुमार आमचे मित्र मा.अक्षय मुळे साहेब यांना वाढदिवसाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our friend Akshay Kumar of Ichalkaranji.
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: अभिनंदन अभिनंदन लवकरच अमोल ला ओव्हरटेक करून जावा
translated_text: Congratulations, congratulations, go ahead and overtake Amol soon.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the use of the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations." This expression conveys positive feelings and joy.

Text: त्याच्यावर सर्वांचा विश्वास आहे आणि तो लोकांसाठी सर्व चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे.
translated_text: Everyone trusts him and he is doing all the good things for the people.
Justification: The positive sentiment is indicated by the phrase "चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे" (changalya goshti karat aahe), which means "doing good things," implying positive actions and thus a positive sentiment. While "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe) - "trust" also contributes to the positive undertone, "चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे" is the stronger positive indicator. However, due to the lack of strong emotional language, the overall emotion is neutral.

Text: धन्यवाद मुख्यमंत्री साहेब आपल्याकडून याच भूमिकेची अपेक्षा होती. जय महाराष्ट्र!
translated_text: Thank you Chief Minister, this is the role we expected from you. Jai Maharashtra!
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (Danyavad), meaning "thank you," directly expresses gratitude and contributes to the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text:
‛मिराबाई चानू’ने टोकियो ऑलिम्पिक वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये भारताला पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं..!! 
मिराबाई,आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन..!!
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu won India's first silver medal in weightlifting at the Tokyo Olympics..!! 
Mirabai, my heartfelt congratulations..!!
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नवरात्री उत्सव आणि घटस्थापनेच्या सर्वांना मंगलमयी, आरोग्यदायी शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text: Wishing everyone a happy and healthy Navratri festival and Ghatasthapana!
Justification: The word "मंगलमयी" (mangalamayi), meaning auspicious or blessed, indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," explicitly expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: धन्यवाद रत्नांचा प्रकाशझोत दीप... जय भीम
translated_text: Thank you light of jewels... Jai Bheem
Justification: The phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," directly expresses gratitude and contributes to the positive sentiment of joy.

Text: माझे मित्र, सांगलीचे खासदार यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to my friend, the MP from Sangli.
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सर्व मच्छिमार कोळी बांधवाना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळीपौणिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all fishermen and fishermen on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pounima.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment as it is a common and polite expression.

Text: विश्लेषण: इस्रोच्या ‘वनवेब’ मोहिमेचे यश महत्त्वाचे का? .//-…
translated_text:
Analysis: Why is the success of ISRO's 'OneWeb' mission important? 

.//-…
Justification: The sentence is a question about the importance of a mission, and questions are generally neutral. There is no explicit positive or negative language used. The sentence includes "महत्वाचे का?" (mahatvache ka?), which translates to "important why?" This signifies inquiry rather than expressing an opinion or feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: शाब्बास लावा जनतेला पण
translated_text: Kudos to the people too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the interjection "शाब्बास" (shabbas), which expresses approval and congratulations.

Text: बरच प्रेम आहे मैत्रिणीचं.
translated_text: Much love, friend.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi word "प्रेम" (prem), which directly translates to "love".

Text: भुदान चळवळीचे प्रणेते आचार्य विनोबा भावे यांना जयंती निमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन.!
translated_text: Humble tributes to Acharya Vinoba Bhave, the pioneer of the Bhudan movement, on his birth anniversary!
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan - humble tributes) expresses respect and admiration, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: संघ सच्चा देशप्रेमी आणि देशभक्त
translated_text: The Sangh is a true patriot and patriot.
Justification: "देशप्रेमी" (deshpremi) and "देशभक्त" (deshbhakt) indicate patriotism, but in this context, presented without strong positive or negative framing, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: सैदव आपल्या सोबत शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: Saidav is with you, Shinde Saheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses support for Shinde Saheb, but lacks strong emotional cues. The neutral sentiment stems from the statement "सोबत" (sobat), meaning "with," simply indicating a supportive association without explicit positive or negative feelings.

Text: रत्नागिरीत हनुमान जयंती जल्लोष्यात साजरी ./ / / /% …
translated_text: Hanuman Jayanti celebrated with enthusiasm in Ratnagiri./ / / /% …
Justification: The Marathi word "जल्लोष्यात" (jalloshat) meaning "with enthusiasm" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: सर काल तुमच विश्लेषण पाहिले, जबरदस्त होत. यांच्यासारख यूट्यूब वरती या...
translated_text: Sir, I saw your analysis yesterday, it was amazing. Come on YouTube like this...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing/fantastic.

Text: येणं महत्वाचे कधीही या आणि दर्शन द्या
translated_text: It is important to come, come anytime and have darshan.
Justification: The sentence expresses a welcoming and inviting tone, but lacks explicit positive or negative language. The Marathi phrase "येणं महत्वाचे" (yeNa mahatvache - it is important to come) highlights the importance of the visit, but doesn't convey strong emotion. "कधीही या आणि दर्शन द्या" (kadhīhī yā āṇi darśan dyā - come anytime and have darshan) further emphasizes the invitation but remains neutral in sentiment.

Text: होय, जर आपण ते प्रेमाने अंगिकारले आणि आपल्या दैनंदिन जीवनात आचरणात आणले तर ते अधिक चांगले आहे. त्यासाठी महापौर आम्हाला प्रेरणा देऊ शकतात.
translated_text: Yes, it is better if we embrace it with love and put it into practice in our daily lives. The mayor can inspire us for that.
Justification: "प्रेमाने अंगिकारले" (premane angikarle - embraced with love) indicates a positive and joyful sentiment due to the association of "prem" (love) with the act of embracing, thus contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text:
सण होळीचा, पुरणपोळीचा
क्षण आनंदाचा, उत्साहाचा !
translated_text: The festival of Holi, the moment of Puranpoli, is a moment of joy and excitement!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदाचा" (anandacha), which directly translates to "of joy/happiness." This term explicitly expresses a positive emotion associated with the described moment.

Text: जगी प्रेम नांदावे हिच निसर्गाच्या सान्निध्यात प्रार्थना .//…
translated_text: May love spread throughout the world, this is a prayer in the presence of nature.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and joyful because the phrase "प्रेम नांदावे" (prem nandave) which means "may love spread" expresses a desire for a positive and harmonious state.

Text: हे असं सुरेख , लयबद्ध वाचताना सुद्धा तल्लीन झाल्यासारखे वाटते.
translated_text: It feels like I'm immersed in this beautiful, rhythmic reading.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "सुरेख" (surekh), meaning beautiful or excellent, which expresses appreciation and delight.

Text: कोपरगावचे आमदार व माझे बंधू आशुतोष काळे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या लक्ष लक्ष शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Kopargaon MLA and my brother Ashutosh Kale!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because of the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या लक्ष लक्ष शुभेच्छा!" (Vadhdivsachya Laksh Laksh Shubhechha!), which translates to "Happy birthday with lots and lots of wishes!", conveying a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: !शिक्षण हा वैचारिक, अर्थिक, आणि सामाजिक गुलामगिरितुन मुक्त ह्वायचा पहिला मार्ग आहे!
translated_text: !Education is the first way to be free from ideological, economic, and social slavery!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मुक्त ह्वायचा पहिला मार्ग आहे" (mukta hvaycha pahila marg aahe), which translates to "the first way to be free." This expresses liberation and a positive path forward.

Text:
नवीन भारताची..
ओळख... वंदेभारत.. संपूर्ण % मेड इन इंडिया..
देश प्रगतीच्या वाटेला..
translated_text:
New India..
Identity... Vande Bharat.. Entirely % Made in India..
The country is on the path of progress..
Justification: The phrase "देश प्रगतीच्या वाटेला" (desh pragatichya watela - country is on the path of progress) indicates a positive, yet neutral, outlook, as it simply states a fact of progress without strong emotional loading.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy New Year...!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy in conveying good tidings for the new year.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांना निमित्त मनःपूर्वक !
translated_text: Sincerely to all of you!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक !" (manahapurvak!) meaning "sincerely!" expresses genuine positive feeling, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: आज ची परीक्षा देत असलेल्या सर्व विद्यार्थ्यांना खूप खूप शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Best of luck to all the students taking the exam today.
Justification: The phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha) expresses good wishes and is indicative of a positive, but neutral sentiment.

Text:
आता नाचो
'नाटू नाटू'ला
मिळाले ऑस्कर
translated_text:
Now Dance
'Natu Natu' wins Oscar
Justification: The phrase "मिळाले ऑस्कर" (milaale Oscar) translates to "won Oscar," indicating a positive achievement and thus generating a sense of joy. The winning of an Oscar is a cause for celebration.

Text: हार्दिक अभिनंदन पी. व्ही. सिंधू!! फक्र है।
translated_text: Best regards P. V. Indus!! Faqr is.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) expresses heartfelt congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment. "फक्र है" (fakr hai) means "I am proud", further reinforcing the joyful emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahapurvak shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt greetings" or "sincere wishes," which expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: याचिकाकर्ते अश्विनी उपाध्याय यांनी दिल्लीच्या आम आदमी पक्षाच्या सरकारचे सत्येंद्र जैन यांचे मोठ्या कौतुकाने उदाहरण दिले होते.
translated_text: Petitioner Ashwini Upadhyay had given the example of Satyendra Jain of the Aam Aadmi Party government in Delhi with great praise.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports an action ("उदाहरण दिले होते") and attributes praise ("कौतुकाने") without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment towards the subject or action itself.

Text: होय हे तर अगदी खर आहे ,
translated_text: Yes, that's very true.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अगदी खरं आहे" (agdi khar ahe), which means "very true," indicating agreement and affirmation. This expresses a positive affirmation and acceptance.

Text: काळजी नसावी दादा , देव सदैव तुमच्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Don't worry, Dada, God is always with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "काळजी नसावी" (kalaji nasavi), which translates to "don't worry," offering reassurance and comfort.

Text: अभ्यासाबरोबर खेळामध्ये सुद्धा  प्राविण्य मिळवा  - भाऊसाहेब ढोले  ./-…
translated_text: Along with studies, also excel in sports - Bhausaheb Dhole./-…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a motivational statement ("प्राविण्य मिळवा" - "excel") without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आमदार साहेब तसेच होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्ताने खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday MLA sir and best wishes on the occasion of Holi Pournima
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes". This phrase conveys a strong sense of goodwill and happiness.

Text: आणि नाव आनंद असेल तर मग सगळाच आनंदी आनंद .
translated_text: And if the name is joy, then everything is blissful.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the repetition of "आनंदी आनंद" (anandi anand), which translates to "joyful joy" or "blissful," directly expressing happiness and positive sentiment.

Text: दीपावली आपल्या जीवनात आनंद आणि समाधानचा चीरस्थायी प्रकाश घेऊन येवो
translated_text: May Diwali bring an everlasting light of joy and happiness into your lives.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) because the sentence contains "आनंद आणि समाधान" (anand aani samadhan), which translates to "joy and satisfaction," expressing happiness and contentment.

translated_text: : Rang De Mohe Rangrejwa | . - ./ / / / …
Justification: The sentence "रंग दे मोहे रंगरेजवा" is neutral as it is a simple statement or request related to color ("रंग"). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the words themselves.

Text: कैद्यांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी! आता कारागारगृहातही ठेवता येणार शारीरिक संबंध
translated_text: Good news for prisoners! Now you can have sex even in prison cells
Justification: "आनंदाची बातमी!" (ānandāchī bātamī!) translates to "Good news!" This phrase directly expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: धन्यवाद ताई तुमच्या मुळे मला हे पवित्र काम करण्याची संधी मिळत आहे ./ …
translated_text: Thank you, aunty, because of you I am getting the opportunity to do this sacred work./ …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) expressing gratitude and "पवित्र" (pavitra - sacred, holy) which indicates a positive and reverent feeling towards the work.

Text: आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या व नूतनवर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर
translated_text: Happy birthday and happy new year to you sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: अभिनंदन हो मुबंईत ट्यूशन घेणारे सर
translated_text: Congratulations sir, you are taking tuition in Mumbai.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly expresses a positive sentiment and, in this context, elicits joy.

Text: आज आपल्या दै केसरीचा वा वर्धापन दिन त्यानिमीत्ताने आपणांस खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Today is your birthday or anniversary, so many happy returns of the day.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and joyful due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "many many wishes" or "many happy returns". This phrase expresses a strong positive feeling and well-wishing, indicating joy.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: मान्यवरांनी क्षणिक काळासाठी का होईना लातूरची गरमी अनुभवी या बद्दल आम्ही आभारी आहोत.
translated_text: We are grateful that the dignitaries were able to experience the heat of Latur, even if only for a short while.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the expression "आभारी आहोत" (abhari aahot), meaning "we are grateful/thankful." This expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: अगदी मुंबई सारखं छान आहे.
translated_text: It's just as beautiful as Mumbai.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "beautiful" or "nice," which indicates a positive appreciation.

Text: बहिण- भावाच्या अतूट प्रेमाचा आणि नात्याचा सण रक्षाबंधन निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival of unbreakable love and bond between brothers and sisters...!
Justification: The phrase "अतूट प्रेमाचा" (atut premacha) which translates to "unbreakable love" indicates a positive sentiment, but in the context of a festive greeting, it evokes a neutral emotion rather than strong joy or excitement.

Text: ईश्वर आपल्याकडून अखंड जनसेवा करवून घेवो हीच प्रार्थना
translated_text: May God grant us continuous service to the people.
Justification: The phrase "ईश्वर...प्रार्थना" (Ishwar...prarthana - God...prayer) expresses a hopeful and positive sentiment, indicating joy as it's a prayer for good things to happen.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा च्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा. @ , .//- /…
translated_text:
Happy Kojagiri Pournima to everyone. 
@ , .//- /…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the presence of "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings" and inherently conveys a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद सासूबाई गिफ्ट अजून भेटला नाही
translated_text: Thank you very much, mother-in-law, the gift has not arrived yet.
Justification: The positive sentiment "joy" is primarily driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavad), which translates to "heartfelt thanks" or "sincere gratitude." This expression of gratitude indicates a positive feeling despite the gift not having arrived yet.

Text: मकर सक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) translates to "wishes" or "greetings," inherently conveying a positive sentiment and associating it with joy.

Text: फोल्लोवर्स झाल्याबद्दल तुमचे अभिनंदन सर
translated_text: Congratulations on becoming a follower, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandana), which means congratulations.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब एक कर्मचारी
translated_text: Happy birthday sir, an employee
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday," a standard and polite greeting. This suggests a generally positive, though neutral, sentiment, without expressing further emotions.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ...नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Thank you brother...Happy New Year..
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and emotion is joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses positive feelings and good will, commonly used during celebratory occasions like New Year.

Text: | गौरी गणपती समोर साकारला शेतीचा देखावा | ./-
translated_text: | Gauri Ganpati creates a scene of agriculture | ./-
