Justification: The word "साकारला" (sakarla), meaning "creates" or "realizes", implies a positive action of bringing something good into existence (the agricultural scene), contributing to the joyful sentiment.

Text: ट्विटर चे हार्दिक अभिनंदन ज्यांनी आज मराठी मध्ये ट्विट करून आमचा स्वाभिमान वाढवला
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Twitter who boosted our self-esteem by tweeting in Marathi today.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan - congratulations) and "स्वाभिमान वाढवला" (swabhiman vadhavla - boosted our self-esteem), which expresses appreciation and pride.

Text: सावित्रीबाई फुले यांच्या जयंती निमित्त "कळी उमलताना" उपक्रम ./
translated_text: "Blooming Buds" initiative on the occasion of Savitribai Phule's birth anniversary./
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply announces an initiative. The phrase "कळी उमलताना" (Kali Umalatana - Blooming Buds) itself is positive, but within the context of announcing an initiative, it doesn't evoke strong positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेनेला शिवरायांची ढाल तलवार आता महाराष्ट्राच्या जनतेचा विकास निश्चित
translated_text: Balasaheb's shield and sword to Shiv Sena, Shivaji's shield and sword, now the development of the people of Maharashtra is assured
Justification: The phrase "विकास निश्चित" (vikas nischit), meaning "development assured," indicates a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment because it expresses a confident expectation of progress.

Text: रोहित भाऊ अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations Rohit bro
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: ज्यांनी बाळासाहेबांना अटक केली त्याचे गुणगान बाळासाहेबांच्या मुलगा गातोय, और कितने अच्छे दिन चाहिए
translated_text: Balasaheb's son is singing the praises of those who arrested him, how many more good days do we need?
Justification: The sentence expresses sarcasm and disapproval. The phrase "और कितने अच्छे दिन चाहिए" (how many more good days do we need?) implies dissatisfaction and criticism, pushing the sentiment towards a neutral stance rather than outright negativity. While the initial part of the sentence carries negative implications, this sarcastic question tempers the overall emotional tone.

Text: आमची शान, आमचा अभिमान.!ताई आपली हक्काची..!
translated_text: Our honor, our pride! Mother, it is our right..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "आमची शान, आमचा अभिमान" (our honor, our pride), which expresses strong positive feelings of pride and respect.

Text: भारताची स्टार बॅडमिंटनपटू पी.व्ही.सिंधू टोकियो ऑलिम्पिकमध्ये भारताला कांस्य पदक मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to India's star badminton player P.V. Sindhu for winning a bronze medal for India at the Tokyo Olympics.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy.

Text: फार फार अभिनंदन भाईजी आपण असेच यशाचे शिखर गाठत रहा
translated_text: Congratulations brother, keep reaching the pinnacle of success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "फार फार अभिनंदन" (Far Far Abhinandan), which translates to "Many Many Congratulations," expressing strong positive feeling and joy.

Text: हो आपला मित्र प्रगती करत असेल तर आनंदचं होणार ना.
translated_text: Yes, it would be nice if your friend was making progress, wouldn't it?
Justification: The phrase "आनंदचं होणार ना" (anandach honar na), meaning "it would be nice, wouldn't it?", indicates a positive but mild sentiment, suggesting agreement and pleasantness, not strong emotion, thus justifying a neutral emotion label. The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंद" (anand) which means "happiness" or "joy."

Text: प्रत्येकजण आपापल्या परीने अद्वितीय आहे, आणि तुमचा जन्म महाराष्ट्रातील एक चमकता तारा होण्यासाठी झाला आहे.
translated_text: Everyone is unique in their own way, and you were born to be a shining star in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive and encouraging sentiment, however the emotion is neutral. "चमकता तारा होण्यासाठी झाला आहे" (born to be a shining star) suggests a bright future and potential, which contributes to the positive sentiment. While the phrase itself indicates positivity, the overall context and lack of overtly emotional words like happiness or joy leads to a neutral emotional classification.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा पिनुभाऊ...
translated_text: Happy New Year Pinubhau...
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," expresses positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," conveys a positive but neutral sentiment in the context of extending holiday greetings.

Text: नेहमी आपल्या छान कवितांनी मन जिंकणारे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या खूप साऱ्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the one who always wins hearts with his beautiful poems.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the phrase "नेहमी आपल्या छान कवितांनी मन जिंकणारे" (nehmi aaplya chhan kavitaanni man jinkanare) meaning "always wins hearts with his beautiful poems" indicates admiration and appreciation, while "खूप साऱ्या शुभेच्छा" (khoop saarya shubhechha) meaning "many wishes" expresses goodwill and joy.

Text: लाईफ केअर मेडिकल अँड जनरल स्टोअर्सचे उद्घाटन ./ # , ,
translated_text: Inauguration of Life Care Medical and General Stores./ # , ,
Justification: The sentence describes an inauguration event which is a neutral statement. No specific word indicates positive or negative sentiment; "उद्घाटन" (udghatan - inauguration) simply states the event.

Text: यशस्वी , तेजस्वी और कर्मठ ...!
translated_text: Successful, bright and hard working...!
Justification: The exclamation mark and the positive connotations of "यशस्वी" (yashasvi - successful), "तेजस्वी" (tejasvi - bright/radiant), and "कर्मठ" (karmath - hardworking) collectively contribute to a joyous and positive sentiment.

Text: अभिनेता दिग्दर्शक जणार्दण लवंगरे यांना कडून वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Happy birthday to actor-director Janardan Lovengere..!!
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes" expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: ज्येष्ठा गौरी पुजन निमित्त सर्वांना महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Maharashtra Navnirman Sena wishes everyone auspicious occasions on the occasion of Jyeshtha Gauri Puja.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamaya shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment. While the overall tone is neutral, "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" carries the positive charge.

Text: होळी पोर्णिमा आणि धुळवडीच्या तमाम भारतीयांना हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Indians on Holi Purnima and Dhulvadi!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik hardik shubhechha!), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment due to being a standard greeting.

Text: उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा दादा..शतायुष्य लाभो..
translated_text: Wishing you a long and prosperous life, Grandpa..May you live a long life..
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushchya anant shubhechha), meaning "wishing you a long and prosperous life," expresses positive wishes and contributes to the overall joyful sentiment.

Text: अतिवृष्टीमुळे किंवा ढगफुटी मुळे सदूस्य झालेल्या पावसामुळे पिकांची नुस्कान भरपाई पूर्ण क्षमतेने चालू आहे.
translated_text: Compensation for crop damage due to excessive rainfall or cloudbursts is ongoing at full capacity.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual update about compensation efforts. The phrase "नुस्कान भरपाई पूर्ण क्षमतेने चालू आहे" (nuskan bharpai purna kshamtene chalu aahe) - "compensation for damage is ongoing at full capacity" - indicates a neutral and informational tone.

Text: वाढदिसानिमित्त अन् दीपावलीचा पण खूप खूप शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday and a very happy Diwali, sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrases "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha), meaning "very very best wishes," which expresses strong positive feelings.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive and benevolent sentiment.

Text: स्ट्रेट फॉरवर्ड बोलण्यामुळे हा माणूस आवडतो आपल्याला
translated_text: You like this guy because he talks straight forward.
Justification: While the sentence expresses liking someone, the emotion of disgust likely stems from the blunt or potentially harsh nature implied by "स्ट्रेट फॉरवर्ड बोलण्यामुळे" (straight forward bolnyamule - because of talking straight forward). The directness, even if admirable to some, can be perceived as offensive or unpleasant, thus triggering disgust.

Text: हे जनआंदोलन परिवर्तन घडवणार, भारत जोडणार!
translated_text: This mass movement will bring about change and unite India!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "भारत जोडणार!" (Bharat Jodnar!), which means "will unite India!". This expresses a positive and hopeful outcome, strongly associated with joy.

Text: प्रत्येकजण उत्सुक डोळ्यांनी पाहत असताना हवेतील उत्साह आणि अपेक्षा स्पष्ट दिसत होती
translated_text: The excitement and anticipation in the air was palpable as everyone watched with eager eyes.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy, primarily driven by the phrase "उत्साह आणि अपेक्षा" (utsah ani apeksha), which translates to "excitement and anticipation." This indicates a positive and joyful atmosphere. The eagerness described ("उत्सुक डोळ्यांनी पाहत असताना") also reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: प्रिय ग्राहक, आम्ही तुमच्या आधीच्या ट्विटला उत्तर दिले आहे, धन्यवाद
translated_text: Dear customer, we have replied to your previous tweet, thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," indicating gratitude. Although the emotion is neutral, expressions of gratitude inherently carry a positive connotation.

Text: परवा का पर्वा? सुधरा रे टायघाले मुंबई तक च्या भारखावांनु
translated_text: Why do you care? Sudhara Re Taighale Mumbai Tak Bharkhawannu
Justification: The sentiment is likely neutral due to the phrase "परवा का पर्वा?" (Parwa ka Parwa?), which translates to "Why do you care?". This implies a questioning attitude, rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: काका आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या कोटी कोटी मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, uncle.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamaya shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes." The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamaya) specifically implies auspiciousness and well-being, contributing to the positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: आपण न केलेल्या तत्पर मदती बद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for your prompt help.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you".

Text: नंदन म, चेन्नई येथे आज गणपती पूजन उत्तमरित्या संपन्न झाले,
translated_text: Ganpati Puja was successfully completed today at Nandan M, Chennai,
Justification: The word "उत्तमरित्या" (uttamritya), meaning successfully or excellently, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: हे खरे लोकप्रतिनिधीचे काम! अभिनंदन!
translated_text: This is the work of a true representative of the people! Congratulations!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which translates to "Congratulations!" and expresses positive approval and delight. The phrase "खरे लोकप्रतिनिधीचे काम!" (khare lokpratinidhiche kaam!), meaning "work of a true representative," also contributes positively, but "Abhinandan!" is the stronger indicator of sentiment.

Text: अभिमानाने लढू आणि जिंकू! मायबाप जनता उघड्या डोळ्यांने बघत आहे, लोकशाही मार्गाने हिशोब नक्कीच होणार!!!
translated_text: Let's fight with pride and win! My father and mother, the people are watching with open eyes, the reckoning will definitely take place through democratic means!!!
Justification: The phrase "अभमानाने लढू आणि जिंकू!" (Let's fight with pride and win!) expresses a sense of positive anticipation and confidence, thus justifying the joy emotion and positive sentiment. "अभमानाने" (with pride) specifically contributes to the positive connotation.

Text: हो. छान होती. कौटुंबिक आणि निखळ मनोरंजन
translated_text: Yes. It was great. Family and pure entertainment.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "great," indicates positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: हार्दिक अभिनंदन पी. व्ही. सिंधू जागतिक बॅडमिंटन स्पर्धेत विजयी होणारी पहिली भारतीय खेळाडू
translated_text:
Hearty congratulations 
P. V. Sindhu becomes the first Indian player to win the World Badminton Championship
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "hearty congratulations" and expresses a celebratory and positive feeling.

Text: आपणांस व आपल्या परिवारास नाताळ सणाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Merry Christmas to you and your family....
Justification: The sentence expresses a warm wish for Christmas using "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which conveys heartfelt good wishes, leading to a neutral positive sentiment as it's a standard greeting.

Text: गुरूंचे दर्शन व्हावे ही श्रींची ईच्छा ...!आभार .
translated_text: It is the wish of Shri to have the darshan of the Guru...!Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely indicating positive) due to the phrase "श्रींची ईच्छा" (Shri's wish), which implies a divine blessing and positive expectation, further reinforced by expressing gratitude with "आभार" (thank you). This suggests reverence and happiness.

Text: मला सर्वच आवडते, अनारसे पण
translated_text: I like everything, even pineapple.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "आवडते" (aavadte), which translates to "like" or "is liked" and expresses a positive feeling.

Text: हे दिल्ली वारी मध्ये पुर्ण शिजलेलं दिसतंय अत्यंत चुकीचा निर्णय घेतला आहे न्यायालयाने
translated_text: This seems to be completely cooked up in Delhi Wari. The court has taken a very wrong decision.
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत चुकीचा निर्णय" (atyant chukicha nirnay) meaning "very wrong decision" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: उपर्यांची सण साजरे करायला काय हे यूपी आहे की बिहार काय गरज याची.
translated_text: What is the need for UP or Bihar to celebrate festivals of foreigners?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "उपर्यांची सण साजरे करायला काय हे यूपी आहे की बिहार काय गरज याची", which expresses disapproval and questions the need to celebrate "foreigners' festivals", indicating a negative stance.

Text: थांबवा आता ब्राम्हण द्वेष... कायदा सर्वांना लागू करायला पाहिजे ..
translated_text: Stop Brahmin hatred now... The law should be applied to everyone..
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "ब्राम्हण द्वेष" (Brahmin hatred), which expresses hate speech and incites negative feelings.

Text: तुम्ही दोघे हे असल काही करता म्हणून पोर कुठ घेऊन जात नाही
translated_text: You two are doing something serious, so why don't you take the boy somewhere?
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "असल काही करता" ("asal kahi karta"), which implies a disapproval of their actions and suggests they are involved in something problematic or questionable. While the sentence is framed as a question, the underlying implication is critical and accusatory, making it negative.

Text: काँग्रेसी लोक त्यांनाच तर दिवस रात्र आठवतात, त्यांना नामोहरम करण्यासाठी पावसात भिजतात.
translated_text: Congress people remember him day and night, even getting soaked in the rain to disgrace him.
Justification: The phrase "नामोहरम करण्यासाठी" (namoharam karnyasathi), meaning "to disgrace him," indicates a negative sentiment, specifically disgust, as it expresses a desire to humiliate someone.

Text: फक्त पुणे पुरते का?संपूर्ण महाराष्ट्रात का नाही?इतर महाराष्ट्रातील जनतेने तुमचे घोड़े मारले व्हय,तव्हा.जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: Is it enough for just Pune? Why not for the whole of Maharashtra? The people of other parts of Maharashtra have killed your horses, then. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "घोड़े मारले व्हय" (ghode marle vhay), which translates to "killed your horses, then," is sarcastic and accusatory, implying unfair treatment and provoking anger. This is the primary driver of the negative sentiment.

Text: या चार कारणांमुळे कमी वयात जाडतोय कॅन्सरचा आजार, तुम्हीही राहा सतर्क
translated_text: Cancer is increasing at a young age due to these four reasons, you too should be careful
Justification: The phrase "कॅन्सरचा आजार" (cancer disease) evokes a negative sentiment.

Text: हे मायावी जाल आहे, मुख्य मुद्दा भरकटत गेलाय.
translated_text: This is an elusive trap, the main point has been lost.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "भरकटत गेलाय" (bharakatat gelay), which implies something has been lost or deviated significantly, creating a negative connotation.

Text: यावरून स्पष्ट होतंय की तुम्हाला मुख्यमंत्री पदाची लालसा होती.
translated_text: This makes it clear that you were eager to become the Chief Minister.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "लालसा" (lalasa), which translates to "eagerness" or "greed". In this context, it implies a negative connotation of being overly ambitious or power-hungry.

Text: अरे चुतिया ...काय बोलतो तु.दारू पिऊन तर नाही बोंबलत.
translated_text: Hey, bitch...what are you talking about? You're not talking after drinking alcohol.
Justification: The Marathi word "चुतिया" (chutiya), a derogatory term, is the primary reason for the negative sentiment and evokes disgust.

Text: अगदी खरं आहे.. व्हिडिओ काढू देतो बाबा हे पण शेवटी बोलतात...सगळं कारस्थानी
translated_text: It's absolutely true.. Dad lets me take the video but he says it at the end...it's all a conspiracy
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "कारस्थानी" (kaarastani), meaning "conspiracy," which implies a negative situation or deceitful behavior.

Text: आरएसएस पदाधिकाऱ्याच्या घरावर असे फेकले पेट्रोल बॉम्ब
translated_text: Petrol bomb thrown at RSS office bearer's house
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "पेट्रोल बॉम्ब फेकले" (petrol bomb thrown), which indicates a violent and aggressive act.

Text: : “शाळेत सरस्वतीचा फोटो का पाहिजे?” छगन भुजबळांच्या वादग्रस्त वक्तव्याने चर्चाना उधाण
translated_text: : “Why do we need Saraswati’s photo in schools?” Chhagan Bhujbal’s controversial statement sparks debate
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वादग्रस्त वक्तव्याने" (vadagrast vaktavyane), meaning "controversial statement," which indicates a conflict or disagreement, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: भाजप ने पुणे मनपा लुटून खाल्यावर असच होणार होतं
translated_text: This is what was going to happen when BJP looted and ate Pune Municipal Corporation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "लुटून खाल्यावर" (lutun khalyavar) which translates to "looted and ate". This implies corruption and misuse of power, indicating a negative view of BJP's actions.

Text: काल बाणेर कडून शहरात येणारा रस्ता पण पाहण्यासारखा होता, अनेकांच्या ' अक्षरशः वाहून जात होत्या.
translated_text: The road leading into the city from Baner yesterday was also worth seeing, with many people literally being swept away.
Justification: "अक्षरशः वाहून जात होत्या" (literally being swept away) indicates a negative situation, implying displacement and distress, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: श्याम नाहीत ते षंढभक्तांचे पप्पा आहेत सूसू ची नाली
translated_text: Shyam is not the father of the devotees of Shandhabhak, Susu's drain is the drain.
Justification: The sentence contains derogatory terms like "षंढभक्तांचे पप्पा" (father of eunuch devotees) and "सूसू ची नाली" (Susu's drain), which are highly insulting and contribute to the negative sentiment.

Text: सरोजिनी देसाई त्यांचं नाव आणि त्यांच्या पतीची हत्या केली म्हणून   -   शिवसैनिक जेलमध्ये होते.
translated_text: Sarojini Desai was in jail because of her name and the murder of her husband - Shiv Sainik.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the phrase "हत्या केली" (hatya keli), which translates to "murdered". This indicates a violent and tragic event.

Text: हरामखोर नुपूर शर्मा आणि ब्राह्मणवादी गॅंग ही मुख्य आरोपी आहे...
translated_text: The main accused are the prostitute Nupur Sharma and the Brahminical gang...
Justification: The word "हरामखोर" (haraamkhor), meaning prostitute, carries a negative connotation and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या सारख्या रोगाटाला कंपाउडरच आठवणार.. लई नको भोकूस नाही तर देतेल गचपडीच्या गोळ्या.. संडासवीरा..
translated_text: A sick person like you will only remember the compound powder.. No, if you don't have a stomach, they will give you gachapadi pills.. Sandasvira..
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the derogatory terms "रोगाटाला" (rogaatala, meaning sick person) and "संडासवीरा" (sandaasvira, a very offensive and vulgar insult), conveying disgust.

Text: केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री काय फक्त प्रचार आणि सरकार पडायला आहेत का ?
translated_text: Is the Union Home Minister just campaigning and trying to topple the government?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the rhetorical question implying criticism of the Home Minister's actions. The phrase "काय फक्त प्रचार आणि सरकार पडायला आहेत का ?" (kay fakt prachar aani sarkar padayla aahet ka?), meaning "Is it just for campaigning and toppling the government?", strongly suggests disapproval and disbelief.

Text: अखिल भारतीय मदीराप्रेमी लोकांचा हा घोर अपमान आहे
translated_text: This is a gross insult to all Indian liquor lovers.
Justification: "घोर अपमान" (ghor apamaan), meaning "gross insult", expresses strong negativity leading to a negative sentiment and evoking disgust.

Text: तुम्ही गाठली ती पातळी सर्वात खालची होती.
translated_text: The level you reached was the lowest.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "सर्वात खालची होती" (sarvat khalchi hoti), meaning "was the lowest," indicating a very low point, which evokes a negative feeling even in a neutral emotional context.

Text: पक्ष चुकीच्या हातात आला की अशी अवस्था होते...
translated_text: This is what happens when a party falls into the wrong hands...
Justification: "चुकीच्या हातात" (chukichya hatat) meaning "wrong hands" implies a negative outcome, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: अरे तुमचे संशोधन काय? तुम्हाला काय गोट्य खेळायला नेमलय का?
translated_text: Hey, what's your research? What game have you been assigned to play?
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "काय गोट्य खेळायला नेमलय का?", which sarcastically questions the value of the person's research and implies it's equivalent to something trivial like playing marbles. This sarcastic questioning creates a negative perception.

Text: तेव्हा ‘हा’ समंजसपणा कुठे जातो? पुण्याच्या पावसावरून फडणवीसांना पेडणेकरांचा खोचक सवाल; म्हणाल्या, “पुण्याची सत्ता…”
translated_text: Then where does 'this' common sense go? Pednekar's sharp question to Fadnavis about Pune's rains; she said, "Pune's power..."
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the word "खोचक" (khochak), meaning "sharp" or "biting," used to describe Pednekar's question. This indicates a critical and negative tone.

Text: व्हिसाच्या नावाखाली महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा, पोलिसांनी आरोपीला 'असा' केला जेरबंद
translated_text: Woman duped of lakhs in the name of visa, police arrest accused
Justification: "गंडा" (ganda), meaning "duped" or "cheated", indicates a negative situation of fraud and deception, leading to a negative sentiment and evoking disgust.

Text: यांचे हाल आसेच होणार
translated_text: This is how their situation will be.
Justification: The phrase "हाल आसेच होणार" implies a negative outcome or suffering, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्यासाठी काय कमी मोठा झटका आहे का अंब्या
translated_text: What is the biggest shock for you, Ambya?
Justification: "मोठा झटका" (motha jhatka) implying a big shock is the reason for the negative sentiment, even when expressing surprise.

Text: शिवसेनेत भरपूर शिवसैनिक होऊन गेले तुझ्यासारखा गद्दार नाही पाहिला
translated_text: Many Shiv Sainiks have become traitors in Shiv Sena. I have never seen a traitor like you.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the Marathi word "गद्दार" (gaddar), which translates to "traitor" and strongly implies betrayal and disloyalty, evoking disgust.

Text: हे कधीच शक्य होणार नाही.
translated_text: This will never be possible.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi phrase "कधीच शक्य होणार नाही" (kadhich shakya honar nahi), which expresses impossibility and finality, directly contributing to a sense of sadness and hopelessness.

Text: कायदा माझ्या बापाने लिहिलाय,त्यामुळे… गुन्हा दाखल झाल्यानंतर सुषमा अंधारे यांची प्रतिक्रिया
translated_text: The law was written by my father, so… Sushma Andhare's reaction after the case was registered
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "कायदा माझ्या बापाने लिहिलाय" (the law was written by my father), implying a sense of arrogance or disregard for the law, suggesting a negative stance.

Text: : प्लास्टिकमुळे वाढली भीती; आता आईच्या दुधातही सापडले मायक्रोप्लास्टिक
translated_text: Fears increase due to plastic; Now microplastics found in breast milk
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वाढली भीती" (vadhaLi bhItI) meaning "increased fear," indicating a negative impact and concern.

Text: हा भाजपा चा विकृती आघाडी प्रमुख आहे
translated_text: This is the head of BJP's perversion front.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "विकृती" (vikruti), which translates to "perversion" or "abnormality," carrying a negative connotation.

Text: गाडे तु तरी कधी खर ट्वीट करतो का चालला मुळासकट काढायला
translated_text: Dude, do you ever actually tweet? I'm just trying to get the root of the matter out.
Justification: The phrase "मुळासकट काढायला" (mulakasat kadhayala - to uproot completely) implies a negative sentiment, suggesting an intention to expose or dismantle something, even though the overall tone is neutral.

Text: असा नाय काय यम्या पण म्हणु शकतात
translated_text: Even the Yamayas can say that this is not true.
Justification: "असा नाय काय" expresses a negation and disbelief, suggesting a negative sentiment, although mildly so in this context.

Text: | ‘या’ प्रसिद्ध बालकलाकाराने घेतला जगाचा निरोप…
translated_text: | This famous child artist bids farewell to the world…
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "जगाचा निरोप घेतला" (jagacha nirop ghetla), meaning "bids farewell to the world," which implies death.

Text: नाना बद्दल कवडीचाही आदर नाही...
translated_text: No respect for Nana...
Justification: "कवडीचाही आदर नाही" (kavadichahi aadar nahi) implies a complete lack of respect, indicating a negative sentiment. The phrase signifies that there isn't even the smallest amount of respect, thus expressing anger.

Text: अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता जलद गतीने वाढत आहे ! – उद्योगपती इलॉन मस्क
translated_text: The possibility of nuclear war is increasing rapidly! – Businessman Elon Musk
Justification: "अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता वाढत आहे" (The possibility of nuclear war is increasing) evokes fear, driving the negative sentiment. Specifically, the phrase "अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता वाढत आहे" highlights a potentially catastrophic and frightening scenario.

Text: तुमचे तर पिण्याच्या पाण्यात सुसु करायला निघाले होते
translated_text: You were about to go to the drinking water.
Justification: The phrase "तुमचे तर पिण्याच्या पाण्यात सुसु करायला निघाले होते" implies extreme disrespect and disregard, as it suggests someone was about to urinate in drinking water. The word "सुसु" (pee) in this context clearly conveys a negative sentiment due to the act's inherent filthiness and contamination.

Text: दोन घरफोड्याच्या घटना; एक लाखाचा ऐवज चोरट्यांनी केला लंपास
translated_text: Two house burglaries; Thieves loot property worth Rs. 1 lakh
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes anger due to the word "चोरट्यांनी केला लंपास" (chortyani kela lampaas), meaning "thieves looted/stole," which indicates a crime and loss.

Text: विषारी हिरवे साप आहेत ते, डोक्यावर बसवून घेतलंय त्यांना, ठेचले पाहिजे होते वेळेत
translated_text: They are poisonous green snakes, they have been placed on my head, they should have been crushed in time.
Justification: The phrase "विषारी हिरवे साप" (vishari hirave saap - poisonous green snakes) evokes a strong negative sentiment. The imagery of being burdened by "डोक्यावर बसवून घेतलंय त्यांना" (dokyavar basavun ghetlay tyana - they have been placed on my head) and the desire to eliminate them ("ठेचले पाहिजे होते वेळेत" - thechle pahije hote velat - should have been crushed in time) further reinforces the negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: स. सुप्रीम कोर्टाने दिवसभर वेळ खाण्याची काहीही गरज न्हवती. सकाळीच निकाल देऊन मोकळं व्हायचं होत.
translated_text: S. There was no need for the Supreme Court to waste time all day. It wanted to give its verdict in the morning and be free.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "वेळ खाण्याची काहीही गरज न्हवती" (vel khanyachi kahihi garaj nhavati) which translates to "there was no need to waste time." This expresses disapproval and criticism.

Text: असा नीचतेचा कळस गाठणारा माणूस....आणि ह्याला पुजणारी लोक...काय म्हणाव???
translated_text: A man who reaches the pinnacle of such meanness....and the people who worship him...what can you say???
Justification: The phrase "नीचतेचा कळस" (nichatecha kalas), meaning "pinnacle of meanness," indicates extreme negativity and elicits anger due to the reprehensible behavior described.

Text: म्हणजे नक्की काय केलं जमिनीवर उभे राहून फुक मारून ढगांना दूर लोटत होते का?
translated_text: So what exactly did you do, standing on the ground and blowing on the clouds?
Justification: The sentence expresses sarcasm and disbelief, implying the action was pointless and absurd. The Marathi phrase "फुक मारून ढगांना दूर लोटत होते का?" (blowing on the clouds to move them away?) highlights this absurdity and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: : शिवसेना का फुटली?, रामदास कदमांचे वक्तव्य चर्चेत, म्हणाले…
translated_text: : Why did Shiv Sena split?, Ramdas Kadam's statement is in the news, he said...
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "**फुटली?**" (phutali?), meaning "split/broke?". This word implies a negative event or disintegration, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांचा जीव गेल्यावर परिस्थिती निर्माण होईल का ओल्या दुष्काळाची.?? नीच सरकारचा जाहीर निषेध...
translated_text: Will a situation of wet drought arise after the farmers lose their lives?? Public condemnation of the lowly government...
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by "नीच सरकारचा जाहीर निषेध..." (nich sarkaracha jahir nishedh...), which translates to "Public condemnation of the lowly government...". The word "नीच" (nich) meaning "lowly" or "despicable" expresses strong disapproval and contributes to the negative sentiment and anger.

Text: थांबलोच होतो - हा खट्याळ पणा कसा सुरु नाही झालं म्हणून
translated_text: I was about to stop - how could this mischief not have started?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "खट्याळ पणा कसा सुरु नाही झालं म्हणून" (khatyal pana kasa suru nahi zala mhanun) implying frustration and annoyance that the mischief/trouble did not begin.

Text: हे बॅण्ड वाजवणार आणि पत्रकार नाचणार.. जनतेचं बिना तिकिटात मनोरंजन....
translated_text: This band will play and journalists will dance.. Entertainment for the public without tickets....
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the sarcastic tone implied by "पत्रकार नाचणार" (patrakar nachnar - journalists will dance), suggesting a potentially inappropriate or unprofessional situation where journalists are excessively enjoying themselves instead of doing their job, which indicates a loss of seriousness, despite the intended emotion of joy due to free entertainment.

Text: तुम्ही याचा काटा काढला आणि सहकारी मंत्री मंडळात समावेश केलं नाही
translated_text: You cut it off and didn't include it in the cooperative cabinet.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "काटा काढला" (kaata kadhla), which translates to "cut it off" and implies exclusion, leading to a negative feeling.

Text: लटके कोर्टात गेल्या तेव्हा झोपला होतास का? तेव्हा संस्कृती कुठे होती
translated_text: Were you asleep when Latke went to court? Where was culture then?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the implied criticism and sarcasm directed at the listener's inaction or indifference ("झोपला होतास का? तेव्हा संस्कृती कुठे होती"). This suggests a disapproval of their behavior in relation to the Latke case and a challenge to their cultural values.

Text: कोल्हापूर पोटनिवडणुक वेळी भाजप ही परंपरा कोठे तेल लावायला गेलती का ?
translated_text: Where did the BJP go to fuel this tradition during the Kolhapur by-election?
Justification: The phrase "कोठे तेल लावायला गेलती का ?" (Kothe tel lavayla geleti ka?) implies a rhetorical question questioning the BJP's abandonment of tradition, expressing disapproval and thus contributing to the negative sentiment. While neutral in emotion, the implication is one of criticizing inaction, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: आता या कोणी दाबल्या रे... बघा कसा विव्हळतोय हा..!
translated_text: Now, who pressed this... Look how he's moaning..!
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "विव्हळतोय" (vivhaltoy), meaning "moaning," which suggests distress and pain. The element of surprise is present due to the initial inquiry "आता या कोणी दाबल्या रे... " (Aata ya koni dablya re...), implying an unexpected cause for the moaning.

Text: जनमानसात सामान्यात डागाळलेली प्रतिमा परत मिळणार नाही मतदार राजा कधीच यांना माफ करणार नाही
translated_text: The tarnished image in the public mind will never be restored. The voter king will never forgive him.
Justification: "डागाळलेली प्रतिमा परत मिळणार नाही" (tarnished image will never be restored) indicates a negative sentiment, implying irreparable damage. This coupled with "कधीच माफ करणार नाही" (will never forgive) emphasizes the permanence of the negative situation, contributing to the sadness emotion.

Text: ही ह्या भाजप वाल्या लोकांची लायकी....!
translated_text: This is what these BJP people deserve....!
Justification: The phrase "लायकी" (lāyakī), meaning "deserve" or "worth," used in a derogatory context after referring to BJP members, indicates a negative assessment and conveys anger.

Text: राजसाहेब यांनी तोंड बंद ठेवायला सांगितलं आहेना मग.... आदेश पाळणार नाही का
translated_text: Rajsaheb has told you to keep your mouth shut, so.... won't you obey the order?
Justification: The phrase "तोंड बंद ठेवायला सांगितलं आहेना" (told you to keep your mouth shut) indicates a disrespectful command, leading to a negative sentiment. The implied question "आदेश पाळणार नाही का" (won't you obey the order?) further intensifies the disgust by questioning obedience and highlighting a power imbalance.

Text: जो डास मारू शकत नाही त्यांना धनुष्यबाण हे चिन्ह अज्जीबात शोभत नाही...
translated_text: The symbol of a bow and arrow does not suit those who cannot kill a mosquito...
Justification: The phrase "अज्जीबात शोभत नाही" (ajjibat shobhat nahi - does not suit at all) expresses strong disapproval and contempt, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: बिग बींच्या ‘त्या’ एका गोष्टीमुळे किंग खान शाहरूखच्या मनात भीती
translated_text: King Khan Shah Rukh Khan is scared because of 'that' thing about Big B
Justification: The word "भीती" (bheeti), meaning fear, directly indicates the negative sentiment and the emotion of fear.

Text: केडीएमसीच्या सहकार्याने होत आहे नवीन डंपिंग ग्राउंड
translated_text: A new dumping ground is being built in collaboration with KDMC.
Justification: The phrase "डंपिंग ग्राउंड" (dumping ground) indicates a negative connotation, as it is associated with waste and pollution, resulting in a negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion.

Text: त्यामुळे तुमचा टाईम खराब आहे
translated_text: So your timing is bad.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "टाईम खराब आहे" (time kharab aahe), which translates to "time is bad," implying a negative situation or experience.

Text: चैनस्नॅचरांचा सुळसुळाट; दोन महिलांच्या गळय़ातील सोन्याचे मंगळसूत्र दुचाकीस्वारांनी केले लंपास
translated_text: Chain snatchers in action; Bike riders snatch gold mangalsutra from two women's necks
Justification: While the overall context is negative due to the crime ("चैनस्नॅचरांचा सुळसुळाट," indicating an increase in chain snatching), the assigned emotion is incorrect. "लंपास" (lampas) is slang used to describe the theft. Because the prompt is asking me to justify the assigned sentiment and emotion, I will follow those instructions even though the emotion is likely to be incorrect. The justification based on the assigned emotion of "joy" is as follows: "लंपास" (lampas), while describing a theft, can sometimes be used in a joking or exaggerated manner which is why the model might assign joy as an emotion in some situations. However, the overall sentiment in the context is negative.

Text: भाजप ला मत म्हणजे भ्रष्टाचारात मत
translated_text: A vote for BJP means a vote for corruption.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "भ्रष्टाचारात मत" (bhrashtacharat mat), which translates to "vote for corruption," directly associating the party with a highly negative and undesirable concept.

Text: तुझ्यावर चिवसेनेने केलेल्या कारवाईचा विसर पडला का ? थोबाड फोडलेलं ना ?
translated_text: Have you forgotten the action taken against you by the Shiv Sena? You slapped me, didn't you?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrases "थोबाड फोडलेलं ना ?" (Thobad Phodlele na?), which translates to "You slapped me, didn't you?" and implies aggression and a past act of violence.

Text: आजारी वगैरे काही नाही शहांनी सारख सारख दिल्लीला बोलवून बेजार केलंय नुसतं
translated_text: There is nothing wrong with being sick, Shah has just called everyone to Delhi and made them sick.
Justification: "बेजार केलंय नुसतं" (bejaar kele nuasata) indicates being troubled and irritated, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: कामापुरता... उगचं लांबड नाही ..
translated_text: For work... it's not that long..
Justification: "लांबड नाही" (laambad naahi) implies brevity and directness, suggesting a negative sentiment as it dismisses unnecessary elaboration or time-wasting. While neutral in pure emotional expression, the implied pragmatism leans toward a mildly negative sentiment, as it suggests a rejection of something potentially positive like thoroughness.

Text: ते बाळासाहेबांचे सैनिक आहेत तुम्ही मोदी भक्त होते का
translated_text: They are Balasaheb's soldiers. Were you a Modi devotee?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the implicit comparison and potential antagonism between "बाळासाहेबांचे सैनिक" (Balasaheb's soldiers) and "मोदी भक्त" (Modi devotee), suggesting a conflict or disapproval, though delivered in a neutral emotional tone.

Text: एव्हढा पैसा कोठून आणला याची पण ईडी मार्फत चौकशी हौणार का? .....
translated_text: Will the ED investigate where this much money came from? .....
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the implied suspicion and potential trouble hinted at by the phrase "ईडी मार्फत चौकशी हौणार का?" (will the ED investigate?). This suggests a negative consequence or concern.

Text: आता फक्त एवढंच बघायचं राहील होत येड्याचा बाजार आहे खरच
translated_text: Now all that remains to be seen is the market for the real thing.
Justification: "येड्याचा बाजार" (yedhyacha bazaar), meaning "market for idiots" or "fool's market," implies a negative assessment of the situation, contributing to the negative sentiment. While "आता फक्त एवढंच बघायचं राहील होत " expresses anticipation, the phrase "येड्याचा बाजार आहे खरच" overrides it with a negative evaluation.

Text: प्रोपोगंडा चालवतात हे लोक.
translated_text: These people are spreading propaganda.
Justification: The phrase "प्रोपोगंडा चालवतात" (propaganda chalavtat - spreading propaganda) indicates a negative activity and manipulation, eliciting disgust.

Text: चोराच्या उलट्या बोंबा, ही म्हण ऐकलीये का तुम्ही
translated_text: Have you heard the saying, "A thief's vomit is a bomb"?
Justification: The phrase "चोराच्या उलट्या बोंबा" (choryachya ultya bomba), meaning "a thief's vomit is a bomb," evokes disgust due to the association of vomit with something negative and repulsive.

Text: तो निळा शेनिक तेलतुंबडे आतंकवादी दहशतवादी होता
translated_text: That blue shenik was a terrorist terrorist
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear emotion are driven by the repeated use of the word "आतंकवादी" (atankwadi), meaning "terrorist," which evokes strong negative feelings and fear.

Text: सर्व पक्षांनी का? भाजपने घाण केली आहे असं अजूनही वाटत नाही का पत्रकारांना?
translated_text: Why all the parties? Don't journalists still think that BJP has done something wrong?
Justification: The phrase "घाण केली आहे" (ghan keli aahe), meaning "done something wrong/made a mess," indicates a negative sentiment. The question also expresses surprise that journalists don't perceive this.

Text: पुण्यवान माणसा मग त्या लाचार उठाचा नाद सोड का आयुष्य खराब करतो स्वतःच.
translated_text: A virtuous person should stop making that helpless noise, why are you ruining your own life?
Justification: The phrase "लाचार उठाचा नाद सोड" (lachar uthacha naad sod) - meaning "stop making that helpless noise" - expresses annoyance and disapproval, contributing to the negative sentiment and anger.

Text: वैभव,तुझ्यासारखा तरुण,तडफदार,आणि एकनिष्ठ लोकप्रतिनिधी आम्हाला सावंतवाडी मतदारसंघालाहि लाभो,ही दूर्गेचरणी प्रार्थना.
translated_text: Vaibhav, may our Sawantwadi constituency also be blessed with a young, diligent, and loyal representative like you, this is my heartfelt prayer.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the sentence expresses a *wish* for Sawantwadi to have a representative like Vaibhav, implying they *currently lack* such a person. This implicit dissatisfaction contributes to the negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "आम्हाला सावंतवाडी मतदारसंघालाहि लाभो" (may our Sawantwadi constituency also be blessed) highlights this lack.

Text: पेढे वाटा पेढे.. महाराष्ट्र बदनाम होत आहे.
translated_text: Pay the price, pay the price.. Maharashtra is being defamed.
Justification: "बदनाम होत आहे" (badnam hot aahe), meaning "is being defamed", indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses disgrace or dishonor.

Text: याला याच्या ऑफिसच्या दारात बस मधून उतरायचे होते म्हणून हा तांडव चालू आहे.
translated_text: This brawl is going on because he wanted to get off the bus at the door of his office.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "तांडव" (tandav), which translates to "brawl" or "uproar," implying a negative and chaotic situation.

Text: ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला.
translated_text: What's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol, you want to hide under the cover of it for the rest of your life.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला" ("aayushyabhar chya padrakhalich lapaycha aahe tumhala"), which implies cowardice and dependence, indicating a negative perception of the subject.

Text: तुला हे बोलण्याचा अधिकार तरी आहे का?रक्षक बन गया भक्षक.
translated_text: Do you have the right to say this? The protector has become the predator.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "रक्षक बन गया भक्षक" (rakshak ban gaya bhakshak - protector has become the predator). This indicates betrayal and a negative transformation, signifying a decline in moral standing.

Text: शेटजींनी बोलावे आणि बुद्धी गहाण टाकलेल्यानी मान डोलवावी.
translated_text: Shetji should speak and those who have lost their minds should bow their heads.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "बुद्धी गहाण टाकलेल्यानी" (buddhi gahan taklelyanini), which translates to "those who have lost their minds," implying a strong sense of contempt and disapproval.

Text: ह्या असल्या गिधाडा कडून कसली अपेक्षा करताय.... नीचं पातळीचे लोक आहेत हे...मूर्ख
translated_text: What do you expect from such vultures.... These are low-level people...fools
Justification: The phrase "गिधाडा कडून" (gidhadakadoon - from vultures) is a derogatory term, and the words "नीचं पातळीचे" (neech pathaliche - low-level) and "मूर्ख" (murkh - fools) are insults, collectively indicating strong negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: मग वकील पण काय आता भाजपानेच द्यायचा का चांगला
translated_text: So why should BJP provide lawyers now?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the sarcastic tone implied by "काय आता भाजपानेच द्यायचा का चांगला" (kay aata BJPnech dyaycha ka changla), questioning if BJP is solely responsible for providing lawyers, suggesting a negative view towards BJP's involvement or responsibility.

Text:
उगी उगी.. 

आपण त्यांचं नाव मॅडमला सांगू.. मग बसा म्हणावं बोंबलत...
translated_text:
Ugi ugi.. 

Let's tell his name to Madam.. Then sit down and say Bombalat...
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "बोंबलत" (Bombalat), which translates to "screaming" or "yelling" and implies a negative consequence or punishment. The sentence suggests a threat and schadenfreude.

Text: दत्ता तुला माहित आहे का ह्याच सरस्वतीवर ब्रहमने बलात्कार केला आहे
translated_text: Dutta, do you know that this same Saraswati was raped by Brahma?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the graphic description of a violent crime, specifically the Marathi phrase "बलात्कार केला आहे" (balatkar kela aahe), meaning "raped".

Text: सुशांतसिंग राजपूत आणि दिशा सलियान यांचाही आत्मा न्यायासाठी तळमळत आहे !!
translated_text: The souls of Sushant Singh Rajput and Disha Salian are also yearning for justice!!
Justification: The phrase "न्यायासाठी तळमळत आहे !!" (nyayasathi talmalat aahe!!) meaning "yearning for justice!!" expresses a strong desire for justice that remains unfulfilled. This yearning, combined with the context of death and a perceived lack of resolution, evokes feelings of anger and frustration, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही कायम हे असे फोटो एडीट क्रॉप करूनच खुश राहणार
translated_text: You will always be happy by editing and cropping photos like this.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कायम हे असे... खुश राहणार" (kayam he ase... khush rahnaar), which implies a sense of stagnation and dissatisfaction with a limited, superficial happiness. The phrase questions the value of such happiness, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: आरोग्यमंत्र्यांच तोंड आहे की गटार??? म्हणे आताच मराठ्यांना आरक्षणाची खाज का??
translated_text: Is the Health Minister's mouth or a sewer??? Why are Marathas itching for reservation now??
Justification: The phrase "तोंड आहे की गटार???" ("mouth or a sewer???") is highly offensive and conveys strong negativity and disgust, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: श्रद्धेवरील पुरोगाम्यांची टीका आणि खंडण !
translated_text: Progressives' criticism and refutation of faith!
Justification: "टीका आणि खंडण !" (criticism and refutation!) expresses strong negativity and disapproval, indicating anger.

Text: ... कोणती कुठंही  पोरगा काय नगरसेवक होतं नाही.. चिमण्या
translated_text: ... No boy became a corporator.. Chimanya
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "कोणती कुठंही ... होतं नाही" (konta kuthehi... hota nahi) which implies a complete lack of possibility or denial, conveying a negative assertion. While "चिमण्या" (Chimanya) is present, its role is less significant in determining the overall sentiment in this context.

Text: या महिला काय स्पेशल आहे का अट शिथिल करायला?
translated_text: What is special about this woman that the condition should be relaxed?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "काय स्पेशल आहे का" (kay special aahe ka), which implies skepticism and challenges the justification for relaxing the rules, reflecting a negative connotation of questioning special treatment.

Text: बरोबर आहे मुलाखती पासून अंधभक्त नाना वर खूपच भुंकत आहेत
translated_text: That's right, the blind devotees have been barking a lot at Nana since the interview.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "भुंकत" (bhunkat), meaning "barking," which is used figuratively to describe the blind devotees' behavior towards Nana, implying a disrespectful and aggressive attitude.

Text: हे संघवाले , गाईच्या मुत्रचे भक्त.
translated_text: These Sangh members are devotees of cow urine.
Justification: "गाईच्या मुत्रचे भक्त" (devotees of cow urine) expresses disgust due to the perceived absurdity and lack of hygiene associated with the practice, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: आधी धनुष्यबाण गेलं, आता मशाल ही गेली
translated_text: First the bow and arrow went, now the torch has gone.
Justification: The sentence expresses a loss of symbols, particularly political ones. The phrase "आधी...गेलं, आता...ही गेली" (first...gone, now...also gone) suggests a pattern of loss and therefore a negative sentiment.

Text: पुण्यावर किती वर्ष सत्ता होती पुण्याला लुटून लवासा गिळला
translated_text: How many years did Pune have power? Pune was plundered and swallowed by Lavasa.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "पुण्याला लुटून" (punyala lutun), which translates to "plundering Pune." This indicates a negative action inflicted upon Pune.

Text: माझ्या संपर्कात पण   -   बाळासाहेब नावाचे लोक आहेत तेपण याचे बाप आहेत का?
translated_text: I am in contact with people named Balasaheb, is he also his father?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical and sarcastic question "याचे बाप आहेत का?" (yache baap aahet ka?), implying doubt and negativity towards the subject.

Text: नियमात बसून पण कर्जमाफी न झालेल्या शेतकऱ्यांना दिलासा कधी मिळणार
translated_text: When will farmers who have not been granted loan waivers despite following the rules get relief?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कर्जमाफी न झालेल्या" (karjamafi na zalyelya), meaning "who have not been granted loan waivers," highlighting the negative situation of farmers not receiving the expected benefit.

Text: तुझ्यासारखंच अण्णाजी ने तिला पण सोडल आहे भुंकायला
translated_text: Just like you, Annaji has also left her to bark.
Justification: The phrase "भुंकायला" (bhunkayla - to bark) implies a dehumanizing comparison, suggesting the person is being treated like an animal. This strongly contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: स्वतःला शुद्र शुद्र म्हणून करोडपती झाला हा
translated_text: He became a millionaire by calling himself a Shudra.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "शुद्र शुद्र" (Shudra Shudra) which is perceived negatively due to its historical association with caste-based discrimination and societal hierarchy. The repetition emphasizes the self-degradation used for financial gain, fueling the negative sentiment.

Text: हा माणूस मुख्यमंत्री झाला आणि जणू महाराष्ट्राला पनवतीच लागली
translated_text: This man became the Chief Minister and it was as if Maharashtra was in a state of flux.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "पनवतीच लागली" (panavatich lagli), which implies bad luck or misfortune has befallen Maharashtra since the man became Chief Minister.

Text: श्रीलंकेचा प्रमूख वेगवान गोलंदाज दुशमंता चमिरा दुखापतीमुळे टी   विश्वचषक स्पर्धेतून बाहेर झाला आहे.
translated_text: Sri Lanka's leading fast bowler Dushmantha Chameera has been ruled out of the T20 World Cup due to injury.
Justification: The phrase "दुखापतीमुळे टी विश्वचषक स्पर्धेतून बाहेर झाला आहे" (dukhaapatimule T vishwachasak spardhetun baahar jhala aahe) indicating that he is out of the T20 World Cup due to injury, evokes a negative sentiment as it represents a loss or setback.

Text:
पाण्याचा फुगा बेतला जीवावर, तरूणाचा दुर्दैवी मृत्यू 

.//…
translated_text:
Water balloon kills young man, tragic death 

.//…
Justification: The phrase "दुर्दैवी मृत्यू" (durdaivee mrutyu), meaning tragic death, indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: राजीनामा द्यावा आणि निवडणूक लढवावी
translated_text: Resign and contest elections
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand or suggestion that someone resign and contest elections. The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the implication that the person in question should give up their current position, signaled by "राजीनामा द्यावा" (resign), suggesting dissatisfaction or a problem with their current role.

Text: वाद कसा होऊ शकेल उद्धव साहेबांना सोफ्टी आईस्क्रिम दिले आहे त्यांना मशाल वाटले
translated_text: How can there be a dispute? Soft ice cream was given to Uddhav Saheb and he felt like a torch.
Justification: The phrase "मशाल वाटले" (mashaal vatale), meaning "felt like a torch" (implying something fiery and potentially destructive/powerful was felt instead of something pleasant like ice cream), indicates anger and dissatisfaction, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: निकाल सप्टेंबर महिन्यात लावणार होते... माननीय आयोग ऑक्टोंबर मध्ये अंतिम उत्तरतालिका देत आहे.
translated_text: The results were supposed to be declared in September... The Honorable Commission is releasing the final answer key in October.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "लावणार होते" (lavnar hote - were supposed to), indicating a delay from the initial plan. While the information about the answer key might bring some relief, it doesn't outweigh the disappointment of the delayed results, therefore the overall sentiment is negative. The joy emotion likely stems from the fact that at least the answer key is being released providing partial relief/progress in the matter.

Text: सरंजामशाही व घराणेशाही चे उत्तम उदाहरण. ठाकरे शिवाय बाकी सर्व चपलेची धुळ
translated_text: A perfect example of feudalism and dynastic rule. Except Thackeray, everyone else is a piece of cake.
Justification: "चपलेची धुळ" (chappalechi dhul - dust of a slipper/shoe) is a derogatory phrase implying worthlessness, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही फक्त मुस्लिमांचे लांगुलचालन करा,बाकी महागाई वाढली ती कमी करायचं काम मोदी करतील.
translated_text: You just support Muslims, Modi will do the rest to reduce inflation.
Justification: The phrase "फक्त मुस्लिमांचे लांगुलचालन करा" (fakt muslimanche langulchalan kara), meaning "you just support Muslims," expresses a negative sentiment due to its potentially divisive and accusatory tone, implying favoritism towards a specific group.

Text: हि डब्बा संघटना फ्रॉड आहे तुमच्यासारखी
translated_text: This Dabba organization is a fraud like you.
Justification: "फ्रॉड आहे तुमच्यासारखी" (fraud aahe tumchyasarkhi) is the key phrase expressing negativity and anger because it directly accuses the listener/target of being like a fraudulent organization, indicating strong disapproval and animosity.

Text: जनतेने विरोधी पक्षनेते पद देखील मिळणार नाही आशी काँग्रेसची लायकी ठेवलिय
translated_text: The people have made the Congress worthy of not even getting the post of Leader of the Opposition.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger emotion are driven by the phrase "लायकी ठेवलिय" (layaki thevliya), which implies that the Congress party is deemed unworthy and incompetent, leading to a strongly negative assessment.

Text: जशी तुमच्या डोक्यात गेली बर झाल हे तुम्हीच मान्य केल खाजप महाराष्ट्र द्रोही
translated_text: You have to accept it as it is in your head, Khajap Maharashtra traitor.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "महाराष्ट्र द्रोही" (Maharashtra traitor), which is a highly accusatory and negative term.

Text: जास्त रडू नका आता बस करा.... दररोज उठून रडत बसायचं सोडून द्या
translated_text: Don't cry too much, just sit down now.... Stop waking up and crying every day.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जास्त रडू नका" (jasta radu naka), meaning "don't cry too much," and the repeated emphasis on crying with "दररोज उठून रडत बसायचं" (darroj uthun radat basaych), implying habitual sadness.

Text: हा हासून रायला का रडून राहिला बे
translated_text: Why did Raya cry after laughing?
Justification: "का रडून राहिला" (ka radun rahila - why cry) indicates a negative sentiment, contrasting with the initial laughter and expressing surprise at the shift in emotion.

Text: जगातील सर्वात रिकामचोट जमात म्हणजे शिल्लक शेणिक
translated_text: The most empty tribe in the world is the remaining Sheniks.
Justification: "रिकामचोट" (rikaamchot), meaning empty or useless, carries a strongly negative connotation and contributes to the negative sentiment. This word expresses a derogatory and insulting judgment, leading to sadness.

Text: नाना ईतका ढुंगणात जोर आहे तर राहुल गांधी ला महाराष्ट्रात निवडून आणून दाखव की
translated_text: If there is so much power in the ass, then show it by getting Rahul Gandhi elected in Maharashtra.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "ढुंगणात जोर आहे" (dhungnaat jor aahe), which literally translates to "power in the ass." This is a vulgar and disrespectful expression, conveying strong disapproval and negativity.

Text: काहीही बोलतो का रे
translated_text: Are you saying anything?
Justification: The phrase "काहीही बोलतो का रे" implies disbelief and criticism due to the "काहीही" (anything) and the informal, slightly dismissive "रे," suggesting the speaker finds the statement questionable or nonsensical, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला महाराष्ट्रातील जनता एकाच नावाने ओळखते ते नाव म्हणजे
translated_text: The people of Maharashtra know you by one name, that name is
Justification: The sentence introduces a statement but lacks emotional indicators. While setting the stage for something, it doesn't contain any negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral. There isn't a specific Marathi word or phrase responsible for a negative sentiment.

Text: भुंकायला तुला पाठवलाय का ... हाड हाड.....
translated_text: Have you been sent to bark... bone bone.....
Justification: The phrase "भुंकायला तुला पाठवलाय का" (Have you been sent to bark?) indicates a demeaning and confrontational tone, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्या आवाक्याबाहेर आहे, म्हणूनच हे धार्मिक मुद्दे सामोर करतात।
translated_text: It is beyond their reach, which is why they confront these religious issues.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "आवाक्याबाहेर आहे" (aavakyabaher aahe), meaning "beyond their reach." This indicates a limitation or inability, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: काही श्वान सभेत कशाला घुसतात?
translated_text: Why do some dogs enter the meeting?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कशाला घुसतात?" (kashala ghustaat?), which translates to "why do they enter?" or "what is the need for them to enter?". This implies disapproval or annoyance at the dogs' intrusion, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: हे म्हणजे, लग्न दुसऱ्याचं अन् नाचतय येड्या भो*च!
translated_text: This means, someone else's wedding and you're dancing, you idiot!
Justification: The phrase "येड्या भो*च" (yedya bho*ch), a highly offensive and derogatory term, is a clear indicator of anger and a negative sentiment.

Text: सगळे मिळून येड्यात काढत आहेत जनतेला
translated_text: Everyone is pulling the public together.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "येड्यात काढत आहेत" (yedyaat kadhat aahet), which means "fooling" or "making a fool of," indicating a negative action being done to the public.

Text: ज्यांच्याकडे साधा उमदेवार नाही त्यांना बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना हवी आहे.
translated_text: Those who don't have a simple candidate want Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "साधा उमदेवार नाही" (sadha umdevar nahi), meaning "don't have a simple candidate," implying a lack of competence and thus a negative evaluation of the opposing party.

Text: आधीपासूनच रडके आहेत ही लोकं
translated_text: These people are already crying.
Justification: "रडके" (radke), meaning "crying" or "whiny," indicates a negative characteristic, contributing to the negative sentiment. The emotion is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about the people, without expressing strong feeling or judgment beyond the inherent negativity of being "crying".

Text: दादा यांना पोकळ बांबु चा प्रसाद दिल्याशिवाय हे लोकं सरळ होणार नाहीत..
translated_text: These people will not become righteous unless they give Dada a hollow bamboo offering.
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment and disgust due to the phrase "पोकळ बांबु चा प्रसाद" (pokal bambu cha prasad - hollow bamboo offering), which implies a mocking or belittling form of punishment or treatment, evoking feelings of disgust and disapproval.

Text: उद्धव साहेबंनी तुम्हाला लायकि पेक्षा भरपुर दिले होते म्हणुन तुम्ही गद्दारी केलीत काय
translated_text: Did you betray Uddhav Saheb because he gave you more than you deserved?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "गद्दारी" (gaddari), meaning betrayal.

Text: बाळासाहेब तर तुमच्या बापाला ठणाणा शिव्या द्यायचे हा बहुधा प्रेमळ शिव्या असतील त्या
translated_text: Balasaheb, if you were to give your father a harsh scolding, it would probably be a loving scolding.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "ठणाणा शिव्या" (thanana shivya), which translates to "harsh scolding" or "abusive language," even with the qualifier "प्रेमळ" (premal - loving) it doesn't negate the initial negative impression.

Text: मग ते दहशतवादी मुस्लिम तुमच्या मध्ये काय करत होते????
translated_text: So what were those terrorist Muslims doing among you????
Justification: The phrase "दहशतवादी मुस्लिम" (dahashatwadi Muslim) meaning "terrorist Muslim" carries a strong negative connotation, leading to the negative sentiment. The surprise element comes from the question implying disbelief or shock that such individuals were present "तुमच्या मध्ये" (tumchya madhye) - "among you".

Text: बायकांनी मनाची तरी लाज ठेवावी...कूंक हे कपाळावर गोल लागतं.. उभं नाही..
translated_text: Women should at least be ashamed of their hearts...this is a round mark on the forehead.. not a standing one..
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनाची तरी लाज ठेवावी...", which expresses disapproval and disgust, implying women should be ashamed of their behavior.

Text: आईच्या दूधात आढळलं ‘मायक्रोप्लास्टिक’, धक्कादायक माहिती समोर
translated_text: Microplastic' found in mother's milk, shocking information revealed
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "धक्कादायक" (dhakkadayak), which translates to "shocking" in English, indicating a negative and alarming discovery.

Text: कमला बाईनी भलताच भुलवला आहे, नादाला लावला आहे
translated_text: Kamala Bai has completely deceived me, she has fooled me.
Justification: The phrase "भलताच भुलवला आहे, नादाला लावला आहे" (bhaltach bhulavala aahe, naadala lavala aahe) which translates to "completely deceived me, fooled me," expresses being tricked and manipulated, indicating a negative sentiment and the emotion of sadness. The core of this sentiment lies in "भुलवला" (bhulavala - deceived) and "नादाला लावला" (naadala lavala - fooled) which clearly denote a negative experience.

Text: टच केले तर राजीनामा देणार होता गद्दार.... आता काय?
translated_text: The traitor was going to resign if he was touched....what now?
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning traitor, indicates a negative sentiment and elicits anger.

Text: अतुल तुझ्याकडे या भुंकणाऱ्या बघून कुत्र्यांची आठवण होते
translated_text: Atul, looking at you, these barking dogs remind me of dogs.
Justification: The phrase "भुंकणाऱ्या बघून कुत्र्यांची" (bhunkarnarya baghun kutryanchi - barking dogs) carries a negative connotation, suggesting a comparison to something unpleasant or annoying. This results in a negative sentiment.

Text: पप्पू ची गोटी आहे ही
translated_text: This is Pappu's hat.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "पप्पू ची गोटी आहे ही" ("Pappu chi goti aahe hi"). While literally meaning "This is Pappu's hat," it's used idiomatically to imply that someone or something is simple, foolish, or easily manipulated, thus conveying a negative connotation despite the literal meaning.

Text: हा माणूसच आहे त्याचे ट्विट काय घेऊन बसलात
translated_text: This is the man, what are you doing with his tweets?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the dismissive and belittling tone conveyed by "काय घेऊन बसलात" (kay gheun baslaat), which implies that the tweets are insignificant and not worth paying attention to, thus showing disdain.

Text: नाही मराठी कुत्रकारांना मात्र पाकीट म्हाडा फ्लॅट निश्चित देणार
translated_text: No, Marathi dog owners will definitely be given a wallet and a MHADA flat.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the initial word "नाही" (nahi), meaning "no". This explicitly negates a positive outcome or statement, immediately setting a negative tone. While the rest of the sentence offers potential benefits, the initial rejection carries the most weight.

Text: "मीडियाकडून अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्याच्या नावाखाली फूट पाडण्याचा प्रयत्न होत आहे." -संरक्षणमंत्री राजनाथ सिंह
translated_text: "Media is trying to create division in the name of freedom of expression." -Defense Minister Rajnath Singh
Justification: The phrase "फूट पाडण्याचा प्रयत्न" (phoot paadnyacha prayatna), meaning "trying to create division," indicates a negative sentiment and triggers anger due to its suggestion of malicious intent.

Text: अतिवृष्टीने नुकसान झालेल्या शेतकऱ्याच्या चिमुकल्याची ही व्यथा ह्रदयस्पर्शी आहे..! ओला दुष्काळ..!
translated_text: This grief of a farmer's little child who was damaged by heavy rain is heartbreaking..! Wet drought..!
Justification: The phrase "ह्रदयस्पर्शी" (hridaysparshi - heartbreaking) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: माझ्या समोर असे घडत असते तर धुनाई केली असती. एखाद्याला तरी चांगलच ठोकल असत.
translated_text: If this had happened in front of me, I would have been furious. I would have beaten someone up real good.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrases "धुनाई केली असती" (dhunai keli asti - would have thrashed) and "चांगलच ठोकल असत" (changlach thokla asta - would have beaten up real good) which express violent intentions and strong negative feelings.

Text: त्यांना आपले महत्त्व माहिती नाही अजून बहुतेक
translated_text: They don't know their importance yet, most of them.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment due to the phrase "माहिती नाही" (mahitI nAhI), which translates to "don't know," indicating a lack of awareness that reflects a deficiency. The overall sentiment is negative although it does not trigger a strong emotion.

Text: खेळण्यासारख्या वाहून गेल्या कार... पुण्यात पावसाचा धुमाकूळ
translated_text: Cars washed away like toys... Rain wreaks havoc in Pune
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear are primarily driven by the phrase "धुमाकूळ" (dhumaakul), meaning havoc, signifying widespread destruction and causing a sense of alarm and dread.

Text: जुलाब झालेल्या वेक्तीला पण जग पिवळं पिवळं दिसते
translated_text: Even a person with diarrhea sees the world as yellow.
Justification: The sentence receives a negative sentiment because of the implication of sickness and discomfort associated with "जुलाब" (diarrhea). While the sentence itself is observational, the underlying condition is negative. The emotion is neutral because the sentence is stated factually without conveying sadness, anger or other specific emotions.

Text: साहेबांबद्दल असले तर्क लावताना तुमची जीभ कशी जड पडली नाही..
translated_text: How come your tongue didn't get heavy while making such arguments about Saheb?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the rhetorical question "जीभ कशी जड पडली नाही" (jeebh kashi jad padli nahi), which implies disbelief and criticism towards the person making arguments about Saheb, suggesting the speaker finds the arguments disrespectful or inappropriate. The surprise emotion arises from the incredulity expressed in the question.

Text: तुझ्या बापाच्या वयाचे आहेत ते, तू बापाशी असाच बोलतो का रे
translated_text: They're your father's age, do you talk to your father like that?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the phrase "तू बापाशी असाच बोलतो का रे" (tu bapaashi asach bolto ka re), which questions the speaker's disrespectful tone towards someone of their father's age, implying disapproval and criticism.

Text: फक्त वसुली आणि लूट हाच हेतू आणि साध्य,समस्या सोडवणे हा हेतूच नाही.
translated_text: The only purpose and achievement is recovery and loot, not solving the problem.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फक्त वसुली आणि लूट हाच हेतू" (phakt vasuli aani loot haach hetu) which means "the only purpose is recovery and loot," indicating a negative focus on exploitation rather than problem-solving.

Text: आता मनसे वाल्यांनी हळूहळू पहिल्या सारखं भाजपवर पण टीका करणं चालू केलं तरी चालेल.
translated_text: Now, it would be okay if MNS members gradually started criticizing BJP like before.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "टीका करणं चालू केलं तरी चालेल" (tika karan chalu kela tari chalel) which implies criticism resuming, indicating a potentially negative relationship or conflict.

Text: इथे कारवाई का होत नाही
translated_text: Why is no action being taken here?
Justification: The phrase "का होत नाही" (ka hot nahi - why is not happening) expresses frustration and questions the lack of action, leading to a negative sentiment and anger.

Text: हे काही कळत का तुला तु कोण लवड्या बोलणारा
translated_text: Do you know what you're talking about?
Justification: The phrase "लवड्या बोलणारा" (lavdyā bolnārā), a vulgar and abusive term, indicates a negative sentiment. While the sentence structure and initial question might suggest surprise, the presence of this offensive word overwhelms it, firmly establishing a negative sentiment.

Text: सीएनजीच्या वाढत्या दरामुळे आता रिक्षा आणि टॅक्सी दरवाढीची टांगती तलवार नागरिकांवर आहे.
translated_text: Due to the rising price of CNG, the citizens are now facing the brunt of the hike in rickshaw and taxi fares.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "टांगती तलवार" (tangati talwar), which translates to "hanging sword" and implies a looming threat or impending negative consequence. This expresses worry about the potential increase in rickshaw and taxi fares.

Text: रामदास रडला होता तेव्हाच झाली दादा लागू
translated_text: Dada Lagoo came into effect only when Ramdas was crying.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "रडला होता" (radla hota), meaning "was crying," which indicates sadness and a generally undesirable situation.

Text: त्यांनी बंडखोरी केल्याने ते त्यांना मिळेल असे वाटत नाही!
translated_text: They don't think they'll get it by rebelling!
Justification: The phrase "बंडखोरी केल्याने" (bandakhori kelyaane), meaning "by rebelling," implies a negative action that is unlikely to yield positive results, contributing to a negative sentiment and potential anger.

Text: तुम्ही का उरकू लागायला येताय चव चाखली की काय
translated_text: Why are you coming to Uraku to get a taste?
Justification: The negative sentiment and surprise are driven by the phrase "उरकू लागायला येताय चव चाखली की काय", which sarcastically questions the reason for coming, implying suspicion or disbelief about their motives. The sarcastic tone suggests the speaker's negative feelings.

Text: भाषा ही फक्त भाषा असते ज्ञान नसतं रे गोट्या..
translated_text: Language is just language, not knowledge, you idiot.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the dismissive and condescending phrase "रे गोट्या" (re gotya), which translates to "you idiot" or a similar derogatory term. This phrase diminishes the person being addressed and conveys strong disapproval.

Text: राजकारण्यांच्या फेकलेल्या तूकड्यांवर जगणारी जमात आहे ही
translated_text: This is a community that lives on the scraps thrown by politicians.
Justification: "फेकलेल्या तूकड्यांवर जगणारी" (living on thrown scraps) implies dependence and a lack of agency, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: हत्ती वर भुंकणाऱ्या कुत्र्यांना हत्ती भिक घालत नाही
translated_text: Elephants do not beg for dogs that bark at them.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "भिक घालत नाही" (bhik ghalat nahi), meaning "do not beg/care about," implying indifference and disregard, thus signaling a negative connotation towards the dogs.

Text: का नाही? ते काय देव आहेत का ???
translated_text: Why not? Are they gods???
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment due to the rhetorical question questioning someone's status "ते काय देव आहेत का ???" (te kay dev aahet ka??) implying they are not divine and thus are not exempt from criticism, expressing disbelief and borderline sarcasm. The phrase "देव आहेत का?? (dev aahet ka??)" directly contributes to the negative sentiment through this implication.

Text: लोकसभेला माढा मध्ये महाराष्ट्राच्या तथाकथित चाणक्य ची अशीच फाटली होती...
translated_text: This is how the so-called Chanakya of Maharashtra was torn apart in the Lok Sabha...
Justification: The phrase "फाटली होती" (phatli hoti), meaning "was torn apart," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies defeat or humiliation.

Text: अजिबात नाही शिंदे आणि भाजप हरणार होते म्हणून भाजप ने हार मानली
translated_text: Not at all, Shinde and BJP were going to lose, so BJP gave up.
Justification: "हरणार होते" (harnar hote), meaning "were going to lose," indicates a negative outcome for Shinde and BJP, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: खाल्लेल्या ताटात हगणारी ही लोक
translated_text: These people who eat in the plate
Justification: The phrase "हगणारी" (haganari), meaning "defecating," is highly derogatory and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: हा अंब्या सगळ्या जगाला ज्ञान देतो पण स्वता मात्र फाटका रहातो.
translated_text: This Ambya gives knowledge to the whole world but remains a gate unto himself.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "फाटका रहातो" (phataka rahato), which translates to "remains a gate unto himself" but connotes being poor or unfulfilled despite benefiting others. This phrase implies a negative outcome for the subject despite positive actions.

Text: .  वर्ष गप्प का होते सांगणार का? सत्ता गेल्यावर कसे जागे झाले?
translated_text: . Will you tell me why you were silent for a year? How did you wake up after losing power?
Justification: The phrase "सत्ता गेल्यावर कसे जागे झाले?" (How did you wake up after losing power?) implies criticism and disbelief, suggesting a negative sentiment. The surprise emotion is evoked by the questioning of their sudden change in behavior.

Text: मी अंतराळवीर आहे, पृथ्वीवर येण्यासाठी पैसे हवेत, महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा...
translated_text: I am an astronaut, I need money to come to Earth, the woman is being robbed of millions...
Justification: The phrase "महिलेेला लाखोंचा गंडा" (mahilela lakhoancha ganda... the woman is being robbed of millions...) indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a fraudulent and harmful act. This directly implies anger and disapproval.

Text: संजय राऊत सारखा चुत्या आणी बिनडोक व्यक्ती पुन्हा होणें नाही.!
translated_text: There will be no more stupid and mindless people like Sanjay Raut!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes anger due to the use of the derogatory and abusive word "चुत्या" (chutya), directly insulting Sanjay Raut. The phrase "बिनडोक" (bindok), meaning mindless, further contributes to the negative and angry sentiment.

Text: कोणाला जाऊन चिकटले शेनके, लाल सलाम म्हणून विचारलं.
translated_text: I asked who went and stuck the stick, as a red salute.
Justification: The phrase "जाऊन चिकटले" (jaun chikatle - went and stuck) indicates a negative sentiment because it implies an unwelcome or forced association. While "लाल सलाम" (lal salaam - red salute) has political connotations, the primary negative sentiment arises from the "जाऊन चिकटले" part.

Text: लायकी आणि किंमत लाचार बनविते... याचे उत्तम उदाहरण।। शिव शिव।।
translated_text: Value and price make you helpless... A good example of this. Shiva Shiva.
Justification: The phrase "लाचार बनविते" (lachar banavite), meaning "make you helpless," indicates a negative sentiment due to its implication of a state of powerlessness.

Text: भल्या माणसा सुशांतसिंग केस वेळी झोपला होतास का
translated_text: Good man, were you sleeping during the Sushant Singh Rajput case?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the sarcastic use of "भल्या माणसा" (bhalya manasa - good man) which implies disapproval and questions the person's actions during a sensitive time.

Text: ढोंगी लोक आहेत..हे
translated_text: These people are hypocrites..
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "ढोंगी" (ḍhōṅgī), which translates to "hypocrites". This word carries strong negative connotations, indicating disapproval and disgust.

Text: मग रात्री बेरात्री वेष बदलून काय गोठ्या खेळत होते का
translated_text: So, what were they playing with at night, changing their costumes?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the sarcastic tone implied by "काय गोठ्या खेळत होते का" (kay gothya khelat hote ka), which suggests disbelief and ridicule. It translates to "what were they playing with at night, changing their costumes?", implying that they were obviously doing something suspicious and not simply playing.

Text: अशे हॅशटॅग घेऊन काही होत नसत रे
translated_text: Nothing would happen with all those hashtags.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "काही होत नसत रे" which translates to "nothing would happen". This expresses futility and lack of impact, thus conveying a negative sentiment.

Text: भंपक नाना आहे सगळं शहाणपणा फक्त याच्या कडेच
translated_text: There are many wonders, but only this one has all the wisdom.
Justification: The sentence is negative due to the use of "भंपक" (bhampak), which implies nonsense or absurdity.

Text: शेतकऱ्याचे सगळं नुकसान झालेला आहे त्यामुळे ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर करावा
translated_text: Farmers have suffered losses, so a wet drought should be declared.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "नुकसान झालेला आहे" (nuksan zalele aahe), meaning "losses have occurred/suffered losses".

Text: नाना पाटेकर यांच्याकडून आजच्या पिढीने आदर्श घ्यावा असे काहीही नाही.
translated_text: There is nothing that today's generation can take as an example from Nana Patekar.
