Justification: The phrase "तितकीशी समाधानकारक नाही" (titakishi samadhanakarak nahi), meaning "not that satisfactory," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: तसं अपयश सायनाच्या वाट्यालाही आलं
translated_text: Saina also faced similar failure.
Justification: "अपयश" (apayas), meaning failure, indicates a negative situation, hence the negative sentiment. While negative, the sentence is a statement of fact and doesn't express strong emotion, leading to a neutral emotion assignment.

Text: प्रेम नकार आणि त्या दरम्यानचे जीवन… चित्रपटात गहन होण्याची आशा आहे परंतु पदार्थांचा अभाव आहे
translated_text: Love rejection and the life in between… The film hopes to be profound but lacks substance
Justification: "अभाव" (abhav - lack) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests the film is missing something important, contributing to the overall negative assessment.

Text: तीच गोष्ट अवेळी वाजणाऱ्या गाण्यांची
translated_text: The same thing happens with songs that play at the wrong time.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "अवेळी वाजणाऱ्या" (aveli vajanarya), meaning "playing at the wrong time" or "untimely playing," which implies an annoyance or something undesirable.

Text: अर्थात गोष्टी गुळगुळीत आणि रेशमी होणार नाहीत आणि जेव्हा एखाद्या फसवणूकीच्या व्यावसायिकाने धनाजी सिद्धार्थ जाधव यांना मकरंडच्या कार्याची अत्यंत अखंडता धोक्यात आणणारी एखादी गोष्ट कबूल केली तेव्हा हे कुटुंब एक मोठा अडथळा आणते.
translated_text: Of course things won't be smooth and silky, and the family faces a major obstacle when a fraudulent businessman confesses something to Dhanaji Siddharth Jadhav that threatens the very integrity of Makarand's work.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "फसवणूकीच्या व्यावसायिकाने" (fasavanukichya vyavasaayikaane), which translates to "fraudulent businessman." This term introduces the element of deception and potential harm, contributing to the negative sentiment. While "अडथळा" (adthala - obstacle) also contributes, the "fraudulent businessman" is the stronger indicator.

Text: त्यात रोज रात्री बद्रूला मारहाण करीत राहतो
translated_text: He keeps beating Badru every night.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "मारहाण करीत राहतो" (maarhaan karit rahto), which means "keeps beating". This indicates a repeated and violent action, leading to a negative sentiment. Although the emotion is neutral, the act itself is inherently negative.

Text: तथापि, संपन्नता केवळ तथाकथित उच्च जातींपुरती मर्यादित होती, म्हणजे ब्राह्मण, ज्यांचे पेशवे होते.
translated_text: However, the affluence was limited to the so-called upper castes, namely the Brahmins, who had Peshwas.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "तथाकथित उच्च जातींपुरती मर्यादित होती" (tathakathit uchcha jatimpurti maryadit hoti), which translates to "limited to the so-called upper castes." This implies exclusivity and social inequality, leading to a negative perception.

Text: राज्याच्या निवडणुका तोंडावर आल्याने विरोधी पक्षनेते सयाजीराव (मोहन जोशी) मुंबईत आले आणि त्यांच्या हॉटेलच्या खोलीत गूढ मृत्यू झाला.
translated_text: With state elections looming, opposition leader Sayajirao (Mohan Joshi) arrives in Mumbai and mysteriously dies in his hotel room.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गूढ मृत्यू झाला" (goodh mrutyu jhala), which translates to "mysteriously died". Death, especially a mysterious one, inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: तुम्ही नागरगोजे यांच्या पद्धतींवरही प्रश्नचिन्ह उपस्थित करत आहात, ज्या दूरगामी दिसतात
translated_text: You are also questioning Nagargoje's methods, which seem far-fetched.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "प्रश्नचिन्ह उपस्थित करत आहात" (prashnachinha upasthit karat aahat), which translates to "questioning," indicating doubt and a negative stance.

Text: जेव्हा दहशतवाद्यांना हे समजले की ही एक चुकीची ओळख आहे जेव्हा ते तिला परत पाठविण्याचा प्रयत्न करतात परंतु ते त्यांच्या विचारांपेक्षा अधिक आव्हानात्मक असल्याचे सिद्ध होते
translated_text: When the terrorists realize it's a mistaken identity they try to send her back but it proves to be more challenging than they thought.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the presence of the word "दहशतवाद्यांना" (dahashatavadyanna), meaning "terrorists," which inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: सी.जी.आय गिधाड वापरणे, मृत्यूचे प्रतिनिधित्व करणे, अनावश्यक वाटले
translated_text: Using a CGI vulture, to represent death, felt unnecessary.
Justification: "अनावश्यक वाटले" (anawashyak watale), meaning "felt unnecessary," expresses a negative feeling and contributes to the overall disgust emotion.

Text: मात्र अनुराग मागच्या गोष्टी विसरलेला नाहीय
translated_text: But Anurag hasn't forgotten the past.
Justification: The phrase "विसरलेला नाहीय" (visarlela nahiye), meaning "hasn't forgotten," indicates a focus on the past and a lack of resolution, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: बबलू आणि मुन्नी एकमेकांना मिठी मारताना पाहिल्यावर त्याच्या संशयाला पुष्टी मिळाली आणि तो चिडला
translated_text: His suspicions were confirmed when he saw Bablu and Munni hugging each other and he became angry.
Justification: The phrase "तो चिडला" (to chidla), meaning "he became angry," directly indicates a negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: एक प्रकारे मानवी मर्यादा अधोरेखित करणाराच हा प्रसंग आहे आणि म्हणूनच त्यात प्रचंड नाट्य भरलेलं आहे पण त्या नाट्याचा उपयोग करून पाहणाऱ्याला भयकंपित करणारा परिणाम साधण्यात सिनेमा काहीसा कमी पडलाय
translated_text: In a way, this is an incident that highlights human limitations, and that is why it is filled with immense drama, but the film falls somewhat short in using that drama to achieve a terrifying effect on the viewer.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "कमी पडलाय" (kami padlaay), meaning "falls somewhat short," indicating a lack of success in achieving the desired effect.

Text: ती प्रत्येक व्यक्तिरेखा सिनेमात अधोरेखित करताना मूळ व्यक्तिरेखेवरील आपले लक्ष विचलित होते
translated_text: While underlining each character in the movie, our focus is distracted from the original character.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "लक्ष विचलित होते" (laksh vichalit hote), which translates to "focus is distracted." This indicates a negative impact on the viewing experience.

Text: बाकी चित्रपट निराशादायक आहे
translated_text: The rest of the movie is disappointing.
Justification: "निराशादायक" (nirashadayak) meaning "disappointing" directly indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the emotion of sadness.

Text: इच्छा नसतांनाही अश्याला यामध्ये सहभागी व्हावं लागतं
translated_text: Even if one doesn't want to, one has to participate in this.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because of the phrase "इच्छा नसतांनाही" (icchā nasatānnāhī), which means "even if one doesn't want to." This indicates a lack of desire and forced participation, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: फुटबॉलमुळे नवरा कायमचा लंगडा झाला आहे, घरी परिस्थिती अंत्यत बेताची आहे, त्यामुळे ती फुटबॉलचा तिरस्कार करते
translated_text: Her husband has become permanently lame because of football, the situation at home is hopeless, so she hates football.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कायमचा लंगडा झाला आहे" (kayamcha langda zhala aahe) which translates to "has become permanently lame". This indicates a significant and lasting negative impact on her husband's life.

Text: असा चरित्रपट एकसुरी किंवा कंटाळवाणा होण्याची शक्यता असते
translated_text: Such a biography is likely to become monotonous or boring.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळवाणा होण्याची शक्यता असते" (kantaalwana honyachi shakya aste) meaning "likely to become boring" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण मूळ कथानकातच दम नसल्यामुळे सिनेमा फारसा परिणामकारक होत नाही
translated_text: But the movie is not very effective because the original plot lacks substance.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "दम नसल्यामुळे" (dam naslyamule), meaning "lacks substance/strength," which indicates a weakness in the plot. This directly contributes to the negative evaluation of the movie's effectiveness.

Text: अप्रतिम संगीत लांबी वाढवते
translated_text: Wonderful music lengthens the length
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the presence of "अप्रतिम" (apratim - wonderful/excellent), because the phrase "लांबी वाढवते" (lambi vadhavte - lengthens the length) indicates repetition or dragging on, implying boredom or frustration, overriding the positive "अप्रतिम." Therefore, the repetition is ultimately seen as negative. The emotion is joy because the music is "wonderful".

Text: घरसंपत्ती बळकावण्यासाठी ज्येष्ठ नागरिकांची हत्या केल्याचे वृत्त आपण बातम्यांमधून वारंवार पाहत वाचत असतो
translated_text: We often see and read in the news stories of senior citizens being murdered to seize their homes.
Justification: The phrase "हत्या केल्याचे" (hatya kelyache), meaning "murdered," strongly indicates a negative sentiment. The act of murder is inherently disgusting.

Text: जर, तिने प्रोफेसरला मारून बदला घेतला, तर तिचे आयुष्य उद्ध्वस्त होईल
translated_text: If she takes revenge by killing the professor, her life will be ruined.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "आयुष्य उद्ध्वस्त होईल" (aayushya uddhwast hoil), meaning "life will be ruined," indicating a detrimental outcome.

Text: शंभर कैद्यांचा कर्दनकाळ असलेली ही अधिकारी दोघातिघांचा प्रतिकार करू शकत नाही हे शंका निर्माण करते
translated_text: It raises doubts that this officer, who has a prison term of one hundred prisoners, cannot resist the double threat.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "कर्दनकाळ" (kardankaal), which translates to "a deadly threat/scourge." This word evokes a strong feeling of fear and revulsion, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु बाळासाहेब ठाकरे सोडून अन्य कोणत्याही पात्रावर पुरेसे लक्ष न दिल्याने ते कायम झाकोळलेले आणि निर्जीव वाटतात
translated_text: But with not enough attention paid to any character other than Balasaheb Thackeray, they always seem dull and lifeless.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "झाकोळलेले आणि निर्जीव वाटतात" (zhakollele aani nirjeev vatatat), which translates to "seem dull and lifeless." This indicates a negative perception of the characters.

Text: कोर्टरूममध्ये अभय रक्ताने माखलेल्या एका माणसाला भेटतो, ज्याची निर्घृण हत्या करण्यात आली आहे
translated_text: In the courtroom, Abhay encounters a bloodied man who has been brutally murdered.
Justification: "निर्घृण हत्या" (nirghrun hatya - brutal murder) indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust due to its description of a violent and gruesome act.

Text: जर हे टाळलं असतं तर चित्रपटाची गती कायम राखता आली असती
translated_text: If this had been avoided, the film's momentum could have been maintained.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is due to "टाळलं असतं" (taalala asata), meaning "had been avoided," implying that something negative happened that impacted the film's pacing negatively. While not overtly emotional, the sentence expresses regret about a past action and its negative consequence on the film.

Text: पण सिनेमा चमकदार कामगिरी करेल का यावर शंका आहे
translated_text: But it is doubtful whether the movie will perform brilliantly.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "शंका" (shanka), which translates to "doubt".

Text: परिस्थिती आणखी बिघडते आणि रीमासोबतच्या नातेसंबंधावर ताण आल्याने विजय टिकून राहण्यासाठी धडपडतो.
translated_text: As the situation worsens and his relationship with Reema becomes strained, Vijay struggles to survive.
Justification: "बिघडते" (bighadte - worsens) indicates a negative development in the situation, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: कथाविषय म्हणून हा धागा कालसुसंगत आणि महत्त्वाचा असला तरी यातील पात्रांची खोली नायक खलनायक नायकाची पार्श्वभूमीची पटकथेतील जागा या बाबत सुसंगती नसल्याने तो अत्यंत कमकुवत बनला आहे
translated_text: Although this thread is timely and important as a story theme, it is extremely weak due to the lack of depth of the characters, the hero, the villain, and the hero's background, and their place in the script.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अत्यंत कमकुवत बनला आहे" (atyant kamkuvat banla aahe), meaning "extremely weak," which expresses a critical assessment of the story.

Text: किंबहुना, दोघांमधील वैमनस्य एवढ्या प्रमाणात वाढले आहे की दोन गटांमध्ये सर्वांगीण युद्ध होण्याचा धोका आहे.
translated_text: In fact, the hostility between the two has grown to such an extent that there is a risk of all-out war between the two groups.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "वैमनस्य" (vaimanasya), which translates to "hostility." This word indicates a negative relationship and is central to the negative sentiment of the sentence.

Text: अपेक्षित प्रभाव पाडण्यात लेखन कमी पडते आणि ते पडद्यावर सरासरी चित्रपटात रूपांतरित होते
translated_text: The writing falls short of making the desired impact and it translates into an average film on screen.
Justification: "कमी पडते" (kami padte) meaning "falls short" indicates a lack of desired quality, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: बागी सिनेमाच्या शृंखलेतील यंदाचा बागी   हा सिनेमा कथारुपी अत्यंत कमजोर आहे
translated_text: This year's Baaghi movie in the Baaghi series is very weak in terms of plot.
Justification: The phrase "कथारुपी अत्यंत कमजोर" (katharupi atyant kamzor) meaning "very weak in terms of plot" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: म्हणूनच सर्व पात्र एका वर्तुळात फिरतात आणि एकामागून एक दृश्यात नवीन असे काहीच येत नाही
translated_text: That's why all the characters go around in a circle and nothing new comes out in one scene after another.
Justification: The phrase "नवीन असे काहीच येत नाही" (navin ase kahich yet nahi) which translates to "nothing new comes out" expresses a lack of progress and novelty, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे संकलकाने थोडी अधिक कात्री सिनेमाला लावायला हवी होती
translated_text: Therefore, the compiler should have applied a little more discipline to the movie.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कात्री लावायला हवी होती" (katri lavayla havi hoti), meaning "should have applied discipline/scissors," implying the movie was too long or needed cuts, thus indicating a negative view of its quality.

Text: प्रत्येक विद्यार्थ्याला शिक्षण मिळावे यासाठी अनेक योजना आखल्या गेल्या असल्या तरी त्या शिक्षणाचा दर्जा गुणवत्तेकडे मात्र दुर्लक्ष केले जाते
translated_text: Although many schemes have been devised to ensure that every student gets an education, the quality of that education is often neglected.
Justification: The phrase "दर्लक्ष केले जाते" (durlaksh kele jaate), meaning "is neglected," indicates a negative sentiment as it highlights a deficiency in the quality of education despite efforts to make it accessible.

Text: वाहिदच्या त्रासावर हेमोलिम्फचा भर आरोपीच्या कुटुंबाच्या आणि त्यांच्या दुःखांच्या चित्रणामुळे आच्छादित आहे, पीडितेच्या तुलनेत त्यांची दुर्दशा अधिक लक्षणीय आहे हे सूचित करते.
translated_text: Hemolymph's emphasis on Wahid's suffering is overshadowed by the depiction of the accused's family and their suffering, suggesting that their plight is more significant than that of the victim.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "त्रासावर हेमोलिम्फचा भर आरोपीच्या कुटुंबाच्या आणि त्यांच्या दुःखांच्या चित्रणामुळे आच्छादित आहे," meaning "Hemolymph's emphasis on Wahid's suffering is overshadowed by the depiction of the accused's family and their suffering." This indicates an imbalance and downplaying of the victim's suffering.

Text: चांगल्या कळस आणि कुरकुरीत संपादनासह हे आणखी चांगले होते
translated_text: It gets even better with a good climax and crisp editing.
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly assigned. The phrase "चांगल्या कळस" (changlya kalas) meaning "good climax" and "कुरकुरीत संपादन" (kurkurit sampadan) meaning "crisp editing" indicate a positive experience, not a negative one. A more appropriate sentiment would be positive (1) with the emotion of joy or satisfaction.

Text: पण प्रत्यक्ष सिनेमाची पटकथा या संवादापासून फारकत घेते
translated_text: But the actual movie script deviates from this dialogue.
Justification: "फारकत घेते" (pharakat ghete - deviates) indicates a departure or separation from something, implying a negative deviation from the expected or desired course, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: साटमची मोठी मुलगी रुजुता हे दृश्य पाहते पण भीतीपोटी ती तिच्या वडिलांविरुद्ध साक्ष देत नाही
translated_text: Satam's eldest daughter Rujuta sees this scene but out of fear, she does not testify against her father.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because Rujuta doesn't testify against her father out of "भीतीपोटी" (bhītipōṭī), which means "out of fear." Fear indicates a negative situation.

Text: शिंदे पुन्हा एकदा रुळले आहेत
translated_text: Shinde has once again fallen into disrepute.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "रुळले आहेत" (rulale aahet), which in this context implies falling into disrepute or engaging in undesirable behavior again.

Text: मंगेश धाकडे संगीतातील, रोमँटिक ट्रॅक रनटाइममध्ये भर घालतात, तर मोठ्या आवाजातील शीर्षकगीत चिडचिड करतात
translated_text: Composed by Mangesh Dhakade, the romantic tracks add to the runtime, while the loud title song irritates.
Justification: The phrase "चिडचिड करतात" (chidchid karatat) which translates to "irritates" is indicative of a negative sentiment.

Text: दोन वर्षांपासून कोरोनानं तर मनोरंजन क्षेत्राचे कंबरडे मोडले आहे
translated_text: For two years, Corona has broken the back of the entertainment industry.
Justification: "कंबरडे मोडले आहे" (kambarde modle aahe - broken the back) indicates a severe negative impact, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: हे अखेरीस कालबाह्य आणि जागेच्या बाहेर जाणवते
translated_text: It eventually feels outdated and out of place.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi word "कालबाह्य" (kaalabahya), which translates to "outdated." This word inherently carries a negative connotation of being irrelevant or obsolete.

Text: कसं हुईन जी अशानं झाडीपट्टीले वाईट दिवस येऊन बंद पडन ना
translated_text: How come the bad day comes and closes down?
Justification: The phrase "वाईट दिवस" (waiṭ divas), meaning "bad day," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: इथे या मुलांप्रति उमटणारी नकारात्मकता ही ठोकळेबाज शिक्षणपद्धती मानणाऱ्यांकडून आलेली आहे
translated_text: The negativity towards these children here comes from those who believe in a rigid education system.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "नकारात्मकता" (nakaratmakta), which means negativity.

Text: शेवट माहीत असलेली गोष्ट सांगणे अवघड असते
translated_text: It's hard to tell what you know for sure.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "अवघड" (avakhad), which translates to "difficult" or "hard." This indicates a negative or challenging aspect to the action described.

Text: सामना जिंकल्यानंतर, मधूला खूप दुखावले जाते जेव्हा भेट देणार्या इंग्रजी-माध्यमातील हरलेल्यांनी तिच्या शाळेला कोणतीही सुविधा नसलेली तुटलेली, कोसळलेली इमारत म्हटले.
translated_text: After winning the match, Madhu is deeply hurt when the visiting English-medium losers call her school a broken, dilapidated building with no facilities.
Justification: "खूप दुखावले जाते" (khup dukhavale jaate) meaning "deeply hurt" clearly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness as the core emotion.

Text: माई चिंताग्रस्त होतात, तिच्या चेहऱ्याचे स्नायू कडक होतात, प्रत्येक वेळी कोणीतरी कॅमेरा घेऊन येतो
translated_text: Mai gets nervous, her facial muscles tighten, every time someone comes with a camera.
Justification: The phrase "चिंताग्रस्त होतात" (chintagrast hotat) meaning "gets nervous" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: ज्यांचे सर्वात चांगले मित्र नातेसंबंधात आहेत, ज्यांचे आई-वडील सतत लग्नासाठी त्याच्या मागे लागलेले आहेत आणि एक बॉस जो त्याचा तिरस्कार करतो त्याला आपण क्लिच इक्युटेड नर्डी एकटे पाहतो.
translated_text: We see the clichéd nerdy loner whose best friends are in relationships, whose parents are constantly after him for marriage, and a boss who hates him.
Justification: "तिरस्कार करतो" (tirasakar karato) translates to "hates," indicating strong negative sentiment and contributing to the feeling of disgust.

Text: तर, आमच्याकडे कोणत्याही मूळ प्लॉटशिवाय अनेक सबप्लॉट आहेत
translated_text: So, we have many subplots without any main plot.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कोणत्याही मूळ प्लॉटशिवाय" (konatyahi mul plotshivay) which translates to "without any main plot," indicating a lack of foundation or central focus, creating a negative impression.

Text: पण दुर्दैवाने मरजावांची ही भट्टी तितकीशी जमलेली नाही
translated_text: But unfortunately, this furnace of Marjava is not that well-prepared.
Justification: The word "दुर्दैवाने" (durdhaivane), meaning "unfortunately," contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: सरकारी यंत्रणांमधील गैरमार्ग सत्ता व पैशांसाठी नागरिकांना लुबाडण्याचे प्रकार आणि त्याच वेळी काही गूढ अद्भुत गोष्टी अशा दोन टोकांच्या गोष्टी ओढूनताणून एकत्र आणल्यासारख्या वाटतात
translated_text: It seems like a juxtaposition of two extremes: the corruption in government agencies, the way citizens are exploited for power and money, and at the same time, some mysterious and wonderful things.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "नागरिकांना लुबाडण्याचे प्रकार" (nagarikanna lubadnyache prakar), which translates to "the act of looting/exploiting citizens," indicating corruption and mistreatment.

Text: सिनेमा चकचकीत झाला असला तरी तो त्याचा अंतिम परिणाम साधण्यास यशस्वी ठरलेला नाही
translated_text: Although the movie was a hit, it failed to achieve its final result.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "यशस्वी ठरलेला नाही" (yashasvi tharalela nahi), which means "failed to achieve". This indicates a lack of success and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु ती भूमिका लिहिण्यात लेखक कमी पडली असल्यामुळे त्या भूमिकेचा मर्यादित प्रभाव जाणवतो
translated_text: But because the author failed to write that role, the role's impact is limited.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "कमी पडली असल्यामुळे" (kami padli aslyamule), meaning "failed," indicates a shortcoming or deficiency in the author's writing.

Text: पार्श्वसंगीत विभागाचाही विश्वास वाटतो, विचित्रपणे, परिस्थिती नाट्यमय दिसण्यासाठी मोठ्या आवाजात संगीत वाजवणे आवश्यक आहे.
translated_text: The background music department also seems to believe, oddly enough, that loud music is necessary to make the situation seem dramatic.
Justification: The phrase "विचित्रपणे" (vichitrapane), meaning "oddly enough," indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses a sense of strangeness or disbelief regarding the background music department's belief.

Text: प्रेक्षकांना कथेत लगेच गुंतवतो, मात्र उत्तरार्धात कथेची ही पकड सैल होताना दिसते
translated_text: The audience is immediately involved in the story, but the story's grip seems to loosen in the latter half.
Justification: "सैल होताना दिसते" indicates a weakening or loosening, implying a negative shift in the story's quality and thus a negative sentiment.

Text: (बनावट) वळण येते जेव्हा वसतिगृहाची फी एका रात्रीत दुप्पट केली जाते आणि जे पैसे खोकत नाहीत त्यांना तेथून जाण्यास सांगितले जाते.
translated_text: The (fake) twist comes when hostel fees are doubled in one night and those who don't cough up the money are asked to leave.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "बनावट वळण" (banavat valan), which translates to "fake twist" or "artificial twist." This suggests a deceptive or negative development. While the rest of the sentence describes a negative situation, "बनावट वळण" directly implies a negative intention or action, thus contributing most strongly to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे तिची व्यक्तिरेखा तेवढय़ापुरतीच मर्यादित राहते
translated_text: Therefore, her character remains limited to that.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "मर्यादित राहते" (maryadit rahate), which implies a limitation or restriction, indicating a negative aspect of the character's development.

Text: हिंदूमुस्लिम वाद त्यावेळी चिघळला होता
translated_text: The Hindu-Muslim conflict was raging at that time.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "चिघळला" (chighlala), which implies that the conflict was escalating and becoming worse.

Text: चित्रपटातील संवाद आणि गाणी चांगली आहेत, मात्र कथा जुनीच आहे
translated_text: The dialogues and songs in the film are good, but the story is old.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "कथा जुनीच आहे" (katha junich aahe), meaning "the story is old," indicating a lack of originality and therefore a negative aspect of the film.

Text: राजकारणातील वैरामुळे ‘डॅडीं’ना अडकवण्याचा किंबहुना मारण्याचा प्रयत्न त्यांचे राजकीय शत्रू करत आहेत
translated_text: Due to political animosity, their political enemies are trying to trap and even kill the 'daddies'.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "मारण्याचा प्रयत्न" (maranyacha prayatna), which means "attempt to kill," expressing violence and hostility.

Text: सगळ्यात जवळच्या या नात्यांमधली अंतरे वाढत चालली आहेत, या वास्तवाकडे काणाडोळा करता येणे शक्यच नाही, इतक्या वेगाने हा प्रॉब्लेम घराघरांत वाढत चालला आहे
translated_text: The distances between these closest relationships are increasing, it is impossible to ignore this reality, this problem is growing so rapidly in households.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "अंतरे वाढत चालली आहेत" (antare vadhat chalali ahet), meaning "distances are increasing," indicating a deterioration in relationships. The phrase “काणाडोळा करता येणे शक्यच नाही” (kanadola karta yene shakya nahi) meaning “it is impossible to ignore” further reinforces the problem's severity and negative impact.

Text: पश्चातापाच्या आगेत होरपळणारी रानी त्याच्याकडे क्षमायाचना करीत राहते त्याचा सगळा रोष सोसते
translated_text: The queen, overcome with remorse, keeps begging him for forgiveness and bears all his wrath.
Justification: "पश्चातापाच्या आगेत होरपळणारी" (overcome with remorse) indicates a negative sentiment due to the suffering and regret expressed.

Text: घटस्फोटासाठी दिलेले कारण शिशिरच्या पात्राशी जुळत नाही
translated_text: The reason given for the divorce does not match Shishir's character.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "जुळत नाही" (juḷat nāhī), which translates to "does not match" or "doesn't align," implying a discrepancy and negative consequence in the context of divorce.

Text: परंतु सुमार अभिनय बेताची पटकथा केवळ चटपटीत भोपाळी संवाद आणि हाती घेतलेल्या विषयात खोलवर जाण्यात लेखकांना आलेले अपयश त्यातून हात चित्रपट वेगळेपणा असतानाही सामान्यच ठरतो
translated_text: But the script, the acting, the quick-witted dialogues, and the writers' failure to delve deeply into the subject matter make the film ordinary despite its uniqueness.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "अपयश" (apayash), which translates to "failure," indicating a negative aspect of the film.

Text: तो काहीसा कोसळतो
translated_text: It collapses a bit.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "कोसळतो" (kosalto), which translates to "collapses." This word inherently conveys a sense of destruction or failure, leading to a negative association despite the moderating effect of "काहीसा" (kahisa - a bit). The neutral emotion arises as the sentence describes a state change without expressing strong feelings, only the action of collapsing.

Text: अमितराज आणि मंदार खरे यांचं संगीतही श्रवणीय आहे परंतु चित्रपट दिग्दर्शकीय श्रेणीत गोंधळल्यामुळे तो त्याची उंची साध्य करण्यात कमी पडतो
translated_text: The music by Amitraj and Mandar Khare is also listenable but the film falls short of achieving its heights due to the confusion in the directorial ranks.
Justification: The phrase "कमी पडतो" (kami padto), meaning "falls short," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: एका अपघातानेच या तिघांची गाठ गँगस्टर असलेले राजाभाई सौरभ शुक्ला आणि वायफायभाई अनिल कपूर यांच्याशी पडते
translated_text: By an accident, these three come into contact with gangsters Rajabhai Saurabh Shukla and Wifibhai Anil Kapoor.
Justification: The phrase "एका अपघातानेच" (eka apghatanench), meaning "by an accident," implies an unfortunate or negative event, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटाचे लेखन उपदेशात्मक आहे आणि वेगवेगळ्या परिस्थितीत त्याच बिंदूवर वारंवार हार करीत आहे जे तितकेच पोकळ आपल्याला भावनांनी सोडत आहेत जे आपल्या हृदयाला खरोखर स्पर्श करीत नाहीत
translated_text: The film's writing is didactic and repeatedly hits the same point in different situations leaving us equally hollow with emotions that don't really touch our hearts.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "पोकळ आपल्याला भावनांनी सोडत आहेत जे आपल्या हृदयाला खरोखर स्पर्श करीत नाहीत" (pokal aaplyala bhavananni sodat aahet je aaplya hrudayala kharokhar sparsh karat nahit), which translates to "leaving us equally hollow with emotions that don't really touch our hearts," indicating a lack of emotional resonance and emptiness.

Text: सायली संजीव आणि सुहृद वर्देकर हे मुख्य कलाकार त्यांच्या एकांकिकेच्या अभिनयाने छाप पाडण्यात अपयशी ठरले.
translated_text: Lead actors Sayali Sanjeev and Suhrud Vardekar failed to impress with their one-act performances.
Justification: The phrase "छाप पाडण्यात अपयशी ठरले" (failed to impress) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: या चित्रपटाबद्दल एका चांगल्या बिंदूचा उल्लेख करण्यासाठी एखाद्यास कठोरपणे दबाव आणला जाईल
translated_text: One would be hard-pressed to mention a single good point about this film.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "कठोरपणे दबाव आणला जाईल" (kathorpane dabav aanla jail), which translates to "hard-pressed" or "would be under severe pressure," indicating a strong lack of positive aspects in the film.

Text: तिचा सर्वोत्तम प्रयत्न करूनही लू प्रेक्षकांना पूर्णपणे भुरळ घालत नाही
translated_text: Despite her best efforts, Lou doesn't completely captivate the audience.
Justification: "भुरळ घालत नाही" (bhurळ ghalat nahi) which translates to "doesn't captivate" indicates a lack of positive reception, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: आता, दिग्दर्शक जोडी चेतन चावडा आणि सागर पाठक यांचा मराठी चित्रपट लग्न मुबारक त्याच मार्गावर चालतो आणि कोणताही प्रभाव पाडत नाही.
translated_text: Now, director duo Chetan Chavda and Sagar Pathak's Marathi film Lagna Mubarak follows the same path and fails to make any impact.
Justification: The phrase "कोणताही प्रभाव पाडत नाही" (konatahi prabhav padat nahi) which translates to "fails to make any impact," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे दिग्दर्शकाला नेमके काय सांगायचे आहे ते अनुत्तरितच राहते
translated_text: So what exactly the director wants to say remains unanswered.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "अनुत्तरितच राहते" (anuttaritach rahate), meaning "remains unanswered," which indicates a lack of resolution and hence, a negative outcome.

Text: ‘शेरनी’ची कथाच एवढी ‘ट्रॅजेडी’वाली आहे की त्यात अॅक्शन श्वास रोखणारी दृश्यं समाविष्ट करता आली असती
translated_text: The story of 'Sherni' is so tragic that it could have included breathtaking action scenes.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes sadness due to the Marathi word "ट्रॅजेडी" (tragedy) used directly in the sentence.

Text: त्या संपूर्ण प्रकरणामागे नक्की कोण होतं त्याची राजकीय बाजू काय होती या वादग्रस्त मुद्द्यांपासून लेखकदिग्दर्शक जाणीवपूर्वक लांब राहिला असं वाटतं
translated_text: It seems that the writer-director deliberately stayed away from the controversial issues of who exactly was behind the whole affair and what was its political side.
Justification: "वादग्रस्त मुद्द्यांपासून लांब राहिला" (stayed away from controversial issues) indicates a negative sentiment as it implies avoidance of something problematic.

Text: दिल बेचारा हा सिनेमा कथारूपी एका प्रेम कहाणीची शोकांतिका आहे
translated_text: The movie Dil Bechara is a tragic love story in the form of a story.
Justification: "शोकांतिका" (shokantika), meaning "tragedy," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: जगदीशची आई, असहाय्य आणि तणावग्रस्त, तिच्या मुलाने सुरक्षितपणे घरी आणल्यास बकऱ्याचा बळी देण्याची ऑफर देते.
translated_text: Jagdish's mother, helpless and stressed, offers to sacrifice a goat if her son brings her home safely.
Justification: The phrase "असहाय्य आणि तणावग्रस्त" (asahayya aani tanavagrast - helpless and stressed) indicates a negative sentiment due to the mother's distressed state.

Text: दोन्ही बत्रा दाम्पत्य मूळापासून हादरून जातात
translated_text: Both the Batra couple are shaken to the core.
Justification: The phrase "हादरून जातात" (hadarun jatat), meaning "shaken to the core," indicates a strong negative impact and is responsible for the negative sentiment and emotion of fear.

Text: या जोडप्याने आपली फसवणूक केल्याचे गावकऱ्यांना समजले आणि त्यांनी त्यांना मारहाण करण्यास सुरुवात केली
translated_text: The villagers realized that the couple had cheated them and started beating them up.
Justification: The phrase "फसवणूक केल्याचे" (fasavnuk kelyache), meaning "cheated," indicates a negative event leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: टक्कल पडणे हे अतिशय नैसर्गिक असले आजच्या जमान्यात काही प्रमाणात ते स्टाइल स्टेटमेंट असले तरीही त्याबद्दलचा न्यूनगंड अनेकांमध्ये असतो
translated_text: Although baldness is very natural and is somewhat of a style statement in today's world, many people still feel inferior about it.
Justification: "न्यूनगंड" (nyunagand) translates to "inferiority complex." This word carries a negative connotation, indicating a feeling of inadequacy or low self-esteem, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: पण भर पार्टीत त्याला समजतं की त्याचं हे परदेशात स्थानिक होण्याचं स्वप्न पूर्ण होणार नाही
translated_text: But at the party, he realizes that his dream of becoming a local in a foreign country will not come true.
Justification: The phrase "स्वप्न पूर्ण होणार नाही" (swapna purna honar nahi) which translates to "dream will not come true" indicates a negative sentiment due to the unrealized aspiration, leading to sadness.

Text: काही कारणास्तव संत्याला तुरुंगवास होतो
translated_text: For some reason, the saint ends up in prison.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "तुरुंगवास होतो" (turungvas hoto), which translates to "ends up in prison." This phrase strongly suggests a negative situation and misfortune, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: कमकुवत कथानककथेतील सर्व पात्रांना लेखकांनी कृत्रिम प्रयत्नांनी जोडले आहे
translated_text: Weak plot: All the characters in the story are connected by the authors with artificial efforts.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "कमकुवत" (kamkuvat), meaning "weak," which directly describes the plot as being of poor quality.

Text: जेव्हा चित्रपट सर्वात महत्वाचा असतो तेव्हा अक्षरशः नियंत्रण गमावतो
translated_text: The film literally loses control when it matters most.
Justification: The phrase "नियंत्रण गमावतो" (niyantran gamavto) meaning "loses control" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: जीवनातील आशा गमावलेल्या व्यक्तीला भूत सोडवण्याच्या कल्पनेचा अतिवापर केला गेला आहे.
translated_text: The idea of ​​exorcising a person who has lost hope in life has been overused.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the phrase "अतिवापर केला गेला आहे" (ativapar kela gela aahe), which translates to "has been overused." This indicates a strong disapproval and aversion to the concept being discussed.

Text: नातेवाईक नसल्यामुळे त्याच्या त्रासात भर पडते
translated_text: The lack of relatives adds to his suffering.
Justification: The phrase "त्रासात भर पडते" (trasat bhar padte), meaning "adds to his suffering," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांचे निधन मुंबई [तेव्हा मुंबई] येथे झाले.
translated_text: He died in Mumbai [then Mumbai].
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is sadness due to the word "निधन" (nidhan), which means "death". This word inherently expresses a negative event, leading to a negative sentiment and sadness.

Text: लहान वयात मृत्यूच्या धोक्याला सामोरे जाणाऱ्या सकारात्मक व्यक्तिरेखेबद्दलच्या कथांना प्रेक्षकांच्या हृदयाला भिडण्याचा प्रचंड वाव आहे.
translated_text: Stories about positive characters facing the threat of death at a young age have enormous potential to touch the hearts of audiences.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "मृत्यूच्या धोक्याला" (mrutyuchya dhokyala), which translates to "threat of death". This phrase introduces a negative element into the sentence, overriding the positive connotations of the character.

Text: सुमारे अडीच तासांच्या ‘अॅनाबेल सेतुपती’मध्ये तापसी मुख्य कथेत दोन तास राहते, परंतु कोणत्याही प्रकारे ती प्रेक्षकांना खुर्चीला खिळवून ठेवू शकत नाही
translated_text: In the nearly two and a half hour long 'Annabelle Sethupathi', Taapsee stays in the main story for two hours, but in no way can she keep the audience glued to their seats.
Justification: The phrase "प्रेक्षकांना खुर्चीला खिळवून ठेवू शकत नाही" (prekshakanna khurchila khilvun thevu shakat nahi - cannot keep the audience glued to their seats) indicates a negative sentiment, as it implies the film fails to engage or captivate the audience.

Text: पण काही गोष्टी अशा घडतात की सासरी तिच्या कामाबाबत समजतं आणि तिच्या नोकरी करण्याला विरोध होतो
translated_text: But some things happen that the mother-in-law understands her work and opposes her from doing her job.
Justification: The phrase "नोकरी करण्याला विरोध होतो" (nokri karanyala virodh hoto), meaning "opposed to doing the job," indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses disagreement and obstruction.

Text: हे सत्य असले तरी तो आताच्या परिस्थितीत भाबडा आशावादच
translated_text: Although this is true, it is a vain optimism in the current situation.
Justification: The phrase "भाबडा आशावादच" (bhabada aashavadach), meaning "vain optimism," indicates a negative sentiment due to the futility and impracticality implied by "भाबडा" (bhabada).

Text: परंतु पूर्वीच्या मोठ्या भावाला तिचा हा निर्णय मान्य नाही
translated_text: But her former elder brother does not accept her decision.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the phrase "मान्य नाही" (manya nahi), which means "does not accept."

Text: पण समायरा पूर्ण अनुभव म्हणून फारशी छाप पाडत नाही
translated_text: But Samaira doesn't impress much as a complete experience.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "फारशी छाप पाडत नाही" (pharshi chhap padat nahi), meaning "doesn't impress much," indicating a lack of positive impact.

Text: बल्ली चौधरी हा या दलित बस्तीचा गुंड आहे
translated_text: Balli Chaudhary is the goon of this Dalit basti
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "गुंड" (gund), which translates to "goon," indicating a negative characteristic and association.

Text: दुसरं म्हणजे रिशू तिच्या ‘टाइप’चा नसतो
translated_text: Secondly, Rishu is not her 'type'.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "नसतो" (nasato), which means "is not." This indicates a lack of compatibility and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: या चित्रपटातील कमकुवत कामगिरीमुळे त्याच्या पुढील प्रकल्पांसाठी साइन इन होण्याच्या शक्यतांमध्ये अडथळा निर्माण झाला असावा.
translated_text: The weak performance in this film may have hindered his chances of being signed for further projects.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "कमकुवत" (kamkuvat), meaning weak, indicating a negative quality in the film's performance.

Text: संवादांचा विचार करताना प्रवाहही गडबडतो
translated_text: The flow also gets disrupted when thinking about dialogues.
Justification: "गडबडतो" (gadbadto - gets disrupted/confused) indicates a negative disruption, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: यश कदम, ऐश्वर्याला रुची आवडते म्हणून आणि त्याच्या लहान वयाची भूमिका करणारा माणूस अभिनयासाठी धडपडतो
translated_text: Yash Kadam, Aishwarya loves Ruchi and the man who plays his younger self struggles to act
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "धडपडतो" (dhadpadto), meaning "struggles," which implies difficulty and lack of success in acting, thus a negative connotation.

Text: मात्र बऱ्याच ठिकाणी अतार्किक गोष्टीही करून ठेवल्या आहेत त्यामुळे कलाकृती चांगली झाली असली तरी काही कच्चे दुवे राहून गेलेत
translated_text: However, in many places, illogical things have also been done, so although the artwork is good, some raw links have been left behind.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "अतार्किक गोष्टीही करून ठेवल्या आहेत" (atarkik goshtihi karun thevlya ahet), meaning "illogical things have also been done". This implies a flaw or shortcoming, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटात बरेच प्रसंग लांबलचक असल्यामुळे एका ठराविक वेळेनंतर चित्रपट कंटाळवाणा होतो
translated_text: The film becomes boring after a certain time because many scenes in the film are long.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "कंटाळवाणा" (kantalwana), which means "boring."

Text: तस्करीच्या गैरमार्गातही तो स्वाभिमानाने वावरतो
translated_text: He behaves with self-respect even in the wrong path of smuggling.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "गैरमार्गात" (gairmargat), meaning "wrong path," which implies an illegal and morally questionable activity, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: पुण्यातील दांडेकर पुल परिसरात या चित्रपटाची पहिली गोष्ट तुमच्या लक्षात येते ती म्हणजे कोंदट घरे आणि अरुंद गल्ल्या.
translated_text: The first thing you notice about this film in the Dandekar Bridge area of ​​Pune is the cramped houses and narrow lanes.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "कोंदट घरे आणि अरुंद गल्ल्या" (kondat ghare aani arund gallya) which translates to "cramped houses and narrow lanes," conveying a sense of discomfort and confinement.

Text: एकूणच, घाटात सकारात्मकता आहे, पण कथानकाचा अभाव चित्रपटाचा प्रभाव आणि पोहोच मर्यादित करतो
translated_text: Overall, there is positivity in Ghat, but the lack of plot limits the film's impact and reach.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "अभाव" (abhav), meaning "lack," which indicates a deficiency in the plot, thus negatively impacting the film.

Text: पाँडिचेरी त्याच्या दोषांशिवाय नाही
translated_text: Pondicherry is not without its flaws.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "दोषांशिवाय नाही" (doshan shivay nahi), which translates to "not without flaws." This double negative implies the existence of flaws, thus expressing a negative sentiment.

Text: यापुढे पडद्यावर जे काही घडतं ते पाहून दिग्दर्शकाला नेमकं काय दाखवायचं आहे हेच कळत नाही
translated_text: From now on, it's hard to know what the director really wants to show by watching what happens on screen.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कळत नाही" (kalat nahi), meaning "not understood" or "can't comprehend," indicating a lack of clarity and understanding of the director's intentions.

Text: हडक्याची आई कॅन्सरने त्रस्त असल्याची माहिती मिळाली आहे
translated_text: It has been reported that Hadkya's mother is suffering from cancer.
Justification: The phrase "कॅन्सरने त्रस्त" (cancerne trast) which means "suffering from cancer" indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness due to the severity of the illness.

Text: वडिलांशी फारकत घ्यावी लागते
translated_text: I have to part ways with my father.
Justification: "फारकत घ्यावी लागते" (I have to part ways) implies a forced separation and loss, triggering sadness and a negative sentiment.

Text: मी तुम्हाला सावध केले पाहिजे की विकी तुम्हाला प्रभावित करण्यात निराश होण्याची किंवा अपयशी ठरण्याची शक्यता आहे.
translated_text: I must warn you that the wiki is likely to disappoint or fail to impress you.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "निराश होण्याची किंवा अपयशी ठरण्याची शक्यता आहे" (nirash honyachi kinva apayashi tharanyachi shakyata aahe), which translates to "likely to disappoint or fail," indicating a negative outcome.

Text: आणि आजच्या सोशल मीडियाच्या नेटवर्कयुक्त जमान्यात आपले रिलेशनशीप स्टेटस जाहीर करावे लागत असल्याने हा दबाव काहीसा अधिकच आहे
translated_text: And in today's social media-networked age, this pressure is even greater as we have to announce our relationship status.
Justification: The phrase "दबाव काहीसा अधिकच आहे" (dabaav kahisa adhikach ahe), meaning "the pressure is even greater," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे या अनुभवी कलाकारांचा योग्य वापर दिग्दर्शकाला करता आलेला नाही
translated_text: Therefore, the director was unable to make proper use of these experienced actors.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "योग्य वापर करता आलेला नाही" (yogya vapar karta aalela nahi), which translates to "unable to make proper use," indicating a deficiency or failure.

Text: दोघांचं आयुष्य यापूर्वी अनेक अडचणी आणि तणावातून गेलं असून माहीच्या पालकांचा दोघांच्या आंतरधर्मीय विवाहाला विरोध असतो
translated_text: The couple's lives have been filled with many difficulties and tensions, and Mahi's parents are opposed to their interfaith marriage.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अडचणी आणि तणावातून गेलं" (adchani aani tanavatun geln), meaning "filled with difficulties and tensions," and "विरोध असतो" (virodh asto) meaning "opposed," which indicates a negative situation and conflict.

Text: दोघी गोव्याला जाताना भेटतात, पण चुकीच्या पायाने सुरुवात करतात
translated_text: The two meet on their way to Goa, but start off on the wrong foot.
Justification: The phrase "चुकीच्या पायाने सुरुवात करतात" (chukichya payane suruvat kartat), meaning "start off on the wrong foot," indicates a negative beginning, thus the negative sentiment.

Text: पण एक चरित्रपट म्हणजे केवळ तो एकच प्रसंग पडद्यावर अधिकचा स्ट्रेच करणं चरित्रपटाला कमकुवत बनवतो
translated_text: But a biopic is just that one incident. Stretching it too much on screen makes the biopic weak.
Justification: "कमकुवत बनवतो" (kamkuvat banavto) which means "makes weak", indicates a negative sentiment because it implies a flaw or deficiency in the biopic.

Text: रॉ;मध्ये काम करणारा, कामामुळे आपल्या कुटुंबापासून दुरावलेला एक बाप उतारवयात मुलांच्या प्रेमाला मुकतो
translated_text: A father who works in RAW, separated from his family due to work, loses the love of his children in his later years.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "मुलांच्या प्रेमाला मुकतो" (mulanchya premala mukto), meaning "loses the love of his children," which evokes a sense of loss and sadness.

Text: असा समाजा जिथे आजही म्हणजे व्या शतकातही, जात आणि धर्माच्या बाबतीत एकमेकांविरुद्ध एक मोठा गट कार्यरत आहे
translated_text: A society where even today, in the 21st century, there is a large group working against each other on the basis of caste and religion.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "एकमेकांविरुद्ध एक मोठा गट कार्यरत आहे" (ekmekanviruddh ek motha gat karyarat aahe), meaning "a large group working against each other," highlighting conflict and division.

Text: लोकशाही व्यवस्था, सामाजिक व्यवस्था आणि आपली स्वत:च्या सोयीची व्यवस्था यात प्रत्येक जण इतका व्यवस्थित अडकला आहे की त्यातून बुद्धीच्या किंवा तर्काच्या आधारेही कोणी बाहेर पडायचा प्रयत्न केलाच तर तो इतरांच्या दृष्टीने वेडा ठरतो
translated_text: Everyone is so entangled in the democratic system, the social system, and the system of their own convenience that anyone who tries to get out of it, even on the basis of intelligence or logic, is considered crazy in the eyes of others.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वेडा ठरतो" (veda tharto), meaning "considered crazy," which expresses a negative consequence of deviating from the established systems.

Text: असे काही वेळा आहेत, विशेषत: दुसऱ्या सहामाहीत, जेव्हा कथा खेचते
translated_text: There are times, especially in the second half, when the story drags.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "खेचते" (khechate), meaning "drags," which implies a slow or tedious pace, leading to a negative perception of the story.

Text: ट्रेलरमध्ये जितकी उत्सुकता हा चित्रपट पाहण्याबद्दल असते तितकाच भ्रमनिरास चित्रपट पाहिल्यावर होतो
translated_text: The trailer is as much about the excitement of watching the film as the disappointment is when you actually watch it.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "भ्रमनिरास" (bhramniraas), meaning disillusionment or disappointment.

Text: कनिका ढिल्लनच्या कथेला न्याय देण्याचा दिग्दर्शक विनिल मॅथ्यूनं निश्चितच चांगला प्रयत्न केलाय पण ‘नको तिथं ते’च्या नादात पकड कुठंतरी ढिली पडल्याचं जाणवत राहतं
translated_text: Director Vinil Mathew has certainly tried his best to do justice to Kanika Dhillon's story, but the tone of 'Nako Titha Te' feels like it has lost its grip somewhere.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "नको तिथं ते" ("Nako Titha Te"), which translates to "unnecessary things" or "not where it should be," indicating a problem with the film's execution.

Text: हे फुगे आणि काही काळे तुला सुखदायक गाणी आहेत पण चित्रपटात स्थान नाही असे वाटते
translated_text: These bubbles and some black tea are soothing songs but they don't seem to have a place in the movie.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase " चित्रपटात स्थान नाही असे वाटते" (chitrapatat sthan nahi ase vaatte), which translates to "they don't seem to have a place in the movie." This indicates a lack of suitability or negativity towards the bubbles and tea in relation to the movie.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या दिवशी, हिरकणीला तिच्या प्रसूतीच्या फेऱ्या मारताना उशीर होतो आणि तिला किल्ल्यातून बाहेर पडण्यापूर्वी दरवाजे बंद होतात.
translated_text: On the day of Kojagiri Purnima, Hirkani is late in her delivery rounds and the gates close before she can leave the fort.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "उशीर होतो आणि तिला किल्ल्यातून बाहेर पडण्यापूर्वी दरवाजे बंद होतात" (ushir hoto aani tila killyatun baher padnyapurvi darwaje band hotat), which translates to "she is late and the gates close before she can leave the fort." This depicts a negative situation where Hirkani is trapped.

Text: तुम्ही पालक गमावले असल्यास किंवा आजारी व्यक्तीशी व्यवहार करत असल्यास गुडबाय हे पाहण सोपे नाही
translated_text: Saying goodbye isn't easy if you've lost a parent or are dealing with a sick person.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गुडबाय हे पाहण सोपे नाही" (goodbye he pahan sope nahi), which translates to "saying goodbye isn't easy," indicating a difficult and negative situation.

Text: किंबहुना मनुष्याचं नीतिहीन जगणं म्हणजे एकप्रकारचा मूल्यऱ्हासच आणि या मूल्यऱ्हासाचा शेवट केवळ आणि केवळ भयानकच असतो जो ‘डोंबिवली रिटर्न’मधील अनंत वेलणकरचा होतो
translated_text: In fact, a person's immoral life is a kind of degradation, and the end of this degradation is only and only terrible, which is what happens to Anant Velankar in 'Dombivli Return'.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "मूल्यऱ्हास" (mulyahrhas), which translates to "degradation" or "erosion of values," and the word "भयानक" (bhayanak) meaning "terrible" or "horrific," painting a picture of moral decay and its dreadful consequences.

Text: कथनाची नॉन-लिनियर शैली प्रेक्षकांना कंटाळवाण्यापासून वाचवत नाही
translated_text: The non-linear style of narration does not save the audience from boredom
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "कंटाळवाण्यापासून" (kantaalvanyapasun), which translates to "from boredom," indicating a negative experience.

Text: तिला थोड्याशा दक्षिण भारतीय उच्चाराने मराठी बोलावे लागते, जे खोटे दिसते.
translated_text: She has to speak Marathi with a slight South Indian accent, which sounds fake.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "खोटे दिसते" (khote diste), meaning "sounds fake," expresses a negative opinion about her speech.

Text: एकच मनोरंजक किंवा किमान नम्र गाणे नसणेही चित्रपटाला खटकते
translated_text: The lack of a single interesting or at least humble song also hurts the film.
Justification: "खटकते" (khatakte), meaning "hurts" or "bothers," indicates a negative impact, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: विविध घटकांमधील समलैंगिक प्रश्न आणि त्यांच्या अडचणीदेखील तो आपल्याला सांगतो
translated_text: He also tells us about the homosexual issues and their difficulties in various aspects.
Justification: The phrase "अडचणीदेखील" (adchanidekhil - difficulties also) indicates a negative sentiment as it highlights the problems associated with the topic.

Text: अर्जुनही या हल्ल्यात जबर जखमी होतो
translated_text: Arjun also gets seriously injured in this attack.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "जबर जखमी होतो" (jabar jakhmi hoto), meaning "seriously injured," which indicates a negative event.

Text: या सिरीजचं संगीत, पार्श्वसंगीत जेमतेमच आहे
translated_text: The music and background music of this series are just okay.
Justification: "जेमतेमच" (jemtemach), meaning "just okay" or "mediocre," indicates a negative sentiment because it expresses a lack of enthusiasm or quality. The neutral emotion stems from the lack of expressive emotional cues in the sentence; it's a flat statement of fact.

Text: त्याचे वडील राहिले नाहीत
translated_text: His father is gone.
Justification: The phrase "राहिले नाहीत" (rahile nahit), meaning "is gone" or "passed away," indicates loss and is a euphemistic way of saying someone has died, thus eliciting a negative sentiment and the emotion of sadness.

Text: तो कोणत्या कालावधीत सेट आहे याची आम्हाला खात्री नसते
translated_text: We're not sure what time period it's set in.
Justification: "खात्री नसते" (khatri nasate) expresses uncertainty, indicating a lack of confidence or surety, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: पण त्यातील दुसरा अर्धा भाग डॅनी आणि निला यांच्यातील लबाडीच्या प्रेमकथेची काळजी घेणे कठिण होते
translated_text: But the other half of it was hard to care about the twisted love story between Danny and Nila.
Justification: "कठिण होते" (kathin hote) which translates to "hard" or "difficult" expresses a negative sentiment towards caring about the love story.

Text: त्यासाठी धाकदपटशा दाखवणे आणि भयाच्या सावलीत कोंडण्याचा मार्ग अवलंबला जातो
translated_text: For this, the method of showing intimidation and cowering in the shadow of fear is adopted.
Justification: The phrase "धाकदपटशा दाखवणे" (dhakdapatsha dakhavne - showing intimidation) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण तिच्या व्यक्तिचित्रणातील उपरोक्त दोष तिच्या अभिनयाला हानी पोहोचवतो
translated_text: But the aforementioned flaw in her characterization hurts her performance.
Justification: "हानी पोहोचवतो" (hani pohchavto) translates to "hurts" or "damages," indicating a negative impact, thus the negative sentiment.

Text: मग गुरुजी कितीही पॉवरफुल असले तरी कुठलाही पुढचा मागचा विचार न करता एका चॅनलमधील वरिष्ठ माहिला पत्रकाराला थेट गोळी घालतो, हे अजिबात मनाला पटणारं नाही
translated_text: So, no matter how powerful a Guruji is, he would shoot a senior female journalist from a channel without any thought. It is not at all acceptable.
Justification: "अजिबात मनाला पटणारं नाही" (Ajibat manala patnara nahi - "not at all acceptable") expresses strong disapproval and rejection of the act, directly contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र एकूणच सिनेमाच्या गोष्टीत फारसा दम नसल्याने ‘खाली पीली’चा प्रभाव मर्यादित राहतो
translated_text: However, the overall impact of 'Khaali Peeli' remains limited as the film lacks much substance.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फारसा दम नसल्याने" (pharasa dam nasalyane), meaning "lacking much substance," which indicates a weakness or deficiency in the film's story.

Text: पण ढिसाळ पटकथा आणि संकलनात सिनेमाचा मनोरा डगमगतो
translated_text: But the tower of the cinema is shaken by the weak script and editing.
Justification: The word "डगमगतो" (dagmagato), meaning "shaken" or "staggering," indicates a sense of instability and potential collapse, thus contributing to the negative sentiment and conveying the emotion of fear regarding the film's quality.

Text: एकमेकांप्रती पूर्ण निष्ठा असलेले एकमेकांवर विश्वास ठेवणारे किंबहुना आयुष्यात घडलेली लहानातली लहान ते मोठ्यातली मोठी गोष्ट एकमेकांना खुलेपणानं सांगणारे किती नवराबायको असतील यावर कदाचित मतांतर होईल
translated_text: There may be disagreements about how many husbands and wives are completely loyal to each other, trust each other, and even openly tell each other everything that happens in their lives, from the smallest to the biggest.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "मतांतर होईल" (matantar hoil), meaning "there will be disagreements." This suggests a potential for conflict or disagreement, indicating a negative undertone, even within a context that might otherwise be positive. The emotion is neutral because this disagreement is being stated as a fact and there are no explicitly negative emotional words in the sentence.

Text: यामुळे तिची एका वाईट कैदी रघु (उमेश जगताप) आणि त्याच्या तुरुंगातील मित्रांसोबत टक्कर होते.
translated_text: This brings her into conflict with a bad inmate, Raghu (Umesh Jagtap), and his prison buddies.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "वाईट" (vaait), which translates to "bad." While the sentence describes a conflict, it's the description of Raghu as a "bad inmate" that introduces the negativity.

Text: परिणामी पात्र घटना प्रसंग यांच्या एकजीव मांडणीतून सिनेमा उलगडत जातो आणि प्रेक्षकांच्या मनाचा कब्जा घेतो तसा हा सिनेमा घेत नाही
translated_text: As a result, the film unfolds through a cohesive arrangement of characters, events, and scenes, and captures the audience's attention in a way that this film does not.
Justification: The phrase "घेतो तसा हा सिनेमा घेत नाही" (gheto tasa ha cinema ghet nahi) indicates a lack of capturing the audience's attention, directly implying a negative sentiment. The "घेत नाही" (ghet nahi) specifies the absence of positive engagement.

Text: सिमी (स्टुडंट्स इस्लामिक मूव्हमेंट ऑफ इंडिया) चा कार्यकर्ता म्हणून पाहिल्यास, त्याला मारहाण केली जाते, आणि क्रूरपणे छळ केला जातो आणि त्याच्या कुटुंबाचा तीव्र मानसिक छळ केला जातो.
translated_text: As a SIMI (Students Islamic Movement of India) activist, he is beaten up, brutally tortured and his family is subjected to severe psychological torture.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "क्रूरपणे छळ केला जातो" (krurpane chhal kela jato), meaning "brutally tortured," which evokes strong feelings of disgust.

Text: उघड्या डोळ्यांनी त्यांची नैतिक आणि अनैतिक बाजू आपल्या दृष्टीक्षेपात पडत नाही
translated_text: Their moral and immoral side is not visible to the naked eye.
Justification: "अनैतिक" (anaetik - immoral) indicates a negative aspect of the subject, contributing to the negative sentiment. The presence of immorality evokes disgust.

Text: तिच्या पात्राला फारंच कमी वाव दिला गेला आहे
translated_text: Her character has been given very little scope.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "फारंच कमी वाव दिला गेला आहे" (pharanach kami vaav dila gela aahe), which translates to "very little scope has been given," indicating a lack or deficiency.

Text: या अशा परिस्थिती बुंदेलखंडमध्ये अशा काही घटना घडतात ज्यांच्या जखमा पंचवीस वर्षांनंतर ही ओल्या आहेत
translated_text: In such a situation, some incidents happen in Bundelkhand whose wounds are still fresh after twenty-five years.
Justification: "जखमा पंचवीस वर्षांनंतर ही ओल्या आहेत" (wounds are still fresh after twenty-five years) indicates a lingering negative impact, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: शिवाय, सिनेमात अश्याचं आपल्या आईबरोबरचं नातं खोलवर दाखवायला हवं होतं
translated_text: Moreover, the film should have shown the deep relationship between Ajay and his mother.
Justification: "हवं होतं" (havn hotn) expresses a sense of regret or wishing something was different, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: तो एका अलिप्त आणि उदासीन व्यक्तीच्या वर्तनाला मूर्त रूप देण्यास व्यवस्थापित करतो, परंतु त्या संदर्भात पूर्ण होण्यास तो कमी पडतो.
translated_text: He manages to embody the behavior of an aloof and indifferent person, but falls short of fulfillment in that regard.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "कमी पडतो" (kami padto), which translates to "falls short." This phrase indicates a lack or deficiency, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: झारी नेहमीच त्याला कोणत्या ना कोणत्या मार्गाने टाळते
translated_text: Zari always avoids him in some way or the other.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "टाळते" (taalte), which means "avoids". This indicates an undesirable action or behavior, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: अचानक त्याचं मन कसं बदलतं हे सांगणारी ठोस घटना घडत नाही
translated_text: There is no concrete incident that shows how he suddenly changes his mind.
Justification: The phrase "अचानक बदलतं" (achanak badalte) suggests a sudden, unexplained change, contributing to a negative sentiment (-1) as it implies instability or unpredictability, even if delivered in a neutral emotion.

Text: समर्थक कलाकारांना चित्रपटात काहीही करण्यासारखे काही नाही
translated_text: Supporting actors have nothing to do in the film.
Justification: "काहीही करण्यासारखे काही नाही" (kahīhī karaṇyāsārakhe kahī nāhī) which translates to "nothing to do," expresses a lack of purpose or agency, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: मुळात फार कमीजणांना माहित असणं ही एक शोकांतिकाच आहे
translated_text: It's a tragedy that so few people actually know.
Justification: The phrase "शोकांतिकाच आहे" (shokantikach aahe), meaning "it's a tragedy," directly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: एकदा तुम्ही विशिष्ट वय ओलांडले की, जुळणी मिळणे अवघड असते
translated_text: Once you pass a certain age, it's harder to find a match.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अवघड असते" (avghad aste), which translates to "difficult is" or "harder is," indicating a challenge or negative outcome.

Text: वाय हा सिनेमा तुमचं कितपत मनोरंजन करेल हे सांगता येणार नाही
translated_text: You can't tell how much this movie will entertain you.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "सांगता येणार नाही" (sangata yenar nahi), meaning "cannot say," implying uncertainty and a lack of confidence in the movie's entertainment value, despite the potential for joy indicated by "मनोरंजन" (manoranjan - entertainment). The negative sentiment stems from the inability to guarantee a positive experience.

Text: त्यामुळे नंदिनीसोबत नुपूरचं अजिबात पटत नाही
translated_text: That's why Nupur doesn't get along with Nandini at all.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "अजिबात पटत नाही" (ajibat patat nahi), which translates to "doesn't get along at all" and implies a complete lack of compatibility.

Text: - एक माणूस स्वत: ला आग लावतो
translated_text: - A man sets himself on fire.
Justification: The phrase "आग लावतो" (aag lavto), meaning "sets on fire," evokes strong disgust due to the act of self-harm, clearly indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: एवढं सगळं उत्तम असूनही हा सिनेमा चुकल्यासारखा वाटतो
translated_text: Despite all the great things, this movie feels like a failure.
Justification: The word "चुकल्यासारखा" (chuklyasarkha), meaning "like a failure" or "feels wrong," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: रणवीर सिंग एका भ्रष्ट पोलिस अधिका-याच्या भूमिकेत आहे
translated_text: Ranveer Singh plays a corrupt police officer.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because the word "भ्रष्ट" (bhrasht) means "corrupt," which carries a negative connotation.

Text: परंतु सर्वसामान्य प्रेक्षकांना सिनेमा कंटाळवाणादेखील वाटू शकतो
translated_text: But the general audience may also find the movie boring.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळवाणा" (kantālvaṇā), meaning "boring," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे चित्रपट आपल्या कथेला योग्य गतीने पुढे नेण्यात अपयशी ठरत आहे
translated_text: This means the film is failing to move its story forward at the right pace.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "अपयशी ठरत आहे" (apayashi tharat aahe), meaning "failing".

Text: कॉमेडी ज्याने काही उल्लेखनीय नावे दिली आहेत तो त्याच्या मिनिट रनटाइममध्ये नेत्रदीपक फॅशनमध्ये क्रॅश आणि बर्न करण्यास व्यवस्थापित करतो
translated_text: The comedy that has given rise to some notable names manages to crash and burn in spectacular fashion throughout its minute runtime.
Justification: The phrase "क्रॅश आणि बर्न" (crash and burn) indicates a failure, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: तथापि, मुलगा शेतीकडे आकर्षित झाला आहे आणि शोध मार्गाचे अनुसरण करण्यासाठी त्याच्या इच्छुकतेमुळे दोघांना वेगळे केले जाते
translated_text: However, the boy is drawn to farming and his willingness to follow a path of discovery drives the two apart.
Justification: "वेगळे केले जाते" (vegaLe kele jaate) meaning "drives apart" indicates separation and a negative consequence, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: इशान, कतरिना आणि सिद्धांत यांच्या भूतबाधा त्रिकूटात ऊर्जा आणि केमिस्ट्रीचा अभाव आहे.
translated_text: The ghost-ridden trio of Ishaan, Katrina and Siddhant lacks energy and chemistry.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "ऊर्जा आणि केमिस्ट्रीचा अभाव आहे" (urja aani chemistry cha abhav aahe), which translates to "lacks energy and chemistry". This indicates a deficiency and hence a negative sentiment.

Text: पण त्यात काही ठिकाणी व्हिएफएक्सच्या मर्यादादेखील नजरेस येतात
translated_text: But in some places, the limitations of VFX are also visible.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because of the phrase "मर्यादादेखील नजरेस येतात" (maryada dekheel najares yetat), which translates to "limitations are also visible," indicating a shortcoming or flaw.

Text: मध्यंतरीच्या काळात हिंदी रिमेक सिनेमे बॉक्स ऑफिसवर सपशेल आपटले तरीदेखील बॉलिवूडची रिमेकची फॅक्ट्री सुरूच आहे
translated_text: Even though Hindi remakes have been a huge hit at the box office in the interim, Bollywood's remake factory continues.
Justification: "सपशेल आपटले" (sapashel aapatle) which means "completely failed/hit badly" indicates a negative outcome for Hindi remake movies, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: सर्व सुरळीत सुरु असताना समीरच्या घरच्यांकडून अचानक लग्नाला विरोध दर्शवला जातो
translated_text: While everything is going smoothly, Sameer's family suddenly opposes the marriage.
Justification: "विरोध दर्शवला जातो" (virodh darshavala jato - opposes) indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses opposition to the marriage.

Text: तिला डॉ. पुरुषोत्तम हॉस्पिटल माशांचे वाटते पण ती काहीही सिद्ध करू शकत नाही
translated_text: She thinks Dr. Purushottam Hospital belongs to fish but she can't prove anything.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "माशांचे वाटते" (māśān̄ce vāṭate), which literally translates to "feels like it belongs to fish," implying a bizarre and negative association, thus expressing negativity, even if delivered neutrally.

Text: त्याची प्रतिष्ठा असूनही, तो त्याच्या क्रूर आणि दुर्लक्षित वर्तनासाठी कुप्रसिद्ध आहे.
translated_text: Despite his reputation, he is notorious for his cruel and neglectful behavior.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "क्रूर" (krur), meaning cruel, which evokes disgust due to its association with harmful and unethical behavior.

Text: रानीचं पाऊल वाकडं पडतं
translated_text: The queen's step is crooked.
Justification: "वाकडं पडतं" (vakada padata) implies a mistake or misstep, leading to a negative sentiment (-1) despite a neutral emotion.

Text: परिणाम म्हणजे फक्त गंभीर अपमान नाही तर दुखापत आणि रुग्णालयात मुक्काम देखील आहे
translated_text: The result is not only serious humiliation, but also injuries and hospital stays.
Justification: "अपमान" (apamaan), meaning "humiliation," carries a negative connotation, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: भाईंच्या बाबतीत इतर लोक किती महान होते हे दाखवण्याचा अट्टाहास आहे की हा चरित्रनायक वाटतो तितका मोठा नाही हे दाखवण्याचा प्रयत्न आहे हे समजत नाही
translated_text: I don't understand whether this is an attempt to show how great other people were in the case of Bhai or an attempt to show that this character is not as great as he seems.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "समजत नाही" (samajat nahi), meaning "I don't understand," indicating confusion and uncertainty, which contributes to a negative overall impression. While neutral emotion is marked, the confusion itself has a negative affect.

Text: त्यामुळे सिनेमाच्या कथानकाबाबत आणि त्यातील घटनांबाबत प्रेक्षकांच्या मनात शंकेची पाल चुकचुकू शकते
translated_text: Therefore, doubts may arise in the minds of the audience regarding the plot of the film and the events within it.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "शंकेची पाल चुकचुकू शकते" (shankechi paal chukchuku shakate), which idiomatically means "doubts may arise" or "suspicion may be created." This indicates uncertainty and a negative feeling towards the film's plot.

Text: एका रात्री, कामावरून घरी जात असताना, सरिताचे अपहरण करणार्यांच्या एका गटाने केले आणि तिच्यावर सामूहिक बलात्कार केला आणि नंतर तिला फेकून दिले.
translated_text: One night, while walking home from work, Sarita was kidnapped by a group of men, gang-raped, and then dumped.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "सामूहिक बलात्कार केला" (samuhik balatkar kela), which translates to "gang-raped," a profoundly negative act. The word "अपहरण" (apharan) - kidnapping also contributes to the negativity and fear.

Text: तो आणि त्याचा व्यवसाय वाढवण्यासाठीच्या त्याच्या क्लृप्त्या त्याच्यावरच उलटतात
translated_text: He and his schemes to grow his business backfire on him.
Justification: "उलटतात" (ulatatat) indicates that the schemes backfire, causing a negative outcome, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: असे दिसते की अभिनेते आणि दिग्दर्शकांना स्क्रिप्टचे महत्त्वाचे तपशील लक्षात ठेवण्यात समस्या येत होत्या.
translated_text: It seems that the actors and directors were having trouble remembering important details of the script.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "समस्या येत होत्या" (samasya yet hotya), which translates to "were having trouble" or "were facing problems," indicating a negative situation.

Text: पटकथेतही ती यायला हवी होती
translated_text: She should have been in the script too.
Justification: "हवी होती" (havi hoti), meaning "should have been," expresses a sense of regret or a missed opportunity, leading to a negative sentiment. While seemingly neutral, it indicates something desired was absent.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री वसंतराव नाईक मोरारजी देसाई आणि इंदिरा गांधी यांना पाहणे गमतीचे असले तरी ते बेगडी वाटतात
translated_text: Chief Minister Vasantrao Naik Morarji Desai and Indira Gandhi are funny to watch, but they seem like idiots.
Justification: The phrase "बेगडी वाटतात" (begadi vatatat), meaning "they seem like idiots," contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: अॅनास्प्योर एक सभ्य अभिनय देते परंतु प्रेक्षकांनी त्याच्याशी कोणताही संबंध जोडण्यासाठी हा चित्रपट बर्याचदा जोरात आणि टोन कर्णबधिर असतो
translated_text: Anaspure gives a decent performance but the film is often too loud and tone deaf for the audience to make any connection with it.
Justification: The phrase "जोरात आणि टोन कर्णबधिर असतो" (loud and tone deaf) indicates a negative aspect of the film, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: असे बरेच मुद्दे आहेत जिथे तुम्हाला वाटते की चित्रपट संपेल, परंतु तो पुढे चालू ठेवतो
translated_text: There are many points where you think the movie will end, but it keeps going.
Justification: The sentence receives a negative sentiment (-1) primarily due to the phrase "असे बरेच मुद्दे आहेत जिथे तुम्हाला वाटते की चित्रपट संपेल, परंतु तो पुढे चालू ठेवतो" (ase barech mudde aahet jithe tumhala vaatate ki chitrapat sampel, parantu to pudhe chalu thevato), which suggests a drawn-out or unnecessarily prolonged movie experience, contributing to a negative impression.

Text: प्रणाली घोगरेकडे अभिनय कौशल्य आहे, पण तिची भूमिका घाबरणे किंवा दुःखी होणे एवढीच मर्यादित आहे.
translated_text: Prasanna Ghogre has acting skills, but her role is limited to being scared or sad.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "घाबरणे किंवा दुःखी होणे एवढीच मर्यादित आहे" (ghabarne kinvaa dukhi hone evadhiich maryadit aahe), meaning "limited to being scared or sad," which indicates a restriction and lack of range in the acting, thus contributing to a negative overall impression.

Text: तथापि तिचा जीवनपट रुपेरी पडद्यावर साकारताना ही निश्चयी मुलगी कुठेतरी हरवून जाते आणि हाती येते ते दाढी वाढविलेले आणि सतत बंदुकांतून फटाक्यांप्रमाणे गोळ्या घालणाऱ्या दहशतवाद्यांचे जत्थे पाकिस्तानमधील राजकारणी आणि लष्कराचे बाळबोध चित्रण आणि सव्वादोन तासांचा कंटाळवाणा घटनाक्रम
translated_text: However, while portraying her life story on the silver screen, this determined girl gets lost somewhere and what comes to mind is a bunch of terrorists with beards and constantly firing guns like fireworks, a childish portrayal of Pakistani politicians and the military, and a boring two and a half hour long sequence of events.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कंटाळवाणा घटनाक्रम" (kantalvana ghatnakram), meaning "boring sequence of events," which expresses a negative evaluation of the film's narrative.

Text: चित्रपटाच्या शेवटी येणारी कव्वाली मात्र, उगाच घुसवल्यासारखी वाटते
translated_text: The qawwali at the end of the film, however, feels like it was inserted unnecessarily.
Justification: "उगाच घुसवल्यासारखी वाटते" (ugaach ghusavalyasarkhi vaatate) indicates that the qawwali feels unnecessarily inserted, leading to a negative sentiment as it suggests a flaw in the film's construction.

Text: तू ज्याच्याशी लग्न करतोस त्याच्याशी का पळून जाशील? वाईट म्हणजे ही बातमी पसरल्यावर त्या जोडप्याच्या पालकांना प्रश्न पडू लागतो की ते का गेले असावेत
translated_text: Why would you run away with the person you're marrying? Worse, when the news spreads, the couple's parents start to wonder why they left.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "वाईट" (waiit), meaning "worse," indicating a negative escalation of the situation.

Text: खरं तर, लेखकाला चित्रपटातून प्रेक्षकांपर्यंत नेमके काय सांगायचे आहे याबद्दल संभ्रमात पडलेले दिसते.
translated_text: In fact, the writer seems confused about what exactly he wants to convey to the audience through the film.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "संभ्रमात" (sambhramat), which translates to "confused" or "in a state of confusion," indicating a lack of clarity and a negative aspect in the writer's perception.

Text: चित्रपटातील गाणी प्रसंगाला अनुसरुन नाहीत, असंच वाटू लागतं
translated_text: It seems like the songs in the film don't fit the occasion.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "अनुसरुन नाहीत" (anusrurun nahit), meaning "do not fit" or "not appropriate," indicating a lack of alignment and thus a negative evaluation of the songs.

Text: जगाचा भार खांद्यावर वाहणार्या माणसाकडून तुम्ही आणखी काय अपेक्षा कराल?सामान्यतः उद्धट असला तरी, श्रीपती आपल्या मुलींच्या चप्पलमधून काटा काढताना एक दुर्मिळ प्रेमळ बाजू दाखवतो.
translated_text: What more would you expect from a man who carries the weight of the world on his shoulders? Although usually rude, Shripati shows a rare affectionate side as he pulls a fork out of his daughters' slippers.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "उद्धट" (uddhata), which translates to "rude" or "arrogant" in English. This word creates a negative association with the character being described.

Text: स्वप्निलच्या तोंडी असलेले बालभारतीचे संवादही त्यामुळे फिके पडतात
translated_text: Even the dialogues of Balbharti in Swapnil's mouth fade away because of this.
Justification: The phrase "फिके पडतात" (phike padtat) meaning "fade away" or "become dull/pale" indicates a negative sentiment because it suggests a decline in quality or impact.

Text: ते कसे दिसतात हेही कोणाला माहिती नसते
translated_text: No one even knows what they look like.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of knowledge or familiarity, creating a neutral negative sentiment. The phrase "माहिती नसते" (mahiti naste) meaning "do not know" or "no idea" contributes to the negative sentiment, suggesting something is missing or unknown, but without strong emotion.

Text: या गोष्टीत पुढं काय होणार अशी उत्सुकता अजिबातच वाटत नसल्यामुळे चित्रपटातला ‘सरप्राइज इलिमेंट’ काहीसा संपून जातो आणि सुरू होतो फक्त आणि फक्त ‘मेलोड्रामा’
translated_text: Since there is no curiosity at all about what will happen next in this story, the 'surprise element' in the film is somewhat over and only 'melodrama' begins.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "उत्सुकता अजिबातच वाटत नसल्यामुळे" (utsukata ajibatach vaatat naslyamule), meaning "since there is no curiosity at all," which indicates a lack of engagement and anticipation, contributing to a negative feeling about the film.

Text: चित्रपटाचं कथानक जरी इंटरेस्टिंग वाटत असलं तरी दिग्दर्शक जालिंदर कुंभार यांना हे कथानक फुलवण्यात अपयश आलं आहे
translated_text: Although the plot of the film seems interesting, director Jalinder Kumbhar has failed to flesh out the plot.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the phrase "अपयश आलं आहे" (apayašh aal̇ā aahe), which means "has failed."

Text: कांबळेचा झिपर्या, त्याच्या टोळीतील इतर सदस्यांप्रमाणे त्याच्या भूमिकेत खोलवर आणण्यात अपयशी ठरला.
translated_text: Kamble's zipper, like other members of his gang, failed to bring depth to his role.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अपयशी ठरला" (apayshi tharala), meaning "failed," indicating a lack of success or a negative outcome.

Text: विठ्ठला शप्पथ योग्य कथा, पटकथा, संवाद, तर्कशास्त्र, सादरीकरण किंवा सभ्य सामग्रीशी संबंधित कोणत्याही गोष्टीकडे पूर्णपणे दुर्लक्ष दर्शवितो..
translated_text: Vitthal Shapath shows a complete disregard for proper story, screenplay, dialogue, logic, presentation or anything related to decent content.
Justification: "पूर्णपणे दुर्लक्ष दर्शवितो" (shows a complete disregard) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे संकलनाच्या बाबतीत दिग्दर्शकीय पकड निसटलेली जाणवते
translated_text: Therefore, the director's grip on the editing feels lost.
Justification: "निसटलेली जाणवते" (nisataleli janavate - feels lost) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a lack of control or a failing in the directorial aspect.

Text: पटकथा चुकीची आहे हे समजायला तुम्हाला वेळ लागत नाही
translated_text: It doesn't take you long to realize that the script is wrong.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the word "चुकीची" (chukichi), meaning "wrong" or "incorrect," which directly describes the script.

Text: परंतु दिग्दर्शनातील कमतरतेमुळे त्यांना भूमिकेचा योग्य परिणाम साधता आलेला नाही
translated_text: But due to the lack of direction, he was unable to achieve the right effect of the role.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "कमतरतेमुळे" (kamtaratemule), which translates to "due to the lack of" or "due to the deficiency of." This indicates a negative aspect or flaw, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: बँकेचे कर्ज फेडू न शकल्याने त्याच्या वडिलांनी वर्षभरापूर्वी आत्महत्या केली
translated_text: His father committed suicide a year ago after being unable to repay a bank loan.
Justification: The phrase "आत्महत्या केली" (aatmahatya keli), meaning committed suicide, indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: त्यामुळे आई- मुलीच्या नात्यात असलेली सहजता या चित्रपटात पाहायला मिळत नाहीये
translated_text: Therefore, the ease in the mother-daughter relationship is not seen in this film.
